name: Ses01F_script02_2_M000
chinese: 看这个，我胳膊上的所有毛都竖起来了。
english: Look at this, all of the hairs are standing up on my arm.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F000
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，那么，你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so, what do you think?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F001
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M002
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情。
english: About what I was saying.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F002
chinese: 我认为这太荒谬了。
english: I think it's ridiculous.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M003
chinese: 这绝对不是。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F003
chinese: 这是公关！有人向你兜售了一堆胡言乱语，说今晚海滩上会发生一件奇妙的事情。
english: It's PR! Somebody sold you a bunch of crap that there is this wonderful thing that is going to happen tonight on the beach.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M004
chinese: 不仅仅是我，看看这些人。
english: Not just me, look at all of these people.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F004
chinese: 每个人都听到了同样的故事。它让我们不断回来，让我们兴奋。我们一直认为，只要我们能找到合适的位置，参与其中，生活就会在任何时刻开始。
english: Everybody's told the same story.  It keeps us coming back for more, it keeps us excited.  We keep thinking that life is going start at any minute if we can just find the right spot, get in on the action.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M005
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing, here?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F005
chinese: 对不起，对我来说只是鱼而已。
english: I'm sorry, it's just fish to me.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M006
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？现在，不要误解我的意思，但是你现在是不是在经期？
english: Carla, can I ask you something?  Now, don't take this the wrong way, but are you on your period?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F006
chinese: 不要问我那个。当你问我那个时，我讨厌它，你总是问我那个。这是侮辱性的。
english: Don't ask me that.  I hate it when you ask me that, you always ask me that.  It's insulting.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M007
chinese: 那么，有什么困扰你的吗？
english: Well then, what's bugging you?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F007
chinese: 我们只是对这个夜晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: We just have different ideas of what this night is supposed to look like.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M008
chinese: 没有什么了不起的；我们来到这里，鱼就来了，它们扑腾着，做它们的鱼事。我们发出哦哇的声音，看着鱼，然后回家。
english: There is nothing to it; we come down here, the fish arrive, they flop around, they do their fish thing.  We go ooh, ah, look at the fish and we go home.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F008
chinese: 为了上帝-长大吧，奥吉。鱼不会到达的。
english: For God- Grow up, Augie.  The fish are not going to arrive.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M009
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F009
chinese: 因为他们从来不这样做。他们有吗...他们有吗？
english: Because they never do.  Have they...Have they ever?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M010
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次。
english: We've missed them twice.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F010
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候；那就是永远。
english: Twice is every time we have tried; that's ever.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M011
chinese: 他们这次会出现。
english: They'll show up this time.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F011
chinese: 不，他们不会。这就像等待圣诞老人一样。
english: No they won't.  It's like waiting for Santa Claus.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F012
chinese: 我觉得我整个生命都将花在这个海滩上，眼睛睁得大大的，双手紧紧地握在一起，期待着鱼儿的出现。但是鱼儿从未出现过。
english: I feel like my whole life is going to be spent standing on this beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasped expectantly waiting for fish to show up.  And the fish never show up.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M012
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F013
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I am saying.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M013
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No. Of course not.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F014
chinese: 我确实想看它，我仍然想看，我总是想看。我只是...
english: I did want to see it, I still do, I always do.  I just...

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F015
chinese: 我觉得我总是站在这里等待。我觉得今晚会是那个晚上，但实际上从来都不是。
english: I feel like I'm always just standing here waiting.  I feel like this night is going to be the night, but it never is.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M014
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，没有什么需要受到创伤的。
english: It's just fish, it's nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F016
chinese: 求求你，这不是关于鱼的事。
english: For God's sake, this is not about fish.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M015
chinese: 好的。我正在尝试逆向思考，找出我们在这里走向最糟糕的那一刻。
english: Okay.  I'm trying to work this backwards and pinpoint the exact moment where we took a turn for the worst here.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M016
chinese: 好的。所以在玛吉打来电话的时候你还好，晚餐也还好。洗碗也还好，然后我要去洗澡，你在看新闻，你说今晚有鱼群出现，你想去吗？我说，当然好啊，我们去吧。
english: Okay.  So you were fine during that phone call from Marge and then dinner was okay.  And doing the dishes was fine and then I was going to take a shower and you're watching the news and you said the grunions are running tonight, do you want to go?  And I said, sure great, let's go.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M017
chinese: 好的。所以我要把宠物放出来，把车开出车库。
english: Okay.  So I am putting out the pets, getting the car out of the garage.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F017
chinese: 你还记得我们第一年来这里吗？那是我们结婚后大约四年的时候。
english: Do you remember the first year we came here?  It was like four years after we got married.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F018
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了，我们买了一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。我们脱掉鞋子，你让我跳舞。
english: We thought I was pregnant, we got a bottle of champagne, we had no glasses.  We took off our shoes and you asked me to dance.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F019
chinese: 你在我耳边轻声细语，说出了最甜蜜、最亲密的话语，让我不仅能听到，还能感受到它们。我记得当时我想，就是这样了。你知道，终于，我像应该快乐一样。
english: You whispered the sweetest, most intimate things to me right into my ear so I could feel them as much as hear them.  And I remember thinking, this is it.  You know, finally, I am as happy as I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M018
chinese: 等一下，我明白了。
english: Wait a minute, I got it.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F020
chinese: 喝着香槟直接从瓶子里，
english: Drinking champagne from the bottle,

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M019
chinese: 当我们开车经过那家纽约酒窖时，你说，我们买点香槟吧。我说不，时间浪费了或者类似的话。
english: It's when we were driving past that Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, you said, let's get some champagne.  I said no, time's a wasting or something like that.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F021
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞。
english: dancing barefoot in the sand.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M020
chinese: 这就是它吗？对吗？你希望这次像上次那样吗？
english: That's what it is?  Right?  You want this to be like the other time, right?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F022
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I'd rather not remember some things.  I'd rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M021
chinese: 当然。好的。好吧。
english: Sure.  All right.  Okay.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M022
chinese: 听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Listen, do you want to dance?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F023
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M023
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: Do you want me to go get some champagne?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F024
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M024
chinese: 你想脱掉鞋子吗？
english: Do you want to take off your shoes?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不，不。什么都没有。
english: No, no. Nothing.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M025
chinese: 然后呢？
english: Then what?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M026
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？
english: Do you want to get married again?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M027
chinese: 什么？什么？你想要离婚吗？
english: What?  What?  Do you want a divorce?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M028
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M029
chinese: 喜欢一块新地毯吗？一只贵宾犬？背部按摩？冰淇淋？自杀协议？你想要什么？你到底想要什么？
english: Like a new carpet?  A poodle?  A back rub?  Ice cream?  A suicide pact?  What do you want?  What the hell do you want?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F028
chinese: 我只是希望事情能够如我所预期的那样发展。
english: I just want something to turn out like I expected it to.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M030
chinese: 欢迎加入人类大家庭，嗯？你觉得我有没有一个宏大的幻想，认为四年后我们会来到这个海滩上争论鱼？不会的。
english: Well welcome to the human race, huh?  Do you think I had some grand fantasy going that four years down the line we would come to this beach and be arguing over fish?  No.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F029
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M031
chinese: 不，我就像你一样。我以为一切都会很美好，账单会自己付清。我们会有三个胖乎乎的红润脸颊的孩子。哼，宝贝，我们被愚弄了。因为你知道你会得到什么吗？
english: No I'm just like you.  I thought it was going to be all roses and peaches and the bills would just pay themselves.  And we'll have three, fat rosy cheeked children.  Huh, baby, the joke's on us.  Because you know what you get?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M032
chinese: 你知道你得到了什么吗？你得到了这个。
english: Do you know what you get?  You get this.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F030
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么？这什么都不是。这甚至什么都不是。
english: This? What is this?  This is nothing.  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M033
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F031
chinese: 当然。这是站在海滩上等待。这是战斗。
english: Sure.  This is standing on the beach waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M034
chinese: 正确
english: Right

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F032
chinese: 我是说这是很多事情，但只是...
english: I mean this is a lot of things, but it's just...

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M035
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F033
chinese: 你明白我在说什么吗？
english: Do you understand what I am saying?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M036
chinese: 我正在尽力而为。
english: I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F034
chinese: 我知道你是奥吉，我知道。
english: I know you are Augie, I know.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F035
chinese: 我知道你希望这个特别，我知道你想要它变得正确，但我就是忍不住想，我就是忍不住希望我在别的地方。
english: I know you meant this to be special, I know that you wanted it to be right, but I just can't help thinking that, I can't help wishing that I was somewhere else.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M037
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起的话。
english: Maybe if you were with someone else, too.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F036
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M038
chinese: 我只是-我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: I just- I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F037
chinese: 别胡说八道。无论我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: Don't be ridiculous.  Anything that- anything I am doing, I'd rather be doing it with you.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M039
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F038
chinese: 是的。你不知道吗？
english: Yeah.  Don't you know that?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F039
chinese: 求求你了，奥吉。
english: For Heaven's sake Augie.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F040
chinese: 你可能希望与其他人在一起，那些不那么认真对待事情的人，能够享受自己的人。
english: You're the one who probably wishes he was with somebody else.  Somebody who doesn't take things so seriously, who could enjoy herself.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M040
chinese: 你知道的，实际上现在你提到了，不，我不知道。
english: You know, actually now that you mention it, no I don't.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F041
chinese: 也许我们在错误的地方，但我们与正确的人在一起。
english: So maybe we are in the wrong spot, but we are with the right person.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M041
chinese: 我不知道，对我来说，这似乎是个很好的地方。
english: I don't know, it seemed like such a good spot to me.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M042
chinese: 我们从这里可以看到月亮的美景，不是吗？
english: We have a great view of the moon from here, though, huh?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F042
chinese: 嗯，我注意到了，它很漂亮。大而古老的白色月亮。
english: Hmm.  I noticed that, it's pretty. Big old white moon.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M043
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M044
chinese: 看看我这里有什么。
english: And look what I got here.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F043
chinese: 奥吉，你买了点心。
english: Augie, you bought refreshments.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M045
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F044
chinese: 我猜我们不需要眼镜。
english: I guess we don't need glasses.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M046
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M047
chinese: 你想回家吗？你冷吗？
english: Do you want to go home?  Are you cold?

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F045
chinese: 我开始觉得这可能是正确的地点。
english: I'm beginning to think this might be the right spot after all.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F046
chinese: 奥吉，对不起。
english: Augie, I'm sorry.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M048
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're very quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_F047
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses01F_script02_2_M049
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M000
chinese: 你收到信了吗？
english: Did you get the letter?

name: Ses01F_impro07_F000
chinese: 是的。有一个大信封上面写着，你被录取了。我知道。
english: Yes.  There's a big envelope it says, you're in. I know.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M001
chinese: 是的。那太棒了。
english: Yeah. That is so awesome.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M002
chinese: 哦，我的天。你打算做什么？【笑声】
english: Oh my God. What are you going to do? [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro07_F001
chinese: 所以我必须搬回到贫民区，但是...我知道。
english: So I have to move back to the ghetto but...I know.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M003
chinese: 哦，是的，我敢打赌你真的很兴奋。哦，那就是贷款的用途？对吗？确切地说。
english: Oh-Yeah, I bet you're really excited. Oh.  That's what loans are for?  Right? Exactly.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F002
chinese: 我真的很兴奋。是的。我不知道我要如何支付任何东西，但是...我也-是的。贷款也是，是的。不过，我申请了一堆助学金和奖学金，所以我还在等待消息。
english: I'm really excited.  Yeah. I don't know how I'm going to pay for anything, but... I also- Yeah.  Loans, too, yeah. I applied, though, for a bunch of grants and scholarships so I'm still waiting to hear on that.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M004
chinese: 哦，好的，好的。太棒了。你打算在这附近待着吗？还是你打算搬到另一个社区？你要搬到另一个社区吗？
english: Oh.  Good, good.  That's awesome. Are you going to stay around here?  Or are you going to like get a different neighborhood- you going to move to a different neighborhood?

name: Ses01F_impro07_F003
chinese: 哦-我知道，我知道，我知道，我知道。
english: Oh- I know, I know, I know, I know.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F004
chinese: 我不知道。我已经花了很多时间通勤，我宁愿不要。
english: I don't know.  I spend so much time commuting as it is, I'd rather.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M005
chinese: 这太好了-我很高兴你要留下来。你不会走了...我们应该举办一个派对。
english: This is so- I am so happy that you're going to stay.  You're not going to...We should totally throw a party.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F005
chinese: 我知道。我们应该举办一个派对。
english: I know. We should throw a party.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F006
chinese: 在阿拉帕霍，我们负担得起那个。[垃圾]。是的。那么你这个夏天打算做什么呢？你也会留在这里，对吗？
english: At Arapaho we could afford that. [GARBAGE]. Yeah.  So what are you doing this summer, though?  You're staying around, too, yeah?

name: Ses01F_impro07_M006
chinese: 一个说唱歌手的派对嗨。是的。好的。
english: A rapper party ho. Yeah. Okay.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M007
chinese: 我只是- 是的。我会继续待在这里，我只是做我的事情。我在这里生活。我很高兴你要留下来，我很高兴你会在这里。是的。哇。
english: I am just- Yeah.  I'm sticking around, I'm just doing my thing.  I'm living here.  I'm so glad you're going to stay, I'm so glad you're going to be here. Yeah. Woo.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F007
chinese: 太好了。我的意思是，我本来以为我要把所有的东西都打包起来，但是没想到。为南加州大学欢呼！
english: It's a relief too. I mean I was thinking I was going to have to pack up all of my stuff but yeah. Hooray for U.S.C.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M008
chinese: 是的。非常的。
english: Yeah.  Big time.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M009
chinese: 嗯嗯。嗯嗯。耶。那你主修什么？你在做什么？
english: Mmhmm. Mmhmm. Yay. So what major?  What are you doing?

name: Ses01F_impro07_F008
chinese: 嗯，这个...这个...这是批判研究。据说这是一个非常有声望的项目。
english: Umm. It's...It's uhh...It's Critical Studies. It's a really prestigious program, so they say.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M010
chinese: 哦，好的。
english: Oh, okay.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M011
chinese: 哦，好高级。
english: Ooh. Fancy.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F009
chinese: 是的。我不确定。
english: Yeah.  I'm not sure.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M012
chinese: 这是硕士还是博士学位？或者你可以...？很好。
english: Is this a Masters or a P.h.D.?  Or can you...? Nice

name: Ses01F_impro07_F010
chinese: 嗯...博士学位 [笑声]
english: Umm...P.h.D. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro07_M013
chinese: 那很好。当你这样做的时候，你也不需要教课吗？
english: That's good.  Don't you have to like teach a class, too, when you do that?

name: Ses01F_impro07_F011
chinese: 嗯，是的，是的。我是两个课程的助教。嗯嗯。
english: Um, yeah, yeah.  I'm a TA for two sessions. Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M014
chinese: 老师，纳什夫人，我有一个问题。
english: Teacher. Mrs. Nash, I have a question.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F012
chinese: 所以我可以塑造年轻的思想。夫人？那是我妈妈。
english: So I get to mold young minds. Mrs.?  That's my mother.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M015
chinese: 你必须结婚。嗯，你已经和查克结婚了。你是纳什夫人。不要把它和流行的调味品达夫夫人搞混了。
english: You have to get married.  Well you are married to Chuck.  You're Mrs. Nash.  Not to be confused with Mrs. Dash which is the popular seasoning.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F013
chinese: 我会像-哦。对，对，对。
english: I would be like- Oh. Right, right, right.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M016
chinese: 纳什夫人。虽然如此，那真是太棒了。
english: Mrs. Nash.  That's so awesome, though.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F014
chinese: 是的。是的，我很兴奋。万岁。然后一旦我毕业了，我就会成为百万富翁，你明白吗？因为这就是它的运作方式。
english: Yeah. Yeah I'm excited. Hooray.  And then I'll be a millionaire once I graduate, you understand? Because that's the way it works.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M017
chinese: 耶...学校很有趣。
english: Yay...School's fun.

name: Ses01F_impro07_M018
chinese: 当然，没错。那就是作为学生的真正赚钱之处。
english: Of course, right.  That's where the real money is, being a student.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F015
chinese: 是的。完全正确。【笑声】
english: Yeah.  Totally. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro07_M019
chinese: 这就是你赚大钱的方式。你在搞弄这把椅子吗？不要毁坏它。
english: That's how you get the big bucks.  Are you messing with the chair? Don't ruin it.

name: Ses01F_impro07_F016
chinese: 我知道。我整个时间都搞得一团糟。我做的最后三件事，我觉得都把一切都毁了。嗯。是的。
english: I know. I made such a mess of it, the entire time.  The last three things I've done, I've ruined everything, I think. Mm-hmm.  Yeah.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M000
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F000
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M001
chinese: 然而，我相信那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: However I believe the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F001
chinese: 哦，你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: Oh.  You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You took presents from him.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F002
chinese: 礼物？只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents?  It was only a trivial, little brooch.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M003
chinese: 它上面布满了钻石。而且还是最糟糕的品味。
english: It was bristling with diamonds.  In the worst possible taste, too.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F003
chinese: 它不是。我仍然拥有它，并且经常穿着它。它非常漂亮。
english: It was not.  I still have it, and I wear it often.  It is very pretty.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F004
chinese: 我没有。你在嫉妒的想象中编造了整件事。
english: I did not.  You worked that whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M005
chinese: 嗯，你让他亲吻你了，是吗？你说你做了。
english: Well, you let him kiss you, huh?  You said you did.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F005
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well, what of it?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F006
chinese: 它给了他很多快乐，而且没有伤害到我。
english: It gave him a lot of pleasure and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F007
chinese: 如果你不那么多疑和爱管闲事，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: If you hadn't been so suspicious and nosey, you never would have known a thing about it.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M008
chinese: 这是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view, I must say.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F008
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: Oh dear.  I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M009
chinese: 我也是。我无聊得要命。[垃圾] 你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: So am I.  I'm bored stiff. [GARBAGE]  Do you want some brandy?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No.  Thank you.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I'll have a little, I think.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不知道你为什么还想要，你已经喝了三杯了。
english: I don't know why you'd want any, you've already had three glasses.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason.  Anyhow, they are very small ones.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F011
chinese: 我只是觉得对这样的事情继续不断地纠缠下去很愚蠢。
english: I just think it's silly to go on and on and on about such a thing.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M012
chinese: 你几乎不能把三杯酒称为整个晚上，一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three glasses of liquor a whole evening long, going on and on and on.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F012
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's become a habit with you.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M013
chinese: 哦，别那么自大。只是因为你此刻碰巧不想要一个而已。
english: Oh.  Don't be so grand.  Just because you don't happen to want one at the moment.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要傻。
english: Don't be stupid.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M014
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M015
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M016
chinese: 你要出去哪里，亲爱的？
english: you going out somewhere, dear?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F015
chinese: 不，我只是让自己对你有吸引力。
english: No.  I am just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M017
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F016
chinese: 哦，吸引男人是女人的责任。
english: Oh.  It's a woman's duty to allure the man.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M018
chinese: 事实上，是的，那是完全正确的。
english: Well as a matter of fact, yes, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F017
chinese: 不，不是这样的。
english: No it isn't.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F018
chinese: 你闭嘴。
english: You shut up.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M020
chinese: 哦，真的吗。很遗憾你没有任何白兰地，它会让你少一点不愉快。
english: Oh really.  It's a pity you didn't have any brandy, it would have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F019
chinese: 很有趣，它对你没有产生如此奇迹的效果。
english: It's funny it hasn't worked such wonders for you.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M021
chinese: 咔嚓，咔嚓，咔嚓。你知道你就像一条小蝰蛇。
english: Snap, snap, snap.  You know you are like a little adder.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F020
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M022
chinese: 胡说八道。他们的牙齿后面有一袋毒液，他们会咬人。他们会咬人。
english: Nonsense.  They have a bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap. They snap.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F021
chinese: 它们会蜇人。我不在乎。你明白吗？我不在乎它们是否会叫，是否会像圈圈一样滚来滚去。
english: They sting. I don't care.  Do you understand?  I don't care if they bark and they roll about like hoops.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M023
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F022
chinese: 是的，我做了，相当多。
english: Yes I did, quite a lot.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M024
chinese: 我猜你让他亲吻你的次数比我多得多。是的，我猜你们玩得很疯狂，对吗？完全放纵，没有任何约束。嗯，其实你从来就没有太多约束。
english: And I suppose you let him kiss you a good deal more than, too. Yes.  I suppose you guys had a riotous time, huh?  All out, no restraint at all.  Well, you never really had much anyhow.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F023
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F024
chinese: 你真是讨人厌，我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable, I expect it's because you are drunk.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M025
chinese: 我觉得我一点都没有喝醉。
english: I think I am not in the least bit drunk.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F025
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不太好的问题。
english: You've always had a weak head.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M026
chinese: 我想我之前提到过，整个晚上我一直在喝三分钟的酒杯。一个两岁的孩子不可能因此而醉。
english: I think I mentioned once before that I've had three minute liquor glasses the whole evening long.  A child of two cannot get drunk on that.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F026
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child of two can get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M027
chinese: 这非常有趣，阿曼达。四岁的孩子怎么样？六岁的孩子呢？还是九岁的孩子？我们可以就这个话题展开一次很有意思的对话，你知道的，这些孩子们有时候会很冲动。
english: That's very interesting Amanda. How about a child of four?  Or a child of six?  Or a child of nine? We can get a good little conversation going on about this, you know, intemperate tots.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F027
chinese: 哦，闭嘴。
english: Oh shut up.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F028
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F029
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。你为什么不再喝点白兰地呢？
english: Not very funny, darling.  Why don't you have some more brandy.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M028
chinese: [笑声] 这是一个非常好的主意。我想我会这样做。
english: [LAUGHTER] That's a very good idea.  I think I will.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M029
chinese: 看着，你最好把那个关掉。我不想把楼上的人吵醒。
english: Look, you better turn that off. I don't want to wake up the people upstairs.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F030
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F031
chinese: 楼上没有人，那是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There are no people upstairs; it's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M030
chinese: 那么你会吵醒楼下的人。
english: Well then you'll wake up the people downstairs.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F032
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They are away in Tunis.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M031
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of year for Tunis.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F033
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M032
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I will do no such thing.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F034
chinese: 好吧，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Fine if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M033
chinese: 你能把那个关掉吗，它让我发疯了。
english: Will you turn that off, it's driving me mad.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F035
chinese: 你太易怒了，试着控制自己。
english: You are far too temperamental, try to control yourself.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M034
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F036
chinese: 我不会的。放开我，放开我。听着，听着？我受够了听你说话，你这个虐待狂恶霸。
english: I won't.  Let go, let go of me. Listen, listen?  I'm sick and tired of listening to you, you sadistic bully.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M035
chinese: 阿曼达，听着，听着。
english: Amanda, listen, listen.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M036
chinese: 哦，那确实非常有趣。
english: Oh.  That's very amusing indeed.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F037
chinese: 哦，闭嘴。放手。我讨厌你，我讨厌你。你听到了吗？你自负、专横而且完全不可理喻。
english: Oh shut up.  Let go.  I hate you, I hate you.  Do you hear?  You are a conceited and overbearing and utterly impossible.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M037
chinese: 你是一个卑鄙、脾气暴躁、放荡不羁、邪恶的小兽，只要我活着，我再也不想见到你。
english: You are a vile, ill-tempered, loose living, wicked little beast and I never want to see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F038
chinese: 这是结局。你听到我说话了吗？最终和永远。
english: This is the end.  Do you hear me?  Finally and forever.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M038
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F039
chinese: 哦。是的，我是。
english: Oh.  Yes I am.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M039
chinese: 你不是。
english: You're not.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_F040
chinese: 是的，我是。停下。停下。放开我。哦。你是个残忍的恶魔。我憎恨你。再嫁给你？永远不会，永远不会，永远不会。我希望你在痛苦中死去，你这个野兽。
english: Yes I am.   Stop it. Stop it.  Let go of me. Oh.  You're a cruel fiend.  I loathe and I hate you. Marry you again?  Never, never, never. I hope you die in torment, you brute beast cad.

name: Ses01F_script03_2_M040
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。天啊，就算你跪在我面前再回来，我也不会再嫁给你。你是个恶劣、脾气暴躁、刻薄的小贱人，我一辈子都不想再见到你。
english: Shut up. Shut up. God, I wouldn't marry you again if you came crawling back to me on a bended knee.  You are a vile, ill-tempered, mean little wench and I never want to see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M000
chinese: 嘿，乔伊，请进来。
english: Hey, Joy come in here.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F000
chinese: 发生了什么事？
english: What's happening?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M001
chinese: 我必须回去。
english: I have to go back.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M002
chinese: 我刚收到一封信，我必须回去。
english: I just got a letter I have to go back.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F001
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M003
chinese: 明天早上的第一件事。
english: First thing tomorrow morning.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F002
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？
english: Are you kidding me?

name: Ses01M_impro02_F003
chinese: 如何...
english: How...

name: Ses01M_impro02_M004
chinese: 我不明白，我不明白--
english: I don't understand, I don't underst--

name: Ses01M_impro02_F004
chinese: 他们怎么能这样做？
english: How can they do that?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M005
chinese: 他们可以做到。
english: They can do it.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F005
chinese: 他们说你至少在家四年。
english: They said you're home for at least four years.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M006
chinese: 我猜他们能做到。
english: I guess they can do it,

name: Ses01M_impro02_M007
chinese: 国民警卫队我猜真的很紧张，然后每个人都必须去。我们都必须回去，我整个公司都要回去。
english: The National Guard is I guess really spread thin and then everyone has to go.  We all have to go back, my whole companies going back.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F006
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro02_F007
chinese: 那不公平。
english: That's not fair.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M008
chinese: 我简直不敢相信。我刚刚回来。
english: I can't believe it. I just got back.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M009
chinese: 所以，是的，我们明天离开...
english: So yeah, we leave tomorrow...

name: Ses01M_impro02_F008
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro02_M010
chinese: ...我们都要出发了。
english: ...we're all shipping out.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M011
chinese: 我刚刚得到了，我感觉好像我在震惊中。
english: I just got I feel like I'm in shock actually.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F009
chinese: 我甚至不知道该告诉你什么。
english: I don't even know what to tell you.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M012
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F010
chinese: 生日派对怎么样？
english: What about the birthday party?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M013
chinese: 我猜你只能在没有我的情况下拥有它。
english: I guess you're just going to have to have it without me.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M014
chinese: 嘿，听着，虽然情况可能会好起来，没问题吧？
english: Hey listen, it's going to be okay though, all right?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M015
chinese: 你会没事的。
english: You're going to be fine.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F011
chinese: 我？我不担心我自己。
english: Me?  I'm not worried about me.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M016
chinese: 我也会好的，好吗？
english: I'm going to be fine too, okay?

name: Ses01M_impro02_F012
chinese: 你怎么知道的？
english: How do you know?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M017
chinese: 我知道我有一群很好的人...我身边有一群非常好的人。
english: I know I have a good... I have a really good group of guys with me.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M018
chinese: 我们会没事的。
english: We're going to be okay.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F013
chinese: 你要和同样的人一起去吗？
english: You're going with the same ones?

name: Ses01M_impro02_M019
chinese: 请答应我，你会拍很多照片的。
english: Do promise me you're going to take a lot of pictures.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F014
chinese: 总是，我总是这样做。
english: Always, I always do.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M020
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F015
chinese: 虽然不一样。
english: It's not the same though.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M021
chinese: 我只是希望有些事情我可以做。
english: I just wish there was something I could do.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F016
chinese: 我们可以躲起来。
english: We could hide away.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M022
chinese: 逃跑吗？
english: Run away?

name: Ses01M_impro02_F017
chinese: 嗯嗯。我们将建造一个掩体，永远不出来。
english: Mm hmm.  We'll build a bunker and never come out.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M023
chinese: 我真的不想去，我不想去...
english: I really don't want to go, I don't want to go...

name: Ses01M_impro02_F018
chinese: [笑声] 嗯。
english: [LAUGHTER] Mmm.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M024
chinese: 我害怕。
english: I'm scared.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F019
chinese: 不要说那样的话。
english: Don't say that.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F020
chinese: 我会每天给你寄一封信。
english: I'll send you a letter every single day.

name: Ses01M_impro02_M025
chinese: 我爱你。
english: I love you.

name: Ses01M_impro02_F021
chinese: 我也爱你。
english: I love you too.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M000
chinese: 对不起，乔伊。
english: I'm sorry, Joy.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F000
chinese: 没关系。
english: It's okay.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M001
chinese: 有什么我可以帮你的吗？你想让我照顾什么或者...？
english: Is there anything I can get you?  Do you want me to take care of anything for you or...?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F001
chinese: 不，不，不。
english: No, no, no.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M002
chinese: ...拿起任何东西吗？
english: ...pick up anything?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F002
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M003
chinese: 如果你想要休息几天并且一起玩的话，你知道你随时都可以来我家住。
english: You know you are welcome to stay at my house if you want to just check out for a couple days and hang out.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F003
chinese: 那很甜。
english: That's sweet.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F004
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F005
chinese: 我一两周前去看她的墓碑。
english: I went to see her headstone a week or two ago.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F006
chinese: 在她去世之前，我经常去墓地。你知道的，我觉得它们就像城市绿洲，城市中总是有绿色。
english: I used to go to cemeteries a lot before she died.  I just, you know, I felt like they were urban oasis, you know, there is always this green in the city.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M004
chinese: 嗯。
english: Hmm.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F007
chinese: 所以之前我就像四处游荡。找到她的墓碑花了好久，我总是找不到。你知道的。
english: So I was like wandering around before.  It takes forever to find her headstone; I always lose it. You know.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F008
chinese: 所以我看着另一个地方，那里有一块糖果，我想我会把糖果放在她的墓碑上。然后-
english: So I was looking at this other one and there was like a piece of candy there and I thought that I would take the candy and put it on her headstone.  And-

name: Ses01F_impro06_F009
chinese: 这个女人走过来，你知道的，那是她的。那是她的人在那里。
english: this woman came up and, you know, it was hers. It was her person that was there.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M005
chinese: 哦，她在那里吗？
english: Oh.  She was there?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F010
chinese: 是的。她说，那太可悲了，希望你喜欢。
english: Yeah.  And she was like, that's pathetic, I hope you enjoy it.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F011
chinese: 我，你知道的，我的意思是，我说过我很抱歉，然后我把它还给了她，放在地上，她说，不，没关系。她说，说实话，我宁愿把她还给我。
english: And I, you know, I mean, I said I was sorry and I brought it back to her kind of and I like put it on the ground and she was like, no, it's fine.  She was like, I would rather have her back, honestly.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M006
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F012
chinese: 我不知道。就是，我感觉很糟糕，因为我不应该这样做。我不知道。随便吧。
english: I don't know.  It just, like, I felt so bad because I shouldn't have done it.  I don't know.  Whatever.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F013
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M008
chinese: 你在那里待了多久？
english: How long were you there for?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F014
chinese: 在墓地吗？
english: At the cemetery?

name: Ses01F_impro06_M009
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F015
chinese: 几个小时。
english: couple hours.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F016
chinese: 我带了-我带了查克和我一起。他去了雷德兰兹，是的，只是一天。我们在喷水器下跑来跑去。
english: I brought- I brought Chuck with me. He went to Redlands, yeah, for the day.  We ran through the sprinklers.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M010
chinese: 哦，真的吗？
english: Oh really?

name: Ses01F_impro06_M011
chinese: 你在墓地里跑过洒水器了吗？
english: You ran through the sprinklers in the cemetery?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F017
chinese: 天气很热。[咂嘴声]
english: It was hot.[LIPSMACK]

name: Ses01F_impro06_M012
chinese: 这是一个大的墓地吗？
english: Is it a big cemetery?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F018
chinese: 是的。它很大。Redlands是一个古老的城市，所以他们有很多很多的石头。
english: Yeah.  It's huge.  Redlands is an old city so they have lots and lots of stones.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M013
chinese: 哦，所以它们也很古老，非常古老的吗？
english: Oh, so they're like really old too, really old ones?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F020
chinese: 很奇怪。每当我回到城里，我就会想起她。我的意思是，就像...我们一起长大，她在我们二十一岁时去世了。是的，她得了癌症，她有两个脑瘤。
english: It's weird.  Whenever I go back to town, I think of her.  I mean, it's like ... I mean we grew up together and she died when we were twenty one.  And yeah.  She had cancer, she had two brain tumors.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F021
chinese: 我最好的朋友是Heather。我们有一个-我们建了一个小的-有一个公园，叫做Prospect Park。在公园里有一个花园区，我们为她设置了一个。
english: My best friend Heather.  She's got a- we have a- we built this like little--  There's a park, Prospect Park.  And there is like a garden section of it that we set up for her.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F022
chinese: 她过去在阵亡将士纪念日举办这些诗歌聚会。
english: She used to have these poetry parties on Memorial Day.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M014
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F023
chinese: 嗯，是的。
english: Umm. Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F024
chinese: 而在她去世之前的最后一次，我记得她实际上站不起来，嗯...
english: And the last time before she died, I remember she couldn't really stand, umm...

name: Ses01F_impro06_F025
chinese: 但是我的意思是她可以，但是它-所以它有点坐在她的脚下支撑着她，她有这些她背诵过的诗。我记得抬头看她，她有卷曲的红发，她身后有一棵棕榈树，就像一顶长在她头上的王冠。很酷。
english: But I mean she could, but it was- so it was kind of sitting at her feet holding her up and she had these poems she had memorized.  And I remember looking up, she had curly red hair and there was this palm tree right behind her and it was like a crown growing right out of her head.  It was cool.

name: Ses01F_impro06_M015
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F026
chinese: 一些，我猜。她记住了这一首，约翰·邓恩的，它叫做《死亡不要骄傲》。还有-
english: Some, I guess.  She memorized this one, John Dunn, it's called, Death Be Not Proud. and-

name: Ses01F_impro06_M016
chinese: 那么她写了很多诗吗？
english: So she wrote a lot of poetry?

name: Ses01F_impro06_F027
chinese: 还有一个，我记不起来了。
english: There's another one, I can't remember.

name: Ses01F_impro06_F028
chinese: 我也记得，当我们在那时——她在加州大学洛杉矶分校去世了。她接受了脑部手术，一开始就没有太多希望，但我为她的手术献了血，她妈妈和我之前也献过血，所以我们把她送到了候诊室，然后我们去献血，然后回来。她坐在轮椅上，几乎什么都做不了，为那些在候诊室里的人背诵她的诗歌。她只需要一个该死的观众。你知道吗？
english: I remember, too, when we were--  she died at U.C.L.A.  She had brain surgery and there was not much hope to begin with, but I gave blood for her surgery, her mom and I before, so we dropped her off in the waiting room and then we were giving blood and came back.  And she, in her wheelchair, like can hardly do anything, reciting her poetry for these people like in the waiting room.  All she needs is a God damn audience.  You know?

name: Ses01F_impro06_M017
chinese: 嗯嗯。嗯嗯。嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.Mmhmm.Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是唯一一个仍然爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one who still loves his parents.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道。它有点过时了，不是吗？
english: I know.  It kind of went out of style, didn't it?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F001
chinese: 这并不是那么糟糕；这是一件好事。
english: It's not so bad; it's a good thing.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F002
chinese: 【呼吸】你知道，这里很美。空气很甜。
english: [BREATHING] You know, it's lovely here.  The air is sweet.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了。
english: You're not sorry you came.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F003
chinese: 我不抱歉，不。但是我...我不能留下来。
english: I'm not sorry, no. But I'm...I can't stay.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F004
chinese: 首先，你妈妈几乎告诉我要走。
english: For one thing, your mother much as told me to go.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: Well.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F005
chinese: 然后，你。你有点...
english: And then, you.  You've been kind of...

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F006
chinese: 有点尴尬自从我到这里以后。
english: Sort of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M005
chinese: 嗯，我原本计划在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你。他们只是认为我们已经准备好了。
english: Well I was kind of planning of sneaking up on you over the course of a week or so.  They just take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我知道他们会的。
english: I knew they would.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你做了吗？
english: You did?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F008
chinese: 当然，从你母亲的角度来看。我还有什么其他原因会来呢？
english: Well sure, from your mother's point of view.  Why else would I come?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M007
chinese: 那么你想要吗？我的意思是，我猜你必须要知道这也是我邀请你来的原因吧？
english: So would you want to?  I mean, I guess you have to know that's kind of why I asked you to come?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F009
chinese: 我，嗯。我猜，我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I, umm. I guess, I guess that's kind of why I came.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F010
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M008
chinese: 我爱你。安妮，我爱你。
english: I love you. Annie, I love you.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F011
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我真的没有任何想象力，这就是我知道如何说的。
english: I don't really have any imagination, that's all I know how to say.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F012
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我让你感到尴尬吗？你是-看，我不想在这个院子里，在这个门廊上做这件事。我希望它能在一个新的地方，一个对我们两个人都新鲜的地方。
english: Am I embarrassing you? Are you - See, I didn't want to do it here with this yard, on this porch.  I wanted it to be somewhere new, some place fresh for both of us.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F013
chinese: 不。不。
english: No. No

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M011
chinese: 你在这里感到不舒服，你感觉这里有些不对劲。我只是...我不...我不想...我不想把你从任何事情中带走。
english: You feel uncomfortable here, you feel that it's wrong here somehow.  I just...I don't...I didn't want...I didn't want to take you away from anything.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F014
chinese: 克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Chris, I've been ready a long, long, time.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M012
chinese: 他永远离开了吗？你确定吗？
english: And he's gone forever?  Are you sure?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F015
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M013
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F016
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M014
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F017
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M015
chinese: 为什么你不告诉我？
english: Why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F018
chinese: 我一直在等你，克里斯。你真的可以很模棱两可，你知道吗。当你最终给我写信的时候，
english: I was waiting for you, Chris.  You sure can be ambiguous, you know.  And when you did finally write me,

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M016
chinese: 给我一个...
english: Give me a...

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M017
chinese: 给我一个吻。
english: Give me a kiss.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M018
chinese: 上帝。我吻了你，安妮。
english: God.  I kissed you Annie.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F019
chinese: 拐弯抹角。
english: beating around the bush.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F020
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。我所做的一切就是坐在那里想着自己是否疯了，等了这么久，想着你是否在想我。
english: I will never forgive you.  All I'd done was sit around wondering if I was crazy waiting so long, wondering if you were thinking about me.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M019
chinese: 哦，安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Oh Annie, we are going to live now.  I am going to make you so happy.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F021
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M020
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F022
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F023
chinese: 克里斯，这是什么？
english: Chris, what is it?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M021
chinese: 嘿，让我们开车去某个地方。嗯？让我们离开这里。
english: Hey, let's drive some place.  Huh?  Let's get out of here.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F024
chinese: 不。是什么？是你的母亲吗？
english: No. What is it?  Is it your mother?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M022
chinese: 不，不是那样的。它是-
english: No it's nothing like that. It's-

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F025
chinese: 然后呢？克里斯。即使在你的信中，也有一些羞愧的东西。
english: Then what?  Chris.  Even in your letters, there was something ashamed.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M023
chinese: 是的。我想我一直都是。但是它正在离开我。
english: Yeah.  I suppose I have been. But it's going from me.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You've got to tell me.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M024
chinese: 我甚至不知道如何开始。
english: I don't even know how to start.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F027
chinese: 这样是行不通的。
english: It wouldn't work like this.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M025
chinese: 这只是与许多其他事情混在一起，你知道吗？你知道在海外我指挥着一家公司吗？
english: It's just all mixed up with so many other things, you know?  You know overseas I was in command of a company?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F028
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M026
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well I lost them.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F029
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M027
chinese: 几乎全部。
english: Pretty much all.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F030
chinese: 哎呀，天哪。
english: Aw, geez.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M028
chinese: 你不能仅仅因为他们不仅仅是男人就随意抛弃这样的事情。你知道吗？
english: You can't just toss off a thing like that because they weren't just men. You know?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M029
chinese: 比如说，有一次连续下了几天雨，有个孩子走到我面前，把他最后一双干袜子给了我。他就把它们放进了我的口袋里。这只是一件小事，但这就是我所交往的那种人。
english: Like for instance, there was this one time it had been raining for several days and this kid he just came up to me and he gave me his last pair of dry socks.  He just put them in my pocket.  That's a little thing, you know, but that's what kind of guys I had.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M030
chinese: 他们没有死，他们是为了彼此而自杀。我的意思就是这样。如果再自私一点，他们今天都还会在这里。
english: They didn't die, they killed themselves for each other.  I mean that, exactly.  Just a little more selfish and they would all be here today.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M031
chinese: 当我看着它们下降时，我有了这个想法。你知道，一切都被摧毁了，但有一件事正在被创造。这是一种纪念碑，一种责任，人对人。
english: And I had this idea as I was watching them go down.  Everything was being destroyed, you know, but this one thing was being made.  It was kind of a monument, it's kind of responsibility, man for man.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F031
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M032
chinese: 将它再次带到地球上，你知道，就像某种纪念碑，我想我会给他们带来一些不同。
english: To bring that on to the earth again, you know, is like some kind of monument and I thought I would just make a difference to them.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M033
chinese: 但是后来我回到家里，真是太不可思议了，你知道吗？整件事就像是一场随机的公交车事故。你知道的，我又回到了那种拼命工作的生活中，我又去上班了。
english: But then I came home and it was incredible, you know?  The whole thing was just kind of this random bus accident.  You know, I went back to the rat race again, I went to work.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M034
chinese: 开着我的新车，看到了一个新的冰箱。
english: Driving my new car and seeing a new refrigerator.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M035
chinese: 我的意思是...你不能把这些事情从战争中剥离出来。当你开着那辆车，看到那台新冰箱时，你必须知道它是源于一个人对另一个人的爱。
english: I mean...You can't take those things out of a war. when you drive that car and you see that new refrigerator, you have to know that it came out of the love that a man can have for another man.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我不想要其中的任何东西。我猜那也包括你。
english: And I didn't want any of it. I guess that included you.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F032
chinese: 你还有同样的感觉吗？
english: Do you still feel that way?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M037
chinese: 我只是想让你知道，安妮。
english: I just want you to know Annie.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F033
chinese: 因为你不应该有那种感觉。你拥有的一切都是你努力赢得的 - 一切。你明白我的意思吗？
english: Because you mustn't feel that way.  Everything you have, you've earned - everything.  you understand me?

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F034
chinese: 连我都是如此。你的钱呢？克里斯，你的钱没有任何问题。你父亲让数百架飞机起飞，你应该为此感到骄傲。一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: Even me.  And your money?  Chris, there's nothing wrong in your money.  Your father put hundreds of planes into the air, you should be proud of that.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_M038
chinese: 安妮，安妮。我将为你赚大钱。
english: Annie, Annie.  I am going to make a fortune for you.

name: Ses01F_script01_3_F035
chinese: 我会用财富做什么？
english: What would I do with a fortune?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？天啊，这太棒了，不是吗？我简直不敢相信。
english: What time is it?  God, this is great, isn't it?  I can't believe it.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M001
chinese: 当然，我确实想再往海岸上走一点，你知道，远离所有的灯光、人群和一切。现在是午夜吗？他们总是从午夜开始吗？就是午夜吗？你好吗？你还好吗？那很好。
english: Of course I did want to a little further up the coast you know get away from all the lights and people and everything.  Is it midnight, do they always start at midnight?  Is that what it is midnight?  How you doing, huh? You okay?  That's good.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F000
chinese: 我很好。
english: I'm fine.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M002
chinese: 看，那是什么，那是什么？它是什么？
english: Look, there what's that, what's that?  Is it--

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M003
chinese: 不，我认为那只是泡沫。
english: No, I think that's just foam.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F001
english: Ugh...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M004
chinese: 哦，不，我不能确定。虽然如果你不能确定，那可能不是他们对吧，是吧。可能会是明显的，对吧？
english: Oh, no I can't tell though.  Although probably if you can't tell it probably isn't them right, yeah.  Probably going to be like unmistakable, right?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M005
chinese: 哇，这太棒了，不是吗？这太棒了。哦，不，你知道我忘了什么吗？
english: Gosh, this is great, isn't it?  This is awesome.  Oh, no you know what I forgot?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M006
chinese: 我的手电筒。我怎么会忘记我的手电筒？天啊--
english: My flashlight.  How could I forget my flashlight?  God--

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F002
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M007
chinese: 手电筒是银色的。只有一个，对吧？
english: Flashlight the silver one.  There's only one isn't there?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F003
chinese: 那不是你的手电筒。
english: That's not your flashlight.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M008
chinese: 它是谁的？
english: Whose is it?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F004
chinese: 这是我们的；这也是我的手电筒。
english: It's ours; it's my flashlight, too.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M009
chinese: 哦，嗯，当然了。
english: Oh, well, yeah of course.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F005
chinese: 你一直说“我的手电筒”，好像它只属于你一样。这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: You keep saying "my flashlight" like somehow it's just yours. How's that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M010
chinese: 当然，我们的手电筒。你的就是我的，我的手电筒就是你的手电筒。
english: Of course, our flashlight.  What's your is mine, mi flashlight es su flashlight.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M011
chinese: 天哪，我应该把它带来的。我简直不敢相信我忘了那个。
english: Gosh, I should have brought it. I can't believe I forgot that.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M012
chinese: 虽然月亮很美，应该会保持圆满。他们总是在满月期间运行吗？我记不清去年是不是满月了。
english: It's a nice moon though, should stay full.  Do they always run during a full moon?  I can't remember was it full last year?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F006
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M013
chinese: 你还好吗？你没事吧？你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？我的夹克？不要吗？
english: Are you all right?  Are you okay?  You cold?  Do you want to my jacket? My jacket? No?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F007
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M014
chinese: 你知道吗，我们也应该带一条毯子。哎呀，我们的毯子，我们的毯子。要是我也有一箱啤酒，现在正好是最好的时候，对吧，一箱啤酒。
english: You know what we should've brought a blanket too.  Man, our blanket, our blanket.  Wish I had six-pack too, a six-pack would be just the ticket right about now, huh, six-pack.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M015
chinese: 什么问题？你还好吗？嗯？你冷吗？
english: What's wrong?  Are you okay?  Huh?  You cold?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F008
chinese: 我很好。
english: I'm fine.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M016
chinese: 哦，是的，我现在非常兴奋，就像一个孩子一样。
english: Oh yeah, I'm so excited right now I'm like a kid.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M017
chinese: 我简直不敢相信我居然忘记拉上拉链就出门了。
english: I can't believe I got out of the house without my fly zipped up even.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F009
chinese: 我想知道他们能否听到我说话
english: I wonder if they can hear me talk

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M018
chinese: 我想知道他们能否听到我说话，你知道的。
english: I wonder if they can hear me talking, you know.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M019
chinese: 喜欢感受当我们在沙滩上移动时的震动。
english: Like feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F010
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M020
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F011
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了，我们回家吧。
english: It's after eleven, let's go home.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M021
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们刚到这里。我们不想掉头回家。来这么远的目的是什么？
english: What are you kidding?  We just got here.  We don't want to turn around and go home now.  What's the point coming all the way down here?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F012
chinese: 没有意义。
english: There is no point.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M022
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F013
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M023
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point too.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F014
chinese: 那么，让我们走吧。
english: Then let's go.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M024
chinese: 不，等等，不，不是这个意思。我的意思是如果我们只是转身回家，那就没有意义了，为什么要走这么远下来。
english: No, wait no, no that's not my point.  My point is there is no point and coming all the way down here if we just turn around and go home.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M025
chinese: 你不想看吗？
english: Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F015
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M026
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我就是不喜欢，这太愚蠢了。
english: I just don't, it's stupid.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M027
chinese: 这不是愚蠢的。这是一个自然现象。
english: It's not stupid.  It's a natural phenomenon.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M028
chinese: 堪萨斯州的人们需要买机票并预订酒店才能看到这个。它只有四十分钟的路程，实在是太好了，不容错过。
english: People in Kansas would have to get plane tickets and make hotel reservations to see this.  It's only forty minutes away; it's just too good to pass up.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F017
chinese: 过什么？这些小鱼从海洋中游出来，在沙滩上扑腾，然后又游回去，然后它们就死了。
english: Pass what up?  These little fish swim out of the ocean, they flop around on the sand then they swim back and then they die.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M029
chinese: 是的，但那种翻来覆去的动作就是它们的生活方式，就像是产卵或交配之类的。这就像是它们小小鱼生活中的亮点。这就像是生命的最后狂欢。
english: Yeah but that like flopping around is what to do it's like spawning or mating or something.  This is like the highlight of their little fish lives.  It's like life's last orgy.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F018
chinese: 我不知道你为什么这么兴奋。我们谈论的不是登月，而是鱼，是一种没人吃的鱼。
english: I don't know what you're so excited about.  This isn't a moon landing we're talking about, it's fish, it's a fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M030
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah, they do.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F019
chinese: 哦，奥吉。
english: Oh, Augie.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M031
chinese: 好吧，无论如何，好吧，但它是一条做一些其他鱼不会做的事情的鱼，你知道的，就像那些回到卡皮斯特拉诺的燕子或那些跳下悬崖的旅鼠一样，你知道的。
english: Well, okay whatever, okay but it's a fish who do something that like no other fish do, you know, it's like those swallows that return to Capistrano or those like those lemmings that jumped off the cliffs, you know.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M032
chinese: 就像是一点点无法解释的东西，一点点魔力，一点点神秘。我就是不明白你怎么可能对这个不感兴趣。
english: It's like a little bit of the unexplainable, a little magic, a little mystery.  I just don't see how you can not be interested in this.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F020
chinese: 我不是。
english: I'm not.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M033
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F021
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M034
chinese: 好的。
english: All right.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M035
chinese: 我不明白，我是说第一次我们来这里的时候，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚...
english: I don't get it though, I mean the first time we came here you said it was like the best night of your life...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M036
chinese: 去年我记得你非常兴奋地来到这里，以至于直到我们坐在车里你才意识到你撞到了脚趾。
english: And last year I remember like distinctively you were so excited to get here that you didn't realize you stubbed your toe until we were in a car.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F022
chinese: 去年，你还记得我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，你喉咙痛，我们发生了一场大争吵，我们没有看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Last year, you'll also remember we got--our shoes got wet, I got sand in my panties, you got a sore throat, we got into a big fight and we did not see the grunions.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M037
chinese: 我们只是处于一个不好的位置。
english: We just weren't in a good spot though.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F023
chinese: 我们前一年也没有见到他们。
english: We didn't see them the year before either.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M038
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置，我告诉你这是一个更好的位置。
english: We just weren't in a good spot I'm telling you this is a much better spot.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M039
chinese: 来吧，相信我，我对这些事情有直觉，好吗？所以只是...只是考虑一下，好吗？好的，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请考虑一下...
english: Come on, trust me I got instincts for these things, okay?  So just--just think about it all right?  Okay, I know you're not interested, think about it...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M040
chinese: 在那里，有一大群银色的鱼，它们正朝这边游来...
english: Out there, there's like this big mass of silver fish they're heading this way...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M041
chinese: 他们不知道为什么，我们也不知道为什么。没有人给他们发邀请函，也没有给他们提供地图或方向。
english: They don't know why, we don't know why.  No one like sent them an invitation or gave them a map or direction...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M042
chinese: 他们突然一起转身，就像加利福尼亚海岸一样形成了一条长长的队伍。然后他们就开始游泳了...
english: They just all turned at once and they just form this line as long as the California coast.  And they just started swimming...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M043
chinese: 就像一些小小的延时爆竹在他们小小的身体里爆炸一样。然后他们全都一起转身...
english: Like some little time release fire cracker went off inside their little tiny bodies.  And they all turned as one...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M044
chinese: 然后排成一行开始游泳，游泳将把他们带到这个地方...
english: And form the line and started swimming, swimming that would bring them to this point here...

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M045
chinese: 就像是纯粹的冲动，你知道的，这就像是紧迫感。这是没有思维的单一目标。
english: It's like urgency that's pure urge you know.  It's single-mindedness with no mind.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_M046
chinese: 太疯狂了。看看这个，我自己都起鸡皮疙瘩了，胳膊上的毛都竖起来了。
english: It's crazy.  Look at this, I'm giving myself goose bumps, the hairs are standing up on my arm.

name: Ses01M_script02_1_F024
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F000
chinese: 你看起来有点沮丧。
english: You seem kind of down.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M000
chinese: 我只是生气。
english: I'm just mad.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F001
chinese: 为什么？
english: How come?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M001
chinese: 我一直在努力找工作，但找不到任何工作。
english: It's--I've been trying to find this job I can't get any job.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M002
chinese: 这不公平。
english: It's not fair.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F002
chinese: 你是什么意思？
english: What do you mean?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M003
chinese: 我是说我已经找工作找了三年了，但是找不到工作。我是说，这是美国，对吧？我应该能找到工作的。
english: I mean I've been looking for a job for like three years and I can't get a job.  I mean like, it's America, right?  I should be able to get a job.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F003
chinese: 有很多人在找工作。
english: There's a lot of people looking for jobs.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M004
chinese: 我猜。但是三年？我的意思是，我喜欢--我甚至上了大学，虽然我没有毕业，但我上了一段时间。这不公平，我不知道。
english: I guess.  But three years?  I mean, I like--I went to college even, I mean I didn't finish but I went for like a little bit.  It's not fair, I don't know.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F004
chinese: 我不知道，我的意思是，我只是不认为...
english: I don't know, I mean, I just don't think...

name: Ses01M_impro04_M005
chinese: 我是说我一直在投递简历，尽我所能做的一切，但什么都没有发生。你知道，就像我不能再像这样靠贷款生活下去了。我要-我是说最终我得还钱。我有点儿慌了，我不知道该怎么办。
english: I mean I've been sending out my resumes and doing everything I can do but nothing is happening.  You know, it's like I can't and I can't keep living on loans anymore like this.  I'm going to--I mean eventually I'm going to have to pay it back. I'm just kind of freaking out, I don't know.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F005
chinese: 你有没有想过可能是你的态度...
english: Did you ever think it might be your attitude that's...

name: Ses01M_impro04_M006
chinese: 我的态度是什么意思？
english: What's my--like what do you mean "my attitude"?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F006
chinese: 我不知道，有时候你会有点...不，我不是说那个。我只是...
english: I don't know just sometimes you get kind of... No, I'm not saying that.  I just--

name: Ses01M_impro04_M007
chinese: 我有态度问题吗？
english: Do I have an attitude problem?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M008
chinese: 不，也许是因为我找不到工作，所以感到沮丧，你知道的。
english: No, well maybe it's because I'm like frustrated 'cause I can't get a job, you know.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F007
chinese: ...有人以前对你说过这样的话吗？
english: ...has anyone ever just said anything like that to you before?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M009
chinese: 就像当你进入一个试镜房间或者其他场合时，真的很难摆脱这种感觉，你知道我是什么意思吗？
english: Like it's really hard to like shake that off when you go into like audition a room or whatever, you know what I mean?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F008
chinese: 好的，当然。
english: Right, sure.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F009
chinese: 但是我的意思是，你必须要假装到你真的感受到了，对吗？
english: But I mean you kind of got to, you got to fake it 'til you feel it, right?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M010
chinese: 我猜我只是越来越难以伪装，你知道的。
english: I guess I just getting really hard to fake, you know.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F010
chinese: 我只是在说，如果我要雇佣某人的话，或者说...不。不。不。
english: I'm just saying that if I was looking to hire somebody in the--or kind of... No. No. No.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M011
chinese: 你们在招聘吗？等一下，你知道有工作吗？说真的，你知道吗，就是你知道有什么工作吗？就像，哦拜托，你知道有什么工作吗？
english: Are you hiring? Wait, do you know of a job? Seriously, do you know, like do you know of anything though?  Like, oh please, do you know of anything?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F011
chinese: 不，我只是在说，如果我是一个雇佣别人的人，我不会雇佣一个生气或沮丧的人。
english: No.  I'm just saying though that if I was a person who was hiring somebody I-- --would not hire someone who was angry or upset.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M012
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M013
chinese: 我感到生气吗？
english: I come across angry?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F012
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F013
chinese: 嗯，你知道一点。如果你愿意听的话--
english: Well, you know a little.  If you were to listen to--

name: Ses01M_impro04_M015
chinese: 好的。你是我的朋友，你可以告诉我一些事情。你可以坦诚地告诉我一些事情，好吗？请。
english: Okay.  You're my friend you can tell me stuff.  You can tell me honestly stuff, okay?  Please.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F014
chinese: 我只是不想你失去控制。
english: I just don't want you to fly off the handle.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M016
chinese: 好的，我不认为我在这里失去控制。
english: Okay, I'm not flying off the handle I don't think I'm flying off the handle here at all.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F015
chinese: 你有点脾气暴躁。
english: You kind of have a short fuse.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M017
chinese: 我脾气很暴躁吗？
english: I have a short fuse?

name: Ses01M_impro04_F016
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M018
chinese: 好的。好的不，不，不，不好的不，我需要听到更多。来吧，说出来。
english: Okay. Okay no, no, no, no okay no, I need to hear this more. Come on, bring it.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F017
chinese: 就像现在这样，我们正在尝试进行对话。
english: Like this, right now we're trying have a conversation.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F018
chinese: 我们正在试图进行对话，而你似乎非常敌对。你一直打断我。
english: We're trying to have a conversation and you seem extremely hostile. You keep cutting me off.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M019
chinese: 嗯，这是因为我找不到工作，好吗？
english: Well, it's 'cause I can't get a job, okay?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M020
chinese: 我并不总是正确的，我只是--
english: I'm not always right I'm just--

name: Ses01M_impro04_F019
chinese: 我不能和你一起完成这个句子，因为你总是插话...
english: I can't finish the sentence with you without you jumping in...

name: Ses01M_impro04_F020
chinese: ...而且你总是对的。
english: ...and you're always right.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M021
chinese: 好的，没问题。
english: fine okay.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F021
chinese: 你对一切都有借口。
english: You have an excuse for everything.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M022
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro04_F022
chinese: 我只是在说，也许在你自己创造更多之前，你应该先吸收一些信息。
english: I'm just saying that maybe you should take in some information before you produce more of your own.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M023
chinese: 我就像一块海绵，吸收了这三年来的所有信息，我渴望找到一份工作来应用它们。
english: I'm like a sponge I'm like soaked up with all this information for like three years I'm just dying for a job to like put it in to.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F023
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro04_F024
chinese: 那是 -。
english: That's -.

name: Ses01M_impro04_M024
chinese: 你知道，就像我不认为这是太过分的要求。我知道。
english: You know, and like I don't think it's that much to ask. I know.

name: Ses01M_impro04_F025
chinese: 嗯，你想要进入哪个领域？
english: Well, what kind of field are you looking to go into?

name: Ses01M_impro04_M025
chinese: 就是这样。
english: That's it.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？
english: What he's going to say?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F001
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他今天早上四点钟在这里。
english: He was out here at four this morning.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F002
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的，而他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up and he was still in bed.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M002
chinese: 我今天早上四点在这里，听到一声爆裂声，我朝窗外看去，他就站在那边。
english: I was out here at four this morning I heard a crack and I looked out the window and he was standing right over there.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他在凌晨四点钟在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing here at four in the morning?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。但他回到厨房里哭了。
english: I don't know.  But he went back in the kitchen and he cried.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不，我想我会让它等待。
english: No.  I figured I'd just let it wait.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F005
chinese: 哭得很厉害吗？
english: Cried hard?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M005
chinese: 是的，我能听到他在我房间的地板上哭泣。
english: Yeah, I could hear him crying through the floorboards in my room.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F006
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他在那个时候在这里做什么？
english: What is he doing out here at that hour?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F008
chinese: 他又在梦里，走在街上。
english: He's dreaming about him again, walking the streets.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F009
chinese: 这就像他去世后一样。那是什么意思？
english: It's getting to be just like after he died.  What is the meaning of that?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M008
chinese: 我不知道它的意思。但是我知道我们和父亲犯了可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it.  But I know we've made terrible mistake with father.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F010
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M009
chinese: 我的意思是，这些事情，伙计，它们总是会回到你身上。而且这肯定会回到我们身上。
english: I mean, these kinds of things, man they always come back at you.  And this is definitely coming back to us.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你是什么意思，一个错误？
english: What do you mean a mistake?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M010
chinese: 我只是——为什么他不应该在夜晚等待他呢，嗯？我们是否与他矛盾，是否说我们不再有任何希望，他不会回来了？
english: I just--why shouldn't he walk the nights waiting for him, huh?  Do we contradict him do we say we don't have any hope any more that he's not coming back?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你想做什么，和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do, argue with him?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M011
chinese: 我不想和他争论，只是天哪，是时候让他意识到没有人再相信他了。
english: I don't want to argue with him, it's just for God's sake it's time he realized that no one believes with him any more.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F013
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我到了。
english: I got to.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F014
chinese: 什么，你能证明吗？你有什么证据？你能证明吗？
english: What, can you prove it?  What proof do you have?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M013
chinese: 求求你，三年？三年后没人会回来的。这太疯狂了。
english: For God's sake, three years?  Nobody comes back after three years. It's insane.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F015
chinese: 对你来说，对我来说也是如此。但对你的父亲呢？你可以自言自语到脸色发青，但没有坟墓，也没有尸体。那么你在哪里？
english: To you it is, to me it is.  But to your father?  You can talk yourself 'til you're blue in the face but there's was no grave and there is no body.  So where are you?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M014
chinese: 好的，没问题。妈妈，请坐下。我想和你谈谈。
english: Okay, all right.  Mom, sit down.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F016
chinese: 问题是那些该死的报纸。每个月都有一些男孩回来的时间比拉里更长，所以--
english: The trouble is those god damn news papers.  Every month some boy comes back missing longer then Larry so--

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M015
chinese: 是的，好的，好的。听着，嗯，你知道我为什么请安妮来这里吗？
english: Yeah, okay all right, all right.  Listen, um, you know why I asked Annie here, right?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F017
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: Well, I've got an idea but what's the story?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M017
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F019
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well, that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M018
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not just my business.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好的，你想让我做什么？你已经够大了，应该自己知道自己的事情。
english: Well, what do you want me to do?  You're old enough known your own business.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M019
chinese: 那么可以吗？我就继续进行了吗？
english: So it's okay then?  I'm just going to go ahead with it?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F021
chinese: 你想确保你父亲不会...
english: You want to make sure that your father's not going to...

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M020
chinese: 看着吧。那不仅仅是我的事情。有时候你真的让我很生气，你知道吗？如果我告诉父亲并且他对此大发雷霆，那也是你的事情，明白吗？
english: See.  Then it's not just my business. Sometimes you infuriate me, you know that?  You know it's just your business too if I tell father and he throws a fit about it, huh?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F022
chinese: 我只是在说。
english: I'm just saying.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F023
chinese: 对不起。我忽略了我必须忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I'm sorry.  I ignore what I've got to ignore. That girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M021
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She is not Larry's girl.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F024
chinese: 从父亲的角度来看，他并没有死，你没有权利带走他的女孩。我只是说，如果你知道去哪里，你可以继续前进，但我是说我不知道去哪里。你看，我不知道。
english: From father's point of view he is not dead and you have no right to take his girl.  I'm just saying that you can go on from there if you know where to go but I'm saying I don't know where to go.  See, I don't know.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M022
chinese: 我不知道为什么，每次我伸手去拿东西的时候，我都不得不收回来，因为我害怕会伤害到别人。我一生都是这样...
english: I don't know why it is you know every time I reach out for something I have to pull back 'cause I'm afraid it's going to hurt somebody.  All my life...

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There's nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M023
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F026
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Did you ask Annie yet?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M024
chinese: 不，我想先把这个问题解决好。
english: No, I wanted to get this all sorted out first.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F027
chinese: 嗯，你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和你父亲有相同的感觉。
english: Well, how do you know she's going to marry you?  Maybe she feels same way your father does.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M025
chinese: 嗯，如果她真的这样做了，那就是结束了。然而根据她的信件，我觉得她几乎忘记了他。
english: Well, if she does then that's the end of it.  However from her letters I think she's pretty much forgotten him.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F028
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性，你从来没有看到过。
english: The trouble is you don't see enough women, you never did.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M026
chinese: 那又怎样？我只是...我对女人不太擅长。
english: So what?  I'm just--I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F029
chinese: 我不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M027
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F030
chinese: 那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。自从你去参战以来，你就没有见过她，已经过去五年了。
english: That's a good answer but it doesn't answer anything.  You haven't seen her since you went away to war, it's been five years.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M028
chinese: 我不知道，但是当我想起她时，我想到了她。她是我想到妻子时的形象。
english: I don't know, it I think of her, I grew up next to her.  She is what I think of when I think of a wife.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F031
chinese: 他认为他会回来，克里斯。你娶了那个你宣布他死了的女孩。
english: He thinks he's coming back, Chris.  You marry that girl you're pronouncing him dead.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F032
chinese: 你知道那会对你有什么影响吗，对你的父亲有什么影响，你知道吗？我不知道。
english: Do you know what that'll do to you, to your father, do you know?  I don't.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M029
chinese: 好的，那么。
english: All right then.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F033
chinese: 请再仔细考虑一下。
english: Give it some more thought.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M030
chinese: 我已经仔细考虑过了。而且我一直回到同样的事情上。
english: I've given it lots of thought.  And I keep coming back to the same thing.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M031
chinese: 当我想到一个家庭，当我想到我的未来时，我看到安妮在其中心，你知道的，如果这里不能实现，那我会去别的地方。
english: When I think of a family, when I think of my future I see Annie in the center of that and you know and if that can't happen here then I'll go somewhere else.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F034
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M032
chinese: 我会离开。我会结婚并搬到其他地方，也许是纽约。
english: I'll leave.  I'll get married and move somewhere else maybe New York.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F035
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M033
chinese: 我会做的。
english: I'll do it.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你在这里有一家生意。我说这到底是什么鬼？
english: You have a business here.  I said what the hell is this?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M034
chinese: 生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: Business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F037
chinese: 哦，你一定要受到启发吗。
english: Oh, must you be inspired.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M035
chinese: 是的，是的，我每天喜欢它一个小时。我不在乎我是否必须整天为钱而努力，当我回家时，我希望一切都好，我想要一个家庭，我想要孩子，安妮是其中心。
english: Yes, yes I like it for one hour a day.  I don't care if I have to grub for money all day long when I come home I want it nice, I want a family, I want to kids and Annie is in the center of that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M036
chinese: 如果这里不能发生这种事情...
english: If that can't happen here...

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F038
chinese: 你是说你会因为这个而离开生意吗？
english: You mean to tell me you would leave the business for this.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M037
chinese: 是的，对于这个我愿意。
english: Yes, on this I would.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F039
chinese: 好吧，你不想那样思考。
english: Well, you don't want to think like that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M038
chinese: 然后帮助我留在这里，妈妈。
english: Then help me stay here mom.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F040
chinese: 好吧，但你不这样想，因为这到底是为了什么。这一切都是为了你，我们为克里斯在工作什么？整个计划都是为了你。
english: All right but you don't think like that because what the hell is this all for.  This is all for you, what are we working for Chris? The whole shooting match is for you.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我知道，我知道。
english: I know, I know.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M040
chinese: 那么帮助我留下来。
english: Then help me stay.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F041
chinese: 嗯，你不这样想。
english: Well, you don't think like that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M041
chinese: 我是这样想的。
english: I am thinking like that.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F042
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses01M_script01_1_M042
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强壮的人。
english: No, you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses01M_script01_1_F043
chinese: 嗯，我能看到。
english: Well, I can see that.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F000
chinese: 对不起。
english: Excuse me.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M000
chinese: 你有你的表格吗？
english: Do you have your forms?

name: Ses01F_impro01_F001
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M001
chinese: 让我看看它们。
english: Let me see them.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F002
chinese: 有问题吗？
english: Is there a problem?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M002
chinese: 谁告诉你排这条队的？
english: Who told you to get in this line?

name: Ses01F_impro01_F003
chinese: 你做了。
english: You did.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F004
chinese: 你站在起点，你引导着我。
english: You were standing at the beginning and you directed me.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M003
chinese: 好的。但是我没有告诉你如果你在填写这个特定的表格时要排这条线。
english: Okay. But I didn't tell you to get in this line if you are filling out this particular form.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F005
chinese: 好的，有什么问题？让我来改一下。
english: Well what's the problem?  Let me change it.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M004
chinese: 这个表格是一个Z.X.四。
english: This form is a Z.X.four.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M005
chinese: 你不能这样做——这不是Z.X.four的排队处。如果你要填写Z.X.four，你需要有一种不同的身份证明。
english: You can't--  This is not the line for Z.X.four.  If you're going to fill out the Z.X.four, you need to have a different form of ID.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F006
chinese: 什么？我正在办理身份证。这就是我来这里的原因。我的钱包被偷了。
english: What?  I'm getting an ID.  This is why I'm here.  My wallet was stolen.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M006
chinese: 不，我需要另一套身份证来证明这确实是你。
english: No. I need another set of ID to prove this is actually you.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F007
chinese: 我没有身份证，我应该怎么办才能得到一个身份证呢？一个人首先如何获得一个身份证呢？
english: How am I supposed to get an ID without an ID?  How does a person get an ID in the first place?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M007
chinese: 我不知道。但是我需要一个身份证来通过这个表格。我不能没有身份证就把它发送出去。
english: I don't know.  But I need an ID to pass this form along.  I can't just send it along without an ID.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F008
chinese: 我在这里是为了办理身份证。
english: I'm here to get an ID.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M008
chinese: 不，我需要另一个身份证，一个独立的。
english: No.  I need another ID, a separate one.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F009
chinese: 像什么？像出生证明吗？
english: Like what?  Like a birth certificate?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M009
chinese: 一张出生证明，一个护照...一个学生证；你没有上学吗？还有其他什么东西吗？
english: A birth certificate, a passport...a student ID; didn't you go to school?  Anything?

name: Ses01F_impro01_F010
chinese: 谁他妈有出生证明？
english: Who the hell has a birth certificate?

name: Ses01F_impro01_F011
chinese: 是的，但是我的钱包被偷了，我什么都没有了。我没有任何信用卡，也没有我的身份证。你们这里没有保存我的信息吗？
english: Yes but my wallet was stolen, I don't have anything.  I don't have any credit cards, I don't have my ID.  Don't you have things on file here?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M010
chinese: 是的。我们将其存档，但我们需要一个身份证来访问那个文件。
english: Yeah.  We keep it on file, but we need an ID to access that file.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F012
chinese: 那已经失控了。
english: That's out of control.

name: Ses01F_impro01_M011
chinese: 我不明白为什么人们到这里时会觉得这么复杂。这只是一个简单的表格。我只需要一个身份证。
english: I don't understand why this is so complicated for people when they get here.  It's just a simple form.  I just need an ID.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F013
chinese: 你在这里工作多久了？
english: How long have you been working here?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M012
chinese: 实际上太长了。
english: Actually too long.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F014
chinese: 当然。你知道的，你有像主管之类的人吗？
english: Clearly.  You know, do you have like a supervisor or something?

name: Ses01F_impro01_M013
chinese: 是的。你想见我的主管吗？嗯？是的。你想见我的主管吗？好的。我马上回来。
english: Yeah.  Do you want to see my supervisor?  Huh? Yeah.  Do you want to see my supervisor?  Fine.  I'll be right back.

name: Ses01F_impro01_F015
chinese: 那样的话 - 我会很感激的。是的。
english: That would - I would appreciate that.  Yeah.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？
english: What's he going to say?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F001
chinese: 也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: Maybe we should tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F002
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的，他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up; he was still in bed.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F003
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M002
chinese: 今天早上四点钟。我听到一声爆裂声，醒来后朝外看去。当它爆裂时，他就站在那边。
english: Four o clock this morning.  I heard a crack and I woke up and looked out.  He was standing right over there when it cracked.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F004
chinese: 他在凌晨四点钟在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four o clock in the morning?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他又在梦见他，四处走动。
english: He's dreaming of him again, walking around.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M004
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F006
chinese: 这变得就像他去世后一样。那是什么意思？
english: It's getting to be just like after he died.  What's the meaning of that?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我不知道它的意思。但是我知道一件事，妈妈，你在爸爸身上犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it.  But I know one thing, Mom, you've made a terrible mistake with father.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F007
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M006
chinese: 对他不诚实，你知道的。这种事情总是会得到回报，而且正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him, you know.  This kind of thing always pays off and it's paying off.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F008
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M007
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们要让他继续认为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know Larry is not coming back and I know it.  Why do we allow him to go on thinking that we believe with him?
