name: Ses01F_script01_1_F009
chinese: 你想做什么？和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do?  Argue with him?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M008
chinese: 我不想争论，但是是时候让他意识到没有人相信Larry还活着了。
english: I don't want to argue but it's time he realized that nobody believes Larry is alive.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道吗？为什么他不应该在夜晚想着他，梦见他呢？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否说过，我们不再有任何希望了？我们多年来一直没有希望吗？
english: You know?  Why shouldn't he walk the nights thinking of him, dreaming of him?   Do we contradict him?  Do we say, we don't have any hope anymore?  That we haven't had any hope for years now?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M010
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来。
english: We've got to say it to him.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F011
chinese: 在哪里有证据？你有任何证据吗？
english: Where's the proof?  Do you have any proof?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M011
chinese: 求求你，三年？三年后没人会回来的；那简直疯了。
english: For God's sake, three years?  Nobody comes back after three years; that's insane.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F012
chinese: 对你来说，对我来说，但对你的父亲来说，你可以自言自语到脸都发青。但是没有坟墓，也没有尸体，那么你在哪里？
english: To you it is, to me it is, but to your father, you can talk yourself until you are blue in the face.  But there is no grave and there is no body, so where are you?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M012
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, Mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F013
chinese: 这个麻烦就是那些该死的报纸。每个月都有新的男孩回来，下一个就是Larry，他们只是--
english: It's that the trouble is those God damn newspapers.  Every month some new boy comes back and so the next one is going to be Larry, they just--

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M013
chinese: 好的，好的，好的。你知道我为什么叫安妮来这里，对吗？
english: All right, all right, all right.  You know why I asked Annie here, right?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F014
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M014
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F015
chinese: 嗯，我有一个主意，但是你的故事是什么？
english: Well I got an idea, but what's your story?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M015
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F016
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not just my business.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F017
chinese: 好吧，你想让我做什么？你已经长大到足够了解自己的想法了。
english: Well what do you want me to do?  You're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M017
chinese: 那么好吧，那我就继续下去了吗？
english: So all right then, I'll just go ahead with it?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好的，你想要确保你的父亲不会--
english: Well you want to make sure that your father is not going to --

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M018
chinese: 那么这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: Then it's not just my business.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F019
chinese: 我只是在说。
english: I'm just saying.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M019
chinese: 你知道有时候你让我很生气。你知道吗？如果我告诉父亲，他会大发脾气，这不关你的事吗？天啊，你真是擅长忽视事情。
english: You know sometimes you infuriate me.  you know that?  Isn't it your business if I tell father and he throws a fit about it?  God, you have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F020
chinese: 哦，我忽略了我需要忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: Oh.  I ignore what I got to ignore.  That girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M020
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F021
chinese: 从你父亲的角度来看，他并没有死，克里斯他仍然认为自己还活着。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: From your father's point of view, he is not dead and- Chris he still thinks he's still alive.  The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F022
chinese: 现在如果你知道要去哪里，你可以从那里继续前进，但是我告诉你，我不知道要去哪里。
english: Now you can go on from there if you know where to go, but I'm telling you, I don't know where to go.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M021
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我伸手去拿东西，我都不得不收回，因为我害怕其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的生活，一次又一次。
english: I don't know why it is, but every time I reach out for something I have to pull back because I am afraid other people will suffer. My whole bloody life, time after time.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F023
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人，这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow, there's nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M022
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F024
chinese: 我就是不明白为什么。你问过安妮了吗？
english: I just don't see why.  Have you asked Annie yet?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M023
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你怎么知道她会嫁给你呢？也许她和你父亲有相同的感觉。
english: Well how do you know she's going to marry you?  Maybe she feels the same way your father does.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M024
chinese: 嗯，如果她真的这样做了，那就这样吧。这就是结束了。不过从她的信中，我觉得她几乎忘记了他。
english: Well if she does, then that's it.  That's the end of it.  From her letters, though, I think she's pretty much forgotten him.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M025
chinese: 然后我们会和爸爸好好解决这个问题。好吗，妈妈？不要躲避我。
english: And then we'll thrash it out with father.  Okay Mom?  Don't avoid me.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F026
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性。你从来没有看到过。
english: The trouble is you don't see enough women.  You never did.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M026
chinese: 所以呢。我对女人不敏感。
english: So what.  I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F027
chinese: 为什么一定要是安妮？
english: Why does it have to be Annie?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M027
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F028
chinese: 哦，那是一个很好的理由。这根本不是理由。
english: Oh that's a great reason.  It's no reason at all.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M028
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F029
chinese: 你自从去打仗以来就没有见过她，已经过去五年了。
english: You haven't seen her since you went away to war, it's been five years.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M029
chinese: 我无法控制，我最了解她。你知道吗？我是在她隔壁长大的。这些年来，每当我想到一个妻子的人选，我就会想到安妮。
english: I can't help it, I know her best.  I was brought up next door to her, you know?  These years when I think of someone for my wife, I think of Annie.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M030
chinese: 妈妈，你想要什么？一个图表吗？
english: Mom, what do you want?  A diagram?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F030
chinese: 我不想要一个图表。
english: I don't want a diagram.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F031
chinese: 他认为他会回来克里斯。
english: He thinks he's coming back Chris.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F032
chinese: 你娶了那个女孩，你就等于宣布他死了...
english: You marry that girl, you are pronouncing him dead...

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F033
chinese: ...然后那会对你父亲有什么影响？你知道吗？我不知道。
english: ...and then what's that going to do to your father?  Do you know?  I don't.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M031
chinese: 好的，那么，妈妈。【呼吸声】
english: All right, then, Mom. [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F034
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M032
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我希望如果我等待，父亲会忘记拉里，然后我们可以举行一场普通的婚礼，每个人都会很开心。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  And I'd hope that if I waited, father would forget about Larry and then we could just have a regular wedding and everyone would be happy.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M033
chinese: 但是如果我在这里做不到，我可能不得不去别的地方。
english: But if I can't do that here, I may have to go somewhere else.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F035
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M034
chinese: 我会离开。我会结婚，然后搬到别的地方，也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll get married and I'll move somewhere else, maybe New York.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M035
chinese: 我已经做了一个好儿子太久了，一个好的傻瓜。
english: I've been a good son for too long, a good sucker.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F037
chinese: 你在这里有生意。这到底是什么鬼东西？
english: You have a business here.  What the hell is this?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M036
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F038
chinese: 哦，你一定要受到启发吗？
english: Oh.  Must you be inspired?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M037
chinese: 是的。我每天喜欢它一个小时。我不在乎整天为钱而努力，当我回家时，我希望它快乐。
english: Yes.  I like it for an hour a day.  I don't care if I have to grub for money all day long, when I come home I want it happy.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M038
chinese: 我想要一些孩子，我想要一个家庭，我想要一个可以付出自己的人，安妮就是其中心。现在只是要找到它的地方。
english: I want some kids, I want a family, I want somebody that I can give myself to and Annie is in the center of that.  Now it's just where to find it.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F039
chinese: 你是说你会因为这个而离开这个生意吗？
english: You mean to tell me that you would leave the business over this?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M039
chinese: 关于这个，我会的。
english: On this, I would.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F040
chinese: 嗯，你不想那样思考。
english: Well you don't want to think like that.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M040
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F041
chinese: 好吧。但你不想这样想，因为我们到底为了什么在工作，克里斯？这一切都是为了你。整个摄制过程都是为了你。
english: All right.  But you don't want to think like that because what the hell are we working for, Chris?  It's all for you.  This whole shooting match is for you.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M041
chinese: 我知道。那就帮我留在这里。
english: I know that.  Then just help me stay here.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F042
chinese: 只是不要这样想。
english: Just don't think like that.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M042
chinese: 嗯，我是这样想的。
english: Well I am thinking like that.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F043
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses01F_script01_1_M043
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强硬的人。
english: No.  You don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses01F_script01_1_F044
chinese: 我能看到那个。
english: I can see that.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F000
chinese: 嗨。
english: Hi.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M000
chinese: 嗨。谢谢你等待。
english: Hi.  Thanks for waiting.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F001
chinese: 是的。这是我参与的第四行。
english: Yeah. This is the fourth line that I have been in.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M001
chinese: 我可以帮助你吗？
english: Can I help you?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M002
chinese: 嗯，是的。
english: Uh huh.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F002
chinese: 我需要我的包。
english: I need my bag.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F003
chinese: 我在三个多小时前飞过来，我已经排了四条不同的队。
english: I flew in over three hours ago, I've been in four different lines.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M004
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F004
chinese: 我等了整个行李传送带-我等了整个行李传送带四次。他们告诉我去下一个。我在那里等了三个飞机，现在我在这里。
english: I waited the entire baggage- I waited for the whole baggage carousel four times.  They told me to go to the next one.  I waited through that for three planes and now I'm here.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M005
chinese: 好的。太好了。我真的很抱歉你不得不这样做。你姓什么？我们从那里开始。
english: Okay.  Great.  I'm really sorry that you had to do that.  What's your last name?  Let's start there.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F005
chinese: 纳什。
english: Nash.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M006
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F006
chinese: 没有 G.
english: No G.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M007
chinese: 好的-好的。你丢了你的包吗？那-那是问题吗？
english: all right- okay.  And you lost your bag? Is that- that the issue?

name: Ses01F_impro05_F007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F008
chinese: 航班七一四。
english: Flight seven fourteen.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M008
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Uh-huh.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F009
chinese: 我会得到免费的门票和里程吗？我什么时候能收到我的行李？
english: Am I going to be getting, like, free tickets, free mileage. When can I expect my bag here?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M009
chinese: 是的。是的，我看不到-我看不到任何-
english: Yeah. Yeah, I don't see- I don't see any--

name: Ses01F_impro05_M010
chinese: 我没有看到任何记录，并且通常当我没有看到记录时，这意味着嗯-
english: I don't see any record of it, and I-usually when I don't see a record of it, that means um-

name: Ses01F_impro05_M011
chinese: 我们不小心丢失了您的行李。我们非常抱歉。代表Jet Blue，我想为任何不便向您道歉。我可以为您发放一张价值五十美元的礼品卡，您可以在未来任何想要与我们一起乘坐的航班上使用。再次非常抱歉...
english: we've mistakenly lost your baggage.  We're very sorry.  On behalf of Jet Blue I would like to apologize for any inconvenience.  I am allowed to issue you a fifty dollar gift card which you can use any future flights you want to take with us.  I'm very sorry, once again...

name: Ses01F_impro05_F010
chinese: 哦，你在开玩笑吗？
english: Oh, Are you kidding me?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M012
chinese: 对于这样的不便和您的包，但是
english: for such an inconvenience and your bag, but

name: Ses01F_impro05_F011
chinese: 这是一个笑话吗？
english: Is this a joke?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M013
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M014
chinese: 不，不。
english: No, no.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F012
chinese: 有隐藏摄像头吗？这是那部电影吗？有那个节目，对吗？飞机，航空公司。
english: Are there candid cameras?  Is this that movie? There's that show, right?  Airplane, airline.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M015
chinese: 不，不。这是真的。
english: No, no.  This is real.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F013
chinese: 所以你会给我钱，然后我就可以拿到我的包包了吗？
english: So you'll give me money and then I'll get my bag?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M016
chinese: 不，我只是给你钱，包包不见了。如果它不在这里，真的很抱歉，我无能为力，因为...
english: No.  I'm just giving you money, the bag is gone.  If it's not here, I'm really sorry there is nothing I can do because...

name: Ses01F_impro05_M017
chinese: 这是我们唯一的记录，如果它没有在这里列出，那么可能就不存在任何地方。
english: this is the only track record that we have and if it's not listed here then it's probably not anywhere.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F014
chinese: 你在开玩笑吧，这是个笑话。
english: You're kidding me, this is a joke.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M018
chinese: 再一次，我真的-我真的很抱歉。
english: Once again, I'm really- I'm really sorry.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F015
chinese: 你有任何想法吗 - 五十美元？那应该替代我所有的东西吗？你明白我在那里装了多少东西吗？它不仅有情感价值，而且不能像那样被替代。它非常昂贵。
english: Do you have any idea-- fifty dollars?  That's supposed to replace everything that I have?  Do you understand how much I have packed in there? Not only does it have sentimental value; it can't be replaced like that.  It was incredibly expensive.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M020
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F016
chinese: 我们从巴黎飞来。我已经购物三个星期了。
english: We flew in from Paris.  I've been shopping for three weeks.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M021
chinese: 非常抱歉。但是如果你看到我身后的标志，它非常清楚地说明我们不承担责任--
english: I'm very sorry.  But if you see the sign that's right behind me here, it spells it out really clearly that we are not held liable--

name: Ses01F_impro05_F017
chinese: 我不在乎你那该死的标志说什么。有人-有人需要替换我那里的一切，并为我带来的不便给我钱。
english: I don't care what you're freaking sign says.  Somebody- Somebody needs to replace everything I've got there and give me money for my inconvenience.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M022
chinese: 好的。冷静一点。
english: Okay. Calm-

name: Ses01F_impro05_M023
chinese: 实际上，我们并不一定有责任给你-甚至给你这五十美元，所以...实际上-实际上真的
english: Actually, we are not necessarily liable to give you- to even give you this fifty dollars so... it's actually- it's actually really

name: Ses01F_impro05_F018
chinese: 你明白我丈夫是谁吗？
english: Do you understand who my husband is?

name: Ses01F_impro05_F019
chinese: 如果你正在寻找一场官司，宝贝，你找对了。
english: If you're- if you're- if you're looking for a lawsuit, baby, you've found it.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M024
chinese: 我们实际上甚至不被允许-你知道的，就像我们不必给你这五十美元。我们不必这样做。
english: We are actually not even allowed--  you know, like we don't have to give you this fifty dollars.  We don't have to do that.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F020
chinese: 哦哦。这是个礼物。你-你在帮我吗？
english: Oh-Oh.  It's a gift.  You're-You're helping me out here?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M025
chinese: 这是一份礼物。
english: It's a gift.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M026
chinese: 你知道，航空公司不能对每一件经过这里的行李负责。
english: You know, the airlines can not be held responsible for every bag of luggage that comes through here.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F021
chinese: 你正在寻找麻烦。你会有大麻烦的。
english: You are cruising for a bruising.  You are in so much trouble.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M027
chinese: 随着数量的增加--
english: With the amount of--

name: Ses01F_impro05_F022
chinese: 谁负责？谁是捷蓝航空的总裁？
english: Who's in charge?  Who is the president of Jet Blue?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M028
chinese: 嗯，实际上，我不知道。我不知道。哦，真的吗？
english: Um, actually, I don't know. I don't know. Oh really?

name: Ses01F_impro05_F023
chinese: 因为我很可能认识他。
english: Because I probably know him.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F024
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M029
chinese: 那么也许你可以直接给他打电话，他可以给你更多的钱。但是现在我能做的只有--
english: Well then maybe you can just call him and he can give you more money.  But right now all I can do--

name: Ses01F_impro05_F025
chinese: 我不想要钱，我想要我的衣服。
english: I don't want money, I want my clothes.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M030
chinese: 现在我能做的就是给你这五十美元，真的很抱歉。
english: Right now all I can do is just give you this fifty dollars, I'm really sorry.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F026
chinese: 你叫什么名字？
english: What's your name?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M031
chinese: 哦。我的名字是Sean。嗨。
english: Oh.  My name is Sean. Hi.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F027
chinese: Sean. 太好了。你有工作证号码或者其他什么吗？
english: Sean.  Great. Do you have a badge number or something?

name: Ses01F_impro05_M032
chinese: 请输入徽章号码？嗯，不用了。你可以用我的员工号码。
english: Badge number?  Uh, no.  You can just take my employee number I guess.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F028
chinese: 好的。我会这样做。
english: Okay.  I'll do that.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M033
chinese: 为什么？我做错了什么吗？我给你提供了差劲的服务吗？我感觉我已经尽力了。
english: Why?  Have I done something wrong?  Have I given you bad service?  I feel like I have done the best I could.

name: Ses01F_impro05_F029
chinese: 我认为你还没有尽力做到一切，因为我的包还没有在这里。
english: I don't think you have done everything you could do because I don't have my bag here yet.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M034
chinese: 如果你想的话，你可以写一封信。我可以给你地址。是的。一个生气的--
english: If you want, you can write a letter.  I can give you the address. Yes.  An angry--

name: Ses01F_impro05_F030
chinese: 一封信？我会打个私人电话。
english: A letter? I'll make a personal phone call.

name: Ses01F_impro05_M035
chinese: 或者你可以打电话。但我认为写信可能会更好一些——在我印象中，信件更有...
english: Or you can make a phone call.  But I think a letter might be a little more-- in my impression, letters have more...

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M000
chinese: 嗯，也许他想见她。
english: Well, maybe he wanted see her.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F001
chinese: 已经过去了三年半了。为什么突然间？
english: It's been three and a half years.  Why all of a sudden?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，他和那个女孩住在隔壁，为什么他不想见她呢？
english: Well uh, He grew up next door to the girl, why wouldn't he want to see her?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M002
chinese: 不要那样看着我。他没有告诉我任何他告诉你的事情。
english: Don't look at me like that.  He didn't tell me anything he told you.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F002
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M003
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking about it?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F003
chinese: 它有点那个样子。
english: it's got that about it.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M004
chinese: 哦，那又怎样？
english: Oh so what?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F004
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What is going on here, Joe?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M005
chinese: 好的，现在听着，孩子们...
english: Okay, now listen, kids...

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这个女孩不是拉里的。如果这个女孩是拉里的女孩，她不是他的，她知道她不是。
english: The girl is not Larry's.  If the girl is Larry's girl she's not his she know she's not.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M006
chinese: 听着。别废话。你无法读懂她的心思。
english: Listen. Line. You can't read her mind.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F006
chinese: 那她为什么还是单身呢？纽约到处都是男人，可能有一百个人告诉她她疯了，但她还在等待。
english: Then why is she still single?  New York is full of men probably a hundred people told her she is crazy but she is waited.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M007
chinese: 而你怎么知道她为什么等待。
english: And how do you know why she's waited.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F007
chinese: 因为她知道我所知道的，所以她像石头一样忠诚。在我最黑暗的时刻，我想到她在等待，我知道我是对的。
english: Because she knows what I know that's why.  She's faithful as a rock. in my darkest moments I think of her waiting and I know that I'm right.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M008
chinese: 好的，看，今天天气很好。我们为什么要争吵呢？
english: Okay, look it's a beautiful day.  Why are we arguing?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F008
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢夺走她对乔的信任。陌生人可能会，但她的父亲和她的兄弟不会。
english: Nobody in this house dares take away her faith Joe.  Her- strangers might but not her father, not her brother.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M009
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你想要什么？
english: What do you want me to do?  What do you want?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F009
chinese: 我希望你们表现得好像他会回来一样。自从Chris邀请她来这里以来，我注意到了你们两个。我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I want you to---act like he is coming back.  Don't think I haven't noticed you, both of you since Chris invited her here.  I won't stand for any nonsense.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M010
chinese: Kate...
english: Kate...

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F010
chinese: 因为如果他不回来的话，我会自杀。
english: Because if he's not coming back then I'll kill myself.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M011
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F011
chinese: 哦，嘲笑我吧，尽管你想笑就笑吧，但为什么每个晚上她回来的时候都会发生这种事情呢？她去他的房间睡觉，他的纪念品却碎成了碎片。看啊，乔，看看它。
english: Oh, laugh at me, laugh all you like but why does this happen to very night she comes back?  She goes to sleep in his room and his memorial breaks in pieces.  Look at it, Joe look.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M012
chinese: 好的，冷静一下。
english: All right, calm yourself.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F012
chinese: 相信我，乔，你必须相信。就在上周，一个比拉里失踪时间更长的男孩回来了，你亲自读过。
english: Believe with me Joe, you got to believe. Only last week a boy came back missing longer then Larry you read it yourself.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M013
chinese: 好的，冷静一点。好的。
english: Okay, calm yourself. Alright.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M014
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: calm yourself.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F013
chinese: 你最重要的是要相信。只是不要停止相信。
english: You above all have got to believe. Just don't stop believing.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M015
chinese: 这是什么意思？我首先？这是什么意思？
english: What does that mean? Me above all? What does that mean?

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M016
chinese: 看看你。你在发抖。
english: Look at you. You're shaking.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_F014
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses01M_script01_2_M017
chinese: 你到底想要我怎么样，凯特？
english: What the hell do you want from me, Kate?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M000
chinese: 他们现在正在外面游泳...
english: They're out there swimming right now...

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M001
chinese: ...来到这个地方参加这场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典...
english: ...to this spot for this massive celebration of like sex and death...

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M002
chinese: 看这个，我的头发都竖起来了。我给自己起鸡皮疙瘩了。
english: Look at this, my hairs are standing up my arm. I'm giving myself goose bumps.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F000
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M003
chinese: 好了，那么呢？你怎么想？
english: Well, so?  What do you think?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F001
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M004
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情。
english: About what I was saying.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F002
chinese: 我认为这太荒谬了。
english: I think it's ridiculous.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M005
chinese: 这绝对不是。它就像是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's like slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F003
chinese: 这是一个公关活动。
english: It's a PR.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F004
chinese: 有人向你兜售了一张好东西的票，说在海滩上会发生一些令人惊奇的事情。
english: Somebody sold you a bill of goods that something amazing is going to happen on the beach.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M006
chinese: 不仅仅是我，好吗？看看所有的人。
english: It's not just me, okay?  Look at like all the people.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F005
chinese: 他们都被告知了同样的事情。
english: They're all told the same thing.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F006
chinese: 每个人都相信它能让他们兴奋，你知道它能让他们不断回来。
english: Everybody is believes that it keeps them excited, you know it keeps them coming back for more.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F007
chinese: 每个人都认为他们可以找到合适的位置，你知道他们会参与其中。
english: Everybody keeps thinking that they can just find the right spot, you know they'll get it on the action.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F008
chinese: 他们的生活将从那时开始。
english: Their life will start then.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M007
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F009
chinese: 对不起，对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: I'm sorry it still just fish to me.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M008
chinese: 我可以问你一个问题吗？你现在是不是在经期？
english: Can I ask you a question?  Are you on your period?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F010
chinese: 为什么你问我那个？该死，我告诉过你不要问我那个，你问我那个我讨厌。这是侮辱。
english: Why do you ask me that?  God damn it, I told you not to ask me that I hate it when you ask me that. It's insulting.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M009
chinese: 好的，那么有什么困扰你的吗？
english: Okay, well then what's bugging you?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F011
chinese: 我只是，我们只是对今晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: I just, we just have different ideas of what this evening is supposed to look like.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M010
chinese: 不应该喜欢任何东西。我们下来这里，看鱼，它们到达，我们就会说哇，鱼。
english: Is not supposed to like anything.  We come down here, we look at the fish, they arrive, we go woo-ah fish.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F012
chinese: 哦，长大点，奥吉，鱼不会来的。
english: Oh. Grow up Augie, the fish are not going to come.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M011
chinese: 然后我们回家，他们也回家。
english: And then we go home and they go home.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M012
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F013
chinese: 因为他们从来不这样做。他们这样做过吗？
english: Because they never do.  Do they, have they ever?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M013
chinese: 我们错过了他们两次。
english: We missed them twice.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F014
chinese: 两次是我们尝试过的每一年。
english: Twice is every year we've tried that's ever.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M014
chinese: 好的，我们今年会见到他们，这个地方要好得多。相信我。
english: Okay we'll see them this year, this is a much better spot. Trust me.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F015
chinese: 不，我们不会这样做。这是毫无意义的，就像等待圣诞老人一样。
english: No we won't.  It's pointless it's like a waiting up to see Santa Claus.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F016
chinese: 我感觉我的整个生活都将在这里度过，眼睛睁得大大的，双手期待地紧握着，等待鱼儿的出现，但鱼儿从未出现。
english: I feel like my whole life is going to be spent here on the beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasped expectantly, waiting for fish to show up and the fish never show.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M015
chinese: 好的，我正在尝试逆向解决这个问题。
english: Okay, I'm trying to work this backwards

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F017
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I'm saying.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M016
chinese: 并找出我们走错了方向，导致了最糟糕的事情。
english: and figure out where we took a turn to the worst thing.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M017
chinese: 当然不是。
english: Of course not.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F018
chinese: 我曾经想要看到它，现在我仍然想要，我总是这样。我一直在想，这一次会是那个时刻，但事实总是不是这样。
english: I did want to see it I still do, I always do.  I keep thinking that this time will be the time but it just never is.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M018
chinese: 好的。我在尝试逆向思考，试图找出你在这里转变为最糟糕的时刻，现在。
english: Okay.  I'm trying to work this backwards here and I'm trying to figure out the exact moment that you took a turn for the worst here, now.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M019
chinese: 你在和玛吉的电话中表现得很好，晚餐还可以，洗碗也还好。
english: you were fine during the phone call from Marge, dinner was okay, doing the dishes was fine.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M020
chinese: 让我想想，嗯，我洗了个澡，而你在看新闻，你说“今晚有鱼群上岸”，我说“好的，我们去吧。”
english: Let's see, uh, I took a shower and, um, you were watching the news and you said the "the Grunions are running tonight," and I said "okay great, let's go."

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M021
chinese: 所以我正在把动物放出来，我们把车开到车库里，然后--
english: So I'm putting the animals out we're getting the car to the garage and--

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F019
chinese: 你还记得我们第一年来这里吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。
english: Do you remember the first year we came here? It's about four years ago right after we got married.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F020
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了，我们有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。你叫我跳舞，所以我们脱掉了鞋子。
english: We thought I was pregnant we had this bottle of champagne but no glasses.  You asked me to dance so we took off our shoes.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F021
chinese: 当我们在跳舞时，你对我说了最柔软、最亲密的话，直接传入我的耳朵，让我不仅能听到，还能感受到。
english: While we were dancing you said the softest most intimate things to me, right into my ears so I could feel them much as hear them.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F022
chinese: 我记得当时想着，这就是了。终于，终于我像应该的那样快乐。
english: And I remember thinking this is it. finally, finally I'm as happy as I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M022
chinese: 等一下，我明白了。
english: Wait a minute, I've got it.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F023
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，从瓶子里喝香槟。
english: Dancing on the beach barefoot, drinking champagne from the bottle.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M023
chinese: 当我们经过那个纽约人的酒柜时，你说过，不，你说过“让我们买点香槟”，而我说“没时间浪费”或者类似的话。就是这样，对吗？
english: It was when we were driving passed that knickerbocker liquor locker and you would said, no you said "let's get some champagne" and I said "no time to wasting" or something like that.  That's what it is, right?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M024
chinese: 你希望这次像以前一样吗？
english: You want this to be like the other times, right?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F024
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I'd rather not remember some things.  I'd rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M025
chinese: 哦，没错，当然可以。
english: Oh right sure, of course.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M026
chinese: 你想跳舞吗？
english: Do you want to dance?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M027
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: You want me to go get some champagne?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M028
chinese: 你想脱掉我们的鞋吗？
english: Do you want to take off our shoes?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M029
chinese: 什么？嗯？
english: What? Huh?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M030
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？
english: You want to get married again?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M031
chinese: 什么？什么？你想要离婚？
english: What?  What?  You want to divorce?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F028
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M032
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F029
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M033
chinese: 一块新地毯，一只贵宾犬，一份自杀协议，冰淇淋，一次背部按摩，什么？什么？你到底想要什么？
english: A new carpet, a poodle, a suicide pact, ice cream, a back rub, what?  What?  What the hell do you want?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F030
chinese: 我希望事情能按照预期的方式发展。
english: I want something to turn out the way that it's supposed to.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M034
chinese: 嗯，欢迎加入人类大家庭。
english: Well, welcome to the human race.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M035
chinese: 你认为一切都不会按照计划进行。你认为我有一个伟大的想法，四年后我们会来到这个海滩争论鱼？不可能。
english: You think nothing turns out how it's supposed to.  You think I had some grand idea going that four years down the line.  We would come to this beach and argue over fish?  No.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M036
chinese: 你觉得会有时候你会像看待我是用过的纸巾一样看着我，然后我会看着你想：“天哪，下一班去阿拉斯加的飞机是什么时候。”
english: You think there would be times when you'd look at me like I was used Kleenex and then I'd look at you and think "Holy hell when is the next flight to Alaska."

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M037
chinese: 不，不，我和你一样，我以为一切都会很美好，脸颊会红润，账单会自己付，鱼也会一直来--
english: No, no I'm just like you, I thought it was going to be all rosy cheeks and the bills would pay themselves and fish will always come and--

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M038
chinese: 不。你知道你得到了什么吗？你知道你得到了什么吗？你得到了这个。
english: No.  You know what you get?  You know what you get?  You get this.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F031
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This what?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M039
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yeah, it is.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F032
chinese: 哦，当然，这是站在海滩上，这是等待，战斗。
english: Oh, sure this is standing on the beach, this is waiting, fighting.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M040
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F033
chinese: 这根本不像我以为的任何事情。
english: This isn't anything like I thought anything would be.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M041
chinese: 我也不知道自己。
english: I know me neither.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F034
chinese: 这只是这样的。我的意思是它包含了很多和一切，但是它是-你明白我在说什么吗？
english: This is just this.  I mean it includes a lot and everything but it's--do you understand what I'm saying?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M042
chinese: 我正在尽力而为。
english: I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F035
chinese: 我知道，奥吉，我真的知道。
english: I know that Augie, I really do.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F036
chinese: 我只是忍不住希望自己是别人，或者在别的地方。
english: I just can't help wishing that I was somebody, somewhere else.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M043
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起的话？
english: Maybe if you were with somebody else too?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F037
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M044
chinese: 不，我知道但是--我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know but--I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F038
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？天哪，奥吉，无论我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: Are you kidding me?  For heaven sake Augie anything I'm doing I'd rather be doing it with you.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M045
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F039
chinese: 是的，别荒谬了。难道你不知道吗？
english: Yes, don't be ridiculous.  Don't you know that?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F040
chinese: 你是那个可能希望与其他人在一起的人，一个不那么认真对待一切的人，一个会享受自己的人。
english: You are the one who probably wishes he was with somebody else, someone who didn't take everything so seriously, someone who would enjoy yourself.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M046
chinese: 实际上，你知道吗？现在你提到了那个，不，我不知道。
english: Actually, you know what?  Now you mentioned that--no I don't.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F041
chinese: 也许我们在错误的地方。但是我们和正确的人在一起。
english: So maybe we're in the wrong spot.  But we're with the right person.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M047
chinese: 我不知道，只是对我来说看起来是个很好的地方。
english: I don't know, just seemed like such a good spot to me.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M048
chinese: 我们确实从这里有一个非常好的月亮景观。
english: We do have really good view of the moon from here though.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F042
chinese: 哦，我看到了。很漂亮吧。大大的白色月亮。
english: Oh I saw that.  Pretty isn't it. Big ol' white moon.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M049
chinese: 看看我们在这里得到了什么。
english: Look what we got here.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F043
chinese: 奥吉，你带来了点心。
english: Augie, you brought refreshments.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M050
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F044
chinese: 我猜我们不需要眼镜。
english: I guess we don't need glasses.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M051
chinese: 你冷吗？你想回家吗？
english: Are you cold, huh?  Do you want to go home?

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F045
chinese: 我开始觉得你可能是对的。我觉得这可能就是那个地方。
english: I'm beginning to think you might be right.  I think this might be the spot after all.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F046
chinese: 奥吉，对不起。
english: Augie, I'm sorry.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M052
english: Shh...

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M053
chinese: 如果我们保持安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: If we are really quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_F047
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses01M_script02_2_M054
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？我想应该是在午夜左右吧？天啊，这太棒了，对吧，卡拉？看看我们这里的夜晚，嗯。
english: What time is it?  I think it's supposed to run around midnight, right?  God, this is great, isn't it, Carla?  Look at this night we got here, huh.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M001
chinese: 实际上，我想沿着海岸再往前走一点，远离所有的灯光和人群，但是...你好吗？
english: Actually I want to get a little further up the coast, get away from all like the lights and the people, but...  How are you doing?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M002
chinese: 好的。那个，那个是吗？
english: Okay.  Is that, is that--

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M003
chinese: 不，那只是泡沫。我不知道。我说不出来。
english: No.  That's just foam.  I don't know.  I can't tell.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F001
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M004
chinese: 我不知道，可能如果你说不出来的话，那可能不是他们，对吗？这可能会是一件明显的事情，对吗？
english: I don't know, probably if you can't tell, though, it's probably not them, right?  It's probably going to be like this unmistakable thing, right?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M005
chinese: 哦不。你知道我忘了什么吗？
english: Oh no.  you know what I forgot?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F002
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M006
chinese: 我的手电筒。天哪，我怎么会这么愚蠢？我简直不敢相信我忘记了我的手电筒。
english: My flashlight.  God, how could I be so stupid?  I can't believe I forgot my flashlight.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F003
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M007
chinese: 手电筒，那个银色的。只有一个，对吗？
english: The flashlight, the silver one.  There's only one, isn't there?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F004
chinese: 那不是你的手电筒。
english: That's not your flashlight.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M008
chinese: 它是谁的？
english: Whose is it?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F005
chinese: 这是我们的；这也是我的手电筒。
english: It's ours; it's my flashlight too.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M009
chinese: 哦...嗯。是的，当然。
english: Oh...well. Yeah, of course.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F006
chinese: 你一直说我的手电筒就像它只属于你一样。
english: You keep saying my flashlight like it's just yours.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M010
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F007
chinese: 这是怎么让我感觉的？
english: How's that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M011
chinese: 当然，我们的手电筒。你的就是我的。我的手电筒就是你的手电筒。
english: Of course, our flashlight.  What's yours is mine.  Me flashlight es su flashlight.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M012
chinese: 当然。天哪，我们怎么会忘记带它呢？不过我希望月亮能继续出来。
english: Naturally.  God, how could we not think to bring it?  I hope the moon stays out, though.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M013
chinese: 他们总是在满月时跑步吗？我不记得了。去年是满月吗？
english: Do they always run during a full moon?  I don't remember.  Was it full last year?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F008
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M014
chinese: 嗯。你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？不要？你知道，我们应该带毯子的。我们的毯子。
english: Huh.  Are you cold?  Do you want my jacket?  No?  you know, we should have brought the blanket?  Our blanket.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M015
chinese: 哎呀，你知道吗，我也应该带上一打啤酒。现在正好是喝一打啤酒的时候。嗯？
english: Aw.  Do you know, I should have brought a six pack, too.  A six pack, that would be just the ticket right about now.  Huh?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M016
chinese: 天啊，我太兴奋了，就像个孩子一样。我简直不敢相信我出门时拉链没拉开。
english: God, I'm so excited, I'm like a kid.  I can't believe I got out of the house with my fly zipped up.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F009
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M017
chinese: 我想知道他们是否能听到我说话，或者能否感受到我们在沙滩上移动时的振动。
english: I wonder if they can hear me talk or like feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F010
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M018
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F011
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了，我们走吧。
english: It's after eleven, let's go.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M019
chinese: 什么？我们刚到这里。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里的意义是什么？
english: What?  We just got here.  What's the point of coming all the way down here if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F012
chinese: 没有意义。
english: There is no point.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M020
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F013
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M021
chinese: 等等，那也是我的观点。
english: Wait, that's my point, too.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F014
chinese: 好的，那么我们走吧。
english: Well, then let's go.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M022
chinese: 不，不。好吧。那不是我的观点。我的观点是如果我们只是转身回家，那么下来这里就没有意义了。你不想看看吗？
english: No, no.  Okay.  That's not my point.  My point is there is no point in coming down here if we just turn around and go home.  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F015
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M023
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我就是不喜欢。这太愚蠢了。
english: I just don't.  It's stupid.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M024
chinese: 亲爱的，这就像是一个自然现象。我的意思是...堪萨斯的人们必须预订飞机和酒店才能看到这个。对我们来说只有四十分钟的路程，太好了，不容错过。
english: Honey, this is like a natural phenomenon. I mean... People in Kansas would have to get plane reservations and get hotel rooms to see this.  It's just forty minutes away for us; it's too good to pass up.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F017
chinese: 过什么？我的意思是这些鱼从海洋中游出来，在海滩上翻滚，然后游走，然后死去。
english: Pass what up?  I mean these fish swim out of the ocean, they flop around on the beach, they swim away and then they die.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M025
chinese: 是的。但是这个...海滩上的这一刻就像是他们小小生命中的亮点。所有那些翻滚都是为了产卵或者做什么 - 繁殖或交配或其他什么。
english: Yeah.  But this..this moment on the beach is like the highlight of their little lives.  All that flopping around is laying eggs or what to do - spawning or mating or whatever.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M026
chinese: 这对于这些小家伙来说是个重要的夜晚。就像是生命的最后狂欢。
english: This is a big night for these little guys.  It's like life's last orgy.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F018
chinese: 我不明白你为什么这么兴奋；我们谈论的不是登月，只是一条鱼而已。它只是一条没人吃的鱼。
english: I don't see why you're so excited; this isn't a freaking moon landing we are talking about.  It's fish.  It's a fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M027
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah they do.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F019
chinese: 哦，奥吉
english: Oh Augie

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M028
chinese: 好吧...嗯，无论如何。但它是一条做着其他鱼不会做的事情的鱼。就像那些返回卡皮斯特拉诺的燕子，或者像那些跳下悬崖的旅鼠。
english: okay... well, Whatever.  But it's a fish who do something no other fish do.  It's like those swallows returning to Capistrano or like those lemmings that throw themselves off the cliffs.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M029
chinese: 这里有一种神秘感，有一种魔力。就像一点点无法解释的东西。我就是无法理解你为什么不感兴趣。
english: There's like mystery here, there's magic.  It's like a little bit of the unexplainable.  I just can't see how you're not interested.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F020
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M030
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F021
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M031
chinese: 天啊，我不明白。你记得我们第一次来这里时，你说那是你一生中最美好的夜晚吗？
english: God, I don't get it.  you know the first time we came here, you said it was the best night of your life?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M032
chinese: 去年，我清楚地记得你说过，你非常兴奋地来到这里，直到我们坐在车里你才记起你撞到了脚趾。
english: And last year, I remember distinctly you said, you were so excited to get here that you don't remember you stubbed your toe until we were in the car.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F022
chinese: 上次，你也记得，我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，你喉咙痛，我们还发生了一场大争吵，我们没有看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Last time, you'll also remember, we got our shoes wet, I got sand in my panties, you got a sore throat and we got into a big fight and we did not see the grunions.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M033
chinese: 啊...我们不在一个好位置。
english: Ahh...we weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F023
chinese: 嗯，我们前一年也没有看到他们。
english: Hmm.  We didn't see them the year before either.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M034
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。我告诉你，这是一个更好的位置。我对这些事情有直觉。
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  I'm telling you, this is a much better spot.  I have instincts for these things.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M035
chinese: 看那里，看见了吗？那是什么？不，那只是海草。
english: Look there, see?  What's that?  No, that's - that's just seaweed.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M036
chinese: 天啊，这太棒了。想想看。我知道你对此不感兴趣，但是请思考一下。
english: God, this is great.  Think about this.  I know you are not interested, but just think about this.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M037
chinese: 现在外面有一大群银鱼，它们正朝这边游过来。没有人给它们发过邀请，没有人告诉它们，甚至没有人给它们一张地图。
english: Right now out there, there is this mass of silver fish and it's heading this way.  No one sent them an invitation, no one told them, no one even gave them a map.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M038
chinese: 突然间，他们转过身来，排成了一条与加利福尼亚海岸一样长的队伍。他们的身体里突然间燃起了一种本能的小火花，他们全都一起转身，开始游泳。
english: Just all at once, they turned and they formed this line as long as the California coast.  And some instinctual little firecracker went off in their bodies and they all just turned as one and started swimming.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M039
chinese: 他们现在正在游泳。他们游泳的样子好像那是他们唯一关心的事情。
english: They are swimming right now.  They are swimming as if that is the only thing that matters to them.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M040
chinese: 这是没有思想的单一目标。这是纯粹的迫切需要。
english: It's single mindedness with no mind.  It is urgency that is just pure urge.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M041
chinese: 他们现在正在游泳，游向我们站立的这个地方，为了这场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典。
english: And they are swimming right now to this very point where we stand for this huge celebration of sex and death.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M042
chinese: 哦，看看。我给自己起了鸡皮疙瘩，我的手臂上的毛发都竖了起来。
english: Oh look.  I'm giving myself goose bumps, my hairs are standing up on my arm.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F024
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M043
chinese: 那么你认为怎么样？
english: So what do you think?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_F025
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses01F_script02_1_M044
chinese: 关于所有那些，关于我所谈论的一切。
english: About all of that, about all I was talking about.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M000
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F000
chinese: [笑声] 完全、完全荒谬。
english: [LAUGHTER] Utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F001
chinese: 非常愚蠢。
english: Very much sillier.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M002
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M003
chinese: 然而，我确实相信那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: However, I do believe the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F002
chinese: 哦，你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: Oh you knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M004
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort. You took presents from him.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F003
chinese: 礼物？那只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents? It was a trivial little broach.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M005
chinese: 它以最糟糕的品味布满了钻石。
english: It was bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F004
chinese: 一点也不。它非常漂亮。我经常还戴着它。
english: Not at all. It was very pretty. I still wear it often.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M006
chinese: 你刻意为了折磨我而绕道去找彼得·伯登。
english: You sent out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F005
chinese: 我没有你在嫉妒的想象中把整件事情都搞砸。
english: I did not you worked whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M007
chinese: 好吧，你让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: Well, you let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F006
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well, what of it?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M008
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F007
chinese: 它给了他很多、很多的快乐，而且没有伤害到我。
english: It gave him a lot, a great deal of pleasure and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M009
chinese: 那我呢？
english: And what about me?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F008
chinese: 如果你不那么多疑和爱管闲事，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: If you hadn't been so suspicious and nosey you'd never known a thing about it.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M010
chinese: 那是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F009
chinese: 我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M011
chinese: 我也是。我无聊得要命。你想喝点白兰地吗？
english: So am I.  I'm bored stiff.  You want some brandy?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F010
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No, thank you.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M012
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I'll have a little, I think.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F011
chinese: 我不明白为什么你还想要，你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want any you already had two glasses.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M013
chinese: 哦，除了它们是非常小的眼镜之外，你知道没有特别的原因。
english: Oh, you know no particular reason besides they are very small glasses.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F012
chinese: 我只是觉得你知道，对这样一件事情继续不停地说下去很愚蠢。
english: I just think it's silly you know to go on and on and on about such a thing.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M014
chinese: 你几乎不能说整个晚上喝三杯酒就是一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three glasses of liquor in a whole evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F013
chinese: 我只是，我只是觉得这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: I just, I just think it's becoming a habit with you.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M015
chinese: 嗯，好吧，你不必因为此刻不想要任何东西而摆出这么高傲的样子，好吗？
english: Hmm.  Well, you needn't be so grand just because you don't happen to want any at the moment, okay?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F014
chinese: 请安静。
english: Do be quiet.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M016
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F015
chinese: 不要傻了，什么？
english: Don't be stupid, what?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M017
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M018
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Are you going out somewhere dear?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F016
chinese: 不，亲爱的，我只是为了你让自己变得迷人。
english: No, darling I'm just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M019
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F017
chinese: 好吧，吸引男人是女人的责任。你能看一分钟吗？
english: Well it's a woman's duty to allure the man. Watch me a minute will you?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M020
chinese: 事实上，这是完全正确的。
english: As matter the fact that's perfectly true.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F018
chinese: 哦不，不是这样的。
english: Oh no, it isn't.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M021
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F019
chinese: 不要傻了，闭嘴。
english: Don't be stupid, shut up.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M022
chinese: 你知道，很可惜你没有更多的白兰地。它会让你稍微不那么不愉快的。
english: You know, it's a pity you didn't have any more brandy. It would have made you just a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F020
chinese: 哦，那真有趣。看起来它对你并没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: Oh, well that's funny.  It doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M023
chinese: 你知道吗？你咬人，你咬人，你咬人就像一条小蝰蛇。
english: You know what?  You snap, you snap, you snap you're like a little adder.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F021
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M024
chinese: 胡说八道。他们在牙齿后面有一袋毒液，他们会咬人。
english: Nonsense.  They have a bag of venom behind of fangs and they snap.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F022
chinese: 它们叮咬。
english: They sting.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F023
chinese: 我不在乎。我不在乎，你明白吗？如果它们叫并像箍圈一样滚动，我也不介意。
english: I don't care.  I don't care, do you understand?  I don't mind if they bark and they roll about like hoops.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M025
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F024
chinese: 是的，我做了很多。
english: Yes, I did quite a lot.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M026
chinese: 我猜你让他亲吻你，或者比亲吻更进一步。
english: I suppose you let him just kiss you or good deal more than too.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F025
chinese: 哦，管好你自己的事。
english: Oh, mind you own business.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我猜你们两个玩得很疯狂，对吧？完全没有约束，非常愉快，他本来就没有太多约束。
english: I suppose you two had a riotous time, huh?  No restrain at all, very enjoyable, he never had much any how.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F026
chinese: 你真是讨人厌，我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable, I expect it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M028
chinese: 我一点儿也没有喝醉。
english: I am not in the least bit drunk.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F027
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不好的问题。
english: You always had a weak head.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M029
chinese: 我想我之前告诉过你，整个晚上我都用三分钟的酒杯。一个两岁的孩子不会因此而醉。
english: I think I told you once before that I had three minute liquor glasses the whole evening long.  A Child of two cannot get drunk on that.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F028
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就能醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child two could get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M030
chinese: 哦，非常非常有趣的阿曼达。那么，四岁、六岁或者可能是九岁的孩子怎么样？我们可以就此展开一场精彩的辩论，你知道吗？这些任性的小家伙们。
english: Oh very, very interesting Amanda.  How about the child of uh... four, six or maybe nine---you know, we could work up a splendid little debate about it, you know?  Intemperate tots.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F029
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F030
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。你为什么不再喝点白兰地呢？
english: Not very funny darling.  Why don't you have some more brandy?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M031
chinese: 那是一个非常好的主意，我想我会这样做。
english: That's a very good idea I think I will.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M032
chinese: 请你...把那个关掉好吗？你会吵醒楼上的人。
english: Would you uh...turn that off please? You're going to wake the people upstairs.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F031
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F032
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There are no people upstairs. It's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M033
chinese: 那么你会吵醒楼下的人。
english: Well then you'll wake the people downstairs.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F033
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They are away in Tunis.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M034
chinese: 这不是去突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time a year for Tunis.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F034
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M035
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I will do no such thing.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F035
chinese: 好吧，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M036
chinese: 关掉它。它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off. It's driving me mad.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F036
chinese: 我不会。
english: I won't.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M037
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F037
chinese: 停下来。不。走开。
english: Stop it. No. Go away.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M038
chinese: 阿曼达听着。听着。
english: Amanda listen. Listen.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F038
chinese: 听着，我受够了听你说话，你这个该死的虐待狂恶霸。
english: listen Oh I'm sick and tired of listening to you, you damn sadistic bully.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M039
chinese: 那确实非常有趣。
english: That's very amusing indeed.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F039
chinese: 哦，你真残忍，你...你...我讨厌你，我讨厌你。走开。你自负。你专横。你完全不可理喻。
english: Oh you're cruel you're...you're...I hate you, I hate you. Go away. You're conceited. You're overbearing. You're utterly impossible.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M040
chinese: 你...你是一个邪恶心机、自我为中心的小贱人，我再也不想见到你了。
english: You...You're an evil minded, self-centered little wench and I never want to see you again.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F040
chinese: 这是结束了，你听到了吗？最终和永远。
english: This is the end do you hear me?  Finally and forever.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M041
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_F041
chinese: 哦，是的，我是...哦，是的，我是。放开我。你放开。你...呃...你是个残忍的朋友。我憎恨你，我讨厌你。再嫁给你...哈...永远不会，永远不会，永远不会，永远不会。我希望你在痛苦中死去。你这个野兽。
english: Oh yes I am...Oh yes I am. Let go of me. You let go. You...urgh...You're a cruel friend. I loathe and I hate you. Marry you again...Ha...Never, never, never, never. I hope you die in torment. You beast.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M042
chinese: 不，你不是。
english: No you're not.

name: Ses01M_script03_2_M043
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。如果你跪着向我求婚，我也不会再嫁给你。你是一个邪恶脾气的小吸血鬼，只要我活着，我永远不想再见到你。
english: Shut up. Shut up. I wouldn't marry you again if you came crawling back to me on a bended knee. You are an evil tempered little vampire and I never want to see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F000
chinese: 我可以帮助你吗？
english: Can I help you?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M000
chinese: 是的，请帮帮我。我的包在哪里？
english: Yes, please help me.  Where is my bag?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F001
chinese: 我需要更多的信息。
english: I need a little more information.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M001
chinese: 我的包在哪里？快点，我已经在这里待了四个小时了。
english: Where is my bag?  Come on, I've been here for four hours.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F002
chinese: 你乘坐了哪个航班来的？
english: What- What flight did you come in on?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M002
chinese: 好的，我从亚特兰大过来。
english: Okay, I'm coming in from Atlanta.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F003
chinese: 乔治亚？
english: Georgia?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M003
chinese: 是的，乔治亚。很好，我需要我的包。你能...
english: Yes, Georgia.  Good for you I need my bag.  Can you...

name: Ses01M_impro05_F004
chinese: 先生，您没有必要提高声音。
english: There's no need for you to raise your voice, sir.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F005
chinese: 我接受过大学教育。
english: I've been college educated.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F006
chinese: 我说你的语言。
english: I speak your language.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M004
chinese: 你是在暗示我没有大学教育，而且因为这个原因你比我更优秀吗？
english: Are you insinuating that I don't have a college education and that- for some reason that makes you a better person than I am?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M005
chinese: 听着，闭上你那自以为是的嘴巴，好吗？我不需要那个。
english: Listen, shut your smug mouth, okay?  I don't need that.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F007
chinese: 我只是在说你不需要像对待我一样和我说话。
english: I'm just saying you don't need to talk to me like I-

name: Ses01M_impro05_M006
chinese: 我已经坐在这里四个小时了。
english: I've been sitting here for four hours.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F008
chinese: 我不是一个孩子。
english: I'm not a child.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F009
chinese: 我已经在这里待了十六个。
english: I've been here for sixteen.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M007
chinese: 你们这些人就像把我当成一块用过的手帕一样随意扔来扔去。
english: You people have just been tossing me around like a used hanky.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F010
chinese: 我每天都来这里。
english: I come here every single day.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M008
chinese: 你在这里工作。
english: You work here.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F011
chinese: 细节，细节。嗯，无论如何我可以吗？
english: Details, Details.  Well, anyhow can I--

name: Ses01M_impro05_F012
chinese: 所以你从亚特兰大飞来了...
english: so you flew in from Atlanta...

name: Ses01M_impro05_M009
chinese: 我的包来自亚特兰大。
english: My bag from Atlanta.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F013
chinese: 四个小时前。
english: Four...Four hours ago.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M010
chinese: 这是一个带有轮子的小黑色包包。
english: It's a little black bag with wheels.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F014
chinese: 你有任何i-吗？
english: Do you have any i-?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M011
chinese: 你不让我把它放在行李架上。你说我必须托运它。
english: That you wouldn't let me put in the overhead compartment.  You said I had to check it.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F015
chinese: 我不会让你吗？我不在亚特兰大。我不在亚特兰大。
english: I wouldn't let you?   I was not in Atlanta. I was not in Atlanta.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M012
chinese: 这是一个小小的包。
english: It's a tiny little bag.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F016
chinese: 我与登机手续无关。很抱歉您的座位在哪里。
english: I had nothing to do with the boarding attendance.  I'm sorry that your seat was wherever it was.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M013
chinese: 它正好在五个不同的人中间。我旁边有一个巨大的胖女人，左边有一个哭泣的孩子，我说可以给我来一杯血腥玛丽吗？请你给我来一杯血腥玛丽好吗？
english: It was right in the middle of five different people.  I had a huge fat lady next me, a crying kid on left I went like can I please get a Bloody Mary, please? Will you bring a Bloody Mary?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F017
chinese: 我有一些不幸的消息，嗯，你的包包不会...
english: I have some unfortunate news, uh, that your bag isn't going to be--

name: Ses01M_impro05_F018
chinese: --不会很快到达。
english: --arriving any time soon.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M014
chinese: 刚刚度过了一天非常非常有压力的日子，好吗？我需要我的包，你能帮我拿一下我的包吗？
english: Just had a really, really stressful day, okay?  And I need my bag; can you please help me get my bag?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F019
chinese: 我非常抱歉告诉你这个，但是...
english: I'm really sorry to tell you this but...

name: Ses01M_impro05_M015
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F020
chinese: 这不是。我可以给你五十美元和一张我们航空公司的报销礼品卡...
english: It's not.  I can offer you fifty dollars and a reimbursement gift cards for our airline...

name: Ses01M_impro05_F021
chinese: ...和你的未来...
english: ...and your future...

name: Ses01M_impro05_M016
chinese: 对不起，请等一下。你是说我根本拿不到我的包吗？
english: I'm sorry, wait a minute.  Are you saying I'm not going to get my bag at all?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F022
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M017
chinese: 它已经消失了。
english: It's gone.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F023
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M018
chinese: 它在哪里？它去哪了？
english: Where is it?  Where did it go?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F024
chinese: 我们实际上...
english: We've actually...

name: Ses01M_impro05_M019
chinese: 你的意思是有人偷了它吗？人们会偷包吗？
english: You mean did someone steal it? Do people steal bags?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F025
chinese: 他们确实这样做。我们不喜欢公开宣传它，因为
english: They do as matter of fact.  We don't like to publicize it because

name: Ses01M_impro05_F026
chinese: 人们不会乘坐我们的航空公司。
english: people wouldn't Fly our airline.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M020
chinese: 可能是你公司的员工吧？
english: Probably people that work for your company huh?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M021
chinese: 你知道那个小包里面是什么吗？我本来可以轻松地把它放在行李架上，但是我非要检查一下。
english: Do you know what was in that little bag that I could have just easily put in overhead compartment but no I had to check?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F027
chinese: 那是什么？
english: What was that?

name: Ses01M_impro05_M022
chinese: 我的电脑里有我正在收集的所有数据。
english: My computer which has all of my data which I'm collecting right now.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F028
chinese: 很不幸。
english: That's unfortunate.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M023
chinese: 是的，这真的很不幸，你知道为什么吗？因为如果我得不到那个，我就会被解雇。所以我需要把那个拿回来。
english: Yeah it's really unfortunate you know why because I'm going to get fired if I don't get that.  So I need to have that back.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F029
chinese: 太糟糕了。
english: That's too bad.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M024
chinese: 五十美元不足以支付我的工作费用，好吗？
english: Fifty dollars is not going to cover me for my job, okay?

name: Ses01M_impro05_F030
chinese: 我希望我能把它给你。
english: I wish I could give it to you.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M025
chinese: 好的，你需要找到它。我可以回去那里，翻找那些袋子吗？我可以回去那里，然后仔细翻找，也许我会找到它。
english: Well you need to find it. Can I just go back there and look through the bags?  Can I just go back there and just go through maybe I'll find it.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F031
chinese: 我希望我-
english: I wish I-

name: Ses01M_impro05_F032
chinese: 那不是-不是。
english: That's not - no.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F033
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M026
chinese: 这将远远超过你现在坐在这里光说不做的程度。我想至少回去做一些积极地寻找我的东西。
english: It'll be a lot more than what you're doing sitting here and just give me lip service.  I'd like to go back at least do some aggressive searching for my stuff.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F034
chinese: 我们正在进行大量的积极搜索，但没有找到。有人拿走了。
english: We have plenty of aggressive searching going on it's not there.  Someone's taken it.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M027
chinese: 当然，是的，你有很多积极的搜索行为，积极搜索、喝咖啡和抽烟。
english: Sure, yeah right you have plenty of aggressive searching going on, aggressive searching, drinking coffee and smoking cigarettes.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M028
chinese: 我知道你们在不工作的时候都在干什么，你们是工会的人；你们就是坐在那里无所事事。
english: I know what you guys do when you're not working you're union people; you just sit around on your ass.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F035
chinese: 你知道我不需要忍受这种虐待。
english: You know I don't need to take this sort of abuse.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M029
chinese: 好吧，我也不需要忍受这种虐待。我只是想回到亚特兰大。我刚回到家，只想拿到我的包和东西。并保住我的工作。
english: Well, I don't need to take this kind of abuse either.  I just was trying get back to Atlanta. I just got home, I just want to get my bag and get my stuff. And keep my job.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F036
chinese: 太棒了。
english: That's fantastic.

name: Ses01M_impro05_F037
chinese: 那你为什么不拿走你的五十美元呢？明天坐出租车去购物吧。
english: Then why don't you take your fifty dollars. Get yourself a taxi and go shopping tomorrow.

name: Ses01M_impro05_M030
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro05_M031
chinese: 非常感谢你。
english: Thank you very much.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F000
chinese: 下一个。
english: Next.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M000
chinese: 是的，我。好的，好的，我们开始吧。
english: Yes, me. Okay, okay here we go.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F001
chinese: 我的窗户是开着的。
english: My window is open.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M001
chinese: 好的，所以填写完了所有这些表格。
english: Okay, so filled out all these forms  --

name: Ses01M_impro01_F002
chinese: 这是...你的姓氏是琼斯？
english: This is... Your last- Your first name is Jones?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M002
chinese: 我有这种形式的身份证明在这里，所以...
english: and I have This form of ID here so...

name: Ses01M_impro01_M003
chinese: 是的，琼斯。
english: Yes, Jones.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F003
chinese: 那真是奇怪，我以为你填错了部分。
english: That's just strange I figured you filled in wrong sections.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M004
chinese: 好的...
english: Well...

name: Ses01M_impro01_F004
chinese: 你在做什么...什么...你在申请什么？
english: What are you... what's...What are you applying for?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M005
chinese: 我只是申请另一个身份证。
english: I'm just applying for another ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F005
chinese: 另一个身份证号码？
english: Another ID?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M006
chinese: 是的。我应该为这个工作准备三种身份证明。这是一个很长的故事，我应该为这个其他工作准备三种身份证明，我真的不太清楚，但我需要另外一个...
english: Yes.  I'm supposed to have three forms of ID for this.  It's a long story, I'm supposed to have three forms of ID for this other job I really don't get into but I need another...

name: Ses01M_impro01_F006
chinese: 好的。所以我需要身份证。
english: Fine.  So I need ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M007
chinese: 我就在这里，是的。
english: I have it right here, yes.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F007
chinese: 不，我需要你的身份证才能给你第二个身份证。
english: No, I need your ID to give you a second ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F008
chinese: 如果你对此有问题，那真的很简单...也许你应该--
english: It's really simple if you have a problem with it... Maybe you should--

name: Ses01M_impro01_M008
chinese: 但是那是...
english: But that's...

name: Ses01M_impro01_M009
chinese: 这就是为什么我在这里，这就是为什么我在排队等候。我需要获得另一种身份证明。
english: That's why I'm here, that's why I was waiting in this line.  I need to get another form of ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F009
chinese: 好的，你有你的护照吗？
english: Well, do you have your passport?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M010
chinese: 不，我没有护照。
english: No, I don't have a passport.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F010
chinese: 你有出生证明吗？
english: You have a birth certificate?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M011
chinese: 我不知道它在哪里，我没有带着它。我可以从某个地方拿到它吗？我的意思是...
english: I don't where it is though, I don't have with me.  Can I get it from somewhere?  I mean...

name: Ses01M_impro01_F011
chinese: 你希望我做什么？
english: What do you expect me to do?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M012
chinese: 我可能还需要排队去拿我的出生证明，对吗？
english: I probably have to go wait another line to get my birth certificate don't I?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F012
chinese: 可能。
english: Probably.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M013
chinese: 你非常有帮助。你叫什么名字？
english: You're very helpful.  What's your name?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F013
chinese: 喜悦。
english: Joy.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M014
chinese: 嗨，乔伊。
english: Hi, Joy.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F014
chinese: 嗨。你知道...
english: Hi.   You know...

name: Ses01M_impro01_M015
chinese: 所以你能帮助我吗？
english: So can you help me or not?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F015
chinese: 我是...我不...我不明白你想要什么。是驾驶执照还是加利福尼亚身份证。
english: I am..I don't..I don't understand what you want.  A driver's license or a California ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M016
chinese: 好的。[呼吸声]
english: Okay. [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro01_M017
chinese: 我需要加利福尼亚身份证。
english: I need California ID.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F016
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M018
chinese: 除了我已经拥有的这两种身份证明之外。
english: On top of these other two forms of ID which I already have.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F017
chinese: 什么...嗯，你有驾驶执照吗？
english: What... well, do you have a driver's license?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M019
chinese: 不，我没有驾驶执照。
english: No, I don't have driver's license.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F018
chinese: 那么我应该如何给你一张加利福尼亚身份证呢？
english: Then how am I supposed to give you a California ID?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M020
chinese: 你甚至看过表格吗？我回答了所有这些问题--
english: Did you even look at the form?  I filled it out all these questions--

name: Ses01M_impro01_F019
chinese: 不要对我大声说话。
english: Don't raise your voice with me.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M021
chinese: 你甚至看过表格吗？我已经回答了这些问题。
english: Did you even look at the form?  I've already answered these question.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F020
chinese: 不要像对待一个孩子一样和我说话。
english: Don't talk to me like I'm a child.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M022
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F021
chinese: 你知道我在这里工作了多久吗？你在加利福尼亚住了多久？
english: Do you know how long I've been working here? How long have you lived in California?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M023
chinese: 如果这让你停止像个孩子一样行动的话。
english: If it makes you stop acting like a child.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M024
chinese: 我一直去过加利福尼亚--
english: I have been to California my whole--

name: Ses01M_impro01_F022
chinese: 也许你以前从未去过车管所，也许你应该重新排队。你知道吗？再次排队，如果你拿到我的号码，就要求换一个号码。
english: Maybe you never been to the D.M.V. before, maybe you should get back in line.  You know what?  sit in line again and if you get my number ask for different one.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M025
chinese: 我不是...我不能回到那条线。
english: I am not...I'm not getting to back that line.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M026
chinese: 好的，好的，让我们保持声音低一点，好吗？我来这里不是为了吵架。
english: Okay, okay let's keep our voices down, okay?  I didn't come here to get in yelling match.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F023
chinese: 我很平静。
english: I'm perfectly calm.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M027
chinese: 我进来不是为了和你吵架，好吗？
english: I did not come in here to get in a yelling match with you, all right?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F024
chinese: 嗯，我也不是来这里吵架的。
english: Uh huh.  I didn't come here get in yelling match either.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M028
chinese: 只是试着帮助我。
english: Just try and help me.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F025
chinese: 他们不付我足够的钱来应对像你这样的人。
english: They don't pay me enough to deal people like you.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M029
chinese: 人们喜欢我，那是什么意思？你知道，这太荒谬了。这里有经理吗？有其他人我可以和他们交谈吗？
english: People like me, what is that supposed to mean?  You know, this is ridiculous.  Is there like a manager here, is there someone else that I can talk to?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F026
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01M_impro01_M030
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01M_impro01_F027
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F028
chinese: 所以你不打算给我寄一张感谢卡，这是个问题吗？你不打算...
english: So you're not going to send me a thank you card, is that a problem? Is your are not going...

name: Ses01M_impro01_M031
chinese: 为什么，因为我厌倦了和你说话。
english: Why, because I'm sick of talking to you.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M032
chinese: 因为显然你不是在和我说话，你只是在对我大喊大叫，责骂我，并告诉我我填表格不对。
english: 'Cause you're obviously not talking to me, you're just yelling at me, berating me and telling me I can't fill out forms right.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F029
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。哦，噢-噢，噢-噢。
english: Oh, dear. Oh, boo-foo-woo, foo-foo.

name: Ses01M_impro01_M033
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，你还会错过圣诞卡片呢。真可惜。这将是一张好看的照片。
english: Oh, no honey. And you're going to miss the Christmas card too. It's a shame. It's going to be a good, nice picture.

name: Ses01M_impro01_F030
chinese: 请坐回去。
english: Sit back down.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M000
chinese: 那么，怎么样？有什么新鲜事吗？
english: So what's up?  What's new?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F000
chinese: 嗯，拉斯维加斯真是太棒了。
english: Well Vegas was awesome.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M001
chinese: 是的，我听说了。
english: Yeah.  I heard.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F001
chinese: 然后，嗯，我结婚了。
english: And, um, I got married.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M002
chinese: 闭嘴。不- 在拉斯维加斯吗？
english: Shut up.  No- in Vegas?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F002
chinese: 是的。在老城区的一部分。
english: Yeah.  In the old town part.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M003
chinese: 你嫁给了谁？
english: Who did you marry?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F003
chinese: 查克。【笑声】
english: Chuck. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro03_M004
chinese: 你向自己求婚了吗？
english: Did you propose to you?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F004
chinese: 嗯- 是的。那非常浪漫。
english: Um- Yes.  It was very romantic.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F005
chinese: 在老虎机上。
english: It was at the slot machines.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M005
chinese: 哦，是幸运之轮老虎机吗？
english: Oh.  The Wheel of Fortune slots?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F006
chinese: 嗯嗯，嗯嗯。他赢得了很大的胜利，他意识到唯一能让事情变得更好的就是我成为他的新娘。
english: Uhuh, uhuh.  He won big and he-and he realized that the only thing that would make it better was me as his bride.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M006
chinese: 他转向你，然后说道...
english: He turned to you and was like...

name: Ses01F_impro03_F007
chinese: 嘿。让我们结婚吧，我说好的。
english: Hey.  Let's get married and I said okay.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M007
chinese: [笑声] 这真的很浪漫。
english: [LAUGHTER] That's really romantic.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F008
chinese: 是的。嗯。你知道，因为他第二天要离开。
english: Yeah.  Well.  You know, because he's leaving the next day.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M008
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F009
chinese: 但是我们打算去度蜜月的时候会乘坐一艘游轮。
english: But we're going to have a honeymoon cruise.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M009
chinese: 这是否意味着你也会在英格兰或其他地方获得公民身份？
english: Does that mean that you're going to get citizenship, too, in- in England or whatever?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F010
chinese: 哦，我甚至都没有考虑过那个。
english: Oh.  I hadn't even thought about that.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M010
chinese: 是的。想一想这个。
english: Yeah.  Think about that.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F011
chinese: 他不会成为一个公民，不过。
english: He's not going to be a citizen, though.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M011
chinese: 是的。但是他会有一个长期签证。你可以去探望他很长时间吗？
english: Yeah.  But he'll have like a long visa.  Can you go visit then for a long time?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F012
chinese: 哦。完全。
english: Oh.  Totally.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M012
chinese: 哦，你打算怎么处理远距离的事情？那么等等，你打算搬到那里吗？
english: Oh, how are you going to do the long distance thing?  So wait, are you going to move there?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F013
chinese: 我猜我会-我猜我会找一个网络丈夫。[笑声]
english: I guess I'll-  I guess I'll have an internet husband.[LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro03_M013
chinese: 就像你需要另一个一样。[笑声]
english: Like you need another one of those.[LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_impro03_F014
chinese: 我有一个网上男朋友。我想我得同时应付两个人。这算是出轨吗？我不知道。嗯。
english: I have an internet boyfriend.  I guess I'll have to juggle the two.  Is that cheating?  I don't know. Hmm.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M014
chinese: 那是你的手机吗？
english: Is that your phone?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F015
chinese: 是的，所以[笑声]他正在给我打电话。
english: Yeah, so [LAUGHTER] He's calling me now

name: Ses01F_impro03_M015
chinese: 他爱你。
english: He loves you.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F016
chinese: 他喜欢掌握情况，你知道的。
english: He likes to keep tabs, you know.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M016
chinese: 他在老虎机上赢了多少钱？
english: How much did he win at the slot?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F017
chinese: 嗯，我想是七百五十美元。
english: Uh, I think seven hundred and fifty dollars.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M017
chinese: 真的吗？一分钱的老虎机？
english: Really? Penny slots?

name: Ses01F_impro03_F018
chinese: 便士老虎机。那是他玩的游戏。
english: Penny slots. That's what he plays.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M018
chinese: 哇。
english: Wow.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M019
chinese: 我是《幸运之轮》游戏的忠实粉丝。但是它的价格太高了。我不知道。
english: I'm a big fan of the Wheel of Fortune quarters. But it just costs so much.  I don't know.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F020
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F021
chinese: 是的。我们玩了“幸运轮盘”游戏。它就像一个巨大的东西，里面有很多像一分钱那样的东西。
english: Yeah.  We played Wheel of Fortune pennies.  It's like a giant thing with like-

name: Ses01F_impro03_M020
chinese: 但是一直有一些小钱会让你花掉，因为你最后会花掉，就像你知道的那样，五十块钱。
english: But the pennies always get you because you end up spending like, you know, fifty bucks.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F022
chinese: 五十块。嗯嗯。
english: Fifty bucks. Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M021
chinese: 喜欢，等待，但只是几分钱。你会说，等一下，我看穿你了。
english: like, wait, but it's just pennies.  You're like, wait a minute I'm on to you.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F023
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F024
chinese: 好吧，现在我们结婚了。我们有猫孩子。
english: Well so now we're married. We have cat children.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M022
chinese: 太棒了。
english: Awesome.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M023
chinese: [笑声] 猫宝宝们。
english: [LAUGHTER] Cat babies.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F025
chinese: 我们将布伦达重新命名为伐木珍妮特。
english: We renamed Brenda, Lumber Janet.

name: Ses01F_impro03_M024
chinese: 那是公平的。
english: That's fair enough.

name: Ses01F_impro03_F026
chinese: 她需要在我们进入每个州时换一个新名字。【笑声】
english: She needs a new name each state that we go into. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro03_M000
chinese: 最疯狂的事情刚刚发生在我身上。
english: The craziest thing just happened to me.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F000
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M001
chinese: 这个女孩；她刚刚向我提出了五万美元的婚姻提议。
english: This girl; she just offered me fifty thousand dollars to marry her.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F001
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_impro03_M002
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M003
chinese: 嗯，她不是公民，所以她想要获得签证。
english: Well, she's not a citizen so she wants to get a visa.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F003
chinese: 她在逃跑吗？
english: Is she on the run?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M004
chinese: 不，不，不，不，不，不，她只是...她不是公民，但她想要她的签证，是的。她要付给我五万美元来和她结婚，并且维持两年的婚姻关系。
english: No, no, no, no, no, no she just... she's not a citizen but she wants her visa, yeah. She's going to pay me fifty thousand dollars to marry her and stay married to her for two years.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F004
chinese: 哦，她只是需要嫁给你。
english: Oh, she just needs to marry you.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F005
chinese: 那太不可思议了。那太棒了。她是哪里人？也许你可以获得双重国籍。
english: That's incredible. That's awesome. Where's she from?  Maybe you can get a dual citizenship.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M005
chinese: 这就像每年二万五千美元，什么都不做。那不是很棒吗？
english: That's like twenty five thousand dollar a year for doing nothing. Isn't that awesome?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M006
chinese: 她实际上来自英格兰，我想。嗯，她-她说英语，但有口音。我甚至没有问。
english: She's actually from England, I think.  Well she- she spoke English but she had an accent. I didn't even ask.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F006
chinese: 那太酷了。嗯嗯。
english: That's so cool. Uh huh.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F007
chinese: [笑声] 她为什么选择了你？你在哪里？
english: [LAUGHTER] Why did she pick you? Where were you?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M007
chinese: 五万美元。五万美元。我刚刚出去了...我只是...她是-嗯，她是一个朋友的朋友，但是像...
english: Fifty thousand dollars. Fifty thousand dollars. I was just out... I just... she's - well, she's a friend of friend but like...

name: Ses01M_impro03_F008
chinese: 你去参加了一个派对？她说：“嘿，你看起来没有伴侣。”
english: You were at a party? And she's like hey. You seem unattached she's like.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M008
chinese: 是的。你能相信吗？是的，她就像嘿，我就像当然我会做，我不在乎。是的。我就像五万美元，我完全可以为五万美元做这件事。但唯一的问题是那有点像违法。所以如果我被抓到的话，我可能会被判很长时间的监禁，但是...
english: Yeah.  Can you believe that? Yeah, she's like hey, I'm like sure I'll do it, I don't care. Yeah. I'm like fifty thousand dollars, I'd totally do it for fifty thousand dollars. But the only thing is that's kind of like illegal. So like I could go to jail probably for a long if I get caught, but...

name: Ses01M_impro03_F009
chinese: 那真是难以置信... 是的。
english: That's unbelievable... Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F010
chinese: 嗯，我认识之前做过这件事的人。是的。你只需要- 其实这真的很有趣，因为你可以举办一个假的订婚派对，所有的朋友都会过来，然后...
english: Well I've known people who have done this before. Yeah.  You just- it's really fun actually 'cause you have like a fake engagement party and all your friends come over and like...

name: Ses01M_impro03_M009
chinese: 你有吗？
english: Have you?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M010
chinese: 就像我真的要结婚一样。我们会有整个婚礼的一切。
english: It's like I'm really going to get married. We'll have like the whole thing.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M011
chinese: 哦，好的。【笑声】
english: Oh, good. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro03_F011
english: Yeah. Yeah. And then yeah, and then you know like you could like you could do like like sock her for a lot of money

name: Ses01M_impro03_M012
chinese: 我知道。你认为我应该怎么做？
english: I know. What do you think I should-

name: Ses01M_impro03_F012
chinese: 就像让她租下我们俩要一起住的公寓，你知道的。而且你不用付任何房租，或者你付一百块钱一个月之类的。
english: Like make her rent the apartment that you two have to live together in, you know. And you won't pay any rent or you pay like, a hundred bucks a month or something.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M013
chinese: 哦，好主意。
english: Oh good idea.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M014
chinese: 是的。让她也像开银行账户之类的事情。
english: Yeah.  Make her like open the bank account and stuff too.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F013
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M015
chinese: 这是一个好主意。
english: It's a good idea.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F014
chinese: 伙计，你真走运。
english: Dude, you lucked out.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M016
chinese: 我知道。而且现在我还可以参与筹划婚礼。那将会很有趣。
english: I know.  Also I get to like plan the wedding now too. That will be fun.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F015
chinese: 是的。我的颜色是脸红和米色，你知道是什么吗？
english: Yeah.  My colors are blush and beige what is it, do you know?

name: Ses01M_impro03_M017
chinese: 某种蓝色的东西，某种新的东西，某种...不，我不知道。[笑声] 所以，是的，不知道她是否会提前付钱给我，但你觉得这样做是否不好，你觉得他们会追踪这笔钱或者其他什么吗？
english: Something blue, something new, something... no I don't know. [LAUGHTER] So yeah, wonder if she's going to pay me up front but do you think it's bad though, do you think they're going to like track the money or something?

name: Ses01M_impro03_F016
chinese: 哦，我不知道。【笑声】
english: Oh I don't know. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro03_F017
chinese: 我不知道如何以现金形式得到它。
english: I don't know get it in cash.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M018
chinese: 只是现金硬核。
english: Just cash hardcore.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F018
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M019
