chinese: 我们应该做什么？我们应该在哪里结婚？我们应该举办派对。
english: What should we do?  Where should we get married? We should have party.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F019
chinese: 多么令人兴奋。你应该在海滩上举办婚礼。
english: How exciting. You should have a wedding on the beach.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M020
chinese: 是的，就像一个大的婚礼在海滩上，那将会很美好。
english: Yeah, like a big like- A wedding on the beach, that would be nice.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F020
chinese: 是的，晚上。
english: Yeah, at night.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M021
chinese: 然后我们可以度蜜月。我想去热带地区，比如巴哈马，或者塔希提之类的地方。我只想去海滩，喝点东西。
english: And then we can honeymoon.  I want to go tropical though like Bahamas- --or like Tahiti or something. I just want to like beach and like drink.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F021
chinese: 哦，是的，绝对，绝对。
english: Oh yeah, absolutely, absolutely.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F022
chinese: 多么令人兴奋。你应该让她也带上你所有的朋友。
english: How exciting.  You should make her bring all your friends too.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M022
chinese: 我会让她为此付出代价。我听说她非常富有。她就像是皇室——或者类似的东西——无论如何，就像被排除在外或者其他什么，但是是的。
english: I'll make her pay for that.  I hear she's like totally wealthy. She's like royalty- --or something like and- --whatever like removed or something but yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F023
chinese: 她一定很有钱。五万美元。太不可思议了。
english: [GARBAGE] She's got to be loaded.  fifty thousand dollars.  That's incredible.

name: Ses01M_impro03_F024
chinese: 令人难以置信。
english: Incredible.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M023
chinese: 我要嫁给一个贵族。【笑声】
english: I'm going to marry a blue blood. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro03_F025
chinese: 你是一个幸运的人。
english: you're a lucky, lucky, lucky man.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M024
chinese: 你会帮我规划吗？
english: Will you help me plan?

name: Ses01M_impro03_F026
chinese: 哦，完全是的。是的。
english: Oh, totally. Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro03_M025
chinese: 好的。
english: Good.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F000
chinese: 我唯一知道的人仍然爱他的父母。
english: The only one I know still love his parents.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M000
chinese: 是的，那种风格已经过时了，不是吗？
english: Yeah, that kind of went out of style didn't it?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F001
chinese: 哦，这不是坏事，这是好事。
english: Oh it's not bad thing it's good thing.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F002
chinese: 你知道这里很好，空气很甜。
english: You know it's nice here, the air is sweet.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了吗？
english: You're not sorry you came?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不，我不抱歉。我不能在这里待下去。
english: Not sorry, no.  I can't stay here.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F004
chinese: 首先，你的母亲几乎告诉我要走。
english: For one thing your mother as much as told me to go.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: Well.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F005
chinese: [呼吸] 然后你有点...
english: [BREATHING] And then you've been kind of...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F006
chinese: 自从我到这里以来，你一直有点尴尬。
english: You've been kind of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M005
chinese: 我原本打算在你身上偷偷摸摸地接近你，你知道，大概一个星期左右。他们只是认为我们已经准备好了。
english: I was kind of planning on sneaking up on you, you know over like a course of a week or so. They just take for granted that we're already set.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我知道他们会的，无论如何是你的母亲。
english: I knew they would, your mother anyway.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你做了吗？
english: You did?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F008
chinese: 从她的角度来看，我为什么还会来呢？
english: From her point of view why else would I come?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M007
chinese: 是的--
english: Yeah--

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M008
chinese: 那么你想要吗？我的意思是，我猜，你可能必须知道，也许这就是为什么我要求你来的原因。
english: So then would you want to?  I mean I guess, you kind of have to know, maybe that's why I asked you to come.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F009
chinese: 嗯，我想这就是我来的原因。
english: Well I guess that's why I came.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M009
chinese: 安，我爱你。我爱你。
english: Ann, I love you.  I love you.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我非常爱你。
english: I love you a great deal.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M011
chinese: 对不起，我真的没有太多的想象力。
english: I'm sorry I don't really have much of an imagination.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F010
chinese: 克里斯，
english: Chris,

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M012
chinese: 对不起，我让你尴尬了，是吗？你看，我不想在这里做这件事，我不想在这个门廊上，用这个戒指——我不想从任何事情中把你夺走。
english: I'm sorry I'm embarrassing you, aren't I?  See, I didn't want to do it here I didn't on this porch, with this ring--I didn't want to win you away from anything.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F011
chinese: 我已经准备好很久了。
english: I've been ready a long, long time.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M013
chinese: 那么他走了。你确定吗？
english: So then he's gone.  You sure?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F012
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M014
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F013
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M015
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F014
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Everyday since.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M016
chinese: 为什么你不告诉我？
english: why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F015
chinese: 因为我一直在等你，克里斯。在那之前你从未给我写过信，而当你写信给我时，嗯，你确实可以含糊其辞，你知道的。
english: Because I was waiting for you, Chris.  Till then you never wrote me and then when you did, well, you sure can be ambiguous you know.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M017
chinese: 噢，安妮，为什么不主动给我一个吻呢，来吧，只是一个...
english: Oh Annie, why don't you go ahead and give me a kiss, come on just a...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M018
chinese: 我吻了你。我吻了安妮。
english: I kissed you.  I kissed Annie.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F016
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你等了这么久。我所做的只是坐在那里想着我是否疯了，想着你。
english: I'll never forgive you for waiting so long.  All I did was sit around and wonder if I was crazy for thinking about you.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M019
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F017
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。做你喜欢的事，克里斯。
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do what like you, Chris.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F018
chinese: 克里斯，怎么了？
english: Chris, what's the matter?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M020
chinese: 你想去某个地方吗？我们走吧。
english: Do you want to go somewhere?  Let's go.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F019
chinese: 不，是什么？是你的妈妈吗？
english: No, what is it?  Is your mother?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M021
chinese: 不，不，不是那样的。
english: No, no, it's nothing like that.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F020
chinese: 好的，那接下来呢？你知道吗，即使在你的信中，你似乎有点羞愧。
english: Well, then what?  You know, even in your letter you seem kind of ashamed.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M022
chinese: 我不知道它是什么，它很复杂。但是现在它离开我了。
english: I don't know it's--it's complicated. But it's going from me now.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F021
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You got to tell me.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M023
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M024
chinese: 这有点和其他事情混在一起了。
english: It's kind of all mixed up with all these other things.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F022
chinese: 不会像这样工作。
english: Wouldn't work like this.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M025
chinese: 你知道在海外我曾经指挥过这个公司吗？
english: you know over seas I was in command of the company?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F023
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M026
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well I lost them.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F024
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M027
chinese: 几乎全部。
english: Pretty much all.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F025
chinese: [呼吸]。天啊。
english: [BREATHING]. Geez.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M028
chinese: 需要一段时间才能摆脱这样的事情。我的意思是，他们不仅仅是男人，你知道的。
english: Takes awhile to toss something like that off.  I mean they weren't just men, you know.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M029
chinese: 例如，有一次，这个孩子——已经下了好几天雨了，他给了我他最后一双干袜子。
english: For instance, there was this one time when this kid--it had been raining for like several days and he gave me his last pair of dry socks.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M030
chinese: 他只是把它放在我的口袋里，这就是我遇到的那种人。
english: He just put it in my pocket that's the kind of guys I had.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M031
chinese: 他们没有死，他们为了彼此而自杀，我是指确切地这样说，你知道，再自私一点，他们今天都会在这里...
english: They didn't die they killed themselves for each other and I mean that exactly, you know a little more selfish and they'll all be here today...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M032
chinese: 当我看着它们像一切都被摧毁一样消失时，我有了这个想法。但我感觉到有一件新事物正在被创造，你知道的，就像这样。这个纪念碑...
english: And I had this idea as I was watching them go down like everything was being destroyed, you know.  But I felt like this one new thing was being made, you know it's kind of like this.  This monument...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M033
chinese: 你知道，他们正在带来一种牺牲，你知道的，带到这个地球上的。
english: You know, that they were bringing something on to this earth, a kind of sacrifice you know.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M034
chinese: 我以为我会改变你所知道的一切，但当我回到这里时，一切都没有改变...
english: I thought I would change everything you know, and I got back here and it was- it was like nothing had changed at all...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M035
chinese: 你知道的。我和爸爸一起去上班，然后我又开始了那整个老鼠赛跑的生活...
english: You know.  I went to work with dad and I started that whole rat race again...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M036
chinese: 而且没有人改变，就像对他们来说是一次随机的公交车事故。
english: And no one had changed it was just like sort of random bus accident to them.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M037
chinese: 开着我的新车，当我打开银行账本看到一台新冰箱时，我感到有些内疚。
english: Driving my new car and I felt guilty you know opening my bank book seeing a new refrigerator.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M038
chinese: 因为你可以从战争中消除那些东西。但你必须意识到，那些东西源于一个人对另一个人的爱...
english: 'Cause you can take those things out of a war.  But you have to realize that those things came out of the love that a man can have for another man...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M039
chinese: 如果你看不到那个，那就只是掠夺，上面都是血。
english: And if you can't see that then it's just loot and there's blood all over it.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M040
chinese: 我感到羞愧，我不想参与其中。我猜我也包括了你。
english: I felt ashamed and I didn't want any part of it.  I guess I included you too.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你还有同样的感觉吗？
english: Do you still feel that way?

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M041
chinese: 我想让你知道，安妮。
english: I want you to know Annie.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F027
chinese: 因为你不应该有那种感觉。你拥有的一切，你都有权拥有...
english: 'Cause you mustn't feel that way.  Everything you have, you have a right to...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F028
chinese: 你明白克里斯所做的一切吗？对我来说也是这样...
english: Everything Chris do you understand that?  To me too...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F029
chinese: 你的钱没有问题。你的父亲让数百架飞机起飞。你应该为此感到自豪，一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: And your money there's nothing wrong in your money.  Your father put hundreds of planes into the air.  You should be proud of that a man should be paid for that.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M042
chinese: 安妮...
english: Annie...

name: Ses01M_script01_3_M043
chinese: 我要为你赚大钱。
english: I'm going to make a fortune for you.

name: Ses01M_script01_3_F030
chinese: 我会用财富做什么呢？
english: What would I do with a fortune?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F000
chinese: 是他们吗？
english: Is it them?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F001
chinese: 弗雷达是唯一一个知道我们在这里的人。她不会打电话。
english: Freda is the only one who knows we are here.  She wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那么肯定是他们了。
english: It must be them then.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F002
chinese: 这迟早会发生的。我们要怎么办？
english: It had to happen sooner or later.  What are we going to do?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M003
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我们还好，亲爱的，对吗？
english: We are okay, aren't we darling?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远，甜蜜。
english: Now and always, sweet.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M005
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这迟早会发生。
english: It had to happen sooner or later.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M006
chinese: 你好？你好吗？对不起，那是什么？
english: Hello?  Hello?  I'm sorry, what's that?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M007
chinese: 不好意思，打错了。【笑声】
english: No.  Wrong number. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F005
chinese: [笑声] 那让我毛骨悚然。
english: [LAUGHTER] That sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M008
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？【笑声】
english: What shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us.[LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F006
chinese: 我们会表现得非常出色。
english: We'll behave exquisitely.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M009
chinese: 以完美的优雅。
english: With perfect poise.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F007
chinese: 我想我应该鞠躬。
english: I think I shall do a curtsy.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M010
chinese: 这很奇怪；那些本应该非常重要的事情，在一个人快乐的时候却一点都不重要。是吗？
english: It's strange; things that ought to matter dreadfully, they just don't matter at all when one's happy.  Do they?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F008
chinese: 嗯。可惜的是一个人不能一直保持快乐。
english: Hmm.  The pity is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M011
chinese: 亲爱的，不要这样说。
english: Darling, don't say that.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F009
chinese: 是真的。我认为整件事都是一个残忍的玩笑。
english: It's true.  I think the whole thing's a cruel joke.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M012
chinese: 什么？这美丽而神圣的东西 - 爱？
english: What?  This beautiful and sacred thing - love?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的。只是这个意思。
english: Yes.  Meaning just that.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M013
chinese: 好吧，这一切意味着什么？这是我在追求终极真理时问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: Well what does it all mean?  That's what I ask myself in my quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God, what does it all mean?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm being serious.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M014
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，你不必认真。这只是他们想要的。
english: Oh darling, you mustn't be serious.  It's just what they want.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M015
chinese: 所有那些让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。你必须嘲笑他们，变得轻率。
english: All of those futile moralists who make life unbearable.  You have to laugh at them, be flippant.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M016
chinese: 你知道，轻率会激发他们那该死的、轻盈和甜美中的酸味。
english: You know, flippancy brings out the acid in their darned, light and sweetness.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F013
chinese: 你知道如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们。
english: you know if I laugh at everything then I must laugh at us, too.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M017
chinese: 哦，当然。我们是笑柄。好吧。
english: Oh of course.  We are figures of fun.  All right.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F014
chinese: 这种荒谬而霸道的爱情会持续多久？
english: How long with it last, this ludicrous overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M018
chinese: 谁知道？
english: Who knows?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F015
chinese: 我们是否总是想要争吵和打架？
english: Shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M019
chinese: 哦不。那场火将会随着我们的激情逐渐熄灭。
english: Oh no.  That fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦亲爱的，我们应该这样吗？
english: Oh dear, should we like that?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M020
chinese: 嗯，这取决于我们打得有多好。
english: Well it depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F017
chinese: 如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？另一个人还会笑吗？
english: What happens if one of us dies?  Does the other one still laugh?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M021
chinese: 是的。是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes.  Yes with all of his might.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F018
chinese: 嗯，那可够严重的，不是吗？
english: Well that's serious enough, isn't it?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M022
chinese: 不，不，不，不，不。死亡是一件非常可笑的事情。它是一个狡猾的小谜团，全靠镜子完成。
english: No, no, no, no. no.  Death is a very laughable thing.  It's a cunning little mystery, it's all done with mirrors.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F019
chinese: 我认为你在说胡话。
english: I think you are talking nonsense.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M023
chinese: 哦，长远来看，每个人都是这样的。
english: Oh.  So is everyone, in the long run.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M024
chinese: 让我们表面一点，只是可怜那些可怜的哲学家，好吗？让我们吹喇叭和吱吱声，尽可能地享受派对，你知道的，就像小小的、愚蠢的学童一样。
english: Let's be superficial, and just pity those poor philosophers, huh?  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and enjoy the party for as long as we can, you know, like small, idiotic school children.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F020
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M025
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，在你的身体腐烂和蠕虫从你的眼眶中爆出之前，请来亲吻我。
english: Oh Come and kiss me darling before your body rots and worms pop out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F021
chinese: 哦，埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Oh Elliott, worms don't pop.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M026
chinese: 哦，看吧，我不在乎你做什么，明白吗。你可以把自己涂成绿色，赤身裸体地穿过凡尔登广场，和世界上所有的男人跑走。只要你最爱我，我不会说一句话。
english: Oh See, I don't care what you do, see.  You can paint yourself green and run naked through the Place Vendome and run off with all of the men of the world.  I shan't say a word, just as long as you love me best.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F022
chinese: 噢，谢谢你，亲爱的。同样的话也适用于你，只是如果你稍微看一眼其他女人，我会杀了你。
english: Aw.  Thank you, darling.  The same applies to you too, except that if you so much as look at another woman I'll kill you.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M027
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Do you remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M028
chinese: 那个你把那条小木蛇放在我的床上的地方。
english: The one where you put that tiny painted wooden snake in my bed.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F024
chinese: 哦，查尔斯，那是他的名字。他摇摆得如此美丽。
english: Oh Charles, that was his name.  He did wiggle so beautifully.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M029
chinese: 垃圾
english: [GARBAGE]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M030
chinese: 这是一件可怕的事情。我讨厌它。
english: It was a terrible thing.  I hated it.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F025
chinese: 我知道你做了。你把他扔出窗户，扔进了大运河。我永远不会原谅你。
english: I know you did.  You threw him out the window into the Grand Canal.  I'll never forgive you for that.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M031
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F026
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M032
chinese: 嗯，是的。
english: Uh huh.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M033
chinese: 但最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的新睡袍上。
english: But the worst one was in Cannes when your curling irons burnt a hole in my new dressing gown.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F027
chinese: 哦，它还烧毁了我的梳子，还有浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: Oh And it burnt my comb, too, and all of those towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M034
chinese: 那真是一个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F028
chinese: [笑声] 那是你第一次打我。
english: [LAUGHTER] That was the first time you hit me.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M035
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I did not hit you very hard.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F029
chinese: 经理进来了，他发现我们在地板上滚来滚去，像豹子一样咬来咬去，抓来抓去。【笑声】多么，多么荒谬啊。
english: The manager came in, he found us rolling about the floor, biting and scratching like panthers. [LAUGHTER]  How utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M036
chinese: [笑声] 我永远不会忘记他的脸。 [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER] I'll never forget his face. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M037
chinese: [笑声] 那时候我们都很年轻。
english: [LAUGHTER] We were very much younger then.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F030
chinese: 【笑声】而且非常愚蠢。
english: [LAUGHTER] And very much sillier.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_M038
chinese: 然而，我相信那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: However I believe the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses01F_script03_1_F031
chinese: 哦，你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: Oh.  You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M000
chinese: 看看这个。你知道我之前告诉过你我最近对垒球很感兴趣吗？
english: Check this out.  You know how I've told you I've been really into like softball recently?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F000
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M001
chinese: 嗯，这完全是随机的，我获得了全额奖学金，明年去美国南加州大学打垒球。
english: Well, this is totally random, I got this full ride scholarship to go to U.S.C next year to play softball.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F001
chinese: [笑声]。为垒球？那太不可思议了。是慢速投球吗？
english: [LAUGHTER]. For softball? That's unbelievable. Is it slow pitch?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M002
chinese: 对于垒球来说，他们将支付我上学的费用。那不是很棒吗？
english: For softball.  They're going to pay me to go to school. Isn't that awesome?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M003
chinese: 是的。嗯，我不是...嗯，是的，我会投球，但我不像投手那样。我更像是替补击球手，我主要只是击球。但我想我将不得不...是的，然后我也打游击手，但是...这太...好消息是我可以留在这里。
english: Yeah.  Well, I don't--well yeah I can pitch, I'm not like the pitcher though. I'm like the pinch hitter guy I mostly just hit.  But I guess I'm going to have to... Yeah, and then I play shortstop too but... It's so ex- The good news is I get to stay here.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F002
chinese: 嗯，是的。
english: Uh huh.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F003
chinese: 挤压击打垒球。
english: Pinch hitting softball.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F004
chinese: 那真是令人难以置信的。
english: That is incredible.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F005
chinese: 太神奇了。他们支付一切吗？
english: That's amazing. They pay for everything?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M004
chinese: 我知道。对于垒球，是的。
english: I know. For softball, yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F006
chinese: 你的住房、书籍，一切都是吗？那太不可思议了。
english: Your housing, books, everything? That is incredible.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M005
chinese: 是的，一切都是。每一次免费搭车，我还可以加入特洛伊人的体育队，这很酷。这不是很棒吗？
english: Yeah, everything. Every like- free ride and I get to, you know, like be on like a Trojans sports team too. And it's like cool. Isn't it awesome?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F007
chinese: 那太不可思议了。你有每日津贴吗？
english: That is incredible. Do you get like a per diem?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M006
chinese: 我不知道。我应该问一下。是的，我会的。
english: I don't know. I should ask. Yeah, I will.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F008
chinese: 你应该...你应该调查一下。
english: You should...You should look into that.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F009
chinese: 那太棒了，恭喜你。真为你高兴。
english: That is amazing, congratulations. Good for you.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M007
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M008
chinese: 但是我不知道我想要住他们给我的住房，因为我觉得我想要一个更好的地方。
english: But I don't know I want to live in the housing that they give me though 'cause I think I want to you know like get like a nicer place.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F010
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F011
chinese: 是的，你可能会看到这些维多利亚式的房子之一附近。
english: Yeah, that you probably. You should see one of these Victorian houses around by.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M009
chinese: 我应该搬到哪里？
english: Where should I move?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M010
chinese: 那是一个非常好的主意。或者我可以去圣莫尼卡。去海滩。威尼斯海滩，是的，有点脏。我不想去威尼斯海滩。但是-马里布。好的。
english: That's a really good idea. Or I could go to like Santa Monica. Go beach. Venice beach, yeah a little dirty though. I don't want to go to Venice beach. But - Malibu. All right.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F012
chinese: 哦，威尼斯海滩。
english: Oh. Venice beach.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F013
chinese: 哦，你不喜欢那个。你是西区人吗？
english: Oh, you don't like that. You're west-sider?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F014
chinese: 好的。那将是一段非常长的通勤路程，你做不到那样。特别是-我知道特别是从-我不知道，我要说什么，我不知道。
english: Okay. That would be way too much of a commute you can't do that. Especially- I know especially from--I don't know, what I was going to say, I don't know.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M011
chinese: 职业垒球运动员马里布。【笑声】
english: Professional softball player Malibu. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro07_M012
chinese: 从哪里来？嗯？嗯，我来自旧金山。
english: From where? Huh? Well I'm from San Francisco.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F015
chinese: 我不知道。从哪个马里布通勤那将是荒谬的。
english: I don't know. Commuting from what Malibu that would be ridiculous.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M013
chinese: 哦，是的，那将是这样的。嗯，这取决于你有什么类型的车。不过我猜这会值得的。直升机。是的，直升机。那里有一个直升机停机坪，对吧？是的，完全正确。
english: Oh yeah, that would be.  Well, depends on what type of car you had, though too. I guess it would be worth it. helicopter. Yeah, helicopter.  There is a helipad there, right? Yeah, exactly.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F016
chinese: 哦，是的。他会把你送到练习场吗？
english: Oh yeah. He'd drop you right off at practice?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F017
chinese: 你是那种早上四点钟练习的人吗？那更像是游泳和芭蕾舞之类的东西。
english: Do you--are you one of those like four a clock in the morning practices?  Is it--that's more like swimming and- --ballet and things like that.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M014
chinese: 是的。我认为是在下午，因为如果太早的话，你就看不到球了。
english: Yeah. I think it's in the afternoon 'cause I mean can't be too early 'cause then you can't see the ball.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F018
chinese: 他们有那些霓虹软式球。它们就像日光一样，你可以在任何地方看到它们。
english: They have those neon--softballs.  They're like day-glow you can see them anywhere.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M015
chinese: 是的，但也不是。嗯，他们有晚上的比赛，但你知道还有更多的晚上比赛，不像早上的比赛，你知道的。我猜这差不多是一回事。
english: Yeah, but no. Well, they have a night games but you know there's more like night games they're not like morning games, you know. I guess it's kind of same thing.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F019
chinese: 我很惊讶你不知道那个。
english: I'm surprised you don't know that.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F020
chinese: 哦，那太不可思议了。是吗？
english: Oh. That is incredible. Is it--

name: Ses01M_impro07_F021
chinese: 他们有一个混合男女的垒球队吗？我是说...真的吗？你知道吗，我甚至都不知道他们有这个。
english: do they have a--is it a co-ed softball team?  I mean... Really? You know, I didn't even know that they have that.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M016
chinese: 不，都是男孩子。全是男孩子的垒球队。
english: No it's all boys. All boys' softball team.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M017
chinese: 他们这样做，相信我，这是巨大的。
english: They do it's--believe me it's huge.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F022
chinese: 你打什么？比如说，你是不是...全国排名的？
english: Who do you play? Like do--are you like... nationally ranked?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M018
chinese: 我刚刚开始参与其中。我只是有点无意中陷入其中。真的，我只是四处走动...
english: I just got into it. I just kind of fell into it. Literally I was walking around and...

name: Ses01M_impro07_F023
chinese: 那是难以置信的。
english: That is unbelievable.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M019
chinese: 这相当疯狂。
english: It's pretty wild.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F024
chinese: 我会把那个和乒乓球放在一起。
english: I would put that right up there with--ping-pong.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M020
chinese: 是的，我怀疑[GARBAGE]乒乓球[GARBAGE]
english: Yeah, well I doubt [GARBAGE] ping pong [GARBAGE]

name: Ses01M_impro07_F025
chinese: 我并不是要贬低你所做的事情。我认为那很棒。
english: I mean not to denigrate what you are doing.  I think that's great.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M021
chinese: 哦，你的意思是这不是真正的运动，是吗？
english: Oh you mean it's not really sport that what you're saying?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F026
chinese: 不，不。我喜欢垒球。我一直都在打垒球。
english: No, no.  I love softball. I played softball all the time.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M022
chinese: 这绝对是一项运动。你在说什么？
english: It's totally a sport. What are you talking about?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M023
chinese: 仅仅因为我不打常规棒球，并不意味着我不像其他体育爱好者一样。
english: What, just 'cause I don't play regular baseball doesn't mean I'm like any less of like a sports guy.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F027
chinese: 我并不是说你应该这样做。我不是。我认为这很棒，我认为你应该为自己感到非常自豪，特别是因为你可以免费去美国南加州大学。免费的。
english: I am not saying you should be. I'm not no. I think it's great I think you should be incredibly proud yourself especially because you're going to U.S.C for free for doing it. For free.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M024
chinese: 免费的，这才是真正的重点。我的意思是谁在乎呢，如果我一直都要打垒球的话？
english: For free that's really what it's about. I mean who cares I mean if I have to play softball all the time?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M025
chinese: 但是他们可以坐在巴士上四处游览 - 那真糟糕。
english: But they got to like drive around in a bus--that would suck.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F028
chinese: 真的吗？和整个团队一起吗？
english: Oh really? With the whole team?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M026
chinese: 是的，我们有像客场比赛之类的事情。
english: Yeah we have like away games and stuff.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F029
chinese: 你的队友们是什么样的？我确定你还不知道吧？打垒球的人是什么样的人？
english: What are your teammates like? I'm sure you don't know yet? What kind of people play softball?

name: Ses01M_impro07_M027
chinese: 他们很好。
english: They're nice.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M028
chinese: 就像，你知道像警察一样，像那种身材偏胖的人。有胡子，是那种类型的-
english: Like, you know like police officers, like--kind of heavyset guys. Mustaches, yeah. It's that kind of-

name: Ses01M_impro07_F030
chinese: 哦，真的吗？
english: Oh really?

name: Ses01M_impro07_F031
chinese: 酷。你似乎不适合在那里。
english: Cool. You don't seem like you'd fit in there.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M029
chinese: 那种...他们还好。不，我就像-我有点像是个局外人，我就像...
english: That kind of...They're okay.  No I'm like- I'm kind of like the odd man out I'm like...

name: Ses01M_impro07_F032
chinese: 哦，太酷了。
english: Oh, cool.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M030
chinese: 但是你知道我就像[垃圾]一样。
english: But you know I'm like [GARBAGE].

name: Ses01M_impro07_F033
chinese: 你就像新手一样？新来的孩子。
english: You're like the rookie? The new kid.

name: Ses01M_impro07_M031
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro07_F034
chinese: 只要再过五年，你就会像在警队里一样。你会把甜甜圈放在后袋里... [笑声]
english: Just watch in five years you'll be like on the force. You carry around donuts in your back pocket... [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_impro07_M032
chinese: 我要留胡子...在警队里...
english: I'm going to have a mustache...On the force...

name: Ses01M_impro07_M033
chinese: 请靠边停车。
english: Pull over..

name: Ses01F_impro02_F000
chinese: 你收到邮件了吗？所以你看到我的信了？
english: Did you get the mail? So you saw my letter?

name: Ses01F_impro02_M000
chinese: 这不公平。
english: It's not fair.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F001
chinese: 是的，我知道。
english: Yeah.  I know.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M001
chinese: 我不明白。你已经做了这么多，我不知道为什么你要回去。
english: I don't understand.  You've already done so much, I don't know why do you have to go back.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F002
chinese: 我不知道。我也提出了那个请求。他们没有...
english: I don't know.  I put in that. request too. They didn't...

name: Ses01F_impro02_F003
chinese: 我猜，你知道，每个人都需要做出牺牲。
english: I guess, you know, everybody has to make sacrifices.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M002
chinese: 我不知道，这只是不公平。我认为你已经做出了牺牲。
english: I don't know, it's just not fair.  I think you've already made your sacrifice.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F004
chinese: 有些人已经考虑得更多了，你知道吗？
english: There's people that have given more though, you know?

name: Ses01F_impro02_M003
chinese: 我就是不明白他们怎么能让你离开，当你有一个新生儿的时候 - 我们有一个新孩子。
english: I just don't see how they can make you leave when you have a new baby - we have a new kid.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F005
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M004
chinese: 那为什么这样公平呢？为什么--
english: Then why is that fair?  Why--

name: Ses01F_impro02_F006
chinese: 那边有些婴儿，他们需要母亲。
english: There's babies over there, though, that need mothers.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M005
chinese: 我不知道你怎么能对此感到满意？我不知道为什么你不是——你对此感到满意。
english: I don't know how you can be okay with this?  I don't know why you're not-- you're fine with it.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F007
chinese: 我对此不满意，但我没有选择的余地。我不明白哭泣能解决什么问题。
english: I'm not okay with it, but I don't-- it's not like I have a choice.  I don't see what crying about it is going to fix.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M006
chinese: 我只是在尝试想出另一种方法。我只是在尝试...
english: I'm just trying to think of another way.  I'm just trying to...

name: Ses01F_impro02_F008
chinese: 只是，你知道的，自责自己。
english: Just, you know, kicking myself.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F009
chinese: 喜欢你注册是因为你需要钱和
english: like you sign up because you need money and

name: Ses01F_impro02_F010
chinese: 事情并不是看起来的那样。
english: things just aren't what they seem.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M007
chinese: 这是一场愚蠢的战争。
english: This is a stupid war.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F011
chinese: 我们正在做正确的事情，尽管如此。
english: We're doing the right thing, though.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M008
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M009
chinese: 我就是不明白为什么非得是你。
english: I just don't see why it has to be you.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F012
chinese: 如果不是我，那么是谁？
english: If not me then, who?

name: Ses01F_impro02_M010
chinese: 我要做什么？嗯？
english: What am I going to do? Huh?

name: Ses01F_impro02_F013
chinese: 你会录下一切，对吗？
english: You'll videotape everything, yeah?

name: Ses01F_impro02_M011
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F014
chinese: 也许你可以把它发送给我，像是流式传输，是吗？
english: Maybe you can send it to me, like stream it, yeah?

name: Ses01F_impro02_M012
chinese: 你们那边没有电脑可以使用吗？
english: Don't you guys have access to computers over there.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F015
chinese: 上个月-- 是的。
english: Last month--  Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M013
chinese: 我真的不知道没有你我该怎么做。
english: I just don't know how I'm going to do it without you.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F016
chinese: 我必须找到保姆。
english: I have to find sitters.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M014
chinese: 我一个人无法养育一个孩子。怎么办？
english: I can't raise a baby by myself.  How?

name: Ses01F_impro02_F017
chinese: 我们有朋友，这就是我们搬到这里的原因，对吧？因为街上有一个托儿所。
english: We've got friends, that's why we moved here, huh?  Because there is a day care down the street.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M015
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F018
chinese: 而且你的母亲就在附近。
english: And your mother is close by.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F019
chinese: 我会给你寄很多信。
english: I'll send you lots of letters.

name: Ses01F_impro02_F020
chinese: 我想要很多很多很多的照片。
english: And I want lots and lots and lots of pictures.

name: Ses01F_impro02_M016
chinese: 这真的不公平。
english: It's just not fair.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F000
chinese: 你还好吗？
english: You okay?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M000
chinese: 是的，我只是... 是的。
english: Yeah, I'm just-- yeah

name: Ses01M_impro06_M001
chinese: 只是感觉有点麻木，你知道的。
english: Just kind of feel numb, you know.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F001
chinese: 发生了什么事？
english: What's happened?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M002
chinese: 你甚至都没听到吗？
english: You didn't even hear?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M003
chinese: [呼吸] 嗯。
english: [BREATHING] Umm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M004
chinese: 上帝，我已经讲了这个故事很多次了。嗯。
english: God I've told this story so many times. Umm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F002
chinese: 你不必做，如果你不想做的话。
english: You don't have to if you don't want to.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M005
chinese: 我只是...我只是失去了一个对我来说非常亲近的人。
english: I just...I just basically lost someone that was really close to me.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M006
chinese: 我一直在处理所有的事情，你知道的，医院和人们的工作，因为...
english: And I've kind of been dealing with all of the...the stuff, you know the hospital and people work because...

name: Ses01M_impro06_F003
chinese: 很抱歉听到这个。
english: I'm sorry to hear that.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M007
chinese: 他有点没有人照顾他，所以--
english: He kind of didn't have anyone to take care of that for him, so--

name: Ses01M_impro06_F004
chinese: 你一直在照顾它吗？
english: You've been taking care of it all?

name: Ses01M_impro06_F005
chinese: 哦，耶稣。
english: Oh Jesus.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M008
chinese: 这真的...真的很糟糕。
english: It's just really...really messed up.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F006
chinese: 他生病了一段时间吗？
english: He sick for awhile?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M009
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M010
chinese: 就像它一样。
english: Just like it.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F007
chinese: 这是一个意外吗？
english: Was it an accident?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M011
chinese: 不，我的意思是它来得非常快，你知道，我的意思是它是一种[垃圾]，是一种疾病，但它只是--
english: No, I mean it just came on really quick, you know I mean it was a [GARBAGE] it was a sickness but it just --

name: Ses01M_impro06_F008
chinese: 你生病了吗？
english: how was sick?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M012
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_impro06_F009
chinese: 嗯，我很困惑。他是生病了还是发生了意外？
english: Well, I'm confused.  He was sick or it was an accident?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M013
chinese: 他生病了。他生病了。他生病了，但是发生得非常非常快，你知道的。
english: He was sick. He got sick. He got sick but it happened really, really fast, you know.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F010
chinese: 哦。真的很快吗？哦。
english: Oh. Really fast? Oh.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M014
chinese: 就像轰隆一声... 完成了
english: It was kind of like boom... done

name: Ses01M_impro06_F011
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M015
chinese: 这真的很奇怪，因为他当时还很年轻，你知道的，有点像是...
english: It's just really weird because he was really young you know and it kind of like...

name: Ses01M_impro06_F012
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M016
chinese: --它只是让你感到有点害怕。
english: --it just kind of freaks you out.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F013
chinese: 完全是的，是的。
english: Totally, yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M017
chinese: 好奇怪，你知道吗，就像有一天，你知道的，听起来很愚蠢，但是就有一天，有人在这里。然后下一天，你知道的，他们就不在这里了，这让你开始思考生命、死亡和那些东西。你曾经习以为常的事情，你知道的。
english: So weird you know that like one days it's like you know sounds so stupid but like one day someone's here. And like next day you know they're not here and it just kind of makes you like think about like life and mortality and like that kind of stuff.  You just like used to take for granted--you know.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F014
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F015
chinese: 锁
english: Lock

name: Ses01M_impro06_F016
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F017
chinese: 你制定的计划【垃圾】。
english: The plans you make [GARBAGE].

name: Ses01M_impro06_M018
chinese: 确切地说，你知道的，就像他有很多计划，他打算做...
english: Exactly, you know, and like he had so many plans and he was going to do...

name: Ses01M_impro06_F018
chinese: 它也给你留下了一个洞。
english: It leaves a hole for you too.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M019
chinese: 那么多事情，你知道吗？
english: so many things, you know?

name: Ses01M_impro06_F019
chinese: 它也给你留下了一个空缺，在你们共同的计划中。
english: It leaves a hole for you too, in your plans together.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M020
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M021
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F020
chinese: 它会变得更好。
english: It gets better.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M022
chinese: 他是一个非常非常好的人。
english: He was a really, really good guy.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F021
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M023
chinese: 很多人都喜欢他。
english: A lot of people loved him.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F022
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: MMhmm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M024
chinese: 你知道的，这会影响很多人，不仅仅是我，你知道吗？
english: You know, it's like affecting a lot of people it's not just me, you know?

name: Ses01M_impro06_F023
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F024
chinese: 你们认识彼此多久了？
english: How long did you know each other?

name: Ses01M_impro06_M025
english: Umm...

name: Ses01M_impro06_M026
chinese: 大约八年。
english: For like eight years.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F025
chinese: 那是很长的时间。
english: That's a long time.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M027
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F026
chinese: 很好，你在那里。
english: It's good that you were there.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M028
chinese: 是的，我很高兴我在那里。很高兴我-很高兴我能在那里。
english: Yeah, I'm glad I was there. Glad I- glad I got to be there.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M029
chinese: 好奇怪，
english: So weird,

name: Ses01M_impro06_F027
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01M_impro06_M030
chinese: 就像我不能...就像你知道的那样，就像“捏我一下”一样，就像我不能相信我正在处理这个问题，你知道的。
english: like I can't...it's like you know it's like "pinch me" it's like I can't believe like I'm dealing with this, you know.

name: Ses01M_impro06_F028
chinese: 你有没有希望自己能做得不同的事情？
english: Are there things you wish you'd done differently?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F001
chinese: 弗雷达是唯一一个知道我们在这里的人。她不会打电话。
english: Freda is the only one who knows we are here. She wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那一定是他们了。
english: Must be them then.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们要做什么？
english: What we're going to do?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M003
chinese: 我们还好，亲爱的，对吗？无论发生什么，我们都还好？
english: We're okay, right darling?  Whatever happens, we're okay?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远甜蜜。
english: Now and always sweet.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这迟早会发生。
english: It had to happen sooner or later.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M005
chinese: 是的... 你好？ 你好吗？ 对不起，你说什么？
english: Yes... Hello?  Hello?  I'm sorry what's that?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M006
chinese: 不，这是一个错误的号码。
english: No, it's a wrong number.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F005
chinese: 哦，哦，那让我背脊发寒。
english: Oh, oh, that sent shivers on my spine.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M007
chinese: [呼吸] [笑声]
english: [BREATHING] [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F006
english: Oh...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M008
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F007
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M009
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F008
chinese: 哦，行为优雅...
english: Oh. Behave exquisitely...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M010
chinese: 以完美的优雅姿态...
english: With perfect poise...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F009
chinese: [笑声] 我想我应该做一个法庭屈膝礼。
english: [LAUGHTER] I think I shall do a court curtsey.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M011
english: Ah...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F010
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M012
english: Ah...Strange...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F011
english: Mmm...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M013
chinese: 当一个人快乐时，那些本应该非常重要的事情，你知道它们实际上一点都不重要，对吗？
english: Things that just ought to matter dreadfully, you know they just don't matter at all when one is happy, do they?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F012
chinese: 可惜的是，一个人无法一直保持快乐。
english: The pity is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M014
chinese: 亲爱的，不要这样说。
english: Darling, don't say that.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F013
chinese: 是真的。我认为整件事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true.  I think the whole things a very poor joke.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M015
chinese: 什么，这是神圣而美丽的东西，爱？
english: What, this sacred and beautiful thing, love?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F014
chinese: 哦，是的，意思就是那样。
english: Oh, yes meaning just that.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M016
chinese: 哦，亲爱的上帝，那一切是什么意思，亲爱的上帝？
english: Oh, dear god what is that all mean, dear god?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F015
chinese: [笑声] 别笑我，我是认真的。
english: [LAUGHTER] Don't laugh at me I'm being serious.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M017
chinese: 亲爱的，你不必那么认真，这正是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be so serious, darling, it just what they want.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦，他们是谁？
english: Oh whose they?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M018
chinese: 哦，你知道那些肤浅的哲学家。我们必须嘲笑他们，轻率对待。
english: Oh you know all those superficial philosophers. We must laugh at them, be flippant.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M019
chinese: 轻率的态度使他们那些讨人喜欢的甜蜜和温和变得刻薄。
english: Flippancy brings out the acid in their darn sweetness and light.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F017
chinese: 嗯，如果我必须对一切都笑，那我也必须笑我们自己。
english: Mmhmm If I must laugh at everything, I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M020
chinese: 哦，是的。
english: Oh yes.  .

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F018
chinese: 这种荒谬而霸道的爱情会持续多久？
english: How long will it last, this ludicrous, overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M021
chinese: 我们确实是好玩的人物
english: We are figures of fun all right

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M022
chinese: 啊...谁知道呢。
english: Ahh...who knows.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F019
chinese: 我们是否总是想要争吵和打架？
english: Shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M023
chinese: 不，那将会消逝...连同我们的激情一起...
english: No, that will fade...Along with our passion...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F020
chinese: 哦，我们会喜欢那个吗？
english: Oh, will we like that?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M024
chinese: 嗯，这取决于我们打得有多好。
english: Well it depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F021
chinese: 如果我们其中一个人死了...
english: If one of us dies...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F022
chinese: 那个剩下的人还在笑吗？
english: does the one that's left still laugh?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M025
chinese: 是的，是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes, yes with the all his might.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F023
chinese: 嗯，那就够严重了，不是吗？
english: Well, that's serious enough isn't it?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M026
chinese: 不，不，不，没有死亡是非常可笑的，这是一个狡猾的小谜团，你知道的。这一切都是靠镜子完成的。
english: No, no, no, no death is very laughable it's a cunning little mystery, you know.  It's all done with mirrors.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F024
chinese: 我认为你在说胡话。
english: I think you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M027
chinese: 啊，所以最终每个人都是这样的，是吗？
english: Ah so is everyone in the long run, huh?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F025
chinese: 嗯。
english: Hmm.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M028
chinese: 让我们可怜那些可怜的哲学家，好吗？让我们尽可能地享受派对，好吗？让我们吹喇叭和吱吱声，像小傻瓜学生一样坐着。【笑声】
english: Let's pity the poor philosophers, huh?  Let's enjoy the party for as long as we can, okay?  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and sit like small idiotic school children. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F026
chinese: 啊。
english: Ah.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M029
chinese: 来这里亲爱的，亲吻我
english: Come here darling, kiss me

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F027
chinese: 哦，艾略特。蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Oh, Elliot.  Worms don't pop.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M030
chinese: 在你的身体腐烂之前，蠕虫从你的眼眶中爬出来。
english: before your body rots and worms pop out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M031
chinese: 看，你知道我不在乎你做什么。你可以把自己涂成绿色，然后裸奔到凡尔赛广场。
english: See, you know I don't care what you do.  You could paint yourself green and run naked to the Place Vendome.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F028
chinese: 哦，谢谢你，亲爱的。
english: Oh, thank you darling.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M032
chinese: 你可以和世界上所有的男人私奔，我不会说一句话。只要你最爱我就好。
english: You could run off with all the men in a world. I won't say a word.  Just as long as you love me best.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F029
chinese: 对你也适用，除非你连看一眼其他女人，否则我会杀了你。
english: The same applies to you too, except you so much as look at another women I'll kill you.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M033
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那场争吵吗？
english: Do you remember that row we did have in Venice?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F030
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M034
chinese: 那个时候你把那条小木制的彩绘蛇放在我的床上？
english: The one when you put that little wooden painted snake in my bed?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F031
chinese: 哦，查尔斯。那是他的名字，查尔斯。他扭动得如此美妙。
english: Oh, Charles.  That was his name Charles. He did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M035
chinese: 这是一件可怕的事情，我讨厌它。
english: It was a horrible thing I hated it.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F032
chinese: 哦，我知道你把它扔出窗户，扔进了大运河。哦，我永远不会原谅你的。
english: Oh I know you threw it out the window and into the Grand Canal.  Oh, I'll never forgive you for that.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M036
chinese: 当然，那场争吵持续了多久？
english: Of course how long did that row last?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F033
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M037
chinese: 但是你知道，这次并不像我们在戛纳时那样糟糕...嗯嗯...在那里，你的卷发棒烧了我睡袍上的一个洞。
english: But you know it wasn't as bad as the one we had in Cannes...mmhmm...where your curling irons burnt a hole in my dressing gown.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F034
chinese: 戛纳...嗯嗯...
english: Cannes...mmhmm...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F035
chinese: 哦，它也烧坏了我的梳子和浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: Oh it burnt my comb too and all those towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M038
chinese: 哦，那真是一个激动人心的事情，不是吗？
english: Oh that was a rouser wasn't it?

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F036
chinese: 经理进来时，他发现我们在地板上打滚。【笑声】
english: The manager came in he found us rolling about the floor.  [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M039
chinese: 我永远不会忘记他脸上的表情。
english: I will never forget the look on his face.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F037
chinese: 抓挠和咬人就像豹子一样。【笑声】哦...
english: Scratching and biting like panthers. [LAUGHTER] Oh...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M040
english: oh...

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F038
chinese: 完全，完全荒谬。
english: Utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F039
english: oh...[LAUGHTER]

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M041
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F040
chinese: 非常愚蠢。
english: Very much sillier.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_M042
chinese: 然而，我确实相信那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: However, I do believe the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses01M_script03_1_F041
chinese: 哦，你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: Oh you knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M000
chinese: 你试过了吗，嗯，克雷格的名单？
english: Have you tried, uh, Craig's List?

name: Ses01F_impro04_F000
chinese: 嗯，什么？克雷格名单？哦，互联网的东西？
english: Uh, what?  Craig's List?  Oh the internet thing?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M001
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F001
chinese: 我不知道。那不就是陪同服务和类似的东西吗？
english: I don't know.  Isn't that-- that's all like escort services and things like that.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M002
chinese: 不，那里有常规的工作。
english: No.  There's regular jobs on there.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F002
chinese: 我不知道。我的意思是我已经找了很久了，所以我就想到了这一点——我的意思是，我认为像Monster这样的东西比一些随机的免费广告板更可靠。
english: I don't know.  I mean I've been looking for so long that I just figured that--  I mean, I think things like Monster are a lot more reliable than just some random free board.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M003
chinese: 嗯，是的。
english: Uh huh.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M004
chinese: 我只是说我有一个朋友在这方面找到了一份好工作，所以我只是推荐它。
english: I'm just saying I have a friend that got a good job on it so I was just recommending it.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F003
chinese: 什么样的工作？
english: What kind of a job?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M005
chinese: 他就像一个剧院的经理。
english: He's like a manager for a theatre.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F004
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M006
chinese: 他就像一个房屋经理。是的。这是一份好工作。
english: He's like a house manager. Yeah.  It's a good job.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F005
chinese: 他只是...
english: He just...

name: Ses01F_impro04_F006
chinese: 你知道吗？我听说了那个工作。我申请了那个工作。
english: you know what?  I heard about that job.  I applied for that.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M007
chinese: 你做了吗？
english: You did?

name: Ses01F_impro04_F007
chinese: 是的。我在剧院看到了一则公告。
english: Yeah.  I saw a posting at the theatre.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M008
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F008
chinese: 他明白了吗？
english: He got it?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M009
chinese: 你已经找工作很久了；那是很久以前的事了。对吗？
english: You've been looking for a job for a long time; that was a long time ago.  Right?

name: Ses01F_impro04_F009
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M010
chinese: 嗯。
english: Hmm.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F010
chinese: 他做了什么？有什么了不起的？我不明白为什么他们会选择他而不是我。
english: What did he do?  What was so great?  I don't understand why they would pick him over me.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M011
chinese: 我不知道。我猜他有一份非常好的简历，然后--
english: I don't know.  He had a really good resume I guess and--

name: Ses01F_impro04_F011
chinese: 一份简历？
english: A resume?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M012
chinese: 是的。你有简历吗？
english: Yeah.  Do you have a resume?

name: Ses01F_impro04_F012
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M013
chinese: 当找工作时，这是有点有帮助的。
english: It's kind of helpful when getting a job.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F013
chinese: 我只是-我的意思是，我给人们打电话，告诉他们我擅长什么。
english: I just- I mean I call people up and I tell them what I'm good at.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M014
chinese: 也许我们应该找个时间坐下来，你可以告诉我你做过的所有事情，然后我会把它写下来。
english: Well maybe we should sit down some time and you can just tell me all the stuff that you have done and I'll write it out.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F014
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F015
chinese: 我不喜欢-我不喜欢通过邮件发送东西。我不想让我的信息暴露出去。
english: I don't like- I don't like sending things in the mail.  I don't want my information out there.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M015
chinese: 不。你可以-或者你可以亲自带来。但是他们通常需要看到一些东西，你知道，你做过什么，是什么样的-
english: No.  You can- or you can just bring it in person.  But they need, generally, something to see, you know, what kind of what that you've done, what kind of--

name: Ses01F_impro04_F016
chinese: 我在他们面前。我告诉他们我擅长什么。
english: I'm there in front of them.  I'm telling them what I'm good at.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M016
chinese: 是的。但是纸张也有帮助。
english: Yeah.  But the piece of paper helps, too.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F017
chinese: 为什么？这只是一张纸。
english: Why?  It's a piece of paper.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M017
chinese: 不，但它有一个轮廓，你知道的。
english: No.  But it has an outline, you know.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F018
chinese: 我只是不想要这些纸质记录，你知道的。我只是不想要事情一直跟着我，就像……。
english: I just don't want this paper trail, you know.  I just don't want things following me around, like-.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M018
chinese: 我知道。好的。嗯，也许--
english: I know.  Okay.  Well, um. Maybe--

name: Ses01F_impro04_F019
chinese: 这只是......你知道的，我以前就遇到过这个问题。你不是第一个告诉我需要一份简历的人，但是...
english: It's just-- You know, I've had this problem before.  You're not the first person to tell me that I need a resume but...

name: Ses01F_impro04_M019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M020
chinese: 好的，是的。我可以想象。
english: Okay, yeah.  I would imagine.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F020
chinese: 我只是觉得这有点偏见，他们真的歧视那些不是那样的人。
english: ..I just-..I just think it's kind of prejudiced and they are really discriminating against people who just aren't that way.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M021
chinese: 嗯，有时候你不得不做一些你不一定喜欢的事情来找到工作。但是工作能给你带来收入，你现在就不必坐公交车了。
english: Well, sometimes you have to do things that you don't necessarily like to do to have a job. But the job affords you money, you won't have to be taking the bus right now.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F021
chinese: 那是胡说八道，那是胡说八道。
english: That's baloney, that's baloney.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F022
chinese: 请。
english: Please.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M022
chinese: 也许买一辆车。
english: maybe get a car.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M023
chinese: 我只是觉得，你知道的，也许你应该再努力一点。
english: I just, you know, think you should try a little harder maybe.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F023
chinese: 你认为你比我好是因为我没有车吗？
english: you think that you're better than me because I don't have a car?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M024
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F024
chinese: 你知道，你也在坐公交车。
english: You know, you're riding the bus, too.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M025
chinese: 我正在乘坐公交车，但是出于自愿。
english: I am riding the bus, but by choice.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F025
chinese: 为什么？有什么选择？
english: Why?  What choice?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M026
chinese: 为了保护环境，请拼车。
english: To save the environment, carpool.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F026
chinese: 你正在保护环境。嗯嗯。
english: You're saving the environment. mmhmm

name: Ses01F_impro04_M027
chinese: 是的。一次少一辆车。
english: Yes.  One less car at a time.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F027
chinese: 有趣。太棒了。
english: Interesting.  That's fantastic.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M028
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M029
chinese: 你知道的，你不必把你的沮丧发泄在我身上，你知道，只是因为...
english: You know, you don't have to take out your frustration on me, you know, just because...

name: Ses01F_impro04_F028
chinese: 我不是沮丧的。
english: I'm not frustrated.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M030
chinese: ...你不能找到工作并且拒绝有一份简历。
english: ...you can't get a job and refuse to have a resume.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F029
chinese: 你认为你是谁？
english: Who do you think you are?

name: Ses01F_impro04_M031
chinese: 我不认为我是任何人。
english: I don't think I'm anyone.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F030
chinese: 你真是高高在上。我只是--
english: You are so high and mighty.  I just--

name: Ses01F_impro04_M032
chinese: 我-我-我没有-好吧。
english: I- I-I didn't-- okay.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F031
chinese: 哦，我在保护环境。我选择骑这辆车是因为我想要这样做。
english: Oh.  I'm saving the environment. I'm riding this car because I- I want to.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M033
chinese: 什么？不。
english: What?  No.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M034
chinese: 什么？哦。所以现在你是...
english: What? Oh.  So now you're...

name: Ses01F_impro04_F032
chinese: 我坐公交车是因为我想要。
english: The bus, I'm riding the bus because I want to.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M035
chinese: 你知道吗？你不必把你的愤怒和伤害发泄在我身上。
english: you know what?  You don't have to take your anger and your hurt out on me.

name: Ses01F_impro04_F033
chinese: 我不能——你不是出于选择而在这里。没有人会出于选择而乘坐这辆公交车。
english: I can not-- you are not here by choice.  Nobody would ride this bus by choice.

name: Ses01F_impro04_M036
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事让你烦恼？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F001
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了，为什么突然这样？
english: She's been in New York three and an half years, why all of a sudden?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M001
chinese: 也许...也许他只是想见她。
english: Well maybe...maybe he just wanted to see her.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？你知道他一直住在那个女孩的隔壁，为什么他不想见她呢？
english: What do you mean?  You know he lived next door to the girl his whole life, why wouldn't he want to see her?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M003
chinese: 【呼吸】你不要那样看着我。他对我说的和对你说的一样多。
english: [BREATHING] You don't look at me like that.  He didn't tell me anything more than he told you.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F003
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M004
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking about it?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F004
chinese: 它有那种感觉。
english: It's got that about it.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M005
chinese: 哦，那又怎样。
english: Oh.  So what.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What is going on here, Joe?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M006
chinese: 现在请听。
english: Now listen.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F006
chinese: 她不是他的女孩。她知道她不是。
english: She is not his girl.  She knows she's not.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F007
chinese: 那她为什么还是单身呢？纽约到处都是男人，她为什么还是单身呢？可能有一百个人告诉她她很傻，但她还是等待着。
english: Then why is she still single?  New York is full of men, why is she still single?  Probably a hundred people told her she's foolish, but she waited.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M008
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she waited?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F008
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的，所以她忠诚如磐石。在我最黑暗的时刻，我想到她在等待，我知道我是对的。
english: Because she knows what I know, that's why.  She's faithful as a rock.  In my darkest moments, I think of her waiting and I know that I'm right.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M009
chinese: 嘿，看，今天天气不错，对吧？我们为什么要争吵呢？
english: Hey look, it's a nice day, huh?  Why are we arguing?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F009
chinese: 在这个家里，没有人敢夺走她的信仰，乔。你知道陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares take away her faith, Joe.  You know strangers might, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M010
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你想要什么？
english: What do you want me to do? What do you want?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F010
chinese: 我希望你们两个都表现得好像他会回来一样。不要以为我没有注意到自从Chris邀请她来这里以后你们的变化。
english: I want you to-- I want you to act like he is coming back, both of you.  Don't think I haven't noticed you since Chris invited her here.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F011
chinese: 我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I won't stand for any nonsense.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M011
chinese: 凯特。
english: Kate.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F012
chinese: 因为如果他不回来，我会自杀。哦笑吧，尽情笑吧，但为什么他回来的那天晚上会发生这种事情呢？她去他的房间睡觉，他的纪念品碎成了碎片。看看吧，乔，看看。
english: Because if he's not coming back, I'll kill myself.  Oh laugh, laugh all you like but why does this happen the very night he comes back.  She goes to sleep in his room and his memorial breaks in pieces.  Look at it, Joe, look.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M012
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F013
chinese: 请相信我，乔。就在上周，一个比拉里失踪时间更长的男人在底特律回来了。相信我。在所有人中，你必须相信。只要相信。
english: Just believe with me, Joe. Only last week a man came back in Detroit missing longer than Larry.  Believe with me. You, above all, have got to believe. Just believe.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M014
chinese: 好的。冷静一点。
english: Okay. Calm yourself.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M015
chinese: 我知道。好的，好的。好的。好吧。冷静点。这是什么意思，我最重要？
english: I know. All right, all right. All right. Okay.  Calm yourself. What does that mean, me above all?

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M016
chinese: 看看你，你在发抖。
english: Look at you, you're shaking.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_F014
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses01F_script01_2_M017
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide?  What the hell is the matter with you, Kate?

name: Ses02F_impro03_F000
chinese: 哦，我的天。猜猜看，猜猜看，猜猜看，猜猜看，猜猜看，猜猜看？
english: Oh my God.  Guess what, guess what, guess what, guess what, guess what, guess what?

name: Ses02F_impro03_M000
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02F_impro03_F001
chinese: 好吧，猜猜看。猜猜，猜猜，猜猜，猜猜。
english: Well, guess.  Guess, guess, guess, guess.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M001
chinese: 嗯，你--
english: Um, you--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F002
chinese: 不要看我的左手。
english: Don't look at my left hand.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M002
chinese: 不。让我看看。
english: No.  Let me see.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M003
chinese: 哦，不可能。
english: Oh, no way.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F003
chinese: 他求婚了。他求婚了。嗯，我当然答应了。【笑声】
english: He proposed.  He proposed.  Well, and I said yes, of course. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_impro03_M004
chinese: 那太棒了。你看起来光彩照人。我应该猜到的。
english: That is great.  You look radiant.  I should've guess.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F004
chinese: 我太兴奋了。
english: I'm so excited.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M005
chinese: 好的，请告诉我关于他的情况。发生了什么事情？
english: Well, Tell me about him.  What happened.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F005
chinese: 记得我们那次约会吗？我当时说，哦，是的，这是一次约会，无所谓。
english: Remember how we had that date?  And I was like, oh yeah, this is a date, whatever.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F006
chinese: 所以在我们出去吃晚饭之后，我已经有点累了。我并不是很兴奋，所以他说让我们去海滩，我说不，我不想去海滩，我累了。他说不，不，我们必须去。我说好吧，这有点奇怪。
english: So after we sort of went out dinner and I was already like tired.  I wasn't all that excited and and so he's like let's go down to the beach and I was like no I don't want to the beach, like I'm tired. And he's like no, no we have to go.  And I was like okay, like that's a little weird.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F007
chinese: 所以，他们——所以我们走到了码头，那里有一些灯光——像是这些小的，像是灯光——然后我们就像是在问那是什么？他就像是说不知道，我们去看看吧。
english: So, he--so we walked down to the pier and there's like these lights--like these little, like lights-- and we're like what's that? And he's like I don't know let's go find out.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F008
chinese: 所以我们走到那里，那里有-【笑声】-那里有- 在沙滩上有一个巨大的十英尺高的蜡烛心形-
english: So we walked down there and there's-[LAUGHTER]-And there's- this huge like ten foot heart in candles on the beach--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M006
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02F_impro03_F009
chinese: 喜欢他们所有的东西，然后我就像，发生了什么？然后他就像拿着我的手把我拉到中间，然后他就像——你知道的，跪下来，然后说你愿意嫁给我吗？然后我就疯了。
english: like all they have And I was like, what's going on?  And he like takes my hand and pulls me into the middle and he's like--you know, get's on his knee and everything--And says will you marry me? And I flipped out.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M007
chinese: 那，那是我听过的最浪漫的事情。
english: That--that is the most romantic thing I have ever heard.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F010
chinese: 我知道。我当时就想，他是怎么弄到的 - 他一定打电话给了某人或让他们安排了 - 我完全不知道。
english: I know.  I was like, how did he get--like he must have called someone or had them set--like, I have no idea.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M008
chinese: 哇。是的，因为我不知道我确定他-哦，是的，他肯定有-肯定需要有其他人-
english: Wow.  Yeah, 'cause yeah I don't know I'm sure if he--oh yeah he definitely had--would have had to have someone else--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F011
chinese: 因为-因为他和我在一起。你没有做吧？
english: 'Cause- 'Cause he was with me. You didn't do it did you?

name: Ses02F_impro03_M009
chinese: 是的。我的意思是蜡烛不会停留-不，我没有-我对此一无所知。
english: Yeah.  I mean candles wouldn't stay--No, I didn't--I didn't know anything about it.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F012
chinese: 你什么都不知道吗？
english: You didn't know anything?

name: Ses02F_impro03_M010
chinese: 不，我和你一样快乐。这是--
english: No. I'm just as happy as you are.  This is--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F013
chinese: 我只是--就像我以为这可能会发生，但还不是现在，你知道我的意思吗？就像--
english: I was just--it was so like I thought this might happen eventually, but like not yet, you know what I mean?  Like--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M011
chinese: 所以，我的意思是-虽然这很好。
english: So, I mean--it's good though.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F014
chinese: 这很好。这完全很好。我的意思是，就像哦，你知道的。
english: It is good.  It's totally good.  I mean, it like oh, you know.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M012
chinese: 是的，我知道。哇。我在发抖。我甚至连……
english: Yeah, I know.  Wow.  I'm shaking.  I can't even--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F015
chinese: 我知道。所以我们打算慢慢来，不会马上结婚，因为我们想有足够的时间来计划一切。
english: I know. So we're gonna take it--Like we're not gonna get married right away--'Cause we want to like have plenty of time to plan everything out

name: Ses02F_impro03_F016
chinese: ...而且，嗯，我的父母希望参与其中并提供帮助和支持，所以我们希望给它足够的时间来...
english: ...and, um, my parents want to like be part of it and help out and everything--So we want to give it lots of time to like--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M013
chinese: 哦。他们知道吗？你告诉他们了吗？哦，那个...
english: Oh. Do they--do they know yet? Have you told them? Oh, that's--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F017
chinese: 是的，是的，我给他们打了电话。我给他们打了电话，当然，他们非常兴奋，因为他们爱他。就像他们一直以来那样。嗯--
english: Yeah, yeah, I called them. I called them And, of course, they were so excited 'cause they love him. Like they always have.  Um--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M014
chinese: 太棒了。是的。
english: That's great.  Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F018
chinese: 嗯，是的，我的意思是，这会很好。我们想要在春天举办，就像是早春——这样天气还不会太热。嗯，还有——
english: So, yeah, I mean, it'll be good.  We wanna like, uh, I think we're gonna have it in spring time, like early Spring--So it's no too hot yet.  And um--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M015
chinese: 好的。你知道——你知道在哪里吗？还是——
english: Okay. You know--you know where?  Or--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F019
chinese: 我不知道。我的意思是，我有点喜欢在外面有些东西的想法，但是-就像-是-是的，
english: I don't know.  I mean, I kinda like the idea of having something outside, but--Like--is a- Yeah,

name: Ses02F_impro03_M016
chinese: 嗯，是的。我的意思是，你知道，现在是春天——它会——
english: Uh, huh. I mean, you know, it's spring--It'll be--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F020
chinese: 但是这有点困难，因为天气是如此不可预测，如果那天很冷。或者如果天气太热，你知道，就像是-但是嗯-
english: But It's sort of hard 'cause the weather is so unpredictable and then if it's like cold that day.  Or if it's too hot, you know, it's like--but um--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M017
chinese: 春天很美好。
english: Spring's nice though.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F021
chinese: 是的，我不知道-[笑声]-我的意思是-我甚至不能-和某人一起度过整个生活的想法-太疯狂了。
english: Yeah, I don't know-[LAUGHTER]-I mean--I can't even--the whole idea of like living--spending my whole life with somebody--that's crazy

name: Ses02F_impro03_M018
chinese: 是的，那是-你们现在在一起多久了？
english: Yeah, that is--how long you guys been together now?

name: Ses02F_impro03_F022
chinese: 两年半。【笑声】
english: Two and a half years. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_impro03_M019
chinese: 好的。好的。所以-[笑声]-相当一段时间了。我的意思是-那很好。我为你感到非常高兴。[笑声]
english: Okay.  All right.  So-[LAUGHTER]-quite a while.  I mean--That's-  That's good.  I'm so happy for you. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_impro03_F023
chinese: 谢谢你。非常感谢你。
english: Thank you. Thank you so much.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M020
chinese: 是的，我希望有一天能处于同样的情况，但是，哇-那么-
english: Yeah, I'd love to be in that same situation some day, but, wow- so-

name: Ses02F_impro03_F024
chinese: 哦，你会找到的——你会找到那个合适的女孩。她会完美地适合你，一切都会很美好。
english: Oh, you will--You'll find just the right girl.  And she'll be perfect for you and everything will be great.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M021
chinese: 你们在一起真棒。这绝对是一个好的组合。我能看出来。我应该猜到的。
english: You guys are awesome together.  It's definitely a--definitely a good couple.  I can see it. I should've guessed--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F025
chinese: 你同意吗？你同意吗？
english: You approve?  You approve?

name: Ses02F_impro03_M022
chinese: 哦，我同意。我-[笑声]-我不仅仅同意。
english: Oh, I approve. I-[LAUGHTER]-I more than approve.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M023
chinese: 我的意思是，我很惊讶他没有去找一架飞机飞过来照亮海滩上的蜡烛，但在海滩上点蜡烛也可以，我猜。
english: I mean, I'm surprised he didn't, ya know--go get a plane to fly over and shine--But candles on the beach, that's okay too I guess--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F026
chinese: 是的，它相当不错。
english: Yeah, it's pretty good.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M024
chinese: 好的 - 我是说，让我知道 - 我想要 - 我想要邀请函和 -
english: Well--can--I mean, let me know--I want- I want invitations and--

name: Ses02F_impro03_F027
chinese: 当然，当然 - 你可以成为其中的一部分。你可以来帮我挑选颜色。
english: Of course, of course--you'll be able to be a part of it.  You can come help me pick my colors.

name: Ses02F_impro03_M025
chinese: 哦，是的。这就是整个[垃圾]。
english: Oh, yes.  This is the whole [GARBAGE]

name: Ses02F_impro03_F028
chinese: 这太女孩子气了。我甚至不知道怎么喜欢——这太奇怪了，但会很有趣。我妈妈会喜欢的——她肯定会很投入。
english: It's so girly.  I don't even know how to like--It's so weird, but it'll be fun.  My mom will love to be like--she'll get so into it, I'm sure.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F029
chinese: 她会像花朵和那个样子
english: She'll be like--flowers and the--

name: Ses02F_impro03_M026
chinese: 这将是好的。哇，太棒了。
english: It'll be good.  Wow, that's great.

name: Ses02F_impro03_F030
chinese: 哦，谢谢。【笑声】
english: Oh, thank you. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M000
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F000
chinese: 亲爱的，你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: Honey, you knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You took presents from him.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F001
chinese: 礼物？只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents?  Just a trivial little broach.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M002
chinese: 啊，是的，我还记得得很清楚。满是钻石，但品味却是最糟糕的。
english: Ah, yes, I remember it well.  Bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F002
chinese: 不，不是的。它非常漂亮。我仍然拥有它，经常穿着。
english: No, it wasn't.  It was very pretty.  I still have it and I wear it often.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F003
chinese: 不，我没有。你在嫉妒的想象中把整件事情都夸大了。
english: No, I didn't.  You worked the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认，他爱上了你，对吗？
english: You must admit, he was in love with you, wasn't he?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F004
chinese: 也许只是一点点，没有什么严重的。
english: Just a little perhaps, nothing serious.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: You let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F005
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well, what of it?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F006
chinese: 这对他一点伤害都没有，而且我很喜欢。
english: It didn't hurt him at all and I enjoyed it.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M007
chinese: 好吧，那我呢？
english: Well, what about me?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么多疑和爱管闲事，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so suspicious and nosey, you never would have known a thing about it.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M008
chinese: 嗯，我必须说这是一个很好的观点。
english: Well, that's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F008
chinese: 我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M009
chinese: 我也是。无聊得发慌。你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: Me, too.  Bored stiff.  You want some brandy?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No, thanks.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我想我会要一些。
english: I think I'll have some.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F010
chinese: 不明白你为什么还想要。你已经喝了两杯了。
english: Don't see why you want any.  You've already had two glasses.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason.  Anyhow they were very small ones.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F011
chinese: 只是看起来很愚蠢，继续这样做下去。
english: Just seems so silly to go on and on and on with such a thing.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M012
chinese: 在一个晚上里，你几乎不能说三个酒杯一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three liquor glasses in a whole evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F012
chinese: 嗯，这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: Well, it's become a habit with you.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M013
chinese: 你不必那么傲慢，只是因为你此刻不想要任何东西。
english: You needn't be so grand, just because you don't happen to want any yourself at the moment.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要这么愚蠢。
english: Don't be so stupid.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M014
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M015
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M016
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Going out somewhere dear?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F015
chinese: 不，只是让自己对你有吸引力。
english: No, just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M017
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F016
chinese: 一个女人的工作就是吸引男人。你能帮我看一分钟吗？
english: A woman's job is to allure the man.  Watch me a minute, will you?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M018
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F017
chinese: 不，不是的。
english: No, it isn't.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F018
chinese: 哦，安静点。
english: Oh, be quiet.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M020
chinese: 啊，真可惜你没有更多的白兰地。它可能会让你少一点不合群。
english: Ah, it's a pity you didn't have any more brandy.  It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F019
chinese: 似乎对你没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: Doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M021
chinese: 咔嗒，咔嗒，咔嗒，像一条小蝰蛇。
english: Snap, snap, snap, like a little adder.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F020
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M022
chinese: 胡说八道。他们在牙齿后面有一小袋毒液，他们会咬人。
english: Nonsense.  They have a little bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F021
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M023
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F022
chinese: 我不在乎，你明白吗？我不在乎。我不在乎他们是不是叫或者像箍圈一样滚来滚去。
english: I don't care, do you understand?  I don't care.  I don't care if they bark or roll about like hoops.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M024
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F023
chinese: 是的，我做了。相当多。
english: Yes, I did.  Quite a lot.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M025
chinese: 嗯，我想象你让他亲吻你更多。
english: Hmm, I imagine you let him kiss you a good deal more then.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F024
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M026
chinese: 哦，一定度过了狂欢的时光。完全没有约束。非常愉快，反正也从来没有太多。
english: Oh, must have had a riotous time. No restraint at all.  Very enjoyable and never had much anyhow.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F025
chinese: 你真是令人无法忍受
english: You're quite insufferable

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F026
chinese: 我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: I expect it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我一点也没有喝醉。
english: I'm not in the least drunk.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F027
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不太好的问题。
english: You've always had a weak head.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M028
chinese: 正如我之前提到的，整个晚上我一直喝着三分钟的白兰地酒杯。一个两岁的孩子也不会因此而醉。
english: As I mentioned before, I have had three minute liquor glasses of brandy the whole evening long.  A child of two couldn't get drunk on that.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F028
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M029
chinese: 哦，非常有趣。四岁的孩子怎么样？六岁的孩子呢？还是九岁的孩子？
english: Oh, very interesting.  How about a child of four?  A child of six?  Or a child of nine?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F029
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M030
chinese: 我们可以就这个问题展开一场很好的辩论，你不觉得吗？不懂事的孩子们。
english: We could get a good debate going about this, don't you think?  Intemperate tots.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F030
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。你最好再喝点白兰地。
english: Not very funny, dear.  You'd better have some more brandy.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M031
chinese: 好的，我会的。
english: All right.  I will.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉，我想。
english: You better turn that off, I think.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F031
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M033
chinese: 因为现在很晚了，而且会打扰楼上的人。
english: Because it's late and it'll annoy the people upstairs.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F032
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs.  It's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M034
chinese: 有人在楼下，我猜测是吗？
english: There are people downstairs I suppose?

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F033
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M035
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of the year for Tunis.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F034
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M036
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I'll do no such thing.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F035
chinese: 很好，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well, if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M037
chinese: 关掉它。它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off.  It's driving me mad.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F036
chinese: 你太易怒了。试着控制自己。
english: You are far too temperamental.  Try to control yourself.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M038
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F037
chinese: 停下。走开。我讨厌你。
english: Stop it.  Go away.  I hate you.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M039
chinese: 阿曼达，听着。听着。
english: Amanda, listen. listen

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F038
chinese: 听？真的听。我受够了听你说话，该死的虐待狂恶霸。
english: Listen?  Listen, indeed.  I am sick and tired of listening to you, damn sadistic bully.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M040
chinese: 非常有趣，确实。
english: Very amusing, indeed.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F039
chinese: 我讨厌你。停下来。停下来。我讨厌你，你听到了吗？你自负、专横而且完全不可理喻。
english: I hate you.  Stop it.  Stop it.  I hate you, do you hear?  You're conceited and overbearing and utterly impossible.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M041
chinese: 你是一个卑鄙、脾气暴躁、放荡不羁、邪恶的小兽，我希望在我活着的时候再也不见到你。
english: You're a vile, tempered, loose living, wicked little beast and I hope to never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F040
chinese: 这是结束。最终和永远。你听到我说的吗？结束了。
english: This is the end.  Finally and forever.  Do you hear me?  The end.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M042
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F041
chinese: 哦，是的，我是。
english: Oh Yes, I am.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M043
chinese: 你不是。
english: You're not.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F042
chinese: 我是。放开我。你是一个残忍的恶魔，我讨厌你，憎恨你。
english: I am.  Let go of me.  You're a cruel fiend and I hate and loathe you.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M044
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。
english: Shut up. Shut up.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M045
chinese: 我不会--我不会结婚--
english: I wouldn't-- I wouldn't marry--

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M046
chinese: 如果你跪着爬进来，我也不会嫁给你。
english: I wouldn't marry you if you came in crawling on your knees

name: Ses02F_script03_2_F043
chinese: 谢天谢地，我意识到了你是什么样的人——我这辈子再也不会嫁给你了。你是一个残忍的恶魔，我讨厌你。你是个野兽。你是个野兽——我讨厌你。停下来。停下来。
english: Thank God I realized what you are-- I'd never marry you again ever in my life. You're a cruel fiend and I hate you. You're a beast. You're a beast--I hate you. Stop it.  Stop it.

name: Ses02F_script03_2_M047
chinese: 你是一个邪恶的吸血鬼，我希望上帝保佑我一生中再也不要见到你。
english: You're a evil vampire and I hope to God I never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M000
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F000
chinese: 你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort. You took presents from him.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F001
chinese: 礼物，只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents, just a trivial little broach.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M002
chinese: 是的，我记得得很清楚，它满是钻石，但品味却非常糟糕。
english: Yes, I remember it well, bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F002
chinese: 不，不是这样的。它非常漂亮，我仍然保留着它，经常穿着。
english: No it wasn't. It was very pretty I still have it and I wear it often.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F003
chinese: 不，我没有，你是在你嫉妒的想象中把整件事情都编造出来的。
english: No I didn't, you worked the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你，是吗？
english: You must admit he was in love with you, wasn't he?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F004
chinese: 也许只是一点点，没有什么严重的。
english: Just a little perhaps, nothing serious.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你；你说你做了。
english: You let him kiss you; you said you did.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F005
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F006
chinese: 它给了他很多快乐，对我没有造成任何伤害。
english: It gave him a lot of pleasure, it didn't hurt me any.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么爱管闲事和多疑，你就不会知道任何关于它的事情了。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so nosey and suspicious you never wouldn't have known anything about it.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M008
