chinese: 那是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F008
chinese: 我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: I'm bored of this conversation.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M009
chinese: 是的，我也是，无聊得要死。你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: Yes, me too, bored stiff. You want some Brandy?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No thanks.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我有一点点我认为。
english: I have a little I think.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不明白为什么你还想要，你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want any you've already had two glasses.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason. Anyhow, they are very small ones.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F011
chinese: 这样做似乎太愚蠢了，一直这样下去。
english: It just seems so silly to go on and on and on with such a thing.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M012
chinese: 在一个晚上里，你几乎不能说三个酒杯一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three liquor glasses in a whole evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F012
chinese: 嗯，这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: Well, it's become a habit with you.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M013
chinese: 你现在不需要那么自大，只是因为你自己现在不想要任何东西。
english: You needn't be so grand just because don't happen want any yourself right now.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要这么愚蠢。
english: Don't be so stupid.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M014
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M015
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F015
chinese: 不，我只是让自己对你有吸引力。
english: No I'm just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M016
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Going out somewhere, dear?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F016
chinese: 这是一个女人的工作，吸引男人。
english: It's a woman's job to allure the man

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M017
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F017
chinese: 请你看一下我，好吗？
english: watch me a minute, will you?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M018
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F018
chinese: 哦，不，不是这样的。
english: Oh, no it isn't.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F019
chinese: 安静点。
english: Be quiet.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M020
chinese: 很遗憾你没有更多白兰地，它可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you didn't have any more Brandy it might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F020
chinese: 它似乎对你没有产生如此神奇的效果。
english: It doesn't seem to work such wonders with you.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M021
chinese: 咔嗒，咔嗒，咔嗒，像一条小蝰蛇。
english: Snap, snap, snap, like a little adder.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F021
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap they sting.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M022
chinese: 哦，胡说八道，它们在牙齿后面有一小袋毒液，它们会咬人。
english: Oh nonsense they have a little bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F022
chinese: 它们叮咬。
english: They sting.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M023
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F023
chinese: 我不在乎。你明白吗？我不在乎。我不在乎他们是不是叫或者像箍圈一样滚来滚去。
english: I don't care. Do you understand? I don't care. I don't care if they bark or roll about like hoops.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M024
chinese: 告诉我，我们离婚后你还经常见到彼得·伯登吗？
english: Tell me, did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F024
chinese: 是的，我做了很多。
english: Yes, I did quite a lot.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M025
chinese: 我想象你让他亲吻你更多。
english: I imagine you let him kiss you good deal more then.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F025
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M026
chinese: 你一定度过了多么狂乱的时光。
english: What riotous time you must have had.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M027
chinese: 没有任何约束，非常愉快，反正也从来没有太多。
english: No restraint at all, very enjoyable, never had much anyhow.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F026
chinese: 你真是讨人厌。我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable. I expect it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M028
chinese: 我一点也没有喝醉。
english: I am not in the least drunk.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M029
chinese: 我想象着，就像我可能已经提到的那样，整个晚上我已经喝了三杯三分钟的白兰地酒，一个两岁的孩子都不能喝醉。
english: I imagine, as I may have already mentioned, I've had three minute liquor glasses of Brandy the whole evening long a child of two couldn't get drunk on that.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F027
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary a child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass of Brandy.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M030
chinese: 哦，非常有趣。四岁的孩子、六岁的孩子或九岁的孩子怎么样？
english: Oh very interesting. How about a child of four, a child of six or a child of nine?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F028
chinese: 哦，安静点。
english: Oh be quiet.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M031
chinese: 我们可以就这个展开一场很好的辩论，你不觉得吗？不懂事的孩子们。
english: We can get a good little debate going about that, don't you think? Intemperate tots.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F029
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣，你最好再喝点白兰地。
english: Not very funny my dear, you better have some more Brandy.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M032
chinese: 好的，我会的。
english: All right. I will.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M033
chinese: 最好把它关掉，我想。
english: Better turn that off I think.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F030
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M034
chinese: 因为现在很晚了，而且会打扰楼上的人。
english: Because it's late and it'll annoy the people upstairs.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F031
chinese: 楼上没有人，那是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs it's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M035
chinese: 有人在楼下，我猜测是吗？
english: There are people downstairs I suppose?

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F032
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M036
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of the year for Tunis.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F033
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M037
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I'll do no such thing.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F034
chinese: 很好，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well, if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M038
chinese: 关掉它，它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off it's driving me mad.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F035
chinese: 你太易怒了。试着控制自己。
english: You are far too temperamental. Try to control yourself.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M039
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F036
chinese: 停下。停下。我讨厌你。
english: Stop it. Stop it. I hate you.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M040
chinese: 阿曼达，听着。听着。
english: Amanda, listen. Listen.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F037
chinese: 听着确实。我受够了听你说话，该死的虐待狂恶霸。
english: Listen indeed. I'm sick and tired of listening to you, damn sadistic bully.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M041
chinese: 非常有趣的确。
english: Very amusing indeed.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F038
chinese: 停下。停下。我讨厌你，你听到了吗？你太专横、自负，完全不可理喻。
english: Stop it. Stop it. I hate you, do you hear? You're overbearing and conceited and utterly impossible.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M042
chinese: 你是一个脾气恶劣、放荡不羁、邪恶的小野兽，我希望我一生中再也不见到你。
english: You're a vile tempered, loose living, wicked little beast and I hope I never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F039
chinese: 这是结束，你听到了吗？最终的结束，永远地。
english: This is the end, do you hear? The end finally and forever.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M043
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F040
chinese: 哦，是的，我是的。
english: Oh yes I am.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M044
chinese: 你不是。
english: You're not.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F041
chinese: 是的，我是。放开我，你残忍的恶魔，我讨厌你，憎恨你。感谢上帝，在我再次嫁给你之前，我意识到了你真正的本质。我绝不会再嫁给你。我宁愿在痛苦中死去。
english: Yes, I am. Let go of me you're cruel fiend and I hate and loathe you. Thank God I realized who you really are before I would ever, ever marry you again. I would never marry you again. I'd rather die in torment.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M045
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M046
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_M047
chinese: 如果你跪着来找我，我也不会再嫁给你。你是一个邪恶心机的小吸血鬼。上帝保佑，只要我活着，我希望再也不见到你。
english: I wouldn't marry you again if you came to me on your bended knees. You're a evil minded little vampire. I hope to God I never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses02M_script03_2_F042
chinese: 你是个野兽。我讨厌你。停下来。停下来。
english: You're a beast. I hate you. Stop it. Stop it.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M000
chinese: 嗯，我不知道
english: Uhm, I don't know

name: Ses02M_impro04_F000
chinese: 你感觉怎么样？
english: So how you feeling?

name: Ses02M_impro04_M001
chinese: 我不知道我要怎么处理这个问题；我的意思是
english: I don't know what I'm going to do about this; I mean

name: Ses02M_impro04_M002
chinese: 我必须找到一份工作，你知道吗？就像-
english: I have got to get a job, you know? Like-

name: Ses02M_impro04_F001
chinese: 你为此做了很多工作，对吗？
english: You've been doing a lot of work for it, right?

name: Ses02M_impro04_M003
chinese: 嗯，是的，你知道的，我拿到我的简历，我的意思是我-
english: Well, yea you know, I get my resumes and I mean I-

name: Ses02M_impro04_F002
chinese: 没错，所以你尽力而为是事实。
english: Right, so the fact you doing the best that you can is -

name: Ses02M_impro04_M004
chinese: 我去所有我能去的地方，每一个能给我面试的地方，你知道的。
english: I go out all the places I can, every place that'll give an interview you know.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F003
chinese: 你知道你不应该为此事自责，这是你能做到的最好的。
english: you know you shouldn't give yourself a hard time for that, it's the best you can.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M005
chinese: 但是已经过了这么久，就像是什么 - 我在等什么 - 我在等什么 - 我应该可能做些其他的事情，或者
english: But it's been so long, like what - what am I - what am I waiting -- I should probably just do something else, or

name: Ses02M_impro04_F004
chinese: 嗯，但你关心你所做的事情，对吗？
english: Well, but you care about what you do, right?

name: Ses02M_impro04_M006
chinese: 我不知道，我的意思是为什么 - 为什么
english: I don't know, I mean why - why

name: Ses02M_impro04_M007
chinese: 是的，但这几乎就像不值得，你知道的，如果我要浪费我的生命去找工作，我是说一旦我真的找到工作了，就像是退休或者什么的。我不知道，你知道的。
english: Yea, but it's - it's almost like it's not worth it you know, if I'm going to waste to have my life like trying to get a job, I mean once I actually do get the job it's like oh, retirement or something. I don't know, you know.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F005
chinese: 我知道这很令人沮丧，但我知道你在这里是因为你真的想要它，你知道的，嗯
english: I understand that it's so frustrating but I know that you're here because you really want it you know and, and uh

name: Ses02M_impro04_M008
chinese: 嗯，过了一段时间后，我开始质疑的是也许我根本不想要它，也许它甚至不值得，你知道的，就像这样。
english: Well, and that's what I begin to question after a while is maybe I just don't want it, maybe it's not even worth it, you know, like

name: Ses02M_impro04_M009
chinese: 我甚至不知道这是否值得，因为我无法适应，你知道，就像我无法进入门槛一样。
english: I don't even know if it's going to be worth it because I can't break myself in, you know like I can't - can't even get a foot in the door you know.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F006
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是你还在这里，你已经努力了这么久，所以我认为这本身就说明了一些问题。
english: Well, I mean you're still here you've tried for this long so I think that says something all in itself.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M010
chinese: 是的，它说我足够愚蠢，以至于我尝试了这么长时间，却没有去别的地方。
english: Yea, it says I'm stupid enough to be trying this long and not move on somewhere else.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F007
chinese: 你很坚持。我的意思是这很重要。那就是。
english: You are persistence. I mean that's important. that's

name: Ses02M_impro04_M011
chinese: 我的意思是，我不能-我不能永远坚持下去，你知道的，你不能永远没有工作，你知道的，我得-我得做点什么，我得赚钱，把食物放在桌子上。
english: I mean, I can't- I can't be persistent forever, you know, you can't not have a job forever, you know, I've got- I've got to do something, I've got to make money and get food on the table.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F008
chinese: 嗯，你很有才华，记住这一点，你知道，你不应该对自己太苛刻。
english: Well, you're talented so keep that in mind, you know, you shouldn't give yourself too hard of a time.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M012
chinese: 我是说，也许我不是，你知道的。我没有工作。也许 - 也许我不像我以为的那样好，而且
english: I mean, maybe I'm not, you know. I don't have a job. Maybe - maybe I'm not as good as-as I thought I was and

name: Ses02M_impro04_M013
chinese: 我刚刚对这个问题的解决方式有了一个完全扭曲的观点，而且
english: I just got a whole skewed opinion on just how this is supposed to work out and

name: Ses02M_impro04_F009
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M014
chinese: 我不知道，就是不知道，我真的不知道该怎么办，你知道吗，我只是在思考。
english: I don't know, it's just not, I don't know - I don't know what to do really, you know, I'm just thinking

name: Ses02M_impro04_M015
chinese: 也许 - 也许开始绘画，我不知道，你知道。
english: maybe - maybe take up painting, I don't know, you know.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M016
chinese: 做一些我不需要出门去做的事情，待在家里，我不知道。
english: Do something that I don't have to go out and do something, stay at home, I don't know.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M017
chinese: 似乎这是目前唯一的选择，因为显然外界已经拒绝了我所有可能的就业机会。
english: Seems like the only option at this point because obviously the outer world has just rejected me of all possible employment.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F010
chinese: 那个，我的意思是，不仅仅是你是否优秀，还有其他因素，你知道我的意思吗？
english: That's- I mean. There are more factors then just whether you're good or not, you know what I mean like

name: Ses02M_impro04_F011
chinese: 而且你知道总是有不同类型的事物，以及他们在办公室中想要什么样的人，无论是男性还是女性，或者你知道我是什么意思，就像有些事情是无法控制的。
english: and the fact that you know there is always different types of things and what kind of people they want in the office and whether it's male or female or you know what I mean, like things are out of your control.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F012
chinese: 所以你应该考虑这一点，而不是给自己带来这么多困扰。
english: So you should take that in consideration rather than giving yourself such a hard time.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M018
chinese: 我知道，但是我的意思是- 如果那是- 你知道的，要么我在这方面是最差的，要么我只是地球上最倒霉的人，我的意思是这不
english: I know, but I mean- if that's the - you know, I'm either like the worst at this or just the most unlucky person on the planet I mean this doesn't

name: Ses02M_impro04_F013
chinese: 可能是后者，我不知道，因为你不是最糟糕的，我的意思是你很棒，你在你所做的事情上非常有才华。
english: It might be the latter I don't know because you're not the worst, I mean you're great, you very talented at what you do.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M019
chinese: 这种情况不会发生在一个正常的人身上。
english: this doesn't happen to a normal person.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F014
chinese: 你知道，事实上你还在这里，还在做饭，这很好，你在考虑这个问题，重新考虑是好的。
english: You know and the fact you still here and still cooking, like it's good that you're thinking about it, that you're reconsidering.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F015
chinese: 但是，仅仅因为你在考虑为什么事情变得如此困难，并不意味着你应该就此停止。
english: But like, just because you're considering why it's been so difficult doesn't mean you should just stop.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M020
chinese: 我的意思是，我不知道，我看不到 - 我现在看不到其他办法 - 其他办法。
english: I mean, I don't know, I don't see - I don't see any other way - any other way around it right now.

name: Ses02M_impro04_F016
chinese: 也许你应该从中休息一下，但我不认为你应该停止。
english: Maybe you should take a little break from it, but I don't think you should stop.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M021
chinese: 在休息期间我要做什么？
english: What am I going to do on a break?

name: Ses02M_impro04_F017
chinese: 离开这个城市或者做点什么吧，我的意思是你需要——你需要冷静一下，因为你看起来对此非常沮丧。我的意思是你需要对自己正在做的事情感到兴奋，而不是沮丧。
english: Get out of town or something, I mean you need - you need to clear your head 'cause you seem like you're really frustrated about it. I mean you need to like, be excited about you're doing, rather than, you know upset.

name: Ses02M_impro04_M022
chinese: 好的。谢谢你和我交谈。
english: Right. Thanks for talking to me.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M000
chinese: 嗨。嗯-
english: Hi. Um-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F000
chinese: 嗨，我能帮你吗？
english: Hi, can I help you?

name: Ses02M_impro05_M001
chinese: 看起来我的包包没有在传送带上出来。
english: It seems that uh- my-my bag didn't make it out on the carousel.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F001
chinese: 哦，你检查了吗？当它第二次绕过时，你确定了吗？
english: Oh, did you check? Did you make sure as it went around the second time that it-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M002
chinese: 是的，是的，它已经传了大约二十次了。已经过去大约半个小时了。
english: Yes, yes, it's gone around like you know twenty times. It's been about a half hour.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F002
chinese: 好的。嗯，呃- f。
english: Okay. Well, um- the f.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F003
chinese: 实际上，我正在这里查看信息，你乘坐的航班上我们在行李方面遇到了一些麻烦，看起来有几个人的行李没有通过。嗯，所以-
english: Actually I'm looking here at the information, the flight that you were on we had some trouble with some of the baggage, it looks like a few peoples' bags didn't make it through. Um, so-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M003
chinese: 好的。那么我需要了解什么
english: Okay. So what-what do I have to get you know

name: Ses02M_impro05_F004
chinese: 好的，你可以填写这份文件，如果有什么原因它出现了，我们可以把它带给你，但是-
english: Well, you can fill out this paperwork um- and if for some reason it shows up, we can bring it to you, but-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M004
chinese: 由于某种原因，你认为它不会出现吗？
english: For some reason, so you think it won't show up?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F005
chinese: 嗯，有时候只是行李晚到或行李被错放了，但最终会找到，但现在看起来好像还在这里，我正在根据这个读取。
english: Well, sometimes it's just late baggage or misplaced baggage and it comes out but it seems to be here and just I'm reading off of this that

name: Ses02M_impro05_F006
chinese: 嗯，它没有进入第二架飞机，所以看起来他们实际上不知道它发生了什么。
english: Uh- it didn't make it into the second plane so it looks like there - they don't actually know what happened to it.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M005
chinese: 什么？什么？那是怎么发生的？
english: What? What? How does that happen?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F007
chinese: 嗯，嗯，有时候上飞机时会遇到困难。嗯，可能会发生盗窃或者一些意外，比如推车出了问题。
english: Um, well, sometimes there is just difficulties with loading on to the plane. Uh- There can be a theft or uh- some sort of you know mishap with a cart or something.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M006
chinese: 我真的 - 我真的需要那个包。
english: I really - I really need that bag.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F008
chinese: 我-我-我明白，但是嗯。
english: I- I- I understand, but um.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M007
chinese: 那里有-我在那个包里有重要的东西。我有
english: there are- I have important things in that bag. I've got

name: Ses02M_impro05_F009
chinese: 好的
english: Okay

name: Ses02M_impro05_M008
chinese: 我是说 - 我离开了一段时间，现在我有礼物给你知道的朋友和家人，我的意思是，我在那里有东西。
english: I mean -- I've been away for a while and- and now I've- I've gifts for- for you know friends and family I mean, I got stuff in the there

name: Ses02M_impro05_F010
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M009
chinese: 这很值钱。
english: It's worth a lot.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F011
chinese: 我明白。嗯，所以我要在这里记录一下，你在找你的行李，但实际上我们无法找到，这个行李很可能不会出现，所以我们要做的是-
english: I understand that. Um- So I'm going to put down here that you looking for your baggage, but we actually can't, uh this bag is likely not going to show up so what we're going to do-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M010
chinese: 不会展示-好像不是-难道不只是在机场吗，就像，如果它没有上其他的飞机
english: Not going to show - well isn't like - wouldn't it just be at the airport, that, like, if it didn't get on the other plane

name: Ses02M_impro05_M011
chinese: 他们能在那里检查吗？
english: can they check there?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F012
chinese: 有时它被偷走，有时它在另一个平面上被错放了。
english: Sometimes it gets stolen, sometimes it gets misplaced on another plane and

name: Ses02M_impro05_M012
chinese: 在另一个地方-
english: on another-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F013
chinese: 他们 - 他们，它被运送到其他地方，然后被卡在某个地方，我们无法追踪。
english: they - they, it gets shipped to somewhere else and then it's stuck somewhere and then we have no way of tracking that.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F014
chinese: 所以我们将会-我们将会做什么
english: So we'll- what we'll do

name: Ses02M_impro05_M013
chinese: 但是我们有标签。我的意思是，如果它被卡在某个地方，就像这不是谁的包，也许你可以看看标签上的信息。
english: But we have the tags on. I mean like it wouldn't you know, if it got stuck somewhere it's like well this is nobodies bag I mean maybe you know look on the tag and

name: Ses02M_impro05_M014
chinese: 看看它最初来自哪里。我的意思是，它似乎像是-
english: see where it came from originally. I mean it seems like-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F015
chinese: 没错。就像我说的，有时候会发生偷窃之类的事情，但我们愿意为您进行赔偿。
english: Right. Like I said sometimes a theft and things happen like that but we are willing to reim-reimburse you.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M015
chinese: 盗窃？
english: Theft?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F016
chinese: 嗯，那么。
english: Um, so.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M016
chinese: 盗窃？难道你不知道像这些工作的人一样，你要时刻注意他们，他们怎么能逃脱-
english: Theft? Don't you know like all these people that are work - you keep like an eye on them, how can they get away with-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F017
chinese: 我们有非常严格的安全措施，但是有时候我们无法完全确保没有任何人为错误，你知道的。
english: We have very tight security but we -uh- there are times when we just can't uh make sure there aren't absolutely no human error, you know

name: Ses02M_impro05_F018
chinese: 对不起，行李没有保证。
english: I'm sorry there is no guarantee on baggage.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M017
chinese: 这真是难以置信。我得到了。
english: This is unbelievable. I've got

name: Ses02M_impro05_M018
chinese: 你没有意识到我在那个里面有什么东西 - 我真的需要拿到那个行李箱，好吗？
english: you don't realize the stuff that I've got in that - I really need to get the suitcase okay

name: Ses02M_impro05_F019
chinese: 我理解，所以-
english: I understand, so-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M019
chinese: 所以如果它在那边或者其他什么地方，如果有什么你可以做的事情。
english: so if it's back there or something, if there is something you can do

name: Ses02M_impro05_M020
chinese: 我需要你告诉我，因为我真的需要拿到那个包，好吗？
english: I need you to tell me because I really need to get the bag, okay?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F020
chinese: 好的，我们已经在这里检查过您的行李了。
english: all right, We've already checked back here for your baggage

name: Ses02M_impro05_F021
chinese: 我们将继续寻找它，因为你的论文-
english: and we will continue to look for it and because your paper-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M021
chinese: 你已经检查过了吗？你能再检查一次吗？[垃圾]
english: You've already checked? Can you check again? [garbage]

name: Ses02M_impro05_F022
chinese: 我已经查过了，非常感谢，因为我们已经填写了文件，如果它出现了，我们会把它寄给你，但如果没有的话，我们可以为你报销五十美元。
english: I've already looked, thank you very much and because we've filled out paperwork if it shows up we will send it to you but otherwise what we can do is reimburse you for fifty dollar.

name: Ses02M_impro05_M022
chinese: 五十美元？开玩笑吧，你一定在开玩笑。
english: Fifty- fifty dollars? Come on you have got to be joking.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F023
chinese: 嗯，这只是帮助你应对你失去了一些财物的事实，我们宁愿这样做而不是...
english: Well, it's- it's just sort of help with the fact uh that you lost some of your possessions and we rather do that than-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M023
chinese: 嗯，是的，我丢了一些东西，是的，所以如果我丢了可能是在行李箱里的一只鞋和一个随身携带的东西。
english: Uh huh, yea, lost some of my possessions, yes, so if I lost maybe a shoe that was in the suitcase and like a carry-on

name: Ses02M_impro05_M024
chinese: 可能是五十美元，好吧，但是这个 - 我 - [垃圾] 我在那个手提箱里有价值数千美元的东西。
english: that might be like fifty dollars okay, but this - I- [garbage] I had like thousands of dollars worth of stuff in that suitcase.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F024
chinese: 这家航空公司负担不起给你那个行李箱里的所有东西。所以-
english: The airline can't afford to give you everything that is in that suitcase. and so-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M025
chinese: 啥-什么？说他们买不起核心？我的意思是-
english: The a- what? Talking about a core they can't afford it? I mean-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F025
chinese: 嗯，因为很多人的行李会丢失，我们不想出现虚假索赔或类似的情况，所以我们有这样的要求。
english: Well because lots of people get their baggage lost and we don't want to have false claims or anything like that so we have

name: Ses02M_impro05_F026
chinese: 我们可以给你五十美元来弥补一下，作为补偿，而且如果它出现的话，我们肯定会通知你，但很有可能，更有可能-
english: we can give you fifty dollar to sort of make up for it, to compensate, and we can definitely let you know if it shows up but likely, more than likely-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M026
chinese: 我是说你在这里没有帮助我。我在这里需要做什么？我需要起诉航空公司吗？这是我应该做的吗？
english: I mean you're not helping me here. What do I have to do here? Do I need to sue the airline company is that what I should do

name: Ses02M_impro05_M027
chinese: 因为这太荒谬了？
english: because this is ridiculous?

name: Ses02M_impro05_F027
chinese: 对不起。我不- 我-
english: I'm sorry. I don't- I-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F028
chinese: 我不相信你应该起诉航空公司，但我们有一个政策，我们可以给你报销，这就是我们能做的，我很抱歉，我已经尽力了。
english: I don't believe you should sue the airline company but we do have a policy uh- in which we can reimburse you and that's all we can do and I'm sorry I've done everything I can-

name: Ses02M_impro05_M028
chinese: 好吧。我生病了-我受够了，好吧。我受够了你，把你的五十美元留着吧。
english: All right. I'm sick- I'm sick of this all right. I'm sick of you and keep your fifty dollar.

name: Ses02M_impro05_F029
chinese: 有其他人在等待-
english: There's other people waiting-

name: Ses02M_impro05_F030
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑。
english: What time is it?  They're supposed to run around midnight.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M001
chinese: 这太棒了，不是吗？看看我们这里的夜晚，再好不过了。
english: This is great, isn't it?  Look at the night we've got here, couldn't be better.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M002
chinese: 我本来想沿着海岸再往前走一点，远离灯光和人群，但我担心我们会错过它。
english: I would have liked to have gone a little further up the coast to get away from the lights and the people, but I was afraid we'd miss it.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M003
chinese: 你好吗？
english: How you doing?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M004
chinese: 那是-不-那只是泡沫吗？我甚至都分不清。
english: Is that--no--is that just foam?  I can't even tell.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M005
chinese: 嗯，我猜我们可以说，这可能不是对的吧？你觉得可能会是不会被误解的吗？
english: Well, I guess we can tell, it probably isn't right?  Probably be unmistakable don't you think?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M006
chinese: 你好吗？哎呀，你知道我忘了什么吗？我忘了带手电筒。哦，我怎么这么笨呢？我应该带上手电筒的。
english: How you doing?  Aw, you know what I forgot?  I forgot to bring my flashlight.  Oh, how could I be so stupid?  I should've brought my flashlight.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M007
chinese: 你知道，手电筒，那个银色的。只有一个，对吗？
english: You know, the flashlight, the silver one.  There's only one isn't there?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F002
chinese: 那不是你的手电筒。
english: That's not your flashlight.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M008
chinese: 这是谁的？
english: Who's is it?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的。这也是我的。
english: It's ours.  It's mine too.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M009
chinese: 哦，好的，当然。
english: Oh, well sure.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F004
chinese: 你一直说我的手电筒，好像它只属于你一样。我的意思是，这是要让我有什么感觉吗？
english: You kept saying my flashlight, if as if somehow it's just yours.  I mean is that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M010
chinese: 当然，我们的手电筒。我的和你的。我的意思是，我的手电筒当然是属于我的。
english: Right, of course.  Our flashlight.  Mine and yours.  I mean, me flashlight is su flashlight naturally.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M011
chinese: 我们怎么会忘记带它呢？我希望月亮能继续出来。
english: How could we forget to bring it?  I hope the moon stays out.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M012
chinese: 我想知道，他们是否总是在满月时奔跑？我记不清去年是否是满月。你记得吗？
english: I wonder, do they always run during a full moon?  I can't remember if it was full last year.  Do you remember?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M013
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？哦，我们应该带毯子来了。我们的毯子。
english: You cold?  Do you want my jacket?  Oh, we should've brought the blanket.  Our blanket.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M014
chinese: 这太棒了，不是吗？现在一个六瓶装就是最好的选择。
english: This is great, isn't it?  A six pack would be just the ticket right now.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M015
chinese: 我简直不敢相信我忘了。我就像个孩子一样。真不可思议我居然能够带着拉链走出家门。
english: I can't believe I forgot.  I'm like a kid.  It's amazing I got out of the house with my fly zipped.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M016
chinese: 你认为他们能听到我们说话吗？或者当我们在沙子上移动时能感受到振动吗？
english: You think they can hear us talk?  Or feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F006
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M017
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F007
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了，我们就回家吧。
english: It's after eleven, let's just go home.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M018
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们会错过的。我们刚到这里。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里的意义是什么？
english: Are you kidding?  We'd miss it.  We just got here.  What's the point of coming down here if we just turn around and go home.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M019
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M020
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point too.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F010
chinese: 所以，让我们走吧。
english: So, let's go.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M021
chinese: 不，不是这个意思。关键是如果我们只是离开的话，下来就没有意义了。你不想看吗？
english: No. No. That's not my point.  The point is there's no point in coming down if we just leave.  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M022
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我就是不喜欢。这太愚蠢了。
english: I just don't.  It's stupid.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M023
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。我的意思是，你知道，这只发生一次一年。
english: Honey, this is a natural phenomenon.  I mean this only happens once a year, you know.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M024
chinese: 想想堪萨斯的人们，他们不得不买机票和预订酒店才能看到这个。而我们离这里只有四十分钟的路程。这太好了，不容错过。
english: Think about the people in Kansas, they had to get plane tickets and hotel reservations to see this.  We live forty minutes away.  It's too good to pass up.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这些小鱼游到沙滩上，他们扑腾着，然后游走。然后它们就死了。
english: Pass up what?  These little fish swim onto the beach, they flop around, and swim away.  And then they die.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M025
chinese: 是的，但是在海滩上的那一刻，是他们小小生命中的亮点。所有的翻滚都是在产卵还是在交配。我的意思是，
english: Yeah, but that moment on the beach, is the highlight of their little lives.  All that flopping is laying eggs or what do you--spawning or mating.  I mean,

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M026
chinese: 这对这些人来说是个重要的夜晚。生命的最后狂欢。
english: this is a big night for these guys.  Life's last orgy.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？我的意思是，我们谈论的不是登月，而是鱼。这是一种甚至没有人吃的鱼。
english: What are you so excited about?  I mean, it's not a moon landing we're talking about here.  It's fish.  It's a fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M027
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah they do.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F015
chinese: 啊，奥吉。
english: Ah, Augie.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M028
chinese: 好的。但是它是鱼中的一种，它做了其他鱼没有做的事情。就像燕子返回卡皮斯特拉诺或者旅鼠自己跳下悬崖一样。
english: Alright.  But it's fish that do something that none of the other fish do.  Like the swallows returning to Capistrano or the lemmings throwing themselves off the cliffs.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M029
chinese: 有一些魔力，一些无法解释的东西在这里。我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: There's--there's a bit of the magic--some unexplainable here.  I don't see how you can not be interested.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M030
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M031
chinese: 我不明白。第一次我们来这里的时候，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚。
english: I don't get it.  The first time we came here, you said it was the best night of your life.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M032
chinese: 去年，我记得你特别兴奋地要去那里，你急忙催促我离开房子，结果连续到车上才发现你踩到了脚趾头。
english: And last year, I remember specifically you were so excited to go that you stubbed your toe rushing me out of the house and didn't even notice until we got in the car.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F018
chinese: 去年，你也会记得我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，你喉咙痛，我们因为无关紧要的事情大吵了一架，而且我们没有看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Last year, you will also remember our shoes got wet, I got sand in my panties, you got a sore throat, we got in a big fight over nothing, and we didn't see the grunions.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M033
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F019
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M034
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。这个位置要好得多。相信我，我对这些事情有很好的直觉。
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  This is a much better spot.  Believe me, I've got good instincts for these things.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M035
chinese: 那是海草，不是吗？
english: There is that--no that's just seaweed isn't it?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M036
chinese: 哦，伙计，这太棒了，不是吗？我不会错过这个机会。来，考虑一下这个，好吗，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但是请考虑一下。
english: Oh man, this is great, isn't it?  I wouldn't miss this for anything.  Here, think about this, all right, I know you're not interested, but think about this.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M037
chinese: 在那里的某个地方，有一大群银色鱼朝这边游动。
english: Somewhere out there, this huge mass of silver fish swimming this way.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M038
chinese: 他们不知道为什么，我们也不知道为什么。没有人给他们发过邀请或地图，这不是一个决定，只是-
english: They don't know why, we don't know why.  Nobody sent them an invitation or a map, it wasn't a decision, just-

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M039
chinese: 所有人都像一个人一样，这次释放了本能的小鞭炮，他们都转过身来，排成了一条长达加利福尼亚海岸的队伍，开始游泳。现在他们正在游泳，仿佛那是唯一重要的事情。
english: all as one, this time release instinctual little firecracker went off and they all turned and formed a line as long as the California coast and started swimming.  And they're swimming right now as if that's all that matters.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M040
chinese: 就像没有思想的专注。这是纯粹的迫切感。他们不知道是什么驱使他们。他们不问它问题，也不给它一个名字。
english: It's like single mindedness with no mind.  It's urgency that's pure urge.  They don't know what drives them.  They don't ask it a question or give it a name.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M041
chinese: 他们只是一起转身，开始游泳，将他们带到我们站立的地方，为了一场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典。
english: They just turn as one and start the swim that brings them right here to where we stand, for a massive celebration of sex and death.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M042
chinese: 啊，天哪，我自己都起鸡皮疙瘩了。看，我的头发都竖起来了。
english: Ah, God, I'm giving myself goose bumps.  Look, all my hairs are popped up.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M043
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so what do you think?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F021
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses02F_script02_1_M044
chinese: 我刚才说的话。
english: What I was saying.

name: Ses02F_script02_1_F022
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M000
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so what do you think?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我刚才说的话。
english: What I was saying.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这是公关活动。有人向你兜售了一个美妙的活动将在海滩上举行的虚假信息。
english: It's PR.  Somebody sold you a bill of goods that this wonderful event is gonna take place on the beach.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M003
chinese: 嗯，我不是唯一一个。看看这些人。
english: Well, I'm not the only one.  Look at all these people.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F003
chinese: 当然，每个人都听到了同样的故事。它让我们都感到兴奋。它让我们不断回来寻找更多。它让我们相信，只要我们能找到合适的位置并参与其中，生活就会在下一秒开始。
english: Sure, everybody's told the same story.  It keeps us all excited.  It keeps us coming back for more.  It keeps us thinking that life is gonna start any second now if we could just find the right spot and get in on the action.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F004
chinese: 对不起，但对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: Well, I'm sorry, but it's still just fish to me.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？不要误会，但是你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something?  Don't take this wrong, but are you having your period?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F005
chinese: 该死的，奥吉，别问我那个。你问我那个我讨厌。你总是问我那个。这是侮辱。
english: God damn it, Augie, don't ask me that.  I hate it when you ask me that.  You always ask me that.  It's insulting.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M006
chinese: 好的，有什么困扰你的事情吗？
english: Well, what's bugging you?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F006
chinese: 我们只是对今晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: We just have different ideas of what this evening is supposed to look like.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没什么了不起的。我们来到这里，沙鲽到来，它们进行它们的小鱼事务，我们发出哦、啊的声音，看着鱼。它们回家了。我们回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  We come here, the grunion arrive, they do their little fish business, we go ooh, ah, look at the fish.  They go home. We go home.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F007
chinese: 天哪，我们不会去看grunions的。
english: For heaven sake, we're not going to see the grunions.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们从来不这样做，对吗？我的意思是，我们曾经这样做过吗？
english: We never do, do we?  I mean, have we ever?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次。这从来没有发生过。
english: We've missed them twice.  That's not ever.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F009
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候。那是永远的。
english: Twice is every time we've tried. That's ever.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M010
chinese: 好的，我们今年会见到他们。
english: Well, we'll see them this year.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F010
chinese: 不，我们不会这样做。这是没有意义的。这就像等待圣诞老人一样。
english: No, we won't.  It's pointless.  It's like waiting up to see Santa Claus.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F011
chinese: 我的意思是，我觉得我整个生活都会花在沙滩上，眼睛睁得大大的，双手紧紧地握在一起，期待着鱼儿的出现。但是鱼儿却没有出现。
english: I mean, I feel like my whole life is gonna be spent standing on the beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasped expectantly waiting for the fish to show up.  And the fish won't show up.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M011
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F012
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I'm saying.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M012
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No, of course not.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F013
chinese: 我确实想看它。我总是这样想。我一直觉得这次会不一样，但从来都不是。
english: I did want to see it.  I always do.  I keep thinking that this is gonna be the time and it never is.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M013
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，没有什么可受创伤的。
english: It's just fish.  Nothing to get traumatized about.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F014
chinese: 天哪，这不是关于鱼的事情。
english: For heaven sake, this isn't about fish.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M014
chinese: 好的。看，我一直在试图逆向思考，但似乎无法找出我们转向最糟糕的那个确切时刻。
english: All right.  Look, I've been trying to work this backwards, but I cannot seem to figure out the exact moment that we took a turn for the worst.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M015
chinese: 我的意思是，你在和玛吉通电话的时候还好。晚餐还可以。洗碗也没问题。让我想想。我洗了个澡。你看新闻。
english: I mean, you were-  you were fine during the phone call from Marge.  Dinner was okay.  Doing the dishes was no problem.  Let's see.  I took a shower.  You watched the news.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M016
chinese: 你说：“嘿，今晚有鲱鱼上岸。”我说：“太好了，我们去吧。我感觉很幸运。”
english: You said, "Hey the grunion are running tonight."  I said, "Great, let's go.  I feel lucky."

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M017
chinese: 好的，所以我穿上了外套，放出了动物，把车从车库里开出来--
english: Okay, so I'm putting on my jacket, putting out the animals, getting the car out of the garage--

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F015
chinese: 你还记得我们第一次来看它的时候吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。
english: Do you remember the first time we came to see it?  It was about four years ago, right after we got married.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F016
chinese: 我以为我怀孕了，你有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。你叫我跳舞，于是我们脱掉鞋子，你打开了瓶塞。
english: I thought I was pregnant, you had a bottle of champagne, but no glasses.  You asked me to dance, so we kicked off our shoes and you popped the cork.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F017
chinese: 当我们在跳舞时，你对我说了最温柔、最亲密的话，直接传到我的耳朵里，让我不仅能听到，还能感受到它们。
english: And while we were dancing, you said the softest, most intimate things to me right into my ear so that I could feel them as much as hear them.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F018
chinese: 我记得当时想着，就是这样了。你知道，终于——终于我像应该的那样快乐。
english: And I remember thinking, this is it.  You know, at last--at last I am as happy as I am supposed to be.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M018
chinese: 等一下。我明白了。
english: Wait a minute.  I've got it.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F019
chinese: 只是在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，喝着瓶装香槟。
english: Just dancing barefoot in the sand, drinking champagne out of the bottle.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M019
chinese: 它是在车里，对吗？开车经过Knickerbocker酒水柜台时，你说：“我们去买点香槟吧”，我说：“时间在浪费”或者类似的话，对吗？
english: It was in the car, right?  Driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, you said, "let's get some champagne," and I said, "time's a wasting" or something like that, right?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M020
chinese: 是的，当然，我现在明白了。你希望这次像那个时候一样，对吗？就是这样，对吗？
english: Yeah, of course, I see it now.  You want this to be like that other time, right?  That's it, right?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F020
chinese: 我宁愿不去记起一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I'd rather not remember some things.  I would rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M021
chinese: 好的，是的，当然，我现在明白了。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Okay, yeah, sure, I see it now.  Listen, you wanna dance?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F021
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M022
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: You want me to go get some champagne?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F022
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M023
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F023
chinese: 不。不。
english: No. No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M024
chinese: 好的，怎么了？你想让我在你耳边呼吸吗？
english: Well, what?  You want me to breathe in your ear?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F024
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M025
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？
english: You wanna get married again?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M026
chinese: 什么？什么？你想要离婚？
english: What?  What?  You want a divorce?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M027
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M028
chinese: 一块新地毯？一只贵宾犬？冰淇淋？背部按摩？自杀协议？什么？什么？卡拉，你到底想要什么？
english: A new carpet?  A poodle?  Ice cream?  Back rub?  A suicide pact?  What?  What?  Carla, what the hell do you want?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F028
chinese: 我希望事情能按照预期的方式发展。
english: I want something to turn out the way that it's supposed to.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M029
chinese: 嗯，欢迎加入人类的行列。当初我求婚的时候，你觉得这就是我心中所想的吗？四年后，我们会在海滩上互相大喊大叫，为了鱼而争吵？
english: Well, welcome to the human race.  Do you think this is what I had in mind when I proposed?  That four years down the road, we'd be at the beach yelling at each other over fish?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M030
chinese: 不。你以为我知道会有时候你会像看待一个用过的纸巾一样看着我吗？或者我会看着你想，天哪，下一班去阿拉斯加的飞机是什么时候？
english: No.  You think I knew that there'd be times when you'd look at me like a used Kleenex?  Or that I'd look at you and think, holy hell, when's the next flight to Alaska?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M031
chinese: 不，卡拉，我和你一样。我以为一切都会像桃子和玫瑰、脚趾上的沙子、头发中的风一样美好，鱼儿会一直来，账单会自己付，我们会有三个胖乎乎的可爱孩子，哈哈，宝贝，这个笑话是对我们的。
english: No, Carla, I'm just like you.  I thought it was gonna be all peaches and roses and sand in our toes and wind in our hair and the fish will always come and the bills will pay themselves and we'll have three fat rosy kids and ha, ha, baby, the joke's on us

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M032
chinese: 因为你知道你得到了什么，卡拉？你知道你得到了什么吗？就是这个。
english: 'cause you know what you get, Carla?  You know what you get?  This.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F029
chinese: 这个。什么？这是什么？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This.  What?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M033
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F030
chinese: 嗯，对的，这是站在海滩上。这是等待。这是战斗。
english: Uh, right this is standing on the beach.  This is waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M034
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F031
chinese: 嗯，这跟我想象的完全不一样。
english: Well.  This isn't anything like I thought anything would be like.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M035
chinese: 我知道，我也不。
english: I know, me neither.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F032
chinese: 我的意思是，这只是这样。它包含了很多和一切，但它不是其他的东西。你有任何想法我在试图说什么吗？
english: I mean, this is just this.  It includes a lot and everything, but it isn't something else.  Do you have any idea what I'm trying to say?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M036
chinese: 我正在尽力而为。
english: I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F033
chinese: 我知道的，奥吉。真的，我知道。
english: I know that, Augie.  Really, I do.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F034
chinese: 我知道你希望这是特别和美好的，有沙滩、月亮和一切，但我就是忍不住想着在别的地方。
english: I know that you meant this to be special and nice and the sand and the moon and all, but I just couldn't help thinking about being somewhere else.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M037
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起的话。
english: Maybe if you were with somebody else too.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F035
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M038
chinese: 不，我知道。但是还是。我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know.  But still.  I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F036
chinese: 哦，天哪，无论我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: Oh, for heaven sake, whatever I'm doing, I'd rather be doing it with you.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M039
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F037
chinese: 哦，别荒谬了。我的意思是，难道你不知道吗？
english: Oh, don't be ridiculous.  I mean, don't you know that?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F038
chinese: 你可能希望与其他人在一起。与那些你更愿意享受自己并不那么辛苦的人在一起。
english: You're the one who probably wishes you were with someone else.  Someone who--you'd rather enjoy yourself and didn't take everything so hard.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M040
chinese: 嗯，既然你提到了。不，我不这样认为。
english: Well, now that you mention it.  No, I don't.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F039
chinese: 好的。好吧。我们在错误的地方，但我们和正确的人在一起。
english: Okay.  Fine so.  We're in the wrong spot, but we're with the right person.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M041
chinese: 我不知道。对我来说，这个地方看起来相当不错。我的意思是，从这里你可以看到月亮的景色。
english: I don't know.  It seemed like a pretty good spot to me.  I mean, look at the view you have of the moon from here.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F040
chinese: 是的，我注意到了。看起来很漂亮，不是吗？大大的白色月亮。
english: Yeah, I noticed that.  Looks pretty, doesn't it?  Big ol' white moon.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M042
chinese: 嗯，看看我们这里有什么。
english: Well, look what we have here.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F041
chinese: 奥吉，你带来了点心。
english: Augie, you brought refreshments.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M043
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F042
chinese: 好的，那么我们就不需要眼镜了。
english: Well, then we don't need glasses.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M044
chinese: 你还冷吗？你想回家吗？
english: You still cold?  Do you wanna go home?

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F043
chinese: 不，我认为你可能是对的。也许这就是那个地方。
english: No.  I think you might be right.  Maybe this is the spot after all.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F044
chinese: 奥吉，对不起。
english: Augie, I'm sorry.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M045
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're very quiet the fish might come.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_F045
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses02F_script02_2_M046
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M000
chinese: 那么你认为怎么样？
english: So what do you think?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我刚才说的话。
english: What I was saying.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M002
chinese: 当然不是。稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: Certainly it's not. Slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这是公关活动。有人向你兜售了一个美妙的活动将在海滩上举行的虚假信息。
english: It's PR. Someone sold you a bill of goods that this wonderful event is going to take place on the beach.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M003
chinese: 嗯，我不是唯一一个看着所有这些人的人。
english: Well, I'm not the only one look at all these people.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F003
chinese: 是的，当然每个人都被卖了同样的故事。我的意思是，它让我们都兴奋不已，让我们不断回来寻找更多，让我们认为生活马上就要开始了，只要我们能参与其中并找到合适的位置。
english: Yea, sure everyone was sold the same story. I mean it keeps us all excited, keeps us coming back for more, keeps us thinking that life is going to start any second now if we can just get in on the action and find the right spot.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F004
chinese: 对不起，但对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: I'm sorry but it's still just fish to me.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？不要误会，但是你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something? Don't take this wrong but are you having your period?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F005
chinese: 该死的奥吉，别问我那个。当你问我那个时，我讨厌。你总是问我那个。这是侮辱。
english: Goddamn it Augie don't ask me that. I hate it when you ask me that. You always ask me that. It's insulting.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M006
chinese: 好的，有什么困扰你的事情吗？
english: Well, what's bugging you?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F006
chinese: 我们只是对今晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: We just have different ideas of what this evening is supposed to look like.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没有什么了不起的，我们来到这里，Grunion到达，然后进行他们的小鱼事务，我们说哦啊看，他们回家，我们回家。
english: There is nothing to it, we come here, the Grunion arrive, then do their little fish business, we go oh ah look, they go home, we go home.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F007
chinese: 天哪，我们不会去看格鲁尼翻身鱼。
english: For heavens sake we are not going to see the Grunions.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们从来不这样做，对吗？我的意思是我们曾经这样做过吗？
english: We never do, do we? I mean have we ever?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次；那是从来没有过的。
english: We've missed them twice; that's not ever.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F009
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候，那就是永远。
english: Twice is every time we've tried, that's ever.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M010
chinese: 好的，我们今年会见到他们。
english: Well, we'll see them this year.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F010
chinese: 不，我们不会的；这是没有意义的。这就像等待圣诞老人一样。
english: No we won't; it's pointless. It's like waiting up to see Santa Claus,

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F011
chinese: 我的意思是，我觉得我整个生活都将花在站在海滩上等待鱼儿出现，眼睛睁开，双手期待地合拢，但鱼儿却不会出现。
english: I mean I feel like my whole life is going to be spent standing on the beach waiting for the fish to show up with my eyes open and my hands clasped expectantly and the fish won't show up.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M011
chinese: 我以为你想看见它们。
english: I thought you wanted to see them.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F012
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I'm saying.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M012
chinese: 当然不是。
english: No of course not.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F013
chinese: 我确实想见到他们，我总是这样想。我的意思是我一直以为这次会是不同的，但从来都不是。
english: I did want to see them, I always do. I mean I keep thinking that this is going to be the time and it never is.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M013
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，我是说没有什么需要受到创伤的。
english: It's just fish, I mean nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F014
chinese: 天哪，这不是关于鱼的事情。
english: For heavens sake this isn't about fish.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M014
chinese: 好的。我一直在试图逆向思考，但似乎无法确定我们转向最糟糕的时刻。
english: All right. I've been trying to work this backwards but I cannot seem to pinpoint the moment that we took a turn for the worst.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M015
chinese: 你在和玛吉的电话中表现得很好，晚餐还可以，洗碗也没问题，让我想想，我洗了个澡，你看新闻，你说
english: You were fine during the phone call from Marge, dinner was okay, doing the dishes was no problem, let's see, I took a shower, you watched the news, you said

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M016
chinese: "Grunion今晚要来了，"我说道"太好了，我们去吧，我感觉很幸运，"
english: "the Grunion are running tonight," I said "great, let's go, I feel lucky,"

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M017
chinese: 好的，所以我正在穿上夹克，放出动物，把车开出车库。
english: okay so I'm getting on my jacket and putting out the animals, getting the car out of the garage-

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F015
chinese: 你还记得我们第一次来看它的时候吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。
english: Do you remember the first time we came to see it? It was about four years ago right after we got married.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F016
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了，我们打开了一瓶香槟，但没有杯子，你让我跳舞，我们踢掉了鞋子，你弹开了瓶塞。
english: We thought I was pregnant and we opened a bottle of champagne but no glasses, you asked me to dance, we kicked off our shoes and you popped the cork.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F017
chinese: 当我们在跳舞时，你对我说了最温柔、最亲密的话，直接传入我的耳朵，让我不仅能听到，还能感受到它们。
english: And when we were dancing you said the softest most intimate things to me right into my ears so I could feel them as much as hear them

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F018
chinese: 我记得当时想着，这就是了，你知道的。终于，终于我像我应该快乐一样。
english: and I remember thinking that this is it you know. At last, at last I am as happy as I am supposed to be

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M018
chinese: 等一下，我明白了。
english: Wait a minute I've got it

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F019
chinese: 只是在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，喝着瓶装香槟。
english: Just dancing barefoot in the sand, drinking champagne out of the bottle.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M019
chinese: 它是在车里，对吗？开车经过Knickerbocker酒水柜台时，你说，我们买点香槟，我说时间在浪费或者类似的话，对吗？
english: It was in the car, right? Driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker you said, let's get some champagne and I said times are wasting or something like that, right?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M020
chinese: 当然，我现在明白了；你希望这次像那个时候一样，对吗？就是这样，对吗？
english: Of course, I see it now; you want this to be like that other time, right? That's it, right?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F020
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I'd rather not remember some things. I would rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M021
chinese: 是的。好的，当然，不。我明白了。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Yea. Okay, sure, no. I see. Listen, you want to dance?

name: Ses02M_script02_2_F021
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses02M_script02_2_M022
chinese: 你想去买一些香槟吗？

english: I know ahh- yeah-, I'm definitely looking forward to it, and I mean they had a great football season last year

name: Ses02M_impro07_F015
chinese: 哦，完全完全的。
english: Oh, totally totally.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M017
chinese: 你知道我的意思，我打赌主场比赛就像疯狂一样，你知道的。
english: You know what I mean, I bet the home games, are just like nuts you know.

name: Ses02M_impro07_F016
chinese: 你可以成为其中的一部分。
english: you get to like be a part of that.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M018
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02M_impro07_M019
chinese: [笑声] 我知道。我的意思是-
english: [LAUGHTER] I know. I mean part of-

name: Ses02M_impro07_F018
chinese: [笑声] 就像- 就像- [笑声] 不过，我的意思是无论你走到哪里，人们都知道你是谁。
english: [LAUGHTER] like a- like a- [LAUGHTER] No, but I mean like everywhere you go people know who you are.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M020
chinese: 是的。对。一个邪教。我期待着加入邪教。
english: Yeah. Right. A cult. I'm looking forward to being in the cult.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M021
chinese: 没错，我知道，就像你一样，这不会伤害，我的意思是去年的全国冠军，哇，你知道的。
english: Right I know, like you, it won't hurt, I mean national champions last year, wow, you know

name: Ses02M_impro07_M022
chinese: 也许我们今年会再次做这件事。
english: Maybe we'll do it again this year.

name: Ses02M_impro07_F019
chinese: 你知道你要在那里做什么吗？

name: Ses02M_impro07_M023
chinese: 那是什么？啊，嗯，你知道，我在考虑，我倾向于像通讯这样的专业。
english: What's that? ahh Well, you know I'm I'm thinking um I'm leaning towards like communications

name: Ses02M_impro07_M024
chinese: 我-我不知道。有点宽泛，
english: I-I don't know. Kind of a broad,

name: Ses02M_impro07_F020
chinese: 好的。他们有很多好学校，对吗？
english: Okay. They have a lot of good schools, right?

name: Ses02M_impro07_M025
chinese: 是的，我的意思是有很多很多好东西，哦，是的，我的意思是这是一所非常好的学校；所以无论我选择什么，都不会错。我的意思是我只是...
english: yeah, I mean a lot-a lot  of good stuff oh, yeah, I mean it's- it's just a really good school; so really, whatever I pick I can't go wrong. I mean I'm just

name: Ses02M_impro07_M026
chinese: 我期待着到那里。我的意思是，天哪，校园很酷，你知道它就像是一个非常封闭的地方，我是说你知道它就像是一个大学校园，你知道的。
english: I'm looking forward to getting there. I mean, God, the campus is cool, you know it's like all just very confined I mean just you know it's a college campus you know it's like

name: Ses02M_impro07_F021
chinese: 是的，这是亲密的。
english: Yes, it's intimate.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M027
chinese: 这是大学-哦天啊，这是大学，[垃圾]所以就像疯了一样。
english: It's college- oh my God it's college, [GARBAGE] so it's like crazy.

name: Ses02M_impro07_F022
chinese: 我知道。太酷了。
english: I know. It's so cool.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M028
chinese: 哦，伙计。所以，我不知道你知道，我们会看看 - 看看情况如何，是的，我很期待。
english: Oh man. So, I don't know you know, we'll see - we'll see how it goes and, yeah, I'm looking forward to it

name: Ses02M_impro07_F023
chinese: 公平对待你，哇，哦天哪。
english: Fair for you, Wow, oh my Gosh.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M029
chinese: 我是说你必须 - 你必须给我指点迷津，因为我以前从未去过那里，所以我的意思是你已经熟悉那里的路了，哈哈哈。
english: I mean you got to - you got to show me the ropes 'cause I've never been there before so I mean you know your way around already and- [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro07_F024
chinese: 我会尽力而为。
english: I will do the best I can.

name: Ses02M_impro07_F025
chinese: 好的，有各种令人惊喜的秘密，所以你会非常喜欢它。真的很棒。我很高兴。
english: Well, there are all kinds of awesome secrets so you'll really enjoy it. It's really great. I'm so glad.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M030
chinese: 哦，好吧。
english: Oh, alright.

name: Ses02M_impro07_M031
chinese: 我-我期待着那个。[呼吸] 男人，是的，我想我会提前一点出来，所以我会给你打电话，我们肯定会-
english: I'm-I'm looking forward to that. [BREATHING] man, So yeah, I think I'm going to come out a little early so I mean I'll give you a call and we'll definitely-

name: Ses02M_impro07_F026
chinese: 耶
english: Yay

name: Ses02M_impro07_F027
chinese: 好的。是的，完全可以来访。
english: Okay. Yes, totally come visit

name: Ses02M_impro07_F028
chinese: 我们将探索，你会度过愉快的时光，你会很适应，这将会很棒。
english: and we'll explore and you going to have such a good time, you're going to fit in so well, it's going to be awesome

name: Ses02M_impro07_M032
chinese: [笑声] 谢谢，是的，谢谢，是的，那会很酷。
english: [LAUGHTER] Thanks, yes, thanks, yes That'll be cool.

name: Ses02M_impro07_F029
chinese: 恭喜。那太棒了。
english: So Congratulations. That's awesome.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F001
chinese: 嗯，除了弗雷达，没有人知道我们在这里，而且她也不会打电话。
english: Well, nobody know we're here except Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那一定是他们了。
english: Must be them, then.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们要做什么？
english: What're we gonna do?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M003
chinese: 亲爱的，我们都没事，不是吗？无论发生什么。
english: We're all right, darling, aren't we?  Whatever happens.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远，甜蜜。
english: Now and always, sweet.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的。
english: It was bound to come sooner or later.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好？你好？什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello?  Hello?  What?  Wrong number.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F005
chinese: 啊，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: Ah, it send shivers up my spine.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M006
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What do we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M007
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势？
english: With the most perfect poise?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F007
chinese: 哦，当然。我可能会做一个宫廷屈膝礼。
english: Oh, of course.  I shall probably do a court curtsy.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M008
chinese: 当一个人快乐时，那些本应非常重要的事情却一点也不重要。是吗？
english: Things that ought to matter dreadfully don't matter at all when one's happy.  Do they?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F008
chinese: 令人可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: What's so horrible is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M009
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，不要说那样的话。
english: Oh, darling, don't say that.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F009
chinese: 是真的。整个事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true.  The whole business is a very poor joke.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M010
chinese: 意思是那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱？
english: Meaning that sacred and beautiful thing, love?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的，就是这个意思。
english: Yes, meaning just that.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M011
chinese: 哦，这一切意味着什么？这是我在不断追求终极真理时问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: Oh, what does it all mean?  That's what I ask myself in my ceaseless quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God, what does it all mean?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm serious.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真。那只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious, my dear one.  That's just what they want.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M013
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。嘲笑他们。轻率一点。嘲笑一切。他们所有神圣的陈词滥调。
english: All those futile moralists that try to make life unbearable.  Laugh at them.  Be flippant.  Laugh at everything.  All their sacred shibboleths.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M014
chinese: 轻率的态度使他们那些虚伪的甜言蜜语变得刻薄。
english: Flippancy brings out the acid in their damn sweetness and light.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F013
chinese: 如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们自己。
english: If I laugh at everything, then I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M015
chinese: 当然，你必须。我们是好笑的人物，没错。
english: Certainly, you must.  We're figures of fun, alright.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F014
chinese: 这种荒谬而压倒一切的爱会持续多久呢？
english: Well how long will it last us, this ludicrous overbearing love of ours.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M016
chinese: 谁知道。
english: Who knows.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F015
chinese: 嗯，我们总是想要争吵和打架吗？
english: Well, shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M017
chinese: 不，那个欲望会消失。连同我们的激情一起。
english: No, that desire will fade.  Along with our passion.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，我们会喜欢那样吗？
english: Oh, dear, shall we like that?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M018
chinese: 取决于我们打得有多好。
english: Depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F017
chinese: 好的，如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？我的意思是，剩下的那个人还会笑吗？
english: Well, what happens if one of us dies?  I mean, does the one that's left still laugh?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M019
chinese: 是的。是的。全力以赴。
english: Yes.  Yes. With all his might.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F018
chinese: 那已经够严重了，不是吗？
english: That's serious enough, isn't it?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M020
chinese: 不，不是的。死亡是非常可笑的。这是一个非常狡猾的小谜团。全靠镜子完成的。
english: No. No, it isn't.  Death is very laughable.  Such a cunning little mystery.  All done with mirrors.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F019
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M021
chinese: 所以从长远来看，其他人也是这样。
english: So is everyone else in the long run.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M022
chinese: 让我们肤浅地可怜那些可怜的哲学家吧。让我们吹响我们的喇叭和吱吱声，尽可能地享受派对。就像相当愚蠢的、非常小的学童一样。让我们品味这一刻的快乐。
english: Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.  Let's blow our trumpets and squeakers and enjoy the party as much as we can.  Like quite idiotic, very small school children.  Let's savor the delight of the moment.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M023
chinese: 来吧，亲爱的，在你的身体腐烂之前，亲吻我，蠕虫会在你的眼眶里出入。
english: Come and kiss me, darling, before your body rots and worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F020
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliott, worms don't pop.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M024
chinese: 我不在乎你做什么。你可以把自己涂成绿色，在凡尔赛广场上裸舞，疯狂地和世界上所有的男人一起离开，我都不会说一句话。只要你最爱我。
english: I don't care what you do.  See, you could paint yourself green and dance naked in the Place Vendome and rush off madly with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word.  As long as you love me best.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F021
chinese: 哦，谢谢你，亲爱的。同样的规则也适用于你，除非我发现你盯着其他女人看，否则我会杀了你。
english: Oh, thank you, dear.  The same applies to you except that if I catch so much as looking at another woman, I'll kill you.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M025
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: You remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F022
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M026
chinese: 那次你在广场上买了那条小彩绘木蛇，并把它放在我的床上。
english: The one when you bought that little painted wooden snake in the Piazza and put it on my bed.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F023
chinese: 查尔斯。那是他的名字。查尔斯。他扭动得如此美丽。
english: Charles.  That was his name.  Charles.  He did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M027
chinese: 啊，可怕的事情。我讨厌它。
english: Ah, horrible thing.  I hated it.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F024
chinese: 是的，我知道你做了。你把它扔到了大运河里。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: Yes, I know you did.  You threw it out of the window into the Grand Canal.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M028
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F025
chinese: 它连续几天都是间歇性地进展。
english: It went in intermittently for days.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M029
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的新睡袍上。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your curling iron burnt a hole in my new dressing gown.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F026
chinese: 它也烧毁了我的梳子和浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: It burned my comb too and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M030
chinese: 那真是一个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F027
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M031
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F028
chinese: 经理走进来，发现我们在地板上打滚，像豹子一样咬来咬去，抓来抓去。
english: The manager came in and found us rolling around on the floor, biting and scratching like panthers.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M032
chinese: 哦，我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: Oh, I'll never forget his face.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F029
chinese: 这太荒谬了。完全荒谬。
english: It was ridiculous.  Completely ridiculous.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M033
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_F030
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses02F_script03_1_M034
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道唯一一个爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know who loves his parents.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道，它已经过时了，不是吗？
english: I know, it went out of style, didn't it?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F001
chinese: 没关系。这是一件好事。
english: It's all right.  It's a good thing.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F002
chinese: 你知道，这里很美，空气很清新。
english: You know, it's lovely here, the air is sweet.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了吗？
english: You're not sorry you came?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不，不抱歉。但是，嗯。但我不会留下来。
english: No, not sorry.  But, um. But I'm not gonna stay.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F004
chinese: 首先，你妈妈几乎告诉我要走。
english: For one thing, your mother as much as told me to go.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M003
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F005
chinese: 你看到了。我的意思是，然后，嗯，你有点儿，嗯--
english: You saw that.  I mean and then, well, you've been kind of, um--

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F006
chinese: 嗯，自从我来到这里以后有点尴尬。
english: Well, kind of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M005
chinese: 问题是，我计划在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你。但他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: The trouble is, I planned on sort of sneaking up on you on a period of a week or so.  But they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我知道他们会的，无论如何是你的母亲。
english: I knew they would, your mother anyway.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你怎么知道的？
english: How'd you know?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F008
chinese: 好吧，从她的角度来看，我还有什么其他理由来呢？
english: Well, from her point of view, why else would I come?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M007
chinese: 哦。你想要吗？我猜你知道，这就是为什么我请你来的原因。
english: Oh.  Would you want to?  I guess you know, this is why I asked you to come.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F009
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I guess this is why I came.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M008
chinese: 安，我爱你。我非常爱你。我爱你。
english: Ann, I love you.  I love you a great deal.  I love you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我没有想象力。这就是我能告诉你的全部。
english: I have no imagination.  That's all I know to tell you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我让你尴尬了，我不想在这里告诉你。我想去一个我们从未去过的地方。一个我们对彼此都是全新的地方。
english: I'm embarrassing you and I didn't want to tell it to you here.  I wanted some place we'd never been before.  A place where we'd be brand new to each other.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M011
chinese: 你在这里感觉不对劲，对吗？这个院子，这把椅子。我希望你为我做好准备。我不想从任何事物中赢得你的心。
english: You feel wrong here, don't you?  This yard, this chair.  I want you to be ready for me.  I don't want to have to win you away from anything.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F010
chinese: 哦，克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Oh, Chris, I've been ready for a long, long time.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M012
chinese: 他永远离开了。你确定吗？
english: And he's gone forever.  You're sure?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F011
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M013
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F012
chinese: 好的，你开始给我写信了。
english: Well, you started to write me

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M014
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F013
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M015
chinese: 安，为什么你不告诉我？
english: Ann, why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F014
chinese: 嗯，我一直在等你。我的意思是，直到那时你从未写过，当你写了之后，你说了什么？我的意思是，有时候你确实会含糊其辞，你知道吗？
english: Well, I was waiting for you.  I mean, till then you never wrote and when you did, what did you say?  I mean, you can sure be ambiguous sometimes, you know?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M016
chinese: 给我一个吻，安妮。给我一-
english: Give me a kiss, Anne.  Give me a-

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M017
chinese: 上帝啊，我吻了安妮。我等了多久，多久才能吻你。
english: God, I kissed Annie.  How long--how long I've been waiting to kiss you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F015
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。为什么你等了这么多年？我的意思是，我所做的只是坐着想知道我是否疯了，是否对你有所想念。
english: I'll never forgive you.  Why did you wait all these years?  I mean, all I did was sit and wonder if I was crazy for thinking of you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M018
chinese: 哦，安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Oh, Annie, we're gonna live now.  I'm gonna make you so happy.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F016
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M019
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F017
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。这是什么？
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.  What is it?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M020
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方。我想和你独处。
english: Let's drive someplace.  I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F018
chinese: 不。克里斯，是你妈妈吗？
english: No.  What is it, Chris. Your mother?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M021
chinese: 没有。没有那样的事情。
english: No.  Nothing like that.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F019
chinese: 嗯，怎么了？我的意思是，即使在你的信中也有一些...一些让人感到羞愧的东西。
english: Well, what's wrong?  I mean, even in your letters there was some--something ashamed.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M022
chinese: 是的，我想我一直都是。但是它正在离开我。
english: Yeah, I suppose I have been.  But it's going from me.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F020
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You've gotta tell me.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M023
chinese: 我不知道如何开始。
english: I don't know how to start.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F021
chinese: 这样做不会起作用。
english: It wouldn't work this way.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M024
chinese: 这一切都和很多其他事情混在一起。你还记得在海外，我负责一家公司吗？
english: It's all mixed up with so many other things.  You remember overseas, I was in charge of a company?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F022
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M025
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well, I lost them.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F023
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M026
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F024
chinese: 嘿。
english: gee.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M027
chinese: 一个人需要一些时间来摆脱这个问题。因为他们不仅仅是普通的男人。
english: It takes some time for a guy to toss that off.  'Cause they weren't just men.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M028
chinese: 例如，有一次，连续下了几天雨，有个孩子来找我，给了我他最后一双干袜子。我把它们放进口袋里。这只是一件小事，但这些就是我所认识的那种人。
english: For instance, this one time, it had been raining several days and this kid came to me and gave me his last pair of dry socks.  I put them in pocket.  It's only a little thing, but those are the kind of guys I had.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M029
chinese: 他们没有死，他们是为了彼此而自杀。我的意思就是这样。我的意思是，再自私一点，他们今天就还在这里了。
english: They didn't die, they killed themselves for each other.  I mean that exactly.  I mean, a little more selfish and they'd have been here today.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M030
chinese: 我得到这个想法是看着他们倒下的。一切都被摧毁了，你看，但似乎又有一件新事物被创造出来了。一种责任感。人对人。你知道我是什么意思吗？
english: I got this idea watching 'em go down.  Everything was being destroyed, see, but it seemed that one new thing was made.  A sort of responsibility.  Man for man. You know what I mean?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M031
chinese: 展示出来，再次带回地球上，就像某种纪念碑一样，每个人都能感受到它站在他身后，这对他来说会有所不同。
english: To show that, to bring that onto the Earth again, like some kind of monument and everyone can feel it standing behind him and it would make a difference to him.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M032
chinese: 然后我回来了，真是太不可思议了。这里没有任何意义。我的意思是，对他们来说，整件事就像是一场公交车事故。我又回到了和爸爸一起工作的那种竞争激烈的环境。
english: Then I came back and it was incredible.  There was no meaning in it here. I mean, the whole thing to them seemed like it's sort of a bus accident.  I went to work with Dad and that rat race again.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M033
chinese: 我感受到了你说的话，不知怎么地感到羞愧，因为没有人有任何改变。这似乎让很多人变成了傻瓜。我感到活着是错的，打开新的银行账本，开新车，看到新的冰箱。
english: And I felt what you said, ashamed somehow 'cause nobody had changed at all.  It seemed to make suckers out of a lot of guys.  I felt wrong to be alive to open the new bank book, drive the new car, see the new refrigerator.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M034
chinese: 我的意思是，你可以从战争中摆脱这些事情，但当你开着那辆车时，你必须意识到它源于一个人对另一个人的爱。因此，你必须变得更好一点。
english: I mean, you can take those things out of a war, but when you drive that car, you've gotta realize that it came out of the love a man can have for a man.  You've gotta be a little better because of it.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M035
chinese: 否则你所拥有的只是真正的战利品，上面沾满了鲜血。我不想拿走其中的任何东西。我想这也包括你。
english: Otherwise all you have is really loot and there's blood on it.  And I didn't want to take any of that.  And I guess that included you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F025
chinese: 你还有同样的感觉吗？
english: Do you still feel that way?

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now Annie.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F026
chinese: 因为你不应该有那种感觉。因为你有权拥有你所拥有的一切，克里斯。一切，你明白吗？我也是。
english: 'Cause you mustn't feel that way.  Because you have a right to everything you have, Chris.  Everything, you understand that?  Me too.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F027
chinese: 我的意思是，关于你的钱，没有任何问题。我的意思是，你的父亲让数百架飞机起飞。对此，一个人应该得到报酬。
english: I mean, and your money, there's- there's nothing wrong with your money.  I mean, your father put hundreds of planes in the air.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_M037
chinese: 我认识安妮。我会为你赚大钱。
english: I know Annie.  I'm gonna make a fortune for you.

name: Ses02M_script01_3_F028
chinese: 我该怎么处理一笔财富？
english: What'll I do with a fortune?

name: Ses02F_impro06_M000
chinese: 嘿，怎么了？
english: Hey, a what's up?

name: Ses02F_impro06_F000
chinese: 嗯，约翰尼昨天去世了。
english: Um, Johnny died yesterday.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M001
chinese: 哇，那太可怕了。
english: Wow, that's horrible.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M002
chinese: 很抱歉听到这个消息。
english: I'm sorry to hear about that.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F001
chinese: 我们知道它要来了，但是--
english: We knew that it was coming, but--

name: Ses02F_impro06_M003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F002
chinese: 似乎他多了一点时间。就像上周一样，他做得非常好。
english: It seemed like he had a little bit longer.  Like just last week, he was doing was so well.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M004
chinese: 我是说，你知道的，至少他现在不再痛苦了，对吧？
english: I mean, you know, at least he's not in anymore pain now, right?

name: Ses02F_impro06_F003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M005
chinese: 这很好，你知道的。你知道，它会伤害，我知道。我知道失去一个像那样的人是什么感觉。
english: It's good, you know.  you know It hurts I know.  I know what it's like to lose someone like that.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F004
chinese: 我只是不想他离开。
english: I just don't want him to be gone.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M006
chinese: 没关系。
english: It's okay.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M007
chinese: 因为，你知道，你们在一起度过的所有时光，你知道，这是一件好事，你可以回忆起来。
english: 'Cause, you know, you've got all the times that you guys did spend together, you know and that's something good that you can look back on.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M008
chinese: 我是说，我不知道。
english: I mean--I don't know.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F005
chinese: 他的整个家人都在那里。
english: And his whole family was there.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F006
chinese: 我是说，他一直到最后都非常清醒。你知道的。
english: I mean, he was like really conscious right up until the end. you know

name: Ses02F_impro06_M009
chinese: 嗯，那是好的，你知道的。至少，我不知道。我的意思是，这样走出去比较好，比起...
english: Well, that's that's good, you know.  At least, I don't know.  I mean it's- it's better to go- to goout that way than...

name: Ses02F_impro06_M010
chinese: 你知道的比我多，痛苦而且像这样逐渐的，这个可怕的过程。我的意思是--
english: .than you know, in pain and like this gradual, this horrible process.  I mean--

name: Ses02F_impro06_F007
chinese: 他当时还很年轻，你知道的。他曾经给我讲过的所有故事...
english: He was so young, you know.  And all the stories he used to tell me about...

name: Ses02F_impro06_F008
chinese: ...他想要生活的方式，他打算去非洲，他打算--
english: ...the way he wanted to live and he was gonna go to Africa and he was gonna--

name: Ses02F_impro06_M011
chinese: 但是看看他--他--看看他过去的生活。我的意思是，就他的年龄而言，他已经做了很多事情了，而且--
english: But look at the--he--look at the life he did get to lead.  I mean, for his age, he'd done so much and--

name: Ses02F_impro06_F009
chinese: 没有人会忘记他。
english: Nobody's ever gonna forget him.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M012
chinese: 是的，完全正确。他对很多人产生了很大的影响。
english: Yeah, exactly.  He's made a big impact on a lot of people. and

name: Ses02F_impro06_M013
chinese: 而且你会一直拥有那个，并且你应该为他感到高兴，因为他在去年发现之前做了这么多事情，甚至在那之后也是如此。我的意思是--
english: And you'll always have that and--you should feel, you know, happy for him that he got to do so much before--I mean, and even after he found out last year.  I mean--

name: Ses02F_impro06_F010
chinese: 他做了很多事情。但是--
english: He did a lot.  But--

name: Ses02F_impro06_M014
chinese: 我知道。这不能让他回来，但是--
english: I know.  It doesn't bring him back, but--

name: Ses02F_impro06_M015
chinese: 但没关系，因为现在，你知道，你会继续过你的生活，然后--
english: But It's okay because now, you know, you'll just go on with your life and--

name: Ses02F_impro06_F011
chinese: 我会忘记他。
english: I'm gonna forget him.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M016
chinese: 不，你永远不会忘记他。
english: No, you'll never forget him.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F012
chinese: 我将无法听到他的声音或他的--
english: I won't be able to hear his voice or his--

name: Ses02F_impro06_M017
chinese: 我知道。但是你不会，我的意思是你不会忘记他。痛苦最终会消失，或者会减轻。
english: I know. but you're not  I mean you're not going to forget him.  The pain will go away eventually and--or it will subside--

name: Ses02F_impro06_F013
chinese: 你会在一段时间后开始变得像那个形象一样失去。
english: You start to lose like that image after a while.

name: Ses02F_impro06_M018
chinese: 那样会更好。我的意思是时间会告诉我们的。你知道，时间可以治愈一切，这是好的。没关系，我是说，这不是任何人的错或类似的事情。
english: That will be, It'll be--it'll be better that way. I mean Time will tell.  Time heals, you know, and it's good.  It's okay.  I mean, it wasn't anybody's fault or anything like that so .

name: Ses02F_impro06_M019
chinese: 这样失去一个人很难，但他现在过得更好了。
english: It's hard to lose someone that way, but he's he's better--he's better off now.

name: Ses02F_impro06_F014
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F000
chinese: 嗨。对不起。嗯，我想提交这份申请来注册。
english: Hi. Excuse me.  Um, I'd like to put in this application for my registration.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M000
chinese: 嗨。
english: Hi.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M001
chinese: 好的。让我看看。嗯，我们需要-我们需要您的原始出生证明。
english: Okay.  Let me see here.  Um, we need--we need your original birth certificate.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F001
chinese: 我的-我的原始出生证明？但是我不随身携带那个。
english: My--my original birth certificate?  But I don't carry that with me.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M002
chinese: 好的。嗯。我们仍然需要它。
english: Right.  Well.  We still need it.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F002
chinese: 好的，我有驾驶执照，这可以吗？
english: Well, I have my driver's license, does that work?

name: Ses02F_impro01_M003
chinese: 没有，没有，嗯，没有人告诉你需要你的原始出生证明。
english: No. no  Uh, no one told you that you needed your original birth certificate.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F003
chinese: 不，表格上没有写这个。
english: No it doesn't say it on the form.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F004
chinese: 我的意思是它只是说你需要某种形式的身份证明，但它没有说是什么类型的身份证明。
english: I mean it just says that you need some form of identification, but it doesn't say what kind of identification.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F005
chinese: 我是说如果我知道的话，我会带来它的。
english: I mean if I had known--I would have brought it.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M004
chinese: 对不起。
english: um Sorry.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M005
