chinese: 好的。嗯，很抱歉，但是我——我不能帮助你。你需要回去然后...
english: Okay.  Um, I'm sorry but I--I can't help you.  You're gonna have to go back and uh...

name: Ses02F_impro01_F006
chinese: 看，我已经在队伍中等了很长时间了。我的意思是，你也看到了队伍有多长。
english: Look, I've been waiting in line for a really long time.  I mean, you've seen how long it is.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F007
chinese: 现在是午餐时间。
english: It's lunch hour.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M006
chinese: 没错。这是车辆管理局。
english: Right.  It's the D.M.V..

name: Ses02F_impro01_M007
chinese: 我知道，这会变得很长，但是如果没有你的——你有社会保障卡吗，也许？
english: I know, it gets long, but I can't do anything without your--do you have Social Security card, maybe?

name: Ses02F_impro01_F008
chinese: 嗯，不是的。我的意思是，我不随身携带我的原始文件，因为如果那些东西被毁坏了，那你知道的，如果我丢了钱包之类的东西，我就再也找不回它们了。
english: Well, no.  I mean, I don't carry my original documents with me because if those things get destroyed, then what do you, you know what I mean, like if I loose my wallet or something, I'll never have them again.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F009
chinese: 我有我的护照和驾驶执照。这就是我所有的了。
english: I have my passport and I have my driver's license. And that's all I have.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M008
chinese: 好的，我不知道该告诉你什么。
english: Alright, I don't know what to tell you right.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M009
chinese: 我觉得你只需要去拿他们，然后你可以回来，然后我们会帮助你。也许，我们可以-
english: I think you're just gonna--you're gonna have to get 'em and then you can back and then, we'll help you out.  Maybe, we can-

name: Ses02F_impro01_F010
chinese: 但是，难道你真的什么都不能做吗？这一次你不能例外吗？我的照片都在这两个身份证上。你不是不知道那是我吗？
english: But, isn't there anything you can do.  Can't you make an exception this one time?  My picture is on both of those identifications.  It's not like you don't know that it's me.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M010
chinese: 我不能。
english: I can't.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F011
chinese: 我可以给你我的社交信息
english: And I can give you my social--

name: Ses02F_impro01_M011
chinese: 我对你做出了例外，我也必须对每个人都做出例外。我的意思是，我以前见过这种情况，我知道这很令人沮丧，但我无能为力。你只能-
english: I make an exception for you and I have to make an exception for everyone.  I mean, I-I've seen this before and I know it's frustrating, but there's nothing I can do. You just have to-

name: Ses02F_impro01_F012
chinese: 好的，我可以给你我的社会安全号码。
english: Well, I can give you my Social Security Number.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M012
chinese: 不，它是--
english: No, it's--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F013
chinese: 我可以告诉你我出生的地方、时间、由谁和哪一天。
english: And I can tell you where I was born and what time and by who and what day.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M013
chinese: 好的。但是我怎么知道，那对我来说不是证明。我怎么知道，你知道，那真的是你。我需要...
english: Okay.  But how do I--that's- that's not proof to me.  How do I know that, you know, that it's really you.  I need--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F014
chinese: 我不能去了 - 我必须回去工作。我没有时间回家拿那些东西，然后再排队等待另外四十五分钟。
english: I can't go--I have to go back to work.  I don't have time to go back to my house and get all of that stuff and then get back in line and wait for another forty five minutes.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M014
chinese: 嗯，周末不那么忙。也许你可以嗯，试着早点过来-
english: Well, the weekends are not as busy.  Maybe you can uh, come and try to get here early--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F015
chinese: 嗯，我有孩子。周末我必须带他们去各个地方。我没有时间回到这里。拜托了。我真的需要你帮助我。
english: Um, I have kids.  I have to take them places on the weekends.  I don't have time to come back here.  Please.  I really need you to help me.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M015
chinese: 我不能。我无能为力。对不起。
english: I can't.  There's nothing I can do.  I'm sorry.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F016
chinese: 好的。[呼吸] 我只是...我只是不行。对不起，我站在这里很抱歉，但我不能离开。我-
english: Well.  [BREATHING] I just--I just don't.  I-I'm sorry that I'm standing here-- But I can't leave. I-

name: Ses02F_impro01_M016
chinese: 这条线--
english: The line--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F017
chinese: 我真的需要今天完成这个任务。正如你所看到的，截止日期已经快到了，我不能回来。
english: I really need this done today.  As you can see, the deadline is almost up and I can't come back.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M017
chinese: 好的，但是你现在站在这里让更多的人排队等候。
english: Ok, but you're right now you're holding up more people in line by standing here-- and letting

name: Ses02F_impro01_F018
chinese: 嗯，那为什么车管局没有在申请表上注明需要出生证明呢？
english: Well, why didn't the D.M.V. put that you needed your birth certificate on the application then?

name: Ses02F_impro01_M018
chinese: 当你去车管所时，通常需要相当专业的身份证明。
english: I--when you're going to the D.M.V., you usually need pretty professional identification--

name: Ses02F_impro01_M019
chinese: 你知道，官方文档--
english: You know, Official documentation--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F019
chinese: 是的，但你的出生证明——我的意思是，谁会随身携带自己的出生证明呢？没有人会这样做。
english: Yeah, but your birth certificate--I mean, who carries around their birth certificate?  Nobody does that.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M020
chinese: 不，但是你来了- 你来到了D.M.V.，这是一件事情- 你应该- 你应该想明白-
english: No, but you come--you come to the D.M.V., it's something-- You should've- You should've figured--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F020
chinese: 带上你的驾驶执照和护照，就像其他人一样。
english: With your driver's license and your passport.  Just like everybody else.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M021
chinese: 但是，如果没有你的驱动力，没有你的驾驶执照，你的身份怎么办？我的意思是，在那之前你需要什么吗？
english: But, without your drive--where-where- what about your identification without your driver's license?  I mean, you need--you needed something before then?

name: Ses02F_impro01_F021
chinese: 你为什么总是使用你的驾驶执照。我的意思是，如果你还不满十六岁，你就不会来到车管所，而那时你才能拿到驾驶执照，所以你永远都不会需要它。
english: Who--you always use your driver's license.  I mean, you're not coming to the D.M.V. if you're not over sixteen and that's when you get your driver's license so you're never gonna need it anyway.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M022
chinese: 好的。嗯，你知道，我很愿意帮助你，但是——我无能为力。
english: All right.  Well, um, you know, I'd love to help you, but--nothing I can do.

name: Ses02F_impro01_M023
chinese: 所以，如果你想去拿你的出生证明，嗯，也许可以回来-我不知道-也许你可以和排队前面的人交谈。我不知道。
english: So, if you wanna go get your birth certificate, um, maybe come back--I don't--maybe you can talk to the person in the--in the front of line maybe.  I don't know.

name: Ses02F_impro01_F022
chinese: 你有主管吗？
english: Do you have a supervisor?

name: Ses02F_impro01_M024
chinese: 我是主管。所以--
english: I am the supervisor.  So--

name: Ses02F_impro01_F023
chinese: 好的，非常感谢。你非常有帮助。
english: Well, thank you very much.  You've been very helpful.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M000
chinese: 嗯，那么，最近怎么样？我的意思是，你有什么需求或者其他事情吗？
english: So, uh, so how's it been going?  I mean, you have any needs or anything?

name: Ses02F_impro04_F000
chinese: 我每次得到的线索最后都变成了死胡同。你知道我的意思。人们已经厌倦了我打电话给他们。
english: I'm--every lead that I get ends up just being a dead end.  You know what I mean.  People are sick of me calling--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M001
chinese: 不。你不能那样想。我的意思是，这是好的 - 很好你在打电话，你知道的。你不能这样。
english: No.  You can't think that way.  I mean it's good--it's good that you're--that you're calling, you know. you can't

name: Ses02F_impro04_F001
chinese: 是的，但是这个回答一遍又一遍都是一样的。就像--
english: Yeah, but it--I mean it's the same response you get over and over again.  Like--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F002
chinese: 哦，我们目前不招聘，谢谢，我们已经有您的信息了 - 当我们准备好时会给您打电话。
english: Oh, we're not hiring at this time or thank you, we already have your information on file--We'll call you when we're ready.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M002
chinese: 是的 - 我知道你的意思。我也经历过类似的事情，但是 -
english: Yeah--I know what you mean.  I've gone through like similar stuff, but--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F003
chinese: 但是，已经过了这么长时间，就好像——我还不如去麦当劳找份工作。就像，我不——
english: But, it's been so long, like--I mine as well just take a job at McDonald's.  Like, I don't--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M003
chinese: 不，来吧。不要【垃圾】。
english: No, come on.  Don't [GARBAGE]

name: Ses02F_impro04_F004
chinese: 我只是...我再也做不下去了。就像，它会把你的精力耗尽...
english: I just--I can't do it anymore.  Like, it just takes it out of you--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M004
chinese: 我知道。我知道。这很难，但你必须继续前进。我的意思是，你已经坚持这么长时间了，你知道。肯定会有好事发生的。我知道会有的，因为你是一个好员工--
english: I know.  I know. It's hard, but you just--you gotta keep going.  I mean, you've been going at it for so long, you know.  Something is definitely going to come up.  I-I know it will, because you're a good worker--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F005
chinese: 我只是不断地被拒绝。我只是一次又一次地被拒绝，再一次又一次地被拒绝，这让你开始觉得自己一定有什么问题，无法找到工作。
english: I just keep getting rejected.  I just keep getting rejected over and over and over again and it starts to make you feel like there must be something wrong with you that you can't get a job.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M005
chinese: 不。我的意思是，它是竞争性的，你知道的。那就是它。你必须要有竞争力。
english: No.  It's--I mean, it's competitive, you know.  That's-That's what it is.  that's what you gotta be is competitive.

name: Ses02F_impro04_F006
chinese: 是的，但也许只是因为竞争激烈，就像可能是因为我不够好。也许水平在这里，而我在这里，根本没有办法做到那样的事情。
english: Yeah, but maybe--if just because it's competitive, like maybe I'm just not good enough.  Maybe the level is here and I'm here and there's just no way I'm ever gonna do that--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M006
chinese: 那里...那里有很多人拥有...拥有像是好工作的人，你知道的，这样的人很多...
english: There...There are plenty of people out there with--with like, good jobs, you know, that are a lot...

name: Ses02F_impro04_M007
chinese: ...比你笨。我的意思是，他们比你糟糕得多。你比那些人好得多。我知道。
english: ...dumber than you.  I mean they're a lot worse off than you.  You are much better off than like a lot of those people in there. I know

name: Ses02F_impro04_F007
chinese: 我没有像那些人一样的起点，你知道的，像是已经在这个行业里的家庭成员之类的，你知道的，可以帮助我一把的那种。
english: I didn't have like one of those starts, you know, like a family member who was already in the business or something you know that could like give me a helping hand.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M008
chinese: 我知道。这让事情变得更难。我的意思是，在很多情况下，确实是靠你认识的人，但是--
english: I know.  It makes it harder.  I mean it's definitely who you know in a lot of cases, but--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F008
chinese: 这真是太令人沮丧了。就像，我只是——我只是不想再做了。你知道吗？我只是不想每天都拿着我的简历四处奔波。你知道，就像——
english: It's just so frustrating.  Like, I just--I just don't wanna do it anymore.  You know?  I just don't wanna like hit the pavement every single day with my resumes and going out there all the time.  You know, it's just like--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M009
chinese: 但是你必须这样做。否则，你还有其他选择吗？
english: But you gotta.  Otherwise, what is--what's your other option?

name: Ses02F_impro04_F009
chinese: 我感觉自己一无是处。
english: I feel so worthless.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M010
chinese: 这并不是毫无价值的，因为它肯定会有回报。我知道的，我是说，我可以...我只是...我见过你的工作态度。你知道，你是一个好的工作者，而且...
english: It's not worthless 'cause it's definitely gonna--it's definitely gonna pay off.  I know it.  I mean, I can--I've just--I've seen your work etiquette.  You know, you're a good worker and...

name: Ses02F_impro04_M011
chinese: ...而且没有理由说，那样的事情不会很快发生。好吗？所以你只需要...
english: ... and there's no reason that--that something won't come up like really soon.  All right?  So you just gotta--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F010
chinese: 你为什么这么说？似乎没有任何迹象表明情况会好转。
english: And what would make you say that?  There doesn't seem to be any indicators that anything's going to get better.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M012
chinese: 因为我了解你。你知道，也许一旦你认识更多的人，和他们交谈之后，他们也会了解你，并且意识到他们应该在三年前就雇佣你。你知道吗？但是，他们最终会改变主意并相信我——这样——你必须——
english: Because I know you.  You know, and maybe once you get to know some more people, like talking to them and everything, they'll get to know you too and they'll realize they should've hired you three years ago.  You know? but  And- and they'll finally come around and believe me--it'll--you gotta-

name: Ses02F_impro04_F011
chinese: 这真的很难。我感觉他们开始对我产生了个人偏见。你知道我是什么意思吗？就好像突然间他们开始只对你说不，而不是因为他们不接受申请或者不雇佣人，只是对你个人有某种特殊的讨厌理由。你知道吗？
english: It's just really hard.  I feel like their starting to get like a personal prejudice against me.  You know what I mean?  Like it's like suddenly it starts to feel like it's just you that they say no to and it's not that they're not taking applications and it's not that they're not hiring people, it's just you particularly they have some particular reason for just hating you.  You know?

name: Ses02F_impro04_M013
chinese: 也许是的，但也许你会达到一个点，就像你烦扰他们一样，然后他们就不想再听到你的消息了，但你继续烦扰他们，不停地烦扰他们，然后他们会被你搞得很烦，最后会说好吧，你知道的。
english: Well maybe yeah, but maybe you get to that point where it's like you bug 'em and then they just don't wanna hear from you anymore, but you keep bugging them and bugging them and then it's gonna annoy them so much that they're gonna be like all right fine. you know

name: Ses02F_impro04_F012
chinese: 或者他们将永远不再和我说话。
english: Or they'll never talk to me again.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M014
chinese: 嗯，好吧，不。好的。你-[垃圾]
english: Or, well, no.  Okay. you -[GARBAGE]

name: Ses02F_impro04_F013
chinese: 我-我只是觉得也许我应该尝试其他事情。我的意思是，我-我不知道。在成长的过程中，这是我唯一想做的事情，但我却做不到。显然我在身体上无法做到。我的意思是-
english: I-I just I think maybe I should try something else.  I mean, I-I don't know.  All growing up this is the only thing that I ever wanted to do and yet I can't.  I'm not physically able apparently.  I mean--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M015
chinese: 那显然是不真实的。我的意思是，你以前做过这样的事情。你以前做过所有这样的工作，你知道的，而且你得到了人们的赞美，说你很棒，你知道的。
english: That obviously that's not true though.  I mean, you've done this before.  You've done all the work like this before, you know, and and you've gotten people saying oh, you're so good and like you know--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F014
chinese: 我猜钱对我来说不应该重要，但是——不知怎么的，它确实重要。你知道吗？不是因为钱才做这件事，但是
english: I guess the money shouldn't matter to me, but--Somehow it does.  You know? It's not like I do it for the money, but

name: Ses02F_impro04_M016
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M017
chinese: 好吧，你必须活下去。
english: Well, you've gotta live.

name: Ses02F_impro04_F015
chinese: 你必须——我的意思是，如果你被某人雇佣，那么你不是专业人士，而是业余爱好者，这意味着你不够好。
english: you have to--I mean, if you're hired by somebody, then you're not a professional, you're an amateur and that means that you're not good enough.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M018
chinese: 我的意思是，就是，真的，我不知道，是关于他们的观点，是关于，我不知道，只是让自己走出去和...
english: I mean, it's just, it's really--I don't know, yeah, it's about their opinions and it's about, I don't know, just getting yourself out there and--

name: Ses02F_impro04_F016
chinese: 我只想钻进一个洞里，你知道的。就像这让你早上甚至不想睁开眼睛一样。
english: I just wanna crawl in a hole, you know.  Like it just makes you not wanna even open your eyes in the morning.

name: Ses02F_impro04_M019
chinese: 好吧，来吧，来吧。这样想肯定也不会有帮助。
english: Well, come on, come on.  Thinking about it like this is definitely not gonna help either though.

name: Ses02F_impro04_F017
chinese: 我不知道如何摆脱它。我不知道如何挖出自己。这是我一直在挖掘的同一个坑。我不能--
english: I don't know how to get out of it.  I don't know how to dig myself out of it.  It's the same hole that I've been digging and digging and digging.  I can't--

name: Ses02F_impro04_M020
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事会困扰你？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F001
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了。为什么突然这样？
english: She's been in New York for three and half years.  Why all of a sudden?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，也许他只是想再次见到她。
english: Well, maybe he just wanted to see her again.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？他一生都住在那个女孩的隔壁。为什么他不想再见她呢？
english: What do you mean?  He lived next door to the girl all his life.  Why wouldn't he want to see her again?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M003
chinese: 不要那样看着我。他对我说的和对你说的一样少。
english: Don't look at me like that.  He didn't tell me anymore than he told you.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F003
chinese: 她不是-
english: She's not-

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M004
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking of it?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F004
chinese: 他不会娶她。
english: -he's not gonna marry her.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F005
chinese: 它具有一切。
english: It's got that all about it.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M005
chinese: 好的，那又怎样？
english: Well, so what?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F006
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here, Joe?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M006
chinese: 现在，听着，凯特。
english: Now, listen Kate.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F007
chinese: 她不是他的女孩，乔。她知道她不是。
english: She's not his girl, Joe.  She knows she's not.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F008
chinese: 那么为什么她还是单身呢？我的意思是，纽约到处都是男人。为什么她还没有结婚呢？可能有一百个人告诉她她疯了，但她一直在等待。
english: Well then why is she still single?  I mean, New York is full of men.  Why isn't she married?  Probably a hundred people told her she's crazy, but she's waited.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M008
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she's waited?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F009
chinese: 她知道我知道的，这就是为什么。她像一块岩石一样忠诚。在我最糟糕的时刻，我想到她在等待，我再次知道我是正确的。
english: She knows what I know, that's why.  She's faithful as a rock.  In my worst moments I think of her waiting and I know again that I'm right.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M009
chinese: 看，今天天气很好。我们为什么要争论呢？
english: Look, it's a nice day.  What are we arguing for?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F010
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢夺走她的信仰，乔？陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares take her faith away, Joe?  Strangers might, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M010
chinese: 好的，你希望我对此做些什么？
english: Well, what do you want me to do about it?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F011
chinese: 我希望你们表现得好像他会回来一样。你们两个都要。你们以为我没注意到她来了以后的变化吗？我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I want you to act like he's coming back.  Both of you.  Don't you think I haven't noticed since she got here.  I won't stand for any nonsense.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M011
chinese: 但是凯特--
english: But Kate--

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F012
chinese: 因为如果他不回来，我会自杀。我是说，笑话我吧，但是...
english: Because if he's not coming back, I'll kill myself.  I mean, laugh--laugh at me, but...

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F013
chinese: 但是为什么那天晚上她来到这里就发生了这件事呢？她睡在他的房间里，他的纪念品碎成了碎片。快看。看看它。
english: But why did that happen the very night she came here?  She sleeps in his room and his memorial breaks to pieces.  Just look.  Look at it.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M012
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F014
chinese: 和我一起相信，乔。我不能独自忍受。
english: Believe with me, Joe.  I can't stand all alone.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F015
chinese: 上周，一个男人出现在底特律，失踪的时间比拉里还要长。我的意思是，你自己看。
english: Last week, a man turned up in Detroit missing longer than Larry.  I mean, you read it yourself.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M014
chinese: 好的。好的。冷静一点。
english: All right.  All right.  Calm yourself.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F016
chinese: 你，最重要的是要相信。
english: You, above all, have to believe.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M015
chinese: 什么？-为什么-为什么是我中的所有人？
english: What?- Why- Why me above all?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F017
chinese: 只是，只是不要停止相信。
english: Just--just don't stop believing.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M016
chinese: 这是什么意思？我最重要吗？
english: What does that mean?  Me above all?

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M017
chinese: 看看你。看看你在颤抖。
english: Look at you.  Look at you shaking.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_F018
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses02F_script01_2_M018
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide?  What the hell is the matter with you Kate?

name: Ses02M_impro02_F000
chinese: 我不想让你走。
english: I don't want you to go.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M000
chinese: 我知道，我知道。宝贝，我也不想走。我爱你，你知道。我会非常想念你的。
english: I know, I know. I don't want to go either baby. I love you know. And I'm going to miss you a lot.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F001
chinese: 我也会想你的；没有你在这里，我不知道该怎么办。这里将会变得非常孤独和困难。
english: I'm going to miss you too; I don't know what I'm going to do here without you. It's going to be so lonely, and so hard.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F002
chinese: 我不想成为单身妈妈。
english: I don't want to be a single mom.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M001
chinese: 你不会的。我会回来的；在你意识到之前我会回来的。好的，然后。
english: You won't be. I'll be back; I'll be back before you know it. All right, and

name: Ses02M_impro02_F003
chinese: 但是
english: but

name: Ses02M_impro02_M002
chinese: 和
english: and

name: Ses02M_impro02_F004
chinese: 这很危险；我的意思是你怎么能确保你会
english: It's dangerous; I mean how can you make sure that you'll

name: Ses02M_impro02_M003
chinese: 这里任何地方都很危险，亲爱的。我的意思是，我只是要去，然后我们就结束了。
english: It's- It's dangerous anywhere, honey. I mean this is -this- I'm just going to go and we'll get it over with,

name: Ses02M_impro02_M004
chinese: 我会回来的，我们会有一些好处，你知道的，从服役中获得，然后我们会过上幸福的生活，然后我们，就像我们三个人一样。
english: I'll come back we'll have, you know, some good benefits from being in the service and then we'll live - we'll live a happy life, then the rest of us, like the three of us.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F005
chinese: 我希望如此。
english: I hope so.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M005
chinese: 一个小家庭。
english: A little family.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F006
chinese: 我希望如此。
english: I hope so.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M006
chinese: 你得
english: You gotta

name: Ses02M_impro02_F007
chinese: 这将会非常艰难。
english: It's going to be really rough.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M007
chinese: 你得替我照顾好我们的宝宝，好吗？
english: You gotta take care of our baby for me, alright?

name: Ses02M_impro02_F008
chinese: 我会给你发送很多照片。
english: I'll send you lots of pictures.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M008
chinese: 我希望如此，因为如果没有那一切，我将无法生存。我不知道我该怎么办。
english: I hope so, because I'm not going to be able to survive without all that. I don't know what I'm going to do.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M009
chinese: 我从未离开过你，更不用说一年了，甚至两个星期都没有。
english: I've never been - I've never been away from you for two weeks let alone a year.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F009
chinese: 好的，请保证你会安全。
english: Well, just promise me that you going to be safe.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F010
chinese: 我的意思是，他们不能把你安排在厨房工作或者其他你不会受到伤害的地方吗？
english: I mean can't they put you in like, you know kitchen work or something where you won't get

name: Ses02M_impro02_M010
chinese: 不，它不是那样工作的。
english: No, it doesn't work that way

name: Ses02M_impro02_M011
chinese: 但是，我的意思是，我会尽我所能，尽快回到这里。
english: but, I mean, I'm going to do whatever I can and get back here as fast as I can.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F011
chinese: 这毫无意义；我不知道为什么我们首先要打仗。
english: It doesn't make any sense; I don't know why we have to be at war in the first place.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M012
chinese: 我知道，但这不是我们的决定，我猜你知道，我的意思是
english: I know, but it's not our decision, I guess, you know, I mean

name: Ses02M_impro02_M013
chinese: 有人认为这是正确的事情要做，所以现在我们必须-我们必须为我们的国家做我们必须做的事情。
english: there's people that thought it was the right thing to do so now we have to- we have to do what we have to do for our country

name: Ses02M_impro02_M014
chinese: 并且它会解决的，你知道的，去那里做那个。是的，我会回来的。
english: and it'll work out you know, go there and do that. Yeah, I'll be back

name: Ses02M_impro02_F012
chinese: 你会给我写信吗，纸质的信？
english: Will you write me letters, paper ones?

name: Ses02M_impro02_M015
chinese: 是的，当然。我不知道我们是否会有电脑或类似的东西，所以那时可能只有这个选择了。
english: Yeah, of course. I don't know if we'll have computers or anything like that you know, so probably my only option then.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M016
chinese: 是的，我会每天给你写信，因为你是我心中唯一的事物。
english: Yeah, I'll write you every day 'cause you're the only thing that's going to be on my mind.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F013
chinese: 我们的宝宝需要一个爸爸；你不能离开。好吗，你不能消失。
english: Our baby needs a dad; you can't leave. Okay, you can't disappear.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M017
chinese: 我们的宝宝有一个爸爸，没错。爸爸很快就会回来。
english: Our baby has a dad, alright. Daddy is going to be back soon.

name: Ses02M_impro02_M018
chinese: 我希望你能拍很多视频和照片，这样我回来或者在那里的时候就能看到你。我会想念你的。
english: I want you to, you know, take lots of video; pictures and I can see you when I get back or while I'm there. I'm going to miss you.

name: Ses02M_impro02_F014
chinese: 我也会想你的。
english: I'll miss you too.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M000
chinese: 哦，你永远不会相信的。
english: Oh, you're never going to believe it.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F000
chinese: 什么？什么？你看起来真的很开心，发生了什么事？
english: What? What? You look really happy what's going on?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M001
chinese: 好的，我终于做到了。
english: Well, I finally did it

name: Ses02M_impro03_F001
chinese: 最后做了什么？
english: Finally did what?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M002
chinese: 我-我向她求婚。
english: I-I asked her to marry me.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F002
chinese: 你做了吗？哦，天哪，我为你感到非常骄傲。
english: You did? Oh, my Gosh, I'm so proud of you.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M003
chinese: 是的，我知道。【笑声】
english: Yes, I know. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro03_F003
chinese: 哦，我的天啊。嗯，然后呢？
english: Oh, my Gosh. Well, and did

name: Ses02M_impro03_M004
chinese: 我好紧张，你知道吗，我-
english: I'm so nervous you know, I'm-

name: Ses02M_impro03_F004
chinese: 她说是的吗？
english: Did she say yes?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M005
chinese: 是的，她说是的。【笑声】我知道。
english: Yes, she said yes. [LAUGHTER] I know

name: Ses02M_impro03_F005
chinese: 那就像是最明确的。
english: That's like the most definitive.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M006
chinese: 我知道，嗯-我简直不敢相信。就像-
english: I know Uhm- I can't believe it.  It's like-

name: Ses02M_impro03_F006
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，等等，你什么时候决定做这个的，我的意思是，
english: Oh, my gosh, wait so when did you decide to do this, I mean,

name: Ses02M_impro03_F007
chinese: 我本以为你会告诉我你打算这样做。
english: I would have thought you would have told me that you were planning on doing this.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M007
chinese: 嗯，是的，我想让大家都感到惊喜，所以我猜这样做是为了给大家一个惊喜。
english: Well, yes, I wanted it you know I guess sort of as a surprise for everyone so

name: Ses02M_impro03_F008
chinese: 是的，我猜是这样。哦，我的天。她吃惊了吗？
english: Yea, I guess so. Oh, my Gosh. Was she surprised?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M008
chinese: 是的，是的。你知道，她 - 她就像 - 我是说，她很开心，你知道。
english: Yes, yes. You know, she - she was like - I mean, she was happy, you know

name: Ses02M_impro03_F009
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M009
chinese: 我 - 我觉得是时候了，我不知道，也许吧。你知道吗，现在已经过了很长时间了。
english: I - I think it was about time, I don't know, maybe. You know what, it's been it's been long enough now.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F010
chinese: 那么你做了什么？
english: So what did you do?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M010
chinese: 哦，嗯，这是-你知道的，我们在这个音乐会上，是的。
english: Oh, well, it was -- you know, we were at this- at this concert and yeah

name: Ses02M_impro03_M011
chinese: 所以，我在之前和一些机组人员交谈了一下，然后-
english: so I-I talked to some of the crew before hand and-

name: Ses02M_impro03_F011
chinese: 哦，你没有。
english: Oh, You did not.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M012
chinese: 我-我做了。
english: I-I did.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F012
chinese: 哦，我的天。那太可爱了。
english: Oh, my Gosh. that's so cute

name: Ses02M_impro03_M013
chinese: 所以我让乐队做了一些事情，你知道，在歌曲的最后我得上台，然后，嗯
english: So I got the band to do something, you know, like towards the end of the song I got to go up on stage and, uh

name: Ses02M_impro03_F013
chinese: 那太浪漫了。哦，天哪。她一定是死了。这就像是你写进杂志里的那种事情，关于我男朋友做了这件事。哦，我的上帝。
english: That's so romantic. Oh, my Gosh. She must have died. That's like one of those things you write into a magazine about like my boyfriend did this. Oh my God.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M014
chinese: 我知道，所以
english: I know, so

name: Ses02M_impro03_M015
chinese: 我得吓唬她。
english: I got to freak her out.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M016
chinese: 不，是的 - 所以
english: No, yes -- so

name: Ses02M_impro03_F014
chinese: 她一定疯了。
english: She must have flipped out.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M017
chinese: 是的，这样她就确保她不能说不。
english: Yea, that way she was guaranteed that she could not say no.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F015
chinese: 对的，完全是因为你不能在成千上万的人面前说不。【笑声】
english: Right exactly because you can't say no in front of thousands of people. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro03_M018
chinese: 不，但是它很好。
english: No, but it was good.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F016
chinese: 你也把她带上台了吗？
english: Did you bring her up on stage too?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。【笑声】
english: Yes, yes. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro03_F017
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，那太可爱了。
english: Oh, my Gosh, that's so cute.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M020
chinese: 我知道那是的，我不知道我真的很紧张，但我真的很高兴。
english: I know it was, I don't know I was really nervous but I'm really - I'm really glad.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F018
chinese: 你的父母是兴奋的还是...？
english: Are your parents excited or...?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M021
chinese: 哦是的，他们-他们你知道他们爱她，所以我的意思是...
english: Oh yes, they - they you know they love her and so I mean...

name: Ses02M_impro03_F019
chinese: 是的，完全正确。那么什么时候会发生？
english: Yea, totally. So when is it going to happen?

name: Ses02M_impro03_M022
chinese: 嗯，我们在考虑，嗯 - 我们在考虑冬天，你知道，我们打算在冬天进行，然后也许，你知道，也许。
english: Well, we're thinking uh - we're thinking winter time, you know, we're going to do it in the winter and then maybe, you know, maybe

name: Ses02M_impro03_M023
chinese: 我也不知道是选择在雪地里度蜜月还是飞到澳大利亚南半球，[垃圾信息]所以我们会根据那个来决定。
english: I don't know either do a honeymoon like in the snow or fly down to like Australia, Southern Hemisphere, [GARBAGE] so we'll decide with that.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F020
chinese: 哦，那将会很有趣。
english: Ooh, that would be fun.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F021
chinese: 你们觉得你们会买房子或者其他什么东西，就像你们在寻找购买某个地方一样吗？
english: Do you think you'll get a house or something, like you guys are looking to buy some place or

name: Ses02M_impro03_M024
chinese: 是的，是的，我还不太确定在哪里，我猜你知道，我得先弄清楚一些事情。
english: Yea, yea, I'm not too sure where yet I guess you know, I kind of got to figure some stuff out here first

name: Ses02M_impro03_F022
chinese: 是的。【笑声】
english: Yeah. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro03_M025
chinese: 但是你知道，现在我们只是很兴奋，因为我们将继续一起进行下去。
english: but like you know it's just - I guess we're just excited right now that we'll get to continue it together.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F023
chinese: 哦天哪。我简直不敢相信你要结婚了，太酷了。
english: Oh my Gosh. I cannot believe you're getting married, that is so cool.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M026
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F024
chinese: 哇，这让我感到浪漫，就像我真的希望这种事情发生在我身上一样。【笑声】
english: Golly, it just makes me all like romantic inside, like I really want that to happen to me. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02M_impro03_M027
chinese: 哦，显然你知道它会发生。但我知道这是一件事情 - 我不知道，你从来没有真正考虑过它会发生，就像事先一样。
english: Oh, it will, obviously you know. But I know it's something - I don't know, you never really think about it happening, like before hand.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F025
chinese: 你有一个好的戒指吗？你最好有一个好的戒指。
english: Did you have a good ring? You better have had a good ring.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M028
chinese: 当然。哦，是的。
english: Sure. Oh, yes.

name: Ses02M_impro03_F026
chinese: 好的。这个戒指使得一切都不同。
english: Good. The ring makes all the difference.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M029
chinese: 你知道，我让我妈妈一起来，可能帮我一点忙，因为她有很好的品味。但是
english: You know I had my mom come along maybe help me out a little bit because she's got good taste. but

name: Ses02M_impro03_F027
chinese: 哦，那太棒了。
english: Oh, that's awesome.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M030
chinese: 是的，嗯，谢谢，谢谢。谢谢你。是的。
english: Yes, well, Thanks, thanks. Thank you. yeah

name: Ses02M_impro03_F028
chinese: 太好了，恭喜你，太酷了。[呼吸] 我等不及了。
english: Yay, well congratulations, that's so cool. [BREATHING] I can't wait.

name: Ses02M_impro03_M031
chinese: 哈哈。
english: Hah.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道唯一一个爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know who loves his parents.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道，它已经过时了，不是吗？
english: I know, it went out of style, didn't it?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F001
chinese: 没关系。这是一件好事。
english: It's all right.  It's a good thing.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F002
chinese: 你知道，这里很美，空气很清新。
english: You know, it's lovely here, the air is sweet.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了吗？
english: You're not sorry you came?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不，不抱歉。嗯，但是，我-我不会留下来。
english: No, not sorry.  Um, but, I'm- I'm not gonna stay.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F004
chinese: 嗯，首先，你妈妈几乎告诉我要走。
english: Well, for one thing, your mother as much as told me to go.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M003
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F005
chinese: 你看到了。我的意思是，然后，嗯，你有点儿，嗯--
english: You saw that.  I mean and then, well, you've been kind of, um--

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F006
chinese: 嗯，自从我来到这里以后有点尴尬。
english: Well, kind of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M005
chinese: 问题是，我计划在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你。但是，他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: The trouble is, I planned on sort of sneaking up on you over a period of a week or so.  But, they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我知道他们会的，无论如何是你的母亲。
english: I knew they would, your mother anyway.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F008
chinese: 好的，
english: Well,

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F009
chinese: 从她的角度来看，我还有什么其他原因会来呢？
english: from her point of view, why else would I come?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M006
chinese: 哦。你想要吗？我猜你知道，这就是为什么我请你来的原因。
english: Oh.  Would you want to?  I guess you know, this is why I asked you to come.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F010
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I--I guess this is why I came.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M007
chinese: 安妮，我爱你。我非常爱你。我爱你。
english: Anne, I love you.  I love you a great deal.  I love you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M008
chinese: 我没有想象力。这就是我能告诉你的全部。
english: I have no imagination.  That's all I know to tell you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我让你尴尬了，我不想在这里告诉你。我想去一个我们从未去过的地方。一个我们对彼此都是全新的地方。
english: I'm embarrassing you and I didn't want to tell it to you here.  I wanted some place we'd never been before.  A place where we'd be brand new to each other.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M010
chinese: 你感觉这里不对，对吗？这个院子，这把椅子。我希望你为我做好准备。我不想从任何事物中赢得你。
english: You feel it's wrong here, don't you?  This yard, this chair.  I want you to be ready for me.  I don't want to have to win you away from anything.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F011
chinese: 哦，克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Oh, Chris, I've been ready for a long, long time.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M011
chinese: 他永远离开了。你确定吗？
english: And he's gone forever.  You're sure?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F012
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M012
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F013
chinese: 你开始给我写信，然后--
english: You started to write me and--

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M013
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F014
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M014
chinese: 安妮，为什么你不告诉我？
english: Anne, why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F015
chinese: 嗯，我一直在等你。我的意思是，直到那时你从未写过，当你写了之后，我的意思是，你说了什么？有时候你确实会含糊其辞。
english: Well, I was waiting for you.  I mean, till then you never wrote and when you did, I mean, what did you say?  You can sure be ambiguous sometimes.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M015
chinese: 给我一个吻，安妮。给我一-
english: Give me a kiss, Anne.  Give me a-

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M016
chinese: 哦，上帝，我吻了你。我吻了安妮。我等了多久-我等了多久才能吻你。
english: oh God, I kissed you.  I kissed Annie.  How long--how long I've been waiting to kiss you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F016
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。为什么你等了这么多年？我所做的只是坐着想着你，不知道自己是否疯了。
english: I will never forgive you.  Why did you wait all these years?  All I did was sit and wonder if I was crazy for thinking of you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M017
chinese: 哦，安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Oh, Annie, we're gonna live now.  I'm gonna make you so happy.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F017
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M018
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F018
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。这是什么？
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.  What is it?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M019
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方。我想和你独处。
english: Let's drive someplace.  I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F019
chinese: 不，这是什么，你妈妈吗？
english: No.  What is it, your mother?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M020
chinese: 没有。没有那样的事情。
english: No.  Nothing like that.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F020
chinese: 那么，出了什么问题？我的意思是，即使在你的信中也有一些...一些让人感到羞愧的东西。
english: Then, what's wrong?  I mean, even in your letters there was some--something ashamed.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M021
chinese: 是的，我想我一直都是。但是它正在离开我。
english: Yeah, I suppose I have been.  But it's going from me.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F021
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You've gotta tell me.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M022
chinese: 我不知道如何开始。
english: I don't know how to start.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F022
chinese: 这样做不会起作用。
english: It wouldn't work this way.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M023
chinese: 这一切都和很多其他事情混在一起。你还记得在海外时，我指挥着一个公司吗？
english: It's all mixed up with so many other things.  You remember overseas, I was in command of a company?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F023
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M024
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well, I lost them.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F024
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M025
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F025
chinese: 哦，天哪。
english: Oh, gee.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M026
chinese: 一个人需要一些时间来摆脱这个问题。因为他们不仅仅是普通的男人。
english: It takes some time for a guy to toss that off.  'Cause they weren't just men.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M027
chinese: 例如，有一次，连续下了几天雨，有个孩子来找我，给了我他最后一双干袜子。我把它们放进口袋里。这只是一件小事，但这就是我所交往的那种人。
english: For instance, one time, it had been raining several days and this kid came to me and gave me his last pair of dry socks.  I put them in pocket.  It's only a little thing, but that's the kind of guys I had.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M028
chinese: 他们没有死，他们是为了彼此而自杀。我的意思就是这样。再自私一点，他们今天就还在这里了。
english: They didn't die, they killed themselves for each other.  I mean that exactly.  A little more selfish and they'd have been here today.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M029
chinese: 我得到这个想法是看着他们倒下的。一切都被摧毁了，你看，但似乎有一件新事物正在被创造。一种责任感。人对人。
english: I got this idea watching them go down.  Everything was being destroyed, see, but it seemed that there was one new thing being made.  A sort of responsibility.  Man for man.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M030
chinese: 你知道我是什么意思吗？为了展示那个，为了再次将它带到地球上，就像某种纪念碑一样，每个人都会感受到它站在他身后，并且它会对他产生影响。
english: You know what I mean?  To show that, to bring that onto the Earth again, like some kind of monument and everyone would feel it standing behind him and it would make a difference to him.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M031
chinese: 然后我回来了，真是太不可思议了。这里没有任何意义。对他们来说，整件事就像是一场公交车事故。我又回到了和爸爸一起工作的那种竞争激烈的环境中。
english: Then I came back and it was incredible.  There was no meaning in it here.  The whole thing to them seemed like sort of a bus accident.  I went to work with Dad and that rat race again.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M032
chinese: 我感受到了你说的话，不知怎么地感到羞愧，因为没有人有任何改变。这似乎让很多人变成了傻瓜。我感到活着是错的，打开新的银行账本，开新车，看到新的冰箱。
english: And I felt what you said, ashamed somehow 'cause nobody was changed at all.  It seemed to make suckers out of a lot of guys.  I felt wrong to be alive to open the new bank book, drive the new car, see the new refrigerator.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M033
chinese: 我的意思是，你可以从战争中摆脱这些事情，但当你开着那辆车时，你必须知道它源于一个人对另一个人的爱。因此，你必须变得更好一点。
english: I mean, you can take those things out of a war, but when you drive that car, you've gotta know that it came out of the love a man can have for a man.  You've gotta be a little better because of it.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M034
chinese: 因为否则你所拥有的只是掠夺品，上面还有鲜血。我不想拿走其中的任何东西。我想这也包括你。
english: Because otherwise all you have is really loot and there's blood on it.  And I didn't want to take any of it.  And I guess that included you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你还是那样感觉吗？
english: You still feel that way?

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M035
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now Annie.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F027
chinese: 因为你不应该有那种感觉。因为你有权拥有你所拥有的一切。你明白吗？一切，克里斯，还有我。
english: 'Cause you mustn't feel that way.  Because you have a right to everything that you have.  Do you understand that?  Everything, Chris, and me too.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F028
chinese: 我的意思是，你的钱没有问题。我的意思是，你的父亲让数百架飞机起飞。这是应该得到报酬的。
english: I mean, and your money, there's nothing wrong with your money.  I mean, your father put hundreds of planes in the air.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我认识安妮。安妮，我会为你赚大钱的。
english: I know Annie.  Annie, I'm gonna make a fortune for you.

name: Ses02F_script01_3_F029
chinese: 我该怎么处理一笔财富？
english: What'll I do with a fortune?

name: Ses02F_impro05_F000
chinese: 嗨，嗯，打扰一下，我相信航空公司丢失了我的行李。
english: Hi, um, excuse me, I believe that the airline lost my baggage.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M000
chinese: 嗯，好的，它没有-没有出现在行李转盘上-
english: Um, okay, it didn't--didn't come out on the carrousel--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F001
chinese: 不，它没有。嗯，它没有出现，我也没有在这附近看到它，那你能对此做些什么吗？
english: No, it didn't. um It didn't come out and I don't see it anywhere around here, so what can you do about that?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M001
chinese: 好的。嗯，很遗憾，是的，有一些问题出现了--
english: Okay.  Um, well, unfortunately yeah there was a some- some problems with the--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F002
chinese: 一些问题？那是什么意思？
english: Some problems?  What is that supposed to mean?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M002
chinese: 嗯，嗯，一些袋子在运送过来的途中丢失了。嗯-
english: Uh, well some-some of the bags were--were lost on the way over here. uh-

name: Ses02F_impro05_F003
chinese: 你怎么会丢了一个行李箱？一个巨大的行李箱？
english: How do you lose a suitcase?  A huge suitcase?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M003
chinese: 你知道的，我的意思是，飞机下面发生了很多事情，有时候，你知道的，那种事情就会发生。
english: You know, I mean, there's a lot of things that go on under the plane and sometimes, you know, that kind of things happen.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M004
chinese: 嗯，但是我们愿意为您的包和包内物品进行赔偿--
english: Uh, But, we are willing to reimburse you for the bag and and for the contents--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F004
chinese: 多少钱？
english: How much?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M005
chinese: 嗯，我们愿意给你五十美元来...
english: Um, we'd be willing to give you uh fifty dollars for--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F005
chinese: 五十美元？给我的行李箱？我的意思是，仅仅行李箱本身就价值一百五十美元，但是里面的所有东西，我的衣服，我的个人物品，还有情感价值，更不用说，这比所有这些加在一起还要多。
english: Fifty dollars?  For my suitcase?  I mean, the suitcase itself was like a hundred and fifty dollar just for the suitcase, but all the things inside, all my clothes, all my personal belongings, the sentimental value, not to mention, which is more-more than all of that together.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M006
chinese: 没错。嗯，我们意识到，你知道，这是一个糟糕的情况，但是很抱歉，我们真的无能为力。
english: Right.  Uh We realize, you know, that that it's a bad situation, but I'm sorry, there's nothing that we can really do.

name: Ses02F_impro05_F006
chinese: 这就是你要做的全部吗？只是给我五十美元然后说去度假，不带任何你的东西？
english: That's all, that's all, that's all you're going to do is just give me fifty dollars and say go have fun on your vacation without any of your stuff?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M007
chinese: 我想，嗯，如果你愿意的话，你可以提出索赔并将其提交给我们的总部。
english: I think, um, maybe you can file a claim if you want and turn it in to our main office--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F007
chinese: 是的，是的，我想要提出索赔，但是你们会怎么做 - 我是说，它会不会神奇地突然出现？
english: Yes, yes, I would like to file a claim, but what are you gonna--I mean, is it just gonna show up magically out of nowhere?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M008
chinese: 对。不。我的意思是，如果你能更多地争取这个案子，也许他们会给你更多的报销，但是，现在--
english: Right.  No.  I mean they- they might--they might--if you-if you are argue the case more, maybe they'll reimburse you more, but, right now--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F008
chinese: 我需要我的东西。就是说，我需要我的东西。我的意思是，嗯...
english: I need my stuff.  It's--I need my stuff.  I mean, uh...

name: Ses02F_impro05_F009
chinese: 你从来没有丢过行李吗？我的意思是你难道没有其他事情要做吗？
english: Haven't you ever lost baggage?  I mean isn't there anything else you do?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M009
chinese: 是的，我知道。我知道。这真让人沮丧。不过，不幸的是——嗯。
english: Yes, I know. I know-. It's It's frustrating.  Unfortunately though-- um

name: Ses02F_impro05_F010
chinese: 因为你似乎不太在乎，你知道的。
english: Because you don't seem to care very much, you know.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M010
chinese: 通过检查您的行李，您承认了存在风险的责任。
english: By checking your bags, you--you, you know- admit to the liability that's- that's at risk--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F011
chinese: 我没有签任何东西。
english: I didn't sign anything.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M011
chinese: 好的，嗯，通过托运行李，您同意，您知道，在自愿的情况下--
english: Right, well, by checking in your bags, you agreed to, you know, at the will of the--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F012
chinese: 我不同意。[垃圾]我付钱给航空公司来照顾我的事情。当你付钱购买某物时，应该有某种保证它会实现。
english: I didn't agree.  [GARBAGE] I paid the airline to take care of things for me.  When you pay for something, there should be some sort of guarantee that it's gonna come through.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M012
chinese: 你支付了航班费用，然后你的行李被托运了——这是航空公司为我们提供的服务。所以，真的，这真的是冒了风险，很抱歉，但我们真的没有其他办法了。那么，你想要报销吗？
english: You paid for the flight and then your bags were checked at--it's a service that the airline provides for us.  So so, really, it's really the risk was taken and, I'm sorry, but there's really nothing else we can do.  So do you want--do you want the reimbursement?

name: Ses02F_impro05_F013
chinese: [呼吸] 嗯，当然，是的，我猜我会去买晚餐，然后在我整个假期的剩下时间里什么都没有。我应该在这里待三个星期。没有任何东西，我该怎么度过三个星期呢？
english: [BREATHING] Well, sure, yeah, I guess I'll go buy dinner and then be--have nothing for the rest of my entire vacation.  I'm supposed to be here for three weeks.  What am I gonna do without anything for three weeks?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M013
chinese: 嗯，在机场里有一些商店。
english: Well, there are-there are some shops here in- in the airport--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F014
chinese: 但是五十美元不足以让我得到任何东西。
english: But fifty dollars isn't going to get me anything.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M014
chinese: 不，嗯，就像我说的，你可以提出索赔，可能会得到更多的报销 - 你
english: No, um, like I said you can file a claim and, uh, maybe get reimbursed for more-- you

name: Ses02F_impro05_F015
chinese: 难道你没有其他可以做的事情吗？
english: Isn't there anything else you can do?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M015
chinese: 可能甚至会谈话--
english: probably even talk to--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F016
chinese: 我的意思是，有人可以打电话吗？或者是那个把东西放在飞机上的人。我的意思是，他们一定非常不负责任，竟然让我的行李消失了。我的意思是，它被偷了吗？
english: I mean, is there somebody you can call?  Or the guy that put the stuff on the--on the plane.  I mean, are they--they must be really irresponsible to have just disappeared my baggage.  I mean, did it get stolen?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M016
chinese: 没错，那个-那个会被处理-那个会被处理。我们会进行调查，确保他们不会自行处理这些事情，所以-嗯。
english: Right, that--that gets taken care of-- That gets taken care of.  We get we do, you know, we investigate those and just make sure that um- they're not doing their own thing with them so--uh

name: Ses02F_impro05_F017
chinese: 是的，我确定你--你就像，嗯，你带行李吗？不。哦，好的，谢谢。太好了。我的意思是怎么样--
english: Yeah, I'm sure you -- You're like, hmm, do you take baggage?  No.  Oh, okay, thanks.  Great.  I mean how--

name: Ses02F_impro05_M017
chinese: 但不幸的是，有时候是--
english: but Unfortunately sometimes is--

name: Ses02F_impro05_M018
chinese: 好吧，那就是我在说的意思。
english: Well, that's--that's what I'm saying--

name: Ses02F_impro05_F018
chinese: 这里需要更好的安全措施。
english: There needs to be better security here.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M019
chinese: 好的。如果你愿意的话，这可以是你在索赔或投诉表上填写的内容。在你在这里的时候，请提供给我们你的信息，然后，如果找到了，我们会立即发送给你。
english: Okay.  Well that that could be something that you put on on the claim--on on the complaint form if you want.  And provide us with your information while you're here and then, maybe, if it turns up, then we'll send it right over.

name: Ses02F_impro05_F019
chinese: 听起来好像没什么大不了的，无所谓。但对我来说是很重要的事情。
english: It sounds like it's such a little like oh well no big deal whatever.  It's a big deal to me.

name: Ses02F_impro05_M020
chinese: 好的，小姐，我知道。我意识到这一点。但是就像我说的，有几个人处于你同样的情况，所以，嗯，这并不是完全不常见的，我实际上要求你移开，这样我才能帮助下一个人。
english: All right, Miss, I-I know.  I realize this. But Like I said, there are several people that are in your same situation, so, um, it's not--it's not totally uncommon and I'm actually gonna have to ask you to move so I can help the next person.

name: Ses02F_impro05_F020
chinese: 好的，我至少可以拿回我的五十美元吗？请？
english: Well, can I at least have my fifty dollars, please?

name: Ses02F_impro05_M021
chinese: 是的，好的。给你，现在你可以向左边提出索赔了-他们会帮助你的。
english: Yes, all right.  There you go, now you can file a claim over to the left--And they'll help you out.

name: Ses02F_impro05_F021
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses02F_impro05_F022
chinese: 非常感谢你。
english: Thank you very much.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他会说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he gonna say?  Maybe we ought to tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的，他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up, he was still in bed.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约在今天早上四点左右。我听到它发出裂开的声音，然后醒来并向外看。当它裂开时，他就站在这里。
english: About four this morning.  I heard it cracking and I woke up and looked out. He was standing right here when it cracked.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。当它裂开时，他跑回屋里，在厨房里哭了。
english: I don't know.  When it cracked, he ran back in the house and cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不。我认为最好还是让他一个人待着。
english: No.  I thought it was best to leave him alone.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以透过房间的地板听到他。
english: I could hear him right through the floor of my room.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他在那个时候在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at that hour?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他又在梦见他。他在夜晚四处走动。
english: He's dreaming about him again.  He's walking around at night.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F008
chinese: 他变得就像死后一样。那是什么意思？
english: He's getting just like after he died.  What is the meaning of that?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道它的意思。但是，妈妈，我知道一件事，我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it.  But, I know one thing Mom, we made a terrible mistake with Dad.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F009
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。我的意思是，这种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  I mean, that sort of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What you mean dishonest?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们要让他继续认为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back and I know it.  Why do we allow him to go on thinking that we believe with him?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你想要和他争论什么？
english: What do you want to do argue with him?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M010
chinese: 不，我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到没人再相信拉里还活着了。
english: No, I don't want to argue with him, but it's about time he realized that nobody believes Larry's alive anymore?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他并在夜晚等待他？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直接说我们不再有任何希望？我们多年来一直没有希望吗？
english: Why shouldn't he dream of him and walk the nights waiting for him?  Do we contradict him?  Do we say straight out that we don't have any hope anymore?  That we haven't had hope for years now?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来。
english: We've got to say it to him.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F013
chinese: 你能证明吗？你如何证明呢？
english: Can you prove it?  How can you prove it?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M013
chinese: 天哪，已经过去三年了。三年后没人会回来的。这太疯狂了。
english: For God sakes, it's been three years.  Nobody comes back after three years.  It's insane.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F014
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是这样，但对他来说不是。我的意思是，你可以说得滔滔不绝，但他——没有尸体，也没有坟墓，那你在哪里呢？
english: To you it is and to me, but not to him.  I mean, you can talk yourself blue in the face, but he--there's no body and no grave so where are you?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M014
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, Mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F015
chinese: 麻烦就是这该死的报纸。每个月左右就会有一个男孩突然出现，所以，你知道，下一个就是拉里。
english: Trouble is the God damn newspapers.  Every month or so a boy turns up out of nowhere so, you know, the next one is gonna be Larry.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的。好的。听我说。你知道我为什么把安妮带到这里吗？
english: All right.  All right.  Listen to me.  You know why I brought Annie here don't you?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F016
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F017
chinese: 我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: I've got an idea, but what's the story?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M017
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm gonna ask her to marry me.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well, that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M018
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not only my business.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F019
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你已经足够大了，应该知道自己的想法。
english: What do you want me to do?  You're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M019
chinese: 那么，那就没问题了吗？
english: So it's all right then?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M020
chinese: 我会继续下去吗？
english: I'll go ahead with it?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好的，你想确保你的父亲不会去做什么-
english: Well, you want to make sure that your father isn't going to--

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M021
chinese: 好吧，那么这不仅仅是我的事情--
english: Well, then it isn't just my business--

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F021
chinese: 我只是在说--
english: I'm just saying that--

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M022
chinese: 啊，有时候你真让我生气。你知道吗？我的意思是，如果我告诉爸爸，他会翻脸发飙，这也关你的事吧？我的意思是，你真是擅长忽视事情。
english: Ah, sometimes you infuriate me.  You know that?  I mean, isn't it your business too if I tell Dad and flips--freaks out about it?  I mean, you have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F022
chinese: 我忽略我必须忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I gotta ignore.  The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F023
chinese: 从你父亲的角度来看，他并没有死。而且你没有权利夺走他的女孩。
english: From your father's point of view, he isn't dead.  And you've no right to take his girl.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F024
chinese: 然后，如果你知道要去哪里，你可以继续前进，但我不知道要去哪里。你看，我不知道。现在我能为你做些什么？
english: And you can go on from there if you know where to go, but I don't know where to go.  See, I don't know.  Now what can I do for you?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我伸手去拿我想要的东西，我都不得不退缩，因为其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的生活。一次又一次。
english: I don't know why, but, every time I reach out for something that I want, I have to pull back 'cause someone else will suffer.  My whole bloody life.  Time after time after time.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There's nothing wrong with that.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F026
chinese: [呼吸] 你问过安妮了吗？
english: [BREATHING] Have you asked Annie yet?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F027
chinese: 嗯，你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和你父亲有相同的感觉。
english: Well, how do you know she'll marry you?  Maybe she feels the same way your father does.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好的，如果她真的这样做了，那就是结束了。但从她的信中，我觉得她已经忘记了他。我会弄清楚的。然后我们会和爸爸好好谈谈，对吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: Well, if she does, then that's the end of it.  But from her letters, I think she's forgotten him.  I'll find out.  And then we'll thrash it out with Dad, right?  Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F028
chinese: 问题是，你没有看到足够多的女性。
english: Trouble is, you don't see enough women.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F029
chinese: 你从来没有做过。
english: You never did.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M028
chinese: 所以呢，我对女人不太擅长。
english: So what, I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F030
chinese: 我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M029
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F031
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。我的意思是，你已经离开了——参战。已经过去五年了。
english: Well, that's a good answer, but it doesn't answer anything.  I mean, you've been away for--at war.  It's been five years.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M030
chinese: 我无能为力。我最了解她。我的意思是，我是在她旁边长大的。
english: I can't help it.  I know her best.  I mean, I grew up next door to her.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M031
chinese: 这些年来，每当我想到妻子，我就会想起安妮。你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: These years when I think of a wife, I think of Annie.  What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F032
chinese: 我不想要一个图表。嗯，克里斯，他认为他会回来。你娶了那个女孩，就等于宣布他死了。
english: I don't want a diagram.  Umm-- He thinks he's coming back, Chris.  You marry that girl and you're pronouncing him dead.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F033
chinese: 我是说，你父亲会发生什么事？你知道吗？我不知道。
english: I mean, what's gonna happen to your father?  Do you know?  I don't.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M032
chinese: 好的。好的，那么，妈妈。
english: All right.  All right, then, Mom.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F034
chinese: 我只是需要再考虑一下。
english: I just--give it some more thought.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M033
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我以为如果我等待，爸爸会忘记拉里，我们可以有一个正常的婚礼，一切都幸福。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  I thought that if I waited Dad would forget about Larry and we could have a regular wedding and everything happy.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M034
chinese: 但是如果我不能——如果这里不能发生这种情况，那么我就必须离开。
english: But if I can't--if that can't happen here, then I'll have to get out.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F035
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M035
chinese: 我会离开。我会结婚，去别的地方生活。也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll get married and go live some place else.  Maybe New York.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M036
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了。一个好傻瓜。我已经厌倦了。
english: I've been a good son too long.  A good sucker.  I'm through with it.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F037
chinese: 关于生意怎么样？这到底是什么东西？
english: What about the business?  What the hell is this?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M037
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F038
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M038
chinese: 是的。我每天喜欢花一个小时在这上面。如果我整天都要为钱而努力工作，至少在晚上我希望它美丽。
english: Yes.  I like it an hour a day.  If I'm gonna grub for my money all day long, at least in the evening I want it beautiful.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我想要一个家庭。我想要孩子。我想要一些我可以全身心投入的事情。安妮正在其中。现在，我该去哪里找到它？
english: I want a family.  I want kids.  I want something that I can give myself to.  Annie's in the middle of that.  Now, where do I find it?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F039
chinese: 告诉我，你会离开这个生意吗？
english: Tell me, you'd leave the business?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M040
chinese: 是的，对于这个我愿意。
english: Yes, on this I would.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F040
chinese: 好吧，你不想那样思考。
english: Well, you don't want to think like that.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M041
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F041
chinese: 好吧，但是不要这样想，否则我们工作是为了什么？我的意思是，整个事情都是为了你，克里斯。整个计划都是为了你。
english: All right, but just don't go thinkin' like that 'cause otherwise what did we work for?  I mean, the whole thing is for you, Chris.  The whole shootin' match is for you.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M042
chinese: 我知道。我知道，妈妈。只是帮我留在这里。
english: I know.  I know, Mom.  Just help me stay here.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F042
chinese: 好的。只是不要这样想，你听到了吗？
english: All right.  Just-- just don't go thinkin' that way, you hear me?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M043
chinese: 我正在这样想。
english: I am thinkin' that way.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F043
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses02F_script01_1_M044
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强壮的人。
english: No, you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses02F_script01_1_F044
chinese: 我能看到那个。
english: I can see that.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F000
chinese: 发生了什么事？
english: What's going on?

name: Ses02M_impro06_M000
chinese: 凯西昨晚去世了。
english: Kathy died last night.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F001
chinese: 哦，我的天。哦，我的天，我非常抱歉。
english: Oh my God. Oh my God, I'm so sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M001
chinese: 是的，我的意思是，你知道，那是一个-
english: yeah, I mean, you know, it was a -

name: Ses02M_impro06_M002
chinese: 我猜我们早就预料到了，她坚持了很久 - 比他们预期的要久得多，但你知道，当它真的发生时，它就会变得更加困难。
english: I guess we saw it coming and she lasted a lot - a lot longer than, uh, they expected but you know, I mean when it actually happens it's just a lot harder.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F002
chinese: 这并不会变得更容易，是的。
english: It doesn't make any easier, yes.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M003
chinese: 我是说至少她回到了家，她不再在医院里了，
english: I mean at least she was home, she wasn't in the hospital anymore,

name: Ses02M_impro06_F003
chinese: 哦，伙计。我很抱歉。
english: Oh, man. I'm so sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M004
chinese: 她当时和加里在一起，他说她只是坐在那里然后睡着了，闭上了眼睛，就这样。
english: She was with- yeah  She was with Gary, and he said that she was just sitting there and went to sleep, closed her eyes, and that was it.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F004
chinese: 这将会非常艰难，我很抱歉。
english: It's going to be so rough, I'm sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M005
chinese: 是的。我的意思是，对我来说没有对他那么艰难，但是
english: Yes. I mean, it's not as rough on me as it is on him but

name: Ses02M_impro06_M006
chinese: 天啊，你知道的，我们和她们在一起度过了这么多时间，现在我们再也见不到她了，这真的很超现实，很奇怪。
english: God, it's you know, we've spent so much time with them it's just really surreal, really weird that we're not going to be able to see her anymore and go

name: Ses02M_impro06_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M007
chinese: 出去吃饭，你知道的，然后去加利福尼亚，我的意思是。
english: out to- out to dinner you know and do the troops to California, I mean.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F006
chinese: 完全。
english: Totally.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M008
chinese: 就是这样-我不知道，它有点-有点奇怪的事情你知道
english: It's just that- I don't know, it's sort it's sort- of a weird thing you know

name: Ses02M_impro06_F007
chinese: 是的
english: Yeah

name: Ses02M_impro06_M009
chinese: 不能再见到任何人，谁知道他们真正去了哪里，你知道的。我的意思是，我猜我们只能希望无论他们现在在哪里，如果有的话，那里会更好，我的意思是。
english: not being able to see anyone again, who knows where they really went, you know. I mean, I guess we can just hope that wherever they are now if it's anywhere that it's better I mean.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F008
chinese: 是的。嗯，至少你有很多美好的回忆。
english: Yes. Well, at least you have a lot of good memories.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M010
chinese: 她是[垃圾]。
english: She was [garbage]

name: Ses02M_impro06_F009
chinese: 她真的很在乎你，你知道的。
english: She really cared about you, you know.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M011
chinese: 是的，我是说她关心我们所有人。她很棒。
english: Yes, I mean she cared about all of us. She was great

name: Ses02M_impro06_M012
chinese: 那么，爱着你认识的每个人。
english: so loving everybody you know.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F010
chinese: 她是
english: And she was

name: Ses02M_impro06_M013
chinese: 天啊，我真的很讨厌，我真的很讨厌看到她离开。
english: Gosh, I just hate I just hate to see her go.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F011
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M014
chinese: 我们都打算去欧洲旅行，你知道的。
english: We were all going take a trip to Europe you know.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F012
chinese: 即使你仍然这样做，她也会在那里。
english: Even if you still do she'll- she'll be there.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M015
chinese: 是的。[呼吸] 上帝。
english: Yes.  [BREATHING] God.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F013
chinese: 你会没事吗？
english: Are you going to be okay?

name: Ses02M_impro06_M016
chinese: 我只是——我只是不明白，就像你知道的那样，你对此无能为力，就像完全超出了你的控制。
english: I just -- I just don't get it, like there is just nothing you can do about it you know, it's like just out of your control and it

name: Ses02M_impro06_M017
chinese: 只是让处理变得更加困难，因为尽管你想要让她变得更好，看到她没有痛苦，但就像，我不知道，它就是有自己的想法。
english: just makes it that much harder to deal 'cause as much as you want to, you know, make her better, see her not in any pain, it's like, just I don't know, just has a mind of its own.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M018
chinese: 然后她走了。
english: Then she's gone.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F014
chinese: 没事的，我保证。
english: It's going to be okay, I promise.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M019
chinese: 嗯，你知道我很感激你过来和我交谈，我的意思是这确实有帮助。
english: Well, you know I appreciate you coming over and talking to me, I mean it definitely helps

name: Ses02M_impro06_F015
chinese: 当然
english: Sure

name: Ses02M_impro06_M020
chinese: 与某人交谈但是
english: to talk to somebody but

name: Ses02M_impro06_F016
chinese: 你不应该一个人。
english: you shouldn't be alone

name: Ses02M_impro06_M021
chinese: 这只是需要一些时间，我想。
english: It's just going to take a while, I think.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M022
chinese: 啊。
english: Ah.

name: Ses02M_impro06_M023
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses02M_impro06_F018
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑。
english: What time is it? They're supposed to run around midnight.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M001
chinese: 天啊，这太棒了，不是吗？就像看看我们来到这里的夜晚，再好不过了。
english: God, this great, isn't it? Like look at the night we go here, it couldn't be better.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M002
chinese: 我本想沿着海岸再往前走一点，远离灯光和人群，但我担心我们会错过它。
english: I would have wanted to go a little further up the coast, get away from the lights and the people but I was afraid we'd miss it.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M003
chinese: 你好吗？
english: How you doing?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M004
chinese: 那是...那是，不是吗？那只是泡沫吗？我甚至都分不清楚。
english: Is that -- is that, no? Was that just foam? I can't even tell.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M005
chinese: 虽然，我猜你可能无法分辨出它们。你认为它们可能是不可错认的吗？
english: Although, I guess you can't tell it probably isn't them. Probably be unmistakable don't you think?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M006
chinese: 你好吗？你知道我忘了什么吗？我忘了带手电筒。我怎么会忘了带手电筒呢？我怎么会这么愚蠢呢？
english: How you doing? You know what I forgot? I forgot to bring my flashlight. How - how could I forget to bring my flashlight? How could I be so stupid?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M007
chinese: 你知道手电筒，那个银色的，只有一个，对吗？
english: You know the flashlight, the silver one, there is only one, isn't there?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F002
chinese: 那不是你的手电筒。
english: That's not your flashlight.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M008
chinese: 这是谁的？
english: Who's is it?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的；这也是我的。
english: It's ours; it's mine too.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M009
chinese: 哦，好吧，当然，是的。
english: Oh well, sure, yes.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F004
chinese: 但是你一直说我的手电筒，好像它只属于你一样。我的意思是，这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: But you kept saying my flashlight as if somehow it's just yours. I mean how is it supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M010
chinese: 不。不。当然，我们的手电筒是你的和我的。我的手电筒，就是你的手电筒，当然。
english: No. No. Of course our flashlight yours and mine. Mi flashlight, es su flashlight, naturally.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M011
chinese: 我们怎么会忘记带它呢？我希望月亮能继续出来。
english: How could we forget to bring it?  I hope the moon stays out.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M012
chinese: 我想知道他们是否总是在满月时奔跑？我记不清去年是否是满月了，你记得吗？
english: I wonder do they always run during a full moon? I can't remember if it was full last year, do you remember?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yea.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M013
chinese: 你冷吗，你想要我的夹克吗？我们应该带上我们的毯子，我们的毯子，我们怎么会忘记带毯子呢？
english: You cold, you want my jacket? We should've - we should've brought our blanket, our blanket, how could we forget to bring the blanket?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M014
chinese: 哦，一个六瓶装，那应该带来一个六瓶装才是现在最好的选择。我怎么会忘记呢，
english: Oh, a six-pack, that's, should've brought a -- a six-pack be just the ticket right now. How could I forget,

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M015
chinese: 哦，天哪。就像个孩子一样，我竟然能够把拉链拉好就出门了，太神奇了。
english: oh man. Like a kid, it's amazing I got out of the house with my fly zipped.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M016
chinese: 你认为他们能听到我们说话或感受到我们在沙滩上移动时的振动吗？
english: You think they can hear us talk or feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F006
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M017
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: What you want my jacket?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F007
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了。我们就回家吧。
english: It's after eleven. Let's just go home.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M018
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗，我们会错过它的。我们刚刚到这里。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里有什么意义呢？
english: Are you kidding, we'd miss it. We, we just got here. What's the point in coming down here if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M019
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M020
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point too.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F010
chinese: 那么，让我们走吧。
english: So let's go.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M021
chinese: 不，不是这个意思。关键是如果我们只是离开的话，下来这里就没有意义了。你不想看吗？
english: No. No. That's not my point. The point is there is no point in coming down here if we just leave. Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M022
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我不是，这只是愚蠢的。
english: I don't, it's just stupid.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M023
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。我的意思是它每年只发生一次。
english: Honey, this is a natural phenomenon. I mean it only happens once a year.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M024
chinese: 想想堪萨斯州的人们，他们必须买机票和预订酒店才能看到这个。我们离这里只有四十分钟的路程，这太好了，不容错过。
english: Think about the people in Kansas, they- they'd have to get a plane ticket and hotel reservations to see this. We live forty minutes away it's too good to pass up.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这些小鱼游到沙滩上翻滚着游走，然后它们就死了。
english: Pass up what? These little fish swim onto the beach flop around and swim away, and then they die.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M025
chinese: 是的，但是海滩上的那一刻是他们小小生命中的亮点。我的意思是，所有那些翻滚都是在产卵，或者你说交配或者觅食之类的。
english: Yea, but that moment on the beach is the highlight of their little lives. I mean all that flopping is laying eggs or what do you, mating or spotting or something like that.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M026
chinese: 这对于这些人来说是个重要的夜晚，生命的最后狂欢。
english: This is a big night for these guys, life's last orgy.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？我的意思是我们现在讨论的不是登月，而是鱼。这是一条连没人吃的鱼。
english: What are you so excited about? I mean it's not a moon landing we're talking about here it's fish. It's a fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M027
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yes they do.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F015
chinese: 奥吉
english: Augie

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M028
chinese: 好的。但是它是一种其他鱼类所没有的行为。就像燕子返回卡皮斯特拉诺一样，或者是旅鼠自愿跳下悬崖。
english: Okay. But it's fish that do something none of the other fish do. Like the swallows returning to Capistrano, or the Lemmings throwing themselves off the cliffs

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M029
chinese: 你知道这里有一种特定的神秘感，一种魔力，一些无法解释的东西。我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: you know there is like, there is a certain mystery here, a magic, a bit of the unexplainable. I don't see how you cannot be interested.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M030
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M031
chinese: 我不明白。第一次我们来这里的时候，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚。
english: I don't get it. The first time we came here you said it was the best night of your life.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M032
chinese: 然后去年我记得你特别兴奋，以至于在把我推出房子的路上，你踩到了脚趾头，直到我们上了车你才注意到。
english: And then last year I remember specifically you were so excited that you stubbed your toe on the way pushing me out of the house, and you didn't even notice until we got in the car.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F018
chinese: 去年你也会记得我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，你喉咙痛，我们因为无关紧要的事情大吵了一架，而且我们没有看到Grinuons。
english: Last year you'll also remember our shoes got wet, I got sand in my panties, you got a sore throat, we got into a big fight over nothing, and we didn't see the Grunions.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M033
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F019
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M034
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置；这是一个更好的位置。我对这些事情有很好的直觉。
english: We just weren't in a good spot; this is a much better spot. I've got good instincts for these things.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M035
chinese: 那是那个，哦不，那只是海草，不是吗？
english: There is that, oh no that's just seaweed, isn't it?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M036
chinese: 这是，这太棒了，不是吗？我不会错过这个机会。现在听着，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请听一下。
english: This is, this is great, isn't it? I wouldn't miss this for anything. Now listen to this, I know you're not interested but just listen.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M037
chinese: 在某个地方，有一大群银色的鱼朝这个方向游来。
english: Out there somewhere there is this huge mass of silver fish headed this way,

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M038
chinese: 他们不知道为什么，我们也不知道为什么。他们没有进行投票或其他任何事情；他们没有拿到地图或邀请函。
english: they don't why, we don't know why. They didn't take a vote or anything; they didn't get a map or an invitation.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M039
chinese: 就像一个整体一样。这个小小的时间敏感的鞭炮，本能的鞭炮在他们的身体里突然爆炸了，他们全都转过身来，排成一条长长的队伍，开始游泳，就像加利福尼亚海岸是他们唯一关心的事情一样。他们现在正在游泳。
english: Just all as one. This little time sensitive firecracker, instinctual firecracker in their body just went off and all as one they turned and formed a line as long the California coast and started swimming. They're swimming right now as if that's the only thing that matters.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M040
chinese: 这是一种单一的心态，没有思想，纯粹是一种紧迫感，他们不知道是什么驱使着他们。他们不问它的名字，也不问它的问题。
english: It's single mindedness, with no mind, it's urgency that's pure urge, they don't know what drives them. They don't ask it a name or ask it a question,

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M041
chinese: 他们只是一起转身开始游泳，将它们带到我们站立的这个地方，进行一场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典。
english: they just turn as one and start the swim and brings them right here to this spot where we stand, for a massive celebration of sex and death.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M042
chinese: 看着我，我给自己起鸡皮疙瘩，我所有的头发都竖了起来。
english: Look at me; I'm giving myself goose bumps all my hairs are popping up.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M043
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so what do you think?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F021
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses02M_script02_1_M044
chinese: 我刚才说的话。
english: What I was saying.

name: Ses02M_script02_1_F022
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F000
chinese: 嗨，我叫Shiloh，欢迎来到--Airline Six。嗨，我可以帮你什么吗？
english: Hi, my name is Shiloh, welcome to--Airline Six.  Hi, how may I help you?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M000
chinese: 是的，你好。
english: Yeah, hello.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M001
chinese: 好的。我刚刚和这台机器交谈了半个小时，但是我一直无法完成任何事情。我一直在尝试预订这个假期，但是一直没有成功。
english: Ok.  I've- I've just been talking to this machine for the past half hour and I can't-can't get anything done.  I've been trying to book this vacation this entire time.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F001
chinese: 好的，先生。
english: All right, sir.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M002
chinese: 我知道，对不起。只是因为这让我有点沮丧，因为--
english: I know, I'm sorry.  It's-It's just that it's been a little frustrating because--

name: Ses02F_impro08_F002
chinese: 我完全理解。自动化系统有时候非常困难。
english: I completely understand.  Automated systems are very difficult sometimes.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F003
chinese: 嗯，我可以帮您什么忙？您想预订特定的航班吗？
english: Um, how may I help you.  You're trying to book a specific flight?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M004
chinese: 嗯，是的，我的意思是我听说有这些套餐交易，也许我可以得到一个像酒店之类的东西。然后-
english: Well, yeah, I mean I heard there was like these package deals and that maybe I could get a like a hotel or something like that. and-

name: Ses02F_impro08_F004
chinese: 哦，是的，绝对的。你知道，特别是因为你等了这么久，我知道你一直过得很艰难。
english: Oh, yeah, absolutely.  You know, and especially because you've been waiting so long and I know that, um, you've been having a difficult time.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F005
chinese: 我想今天一定要给你我们的特别优惠，通常只针对有先前记录的重要客户。
english: I want to definitely give you our special package today, which um is usually only for valued customers who have a record of having previous,

name: Ses02F_impro08_F006
chinese: 嗯，有很多购买，但我们还是会给你。只是为了确保你对我们的服务满意。
english: um lots of purchases, but we're gonna go ahead and give that to you anyway. uh,  Just to make sure that you're happy with your service here.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M005
chinese: 你- 你可以做那个吗？现在可以吗？我不需要像转接一样被转移或其他类似的事情。
english: You- You can do that--You can do that now? I don't have to get like transferred through or anything like that.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F007
chinese: 那可以吗？
english: Is that all right?

name: Ses02F_impro08_F008
chinese: 我现在可以为您做到这一点。不，绝对可以。我可以一直照顾您直到最后。
english: I can do that right now for you. No, absolutely.  I can take care of you all the way through to the end.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F009
chinese: 我只需要您的信用卡号码，但请给我一点时间。所以-
english: All I'm going to need is your credit card number but just give me one moment. So-

name: Ses02F_impro08_M006
chinese: [呼吸] 这很好。
english: [BREATHING] that's good.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F010
chinese: 嗯，您也要安排一次航班-您希望我们提供高度折扣的酒店价格，以便一切都包含在一个交易中。您到达那里时，我们会照顾好您。
english: um, you're scheduling a flight as well--And you would like to, um, we have a highly discounted hotel rate that goes along with that so that everything is all in one deal.  You're taken care of by the time that you get there.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M007
chinese: 好的。我想要确保它像一家不错的酒店 - 我的意思是，我将为此付出很多钱，所以我不想-我不想，你知道的，我不想浪费时间。
english: All right.  I want to make sure it's like a nice hotel--I mean-mean I'm gonna be paying a lot of money for this so I don't wanna-I don't wanna, you know, I don't wanna to be a waste of time.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F011
chinese: 当然。我们我们。
english: Absolutely. we we

name: Ses02F_impro08_F012
chinese: 是的，我完全理解。实际上，我们的航空公司只使用五星级酒店及以上的酒店。除了我们以三星级酒店的价格收费，因为作为一家公司，我们能够从酒店那里得到优惠。
english: Yes, I completely understand.  Actually, our-our airline only uses five star hotel and above.  Except we charge at a three star hotel rate because, as a corporation, we are able to get a deal from the hotels themselves.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F013
chinese: 所以，您将绝对会入住一家评分很高的优秀酒店，我们也可以确保它位于您喜欢的城区。
english: So, you will absolutely be in a high rated great hotel and we can make sure that it's in a area of town that you like as well.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M008
chinese: 好的。所以--
english: Okay. So--

name: Ses02F_impro08_F014
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M009
chinese: 嗯，你知道的，我们想要去马奥岛，那是一个
english: Well, you know, we wanted to--we wanted to go to Maui and--That was a

name: Ses02F_impro08_F015
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M010
chinese: --你知道的，孩子们想去海滩玩什么的，所以--嗯
english: --you know, the kids wanna go to the beach and stuff and so--um

name: Ses02F_impro08_F016
chinese: 好的。有多少个座位？
english: Great.  How many seats?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M011
chinese: 好的，将会有四个人。
english: Well, it's gonna be four of them.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F017
chinese: 好的。太好了。四个座位。我会为您预订四个座位。
english: Okay.  Great.  Four seats.  I'll book you for four seats.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M012
chinese: 好的。他们能够都聚在一起吗？
english: All right.  And can they like all get together?

name: Ses02F_impro08_F018
chinese: 哦，是的，当然。嗯，你想要靠窗还是靠过道的座位？
english: Oh, yeah, absolutely.  Um- Would you like window seats or aisles?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M013
chinese: 嗯，你知道，窗户很好。我猜。
english: Um- You know, window is nice. I guess

name: Ses02F_impro08_F019
chinese: 好的，我可以做一个窗户和一个过道，然后再做一个窗户和一个过道，这样每个人都可以两人一组坐。然后可以互换位置吗？
english: Okay, I can do um- a win- -two like a window and a aisle and a window and an aisle next to each other so that each of you can sit two by two. And switch around maybe?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M014
chinese: 好的，当然。嗯，那-那会很好。
english: All right, Sure.  A yeah, that- that'd be good.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F020
chinese: 好的。太好了。您希望在一天的什么时间？
english: Okay.  Great.  What time of the day would you like?

name: Ses02F_impro08_M015
chinese: 嗯，嗯，是的，我想我们只是-你知道的，尽可能选择最好的，我猜。你知道的-
english: Uh, well, yeah, I think we were just--you know, whenever best available, I guess.  You know--

name: Ses02F_impro08_F021
chinese: 好的。太好了。我们有一个非常宽松的航班，早上九点起飞，幸运的是，时差实际上是往回倒退的。
english: All right.  Great.  Well we have a very open flight that leaves at nine a.m. and fortunately uh the time change actually goes um backwards from that.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F022
chinese: 所以，这是一段五小时的飞行，但你只会在上午十一点到达。所以那天，你可以有足够的时间去你的酒店休息，然后在毛伊岛度过一个美好的下午。
