english: So, it's a five hour flight, but you'll arrive only at eleven a clock in the morning.  So that day, you can have plenty of time to get to your hotel--Rest up and then still have a nice afternoon your first afternoon in Maui.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M016
chinese: 嗯，就像，有什么班车之类的东西，我可以坐到酒店。
english: And, like, there's there's shuttles or something that I can get to the hotel.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F023
chinese: 当然。实际上，这是与我们的酒店一起打包的。你只需要给我你的地址。我们会来接你，确保你有足够的时间赶到飞机。
english: Absolutely.  That actually goes in on the same package with our hotel.  You just give me your address.  We'll come and pick up a time that allows you to get to your flight with plenty of time to spare.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F024
chinese: 还有一辆班车会等着您，带您去合适的酒店。
english: And a there will also be a shuttle waiting for you to take you to the appropriate hotel.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M017
chinese: 好的。哇。那听起来不错，我猜。非常感谢。这比和机器交谈要好多了。
english: Okay.  Wow.  Sounds good then, I guess.  Thank you very much. It's a lot better than talking to a machine.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F025
chinese: 是的 - 我完全理解。有时候旅行是一个困难的过程，我们希望尽可能地让它变得简单。
english: Yeah--I completely understand.  It's a difficult process sometimes and we want to make traveling as easy as possible.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M018
chinese: 好的。那么我们确认了，还是你有什么问题吗？好的。
english: All right.  So we're confirmed then or do you--All right.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F026
chinese: 当然。非常感谢您的来电，我们希望您能再次光临。
english: Absolutely. Thank you so much for calling and we hope that you will come to us again.

name: Ses02F_impro08_M019
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses02F_impro08_F027
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F000
chinese: 快到我该走的时间了。
english: It's almost time for me to go.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M000
chinese: 我简直不敢相信——现在——你确定这是绝对必要的吗？就像——
english: I can't believe that--now--are you sure this is absolutely necessary?  Like--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F001
chinese: 我无能为力。我的意思是，你知道的，政府--
english: There's nothing I can do.  I mean, the government you know--

name: Ses02F_impro02_M001
chinese: 我们在这里要做什么？我一个人做不了这个。我...
english: What--what're we gonna do here?  I can't--I can't do this by myself.  I--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F002
chinese: 你必须这样做。我的意思是，你是一个很棒的父亲。你能做到的。我知道你能行。
english: You're gonna have to.  I mean, you're a great father.  You can do it.  I know you can.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M002
chinese: 但是，我--我什么都不是--没有你在这里，我什么都不是。也许我们可以--我们可以以某种方式摆脱这个。
english: But, I'm--I'm nothing--I'm nothing without you here.  Maybe we can--we can get out of this somehow.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F003
chinese: 我不这么认为。
english: I don't think so.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M003
chinese: 好吧，来吧。你得想出个办法。一年，一年之后，它会把我们分开的。我甚至不想去想。我的意思是，我甚至不知道我是否能够与你联系上或者--
english: Well, come on.  You've gotta think of something.  A year--a year away, it's gonna tear us apart.  I don't even--I don't even wanna think about it.  I mean, I don't even know if I'll be able to get in touch with you or--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F004
chinese: 嗯，我们能尽力而为，而且，随着无线互联网的普及，我认为我们可以偶尔交流一下。
english: Well, we can do the best we can and-and, with um, you know like wireless internet these days--I think that we could-- Talk every once in awhile.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F005
chinese: 你可以给我发照片。
english: You could send me pictures.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M004
chinese: 不会一样的。
english: It's not going to be the same.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M005
chinese: 如果--也许--如果，嗯，我们去那边的某个地方怎么样？我不知道--我不知道--我--我需要为这个想出一个解决办法，因为--
english: What if--maybe--what if, uh, we went somewhere over there?  I don't--I don't know--I--I need to figure something out for this because--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F006
chinese: 他们不会让你去的。你必须待在家里，而我必须离开。我的意思是，就是这样--
english: Their not gonna let you.  You have to stay home and I have to go.  I mean, that's all--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F007
chinese: 我是说，我的女儿，我不想让她处于危险之中。你知道吗？她必须留下来。
english: and--I mean, my daughter--I don't want to put her in danger.  You know?  She has to stay.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M006
chinese: 这将是一个关键的时刻，她正在成长。她会需要你的。
english: This is gonna be a--a crucial yet--she's--she's growing up.  She's gonna need you.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F008
chinese: 我知道，但是她需要更安全。她需要和同龄的孩子在一起。她需要能够在街上玩耍和...
english: I know, but, she needs to be safe more.  She needs to be around kids her age--own age.  She needs to be able to play on the streets and--

name: Ses02F_impro02_M007
chinese: 但是她会说第一句话的时候，你不会在这里。她迈出第一步的时候，你也不会在这里。我是说，这是你应该在这里的事情。
english: But she's--you're not gonna--you're not gonna be here for--for her first words.  For her first steps.  I mean--it's something that you're supposed to be here for that--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F009
chinese: 你可以帮我记住它。
english: You can just remember it for me.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M008
chinese: 我不知道 - 我不知道 - 我不知道怎么样 - 我不知道你怎么可能会这样 - 如果我是的话 -
english: I don't know--I don't know--I don't know how--I don't know how this could even be possible for you--I--if I was--

name: Ses02F_impro02_F010
chinese: 嗯，我需要-我需要你能够为我做这件事，因为我对此无能为力。
english: Well, I need--I need you to be able to do this for me 'cause I can't do anything about it.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F011
chinese: 我的意思是，对我来说同样困难，但是我知道我们能做到，你知道的。
english: I mean, it's just as hard for me, but--I know that we can do it, you know

name: Ses02F_impro02_M009
chinese: 我的意思是，你只需要去做你自己的事情。我的意思是，是的，我们都不知道，这对我们两个都不好，但是--
english: I mean, you just get to--go off and do your thing.  I mean, yeah, we're both--I don't know--it's bad for both of us, but--

name: Ses02F_impro02_M010
chinese: ...如果我们能够——如果我们能够以某种方式在一起，那将会好得多。你知道的——我们可以——我们可以一起做这件事。
english: ...it would be so much better if we can--if we could stay together somehow.  You know--we could--we could do this together.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F012
chinese: 我不想让你处于危险之中。我也不想让她处于危险之中。
english: I don't want you in danger.  And I don't want her in danger.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M011
chinese: 我不想让你处于危险之中。你要去哪里？你要去参加战争。
english: I don't want you in danger.  Where are you going?  You're going over to war.

name: Ses02F_impro02_F013
chinese: 我别无选择。我无能为力。
english: I have no choice. There's nothing I can do.

name: Ses02F_impro02_M012
chinese: 好的。
english: All right.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么，也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say, maybe we ought to tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的，他还在床上。
english: How could he see it? I was the first one up he was still in bed.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约在今天早上四点左右。我听到它发出裂开的声音，然后醒来并向外看。当它裂开时，他就站在这里。
english: About four this morning. I heard it cracking and I woke up and looked out. He was standing right here when it cracked.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。当它裂开时，他跑进屋子里，在厨房里哭了。
english: I don't know. When it cracked he ran into the house and cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F004
chinese: 所以你和他说过话了吗？
english: So you talked to him?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不，我觉得最好还是让他一个人待着。
english: No. I figured it was best to leave him alone.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以听到他的声音从我房间的地板上传来。
english: I could hear him right through the floor in my room.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他在那个时候在这里做什么？他又在梦见他了，他在晚上四处走动。
english: What was he doing out here at that hour? He's dreaming about him again, he's walking around at night.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他越来越像死后的样子。那是什么意思？
english: He's getting just like after he died. What is the meaning of that?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道它的意思，但是妈妈，我知道一件事，我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it, but I know one thing mom, we've made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F008
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。我的意思是，这种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him. I mean that sort of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F009
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们要让他继续认为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry is not coming back and I know it. Why do we allow him to go on thinking that we believe with him?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你想做什么，和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do, argue with him?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M010
chinese: 不，我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到没人再相信拉里还活着了。
english: No I don't want to argue with him, but it's about time he realized that nobody believes Larry is alive anymore.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他呢？在夜晚四处走动，等待他，我的意思是，我们是否与他矛盾，是否直接说出我们不再有任何希望，我们多年来一直没有希望？
english: Why -- why shouldn't he dream of him? Walk around, waiting for him at night I mean do we contradict him, do we say straight out that we don't have any hope anymore that we haven't had hope for years now?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来。
english: We've got to say it to him.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你能证明吗，你怎么证明呢？
english: Can you prove it, how can you prove it?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M013
chinese: 天哪，已经过去三年了，三年后没人会回来，那太疯狂了。
english: For God sakes it's been three years, nobody comes back after three years, that's insane.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F013
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是这样。你可以自言自语到脸都发青，但是没有人和坟墓，那你在哪里？
english: To you it is and to me. You can talk yourself blue in the face but there is no body and no grave so where are you?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M014
chinese: 坐下妈妈，我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down mom; I want to talk to you.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F014
chinese: 问题在于这该死的报纸，每个月左右就会冒出一个男孩，所以下一个就会是Larry。
english: The trouble is the god damned newspapers, every month or so a boy turns up out of nowhere, so the next one is going to be Larry.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的。好的。听我说。
english: All right. All right. Listen to me.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道我为什么把安妮带到这里吗？
english: You know why I brought Annie here don't you?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M017
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F015
chinese: 我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: I got an idea but what's the story?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M018
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F016
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M019
chinese: 不，这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: No it's not only my business.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F017
chinese: 你想让我做什么；你已经够大了，应该知道自己的想法。
english: What do you want me to do; you're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M020
chinese: 那么没问题，我会继续进行吗？
english: So it's all right then I'll go ahead with it?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好的，你想确保你的父亲不是-
english: Well, you want to make sure that your father isn't-

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M021
chinese: 看，这不仅仅是我的事情-
english: See it isn't just my business-

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F019
chinese: 我只是在说
english: I'm just saying

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M022
chinese: 有时候你真让我生气，你知道吗？如果我告诉爸爸，他会大发脾气，这不是你的事吗？你真是擅长忽视事情。
english: Sometimes you infuriate me you know that. Isn't it your business to if I tell dad and he throws a fit about it? You have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F020
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore. The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F021
chinese: 从父亲的角度来看，他并没有死，你没有权利带走他的女孩。
english: From father's point of you he isn't dead and you have no right to take his girl.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F022
chinese: 如果你知道去哪里，你可以从那里继续前进，但我不知道去哪里，你看，我不知道。那么我能为你做些什么？
english: You can go on from there if you know where to go but I don't know where to go, see I don't know. So what can I do for you?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我追求我真正想要的东西时，我都不得不退缩，因为其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的生活，一次又一次。
english: I don't know why but every time I reach out for something that I really want, I have to pull back 'cause someone else will suffer. My whole bloody life, time after time after time.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F023
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There's nothing wrong with that.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F024
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Have you asked Annie yet?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和你父亲有相同的感觉。
english: How do you know she'll marry you? Maybe she feels the same way your father does.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M027
chinese: 嗯，如果她真的这样做了，那就是结束了。从她的信中我觉得她已经忘记了他。
english: Well, if she does then that's the end of it. From her letters I think she's forgotten him.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M028
chinese: 我不知道，我会找出来。然后我们会和爸爸好好讨论一下，对吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: I don't know, I'll find out. Then we'll trash it out with dad, right? Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F026
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性，你从来没有看到过。
english: Trouble is you don't see enough women, you never did.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M029
chinese: 所以我不擅长与女性相处。
english: So what I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F027
chinese: 我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M030
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F028
chinese: 那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。我的意思是，你自从去打仗以来就没有见过她，已经五年了。
english: That's a good answer but it doesn't answer anything. I mean you haven't seen her since you went away to war it's five years.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M031
chinese: 我无法控制，我最了解她。我的整个生命都住在她隔壁。每当我想到妻子，我就想到安妮。
english: I can't help it I know her best. I mean lived next door to her my whole life. These years when I think of a wife, I think of Annie.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M032
chinese: 你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F029
chinese: 我不想要一个图表。他认为他会回来。克里斯，你娶了这个女孩，你宣布他死了。
english: I don't want a diagram. He thinks he's coming back. Chris, you marry this girl you're pronouncing him dead.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F030
chinese: 你知道你父亲会发生什么事吗？因为我不知道，明白吗？
english: Do you know what's going to happen to your father because I don't, see?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M033
chinese: 好的。好的。妈妈。
english: All right. All right. Mom.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F031
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M034
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我以为如果我等待，爸爸会忘记拉里，我们可以有一个正常的婚礼，一切都很幸福。
english: I've given it three years of thought. I thought that if I waited, dad would forget about Larry and we could have a regular wedding and everything happy.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M035
chinese: 如果我在这里做不好，那么我就必须离开。
english: If I can't do that here well, then I'll have to get out.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F032
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M036
chinese: 我会离开的。我会结婚，去别的地方生活，也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out. I'll get married and go live some place else, maybe New York.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F033
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西，你疯了吗？
english: What the hell is this, are you crazy?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M037
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了，好傻瓜，我已经厌倦了。
english: I've been a good son too long a good sucker, I'm through with it.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F034
chinese: 这个生意怎么样？这是什么？
english: What about the business? What is this?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M038
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F035
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M039
chinese: 是的，我喜欢它，每天一个小时。如果我整天都要为钱而努力工作，至少在晚上我希望它美丽。
english: Yes, I like it and hour a day. If I'm going to grub for money all day long, at least in the evening I want it beautiful.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M040
chinese: 我想要一个家庭；我想要孩子；我想要一些我可以全身心投入的事情。安妮就在其中。现在我该去哪里找到它？
english: I want a family; I want kids; I want something I can give myself to. Annie is in the middle of that. Now where do I find it?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F036
chinese: 告诉我，你会离开这个生意吗？
english: Tell me, you'd leave the business?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M041
chinese: 是的，对于这个我愿意。
english: Yes, on this I would.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F037
chinese: 好吧，你不想那样思考。
english: Well, you don't want to think like that.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M042
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F038
chinese: 好的。但是你不想这样想，因为否则我们为什么要努力工作呢，我的意思是整个事情都是为了你，克里斯，整个计划都是为了你。
english: All right. But you don't want to be thinking like that 'cause otherwise what did we work for, I mean the whole thing is for you, Chris, the whole shooting match is for you.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M043
chinese: 我知道，我知道，妈妈。好的。只是帮我留在这里。
english: I know I know mom. All right. Just help me stay here.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F039
chinese: 别这样想。
english: Just don't go thinking that way.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M044
chinese: 嗯，我是这样想的。
english: Well, I am thinking that way.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F040
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses02M_script01_1_M045
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强硬的人。
english: No, you don't. I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses02M_script01_1_F041
chinese: 是的，我能看到。
english: Yea, I can see that.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M000
chinese: 好的。终于。给你。
english: All right. Finally. Here you go.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F000
chinese: 你好，我能帮你什么吗？
english: Hi, How can I help you?

name: Ses02M_impro01_M001
chinese: 是的。我只是想把这件事做完。
english: Yea. I just want to get this done,

name: Ses02M_impro01_F001
chinese: 当然，嗯。
english: Sure, um

name: Ses02M_impro01_M002
chinese: 获取我的新驾照。
english: get my new license.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F002
chinese: 你是否带有两种身份证明？
english: do you have two forms of ID with you?

name: Ses02M_impro01_M003
chinese: 嗯，不，不过我拿到了驾驶执照。
english: Um, no, I got my driver's license though.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F003
chinese: 我实际上需要两种身份证明。我需要要么护照或出生证明，或社会保障卡。对不起。
english: I actually need two forms of ID. I need either a passport or a birth certificate, or social security card. I'm sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M004
chinese: 嗯，抱歉，我忘记了它们。我的意思是我必须-
english: Uh, sorry, I forgot them. I mean I've got to -

name: Ses02M_impro01_F004
chinese: 好的
english: Well

name: Ses02M_impro01_M005
chinese: 好的，司机的驾照会起作用吗？
english: well is the dri-driver's license going to work?

name: Ses02M_impro01_F005
chinese: 我-我可以拿走你的驾驶执照，但是我需要另一种身份证明来处理这份文件。
english: I- I can take your driver's license but I need another form of ID in order to process this paper work.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M006
chinese: 好的，那你在说什么？什么-
english: Okay, so what are you saying? What-

name: Ses02M_impro01_F006
chinese: 嗯，你需要回家拿另一种身份证明并回来。
english: Um, that you would need to go home and get another form of ID and come back.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M007
chinese: 什么？你是在告诉我，我在那条长长的队伍中等待，只是为了坐下来然后被叫号码，就像之后一样。
english: What? I- You telling me I waited in that huge line to go and sit down and get my number called, like after

name: Ses02M_impro01_F007
chinese: 对不起，先生，但是
english: Well, I'm sorry sir but

name: Ses02M_impro01_M008
chinese: 三个小时和
english: three hours and

name: Ses02M_impro01_F008
chinese: 你需要带两种身份证明，我们对此无能为力。
english: you need to bring two forms of ID there is nothing we can do about it.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M009
chinese: 他们不应该告诉我们那件事吗？我的意思是为什么 - 为什么他们要让我去等三个小时，如果我还得再去做一次呢？
english: Shouldn't they have like told us about that? I mean why - why would they make me go and wait three hours if I have got to go and do it again?

name: Ses02M_impro01_F009
chinese: 嗯，实际上是-
english: Well, it's actually-

name: Ses02M_impro01_F010
chinese: 标准要求你带上几种身份证明，很抱歉。
english: It's standard that you bring a couple of forms of ID, I'm sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M010
chinese: 这是标准的吗？我的意思是我不在车管局工作，我怎么知道，就像，我排队，我拿到我的
english: It's standard? I mean I don't work at the D.M.V. how am I supposed to know that, like, I stand in line, I get my

name: Ses02M_impro01_F011
chinese: 对不起，先生，但是我们不负责任。
english: Well, I'm sorry, sir, but we're not responsible.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M011
chinese: 我填写申请表是正确的，对吗？
english: I filled out the application right, didn't I?

name: Ses02M_impro01_F012
chinese: 是的，你做到了，非常感谢，但是如果你忘记了什么，我们不负责任，并且我们需要两种身份证明。
english: Yes, you did, thank you very much, but we're not responsible if you've forgotten something, and we need to have two forms of ID.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M012
chinese: 好的。那么怎么样 - 不行 - 你拿着那个，我去 - 我去，然后我可以回来 -
english: Okay. What about - no -- how about you hold that and I'll - I'll go and I can come back-

name: Ses02M_impro01_F013
chinese: 对不起，但是有很多人在等待，所以你只能再排队。
english: I'm sorry, but there is a lot of people waiting so you're just going to have to get in line again.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M013
chinese: 我已经等了三个小时了。
english: I've been waiting for three hours.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F014
chinese: 这种情况经常发生，很抱歉先生，但我不能为您例外。
english: It just happens to people all the time, I'm sorry sir, but I can't make an exception for you.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M014
chinese: 这太荒谬了。来吧。
english: This is ridiculous. Come on

name: Ses02M_impro01_F015
chinese: 对不起，先生。
english: I'm sorry, sir.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M015
chinese: 我不能回到那条线上。我有事情要做，我的意思是-
english: I cannot go back in that line. I've got stuff I need to do, I mean-

name: Ses02M_impro01_F016
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: there is nothing I can do.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M016
chinese: 但是我的驾驶执照 - 我必须拿着我的出生证明才能首次获得驾驶执照，对吧，我的意思是 - 这是我的驾驶执照，所以
english: But my driver's license - I had to have my birth certificate to get my driver's license in the first place right, I mean this - here is my driver's license so

name: Ses02M_impro01_F017
chinese: 我知道，先生，但我们必须有两份表格。对此我无能为力，很抱歉。
english: I know sir, but we have to have two forms. There is nothing I can do about it, I'm sorry.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M017
chinese: 那没有任何意义。为什么？
english: That doesn't make any sense. Why?

name: Ses02M_impro01_F018
chinese: 对不起，先生。我无能为力。
english: I'm sorry, sir. There is nothing I can do.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M018
chinese: 你- 你不应该在柜台上放一个标志或者其他东西，也许在你拿到申请表的时候，或者在申请表上。
english: You- shouldn't you have like a sign or something maybe like up on the counter when you get the applica- maybe on the application

name: Ses02M_impro01_F019
chinese: 嗯，如果你查看了网站，它会显示的。
english: Well, if you had checked the web site it would have said.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F020
chinese: 如果你查看了网站，它会说你需要两种身份证明。
english: If you had checked the website it would have said that you needed two forms of identification.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M019
chinese: 什么网站-我没有去过网站-我为什么需要去-这是车管所。你来车管所，你排队等候三个小时，然后回家。
english: What web- I didn't go to a website - why would I need to - it's the D.M.V.. You come to the D.M.V., you wait in line for three hours, and then you go home.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F021
chinese: 好吧，也许你应该这样做。
english: Well, maybe you should

name: Ses02M_impro01_M020
chinese: 我在队伍中等待，现在我准备拿我的东西然后回家。
english: I waited in line now I'm ready to get my stuff and then go home.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F022
chinese: 好的。所以也许你现在应该回家拿你的文件然后再回来。
english: Right. So maybe you should go home now and get your paperwork and come back.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F023
chinese: 对不起先生，但是有很多人在等待。所以如果您不让开道路，我将不得不叫保安。
english: I'm sorry sir but there's a lot of people waiting. So if you won't move out of the way, then I'm going to have to call security.

name: Ses02M_impro01_M021
chinese: 天啊，我的天
english: God, oh my-

name: Ses02M_impro01_M022
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: This is ridiculous.

name: Ses02M_impro01_F024
chinese: 对不起，先生，这不是我的选择。
english: I'm sorry, sir, it's not my choice.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事会困扰你？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F001
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了，为什么突然间-
english: She's been in New York three and half years why all of a sudden-

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，也许他只是想再次见到她。
english: Well, maybe he just wanted to see her again.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？他一生都住在女孩隔壁，为什么他不想再见她呢？
english: What do you mean? He lived next door to the girl all his life, why wouldn't he want to see her again?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M003
chinese: 不要那样看着我，他对我说的和对你说的一样少。
english: Don't look at me like that, he didn't tell me any more than he told you.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F003
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M004
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking of it?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F004
chinese: 它具有一切。
english: It's got that all about it.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M005
chinese: 好的，那又怎样？
english: Well, so what?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here Joe?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M006
chinese: 好的。现在，听着孩子-
english: All right. Now, listen kid-

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F006
chinese: -她不是乔的女孩；她知道她不是。
english: -She's not his girl Joe; she knows she's not.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F007
chinese: 那为什么她还是单身呢，我是说纽约到处都是男人，为什么她还没结婚？可能有一百个人告诉她她疯了，但她一直等待着。
english: Then why is she still single, I mean New York is full of men, why isn't she married? Probably a hundred people told her she's crazy but she's waited.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M008
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she has waited?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F008
chinese: 她知道我知道的，这就是为什么。她像一块岩石一样忠诚。在我最糟糕的时刻，我想到她在等待，我再次知道我是正确的。
english: She knows what I know, that's why. She's faithful as a rock. In my worst moments I think of her waiting and I know again that I'm right.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M009
chinese: 看，今天天气很好，我们为什么要争吵呢？
english: Look it's a nice day, what are we arguing for?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F009
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢夺走乔的信仰。陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares take her faith away Joe. Strangers might, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M010
chinese: 你希望我对此做什么？
english: What do you want me to do about it?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F010
chinese: 我希望你们俩都表现得好像他会回来一样。你们难道不觉得自从他邀请她以来我就注意到了吗？我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I want you to act like he's coming back, both of you. Don't you think I haven't noticed since he invited her, I won't stand for any nonsense

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M011
chinese: 但是凯特
english: But Kate

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F011
chinese: 因为如果他不回来，我会自杀。并且笑——嘲笑我，但是
english: Because if he's not coming back, I'll kill myself. And laugh -- laugh at me but

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F012
chinese: 为什么她回来的那天晚上，她睡在他的房间里，突然他的纪念品碎成了碎片，看看它，看看。
english: why did that happen the very night she came back she sleeps in his room and suddenly his memorial breaks to pieces, just look at it, look.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M012
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F013
chinese: 我需要你和我一起相信；我不能独自承受。
english: I need you to believe with me; I can't stand all alone.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F014
chinese: 就在上周，底特律出现了一个比拉里失踪更久的男人，你亲自看到了。
english: Even last week there was a man who showed up in Detroit missing longer than Larry, you read it yourself.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M014
chinese: 好的。好的。冷静一点。
english: All right. All right. Calm yourself.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F015
chinese: 只有你最需要相信。
english: Just you above all need to believe.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M015
chinese: 等等，为什么我的最重要的事情在上面？
english: Wait, why my above all?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F016
chinese: 不要停止相信。
english: Don't stop believing.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M016
chinese: 那是什么意思，我最重要吗？
english: What does that mean, me above all?

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M017
chinese: 看着你——看着你在颤抖。
english: Look at you -- look at you shaking.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_F017
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses02M_script01_2_M018
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide? What the hell is the matter with you, Kate?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F001
chinese: 嗯，除了弗雷达之外，没有人知道我们在这里，而她也不会打电话。
english: Well, nobody knows we're here except Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那一定是他们了。
english: Must be them then.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们要做什么？
english: What are we going to do?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M003
chinese: 亲爱的，无论发生什么事情，我们都没事，对吗？
english: We're all right darling, aren't we whatever happens?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远甜蜜。
english: Now and always sweet.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是注定要早或晚发生的。
english: It's bound to come sooner or later.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好？你好吗？什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello? Hello? What? Wrong number.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F005
chinese: 哦，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: Oh. It sends shivers down my spine.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M006
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What do we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M007
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势。
english: With the most perfect poise.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F007
chinese: 是的，我应该向法庭行屈膝礼。
english: Yes, I should probably to a court curtsey.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M008
chinese: 当一个人快乐时，那些本应该非常重要的事情却一点都不重要，不是吗？
english: Things that ought to matter dreadfully don't matter at all when one's is happy, do they?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F008
chinese: 令人可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: What's so horrible is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M009
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，不要说那样的话。
english: Oh darling don't say that.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F009
chinese: 是真的；整个事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true; the whole business is a very poor joke.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M010
chinese: 意思是，那个神圣而美丽的东西是爱吗？
english: Meaning that sacred and beautiful thing love?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的。只是这个意思。
english: Yes. Meaning just that.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M011
chinese: 这一切意味着什么，这是我问自己的问题 - 这是我在不断追求终极真理时问自己的问题？天哪，这一切意味着什么？
english: What does it all mean that's what I ask- that's what I ask myself in my ceaseless quest for ultimate truth?  Good God what does it all mean?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me. I'm serious.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真，那只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious my dear one, that's just what they want.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M013
chinese: 所有那些徒劳无益的道德家，试图让生活变得难以忍受的人，嘲笑他们，轻率对待。嘲笑一切他们所奉为神圣的口号。
english: All those futile moralists, who try to make life unbearable, laugh at them, be flippant. Laugh at everything all their sacred shibboleths

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M014
chinese: 轻浮引出了他们可恶甜蜜中的刻薄。
english: flippancy brings out the acid in their damned sweetness in light.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F013
chinese: 嗯，如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们自己。
english: Well, if I laugh at everything then I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M015
chinese: 当然你必须，我们都是有趣的人。
english: Certainly you must, we figures of fun all right.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F014
chinese: 嗯，我们总是想要争吵和打架吗？
english: Well, shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M016
chinese: 不，那个欲望将会随着我们的激情而消逝。
english: No, that desire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F015
chinese: 哦亲爱的，我们应该这样吗？
english: Oh dear, should we like that?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M017
chinese: 取决于我们玩得有多好。
english: Depends on how well we play it.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F016
chinese: 好的，如果我们其中一个死了，那个活着的还会笑吗？
english: Well, what happens if one of us dies, does the one that's left still laugh?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M018
chinese: 是的，是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes, yes, with all his might.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F017
chinese: 嗯，那可够严重的，不是吗？
english: Well that's serious enough, isn't it?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M019
chinese: 不，不是的，死亡是非常可笑的，像一个狡猾的小谜团，全靠镜子完成。
english: No, no it isn't, death is very laughable, such a cunning little mystery, all done with mirrors.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F018
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M020
chinese: 所以从长远来看，其他人也是这样。
english: So is everyone else in the long run.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M021
chinese: 让我们肤浅地可怜那些可怜的哲学家，让我们吹响我们的喇叭和吱吱声，尽可能地享受派对。就像相当愚蠢、非常幼小的学童一样。让我们品味这一刻的快乐。
english: Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers, let's blow our trumpets and squeakers and enjoy the party as much as we can. Like quite idiotic, very small, school children. Let's savor the delight of the moment.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M022
chinese: 亲爱的，在你的身体腐烂之前来亲吻我，蠕虫会在你的眼眶里出入。
english: Come kiss me darling before your body rots and worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F019
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliot, worms don't pop.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M023
chinese: 我不在乎你看到什么。你可以把自己涂成绿色，在凡尔赛广场裸舞，疯狂地和世界上所有的男人一起离开，只要你最爱我，我不会说一句话。
english: I don't care what you do see. You can paint yourself green and dance naked in the Place Vendome, and rush off madly with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word, as long as you love me best.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F020
chinese: 谢谢亲爱的，同样适用于你，只是如果我发现你甚至看着别的女人，我会杀了你。
english: Thank you dear, the same applies you, except that if I catch you so much as looking at another woman, I'll kill you.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M024
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: You remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F021
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M025
chinese: 当你在广场上买了那条小的、画着颜色的木蛇并把它放在我的床上的时候。
english: The one when you bought that little, painted, wooden snake in the Piazza and put it on my bed.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F022
chinese: 哦，查尔斯，那是他的名字查尔斯。它摇摆得如此美丽。
english: Oh Charles, that was his name Charles. It did wiggle so beautifully.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M026
chinese: 可怕的事情，我讨厌它。
english: Horrible thing, I hated it.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F023
chinese: 我知道你做了。你把它扔进了大运河；我不认为我会原谅你的。
english: I know you did. You threw it out of the window into the Grand Canal; I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M027
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F024
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M028
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的新睡袍上。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your curling iron burned a hole in my new dressing gown.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F025
chinese: 它也烧毁了我的梳子和浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: It burned my comb too and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M029
chinese: 那真是一个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F026
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M030
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F027
chinese: 经理走进来，发现我们在地板上像豹子一样打滚、咬人和抓人。
english: The manager came in and found us rolling around on the floor biting and scratching like panthers.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M031
chinese: 我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: I'll never forget his face.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F028
chinese: 哦，这太荒谬了，完全荒谬。
english: Oh it was ridiculous, completely ridiculous.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M032
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_F029
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses02M_script03_1_M033
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M000
chinese: 那么，进展如何？
english: So, how's it going?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F000
chinese: 事情进展得非常顺利。嗯，我今天收到了一封邮件。
english: It's going really well.  Um, I received something in the mail today.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M001
chinese: 哦，你得到了什么？在哪里？
english: Oh, you got what?  Where?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F001
chinese: 我进入了南加州大学。
english: I got into U.S.C.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M002
chinese: 哦，不可能。
english: Oh, no way.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F002
chinese: 是的，我非常兴奋。所以我要说--
english: Yeah, I'm so excited.  So I'm gonna say--

name: Ses02F_impro07_M003
chinese: 你要去吗？你要去吗？
english: Are you gonna go? you gonna-

name: Ses02F_impro07_F003
chinese: 是的，我想，我的意思是因为我还能去哪里呢？就像我申请的其他地方，我真的不太喜欢。
english: Yeah, I think, I mean because where else would I gonna go?  Like the other places that I applied to I really didn't like that much anyway.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F004
chinese: 那么--
english: So--

name: Ses02F_impro07_M004
chinese: 哇，那太...
english: Wow, that's...

name: Ses02F_impro07_M005
chinese: ...那是第一选择，是吗？太棒了，现在看看你将会在这里。你知道的。
english: ...that's first choice, huh? That's so awesome and now look you're gonna be--you're gonna be here. you know

name: Ses02F_impro07_F005
chinese: 是的，我知道。
english: Yeah, I know.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F006
chinese: 当然。我太兴奋了。
english: Absolutely. I'm so excited.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F007
chinese: 我知道。我知道。我们都会聚在一起。虽然我们可能会在城市的不同地方，但我们仍然可以像...一样。
english: I know.  I know. And we'll all get to hang out.  And I'm--even though we'll be at like at different parts of the city, we can still, like...

name: Ses02F_impro07_F008
chinese: ...一起出去，就像，过着各自的生活-见面并结识彼此的朋友等等。所以，我很高兴因为他们有一所很好的学校。
english: ...hang out and, like, have our different lives--And meet each other's friends and stuff.  So, I'm just so glad 'cause they have such a good school

name: Ses02F_impro07_M006
chinese: 是的，不，肯定的 - 它会...
english: Yeah, no, definitely--It's gonna..

name: Ses02F_impro07_M007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F009
chinese: 和喜欢-足球队-和喜欢所有的-...你-我是什么意思，就像...
english: and like-- The football team--And like all the-...you- what I mean, like...

name: Ses02F_impro07_M008
chinese: 是的
english: Yeah

name: Ses02F_impro07_M009
chinese: 战斗吧。
english: Fight on.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F010
chinese: 你可以在国内的任何地方行走，就像是在美国南加州大学一样。
english: You can walk somewhere and be anywhere in the country and be like, oh, yeah, I am at U.S.C.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F011
chinese: 而且你知道吗，你知道我是什么意思，就像它是可辨认的，而不仅仅是我去了某个随机的学校。就像人们真的知道你是什么意思...
english: And you know what, you know what I mean, like it's recognizable rather than just being like I went some random school. It's like people really know what you...

name: Ses02F_impro07_M010
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_impro07_M011
chinese: 哇。太酷了。
english: Wow. That's cool.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F012
chinese: ...就像，他们感觉就像--我感觉就像这样会很有成就感。你明白我的意思吗？
english: ...like, they feel like--I feel like it's going to be so like accomplished.  Do you know what I mean?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F013
chinese: 就像它有一些威望一样。所以
english: Like it has some prestige. so

name: Ses02F_impro07_M012
chinese: 是的。嘿。有声望的学校。
english: Yeah. Hey. Prestigious school.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M013
chinese: 那么，你现在需要寄送你的押金吗？还是你要做什么？
english: So, what, do you have to send in your deposit now?  Or what you-?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F014
chinese: 是的，我的意思是有所有的金钱问题，我妈妈正在帮助我处理财政援助之类的事情。但是，一切都会好的--
english: Yeah, I mean there's all the money stuff and my mom's helping me with the financial aid and stuff.  But, it'll be fine--

name: Ses02F_impro07_F015
chinese: 就像，现在我被接受了，就像，这真是让我心情轻松了很多。
english: Like, now that I'm accepted, it's just, like, such a huge load off my mind.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M014
chinese: 太棒了。
english: That's great.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F016
chinese: 我不介意担心所有的文书工作。你知道的--
english: I don't mind worrying about all the paperwork.  You know--

name: Ses02F_impro07_M015
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M016
english: So...

name: Ses02F_impro07_F017
chinese: 因为，我不再需要做出那个决定了。我不再需要努力决定，我将去哪个糟糕的学校。你知道的。
english: Because, I don't have to like make that decision anymore.  I don't have to try and decide, like, what the bad school I'm going to go to is. you know

name: Ses02F_impro07_M017
chinese: 对。对。对。哦，那你就得参加新生导向了，我猜。
english: Right.  Right.  Right. Oh, man, then you're going to have to do orientation, I guess.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F018
chinese: 我知道。我知道。我觉得你去，你喜欢待上几天，你会遇到人们，他们会带你参观，向你展示一切。哦，天啊，我太兴奋了。
english: I know. I know.  I think you go and you like stay for a couple of days and you meet people and--And they'll give you like a tour--And show you everything.  Oh, man, I'm just so--I'm so excited.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M018
chinese: 那将会很棒。
english: That'll be awesome.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M019
chinese: 我是说因为你之前去过校园，对吧？
english: I mean because you went to the campus before, right?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F019
chinese: 是的，哦，完全是这样。这是一个美丽的校园。它将会非常好。嗯，每个人都很友好，而且墙上都有常春藤。哦，它就是那种大学的感觉。
english: Yeah, oh totally.  It's a beautiful campus.  It's gonna be really nice.  Um, and everyone is friendly and like there's ivy on all the walls.  Oh, it's just so--it's so like collegiate.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F020
chinese: 你知道我是什么意思吗？就像，这正是我想要的。
english: You know what I mean?  Like, it's like exactly what I want.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M020
chinese: 那么你打算在那里做什么？你决定了吗？考虑过吗？
english: So what're you--what're you gonna do there?  Have you decided?  Thought about it?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F021
chinese: 嗯，你知道的，我考虑过，但是他们有很多东西，我可能会先尝试一些东西...
english: Well, you know, I've thought about it but they have so many things that I might--Like try some things out first...

name: Ses02F_impro07_M021
chinese: 我知道。我的意思是，这是个好事情。
english: I know.  I mean, it's good all around.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F022
chinese: 因为在他们的名单上，比如G.E.或其他的，你有很多选择。所以你可以尝试不同的东西，而不仅仅是像“哦，我必须学数学，哦，我必须学这个”。你知道我的意思吗？
english: ...because also on the list of their, um, like G.E.'s or whatever, you have a lot of choices within every single one.  So you can, like, try things out and not just be like, oh, I have to take math, oh, I have to take this.  You know what I mean?

name: Ses02F_impro07_F023
chinese: 所以，嗯，所以我不知道。
english: So, um, so I don't know.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M022
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses02F_impro07_F024
chinese: 我是说我要拿一堆东西去看看。
english: I mean I'm gonna take a bunch of stuff and see.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M023
chinese: 哦，天啊。
english: Oh man.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F025
chinese: 我-他们就像-他们只是有那么多的像这样的学校是前十名的，就像其中的部门一样，你知道我的意思。
english: I- They have like--they just have so many like prestigious like this school is top ten and like the departments within it, you know what I mean.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M024
chinese: 我经常看到人们身上穿着美国南加州大学的衣物。
english: I always see people walking around with like U.S.C stuff on--

name: Ses02F_impro07_F026
chinese: 我知道，我现在可以成为其中之一了 - 我会像一个美国人一样四处走动。你知道我是什么意思吧。
english: I know, I get to be one of those now--I'll like walk around and be like a U.S.C..  You know what I mean.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M025
chinese: 你知道就像。
english: You know is like.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M026
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M027
chinese: 啊。是的。[垃圾]
english: Ahh. Yeah. [GARBAGE]

name: Ses02F_impro07_M028
chinese: 你会像是一个粉丝还是一个学生，你知道吗？学生。【笑声】哦，太棒了。
english: You'll be like are you a fan or a student you know? Student. [LAUGHTER] Oh man, that's awesome.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F027
chinese: 然后你会像...
english: And you'll be like...

name: Ses02F_impro07_F028
chinese: 学生。我是一个学生。是的，我是，非常感谢你。
english: Student. I'm a student. Yes I am, Thank you very much.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F029
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses02F_impro07_M029
chinese: 一位美国南加州大学的毕业生。你已经准备好了。
english: A U.S.C. graduate now. You're set.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F030
chinese: 我知道。我很兴奋。
english: I know.  I'm excited.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F031
chinese: 好的，那会花一些时间。 [垃圾]
english: Well, that'll take a while. [GARBAGE]

name: Ses02F_impro07_M030
chinese: 我知道，那还有很长的路要走。那很好。
english: I know, that's a ways down the road. That's cool.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F032
chinese: 那将会是很多工作。
english: That's going to be a lot of work.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F033
chinese: 但是，没关系的，我是说。我太兴奋了。这将会非常有趣。
english: But, it'll be fine, I mean.  I'm so excited. It's going to be so fun.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M031
chinese: 在洛杉矶。哦，天哪。
english: In LA. Oh man.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F034
chinese: 我知道，我是说这个地区不太好，但是学校弥补了这一点。一切都会好的。一切都会好的。
english: I know, and I mean the area's not great, but like the school makes up for it. It'll be fine. It'll be good.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M032
chinese: 太多了。
english: So much.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M033
chinese: 但这是洛杉矶，你知道的，一切都有。
english: But it's LA, you know, everything.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M034
chinese: 你离海滩越来越近了。我的意思是天哪。
english: You're getting close to the beach.  I mean geez.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F035
chinese: 我知道。我知道。太有趣了。我等不及了。
english: I know. I know. So fun.  I can't wait.

name: Ses02F_impro07_M035
chinese: 好的。给我打个电话，你知道什么时候——你到达城市。绝对棒极了。
english: Cool.  Well give me a call, you know when--You get in town. definitely Awesome.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F036
chinese: 我会的。我会的。谢谢你。
english: I will. I will. Thank you.

name: Ses02F_impro07_F037
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M000
chinese: 嘿，现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑，对吧？天啊，这太棒了，不是吗？
english: Hey, what time is it? They're supposed to run around midnight, right? God, this is great, isn't it?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M001
chinese: 看看我们度过的夜晚，再好不过了。
english: Look at the night we got; couldn't be better.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M002
chinese: 你知道吗，实际上，我想往海岸线上再走远一点，远离所有的人和灯光，但是我觉得我们会错过它。嘿，你好吗？
english: You know actually, I wanted to go a little further up the coast to get away from all the, the people and the lights, and uh- but I thought we'd miss it. Hey, how you doing?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M003
chinese: 哦，那是-那是-现在，那只是泡沫，嗯，我甚至都分辨不出来。
english: Oh, is that-is that-now, is that just foam, uhh, I can't even tell.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M004
chinese: 哦，虽然如果我不能说出来，那可能不是他们，对吧？它可能会是不会被误认的，你觉得呢？嘿，你好吗？
english: Oh, though if I can't tell it probably isn't them, right? It probably would be unmistakable, wouldn't you think? Hey, how you doing?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M005
chinese: 哦，你知道我忘了什么吗？我忘了带手电筒。我怎么会这么笨。哦，我-我应该带上我的手电筒的。
english: Oh, do you know what I forgot? I forgot my flashlight. How could I be so stupid. Oh, I-I should have brought my flashlight.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M006
chinese: 嗯，你知道的，手电筒。银色的那个。只有一个，对吧？
english: Uh- you know, the flashlight. The silver one. There's only one, isn't there?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F002
chinese: 那不是你的手电筒，它是我们的。它也是我的。
english: That's not your flashlight; it's ours. It's mine too.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M007
chinese: 哦，好的，当然。
english: Oh, well, sure.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F003
chinese: 我不明白为什么你总是说“哦，这是我的，这是我的”。就好像这只是你的手电筒一样。我的意思是，你觉得这样会让我感觉如何？
english: I don't understand why you're always saying oh, it's mine, it's mine. It's not like it's just your flashlight. I mean, how do you think that makes me feel?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M008
chinese: 不，当然。你的和我的。我们的手电筒。你的和我的。我的手电筒就是你的手电筒。当然。
english: No, of course. Yours and mine. Our flashlight. Yours and mine. Mi flashlight is su flashlight. Naturally.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M009
chinese: 我们应该带上手电筒。我简直不敢相信我们忘记带它了。
english: We should have brought our flashlight. I can't believe we forgot to bring it.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M010
chinese: 我希望月亮能够继续出现。
english: I hope the moon stays out.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M011
chinese: 嘿，他们总是在满月时奔跑吗？我记不清去年是不是满月了。你记得吗？
english: Hey, do they always run during a full moon? I can't remember if it was full last year. Do you remember?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F004
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M012
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Are you cold? Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M013
chinese: 我们应该带上毯子。哦，为什么我们没有带毯子呢？我们的毯子。
english: We should have brought the blanket. Oh, why didn't we bring the blanket? Our blanket.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M014
chinese: 你知道现在什么会很好吗？一打啤酒。啊，我真不敢相信我忘了买一打啤酒。现在正好需要一打啤酒。
english: You know what would be good right now? A six-pack. Ah, I can't believe I forgot a six-pack. A six-pack would be just the ticket right about now.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M015
chinese: 我太蠢了。我就像个小孩子。我-我居然能够拉上拉链离开家。哦-【笑声】。
english: I'm so stupid. I'm like a little kid. I-it's amazing I get out of the house with my fly zipped. Oh- [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M016
chinese: 我想知道他们是否能听到我们说话。或者能听到我们移动时沙子的振动。
english: I wonder if they can hear us talk. Or hear the vibrations in the sand when we move.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F005
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M017
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F006
chinese: 已经过了十一点了，我们回家吧。
english: It's past eleven, let's go home.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M018
chinese: 什么？你在开玩笑吗？我们刚到这里。我们会错过它。如果我们只是转身回家，下去的意义是什么？
english: What? Are you kidding me? We just got here. We'd miss it. What's the point of coming down there if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F007
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M019
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F008
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M020
chinese: 是的，这也是我的观点。
english: Yeah, that's my point too.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F009
chinese: 好的，那么我们走吧。
english: Well, so let's go.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M021
chinese: 不，不，不，那不是我的观点。我的观点是如果我们只是转身离开，那么下来这里就没有意义。
english: No. No, no, no, that's not my point. My point is there's no point in coming down here if we just turn around and leave.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M022
chinese: 我是说，你不想看吗？
english: I mean, don't you want to see it?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F010
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M023
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F011
chinese: 我不知道。我就是不知道。
english: I don't know. I just don't.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M024
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象，我是说，这只发生一年一次。这是一个很好的机会。想想堪萨斯的人们，他们要买机票和预订酒店才能来看这个。而我们只需要四十分钟的路程。这个机会太好了，不能错过。
english: Honey, this is a natural-this is a natural phenomenon. I mean, it only happens once a year. This is, this is a great opportunity. Think about the people in Kansas. They would have to get a plane ticket and hotel reservation to come and see this. We're only forty minutes away. This is too good to pass up.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F012
chinese: 放弃什么？一群鱼。它们游到海滩上，扑腾着，然后游走，然后死去。
english: Pass up what? A bunch of fish. They swim up to the beach and they flop around and they swim away and then they die.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M025
chinese: 是的。但是海滩上的那一刻是他们小小生命中的亮点。而所有那些翻滚都是在产卵或者你们所说的产仔或交配之类的事情。
english: Yeah. But that moment on the beach is the highlight of their little lives. And all that flopping around is laying eggs or what you-spawning or mating or something like that.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M026
chinese: 我是说，对于这些人来说，这是他们的重要之夜。生命的最后狂欢。
english: I mean, this is the big night for these guys. Life's last orgy.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F013
chinese: 我不知道你为什么这么兴奋。我的意思是，这不像是登月那样重要。只是鱼而已。没人吃的鱼。
english: I don't know why you're getting so excited. I mean, it's not like the landing of the moon or something. It's just fish. Fish that nobody eats.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M027
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah, they do.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F014
chinese: 哦，天啊，奥吉。
english: Oh, God, Augie.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M028
chinese: 什么，好吧，那么就是鱼做一些其他鱼不会做的事情。就像卡皮斯特拉诺的燕子或者那些跳下悬崖的旅鼠。
english: What, okay, then it's fish that do something no other fish do. Like the swallows in Capistrano or the lemmings who throw themselves off the cliffs.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M029
chinese: 这里有魔力、神秘和一点无法解释的东西。我的意思是，我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: There's magic here and mystery and a little bit of the unexplainable. I mean, I don't see how you cannot be interested.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F015
chinese: 我只是不行。我的意思是，对不起，对我来说它们仍然是鱼。
english: I'm just not. I mean, I'm sorry, it just-they're still fish to me.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M030
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F016
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M031
chinese: 我不明白。上次-第一次我们来看的时候，你说那是你一生中最美好的夜晚。
english: I don't get it. The last time-the first time that we came to see it you said it was the best night of your life.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M032
chinese: 然后去年当我们来看它时，你跑得太快，以至于你撞到了脚趾头。而且你甚至没有注意到，直到你上了车。
english: And then last year when we came to see it you ran out of the house so fast that you stubbed your toe. And you didn't even notice until you got in the car.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的，如果你还记得的话，我内裤里进了沙子。我们为了无关紧要的事情争吵了一番。你喉咙痛了，我们再也没见到那些鱼。
english: Yes, and if you also remember, I got sand in my panties. We got into an argument about nothing. You got a sore throat and we never saw the grunions.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M033
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F018
chinese: 不，天哪，我们从来没有见过grunions。我们不会去看它们。
english: No, for God's sakes, we've never seen the grunions. We're not going to see them.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M034
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置，好吗？这个位置要好得多。我对这些事情有很好的直觉。看，那是-
english: We just weren't in a good spot, all right? This is a much better spot. I have a good instinct for these things. Look, is that-

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M035
chinese: 不，那只是海草，不是吗？这太棒了，不是吗？
english: no, that's just seaweed, isn't it? This is great, isn't it?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M036
chinese: 我不会错过这个机会，无论如何。我的意思是，想想这个。好吧，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请花一分钟思考一下。
english: I wouldn't miss this for anything. I mean, think about this. Okay, I know you're not interested, but just think about this for a minute.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M037
chinese: 在某个地方，有一大群银色的鱼正朝这个方向前进。它们不知道为什么。我们也不知道为什么。只是它们体内的某种本能的定时炮竹引爆了。
english: Somewhere out there there's this huge silver mass of fish heading this way. They don't know why. And we don't know why. Just some little instinctual time-release firecracker went off-went off in their bodies.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M038
chinese: 他们全都一起转身，形成了一条像加利福尼亚海岸一样长的队伍，并开始向这边游过。游泳，仿佛那是唯一重要的事情。
english: And they all, all as one, turned as one and formed this line as big as the California coast and started swimming this way. Swimming as if that's the only thing that matters.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M039
chinese: 你知道，他们没有问问题。他们没有，他们没有进行投票。他们没有邀请函或地图；他们只是作为一个整体开始游泳。
english: You know, they didn't ask it a question. They didn't, they didn't take a vote. They didn't have an invitation or a map; they just started swimming as one.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M040
chinese: 它以一心一意的态度。纯粹的紧迫感。你知道，他们没有给它一个名字。
english: its single-mindedness with one mind. Urgency that's pure urge. You know, they don't give it a name.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M041
chinese: 他们不问问题。他们只是，他们只是，他们不知道是什么驱使他们。他们只是一起转身，开始游泳，将他们带到这里。
english: They don't ask it a question. They just, they just, they don't know what drives them. They just turn as one and start the swim that brings them to here

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M042
chinese: 我们站在一个庆祝性和死亡的盛大场合上。哦，天啊，我自己都起鸡皮疙瘩了。看，我的胳膊上的毛都竖起来了。
english: where we stand for a massive celebration of sex and death. Oh, God, I'm giving myself goosebumps. Look, I'm all-all my hairs on my arms is sticking up.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F019
chinese: 是的，那是风。
english: Yeah, that's the wind.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M043
chinese: 那么你认为怎么样？
english: So what do you think?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F020
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses03F_script02_1_M044
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情。
english: About what I just said.

name: Ses03F_script02_1_F021
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F000
chinese: 发生了什么事，伙计？出了什么问题？
english: What's going on man?  What's wrong?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M000
chinese: 我总是感到非常疲倦。
english: I'm just so tired all the time.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F001
chinese: 你一直在努力找工作吗，还是在寻找工作或者其他什么的？
english: Well have you been trying to get a job, look for a job or...?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M001
chinese: 我已经找了八个月了。
english: I've been looking for like eight months.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F002
chinese: 我知道。在外面真的很艰难。找工作真的很难。
english: I know.  It- It's really tough out there.  It's really hard to find a job.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M002
chinese: 我厌倦了同样的借口。不，不，你没有足够的资格，希望你有更多的教育。
english: I'm tired of the same excuses.  No, no you're not qualified enough, wish you had more education.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F003
chinese: 你在找什么？我的意思是--
english: Well what are you looking for?  I mean--

name: Ses03M_impro04_M003
chinese: 上次有人告诉我我过于合格。
english: Last time someone told me I was too qualified.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F004
chinese: 好的，好吧。那就是--
english: Well, okay. Well that's--

name: Ses03M_impro04_M004
chinese: 因为我去了哈佛大学。
english: Cause I went to Harvard.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F005
chinese: 好的，那是什么？是什么工作？你在找什么工作？
english: Well, that's what?  For what job?  Who...what jobs are you looking for?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M005
chinese: 我申请了P.F. Chang的餐厅经理职位。我还申请了Macy's的店长职位。我试图在德勤会计师事务所获得投资银行工作。我正在到处尝试。
english: I applied as restaurant manager at P.F. Chang.  I applied at----Macy's store manager. Tried to get investment banking job with Deloitte and Touche.  I'm trying everywhere.

name: Ses03M_impro04_FXX0
chinese: 但是，请听着--
english: But, Listen--

name: Ses03M_impro04_F006
chinese: 是的。嗯，对我来说，你知道，你只需要继续努力，坚持下去。你有哈佛学位。我是说，你可以在任何地方找到工作。
english: Yeah.  Well it seems to me, you know, you just got to keep going out there, you know, pushing through.  You got a Harvard degree.  I mean, you can get a job anywhere.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M006
chinese: 你知道吗？我过去六个月一直在做临时工作。你知道这有多么令人丢脸吗？
english: You know what?  I've been working at temp jobs for the past six months.  You know how degrading it is?

name: Ses03M_impro04_F007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M007
chinese: 成为一个接待员？哦，我每年花了四万美元读大学，现在我是一个接待员。天哪。
english: To be a receptionist?  Oh I spent forty thousand dollar a year for my college degree and I'm a receptionist.  God.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F008
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M008
chinese: 我比我工作的一半人聪明。
english: I'm smarter than half the people I work for.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F009
chinese: 嗯，你...你理想中想做什么，你知道吗？
english: Well, what do you...what would ideally like to do, you know?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M009
chinese: 我不知道宇航员？我不知道像那样疯狂的东西。
english: I don't know astronaut?  I don't know something crazy like that.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F010
chinese: 你主修什么专业？
english: Well what'd you major in?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M010
chinese: 生物医学工程。
english: Biomedical Engineering.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F011
chinese: 你-你不可能是餐厅经理，我是说，拜托。
english: You-You can't be working as a restaurant manager, I mean, come on.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M011
chinese: 我不想做工程师。虽然去年夏天我有实习经历，但是这个行业太...
english: I don't want to do engineering though.  It's so...I had the internship what, last summer,

name: Ses03M_impro04_M012
chinese: 我当时简直要抓狂了，就像是，天哪。所以我只是不得不完成这个专业，现在他们就问我为什么是工程专业，为什么还在试图在餐厅工作。就像我不知道，就给我这该死的工作吧。
english: and I was pulling my hair out and it was like, oh my God.  So I just had to finish the major so now they're like, why are you an engineering major, and why are you working, trying to work at a restaurant.  And it's like I don't know just give me the damn job.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F012
chinese: 对不起，我-
english: Look I'm sorry-

name: Ses03M_impro04_M013
chinese: 为什么这么多问题？
english: Why all these questions?

name: Ses03M_impro04_F013
chinese: 如果你需要帮忙找房子的话，我可以帮忙。你知道的，我在市中心的那家律师事务所工作，我可以问问他们是否在找人。
english: You know if you need any help finding a place I can, I can talk to my work you know I work at that law firm downtown and I can ask if they're looking for anybody.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M014
chinese: 哦是吗？他们有什么样的工作？
english: Oh yeah?  What kind of jobs they got?

name: Ses03M_impro04_F014
chinese: 我就像一个法庭书记员一样。
english: I am...just like a law clerk.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M015
chinese: 我不想成为一名法院助理。
english: I don't want to be a law clerk.

name: Ses03M_impro04_FXX1
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F015
chinese: 嗯，我在进步。我的意思是可能是...
english: Well, I'm moving up.  I mean it could be...

name: Ses03M_impro04_M016
chinese: 要成为律师吗？你现在去法学院了吗？天啊，这些都是死胡同。
english: To be a lawyer?  You go to law school now?  God this is, all these dead ends.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M017
chinese: 而且我的车也快要坏了-
english: And plus my car is breaking down-

name: Ses03M_impro04_M018
chinese: -他们正在把我赶出公寓。
english: -they're evicting me from my apartment.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F016
chinese: 嗯，虽然这没有任何意义。就像，有了哈佛学位，你应该能够--
english: Well it doesn't make any sense though.  Like, with a Harvard degree you should be able to--

name: Ses03M_impro04_M019
chinese: 是的。我知道。你会认为我应该能够成为一家公司的首席执行官，对吗？
english: Yeah.  I know.  You'd think I would be able to be C.E.O. of a company right?

name: Ses03M_impro04_F017
chinese: 只要你坚持下去就好。你可以向你的父母或任何人寻求帮助吗？
english: Just, you got to hang in there.  Can you ask your parents for help or anybody?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M020
chinese: 不，我不会去做...是的，他们会嘲笑我的。
english: No.  I'm not going to...yeah, they'd laugh in my face.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F018
chinese: 只是一点点，你知道吗？因为我保证你会找到一些东西。当你找到一些东西时，它会非常重要，你会得到钱。
english: Just for a little bit, you know?  Cause I-I guarantee you're going to find something.  When you find something it's just going to be huge and you're going to get money.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M021
chinese: 不，我在我的S.A.T.考试中得了一千六百分。
english: No. I got a sixteen hundred on my S.A.T..

name: Ses03M_impro04_F019
chinese: 某事--你好吗...？
english: Something-- How are you going...?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M022
chinese: 我他妈的——每分钟打六十个字。
english: I'm freaking----typing sixty words a minute.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F020
chinese: 每分钟多少个单词？
english: How many words a minute?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M023
chinese: 六十个字。每分钟六十个字。嘿，史密斯先生，你好吗？哦，你知道的，就像上帝一样，我只是想射击你，史密斯先生。
english: Sixty words.  Sixty words a minute.  Hey how are you doing Mr. Smith?  Oh, you know, it's just like God, I just want to shoot you Mr. Smith.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F021
chinese: 每分钟六十个字。那是一分钟...每分钟一个字，嗯，每秒钟一个字。
english: Sixty words a minute.  That's a min...a word per min uh second.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M024
chinese: 是的。没关系。但是--
english: Yeah.  It's alright.  But--

name: Ses03M_impro04_F022
chinese: 你可以成为一个出色的接待员。
english: You could be an amazing receptionist.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M025
chinese: 我不适合做接待员。
english: I'm not cut to be a receptionist.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M027
chinese: 哦，是的。我将成为一名全职接待员。哈佛学位，SAT考试得了1600分。
english: Oh yeah.  I will be a full time receptionist.  Harvard degree, sixteen hundred on my S.A.T.--

name: Ses03M_impro04_F023
chinese: 嗯...如果你需要什么，我的意思是，你只是要---现在可以找到一个临时的东西，然后再找一些其他的东西--
english: Well... If you need something, I mean, you're just going to---can get a temporary thing right now and then look for something--

name: Ses03M_impro04_M028
chinese: --你知道吗？科学俱乐部的负责人。
english: --you know? Head of the Science Club.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M029
chinese: 这就是我一直在做的事情，暂时的事情。
english: That's what I've been doing, temporary things

name: Ses03M_impro04_F024
chinese: 哦，我知道。但是--
english: Oh I know.  But--

name: Ses03M_impro04_F025
chinese: -一切都会好起来的，我向你保证。你只需要坚持下去。每个人，我是说，你知道的吗？
english: -it's going to get better I promise you. You just got to hang in there. Everyone, I mean, you know?

name: Ses03M_impro04_MXX0
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M030
chinese: 也许我只是想自杀。
english: Maybe I'll just kill myself.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F026
chinese: 什么？你不能...什么？现在来吧。停下来。不要说那样的话。
english: What?  You can't...what?  Now come on.  Stop it.  Don't be talking like that.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M031
chinese: 我只是开玩笑的...
english: I was just joking...

name: Ses03M_impro04_M032
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F027
chinese: 嗯，我要做的就是，你知道的，你能不能打电话给哈佛大学看看...他们有没有关系？他们有没有职业中心，你可以找到一些正在进行的活动？
english: My, what I would do was just, you know, what about can you call Harvard and see...don't they have connections?  Don't they have like career center and you can find some stuff that's going on?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M033
chinese: 是的。他们说布莱恩，你太聪明了。你不需要我们。
english: Yeah.  I--they said Brian you're too smart.  You don't need us.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M034
chinese: 出去自己征服世界，我就像是什么？
english: Go out and take over the world by yourself and I'm like what?

name: Ses03M_impro04_F028
chinese: 显然，这并不起作用。仅仅因为你在SAT考试中得了1600分并不能保证你能找到工作。我是说，理应如此，但实际上并非如此。
english: Well obviously it's not working.  Just cause you got sixteen hundred on your S.A.T. doesn't guarantee you a job.  I mean it should really but--

name: Ses03M_impro04_M035
chinese: 我不知道。我不知道。我知道我只能继续寻找，继续搜索。
english: I don't know.  I don't know.  I know I'm just going to have to keep on looking, keep on searching-

name: Ses03M_impro04_M036
chinese: 我可能永远找不到任何东西，但我会继续努力工作——是的。好的。积极一点，我会做得好，找到那份工作。
english: and I'm never going to find anything probably but I'll just keep working hard at it-- Yeah. Okay.  Positive, I'm going to do good, find that job.

name: Ses03M_impro04_F029
chinese: 你必须要积极一点，你必须要试着只是……
english: You got to be positive man.  You got to try to just--

name: Ses03M_impro04_F030
chinese: 但你必须对此保持真实。你必须...
english: But you got to be real about it.  You have to...

name: Ses03M_impro04_M037
chinese: 是的。我在我的S.A.T.考试中得了一千八百分。
english: Yeah.  I got eighteen hundred on my S.A.T..

name: Ses03M_impro04_F031
chinese: 一千六百。
english: Sixteen hundred.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M038
chinese: 一样的区别。
english: Same difference.

name: Ses03M_impro04_M039
chinese: 二千一百分在我的SAT考试中。
english: Twenty-one hundred on my S.A.T..

name: Ses03M_impro04_F032
chinese: 二千一百？
english: Twenty-one hundred?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M040
chinese: 但是我注定要失败。是的，我变得非常厉害，我超过了2100分。现在我该怎么办？
english: But I'm doomed.  Yeah I got so good I was over twenty one hundred.  Now what am I doing?

name: Ses03M_impro04_M041
chinese: 哇，你真聪明，我们会给你额外的[垃圾]。
english: Like, wow you're really smart we're going to give you an extra [GARBAGE].

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M000
chinese: 是的。那场骚乱的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: Yes.  The real cause of that rile was Peter Burden.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F000
chinese: 哦，别闹了，你知道那里什么都没有。
english: Oh, come on, you knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You took presents from him.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F001
chinese: 礼物？一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents?  A trivial little broach.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M002
chinese: 嗯嗯。我还记得得很清楚。满是钻石，但品味极差。
english: Mmm Hmm.  I remember it well.  Bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F002
chinese: 一点也不。它非常漂亮。我还保留着它，经常穿着。
english: Not at all.  It was very pretty.  I still have it and I wear it often.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F003
chinese: 不，我没有。你是在嫉妒的想象中编造了整件事。
english: No I didn't.  You made up the whole thing in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你。
english: You must admit he was in love with you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F004
chinese: 可能只是一点点，但没有什么严重的。
english: Just a little perhaps but nothing serious.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你自己说的。那又怎样？
english: You let him kiss you. You said so.  What of it?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F005
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well what of it?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F006
chinese: 嗯，这并没有伤害他，事实上，这让他很愉悦，而且对我也没有伤害。
english: Well it didn't harm him, in fact, it pleasured him a lot and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M006
chinese: 那我呢？
english: And what about me?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么多疑和爱管闲事，你就永远不会知道任何事情。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so suspicious and nosey you would've never known anything.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M007
chinese: 哦，我必须说这是一个很好的观点。
english: Oh, that's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F008
chinese: 看，我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: Look, I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M008
chinese: 是的，我也是。无聊得发僵。
english: Yeah, so am I.  Bored stiff.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M009
chinese: 你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: You want some brandy?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No thanks.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I'll have a little I think.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不知道你为什么要它。你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't know why you want it.  You've already had two glasses.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason.  Anyhow they were very small ones.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F011
chinese: 我不明白你为什么要继续谈论这种事情。
english: I don't see what you have to go on and on with this kind of thing.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M012
chinese: 哦，我的天啊...只是因为我刚刚...好吧...
english: Oh my...just because I just...okay...

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M013
chinese: ...在晚上喝三个小小的酒杯几乎不会持续下去。
english: ...having three small minute liquor glasses in the evening is hardly going on and on and on.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F012
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's become a habit with you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M014
chinese: 你不必因为此刻自己不想要任何东西而显得如此傲慢。
english: You needn't be so grand just because you don't happen to want any yourself at the moment.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要这么愚蠢。
english: Don't be so stupid.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M015
chinese: 真的是阿曼达。
english: Really Amanda.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M016
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F015
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M017
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Going out somewhere dear?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F016
chinese: 不，只是为了让自己变得漂亮给你看。
english: No, just making myself beautiful for you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M018
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F017
chinese: 那是女人的工作去引诱男人。你能帮我看一下吗？
english: That's the woman's job to lure the man.  Watch me a moment won't you?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M019
chinese: 实际上，那是完全正确的。
english: Actually that's perfectly true.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F018
chinese: 不，不是这样的。
english: No it isn't.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M020
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F019
chinese: 哦，安静点。
english: Oh, be quiet.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F020
chinese: 我认为你应该再喝一些白兰地...
english: I think you should have some more brandy...

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M021
chinese: 我认为
english: I think that

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F021
chinese: ...因为真的
english: ...cause really

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F022
chinese: 似乎对你没有起作用。
english: it doesn't seem to be working on you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M022
chinese: 也许你应该喝更多白兰地，这样或许会让你不那么不合群。
english: perhaps maybe you should've had more brandy, it might've made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F023
chinese: 嗯，它确实没有对你产生奇迹的效果。
english: Well it really hasn't worked wonders with you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M023
chinese: 嗯，啪啪啪，像一条小蝰蛇一样。
english: Hmm, snap, snap, snap like a little adder.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F024
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M024
chinese: 是的，它们有一袋毒液藏在牙齿后面，它们会咬人。
english: Yes they do.  They have a bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F025
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M025
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F026
chinese: 我不在乎。我不在乎。你明白吗？我不在乎他们是否转来转去并像吠叫一样。
english: I don't care.  I don't care.  Do you understand?  I don't care if they roll around and bark like hoops.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M026
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F027
chinese: 是的，我做了。相当多。
english: Yes, I did.  Quite a lot.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我猜你让他亲吻你更多吗？
english: I suppose you let him kiss you a great deal more then?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F028
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your business.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M028
chinese: 嗯，你一定度过了狂欢的时光。完全没有约束，非常愉快。你本来就没有太多约束。
english: Mmm, you must've had a riotous time.  No restraint at all, very enjoyable.  You never had much anyhow.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F029
chinese: 你真是讨人厌。我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable.  I expect it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M029
chinese: 我一点儿也没有喝醉。
english: I'm not in the least bit drunk.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F030
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不太好的问题。
english: You've always had a weak head.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M030
chinese: 好的，就像我之前提到的，我喝了三个非常小的白兰地酒杯。这甚至都不足以让一个两岁的孩子喝醉。
english: Okay, like I mentioned before I had three very small, minute liquor glasses of brandy.  That's not even enough to get a child of two drunk.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F031
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child of two can get violently drunk off just one glass of brandy.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M031
chinese: 哦，多么有趣的话题。四岁的孩子和六岁的孩子呢？九岁的孩子呢？
english: Oh, what an interesting topic.  What about a child of four and a child of six?  A child of nine?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F032
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M032
chinese: 我们可能能够引发一场关于这个无节制的孩子的精彩辩论。
english: We might be able to bring up a splendid little debate about this intemperate tots.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F033
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。事实上，也许你最好再喝点白兰地。
english: Not very funny dear.  In fact, maybe you better have some more brandy.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M033
chinese: 哦，谢谢。我想我会的。
english: Oh, thanks.  I think I will.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M034
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉。
english: You better turn that off.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F034
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M035
chinese: 因为楼上的人会感到烦恼。
english: Because people upstairs will get annoyed.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F035
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs.  This is a photographer's studio.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M036
chinese: 嗯，我想楼下有人。
english: Well there are people downstairs I suppose.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F036
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They are away in Tunis.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M037
chinese: 哦，这不是突尼斯的时候呆在这里。
english: Oh, this is no time to be in here for Tunis.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F037
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M038
chinese: 不，我不会做这样的事情。
english: No I'll do no such thing.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F038
chinese: 很好。如果你坚持要表现得粗鲁和愚蠢。
english: Very well.  If you insist on being a boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M039
chinese: 快点，把它关掉。它让我发疯了。
english: Come on, turn it off.  It's driving me mad.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F039
chinese: 你太易怒了。试着控制自己。
english: You are far too temperamental.  Try to control yourself.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M040
chinese: 关掉它-关掉它。
english: Turn it--Turn it off.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F040
chinese: 走开。走开。我讨厌你。
english: Go away.  Go away.  I hate you.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M041
chinese: 非常有趣的确。
english: Very amusing indeed.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F041
chinese: 我讨厌你。听着，我受够了听你说话，你这个虐待狂恶霸。
english: I hate you.  Listen I'm sick and tired of listening to you, you sadistic bully.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M042
chinese: 你知道吗？你是一个卑鄙、小心眼、邪恶的小恶魔，我再也不想见到你了。
english: You know what?  You're a vile, little, evil-minded, little, wicked beast and I never want to see you again.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F042
chinese: 这是结束。明白吗？这是结束，此刻此地，永远如此。
english: This is the end.  Understand?  This is the end, here and now, forever and always.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M043
chinese: 你不会去任何地方。不，你不会。
english: You're not going nowhere. No you're not.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F043
chinese: 哦，是的，我是。是的，我是，你无法阻止我。
english: Oh, yes I am. Yes I am and you can't stop me.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M044
chinese: 请闭嘴。
english: Just shut up.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M045
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。如果你跪着双手向我求回来，我也绝不会再嫁给你，因为你是一个邪恶心机的小吸血鬼，我希望上帝永远不要让我再见到你。
english: shut up. shut up.  I would-I would never marry you again if you came crawling back to me on your hands and knees because you're an evil-minded little vampire and I hope to God I never see you again.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F044
chinese: 听着，你是一个残忍的恶魔，我讨厌你，憎恨你。谢天谢地，终于终于谢天谢地我意识到你有多么可怕 - 还要嫁给你？嫁给你？永远不会。我宁愿在痛苦中死去 -
english: Listen, you're a cruel fiend and I hate, loathe you.  Thank God finally, finally thank God I've realized just how horrible you are--and marry you?  Marry you?  Never. I will never marry you.  I will die die in torment-

name: Ses03M_script03_2_F045
chinese: 野兽。畜生。恶棍。猪。野兽。野兽。畜生。恶魔。对不起。
english: Beast. Brute. Cad. Swine. Beast. Beast. Brute. Devil. Sorry.

name: Ses03M_script03_2_M046
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F000
chinese: 先生，我可以帮助您吗？
english: Can I help you sir?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M000
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M001
chinese: 我已经在这里待了四个小时，但我不知道我的一个行李在哪里。
english: I've been here for four hours and I don't know where one piece of my luggage is

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F001
chinese: 好的。嗯，让我来……好的，我会帮你查一下。你是来自……你来自哪里？
english: Okay.  Well let's...well I'm going to go ahead and check on that for you.  You're coming from...where are you coming from?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M002
chinese: 巴尔的摩。
english: Baltimore.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F002
chinese: 巴尔的摩，这是一趟直飞洛杉矶的航班。
english: Baltimore and this is a direct flight to LAX

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F003
chinese: 好的。让我们往这里看。
english: Okay.  Let's look up here

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M004
chinese: 你知道，他们之前查过了，但没有找到。
english: You know and they've looked it up before and it's not there.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F004
chinese: 好的。嗯，你嗯-...
english: Okay.  Well you um-...

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M005
chinese: 现在你打算为我做些什么不同的事情？嗯？
english: Now what are you going to do for me different? Hmm?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F005
chinese: 我可以为您做的是，我们可以报告丢失的财物。
english: What I can do for you is uh we can uh report lost, lost property.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M006
chinese: 你可以报告丢失的物品吗？
english: You can report lost property?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F006
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M007
chinese: 好的。明天我要开车离开洛杉矶去圣地亚哥。所以，你希望我离开时不带走我所有丢失的物品？这是你想让我做的吗？嗯。
english: Okay.  I'm leaving LA tomorrow for San Diego, driving there.  So, I'm going to leave without all my lost property?  That's what you want me to do? um

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F007
chinese: 先生，如果我所相信的发生了，大部分航班已经离开了--
english: Well sir, if if...what I believe has happened is most of the flight was left--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F008
chinese: 行李被遗留在巴尔的摩。因此--
english: the luggage was left in Baltimore.  Therefore--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M008
chinese: 大部分的...
english: Most of the...

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F009
chinese: 喜欢行李，喜欢飞机上的行李。
english: Like the luggage, the luggage on the flight.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M009
chinese: 哇。这是一家无能的航空公司，不是吗？你是--？
english: Wow.  This is an incompetent airline isn't it?  Are you--?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F010
chinese: 实际上，这是第一次发生这种情况。我不知道发生了什么事情--
english: No actually it was...this is the first time this has ever happened.  I don't know what happened--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M010
chinese: 你打算为我们的行李退款吗？为我们的机票退款吗？
english: Are you going to refund us for our luggage, refund us for our tickets for this?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_FXX0
chinese: 我们-我的意思是-
english: We- I mean-

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F011
chinese: 好的，如果那样的话，我们可以为您提供一晚的酒店住宿。
english: Well, we can give you um- hotel lodging for a night if that--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M011
chinese: 明天我要去圣地亚哥和我的家人一起住。嗯，我为什么还需要酒店住宿呢？你能告诉我吗？
english: I'm going to San Diego tomorrow to stay with my family.  What do I need hotel lodging for hmmm?  Can you tell me that?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F012
chinese: 今晚- 今晚先生。您今晚需要住宿吗？
english: For tonight- For tonight sir.  Would you need to stay somewhere tonight?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M012
chinese: 今晚不需要。我明天要开车。今晚我要和朋友住，好吗？我不需要酒店预订...在哪里？什么酒店？
english: Tonight no.  I'm driving tomorrow.  Tonight I'm staying with a friend alright?  I don't need hotel reservations...where?  What hotel?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F013
chinese: 我们可以选择假日酒店还是其他的？
english: We can do Holiday Inn or...?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M013
chinese: 哇。谢谢你。假日酒店。哇。谢谢...这次航班花费了五百美元。
english: Wow.  Thank you.  Holiday Inn.  Wow.  Thank...the flight cost five hundred dollars.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F014
chinese: 先生，我理解，但是只是--
english: Sir I understand that but just--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M014
