chinese: 好的，那你可以把我安排在假日酒店，每晚二十美元吗？
english: Okay, so you can put me in Holiday Inn for twenty dollar a night?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F015
chinese: 你把名牌系在行李上了吗？
english: Did you have your name tags on the luggage?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M015
chinese: 当然，我在行李上贴了我的名牌。
english: Of course I had my name tags on the luggage.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F016
chinese: 好的。如果你能告诉我你的名字、地址和电话号码，一旦我们获得更多信息，我就可以与你联系。
english: Okay.  So if you can just give me your name, your name and your address and your phone number I can contact you as soon as we find out more information.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M016
chinese: 你一说...那还不够好，好吗？
english: Soon as you...that's not good enough okay?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F017
chinese: 先生，请冷静下来。
english: Sir, please calm down.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M017
chinese: 我需要你帮我一个忙。你能打电话并尽可能地把行李送到最快的航班上吗？也许这样我就不会让你失业了。
english: I need you to help me out here.  Can you get on the phone and get the luggage over on the fastest flight you can and then maybe I won't get you fired.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M018
chinese: 如果不行的话，我会记下你的名字，我会和你的上司谈话，无论是谁...我再也不会坐飞德尔塔航空的飞机了...我的生意再也不会选择飞德尔塔航空了。
english: If not, I'm going to get your name, I'm going to talk to your boss, whoever...I'm never going to fly...my business is never going to fly Delta again.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_FXX1
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F018
chinese: 你的业务是什么？
english: What is your business?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M019
chinese: 我在IBM工作。
english: I work for IBM.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F019
chinese: 好的。先生？很抱歉告诉您这个，但这确实发生了。嗯，这不是真的，
english: Okay.  Sir?  I am sorry to tell you this but this does happen. Uh- This is not uh- really,

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F020
chinese: 我是说，这是我们航空公司的错。我不知道发生了什么事，可能是弄丢了，出了点问题，但我们会解决好的--
english: I mean, our airline's fault.  I don't know what happened, misplaced, something happened but we will get you--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M020
chinese: 你把八件行李弄丢了。
english: You misplace a lot of, eight pieces of luggage.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F021
chinese: 嗯，整个航班，先生，行李被放在另一架从未离开巴尔的摩的飞机上。
english: Well, the entire flight, sir, the luggage was placed on another plane that never actually left Baltimore.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F022
chinese: 嗯，不，我不是。
english: Uh no I'm not.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M021
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？
english: Are you kidding me?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M022
chinese: 因为那件事，你打算解雇谁？
english: Who are you going to fire because of that?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F023
chinese: 嗯，我们那边有些人需要解雇，但我真的很感激--
english: Well we have some people back there that need some firing so, but I would just really appreciate--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M023
chinese: 哇。这从未发生过。我没有输。
english: Wow.  This has never happened before.  I've not lost,

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M024
chinese: 在我乘坐的所有一千次航班中，我可能连我乘坐了多少次航班都数不清。这从未发生过。
english: in all thousand flights I've been on probably I can't even count how many flights I've been on.  This has never happened before.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M025
chinese: 这是我以前遇到过的最糟糕的客户服务。
english: This is the worst customer service I've ever gotten before.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_FXX2
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F024
chinese: 好的先生。对不起，你可以-嗯-
english: Okay sir.  I'm sorry you can--um-

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M026
chinese: 好的。拿起电话，弄清楚我的行李在哪里，并告诉我它什么时候会到达，好吗？
english: Okay.  Get on the phone and figure out where my luggage is and tell me when it's going to get there alright?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F025
chinese: 我们已经确认它将在大约两天内到达。
english: We already have been confirmed that it will be arriving in--uh--in about two days.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M027
chinese: 而且，在大约...
english: And and, in about...

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M028
chinese: 两天后我会在圣地亚哥，那么它会如何送到我在圣地亚哥的地方？你会确保它送到圣地亚哥机场吗？
english: Two days I'll be in San Diego and how's it going to get to me in San Diego?  You going to make sure it gets to the San Diego airport?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F026
chinese: 嗯，我们不能--
english: Uh, we can't--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M029
chinese: 你能把它送到圣地亚哥机场吗？你能找人开车把它送到我家吗？然后我能得到一些退款...我能得到一次免费的航班吗？我能得到免费的任何东西。
english: Can you get it to the San Diego airport?  You get someone to drive it to my place alright? Then I get a refund for some...I get a free flight alright? I get free whatever.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F027
chinese: 是的，先生，是的。
english: Yes sir, Yes.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F028
chinese: 我们可以让他们直接将您的行李送往圣地亚哥。
english: We can have them direct your luggage to San Diego.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M030
chinese: 好的。你会为我的不便给我什么？
english: Okay.  And you're going to give me what for my inconvenience?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F029
english: Uh--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F030
chinese: 大堂里有一些茶点吗？
english: Some refreshments in the lobby?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M031
chinese: 一些花生？哇。那真的帮了很多。
english: Some peanuts?  Wow.  That helps a lot.

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M032
chinese: 谢谢你，谢谢你。我没有带行李，所以你给了我在假日酒店的住宿和花生。哇，你知道吗？
english: Thanks you, thank you I don't have my luggage so you gave me a Holiday Inn stay and peanuts.  Wow.  You know what?

name: Ses03M_impro05b_F031
chinese: 嗯-我们实际上-
english: eh- we actually--

name: Ses03M_impro05b_M033
chinese: 我再也不会与Delta做生意了。
english: I will never do business with Delta again.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M000
chinese: 嘿，亲爱的。
english: Hey sweetie.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M001
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F000
chinese: 嗯。
english: Um.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F001
chinese: 你好吗？哦，我好累。哦，我刚刚醒来。嗯。
english: How's it- going?  Oh I'm so tired.  Oh, I just woke up. Mmm.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F002
chinese: 发生了什么事？
english: What's going on?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M002
chinese: 嗯，嗯
english: Uh, -Um

name: Ses03M_impro02_F003
chinese: 为什么脸上带着悲伤的表情？
english: Why the sad face?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M003
chinese: 他们需要我比我想象的更早出去。
english: they need me out there sooner than I thought

name: Ses03M_impro02_F004
chinese: 在哪里？谁？你在谈论什么？
english: Where?  Who?  What are you talking about?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M004
chinese: 他们想要在下周派遣我。
english: They want to deploy me next week.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F005
chinese: 下周？
english: Next week?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F006
chinese: 海外？
english: Overseas?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M005
chinese: 对于--
english: For--

name: Ses03M_impro02_F007
chinese: 这次要多久？
english: For how long this time?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M006
chinese: 他们说可能需要两到三年的时间。
english: They said anywhere from two to three years.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F008
chinese: 什么？你是什么意思两到三年？他们不知道你有一个妻子和一个即将出生的孩子吗？
english: What?  What do you mean two to three years?  Don't they know that you have a wife and an expectant child?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M007
chinese: 我告诉过他们，但是他们--
english: I told them that but they--

name: Ses03M_impro02_F009
chinese: 亲爱的--
english: Honey--

name: Ses03M_impro02_M008
chinese: --亲爱的，我需要专家的帮助。
english: --need me on the specialist honey.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F010
chinese: 你不能。我们需要你。我需要你。
english: You can't.  We need you.  I need you.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M009
chinese: 我不想去，但是-
english: I don't want to go but,-

name: Ses03M_impro02_F011
chinese: 我不在乎钱。
english: I don't care about the money.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M010
chinese: 但他们说他们会通过晋升将我的薪水增加三倍。
english: but they said they'd increase my pay by triple-there promotion.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F012
chinese: 你下周就要离开了，所以你甚至都不会在安娜出生时在这里吗？
english: And you're leaving next week so you won't even be here for Anna's birth?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M011
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F013
chinese: 我要自己完成整个事情吗？
english: Do this whole thing by myself?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不会一个人的--
english: Honey you're not going to be by yourself--

name: Ses03M_impro02_M013
chinese: 我们会安装好互联网，我们会准备网络摄像头和一切设备。我的整个家人也在这里。
english: We'll have internet set up, we'll get web cameras and everything.  My whole family's here too.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F014
chinese: 怀孕九个月然后是的。
english: Carry her for nine months and then yes.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M014
chinese: 亲爱的。
english: Honey.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F015
chinese: 这不是同一件事。这不像你在这里一样。
english: It's not the same thing.  It's not like having you here.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F016
chinese: 我做不到这个。
english: I can't do this.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M015
chinese: 你能做到的。好吗？你能，你能坚强，你能为我们两个人坚强，好吗？
english: You can do it.  Alright?  You can, you can be strong, you can be strong for both of us alright?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F017
chinese: 我受够了坚强——为了我们。
english: I'm sick of being strong-- --for us.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M016
chinese: 我不知道该做什么。
english: I don't know what to do.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M017
chinese: 我不想要 - 我不想 - 我不想要去。
english: I don't want to - I don't- I don't want to go.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M018
chinese: 我应该做什么？
english: What am I supposed to do?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F018
chinese: 你可以说不吗？
english: You can say no?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M019
chinese: 你知道我不能拒绝。
english: You know I can't say no.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F019
chinese: 你可以的。你真的可以的。你可以——————转行做其他工作。安娜出生后我可以开始工作吗？
english: You could.  You really could.  You could-- --get into another line of work.  I could start working after Anna's born?

name: Ses03M_impro02_M020
chinese: 最后一个说不的人被解雇了。
english: The last guy who said no was fired.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M021
chinese: 我在这个工作上投入了十五年。
english: I put in fifteen years in this job.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F020
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M022
chinese: 我离退休只有五年了。
english: I'm so close.  Five more years and I retire-

name: Ses03M_impro02_M023
chinese: 而且我们将拥有那幸福的生活。
english: and we'll have that happy life.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F021
chinese: 对我来说，幸福就是你和我在一起。
english: Happiness for me is having you here with me

name: Ses03M_impro02_F022
chinese: 并且看着我们的孩子成长，看着她迈出第一步，说出第一个词。
english: and watch our child grow, see her take her first steps, her first words.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M024
chinese: 亲爱的，一年后我可以回来了。
english: Honey after a year I can be back.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F023
chinese: 你说了两年。
english: You said two years.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M025
chinese: 他们希望我在那里待两年，但我可能可以得到更多。
english: They want me there two years but I could probably get

name: Ses03M_impro02_M026
chinese: 也许可以休个假——等那边安静下来的时候。
english: maybe get some vacation-- --once it quiets down there.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F024
chinese: 整整一年？--我们不是在说几个月的事情。我是说整整一年。
english: A whole year? --We're not talking about like a couple months here.  I mean this is a whole year.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M027
chinese: 我知道。我知道。但是他们真的需要一些好人在那里。
english: I know.  I know.  But they really need some good guys there.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F025
chinese: 一年内可能发生什么？
english: What could happen in a year?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F026
chinese: 这不是第一次了，你知道吗？我的意思是你总是...把你送到不同的地方去...
english: And this isn't the first time you know?  I mean you always...sending you off to different places and...

name: Ses03M_impro02_M028
chinese: 嗯，那就是我从事的工作类型，亲爱的。
english: Well that's the kind of work I'm in honey.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F027
chinese: 我不知道那是否是我想要过的生活方式。
english: I don't know if that's how I want to live my life.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M029
chinese: 这只是会变得更快，比你想象的要快。
english: It's just going to be--it's going to go faster than you think.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F028
chinese: 乔，我是认真的，我不想不得不告诉一个小女孩...每天都问爸爸在哪里，爸爸在哪里，还得告诉她他不在家。
english: Joe I'm serious I don't want to have to have a little girl to tell...asking every day where's daddy, where's daddy and have to tell her that he's away--

name: Ses03M_impro02_F029
chinese: 远离这里，他不会在这里。
english: far away and he won't be here.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M030
chinese: 你告诉她——[呼吸声]
english: You tell her-- [BREATHING]

name: Ses03M_impro02_F030
chinese: 我完成了。我做不到，亲爱的。
english: I'm done.  I can't honey.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M031
chinese: 你是什么意思？
english: What do you mean?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F031
chinese: 结束了。
english: It's over.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M032
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F032
chinese: 亲爱的，我再也做不下去了。
english: Honey I can't do it anymore.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M033
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？不。
english: Are you kidding me?  No.

name: Ses03M_impro02_F033
chinese: 我需要你在这里。安娜需要你。
english: I need you here.  Anna needs you.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M034
chinese: 所以，你希望我在你们之间选择，还是选择我的事业？
english: So I have--you want me to choose between you guys or my career?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F034
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M035
chinese: 我要做什么？
english: What am I going to do?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F035
chinese: 优先级，亲爱的，优先级。
english: Priorities honey, priorities.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M036
chinese: 我想知道，如果我离开这份工作，我该怎么办？
english: I want to--what am I going to do if I leave this job?

name: Ses03M_impro02_F036
chinese: 你很聪明。你可以回到学校去--
english: You're smart.  You could go back to school--

name: Ses03M_impro02_F037
chinese: 完成你从未完成的硕士学位。
english: finish your Master's that you were started never finished.

name: Ses03M_impro02_M037
chinese: 好的。我会看看我能否和他们交谈。
english: Fine.  I'll see if I can talk to them.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F000
chinese: 先生，请看，我已经等了大约一个小时了，我的行李还没有到。发生了什么事？
english: Look sir, I've been waiting for about an hour and my luggage still hasn't come. What's going on?

name: Ses03F_impro05_M000
chinese: 对不起，罗森克兰茨夫人，但是，嗯，我不知道该告诉您什么。
english: I'm sorry, Mrs. Rosenkrantz, but uh- I don't know what to tell you.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F001
chinese: 你是什么意思，你不知道该告诉我什么？我有两个行李箱，我一直在从法国回来，我需要它们在这里。我现在回家了。我需要去开始工作。
english: What do you mean, you don't know what to tell me? I have two luggage that I've been coming--they're coming--from France and I need them here. I'm home now. I need to go start working.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M001
chinese: 你-你有去失物招领处询问吗？
english: Did you- Did you check with the lost and found?

name: Ses03F_impro05_F002
chinese: 在哪里？我不知道。失物招领处。你是什么意思，失物招领处？
english: Where? I don't know. The lost and found. What do you mean, lost and found?

name: Ses03F_impro05_F003
chinese: 我把我的行李从巴黎转运到洛杉矶，现在我在这里，我需要工作，而且我所有的东西都在里面。
english: I had my luggage transferred here from Paris to L.A. and now I'm here and I need to be working and I have all my stuff in there.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M002
chinese: 也许它丢失了。妈妈，你有考虑过这个吗？
english: Maybe it got lost. Did you think about that, mom?

name: Ses03F_impro05_F004
chinese: 好吧，这就是我问你的。什么-我不知道它发生了什么。
english: Well, that's what I'm asking you. What--I don't know what happened to it.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M003
chinese: 哦，不是我们丢了它；可能是机场弄丢了。也许有人偷走了它。
english: Oh, not--we didn't lose it; maybe the airport lost it. Maybe someone stole it.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F005
chinese: 等一下，先生。你-你完全不-你是什么意思，偷了它？他们怎么能从飞机上偷走它？它不是在空中吗？
english: Wait, sir. You're- You're completely not--what do you mean, stole it? How can they just steal it from an airplane? It was up in the air?

name: Ses03F_impro05_M004
chinese: 不，我的意思是，在那个小的环绕物里，那个东西被偷走了。
english: No, I mean, maybe in the little--going around thingy thing where bopper stole it from there.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F006
chinese: 好的。我只知道我现在应该有我的语言在这里。现在。但它不在这里。你应该帮助我，因为你在机场工作。所以给我我的行李，或告诉我它到底在哪里。
english: Okay. All I know is that I am supposed to have my language here right now. Right now. And it's not there. And you're supposed to help me because you work at the airport. So give me my luggage or tell me where the hell it is.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M005
chinese: 好的。我们可以获取您的姓名和信息，如果有任何消息，我们可以将其发送给您，无论您在哪里。
english: Okay. What can we do is we can get your name and information and if it shows up we can send it to you so-- Wherever you stay

name: Ses03F_impro05_F007
chinese: 你是什么意思，如果它出现了？不，我现在需要它。我有我的钥匙，我有我的钱包，我有我的钱。我在那里有价值数千美元的东西。
english: What do you mean, if it shows up? No, I need it now. I have my keys, I have my wallet, I have my money. I have thousands and thousands of dollars worth of stuff in there.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F008
chinese: 更不用说我还有我的工作在那里。
english: Not to mention I have my work in there.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M006
chinese: 好的，我会让你填写一些文件，看看你能否开始做一些事情。
english: Well, I'll have you fill out some paperwork and see if you can get started on something.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F009
chinese: 如果-如果它丢失了怎么办？那么，你们会为我做些什么？
english: And what if- what if it is lost? Well, what are you guys going to do for me?

name: Ses03F_impro05_M007
chinese: 你知道，我们会提出投诉，可能会替换一些东西。我想-
english: You know, we'll file a complaint and we could possibly, you know, replace some of the things. I think-

name: Ses03F_impro05_M008
chinese: 当你签署你的票时，我们可以替换掉袋子里大约百分之十五的物品。
english: and when you sign your ticket we could replace about fifteen percent of what's in the bag.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F010
chinese: 百分之十五？
english: Fifteen percent?

name: Ses03F_impro05_M009
chinese: 最高限额为二十五美元。
english: Up to a limit of twenty five dollars.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F011
chinese: 什么？那里-那里有价值数十万美元的东西。
english: What? There- There's hundreds of thousands of dollars worth of stuff in there.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M010
chinese: 哇，也许你应该想一想比只是放在袋子里更好的发送方式，嗯？你有考虑过这个吗？
english: Whoa, maybe you should uh- have thought of a better way to send it than just in a bag, hmm? Did you think about that?

name: Ses03F_impro05_F012
chinese: 不，不，不。你不明白。这些是我的行李里的东西。我去了巴黎。
english: No, no, no. You don't understand. This is--these are my belongings in the luggage. And I went to Paris.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F013
chinese: 先生，你为什么嘲笑我？这不好笑。
english: Sir, why are you laughing at me? This isn't funny.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M011
chinese: 我认为这有点愚蠢，你把几十万美元放在袋子里。
english: I think that's kind of stupid, that you put a hundred thousands of dollars in the bag.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F014
chinese: 对不起，如果我——不，这不是愚蠢的。你应该有我的行李。
english: Well I'm sorry, if I--no, it's not stupid. You are supposed to have my luggage.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M012
chinese: 你锁了吗-你甚至锁了吗？你可能甚至都没有锁。
english: Did you lock- Did you lock it even? You probably didn't even lock it.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F015
chinese: 不，他们说我不能锁住它。
english: No, they said I couldn't lock it.

name: Ses03F_impro05_MXX0
chinese: [笑声]，那是他们说的。
english: [LAUGHTER], That's what they say.

name: Ses03F_impro05_F016
chinese: 给我——我要和你的主管谈话。给我你的主管。我现在就要和你的主管谈话。
english: Give me--I'm going to talk to your supervisor. Give me your supervisor. I want to talk to your supervisor right now.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M013
chinese: 好的，让我去找他。哦，猜猜看谁是主管？是我。
english: Okay, let me get him.Oh, guess who the supervisor is? It's me.

name: Ses03F_impro05_M014
chinese: 你有什么问题吗？
english: What, do you have questions?

name: Ses03F_impro05_F017
chinese: 好的，我要C.E.O.。
english: Well, get- I want the C.E.O. then.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M000
chinese: 那么你认为怎么样？
english: So what do you think?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M001
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情？
english: About what I just said?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是。这是一个稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's a slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这是公关活动。我的意思是，有人向你兜售了关于这个即将在海滩上发生的美妙事件的好消息。
english: It's PR.  I mean, somebody sold you a good bill about this wonderful event that going to happen on the beach.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M003
chinese: 我不是唯一一个。看看这些人。
english: I'm not the only one.  Look at all these people.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F003
chinese: 是的。其他人也被卖了同样的东西。我的意思是，看，它让我们兴奋，让我们不断回来寻找更多，你知道的，让我们觉得生活随时都会开始。
english: Yeah.  Everyone else was sold the same thing.  I mean, look, it keeps us excited, it keeps us coming back for more and you know, keeps us thinking life's going to start any minute now.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F004
chinese: 看，对不起，但对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: Look, I'm sorry but it's still just fish to me.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M005
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F005
chinese: 只是...
english: It's just...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F006
chinese: 看，我们只是对这个夜晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: Look, we just have different ideas of what this night is supposed to be like.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M006
chinese: 没什么了不起的。Grinions到达，他们做他们的小鱼事务，你知道吗？我们哦，啊，看着鱼，然后他们回家，我们也回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  The Grunions arrive, they do their little fish business, you know?  We go oh, ahh, look at the fish and they go home and we go home.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F007
chinese: 求求你了，长大点吧。我们不会去看Grinons的。
english: For heavens sake, grow up.  We're not going to see the Grunions.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M007
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们从来不这样做，是吗？我们曾经吗？
english: We never do, do we?  Have we ever?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M008
chinese: 哦天哪。我们错过了他们两次，这几乎是不可能的。
english: Oh my gosh.  We missed them twice, that's hardly ever.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F009
chinese: 好的。两次是我们尝试的次数，而且这是有史以来的。
english: Okay.  Twice is as many times as we've tried and that's ever.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M009
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F010
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M010
chinese: 请不要误解，但是你来例假了吗？
english: Don't take this wrong but, are you having your period?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F011
chinese: 奥吉，该死，别问我那个。你总是问我那个。当你问我那个时，我讨厌。这是侮辱。
english: Augie, god dammit, don't ask me that.  You always ask me that.  I hate it when you ask me that.  It's insulting.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M011
chinese: 你有什么烦恼？
english: What's bugging you then?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F012
chinese: 看，这没意义。我们不会看到Grinons，我的意思是，这就像等待圣诞老人一样，你知道的，这就是...
english: Look, it's pointless.  It's...we're not going to see the Grunions I mean, it's like waiting around to see Santa Claus, you know, it's...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F013
chinese: 听着，我已经在这个海滩上等了一辈子，就站在那里等着这条鱼出现，但这些鱼从未出现过。
english: Listen, I've waiting my entire life on this beach just standing there waiting for this fish to show up and these fish never show up.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M012
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F014
chinese: 上帝，你什么都不懂。
english: God, you don't understand anything.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M013
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No, of course not.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F015
chinese: 我是的。我总是这样做。我一直在想，这一次会是不同的，但从来没有。
english: I do.  I always do.  I keep thinking, this time will be the time and it never is.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M014
chinese: 好的，我们要去看它。
english: Well, we're going to see it.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F016
chinese: 不，我们不会。我的意思是，天啊，这不是关于Augie的鱼。
english: No we won't.  I mean, God, this isn't about the fish Augie.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M015
chinese: 什么...我一直在努力，一直在试图找出我们出错的地方，但似乎无法确定那个时刻。
english: What...I've been trying to, I've been trying to figure out the point where we went wrong and I can't seem to pinpoint that moment.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M016
chinese: 你在和玛吉通电话时还好，晚餐还可以，洗碗也没问题。
english: You were fine during the phone call with Marge, dinner was okay, doing the dishes was no problem.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M017
chinese: 让我们看看，我洗了个澡，你在看新闻，你说嘿，嘿，今晚Grinons要来了，我说太好了，我们去吧，我今晚感觉很幸运。
english: Let's see I took a shower, you were watching the news, you said hey, hey the Grunions are running tonight and I said great let's go, I feel lucky tonight.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M018
chinese: 然后我把动物放到院子里，我把车从车库里开出来，穿上我的夹克。
english: And then I'm putting the animals out in the yard, I'm pulling the car out of the garage, putting my jacket on.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F017
chinese: 看，你还记得我们第一次来这里的时候吗？
english: Look, do you remember the first time we came here?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F018
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了。
english: We thought I was pregnant.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F019
chinese: 我们带了一瓶香槟，脱下鞋子，在沙滩上赤脚跳舞...
english: We brought a bottle of champagne and we took off our shoes and danced barefoot in the sand...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F020
chinese: 在月光下，你轻声对我耳语，让我能感受到你的话语。
english: Under the moon and you whispered so softly into my ear so I could feel your words.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F021
chinese: 我以为，这就是了。这就是我应该感到幸福的方式。
english: And I thought, this is it.  This is how happy I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M019
chinese: 等一下。我明白了。
english: Wait a minute.  I've got it.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F022
chinese: 什么？在沙滩上赤脚跳舞？喝着一瓶香槟？
english: What?  Dancing barefoot in the sand?  Drinking out of a bottle of champagne?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M020
chinese: 是在车里面吗？开车经过Knickerbocker酒水储藏室...
english: It was in the car right?  Driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M021
chinese: 你说让我们喝点香槟，我说时间在浪费，或者类似的话。
english: And you said let's get some champagne and I said time's a wasting or something like that.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M022
chinese: 你希望这次像上次一样吗？就是这样吗？
english: You want this to be like the other time right?  That's it right?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F023
chinese: 我宁愿不去记起某件事情...
english: I'd rather not remember something...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F024
chinese: 宁愿不对某事抱有希望。
english: Rather not hope for something.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M023
chinese: 好的，对的。我明白了。当然。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Okay, right.  I got it.  Sure.  Of course.  Listen, do you want to dance?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M024
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: Do you want me to get some champagne?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M025
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M026
chinese: 什么？你想让我在你耳边呼吸吗？
english: What?  Do you want me to breathe in your ear?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F028
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M027
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？什么？什么？你想离婚吗？度假？什么？地毯？贵宾犬？一篮水果？什么？自杀协议？你到底想要什么，卡拉？
english: Do you want to get married again? What? What?  Do you want a divorce? A vacation? What?  A carpet?  A poodle?  A basket of fruit?  What?  A suicide pact?  What the hell do you want Carla?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F029
english: No...No...No...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F030
chinese: 没有...
english: No...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F031
chinese: 我希望事情能按照它们应该的方式发展。
english: I want things to turn out the way that they're supposed to be.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M028
chinese: 欢迎来到人类世界。
english: Welcome to the human race.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M029
chinese: 你觉得这就是我心中所想的吗？四年后我们会结婚，来到海滩上争吵，还是为了鱼？不。
english: Do you think that this is what I had in mind?  That four years down the line that we'd get married and come to the beach and argue with each other over fish?  No.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M030
chinese: 我曾经和你一样。我以为一切都会是桃子和玫瑰，一切都会很美好，我们会感受到脚趾上的沙子和头发中的风，鱼儿会一直来，账单会自己付，我们会有三个胖乎乎的可爱孩子...
english: I was just like you.  I thought it was going to be all peaches and roses and everything great and the sand in our toes and the wind in our hair and the fish will always come and the bills will pay themselves and we'd have three big fat rosy kids...

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M031
chinese: ...而你知道吗？宝贝，这个笑话是对我们的。因为你知道你得到了什么吗？卡拉，你知道你得到了什么吗？你得到了这个。
english: ...and you know?  Baby the jokes on us.  Because you know what you get?  Do you know what you get Carla?  You get this.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F032
chinese: 这是什么...这是什么？这什么都不是。好吧。当然。站在海滩上，战斗和等待。
english: This what...what's this?  This isn't anything. Alright.  Sure.  Standing on the beach, fighting and waiting.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M032
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M033
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F033
chinese: 因为一切都不像我想象的那样。
english: Cause everything isn't anything like I thought it would be.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M034
chinese: 不。我知道。我也不。
english: No.  I know.  Me neither.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F034
chinese: 这只是这样的。你知道吗？我的意思是这很多，但它不是别的地方。你知道我想说什么吗？
english: This is just this.  You know?  I mean it's a lot and everything but it isn't somewhere else.  Do you know what I'm trying to say?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M035
chinese: 我正在尽力做到最好。
english: I'm trying to do the best I can.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F035
chinese: 我知道你是奥吉。我知道你希望今晚过得愉快。
english: I know you are Augie.  I know you wanted this evening to be nice.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F036
chinese: 我忍不住想着去别的地方。
english: I can't help thinking about being somewhere else.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M036
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起的话。
english: Maybe if you were with someone else too.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F037
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M037
chinese: 我知道。但是我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: I know.  But I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F038
chinese: 奥吉，无论我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: Augie, whatever I'm doing I'd rather be doing with you.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M038
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F039
chinese: 是的。你不知道吗？
english: Yeah.  Don't you know that?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F040
chinese: 如果有人想和其他人在一起，那很可能是你。可能是一个更喜欢享受自己的人，不那么固执的人。
english: If anybody wants to be with anybody else it's probably you.  Probably somebody who enjoys herself a little more and is not so hard.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M039
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我没有。
english: Actually, now that you mention it, no I don't.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F041
chinese: 嗯，我猜这个地方对于合适的人来说是错误的地方。
english: Well, I guess this is the wrong spot for the right people.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M040
chinese: 对我来说，这似乎是个不错的地方。
english: It seemed like a good spot to me.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M041
chinese: 我是说，看看我们从这里得到的月亮景色。
english: I mean look at the view of the moon we got from here.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F042
chinese: 是的。我注意到了。在水上真的很漂亮。
english: Yeah.  I noticed that.  It's real pretty on the water.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F043
chinese: 大而古老的白色月亮。
english: Big old white moon.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M042
chinese: 嘿，看看我们在这里找到了什么。
english: Hey, look what we got here.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F044
chinese: 哦，你带来了点心。
english: Oh you brought refreshments.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M043
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F045
chinese: 好吧，至少我们不需要眼镜。
english: Well at least we won't need glasses.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M044
chinese: 你还冷吗？你想回家吗？
english: Are you still cold?  Do you want to go home?

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F046
chinese: 不，我开始觉得你可能是对的。
english: No I'm beginning to think you might be right.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F047
chinese: 我想这可能是我们最终的去处。
english: I think this may be the place for us after all.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F048
chinese: 对不起，奥吉。
english: I am sorry Augie.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M045
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're very quiet the fish might come.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_F049
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses03M_script02_2_M046
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F000
chinese: 你好。
english: Hello.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M000
chinese: 你好？
english: Hello?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F001
chinese: 哦天哪，我终于弄到了...你知道我在排队等了多久吗？你让我等了整整五个小时。天啊。
english: Oh God I finally got...you know how long I've been waiting on line?  You put on hold for like five hours.  Geez.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M001
chinese: 对不起，女士。您的问题是什么性质的？但首先，能告诉我您的名字和姓氏吗？
english: I'm sorry ma'am.  What's the nature of your problem?  But first can I get you to tell me your first and last name?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F002
chinese: 我已经和这些人经历了五次这样的事情。我每天都在打电话。
english: I've already been through this five times with these people.  I've been calling every single day.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M002
chinese: 我知道，我只需要每次验证一下。对不起。
english: I know I just need to verify every time.  I'm sorry.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F003
chinese: 奥利维亚·布朗。
english: Olivia Brown.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M003
chinese: 好的，布朗女士，您的问题是什么性质的？
english: Alright Ms. Brown what's the nature of your problem?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F004
chinese: 嗯，我的手机不工作了，而且已经连续五天都不工作了。
english: Well my phone isn't working and it hasn't been working for the last five days.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M004
chinese: 哦，对不起。嗯，你是不是把它掉进水里了？
english: Oh.  I'm sorry. Um- Did you drop it in water?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F005
chinese: 是的，是的，是的，你最好道歉。
english: Yeah, yeah, yeah you better be sorry.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F006
chinese: 不，我没有把手机掉进水里。我不是五岁的孩子，随便看到手机就掉。好吧，这是我的事情。
english: No I did not drop my phone in water.  I'm not five years old and just dropped my phone anywhere I see it.  Okay this is my business.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F007
chinese: 好吗？而且它是[垃圾]。因为我的手机不工作，我没有座机，所以我的生意正在失败，而我现在真的无法处理这个问题。
english: Okay?  And it [GARBAGE]. My business is failing because my phone isn't working and I don't have a land line and I really can't handle this right now.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_MXX0
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M005
chinese: 嗯，这可能很容易。你还有其他症状吗？比如你不能接听电话——好的，你不能接听电话，没有收到电话。
english: Um- well it's probably easy.  Can you any more symptoms either you're not receiving calls----ok, you're not receiving calls, not getting calls.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F008
chinese: 症状-这是一个医生办公室。我没有接到电话...我无法接收- 不，它，它把我挂断了--
english: the symptoms- This [GARBAGE] a doctor's office. I'm not receiving calls...I can't receive- no, it's, it cuts me off--

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M006
chinese: 手机开机了吗？
english: Is the phone turned on?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F009
chinese: 是的，手机开机了。不，我是说我在使用它，而不是开机。当然它开机了。
english: Yes the phone turns on.  No I mean I'm using it not turning on the phone.  Of course it turns on.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M007
chinese: 好的，嗯-好吧。你的SIM卡在-没有掉出来-
english: Well, um- okay.  Your sim card is in- didn't fall out-

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F010
chinese: 不，我没有SIM卡，因为它是Verizon，而你们不使用SIM卡。
english: No- I don't have a sim card because it's Verizon and you guys don't use sim cards.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M008
chinese: 好的。嗯- 嗯，那可能就是问题所在。因为-
english: Alright.  Um- Well that could be the problem. cause--

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M009
chinese: 你可能有一部较旧的手机，我们可能会使用SIM卡，但可能不会。
english: you might have an older phone where we would use sim cards but probably not.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F011
chinese: 好的，不行。先生，这是交易。我的手机不工作，我不在乎问题是什么，但它需要工作。这就是为什么我付钱给你们修理的原因。
english: Okay no.  Sir, this is the deal.  My phone isn't working and I don't care what the problem is but it needs to work.  That's why I'm paying you guys to fix it.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M010
chinese: 好的。我们将给您发送一部全新的带有手掌助手的相机手机-和-
english: Okay.  How about this we'll send you a brand new camera phone with palm pilot-- and-

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F012
chinese: 我甚至不知道如何使用那个东西，它太复杂了。我只是希望我的翻盖手机能够工作——这就是我所需要的。
english: I don't know even how to use that stuff it's too complicated.  I just want my flip phone to work----that's all I need

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M011
chinese: 所以我们会发送它-并且我们会给你，一个免费一年的服务怎么样？
english: So we'll send it- And we'll give you, how about a free year's service?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F013
chinese: 看，我一直在路上。你明白有多重要吗？我是一个女人，一个独自工作的单身母亲...什么？
english: Look, I am on the road all the time.  Do you understand how important?  I'm a woman, a single mother by herself working...what?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M012
chinese: 告诉他们我的名字。我的名字是Brent Backersen。
english: Tell them my name.  My name is Brent Backersen.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F014
chinese: 布伦特·巴克森，我正在把这个写下来，布伦特·巴克森。好的。
english: Brent Backersen, I am writing this down, Brent Backersen.  Alright.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M013
chinese: 好的。告诉他们我的身份证号码是二一三五。
english: Okay.  Tell them my - my ID number is two one three five.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M014
chinese: 告诉他们。你可以进去，买一部全新的手机，他们会为你提供服务，甚至还会给你免费三个月。
english: Tell them that.  You can go in, get a brand new phone, they'll hook you up with service even give you a free three months--

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F015
chinese: 我，我，我不想要合同。好的。我不想要任何合同。
english: I, I, I don't want a contract. Okay. I don't want any contracts.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M015
chinese: 它将是免费的。没有合约，可以吗？
english: It will be free.  No contract okay?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F016
chinese: 真的吗？没有合同吗？
english: Really?  No contract?

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M016
chinese: 进去那里，是的，进去那里。告诉他们是Brent Backersen推荐的。
english: Go in there, yeah, go in there.  Tell them Brent Backersen sent you.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F017
chinese: 我想要最好的相机手机。我想要真的很好的那种。
english: I want the best freaking camera phone there is though.  I want the really good kind--

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M017
chinese: 顶级相机手机，游戏机，任何你想要的东西。免费的。还有掌上电脑。
english: the top of the line camera phone, game boy, anything you want. For free. And palm pilot.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F018
chinese: 和手掌式计算机。
english: And palm pilot.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F019
chinese: 充电器和配件，我想要一个粉色的保护套。
english: And charger and accessories and I want a cover that's pink.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M018
chinese: 他们可能只有橙子。
english: They might only have orange.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F020
chinese: 不
english: no

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M019
chinese: 好的。他们可以为你找到粉色的东西。所以你进去告诉他们这个，他们会给你其他好东西，像免费服务、没有合同、没有任何限制。只是因为你是一个好顾客。
english: Okay.  They can figure out pink for you.  So go in there and just tell them that and they'll hook you up with other goodies, stuff like that free service, no contract, no nothing.  Just for being a good customer

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M020
chinese: 并与我们一起奋斗。
english: and battling through with us.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F021
chinese: 好的。嗯，我猜，我猜那还可以，但是，
english: Alright. Well-  I guess - I guess that's okay but,

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F022
chinese: 你最好答应我。
english: you better promise me.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M021
chinese: 是的。你只需要告诉他们是Brent Backersen推荐的。
english: Yes.  You just tell them Brent Backersen sent you.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F023
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_M022
chinese: 好吗？太好了。晚上好。
english: Alright?  Great.  Have a nice evening.

name: Ses03M_impro08b_F024
chinese: 好的，谢谢。
english: Alright Thanks.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M000
chinese: 嘿，伊莎贝拉。
english: Hey, Isabella.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F000
chinese: 嘿，乔，最近怎么样？
english: Hey, how's it going, Joe?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M001
chinese: 我没事。
english: I'm all right.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F001
chinese: 嗯，所以我有一些好消息。
english: Uh-, So I got some good news.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M002
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F002
chinese: 是的。
english: Yep.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M003
chinese: 你没有怀孕或者其他什么。
english: You're not pregnant or anything.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F003
chinese: 怀孕？你在说什么？不。
english: Pregnant? What are you talking about? No.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M004
chinese: 我知道你一直在努力要孩子，对吗？
english: I know you've been trying to have a baby, right?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F004
chinese: 我有一些比那个更好的消息。
english: I have some better news than that.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M005
chinese: 哦，真的吗？
english: Oh, really?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F005
chinese: 是的，你在这个世界上最想要的是什么？
english: Yes, What would you want more than anything in this world?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M006
chinese: 一块巧克力蛋糕？
english: A chocolate cake?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F006
chinese: 对于我可能在洛杉矶待下去怎么样？
english: How about maybe for me to possibly stay in L.A.?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M007
chinese: 哦，哇。你进去了吗？
english: Oh, wow. You got in?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M008
chinese: 哪一个？
english: Which one?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F007
chinese: 我收到了美国南加州大学的录取通知。是的，我收到了录取信。
english: I got--U.S.C.. I got- Yeah, I got the acceptance letter.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M009
chinese: 哦，真的吗？
english: oh really?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M010
chinese: 你进去了？哇。
english: You got in? Wow.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F008
chinese: 是的，我进去了。非常感谢你。
english: Yes, me, I got in. Thank you very much.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M011
chinese: 好好的，适合你。
english: Good for you.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F009
chinese: 是的，我知道，我妈妈给我打电话了。我当时和我的女朋友在波士顿，然后她收到了这封信，给我打电话说不知道要不要打开。我说是的，打开吧。她打开后说，噢，对不起，娜特。
english: Yeah, I know, my mom called me. I was with my girlfriend in Boston, and uh- she got the letter and she called me, she said I don't know, do you want me to open it? And I was like yes, open it. And she opened it and she goes oh, I'm sorry, Nat.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F010
chinese: 然后我就像什么？她就像，你知道的，你没有被录取。完全不在意。就像我没有被录取一样。然后我就像，我差点哭了。
english: And I was like what? She's like, you know, you didn't get in. Totally plays it off. Like I didn't get in. And I'm like, I start almost crying.

name: Ses03F_impro07_MXX0
chinese: 嗯嗯，嗯嗯。
english: Uh-huh, uh-huh.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F011
chinese: 然后我妈妈就像是娜塔莉，娜塔莉，这是垃圾，你知道吗-
english: And my mom was like Natalie, Natalie, it's [GARBAGE], you know-

name: Ses03F_impro07_M012
chinese: 哦，是的。
english: oh yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F012
chinese: 所以，我的意思是，我进去了。
english: and so, I mean, I got in.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M013
chinese: 哦，耶稣。那太令人惊叹了。
english: Oh, Jesus. That is so amazing.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F013
chinese: 所以现在我可以留在这里，现在我们可以聚会。我知道。
english: So now I can stay here and now we can party. I know.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M014
chinese: 派对。你今晚想喝醉吗？
english: Party. You want to get drunk tonight?

name: Ses03F_impro07_F014
chinese: 是的，为什么不呢。
english: Yeah, why not.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M015
chinese: 是的，我们要庆祝。
english: Yeah, we're going to celebrate.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F015
chinese: 我们还不到二十一岁，但无论如何。
english: We're not twenty one yet, but whatever.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M016
chinese: 是的，我只有十八岁，所以去喝醉吧。
english: Yeah, I'm only eighteen so it's--go get drunk.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F016
chinese: [笑声] 我太兴奋了，乔。哦，天啊，我--而且我被录取了--我进了戏剧学院，所以就像是-
english: [LAUGHTER]. I'm so excited, Joe. Oh, man, I-- And I got in--I got into the school of theatre, so it's like-

name: Ses03F_impro07_M017
chinese: 该死。那是-
english: Shit. That's-

name: Ses03F_impro07_M018
chinese: 哦，我的天。那个...我听说它在格劳曼评分中排名前五，或者类似的。
english: Oh, my God. That's--I heard it's top five-- --in the Grauman scale or something.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F017
chinese: 是的。真的很酷。
english: Yeah. It's really cool.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F018
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F019
chinese: 全国前五名。
english: Top five in the nation.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M019
chinese: 谁-呜呜呜。阿克-演戏裤子。
english: Who-whooooo. Miss Acti- Acting Pants.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F020
chinese: 演戏的裤子？那你打算做什么？你会...你会...你会留在这里，对吗？
english: Acting Pants? So what are you going to do? Are you--you're be--you're going to stay here, right?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M020
chinese: 行动-表演裤。
english: Acti- acting pants.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M021
chinese: 我被录取到了艺术学院的电影学院。
english: I got into film school at the Art Academy.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F021
chinese: 太棒了。我们两个都要去洛杉矶。
english: Awesome. We're both going to be in L.A.

name: Ses03F_impro07_MXX1
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Uh-huh.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M022
chinese: 所以我要做电影 - 是的。我要拍电影，你会在其中出演。
english: So I'm going to be--yeah. I'm going to make films; you're going to be in them.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F022
chinese: 我太兴奋了。是的，我以为我要去波士顿，但后来--
english: I'm so excited. Yeah, I thought I was going to go to Boston, but then--

name: Ses03F_impro07_M023
chinese: 操你波士顿。
english: Fuck Boston.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F023
chinese: 哦，天啊，我太兴奋了。有这么多事情要做。
english: Oh man, I'm so excited. So much to do.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M024
chinese: 波士顿闻起来很臭。洛杉矶要凉快得多。
english: Boston smells bad. L.A. is so much cooler.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F024
chinese: 这里有很多文化，你知道吗？就像是所有伟大的餐厅和……
english: There's so much culture here, you know? It's just like-- --all great restaurants and-

name: Ses03F_impro07_MXX2
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F025
chinese: 我太兴奋了，开始我的生活。
english: I'm just so excited to start my life.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M025
chinese: 我们应该去小埃塞俄比亚。
english: We should uh- go to Little Ethiopia.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F026
chinese: 哦，然后你坐下来，吃海绵面包，喝啤酒。嗯，我喜欢那个东西。我太兴奋了。
english: Oh, and you sit down and you have the sponge bread-- --and eat the--drink the beer. Ugh, I love that stuff. I'm so excited.

name: Ses03F_impro07_MXX3
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F027
chinese: 你打算什么时候来和我一起住在我的宿舍里？
english: Are you going to come stay in my dorm with me sometime?

name: Ses03F_impro07_M026
chinese: 嘿，是的。晕倒。
english: Hell, yeah. Pass out.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F028
chinese: 是的。我会买一个那种小的--
english: Yeah. I'll get like one of those little--

name: Ses03F_impro07_F029
chinese: 是的。那些小小的床垫。我会把它放在床边。
english: Yeah. Those little-- --mattresses. I'll put it by my bed.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M027
english: -drunk.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M028
chinese: 不，我会睡在你的床上。依偎在一起。
english: No, I'll sleep in your bed. Cuddle up.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F030
chinese: 哦，我不这么认为。嗯嗯，不。
english: Oh, I don't think so. Hmm-mm. No.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M029
chinese: 哦哦。
english: Uh-oh.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F031
chinese: 那将会被保留给其他人。
english: That's going to--that'll be reserved for somebody else.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M030
chinese: 噢，嘿。新生荡妇。那是你需要的。
english: Oh, hey. Freshman slut. That's you gona need.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F032
chinese: [笑声] 你好吗？我不是。
english: [LAUGHTER] Hello? I am not.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M031
chinese: 那就是你必须经历的，大一的时候。
english: That's what you got to be though, freshman year.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F033
chinese: 不，我不是那样的。
english: No, I don't. I'm not like that.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M032
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M033
chinese: 好吧，要习惯这个。
english: Well, get used to it.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F034
chinese: [笑声] 不，你会习惯的。
english: [LAUGHTER]. No, you'd get used to it.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M034
chinese: 嘿，我已经习惯了。
english: Hey, I'm already getting used to it.

name: Ses03F_impro07_F035
chinese: [笑声] 哦，乔，我太开心了。
english: [LAUGHTER]. Oh, Joe, I'm so happy.

name: Ses03F_impro07_M035
chinese: 我也是，伊莎贝拉。
english: Me too, Isabella.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前和他谈谈。
english: What's he going to say?  Maybe we ought to talk to him before he sees it.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F001
chinese: 你是什么意思。他不可能看到它。我是第一个起床的，他还在床上。
english: What do you mean. He couldn't have seen it. I was the first one up, he was still in bed.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M001
chinese: 当这件事发生时，他在那里。
english: He was out there when it happened.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约凌晨四点。我听到一声裂响，我往外看，他就站在那里，就在那时发生了。
english: About four in the morning.  I heard a crack and I looked out and he was standing right there when it happened.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点出去做什么了？
english: Well what was he doing out at four in the morning?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。但是在它破裂后，他跑回房子里，在厨房里哭了起来。
english: I don't know. But after it cracked he ran back into the house and he cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不。我觉得最好的办法是让他一个人呆着。
english: No.  I figured the best thing to do was leave him alone.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以透过地板听到它。
english: I could hear it right through the floor.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F006
chinese: 上帝，他到底在那里做什么？
english: God, what was he doing out there anyway?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F007
chinese: 开始再次梦见他。他又在夜晚四处走动。
english: Starting to dream about him again.  He's walking around at night again.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F008
chinese: 他现在变得和他死后一样了，你知道吗？这是什么意思？
english: He's getting just like he did after he died, you know?  What, what, what's the meaning of this?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道。但是妈妈，我知道一件事，我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know.  But I know one thing mom, we made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F009
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。这种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  That kind of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们还让他以为我们都相信他呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back and I know that too.  Why we both go on letting him think that we both believe with him.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你打算做什么？你想和他争论吗？
english: What are you going to do?  You want to argue with him?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M010
chinese: 不，我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到没有人再相信拉里会回来了。
english: No I don't want to argue with him but, it's time that he realizes that nobody believes Larry's coming back anymore.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他晚上不可以四处走动并梦见他？四处走动。为什么他不可以四处走动？为什么他不可以梦见他，晚上四处走动等待他？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直截了当地说我们没有希望了？
english: Why shouldn't he walk around and dream at him at night.  Walk around.  Why shouldn't he walk around?  Why shouldn't he dream of him, walk around at night waiting for him?  Do we contradict him?  Do we say flat out that we don't have anymore hope?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们现在已经多年没有希望了吗？
english: That we haven't had any hope for years now?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M013
chinese: 我们得对他说出来。
english: We got to say it to him.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F013
chinese: 你打算如何证明它？你能证明吗？
english: How are you going to prove it?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M014
chinese: 拉里已经离开了三年。天哪，三年后没有人会回来。这太疯狂了。
english: Larry's been gone for three years.  For god sakes no one comes back after three years.  It's insane.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F014
chinese: 对你来说可能是这样，对我来说也是，但对你父亲来说不是。我的意思是，
english: To you maybe, to me, but not to your father.  I mean,

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F015
chinese: 他仍然认为自己还活着。我的意思是，你可以说得滔滔不绝，但没有尸体，也没有坟墓，那你在哪里呢？
english: he still thinks he's alive still.  I mean you could talk yourself blue in the face and there's no body and there's no grave so where are you?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M015
chinese: 妈妈，请坐下。我想和你谈谈。
english: Listen mom, just, sit down.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F016
chinese: 不，这是他该死的报纸。现在每个月都有一个新的男孩回家，而Larry将是下一个。
english: No.  It's his god damned newspapers is what it is.  Now every month there's a new boy comes home and Larry's going to be the next one.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M016
chinese: 好的。好的。好的，请听着。
english: Alright. Alright. Alright just listen.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M017
chinese: 你知道我为什么请安妮来这里吗？
english: You know why I asked Annie here, right?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F017
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M018
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F018
chinese: 嗯，我有一个想法，但我不知道。故事是什么？
english: Well I have an idea but I don't know.  What's the story?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M019
chinese: 我想要向她求婚。
english: I want to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F019
chinese: 好吧，那是你的事，克里斯。
english: Well that's your business Chris.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M020
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not just my business.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好吧，你想让我做什么？我的意思是，你已经够大了，应该知道自己想要什么。
english: Well what do you want me to do?  I mean, you're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M021
chinese: 好的。那么没问题。我会继续进行。
english: Okay.  So then it's alright.  I'll go ahead with it.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F021
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，你必须确保你爸爸不会去做这件事--
english: Well, I mean, you got to make sure your dad's not going--

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M022
chinese: 哦，那么这就不关我的事了。天哪，有时候你真让我生气。如果爸爸发脾气，这也不关我的事吗？嗯？天哪，你真擅长忽视事情。
english: Oh see then it's just not my business. God you infuriate me sometimes.  Isn't my business too if dad throws a fit?  Huh?  God you have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F022
chinese: 好吧，我只是在说--
english: Well I'm just saying--

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F023
chinese: 你知道我忽略了我需要忽略的东西。
english: You know I ignore what I got to ignore.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F024
chinese: 她不是...她是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not...she's Larry's girl.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F025
chinese: 从你父亲的角度来看，他还活着，如果你试图带走她，那就不公平。你不能这样做。
english: From your father's point of view he is still alive and if you try and take her that's just not fair.  You can't do that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我想要去追求某样东西时，我都不得不退缩。
english: I don't know why it is but every time I reach out for something I want I have to pull back

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F026
chinese: 而且-而且-而且，如果你从那里继续，如果你已经知道从那里继续，那么你可以。但是我告诉你的是，我不知道该去哪里。你明白吗？我的意思是，你明白吗？
english: And-And-And if you go on from there if you know already to go on from there, then you can.  But I'm telling you something that I don't know where to go.  You got it?  I mean, do you?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M025
chinese: 因为其他人会受苦。
english: Because other people will suffer.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我的整个、血腥的一生，一次又一次。
english: My whole entire, bloody life time and time again.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F027
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。在这一点上没有任何问题。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There is nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好吧，见鬼去吧。
english: Well to hell with that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F028
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Did you ask Annie yet?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M028
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F029
chinese: 如果她不嫁给你呢？如果她和你父亲有同样的感受呢？
english: And what if she doesn't marry you huh?  What if she feels the same way your father does?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M029
chinese: 那么我猜这就是结束了。
english: Then I guess that's the end of it.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M030
chinese: 但是从她的信中，我觉得她已经忘记了他。我会找出真相的。
english: But from her letters I think she's forgotten him.  I'll find out.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M031
chinese: 然后我们会和爸爸好好谈一谈，对吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: And then we'll thrash it out with dad right?  Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F030
chinese: 看，你从来没有见过很多很多的女人。你知道吗？我的意思是...
english: Look, you never had seen many, many women.  You know?  I mean...

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M032
chinese: 那又怎样？我只是对女人不太擅长。
english: Well so what?  I'm just not fast with women.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F031
chinese: 嗯，我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: Well I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M033
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F032
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的回答，但是它并没有回答任何问题。你自从去参加战争以来就没有见过她，已经过去五年了。
english: Well that's a good answer but, it doesn't answer anything.  You haven't seen her since you left to go to the war and it's been five years.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M034
chinese: 这只是...事情就是这样。这就是我的感受。你知道，这些年来，每当我想到想要嫁给某人时，我就会想到安妮。你想要一个图表吗？
english: It's just...that's just the way it is.  That's how I feel.  You know these years when I think of someone I want to marry I think of Annie.  What do you want a diagram?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F033
chinese: 不，我不想要一个图表。
english: No I don't want a diagram.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F034
chinese: 他认为他会回来。而你却去娶了那个女孩，你只是宣布他死了，他会怎么样？我不知道。你知道吗？我是说，我不知道。
english: He thinks he's coming back. And you go off and marry that girl and you're just pronouncing him dead and what's going to happen to him?  I don't know.  Do you?  I mean, I don't know.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M035
chinese: 好的，那么。
english: Alright then.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F035
chinese: 看，只是好好考虑一下好吗？
english: Look, just give it some thought okay?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M036
chinese: 我已经思考了三年，我认为如果我等待，爸爸会忘记拉里，然后我们可以有一个正常的婚礼，一切都幸福。
english: I've given it three years of thought and I thought that if I waited then dad would forget about Larry and then we could have a regular wedding and everything happy.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M037
chinese: 但是如果我在这里得不到那个，我会离开。
english: But if I can't have that here I'll get out.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F036
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M038
chinese: 我会离开。我会在别的地方和她结婚。也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll marry her somewhere else.  Maybe New York.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F037
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了。一个好傻瓜，我已经受够了。
english: I've been a good son too long.  A good sucker and I'm through with it.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F038
chinese: 你就这样离开生意吗？你在这里有一家生意。你不能这样做。
english: You're just going to leave the business?  You have a business here.  You can't do that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M040
chinese: 这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F039
chinese: 哦，你必须要有灵感。
english: Oh, you have to be inspired.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M041
chinese: 是的。我每天喜欢它一个小时。如果我必须整天为钱而努力，至少在晚上我希望它美丽。我想要一个家庭。我想要一个妻子。我想要一些孩子。我想要建立一些我可以奉献自己的东西。
english: Yes.  I like it an hour out of the day.  If I have to grub for money all day long at least at evening I want it beautiful.  I want a family.  I want a wife.  I want some kids.  I want to build something I can give myself to.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M042
chinese: 现在安妮正处在这一切的中间。我在哪里找到它？
english: Now Annie is in the middle of all that.  Where do I find it?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F040
chinese: 告诉我一些事情。你可以离开这个生意吗？
english: Tell me something.  You can leave this business?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M043
chinese: 是的。在这个问题上，我会这样做。
english: Yes.  On this I would.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F041
chinese: 你不能那样说话。
english: You can't talk like that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M044
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F042
chinese: 好吧，但你不能这样说话，你听到了吗？
english: Alright but you can't talk like that you hear?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F043
chinese: 我是说我们到底为什么努力工作？我的意思是，这一切都是为了你，克里斯。整个计划都是为了你。
english: I mean what the hell have we worked for then?  I mean, it's all for you Chris.  The whole shooting match is for you.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M045
chinese: 我知道。只要你帮助我留在这里。
english: I know.  Just you help me stay here.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F044
chinese: 好吧，但你不要这样说话，听到了吗？你不要这样说。
english: Alright but you don't talk like that you hear?  You don't.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M046
chinese: 我是这样想的。
english: I am thinking like that.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F045
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you do I?

name: Ses03M_script01_1_M047
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强硬的人。
english: No you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses03M_script01_1_F046
chinese: 是的。我能看到。
english: Yeah.  I can see that.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M000
chinese: 嘿，现在几点了？这大概是在午夜左右吧？天啊，这太棒了，不是吗？
english: Hey, what time is it?  This pokes around midnight right?  God this is great isn't it?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M001
chinese: 看看我们得到的夜晚。我不会为任何事情而交换这个。
english: Look at the night we got.  I wouldn't trade this for anything.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M002
chinese: 你知道吗，实际上我想往海岸线更远的地方去，远离所有的灯光和人群，但我担心你会错过它。你好吗？
english: You know actually I wanted to go a little further up the coast and get away from all the lights and people but I was afraid you'd miss it.  How are you doing?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M003
chinese: 那是，那是，不，那只是保罗吗？我甚至都分不清楚。
english: Is that, is that, nah, is that just Paul?  I can't even tell.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M004
chinese: 但是如果我无法辨认，那很可能不是他们，不是吗？很可能会一目了然，你认为呢？你好吗？
english: But if I can't tell, it probably isn't them isn't it?  Probably would be unmistakable wouldn't you think?  How are you doing?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M005
chinese: 哦，你知道我忘了什么吗？我忘了带手电筒。我怎么会这么愚蠢呢？我应该带上我的手电筒。
english: Oh, you know what I forgot?  I forgot my flashlight.  How could I be so stupid?  I should've brought my flashlight.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M006
chinese: 你知道，手电筒，那个银色的？只有一个，对吗？
english: You know, the flashlight, the silver one?  There's only one isn't there?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F002
chinese: 这不是你的手电筒。
english: It's not your flashlight.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M007
chinese: 好的，这是谁的？
english: Well, whose is it?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的。也是我的。
english: It's ours.  Mine too.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M008
chinese: 好的，当然可以。
english: Well, sure.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F004
chinese: 嗯，你一直说这是我的手电筒，好像只有你一个人有手电筒一样。我的意思是，你觉得这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: Well, you keep saying it's my flashlight like it's only your flashlight.  I mean, how do you think that makes me feel?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M009
chinese: 当然，我们的手电筒。你的和我的。我的手电筒是苏手电筒，当然。
english: No.  Of course, our flashlight.  Yours and mine.  Me flashlight is su flashlight, naturally.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M010
chinese: 我们怎么会没想到带它呢？我希望月亮能一直出来。
english: How could we have not thought to bring it?  I hope the moon stays out.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M011
chinese: 去年他们在跑步时是满月吗？我记不清了。你记得吗？
english: Was it a full moon last year when they were running?  I can't remember.  Do you remember?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M012
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Are you cold?  Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M013
chinese: 我们应该带来毯子，我们的毯子。
english: We should've brought the blanket, our blanket.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M014
chinese: 上帝。哦，你知道现在什么会很好吗？一打啤酒。一打啤酒正好合适。
english: God.  Oh, you know what would be good right about now?  A six-pack.  A six-pack would be just the ticket.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M015
chinese: 我太蠢了，我应该带了一个六瓶装的。天啊，我就像个小孩子。真不可思议，我居然能够把拉链拉好出门。哦——【笑声】
english: I'm so stupid, I should've brought a six-pack.  God, I'm like a little kid.  It's amazing I get out of the house with my fly zipped up. Oh- [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M016
chinese: 我想知道他们是否能听到我们说话？或者当我们在沙滩上移动时能感受到振动吗？
english: I wonder if they can hear us talk?  Or feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F006
chinese: 看，我冷。
english: Look, I'm cold.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M017
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F007
chinese: 已经过了十一点了，我们走吧。
english: It's past eleven, let's go.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M018
chinese: 什么？你在开玩笑吗？我们刚到这里。我们错过了。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里有什么意义呢？
english: What?  Are you kidding me?  We just got here.  We miss it.  What's the point of coming down here if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M019
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M020
chinese: 这也是我的观点...不，不，那不是我的观点。我的观点是，如果我们下来了，却只是转身离开，那还有什么意义呢？
english: That's my point too...No.  No.  That's not my point.  My point is what's the point if we come down here if we just turn around and leave?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F010
chinese: 那么，让我们走吧。
english: So let's go.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M021
chinese: 我是说，你不想看吗？
english: I mean, don't you want to see it?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M022
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我不知道。我就是不知道。
english: I don't know.  I just don't.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M023
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。它每年只发生一次。想想堪萨斯的人们，他们得预订酒店和机票才能来看这个。而我们只有四十分钟的路程。这太好了，不能错过。
english: Honey, this is a natural phenomenon.  It only happens once a year.  I mean think about the people in Kansas, they would have to get hotel reservations and plane tickets to come and see this.  We're only forty minutes away.  This is too good to pass up.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这些鱼游到岸边，到沙滩上，然后他们会扑腾一下，然后游走，然后死去。
english: Pass up what?  These fish swim up to shore, on the beach and then they flop around a little, they swim away and then they die.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M024
chinese: 好吧，这就像是他们生命中的亮点，他们一生中的那个晚上，那种蹦来蹦去的行为，就是产卵或者交配，或者你怎么称呼它。
english: Well this is like the highlight, the one night of their lives and that flopping around, that's laying eggs or spawning or mating or whatever you call it.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M025
chinese: 但对于这些人来说，这是他们的重要之夜。他们的最后一次，生命中最后一次的狂欢。
english: But this is the big night for these guys.  Their last, life's last orgy.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？我的意思是，这不像是登上月球那样重要。我是说，这只是鱼，没人吃的鱼而已。
english: What are you getting so excited about?  I mean, it's not like it's like the landing on the moon or something.  I mean, it's just fish, fish that nobody eats.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M026
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah they do.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F015
chinese: 奥吉。
english: Augie.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M027
chinese: 好的。但是它是一种其他鱼类所没有的行为。就像卡皮斯特拉诺的燕子或者那些跳下悬崖的旅鼠一样，这里有魔力，有一些神秘和一点无法解释的东西。
english: Okay.  But it's fish that do something that no other fish do.  Like the swallows in Capistrano or the Lemmings that throw themselves off the cliffs, there's magic here and some mystery and a little bit of unexplainable.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M028
chinese: 我是说，我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: I mean, I can't see how you can not be interested.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M029
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M030
chinese: 我不明白。我是说第一次我们来看的时候，你说那是你一生中最美好的夜晚。
english: I don't get it.  I mean the first time we came to see it, you said it was the best night of your life.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M031
chinese: 去年我们来的时候，你跑得那么快，结果撞到了脚趾头，直到我们上车后你才注意到。
english: And last year when we came you ran out of the house so fast you stubbed your toe and you didn't even notice it until we got in the car.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F018
chinese: 你还记得我内裤里进了沙子，我们因为无关紧要的事情争吵了，你嗓子疼，我们甚至没能看到Grinons。
english: You also could remember that I got sand in my panties, we got in an argument over nothing, you got a sore throat and we didn't even get to see the Grunions.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M032
chinese: 好的。我们处于一个好位置。
english: Okay.  We're in a good spot.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F019
chinese: 你第一次也没有看到他们。
english: You didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M033
chinese: 我们只是没有处在一个好位置。这个位置要好得多。你知道，我对这些事情有很好的直觉。
english: We just weren't in the good spot.  This is a much better spot.  You know, I have a good instincts for these things.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M034
chinese: 看，那是...不，那只是海草吗？
english: Look, is that...no is that just seaweed?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M035
chinese: 你知道的，这真是太棒了，不是吗？你知道的，我不会为任何事情而交换这个。
english: You know, this is great isn't it?  You know, I wouldn't trade this for anything.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M036
chinese: 我是说，想想这个，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请花一分钟思考一下。
english: I mean, think about this, I know you're not interested but just think about this for a minute.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M037
chinese: 在某个地方，有一大群银色的鱼正朝这个方向游来，他们不知道为什么，我们也不知道为什么，他们只是因为身体里突然有了一些本能的火花而前进...
english: Somewhere out there, there's this huge silver mass of fish heading this way, they don't why, we don't know why, they just some little instinctual fire cracker went off in their bodies...

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M038
chinese: ...就像他们都突然一起转身，排成一条长达加利福尼亚海岸的队伍，然后开始朝这边游过来。他们没有，你知道的，他们没有做出决定，他们没有，你知道的，也没有船只之类的东西。没有人给他们发邀请函或地图，他们只是开始游泳，好像那是唯一重要的事情。
english: ...like and they all just turned at once and formed a line as long as the California coast and started swimming this way.  They didn't, you know, they didn't make a decision, they didn't, you know, have boats or anything.  No one sent them an invitation or a map, they just started swimming as if that's the only thing that matters.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M039
chinese: 这是没有思维的单一目标。这是纯粹的迫切感，他们不会，他们不会问它问题，也不会给它一个名字，他们只是游泳。
english: It's single mindedness with no mind.  It's urgency that's pure urge and they don't, they don't ask it a question, they don't give it a name, they just swim.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M040
chinese: 他们只是开始游泳到我们站立的这个地方，为了大规模的性和死亡庆祝活动。
english: They just start swimming to this place right here where we stand for massive celebration of sex and death.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M041
chinese: 哦，我自己把自己吓得起鸡皮疙瘩了。看，我所有的头发都竖起来了。
english: Oh, I'm giving myself goose bumps.  Look, all my hairs are standing up.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M042
chinese: 【呼吸声】那么你觉得呢？
english: [BREATHING] So what do you think?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F021
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M043
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情？
english: About what I just said?

name: Ses03M_script02_1_F022
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses03M_script02_1_M044
chinese: 这肯定不是。它是。
english: It certainly is not.  It's

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F000
chinese: 先生，我可以帮助您吗？
english: Can I help you sir?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M000
chinese: 是的，你可以帮助我。我的行李在哪里？
english: Yes you can help me.  Where is my luggage?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F001
chinese: 好的，让我为您查一下。您来自哪里？
english: Well, let me just check on that for you.  Where are you coming--?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M001
chinese: 是的。你这样做吧。我来自巴尔的摩。你知道那是哪里吗？
english: Yeah.  You do that.  I'm coming from Baltimore.  You know where that is?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F002
chinese: 先生，是的，它在马里兰州。没关系...嗯，我...让我在这里检查一下。
english: Sir, yes it's in Maryland.  It's okay...well, I'm...just let me check here.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M002
chinese: 我有八百磅的行李。
english: I had eight hundred pounds of luggage.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F003
chinese: 好的。先生？您能...如果您能给我一点时间，让我检查一下好吗？
english: Okay.  Sir?  Can you...if you just give me one moment and let me just check okay?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M003
chinese: 好的。检查。
english: Okay.  Check.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F004
chinese: 好的。你是从巴尔的摩飞往洛杉矶国际机场对吗？
english: Alright.  And you're coming-- Wait, hold on sir.  You're coming from Baltimore into LAX right?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M004
chinese: 它在那里吗？
english: Is it there?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F005
chinese: 好的，这是直飞航班吗？
english: Okay and this is direct flight?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M006
chinese: 你不知道我们在哪里吗？
english: You don't know where we're at?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M007
chinese: 上帝。
english: God.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F006
chinese: 我在问你这是从巴尔的摩到洛杉矶的直飞航班还是需要停靠吗？
english: I'm asking you if this is direct flight from Baltimore to LAX or if you have to stop--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M008
chinese: 你知道我已经在这里等了四个小时了，等我的行李。
english: You know I've been waiting here for four hours for my luggage

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M009
chinese: 而且它不在这里，他们告诉我去找这个人，去找这个人。现在我就在这个人这里。
english: and it's not here, they told me to go to this person, go to this person.  Now I'm at this person.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F007
chinese: 你在我这里，我会尽力帮助您，先生，但您必须与我合作。
english: You're at me and I'm going to try to help you out sir but you just have to cooperate with me--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M010
chinese: 好的。你想要什么？
english: Okay.  What do you want?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F008
chinese: 你托运了多少件行李？
english: How many pieces of luggage do you have checked in?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M011
chinese: 八。而且它们都消失了。
english: Eight.  And they're all gone.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F009
chinese: 八件行李。好的。
english: Eight pieces of luggage.  Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M012
chinese: 你打算怎么办？你打算打电话给别人吗？你打算把我送到别的地方吗？
english: And what are you going to do about it?  You going to call someone?  You going to send me somewhere else?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F010
chinese: 不，我只是要去检查一下--
english: No.  I'm just going to check--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M013
chinese: 明天是我母亲的葬礼，骨灰盒在行李箱里。
english: It's my mother's funeral tomorrow and the urn is in the suitcase.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F011
chinese: 对不起，先生。
english: I'm sorry sir.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M014
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F012
chinese: 对不起，但我们立即检查一下。这绝对是一个紧急情况。看起来--
english: I'm very sorry but let's check on this immediately.  This is definitely an emergency.  It seems--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M015
chinese: 明天没有了那个骨灰盒，我该怎么办？
english: What am I going to do tomorrow without the urn?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F013
chinese: 先生，我觉得您的行李好像-好像不在这里。
english: Sir it seems to me that your luggage is um- is not here

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M016
chinese: 哦，哦，那是一个很好的推断。
english: Oh, oh, that's a good deduction.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F014
chinese: 是的 - 它是的
english: Yes--it is

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M017
chinese: 夏洛克·福尔摩斯。天啊，我的行李在哪里？
english: Sherlock Holmes.  God, where's my luggage?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F015
chinese: 先生，请您冷静一下，我请求您稍等一下--
english: Sir, Please please, I would ask you to just calm down for a second--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M018
chinese: 冷静点？明天是我母亲的葬礼。我是这件事的责任人。
english: Calm down?  It's my mother's funeral tomorrow.  I'm the one responsible for this.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F016
chinese: 好的。我们会找到您的行李。显然，由于某种原因...您乘坐的航班是达美航空吗？
english: Okay.  We will find your luggage.  Apparently because it somehow...what flight you were taking, you were on Delta?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M019
chinese: 是的。您是达美航空的代表。
english: Yes.  You are a Delta representative.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F017
chinese: 是的，我是。
english: Yes, I am.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M020
chinese: 你怎么了？
english: What is the matter with you?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F018
chinese: 先生，我只是...你现在需要冷静下来。
english: Sir, I just...you need to calm down is what needs to happen right now.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M021
chinese: 不要对我大喊大叫。
english: Don't yell at me.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F019
chinese: 好的。我不是。对不起，我正在--
english: Okay.  I'm not.  I'm sorry, I am being--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F020
chinese: 冷静。先生，好的，基本上在这里会发生的是您将向我提供您的联系信息，然后我们会与您联系。
english: calm.  Sir, okay basically what- what's going to happen here is you're going to give me your contact information and we will contact you--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M022
chinese: 哦，我的天。我觉得我的脑袋里的血管破裂了。
english: Oh my God.  I think a blood vessel burst in my head.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F021
chinese: 请，请
english: Please, please

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F022
chinese: 先生，请听我说。您的行李仍在巴尔的摩。
english: sir, listen to me.  Your luggage is still in Baltimore.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M023
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F023
chinese: 好的。我们可以在大约七到十个工作日内在这里拿到它。
english: Okay.  We can get it here in about seven to ten business days.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M024
chinese: 什么？你在开玩笑吗？
english: What?  Are you kidding me?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F024
chinese: 是的。嗯，因为--
english: Yes.  Well, because--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M025
chinese: 给-立刻把你的经理给我。
english: Give- Give me your manager right now.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F025
chinese: 我是经理先生。
english: I am the manager sir.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M026
chinese: 你是经理吗？你不知道你在哪里工作，你不知道你在哪里，而你是经理？
english: You're the manager? You don't know where you work for, you don't know where you're at and you're the manager?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F026
chinese: 先生，我知道我为谁工作，但我在检查，因为你不能--
english: Sir I know where I work for but I was checking because you cannot--

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M027
chinese: 你是谁的女儿？
english: Whose daughter are you?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F027
chinese: 先生？
english: Sir?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M028
chinese: 先生。先生。先生。先生。
english: Sir. Sir. Sir. Sir

name: Ses03M_impro05a_F028
chinese: 你叫什么名字？
english: What is your name?

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M029
chinese: 我的名字是Brent Caption。
english: My name is Brent Caption.

name: Ses03M_impro05a_M030
chinese: 现在你打算怎么办？
english: Now what are you going to do about it?

name: Ses03M_impro07_M000
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F000
chinese: 嘿，最近怎么样？我好久没见到你了。
english: Hey.  How's it going?  I haven't seen you in awhile.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M001
chinese: 很好，苏珊娜。
english: Pretty good Susanna.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F001
chinese: 乔，发生了什么事？
english: What's going on Joe?

name: Ses03M_impro07_M002
chinese: 猜猜是谁进了美国南加州大学？
english: Guess who got into U.S.C.?

name: Ses03M_impro07_F002
english: Um--

name: Ses03M_impro07_M003
chinese: 我。是的，我做了。
english: Me. Yeah, I did.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F003
chinese: 不可能。你是认真的吗？哦天啊。恭喜。我太兴奋了。
english: No way. Are you serious? Oh my God.  Congratulations. I'm so excited.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M004
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M005
chinese: 我进入了...
english: I got into the...

name: Ses03M_impro07_M006
chinese: 我进入了电影制作行业。
english: I got into cinema production.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F004
chinese: 不，你没有进入生产。没有办法。
english: No.  You didn't get into production.  There's no way.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M008
chinese: 不。这就像是比进入哈佛还要难。
english: No.  It's like it's harder than getting into Harvard.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F005
chinese: 我知道。哦，我的天啊。哦，我的天啊，乔，我为你感到非常高兴。嗯，你知道这意味着什么吗？
english: I know.  Oh my God.  Oh my God Joe I am so happy for you.  Well you know what that means?

name: Ses03M_impro07_M009
chinese: 那是什么意思？
english: What does that mean?

name: Ses03M_impro07_F006
chinese: 你会在这里，而我会在洛杉矶，所以我们现在可以在一起。我的意思是我们可以在同一个城市。
english: You're going to be here and I'm going to be in LA so we can be together now.  I mean we can be in the same city.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M010
english: Holy shit...

name: Ses03M_impro07_F007
chinese: 我们可以聚会。我们可以玩得开心。
english: We can party.  We can have fun.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M011
chinese: 这将会像高中一样，但更好。
english: This will be like high school but even better.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F008
chinese: 是的。希望它不会像高中那样。
english: Yeah.  Hopefully it won't be like high school.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F009
chinese: 哦，伙计，我真为你感到骄傲，那是...你是怎么做到的...我的意思是你做了什么？你是怎么发现的或者说是什么...？
english: Oh man I am so proud of you, that is...how did you get...I mean what did you do?  How did you find out or what...?

name: Ses03M_impro07_M012
chinese: 我-我回到家，我妈妈就说乔，嗯-
english: I-I came home and my mom was like Joe uh-

name: Ses03M_impro07_M013
chinese: 我有一些坏消息。我就像什么？她就像不是真的，你进了南加州大学，我就像，我就像哦天哪。我差点要拔自己的头发了。
english: I have some bad news.  I was like what?  She's like not really you got into U.S.C. and I was like, I was like oh my God.  I was about to tear my own hair out.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F010
chinese: 哦，天啊。
english: Oh man.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M014
chinese: 是的。这太疯狂了。我的意思是我没有被其他学校录取，但我被我想要的学校录取了。
english: Yeah.  This is so crazy.  I mean I didn't get into any other school but I got into the school I wanted.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F011
chinese: 你是否已经说过是的？我的意思是你是否已经发送了你的答案？
english: Did you say yes yet?  I mean have you sent in your answer?

name: Ses03M_impro07_M015
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，我一拿到它就立刻退回去了。
english: Oh my God the first minute I got it I sent it back in.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F012
chinese: 好的。
english: All right.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M016
english: So...

name: Ses03M_impro07_F013
chinese: 这太棒了，你知道吗，因为我要住在市中心，所以我会在这里。我想我会住在市中心的City Lights。
english: This is so great, you know, because I gone fit on downtown so I'm going to be like right here.  I think I'm going to be living at City Lights downtown.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M017
chinese: 这太令人兴奋了。这就像我们生活中的一个新篇章。
english: This is so exciting.  This is like a new chapter in our lives.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F014
chinese: 是的，确实是这样。
english: Yeah, it really is.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M018
chinese: 我们正在做我们想做的事情，然后四年后我们将成为职业人士，赚钱，每天品味马提尼酒。
english: We're doing what we want to do, then four years later we're going to be working professionals, making money, sipping martinis every day.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F015
chinese: 上帝保佑。
english: God hopefully.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F016
chinese: 我只是为你感到如此高兴。我只是--
english: Man I'm just so happy for you.  I just--

name: Ses03M_impro07_M019
chinese: 谢谢你
english: Thank you

name: Ses03M_impro07_F017
chinese: 嗯，我为你感到高兴，但我也为自己感到高兴，因为这意味着你会留下来。
english: Well, I'm happy for you but I'm happy for me cause that means you're going to stay.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M020
chinese: 今晚我的父母想带我去吃寿司，他们说我可以带你一起去。
english: And tonight my parents want to take me out to sushi and they said I could bring you.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F018
chinese: 哦，太好了。我很想去。
english: Oh great. I would love to go.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M021
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M022
chinese: 是的，他们说随便你想要什么...
english: Yeah and they said get whatever you want and...

name: Ses03M_impro07_F019
chinese: 嗯嗯，一些味噌汤。
english: Mmmm some miso soup.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M023
chinese: 一些味噌汤。你可以随便点。你可以点一大桶味噌汤。天哪。
english: Some miso soup.  You can get whatever.  You can get a vat full of miso soup.  God.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F020
chinese: 啊，伙计。
english: Ah man.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M024
chinese: 这将会非常棒。我有很多伟大的想法。
english: This is going to be so great.  I have so many great ideas.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F021
chinese: 是的。你...我的意思是，你发送申请后多久听到的？
english: Yeah. Did you...I mean do send in like how long after you send in your application did you hear?

name: Ses03M_impro07_MXX0
chinese: 开始。
english: to start off.

name: Ses03M_impro07_M025
chinese: 他们花了很长时间，哦天啊，他们花了很长时间，就像，我的意思是现在已经是四月了，四月份收到的信通常都是拒绝信，所以我就像...
english: It took them, oh man, it took them like, I mean what it's like April now and any letters that come in April are usually the rejection letters so I was just like...

name: Ses03M_impro07_F022
chinese: 你就像...
english: You were like...

name: Ses03M_impro07_M026
chinese: 我被打击了。
english: I was struck.

name: Ses03M_impro07_F023
chinese: 哦，我的天。我为你感到非常骄傲。
english: Oh my God.  I am so proud of you.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F001
chinese: 除了弗里达知道我们在这里，没有人会打电话。
english: And nobody knows we're here except for Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那么就一定是他们了。
english: Well it must be them then.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F002
chinese: 你打算做什么？
