english: What are you going to do?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M003
chinese: 我们还好吧？我们不是吗？无论发生什么，亲爱的。
english: We're fine right?  Aren't we?  Whatever happens darling.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远甜蜜。
english: Now and always sweet.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F004
chinese: 我的意思是，这是注定要早晚被揭示出来的。
english: I mean, it was, it's bound to come out sooner or later.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好？你好？什么？
english: Hello?  Hello?  What?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F005
chinese: 那让我毛骨悚然。
english: That sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M006
chinese: 不对，号码错误。
english: No, wrong number.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M007
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What are we to do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M008
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势？
english: With the most perfect poise?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F007
chinese: 当然。我可能会进行一次法庭礼节。
english: Certainly.  And I shall probably do a court courtesy.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M009
chinese: 嗯-当一个人快乐的时候，那些本应该非常重要的事情似乎一点都不重要，对吗？
english: um- Things that should matter dreadfully don't seem to matter at all when one's happy do they?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F008
chinese: 令人可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: What is so horrible is that one cannot stay happy.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M010
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。不要说那样的话。
english: Oh, darling.  Don't say that.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F009
chinese: 是真的。我的意思是，整个事情简直是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true.  I mean, the whole business it's a very poor joke.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M011
chinese: 你是说那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱？
english: You mean that, that sacred and beautiful thing love?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的。我指的就是这个。
english: Yes.  I mean just that.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M012
chinese: 那到底意味着什么？这是我在追求终极真理的过程中问自己的问题。那到底意味着什么？
english: What does that all mean?  That's what I asked myself on my quest for ultimate truth.  What does it all mean?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm serious.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M013
chinese: 【笑声】哦，亲爱的。你不能太认真，那正是他们想要的。
english: [LAUGHTER] Oh, darling.  You mustn't be serious, that's just what they want.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M014
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。嘲笑他们。轻率一些。
english: All the futile moralists who try to make life unbearable.  Laugh at them.  Be flippant.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M015
chinese: 嘲笑他们所有神圣的陈词滥调。轻率带来了他们该死的甜蜜和光明中的酸涩。
english: Laugh at all their sacred shibboleths.  Flippancy brings the acid in their damn sweetness and light.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F013
chinese: 所以如果我要笑话一切，那么我也必须笑话我们自己。
english: So if I'm to laugh at everything then I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M016
chinese: 哦，当然，你一定要这样做。我们确实是可笑的人物。
english: Oh, certainly, you must.  We're figures of fun alright.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F014
chinese: 这种荒谬而霸道的爱情会持续多久？
english: How long will it last?  This ludicrous overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M017
chinese: 谁知道？
english: Who knows?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F015
chinese: 我们是否总是想要争吵和打架？
english: Shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M018
chinese: 不。那火焰将随着我们的激情逐渐消逝。
english: No.  That fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F016
chinese: 好的，亲爱的，我们需要那个吗？
english: Well, dear, shall we want that?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M019
chinese: 嗯，这取决于我们打得有多好。
english: Well, it depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F017
chinese: 如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？我的意思是，另一个人还会笑吗？
english: What happens if one of us dies?  I mean, does the other one still laugh?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M020
chinese: 当然，是的，是的，全力以赴。
english: Of course, yes, yes, with all his might.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F018
chinese: 那已经够严重的了。
english: That's serious enough.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M021
chinese: 不，不是的。那太可笑了，一个用镜子完成的狡猾小谜题。
english: No.  No it isn't.  That's very laughable, a cunning little mystery all done with mirrors.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F019
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M022
chinese: 哦，还有谁在胡说八道？
english: Oh, and who isn't talking nonsense?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M023
chinese: 让我们肤浅地可怜一下那些可怜的哲学家，嗯？让我们吹喇叭、吱吱作响，尽可能像愚蠢的小学生一样狂欢派对。
english: Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers hmmm?  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and party as much as we can like quite idiotic school children.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M024
chinese: 让我们品味这一刻的愉悦。亲爱的，在蠕虫从你的眼眶里出入之前来亲吻我。
english: Let's savor the delight of the moment.  Come kiss me darling before worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F020
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliot, worms don't pop.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M025
chinese: 我不在乎你做什么，你明白吗？只要不，我不在乎你做什么，明白吗？
english: I don't care what you do, you see?  As long, no I don't care what you do, see?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M026
chinese: 你可以把绿色的油漆涂满全身，在凡尔赛广场上裸舞，并且疯狂地和全世界的男人们一起冲出去，只要你最爱我，我不会说一句话。
english: You can put green paint all over your body and dance naked in the Place Vendome and rush off madly with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word as long as you love me best.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F021
chinese: 谢谢亲爱的。同样适用于你...
english: Thank you dear.  The same applies to you...

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F022
chinese: 只要你稍微看一眼其他女人，我就杀了你。
english: ...only if you ever so much as look at another woman I'll kill you.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M027
chinese: 记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M028
chinese: 那次你在广场上买了一条小木制蛇，并把它放在我的床上。
english: The one when you bought a little painted wooden snake in the Piazza and put it in my bed.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F024
chinese: 查尔斯，那是他的名字，查尔斯。哦，天啊，他如此优雅地扭动着。
english: Charles, that was his name, Charles.  Oh, God he was so wiggled so beautifully.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M029
chinese: 可怕的小东西。
english: Horrible little thing.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F025
chinese: 是的。我知道你做了。你把它扔出窗户，扔进了大运河。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: Yeah.  I know you did.  You threw it out the window and into the Grand Canal.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M030
chinese: 我讨厌它。
english: I hated it.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M031
chinese: 那场骚乱持续了多久？
english: How long did that rile last?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F026
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M032
chinese: 哦，最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当时你-
english: Oh, the worst one was in Cannes when you-

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F027
chinese: 我也把梳子烧了个洞，还把浴室里的所有毛巾都烧坏了。
english: I burnt a hole in my comb too and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M033
chinese: 你的卷发器在我的睡袍上烧了一个洞。
english: you're curling iron burnt a hole in my dressing gown.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M034
chinese: 那真是一个令人振奋的事情，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser wasn't it?

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F028
chinese: [笑声] 是的。那是你第一次打我。
english: [LAUGHTER] Yeah.  That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M035
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F029
chinese: 经理走进来，看到我们在地板上滚来滚去，像豹子一样抓来抓去、咬来咬去。
english: The manager came in and saw us rolling on the floor, scratching and biting like panthers.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M036
chinese: 我永远不会忘记他的脸。噢-啦 [笑声]。
english: I will never forget his face. Ooh-rah [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F030
chinese: 多么荒谬。多么彻底、彻底荒谬。
english: How ridiculous.  How utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M037
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_F031
chinese: 而且更加愚蠢。
english: And much sillier too.

name: Ses03M_script03_1_M038
chinese: 那场骚动的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: The real cause of that rile was Peter Burden.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M000
chinese: 哦。
english: Oh.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F000
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M001
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F001
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M002
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我是说，除了弗里达之外，没有人知道我们在这里，而她也不会打电话。
english: I mean, nobody knows we're here except for Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M003
chinese: 那么肯定是他们了。
english: It must be them then.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F003
chinese: 我们该怎么办？
english: What are we to do?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我们都没事，亲爱的，对吧？无论发生什么。
english: We're all right, aren't we darling? Whatever happens.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F004
chinese: 是的。现在和永远，甜蜜。
english: Yes. Now and always, sweet.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M005
chinese: 那我不在乎。
english: Then I don't care.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F005
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的。
english: It was bound to come sooner or later.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M006
chinese: 你好？你好吗？什么？唉，打错电话了。
english: Hello? Hello? What? Ugh, wrong number.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F006
chinese: [笑声] 天啊，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: [LAUGHTER] God, it sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M007
chinese: 当一个人快乐时，那些本应该非常重要的事情似乎一点都不重要，不是吗？
english: things that should matter dreadfully don't seem to matter at all when one's happy, do they?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F007
chinese: 一个可怕的事情是一个人无法保持快乐。嗯，这是真的。我的意思是，整个事情就是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: Um terrible thing is one can't stay happy. Well, it's true. I mean, the whole business is a very poor joke.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M008
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，不要说那样的话。
english: Ooh darling, don't say that.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M009
chinese: 你是指那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱吗？
english: You mean that sacred and beautiful thing, love?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F008
chinese: 是的，就是这个意思。
english: Yes, meaning just that.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M010
chinese: 这一切意味着什么？这是我在追求终极真理时问自己的问题。这一切意味着什么？
english: What does it all mean? That's what I ask myself in my quest for ultimate truth. What does it all mean?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F009
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me. I'm serious.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M011
chinese: [笑声] 亲爱的，你不能太认真，那正是他们想要的。
english: [LAUGHTER]. You mustn't be serious, my dear one, that's what they want.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F010
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M012
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。嘲笑他们。轻率一点。嘲笑所有那些神圣的陈词滥调。轻率会激起他们那该死的甜蜜和光明中的酸味。
english: All the futile moralists who try to make life unbearable. Laugh at them. Be flippant. Laugh at all the sacred shibboleths. Flippancy brings out the acid in their damn sweetness and light.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F011
chinese: 好吧，如果我对一切都笑，那我也得笑笑我们自己。
english: Well, if I laugh at everything I'm going to have to laugh at us too.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M013
chinese: 哦，当然你必须这样做。我们是好笑的人物，没错。
english: Ooh, certainly you must. We're figures of fun, all right.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F012
chinese: 那么这种荒谬、压倒一切的爱情会持续多久呢？
english: So how long is it going to last? This ludicrous, overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M014
chinese: 谁知道？
english: Who knows?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F013
chinese: 我们是否总是想要争吵和打架？
english: Shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M015
chinese: 不。火焰将随着我们的激情逐渐消逝。
english: No. The fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F014
chinese: 哦亲爱的，好吧，我们想要那个吗？
english: Oh dear, well, shall we want that?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M016
chinese: 取决于我们玩得有多好。
english: Depends on how well we play it.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F015
chinese: 好吧，如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？剩下的那个人还会笑吗？
english: Well, what if happens if one of us is to die? Does the one that's left still laugh?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M017
chinese: 是的，是的。是的，他必须全力以赴。
english: Yes, yes. Yes, he must with all his might.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F016
chinese: 嗯，那就够严重的了。
english: Well, that's serious enough.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M018
chinese: 不，不是的。死亡是非常可笑的。一个狡猾的小谜团。全都是用镜子完成的。
english: No. No, it isn't. Death's very laughable. A cunning little mystery. All done with mirrors.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F017
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M019
chinese: 所以从长远来看，每个人都是如此。让我们肤浅地同情那些可怜的哲学家。
english: So is everyone else in the long run. Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M020
chinese: 让我们吹奏小号、吹奏喇叭和吹响小玩具，像一群相当愚蠢的小学生一样尽情狂欢吧。让我们品味这一刻的快乐。来吧，亲爱的，亲吻我，免得蠕虫在你的眼眶里出没。
english: Let's blow strumpets, blow-blow trumpets and squeakers and party as much as we can like small quite idiotic school children. Let's savor the delight of the moment. Come, kiss me darling, before worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F018
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliott, worms don't pop.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M021
chinese: 我不在乎你做什么，明白吗？只要你能把自己涂成鲜绿色，全身赤裸地在凡尔赛广场跳舞，疯狂地和全世界的男人们一起离开，只要你最爱我，我不会说一句话。
english: I don't care what you do, see? As long-you can paint yourself bright green all over and dance naked in the Place Vendome and rush off madly with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word as long as you love me best.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F019
chinese: 谢谢你，亲爱的。同样适用于你。只是，如果我发现你盯着别的女人看，我会杀了你。
english: Thank you, dear. The same applies to you. Except that if I ever so much as catch you looking at another woman I'll kill you.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M022
chinese: 记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F020
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M023
chinese: 那次你在广场上买了那条小彩绘木蛇，并把它放在我的床上。
english: The one when you bought that little painted wooden snake in the Piazza and put it in my bed.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F021
chinese: 哦，查尔斯。那是他的名字。查尔斯。他摇摆得如此美丽。
english: Oh Charles. That was his name. Charles. He did wiggle so beautifully.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M024
chinese: 可怕的小东西。我讨厌它。
english: Horrible little thing. I hated it.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F022
chinese: 我知道你做了。你把它扔出窗户，扔进了大运河。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: I know you did. You threw it out the window and into the Grand Canal. I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M025
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F023
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M026
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的睡袍上。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your-your curling iron burnt a hole in my dressing gown.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F024
chinese: 嗯，我也把梳子烧了个洞，还有浴室里的所有毛巾。【笑声】。
english: Well, I burnt a hole in my comb too, and all the towels in the bathroom. [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F025
chinese: 是的。那是你第一次打我。
english: yeah. And that was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M027
chinese: 那真是一个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F026
chinese: 经理走进来，发现我们像黑豹一样在地板上滚来滚去，咬来咬去，抓来抓去。【笑声】
english: The manager came in and found us rolling on the floor and biting and scratching like panthers. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M028
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F027
chinese: 我知道。哦，天哪。简直不敢相信。
english: I know. Oh man. Couldn't believe it.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M029
chinese: 哦，我永远不会忘记他的脸。哦-啊 [笑声]。
english: Oh, I will never forget his face. Ooh-rah [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M030
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_F028
chinese: 是的，而且非常愚蠢。
english: Yeah, and very much sillier.

name: Ses03F_script03_1_M031
chinese: 哦，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: Oh, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M000
chinese: 嘿，听着，小姐，我在这条队伍里等了一个小时，现在终于轮到我了。所以你要接收我的申请。
english: Hey listen here missy, I've been in this line for an hour and now I'm finally here.  So you're going to take my application.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F000
chinese: 这是一个要求吗，先生？
english: Is that a demand sir?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M001
chinese: 这不是一个要求，而是一个请求。你能接受吗？拜托。
english: It's not a demand it's a request.  Will you just take it?  Come on.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F001
chinese: 我必须在拿走之前看到它。
english: I must see it before I just take it.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M002
chinese: 哦，看看它。
english: Oh.  Look at it.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F002
chinese: 先生，您完全填错了。
english: Sir, you completely filled this out wrong.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F003
chinese: 不。你填写了背面部分。你只应该填写前面的部分。
english: No.  You filled out the back part.  You were supposed to fill out the front portion only.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M003
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M004
chinese: 你在说什么？它说要填写那部分。
english: What are you talking about?  It says fill out that part.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F004
chinese: 不，不，不，不，不。你必须回到另一边去——第二扇门，上楼梯...
english: No, no, no, no, no.  You're going to have to go back over on the other side-- --second door, up the stairs...

name: Ses03M_impro01_M005
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M006
chinese: 哦，我的天。你能自己转账吗？
english: Oh my God. Can you just transfer it yourself?

name: Ses03M_impro01_F005
chinese: 不，先生，我不能自己转账。你必须这样做。其他人都在做同样的事情。
english: No I can't just transfer it myself sir.  You got to do this.  Everyone else is doing the same thing.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M007
chinese: 你不知道！你不会写吗？你不知道怎么写吗？
english: You don't know! you can't write?  You don't know how to write?

name: Ses03M_impro01_F006
chinese: 请问先生？
english: Excuse me sir?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M008
chinese: 你们这些人怎么了？天啊。
english: What's wrong with you people?  God.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F007
chinese: 我觉得你有点傲慢。
english: I think you're being a little condescending.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F008
chinese: 你需要回去那边重新填写。
english: You need to go back over there and fill it out again.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M009
chinese: 这些信息在那里。我会在这里填写好。
english: The information is on there.  Here I'll just fill it out right here.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F009
chinese: 不，不，不，因为还有其他人在排队。你必须去拿一份全新的申请表。
english: No, no, no, because there are other people in line.  You have to go get a complete new application.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M010
chinese: 这将花费大约一分钟，好吗？天啊。
english: This will take like a minute, okay? Jesus.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F010
chinese: 不，不，不。先生，您需要离开队伍。
english: No, no, no. Sir,you need to get out of the line--

name: Ses03M_impro01_M011
chinese: 我不会去任何地方。我就待在这里。
english: I'm not going anywhere.  I'm staying right here.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F011
chinese: 好的，我将不得不叫保安，因为先生，你-这个车管所里有数百人在排队等候-我们将在大约半小时内关闭...
english: Well I'm going to have to call- security because sir, you- there are hundreds of people waiting in line at this D.M.V.-- --We're closing in about half an hour...

name: Ses03M_impro01_M012
chinese: 嘿，嗯——那太糟糕了，因为我正在办理驾照。
english: Hey,uh-- Well that's too bad cause I'm getting my license right now.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F012
chinese: 您会得到您的许可证，先生，您需要去填写另一份副本...对不起？
english: You will get your license, sir, you have to go fill out-- --another copy...excuse me?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M013
chinese: 给我我的--
english: Give me my--

name: Ses03M_impro01_M014
chinese: 嘿，不，把那个还给我。
english: Hey, no, give me that back.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F013
chinese: 不。现在我要从你手中拿走这个，因为你显然在误导。
english: No.  Now I'm going to take this from you because you are obviously misleading

name: Ses03M_impro01_M015
chinese: -- 不，我不等待...我不会再回来了。我没有时间再回来五天。
english: -- No.  I'm not waiting...I'm not coming back again.  I don't have time to come back five days.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F014
chinese: 不行。你不能去拿另一个。
english: No.  You couldn't go get another one.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F015
chinese: 那么你就没有驾照了，对吗？
english: Well then you won't have a license will you?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M016
chinese: 我要一张许可证。
english: I'll have a license.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F016
chinese: 好的，你不会从这个部门得到。
english: Well not from this department you won't.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M017
chinese: 是的，我会的。我会处理这个[垃圾]。
english: Yes I will.  I'll have this [GARBAGE]

name: Ses03M_impro01_F017
chinese: 先生-
english: Sir-

name: Ses03M_impro01_M018
chinese: 就像我想要的一样。呃。
english: just as I want.  Ugh.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F018
chinese: 先生？我再问你一次，然后我会打电话给我的主管。
english: Sir?  I'm going to ask you one more time and then I'm going to call my supervisor

name: Ses03M_impro01_F019
chinese: 如果你不能自己离开，谁会继续呼叫安保？
english: who will proceed to call-- security if you can't remove yourself--

name: Ses03M_impro01_M019
chinese: 好的。打电话给你的主管。请主管过来。
english: Fine.  Call your supervisor.  Ask supervisor over

name: Ses03M_impro01_M020
chinese: 并且我会告诉她你的行为如何。
english: and I'll tell her how you've been behaving.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F020
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M021
chinese: 你喜欢怎样的呢？嗯？
english: How would you like that hmm?

name: Ses03M_impro01_F021
chinese: 她实际上并不在建筑物里。她只是在电话里。先生，请立即离开这条线路。
english: She's not actually in the building.  She's only on the phone. Sir, please leave this line immediately.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M022
chinese: 哦，好的。哇。
english: Oh, okay.  Wow.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M023
chinese: 不，我不会去任何地方。我就在这里待着——我现在正在填写，好吗？你冷静点。我正在填写——就拿这该死的纸张吧。
english: No.  I'm not going anywhere.  I'm staying here-- I am filling out right now okay just calm down. I'm filling out right now-- Just take the god damn piece of paper.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F022
chinese: 好的。我要叫保安。保安！
english: Okay.  I'm going to call security. Security!

name: Ses03M_impro01_F023
chinese: 我有它。我正在拿着它。这并不意味着我会对它做任何事情。-离开我的队伍！这是我的队伍。离开。所有这些人-先生，你在这个部门引起了一场骚乱。
english: I have it.  I'm taking it.  Doesn't mean I'm going to do anything with it.--Get out of my line!  This is my line.  Get out.  All these people--Sir, you are causing a mob in this department.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M024
chinese: 好的，这是一个新的。拿走这个新的。
english: Okey This is a new one.  Take the new one.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M025
chinese: 你拥有D.M.V.吗？
english: Do you own the D.M.V.?

name: Ses03M_impro01_M026
chinese: 对不起，她是这些人，他们只是想拿到他们的许可证。
english: I'm sorry she's--these people they just want to get their license--

name: Ses03M_impro01_F024
chinese: 不，你不能拿到你的驾照。你填错了表格的部分。
english: No, You cannot get your license.  You filled out the wrong part of the form.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M027
chinese: 你在说什么？只是转移过去。我填写了新的。
english: What are you talking about?  Just transfer it over.  I filled out the new one.

name: Ses03M_impro01_F025
chinese: 这整个时间你和我争吵，先生，你本可以填完表格并已经走了一半的路了——不，滚出去。
english: This entire time you're fighting with me sir, you could've finished the form and already been half way-- No.  Get out.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M028
chinese: 我完成了一个。拿去吧。
english: I did finish one.  Take it.

name: Ses03M_impro01_M029
chinese: 你怎么了？
english: What is wrong with you?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前和他谈谈。
english: What's he going to say? Maybe we ought to talk to him before he sees it.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他是怎么看到的？我的意思是，我是第一个起床的。他还在床上。
english: What-how did he see it? I mean, I was the first one up. He was still in bed.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M001
chinese: 当这件事发生时，他在那里。
english: He was out there when it happened.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M002
chinese: 嗯，大约是今天早上四点左右。嗯，我听到了一声裂开的声音，我往外看，看到他站在那里。
english: Um, about four this morning. Uh- I heard a crack and I looked out and I saw him standing there.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在外面做什么？
english: What was he doing out at four in the morning?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。但是在它破裂之后，他回到屋子里，在厨房里哭了起来。
english: I don't know. But after it cracked he went back in the house and he cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不，我，嗯，我觉得最好的办法是让他一个人待着。
english: No, I uh-, I figured the best thing to do was to leave him alone.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害，嗯？
english: He cried hard, huh?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以透过地板听到它。
english: I could hear it right through the floor.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他当时在那里做什么？他又在梦见他了。他又在晚上四处走动。
english: What was he doing out there at that time? He was dreaming about him again. He's walking around at night again.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他-他的行为就像他死后一样，你知道吗？
english: Could he-he's acting just like he did after he died, you know?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F008
chinese: 那是什么意思？
english: What's the meaning in that?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M008
chinese: 但是妈妈，我知道一件事，我们在爸爸身上犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: But I know one thing, mom. We've made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F009
chinese: 好的，你是什么意思？什么？
english: Well, what do you mean? What?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M009
chinese: 对他不诚实。这种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him. That kind of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean, dishonest?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M010
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们还让他以为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know Larry's not coming back and I know that too. Why do we go on letting him think that we believe with him?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你要和他争论吗？
english: What, you're going to argue with him?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M011
chinese: 不，我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到没有人再相信拉里会回来了。
english: No, I don't want to argue with him, but it's time that he realized that no one believes that Larry's coming back anymore.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你不能告诉他那件事。
english: You can't tell him that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们得告诉他。
english: We got to tell him that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F013
chinese: 我们不能。它根本行不通。
english: We can't. It just won't work.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M013
chinese: 你知道的，天哪，已经过去三年了。三年后没有人会回来的。这太疯狂了。
english: You know, for God's sakes it's been three years. No one comes back after three years. It's insane.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F014
chinese: 他们确实会回来。
english: They do come back.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F015
chinese: 我知道，但他不知道。
english: I know, but he doesn't know that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F016
chinese: 三年已经是很长的时间了。
english: Three years has been a long time.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M014
chinese: 好的。妈妈，请坐下，我想和你谈谈。
english: All right. Just- Sit down, mom. I want to talk to you.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F017
chinese: 这些该死的报纸，你知道吗？我的意思是，就好像每天他们都会出现一个新的人物。下一个就是Larry。
english: It's those Goddamn newspapers, you know? I mean, it's like every day they come out with this new person that comes along. And the next one's going to be Larry.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的。好的。快点，坐下。
english: All right. All right. Just come on, sit down.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F018
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道-你知道我为什么请安妮来这里吗？
english: You know-you know why I asked Annie here, right?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F019
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M017
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法，但是继续说吧，告诉我，这个故事是什么？
english: Well, I have an idea, but go on, tell me, what's the story?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M018
chinese: 我想要向她求婚。
english: I want to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F021
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well, that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M019
chinese: 来吧，你知道那不仅仅是我的事情。
english: Come on, you know that's not only my business.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F022
chinese: 好吧，是的。我的意思是，你想让我怎么做呢？你已经长大了，你知道自己心里在想什么。
english: Well, it is. I mean, what do you want me to do? You're grown up; you know what's going on in your mind.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M020
chinese: 所以没关系。我会继续进行下去。
english: So it's all right. I'll just go ahead with it.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F023
chinese: 好的，你最好确保你父亲不在- 不- 我只是说说而已。
english: Well, you better make sure your father's not- No- I'm just saying.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M021
chinese: 看，那不仅仅是我的事情。天啊，你也有。
english: See, then it's not just my business. God, you have

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M022
chinese: -哦，有时候你真让我生气。你知道，如果爸爸发脾气，这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: -Oh, you infuriate me sometimes. You know, it's not just my business too if dad throws a fit.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M023
chinese: 天啊，你真是一个擅长忽视事情的人。
english: God. You have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F024
chinese: 是的，我忽略我需要忽略的事情。
english: Yeah, well I ignore what I got to ignore.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F025
chinese: 她，她是拉里的女孩。
english: And she-she's Larry's girl.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M024
chinese: 不，她不是拉里的女孩。
english: No, she is not Larry's girl.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F026
chinese: 嗯，从你父亲的角度来看，她是他的。我的意思是，他还活着。你没有权利带走她。
english: Well, from your father's point of view she is. I mean, he's still alive. You've got no right to take her.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F027
chinese: 如果你从那个点继续前进，我不知道你会去哪里。
english: If you go on from that point, I don't know where you go.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F028
chinese: 因为听着，我告诉你，我不知道从那里去哪里。你知道吗？
english: 'Cause listen, I'm telling you, I don't know where to go from there. Do you?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M025
chinese: 哦，我不知道。
english: Oh, I don't know.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F029
chinese: 你想从我这里得到什么？
english: What do you want from me?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M026
chinese: 每当我伸手去拿某样东西时，我都不得不收回，因为其他人会受苦。我整个生命，一次又一次。
english: Every time I reach out for something I have to pull back because other people will suffer. My whole entire life, time and time after time.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F030
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人，这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fella and there's nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M027
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F031
chinese: 没有任何问题。
english: There's nothing wrong with it.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M028
chinese: 我还没有问过安妮。
english: I didn't ask Annie yet.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F032
chinese: 你还没有问她吗？
english: You didn't ask her yet?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M029
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F033
chinese: 嗯，你怎么知道她会嫁给你？我的意思是，如果她和你父亲有同样的感觉呢？
english: Well, how do you know she's going to marry you? I mean, what if she feels the same way as your father?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M030
chinese: 那么我猜这就结束了。但是从她的信中我觉得她已经忘记了他。
english: Well then I guess it's over then. But from her letters I think she's forgotten him.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M031
chinese: 我会找出来。但是等一切结束后，我们会和爸爸好好解决这件事，对吗？
english: I'll find out. But then after it's all over we'll thrash it out with dad, right?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M032
chinese: 妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F034
chinese: 你知道，问题是你从来没有足够的女人。不，你从来没有过。
english: You know, the trouble is you've never had enough women. No, you never did.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M033
chinese: 那又怎样？我对女人不敏感。
english: So what? I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F035
chinese: 我不明白为什么非得是她。
english: I don't understand why it has to be her.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M034
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F036
chinese: 那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。
english: That's a good answer, but it doesn't answer anything.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M035
chinese: 我只是-
english: I just-

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F037
chinese: 我是说，你自从战争以来就没见过她。我是说，已经过去五年了。
english: I mean, you haven't seen her since the war. I mean, it's been five years.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M036
chinese: 这就是。我-
english: It just is. I-

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M037
chinese: 我和她一起长大。好吧。所有这些年来，每当我想到一个我想要成为我的妻子的人，我就会想到安妮。你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: I grew up with her. Okay. All these years, when I think of someone I want to be my wife I think of Annie. What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F038
chinese: 不，我不想要一个图表。
english: No, I don't want a diagram.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F039
chinese: 他认为他会回来。你继续和她结婚吧，我的意思是，你宣布她已经死了。那你父亲会发生什么事呢？我不知道。你知道吗？
english: He thinks he's coming back. You go-go on and marry her, I mean, you're pronouncing her dead. And what's going to happen to your father, huh? I don't know. Do you?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M038
chinese: 好的。好吧，那么。
english: Okay. All right, then.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F040
chinese: 只是，请听着。多考虑一下，就是这样。
english: Just, listen. Give it more thought, is all.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M039
chinese: 不，我已经思考了三年。
english: No, I've given it three years of thought.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M040
chinese: 我以为如果我等待，爸爸就会忘记拉里，然后我们可以举行一场正常的婚礼，一切都会幸福。
english: And I thought that if I waited then dad would forget about Larry and then we could have a regular wedding and everything happy.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M041
chinese: 但是如果我在这里得不到那个，那我就离开。
english: But if I can't have that here then I'll get out.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F041
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M042
chinese: 我会离开的。我会在别的地方和她结婚。也许是在纽约。
english: I'll get out. I'll marry her somewhere else. Maybe New York.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F042
chinese: 你疯了。
english: You're crazy.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M043
chinese: 我已经太久被骗了。我对此已经结束了。
english: I've been a sucker too long. I'm through with it.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F043
chinese: 你是什么-你要离开这个生意吗？但你不能这样做。这是什么鬼？
english: You're what-you're going to leave the business? But you can't do that. What the hell is this?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M044
chinese: 这个生意。这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business. The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F044
chinese: 哦，你必须要有灵感。
english: Oh, you have to be inspired.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M045
chinese: 是的。我每天喜欢它一个小时。如果我必须整天为钱而努力，至少那个晚上我希望它美丽。我想要一个妻子。我想要一个家庭。我想要一些孩子。我想要建立一些我可以奉献自己的东西。
english: Yes. I like it an hour out of the day. If I have to grub for money all day long at least that evening I want it beautiful. I want a wife. I want a family. I want some kids. I want to build something I can give myself to.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M046
chinese: 现在，安妮正处在那一切的中间。
english: Now, Annie's in the middle of all that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M047
chinese: 现在，我在哪里找到它？
english: Now, where do I find it?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F045
chinese: 告诉我一些事情。
english: Tell me something.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F046
chinese: 你会离开那个生意。
english: You'd leave that business.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M048
chinese: 是的。对于这个我会的。
english: Yes. On this I would.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F047
chinese: 你不能这样做。
english: You can't do that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M049
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F048
chinese: 好的，但你不能那样做。你不能那样说话。
english: All right, but you can't do that. You can't talk like that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M050
chinese: 好的。只是-
english: Okay. Just-

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F049
chinese: 我们一生都为你工作。只为你，克里斯。整个事情都是为了你。
english: We've worked all our lives for you. Only for you, Chris. The whole shootin' match is for you.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M051
chinese: 是的，我知道，我知道，只是帮我留在这里，好吗？
english: Yeah, I know, I know, just help me stay here, all right?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F050
chinese: 我要去。
english: I'm going to.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F051
chinese: 你就是不能这样说话。
english: You just can't talk like that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M052
chinese: 我是这样想的。
english: I am thinking like that.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F052
chinese: 我不认识你，对吗？
english: I don't know you, do I?

name: Ses03F_script01_1_M053
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强硬的人。
english: No, you don't. I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses03F_script01_1_F053
chinese: 是的。我能看到。
english: Yeah. I can see that.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F000
chinese: 我不知道，布莱恩，如果他们，嗯，已经过去三年了。
english: I don't know, Brian, if they uh--it's been three years.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M000
chinese: 嘿，你只需要继续前进。
english: Hey, you just got to keep on going.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F001
chinese: 不，我不知道，我--也许这不适合我。你知道，也许这不是适合我的正确行业。
english: No, I don't know, I--maybe this isn't for me. You know, maybe this isn't the right business for me.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M001
chinese: 不，不要这样想。
english: No, don't think like that.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F002
chinese: 我只是，我看到其他人都在得到广告和工作，而我却一无所获。
english: I just, I see all these other people getting commercials and work and it's like I'm not getting anything.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F003
chinese: 我身后没有钱。什么都没有。我二十五岁，然后--
english: I have no money behind me. Nothing. I'm twenty five and--

name: Ses03F_impro04_M002
chinese: 罗素·克劳在他取得重大成就之前还不到四十岁。
english: Russel Crowe wasn't forty until he got his big stuff.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M003
chinese: 如果你真的想做它-我的意思是，
english: If you really want to do it-I mean,

name: Ses03F_impro04_F004
chinese: 所以我将不得不等待二十五年-
english: So I'll have to wait twenty five years-

name: Ses03F_impro04_M004
chinese: 你必须去做。
english: you got to do.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F005
chinese: -只是去试镜，试镜，然后一个接一个的被拒绝，就像是--
english: -just going and auditioning and auditioning and rejection after refection, it's like--

name: Ses03F_impro04_M005
chinese: 你可以。你可以。我们只是--
english: You could. You could. We just--

name: Ses03F_impro04_M006
chinese: 我们只是把我们的资金集合在一起。
english: we're just pooling our funds together.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F006
chinese: 我知道，我只是不知道我能不能应付得了。我的意思是，你在经济上帮了我这么多，就好像我没有你我就无法独立生活一样。我不喜欢这样。
english: I know, I just don't know if I can handle it. I mean, you're helping me so much financially it's like I can't survive on my own without you. I don't like that.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M007
chinese: 你不欠我任何东西。
english: You don't owe me anything.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F007
chinese: 我感觉自己什么都没做。就像我没有为这个世界做出任何贡献。
english: I feel like I'm not doing anything. Like I'm not giving anything into this world.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M008
chinese: 你是的，你要上课，你在学习，你在进步。当你最终得到那个角色时，你会准备好的。
english: You are, you're going to class, you're learning, you're getting better. When you finally get that role you're going to be prepared.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F008
chinese: 是的，但如果我永远无法成功呢？如果我一辈子都在学习，学这个戏剧，学这个表演，却永远无法取得任何成就。我永远无法找到工作。
english: Yeah, but what if I never make it? What if I studied all my life, this theatre, this acting, and I'm never going to get anywhere. I'm never going to be able to have a job.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M009
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，安娜，你还年轻呢。别想那些事情。
english: Oh my God, Anna, you're still young. Don't even think about that.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F009
chinese: 时间正在流逝。每年都是这样。
english: Time is passing by. Every year it's

name: Ses03F_impro04_F010
chinese: 一部分比我能做的还要剩下。
english: a part left than I can do.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M010
chinese: 你只有二十五岁，好吗？有些人直到三十五岁才开始。
english: You're only twenty five, okay? Some people don't start until they're thirty five.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F011
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses03F_impro04_M011
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F012
chinese: 我不知道，我只是[呼吸]我感到沮丧。
english: I don't know, I just [BREATHING] I get frustrated

name: Ses03F_impro04_M012
chinese: 如果你不这样做，你会怎么做？你可以去法学院。
english: What would you do- What would you do if you didn't? You can go to law school.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F013
chinese: 那就是问题所在。我不知道。我什么都不知道。
english: That's the thing. I don't know. I don't know anything.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F014
chinese: 法学院？也许。
english: Law school? Maybe.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F015
chinese: 我不知道。除了这个之外，我什么都不知道，这就是问题所在。这是我的生活。这是我建立一切的基础，你知道的。
english: I don't know. I don't know anything other than this, though, is the problem. This is my life. This is what I built everything about, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M013
chinese: 看到了吗？所以你现在不能就放弃。
english: See? So you can't just quit now.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F016
chinese: 我的意思是，我可以去上法学院，但我对此并不热衷，你知道吗？就像我不是那种被它驱动、激励的人。我……
english: I mean, I could go to law school, but I'm just not passionate about it, you know? Like I'm not--it doesn't drive me, it doesn't motivate me. I--

name: Ses03F_impro04_M014
chinese: 你有去试镜和其他活动吗？
english: Have you been going to auditions and stuff?

name: Ses03F_impro04_F017
chinese: 是的。我的意思是，我接到了回电和其他一些事情，但是-
english: Yeah. I mean, I get a call-back and stuff, but-

name: Ses03F_impro04_F018
chinese: 我只是，我需要休息。我需要一些东西来让我解脱。
english: I just, I need a break. I need something to break me out.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M015
chinese: 工作怎么样？还在Denny's餐厅当服务员吗？
english: How's the job? Still waiting tables at Denny's?

name: Ses03F_impro04_F019
chinese: 是的。不幸的是。
english: Yeah. Unfortunately.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F020
chinese: 是的，所以我上了四年的学，现在在Denny's当服务员。
english: Yeah, so I go to--get an education for four years and I'm waiting tables at Denny's.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M016
chinese: 嗯，他们给小费很多。
english: Well, they tip well.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F021
chinese: [BREATHING] 布莱恩-
english: [BREATHING] Brian-

name: Ses03F_impro04_F022
chinese: 这不好笑。我只是不知道我要做什么。
english: it's not funny. I just don't know what I'm going to do.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M017
chinese: 也许你可以开始教学。我不知道。
english: Maybe you could start teaching. I don't know.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F023
chinese: 是的，我猜我可以。
english: Yeah, I guess I could.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M018
chinese: 回到学校。你知道吗？再过三年，拿到你的硕士学位。
english: Go back to school. You know? Another three more years, get your master's.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F024
chinese: 是的
english: Yeah

name: Ses03F_impro04_M019
chinese: 接近三十岁了。哎呀，这将会很艰难。
english: Close to thirty. Oof, it's going to be tough.

name: Ses03F_impro04_F025
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses03F_impro04_M020
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_impro04_F026
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M000
chinese: 那么你认为怎么样？
english: So what do you think?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M001
chinese: 关于我刚才说的事情。
english: About what I was just saying.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是事实。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not. It is slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这太公关了。我的意思是，有人给你一个关于即将在海滩上发生的美妙事件的好账单。
english: It's so P.R. I mean, somebody's giving you a good bill about this wonderful event that's going to happen on the beach.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M003
chinese: 嗯，我不是唯一一个。看看这些人。
english: Well, I'm not the only one. Look at all these people.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F003
chinese: 没错。其他人也被告知同样的事情。这让他们感到兴奋。让他们不断回来。让他们觉得生活随时都会开始。
english: Exactly. Everyone else is told the same thing. It keeps them feeling excited. Keeps them coming back. Keeps them thinking life's going to start at any minute now.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F004
chinese: 我不在乎。对我来说，它仍然是鱼。
english: I don't care. It's still fish to me.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？不要误会，但是你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something? Don't take this wrong, but are you having your period?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F005
chinese: 奥吉，该死的，别问我那个。你总是问我那个。你为什么问我那个？我讨厌它。这是侮辱。
english: Augie, Goddamn it, don't ask me that. You always ask me that. Why do you ask me that? I hate it. It's insulting.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M006
chinese: 好的，那么什么让你烦恼？
english: Okay, then what's bugging you?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F006
chinese: 看，这个晚上我们只是以不同的方式看待，我们俩都有不同的想法。
english: Look, it's-we just-we're looking at this evening in a different way, both of us. We both have different ideas of it.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没什么了不起的，明白吗？我们下来，鲱鱼来了，它们做它们的小鱼事，我们发出哦、啊的声音，看着鱼，然后它们回家，我们也回家。
english: There's nothing to it, alright? We come down here, the grunion arrive, they do their little fish business, we go ooh, ah, look at the fish, and then they go home and we go home.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F007
chinese: 不是那样的。
english: It's not like that.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M008
chinese: 我们没有看到grunions吗？
english: We're not seeing the grunions?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F008
chinese: 看，奥吉，我们从未见过他们。他们永远不会来。
english: Look, Augie, we've never seen them. They're never going to come.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们错过了他们两次。那从来没有发生过。
english: We missed them twice. That's not ever.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F009
chinese: 两倍是我们尝试的次数。这是有史以来的。
english: Twice is as many times as we've tried. That's ever.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M010
chinese: 这次我们会见到他们。
english: We'll see them this time.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F010
chinese: 不，我们不会。
english: No, we won't.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F011
chinese: 这是不可能的。就像在等待一样。等着看圣诞老人，你知道吗？
english: It's impossible. It's like waiting around. Waiting to see Santa Claus, you know?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F012
chinese: 就像我感觉整个生活都是站在这个海滩上，双手紧握着等待这些鱼出现，但这些鱼从未出现过。
english: Like I feel like my whole life I've been just standing on this beach with my hands clasped waiting for these fish to show up and these fish never show up.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M011
chinese: 上帝，我以为你想看它。
english: God, I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F013
chinese: 我做。
english: I do.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F014
chinese: 看，我做了。我总是这样做。但就好像每次我尝试什么都不会发生。
english: Look, I did. I always do. But it's like every time I try nothing ever happens.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M012
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，没有什么需要受创伤的。
english: It's just fish. Nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F015
chinese: 拜托，奥吉，这不是关于鱼的事情。
english: For God's sake, Augie, this is not about fish.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M013
chinese: 我一直在思考这件事，试图弄清楚我们何时走向恶化的转折点，但我似乎无法确定。
english: I've been turning this thing over in my head trying to figure out when the point was when we took a turn for the worse, and I can't seem to pinpoint it.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M014
chinese: 你在和玛吉通电话的时候还好。晚餐还可以。洗碗没有问题。让我想想。我洗了个澡。你在看新闻。你说奥吉，我觉得灯笼鱼在跑。我说太好了，我们去吧。我今晚感觉很幸运。
english: You were fine during the phone call from Marge. Dinner was okay. Doing the dishes was no problem. Let's see. I took a shower. You were watching the news. You said Augie, I think the grunion are running. I said great, let's go. I feel lucky tonight.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M015
chinese: 于是我把动物们带出去放在院子里。我穿上夹克，把车从车库里开出来。
english: And so I'm getting the animals, putting the animals out in the yard. I'm putting on my jacket, getting the car out of the garage-

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F016
chinese: 你还记得我们上次来这里的时候吗？
english: Do you remember the last time we came here?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F017
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了。
english: We thought I was pregnant.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F018
chinese: 你带来了一瓶香槟。
english: You brought a bottle of champagne.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F019
chinese: 我们脱下鞋子，在沙滩上赤脚跳舞。在月光下。
english: We took off our shoes and we danced barefoot in the sand. Under the moon.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F020
chinese: 而你亲密地在我耳边低语，让我能感受到你的话语。
english: And you whispered so intimately in my ear so I could feel your words.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F021
chinese: 哦，那一刻-就是那个时刻。
english: Oh, that moment-that was it.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F022
chinese: 我告诉自己，终于，这就是我应该拥有的幸福。
english: I told myself finally, this is how happy I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M016
chinese: 等一下。我明白了。
english: Wait a minute. I got it.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F023
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞。喝着一瓶香槟。
english: Dancing barefoot in the sand. Drinking out of a bottle of champagne.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M017
chinese: 它是开车经过Knickerbocker酒水柜台的，对吧？你说让我们买点香槟，我说时间不等人之类的话。
english: It was driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, right? You said let's get some champagne, and I said time's-a-wasting or something like that.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M018
chinese: 你希望这次像上次那样，对吗？就是这样，对吗？
english: You want this to be like the other time, right? That's it. Right?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F024
chinese: 我不想记住某件事情。
english: I don't want to remember something.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F025
chinese: 希望有些事情。
english: Hope for some things.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M019
chinese: 好的，我明白了。当然。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Right. I got it. Of course. Listen, do you want to dance?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M020
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: Do you want me to get some champagne?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M021
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F028
chinese: 不，不。
english: No, no.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M022
chinese: 什么？什么？你想让我在你耳边呼吸吗？
english: What? What? Do you want me to breathe in your ear?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F029
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M023
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？什么？什么？你想离婚吗？
english: Do you want to get married again? What? What? Do you want to get a divorce?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F030
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F031
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M024
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F032
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M025
chinese: 一块新地毯？一只贵宾犬？
english: A new carpet? A poodle?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M026
chinese: A-一个背部按摩，一些冰淇淋，一个自杀协议。你到底想要什么，卡拉？
english: A-a back rub, some ice cream, a suicide pact. What the hell do you want, Carla?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F033
chinese: 我希望事情能按照它们应该的方式发展。
english: I want things to turn out the way that they're supposed to be.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M027
chinese: 耶稣，欢迎来到人类世界。
english: Jesus, welcome to the human race.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M028
chinese: 你觉得这就是我想象中的结果吗？你认为我有一个伟大的幻想吗？四年后，我们会来到海滩上争吵吗？
english: Did you think this is how I thought it was going to turn out? Do you think I had some great fantasy down the line? That four years down the line that we'd come to the beach and argue with each other over fish?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M029
chinese: 不，我就像你一样。我以为一切都会是桃子和玫瑰，一切都会很美好。风吹拂着我们的头发，沙子蹭在我们的脚趾间，鱼儿总是会来，账单会自己付，我们会有三个胖乎乎的可爱孩子。哦，天哪。
english: No, I was just like you. I thought it was going to be all peaches and roses and everything great. And the wind in our hair and the sand in our toes, and the fish will always come and the bills will pay themselves, and we'll have three big fat rosy kids. And oh God.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M030
chinese: 你知道你得到了什么吗？这是我们的笑话，宝贝。因为你知道你得到了什么吗？嗯？卡拉？你知道你得到了什么吗？你得到了这个。
english: You know what you get? The jokes on us, baby. Because do you know what you get? Huh? Carla? Do you know what you get? You get this.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F034
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么？这什么都不是。
english: This what? What is this? This is nothing.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M031
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F035
chinese: 不，不是的。它站在海滩上等待和战斗。
english: No, it's not. It's standing on the beach waiting and fighting.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M032
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F036
chinese: 事情从来没有按照我想象的方式发展。
english: Things have never turned out anything the way that I thought they would be.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M033
chinese: 不，我知道。我也不。
english: No, I know. Me neither.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F037
chinese: 我的意思是，这就是一切，而且很多，但是
english: I mean, this is, this is everything, and it's a lot, but

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F038
chinese: 这不是其他的事情。你知道我想说什么吗？
english: it's not something else. Do you know what I'm trying to say?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M034
chinese: 嗯，我正在尽力而为。
english: Well, I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F039
chinese: 我知道你是，奥吉，我知道你希望今晚很愉快，但我忍不住想着去别的地方。
english: I know you are, Augie, and I know you wanted this evening to be nice, but I can't help thinking of being somewhere else.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M035
chinese: 是的，也许如果你和其他人在一起的话。
english: Yeah, maybe if you were with someone else too.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F040
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M036
chinese: 不，我知道。但我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know. But I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F041
chinese: 奥吉，无论我做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: Augie, anything I do I'd rather be doing with you.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M037
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F042
chinese: 神啊，难道你不知道吗？我的意思是，你可能想和别人在一起。那些不那么认真对待自己的人，能更加享受生活。
english: God, don't you know that? I mean, you're the one that probably wants to be with somebody else. Somebody that didn't take herself so seriously, could enjoy herself more.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M038
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我不这样认为。
english: Actually now that you mention it, no, I don't.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F043
chinese: 嗯，我想我们只是和对的人错了时间地点。
english: Well, I guess we're just in the wrong spart-spot with the right person.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M039
chinese: 看起来对我来说是个相当不错的地方。我的意思是，看看我们从这里能看到的月亮景色。
english: Seemed like a pretty good spot to me. I mean, look at the view of the moon we've got from here.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F044
chinese: 我注意到了。它很美。
english: I noticed that. It's beautiful.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F045
chinese: 你可以看到水面上方。
english: You can see right over the water.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F046
chinese: 上帝，大而古老的白色月亮。
english: God, big old white moon.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M040
chinese: 看看我们在这里得到了什么。
english: Look what we got here.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F047
chinese: 你带来了点心吗？
english: You brought refreshments?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M041
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F048
chinese: 至少我们不需要眼镜。
english: At least we won't need glasses.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M042
chinese: 你还冷吗？你想回家吗？
english: Are you still cold? Do you want to go home?

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F049
chinese: 所以我在想你可能是对的。
english: So I was thinking you might be right.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F050
chinese: 也许这才是对的地方。
english: Maybe this is the right place after all.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F051
chinese: 对不起，奥吉。
english: I'm sorry, Augie.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M043
chinese: 嘘。
english: Shh.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M044
chinese: 如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: If we're very quiet the fish might come.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_F052
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses03F_script02_2_M045
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道的唯一一个仍然爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know that still loves his parents.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M000
chinese: 是的。我知道。它已经过时了，不是吗？
english: Yeah. I know. It went out of style, didn't it?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F001
chinese: 不，没关系。你知道，那没什么问题。
english: No, it's all right. There's nothing wrong in that, you know.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F002
chinese: 这里真的很可爱。空气很甜。
english: It's really lovely here. The air is sweet.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了吗？
english: You're not sorry you came?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不，我不抱歉。这是-
english: No. I'm not sorry. It's-

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F004
chinese: 我不能留下。
english: I can't stay.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F005
chinese: 嗯，首先，你妈妈告诉我要走。【笑声】。
english: Well, for one thing, your mother so much has told me to go. [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的-
english: Well-

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F006
chinese: 看，
english: Look,

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F007
chinese: 你最近的表现有点，嗯，你懂的。
english: you've been acting kind of, well, you know.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F008
chinese: 嗯，自从我来了以后，你一直很尴尬。
english: Well, you've been embarrassed ever since I came.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M005
chinese: 是的，我猜我一直在。但现在它正在离开我。
english: Yes, I guess I have been. But it's going from me now.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M006
chinese: 噢，看，嗯，事情是这样的，我原本计划在一周左右悄悄接近你，他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: Oh look, um, well, the thing is, I was planning on, planning on sort of sneaking up on you over a week or so, and they-they take it for granted we're all set.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F009
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M007
chinese: 你是怎么知道的？
english: How did you know?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F010
chinese: 是的，他们会。尤其是你的妈妈。
english: Yeah, they would. Especially your mom.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M008
chinese: 好的，嗯- 你想要吗？
english: Well, uh- would you want to?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我，我猜这就是为什么我要求你来的原因。
english: I, I guess that's why I asked you to come.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F011
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，
english: Well, I mean,

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M010
chinese: 哦，安妮。
english: Oh, Annie.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F012
chinese: 从她的观点来看，我为什么还会来这里呢？
english: from her opinion, why else would I come here?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M011
chinese: 安妮，我爱你。
english: Annie, I love you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M012
chinese: 我非常爱你。
english: I love you a great deal.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M013
chinese: 我-我爱你。我没有想象力。这就是我知道如何表达的全部。
english: I-I love you. I have no imagination. That's all I know how to tell it.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F013
chinese: 嗯，我想这就是我来的原因。
english: Well, I guess that's why I came.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M014
chinese: 我让你尴尬了。我不想在这里告诉你。我想去一个对彼此都是全新的地方。在这里感觉不对，你觉得呢？这个院子和这把椅子。
english: I'm embarrassing you. I didn't want to tell you it here. I wanted to go somewhere that would be brand-new to each other. It feels wrong here, don't you? This yard and this chair.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M015
chinese: 我不想从任何人那里赢得你。我希望你为我做好准备。
english: I don't want to win you from anybody. I want you to be ready for me.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F014
chinese: 我已经准备好很久了。
english: I've been ready for a long, long time.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M016
chinese: 然后他就永远离开了。你确定吗？
english: Then he's gone forever. You're sure?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F015
chinese: 看
english: Look

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F016
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I was almost married two years ago.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M017
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F017
chinese: 因为你开始给我写信。
english: 'Cause you started to write me.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M018
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F018
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M019
chinese: 为什么你不告诉我？
english: Why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F019
chinese: 嗯，我不知道，直到那时你才写信，然后当你写了信时，你说了什么？
english: Well, I don't know, you didn't write until then and then when you did, what'd you say?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F020
chinese: 你总是可以如此模棱两可。
english: You always can be so ambiguous.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M020
chinese: 给我一个吻，安妮。
english: Give me a kiss, Annie.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M021
chinese: 给我-
english: Give me-

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M022
chinese: [笑声]。天啊，我吻了安妮。我吻了安妮。我等了多久，多久才能吻你。
english: [LAUGHTER]. God, I kissed Annie. I kissed Annie. How long, how long I've been waiting to kiss you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F021
chinese: 我不知道我是否能原谅你那件事。你为什么等了这么久？我坐在房间里想着你，不知道自己是否疯了。
english: I don't know if I ever can forgive you for that. Why'd you wait so long? I sat in my room wondering if I was crazy for thinking about you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M023
chinese: 我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: We're going to live now. I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F022
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是这样的。
english: Not like that, you're not.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M024
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F023
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。
english: Like Larry's brother. Do it like you, Chris.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F024
chinese: 这是什么？
english: What is it?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M025
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方。我想和你独处。
english: Let's drive somewhere. I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F025
chinese: 不。这是什么？这是你的母亲吗？
english: No. What is it? Is it your mother?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M026
chinese: 不，不，不，不。没有那样的事情。
english: No, no, no, no. Nothing like that.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F026
chinese: 那么告诉我出了什么问题。我的意思是，即使在你的信中也有一些羞愧的事情。
english: Well then tell me what's wrong. I mean, even in your letters there's something ashamed.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M027
chinese: 是的。我猜是有的。我猜我曾经是，但是现在它正在离开我。
english: Yeah. I guess there is. I guess I was, but uh- it's going from me now.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F027
chinese: 你应该告诉我。
english: You should tell me.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M028
chinese: 我不知道从哪里开始。
english: I don't know where to start.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F028
chinese: 但是，克里斯，这样是行不通的。
english: But, Chris, it wouldn't work like this.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M029
chinese: 你知道当我出国时，我说我是一家公司的负责人。
english: You know when I went overseas. I said I was in command of a company.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F029
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M030
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well, I lost them.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F030
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M031
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F031
chinese: 吉斯。
english: Geez.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M032
chinese: 这需要一点时间来处理。因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: It takes a little while to toss that off. Because they weren't just men.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M033
chinese: 例如，有一次，肯定下了好几天雨。有一个孩子走到我面前，把他最后一双干袜子给了我，我把它们放进了口袋里。
english: For instance, one time, it had to have been raining several days. There was this one kid, he came up to me and he gave me his last pair of dry socks. Put them in my pocket.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M034
chinese: 我的意思是，那只是一件小事，但那就是我曾经拥有的那种人。他们不仅仅是死了，他们是为了彼此而自杀。我是指确切的那种情况。再自私一点，他们今天可能还在这里。
english: I mean, that's-that's only a little thing, but that's the kind of guys I had. They didn't just die. They killed themselves for each other. And I mean that exactly. A little more selfish and they'd still be here today.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M035
chinese: 我，我以为有什么东西在看着他们离去。
english: And I, and I thought something watching them go down.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M036
chinese: 一切都在被摧毁，你看，但也有一件新事物正在被创造。一种责任感，人对人。你明白我说的吗？
english: Everything was being destroyed, see, but there was one new thing that was being created. A kind of responsibility, man for man. You understand me?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M037
chinese: 并且展示出来，将它带到地球上，就像一座纪念碑站在我们身后，每个人都能感受到它，并且它会对他产生影响。
english: And to show that-to bring that onto the earth like some sort of monument standing right behind us where everyone could feel it and it would make a difference to him.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M038
chinese: 我回到这里，真是太不可思议了。在这里没有任何意义。对他们来说，整件事就像一场公交车事故。
english: And I came back here and it was incredible. There was no meaning in that here. The whole thing to them was a bus accident.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M039
chinese: 我又和爸爸一起去上班了，又陷入了那场老鼠赛跑。我感受到了你说的话-不知怎么地感到羞愧。因为没有人有任何改变。这似乎让很多人变成了傻瓜。
english: And I went to work with dad and that rat race again. And I felt what you said-ashamed somehow. Because nobody was changed at all. It seemed to make a sucker out of a lot of guys.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M040
chinese: 我感到活着是错误的。开车、看到新的支票簿、看到新的冰箱，这些都让我感到不对劲。我的意思是，你可以把这些东西从战争中拿出来。但是你必须知道，当你开着那辆车时，那是一个人对另一个人的爱所产生的结果。因此，你必须因此变得更好一点。
english: And I felt wrong to be alive. To drive the car, to see the new checkbook, to see the new refrigerator. I mean, you can take those things out of the war. But you got to know that when you drive that car that that came out of the love a man can have for another man. And you got to be a little bit better because of that.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M041
chinese: 否则，你在这里所拥有的是赃物；而且上面有血迹。
english: Otherwise, what you have here is loot; and there's blood on it.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M042
chinese: 而且我不想要其中的任何一部分。
english: And I didn't want to take any of it.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M043
chinese: 我猜那也包括你。
english: And I guess that included you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F032
chinese: 你还是这样感觉吗？
english: And you still feel that way?

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M044
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now, Annie.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F033
chinese: 因为你不能再有那种感觉了，克里斯。你听到我说的了吗？永远不要再有。我的意思是，钱和我也是。
english: Because you can't feel that way, never again, Chris. You hear me? Never. I mean, the money and me too.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F034
chinese: 我的意思是，那些钱没有任何问题，你父亲让好的飞机起飞，你应该为此感到骄傲。一个人应该为此而得到报酬。
english: I mean, there's nothing wrong in that money, and your father put good planes up in the air and you should be proud of that. A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M045
chinese: 安妮，
english: Annie,

name: Ses03F_script01_3_M046
chinese: 安妮，我要为你赚大钱。
english: Annie, I'm going to make a fortune for you.

name: Ses03F_script01_3_F035
chinese: 我会用财富做什么？
english: What am I going to do with a fortune?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道的唯一一个仍然爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know that still loves his parents.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道。它似乎已经过时了，不是吗？
english: I know.  It sort of went out of style didn't it?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F001
chinese: 不，没关系。你知道吗，这是件好事。
english: No.  It's alright.  It's a good thing, you know?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F002
chinese: 这里很可爱。
english: It's lovely here.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F003
chinese: 空气是如此甜美。
english: The air is so sweet.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了吗？
english: You're not sorry you came?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F004
chinese: 不，我不抱歉。但我不打算留下来。
english: No.  I'm not sorry.  But I'm not going to stay.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F005
chinese: 首先，你妈妈甚至告诉我要走。
english: First of all your mother so much as told me to go.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的...
english: Well...

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F006
chinese: 看，
english: Look,

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F007
chinese: 你看到她的表现方式，然后嗯，我的意思是，你，你的行为有点...
english: you saw the way that she acted and then well, I mean, you, you were acting kind of...

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F008
chinese: 嗯，我不知道，自从我来了以后，我对她感到尴尬。
english: Well, I don't know, embarrassed of her since I came.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M005
chinese: 嗯，问题是我原本计划在一周左右悄悄接近你，而他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: Well the trouble is I was planning on sneaking up on you over a week or so and they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F009
chinese: 是的。我知道他们会这样做，尤其是你的母亲。
english: Yeah.  I know they would, especially your mother.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你是怎么知道的？
english: How did you know?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F010
chinese: 好吧，从她的角度来看，我来这里还有什么其他原因呢？
english: Well what other reason, from her point of view, would I be coming here?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M007
chinese: 那么，你想要吗？
english: So, would you want to?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M008
chinese: 我是说，这就是我请你来的原因。
english: I mean, that's the reason why I asked you here.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F011
chinese: 好的，
english: Well,

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M009
chinese: 哦，安妮。我爱你。我非常爱你。
english: Oh Annie.  I love you.  I love you a great deal.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我爱你。
english: I love you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F012
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I guess that's why I came.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M011
chinese: 我不...我没有想象力，这是我唯一知道如何讲述的方式。
english: I don't...I have no imagination that's the only way I know how to tell it.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M012
chinese: 我让你尴尬了。我不想在这里告诉你这个。我想开车去一个全新的地方，我们对彼此都是全新的。在这里感觉不对，你觉得呢？
english: I'm embarrassing you.  I didn't want to tell you this here.  I wanted to drive someplace brand new where we'd be brand new to each other.  It feels wrong here don't you?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M013
chinese: 这个院子和这把椅子。我不想从你那里赢得任何东西，我只希望你为我做好准备。
english: This yard and this chair.  I don't want to win you from anything, I want you to be ready for me.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F013
chinese: 看，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Look, I've been ready for a long, long time now.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M014
chinese: 然后他就永远离开了，你确定吗？
english: Then he's gone forever, you sure?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F014
chinese: 看，我差点在两年前结婚了。
english: Look, I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M015
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F015
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M016
chinese: 你在那么久以前感受到了某种东西。
english: You felt something that far back.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F016
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M017
chinese: 为什么你不告诉我？
english: Why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F017
chinese: 我一直在等你，克里斯，我的意思是，直到那时你从未写过，然后当你写了之后，你说了什么？
english: I was waiting for you Chris, I mean, till then you never wrote and then when you did what did you say?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F018
chinese: 你总是如此模棱两可。
english: You'd always be so ambiguous.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M018
chinese: 给我一个吻，安，就给我一个...
english: Give me a kiss Ann, just give me...

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M019
chinese: 哦，天啊。安妮，我吻了安妮。我吻了安妮。
english: Oh God.  Annie, I kissed Annie.  I kissed Annie.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F019
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你的。
english: I'll never forgive you for that.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M020
chinese: 多久了，多久了，我一直在等待做那件事。
english: How long, how long I've been waiting to do that.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F020
chinese: 我的意思是，你为什么等了这么多年？我一直坐在那里，想知道我是否疯了，因为我一直在想你。
english: I mean,  Why did you wait all these years?  There I was sitting around and wondering if I was crazy for thinking about you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M021
chinese: 我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: We're going to live now.  I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F021
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M022
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F022
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你克里斯一样去做。
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you Chris.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M023
chinese: 什么都没有。嘿，让我们开车去某个地方吧。我想和你独处。
english: Nothing.  Hey, let's drive somewhere.  I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F023
chinese: 这是什么？
english: What is it?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F024
chinese: 不，是什么？你的妈妈吗？
english: No, what is it?  Your mother?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M024
chinese: 不，没有，没有那样的事情。
english: No, nothing, nothing like that.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F025
chinese: 告诉我出了什么问题。我的意思是，即使在你的信中，你似乎也感到羞愧。
english: Tell me what's wrong.  I mean, even in your letters you seemed ashamed.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M025
chinese: 嗯，是的，我想我曾经感到羞愧，但是，它正在离开我。
english: Well, yes I guess I've been ashamed but, it's going from me.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You got to tell me.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M026
chinese: 我不知道从哪里开始。
english: I don't know where to start.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F027
chinese: 好的。这样行不行？
english: Okay.  It wouldn't work like this?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M027
chinese: 你还记得我在海外指挥一家公司吗？
english: You remember overseas I was in command of a company?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F028
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M028
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well I lost them.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F029
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M029
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F030
chinese: 吉斯。
english: Geez.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M030
chinese: 需要花一点时间才能摆脱这个，因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: Takes a little while to toss that off cause they weren't just men.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M031
chinese: 例如，有一次...连续下了几天雨，有一个孩子走到我面前，他把他最后一双干袜子给了我，放进了我的口袋里。
english: For instance, one time this...it had been raining several days and this one kid, he came up to me, he gave me his last pair of dry socks, put them in my pocket.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M032
chinese: 那只是一件小事，但那就是我所拥有的那种人。他们不仅仅是死了，他们为彼此而自杀，我是指确切地这样。
english: That's just a little thing but that's the kind of guys I had.  They didn't just die, they killed themselves for each other and I mean that exactly.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M033
chinese: 如果他们再自私一点，他们可能还在这里。我从他们的失败中得到了这个想法。你看，一切都在被摧毁，但也有一件新事物正在被创造出来。
english: A little more selfish and they'd still be here today.  And I got this idea watching them go down.  See everything was being destroyed but there was one new thing that was being created.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M034
chinese: 这是一种责任，人对人的责任。你明白我说的吗？
english: It was a kind of responsibility, man for man.  You understand me?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M035
chinese: 并且展示出来，并且再次将它带到地球上，就像某种纪念碑站在我们所有人的身后，我们可以感受到它，对他来说会有所不同。
english: And to show that and to bring that onto the earth again like some sort of monument standing right behind all of us and we could feel it and it would make a difference to him.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M036
chinese: 然后我来到这里，真是令人难以置信。这里没有任何意义。对他们来说，整件事就像一场公交车事故。
english: And then I came here and it was incredible.  There was no meaning in it here.  The whole thing to them was a kind of bus accident.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M037
chinese: 我和爸爸一起去上班，又陷入了那场竞争激烈的工作，我感受到了你说的羞愧。不知怎么的，因为没有人有任何改变。
english: And I went to work with dad and that rat race again and I felt what you said, ashamed.  Somehow because nobody was changed at all.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M038
chinese: 似乎让很多人成为傻瓜。我觉得活着是错的。我觉得拥有那本新支票簿是错的。
english: It seemed to make a sucker out of a lot of guys.  I felt wrong to be alive.  I felt wrong to have that new checkbook,

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M039
chinese: 打开那个新的银行账户，开新车并看看新的冰箱。
english: open that new bank account, drive the new car and see the new refrigerator

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M040
chinese: 因为你可以将这些事情从战争中剔除出去。但你必须知道，当你驾驶那辆车时，它源自一个人对另一个人的爱，因此你必须变得更好一点。
english: cause you can take those things out of the war.  But you got to know, when you drive that car that it came out of the love that a man can have for a man and you got to be a little bit better because of that.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M041
chinese: 否则你所拥有的就是赃物，上面还有血迹。
english: Otherwise what you have is loot and there's blood on it.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M042
chinese: 我不想接受其中的任何一部分，我猜其中也包括你。
english: And I didn't want to take any of it and I guess that included you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F031
chinese: 你还是这样感觉吗？
english: And you still feel that way?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M043
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now Annie.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F032
chinese: 因为你不能再有那种感觉。你听到了吗？你不能。你应该拥有你所拥有的一切，克里斯。
english: Cause you must not feel that way again.  You hear me?  You can't.  You deserve everything you have Chris.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F033
chinese: 那也包括我，我的意思是，还有那笔钱，你有权拥有那笔钱。你父亲让飞机飞上天空，是好飞机，他应该得到回报，你应该为此感到骄傲。一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: that includes me too, I mean and the money, you have right to that money.  Your father put planes up in the air, good planes and he deserves it, you should be proud of that.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M044
chinese: [垃圾] 安妮
english: [GARBAGE] Annie

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M045
chinese: 安妮，我要为你赚大钱。
english: Annie I'm going to make a fortune for you.

name: Ses03M_script01_3_F034
chinese: 我会用财富做什么？
english: What am I going to do with a fortune?

name: Ses03M_script01_3_M046
chinese: 买一些帽子吗？
english: Buy some hats?

name: Ses03M_impro06_F000
chinese: 你好吗？你感觉怎么样？
english: How's it going?  How are you feeling?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M000
chinese: 我啊--
english: I ah--

name: Ses03M_impro06_M001
chinese: 好的。
english: alright.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F001
chinese: 还好吗？
english: Hanging in there?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M002
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F002
chinese: 好伤心。
english: So sad.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M003
chinese: 只是感觉就像昨天我还在和他说话。
english: It just feels like I was talking to him yesterday.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F004
chinese: 你们真的很亲近，对吗？
english: You guys were real close huh?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M004
chinese: 他是我成长过程中唯一的朋友。
english: He was my only friend growing up.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M005
chinese: 没有其他人愿意和我说话，但他愿意。
english: no one else would talk to me but he would.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M006
chinese: 他本应是我婚礼上的伴郎。
english: He was supposed to be the best man at my wedding.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F005
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm so sorry.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M007
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M008
chinese: 你知道我总是告诉他要更加狂野的，你知道吗？
english: You know I was always the one to tell him to be more wild you know?

name: Ses03M_impro06_F006
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M009
chinese: 他只是过分了。
english: And he just took it overboard.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F007
chinese: 发生了什么事？出了什么问题？
english: What happened?  What went wrong?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M010
chinese: 你知道一个愚蠢的酒后驾驶案例，就是...
english: You know a stupid case of drunk driving it's just...

name: Ses03M_impro06_M011
chinese: 而最糟糕的是，他和他的女朋友一起在车里。
english: and the worst part of it is that he was in the car with his girlfriend,

name: Ses03M_impro06_M012
chinese: 他的女朋友也被杀了。
english: his girlfriend got killed too.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F008
chinese: 哦，天啊。
english: Oh man.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M013
chinese: 他撞到的车是他的家人的车。
english: And the car that he hit was his family.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F009
chinese: 他们怎么样？
english: How are they?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M014
chinese: 母亲和父亲去世了--
english: The mother and father died--

name: Ses03M_impro06_M015
chinese: 而孩子们现在陷入了昏迷中的麻痹状态。
english: and the kids are paralyzed in a coma right now.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M016
chinese: 而且只是去参加葬礼的话，那就是-
english: and just going to the funeral it's-

name: Ses03M_impro06_M017
chinese: - 我是想念他还是恨他，你知道吗？
english: -do I miss him or do I hate him, you know?

name: Ses03M_impro06_F010
chinese: 是的。我的意思是，如果你需要和任何人交谈或者需要什么帮助，我会在这里陪伴你，好吗？
english: Yeah.  Like I mean if you need anyone to talk to or anything I'm here for you okay?

name: Ses03M_impro06_MXX0
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F011
chinese: 我们都在这里支持你。
english: We're all here for you.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M018
chinese: 我原本应该在去年夏天见到他。
english: I was supposed to see him last summer

name: Ses03M_impro06_M019
chinese: 然后我忙于工作和其他事情，三年过去了。
english: then I got busy with work and stuff and three years go by

name: Ses03M_impro06_M020
chinese: 然后像这样发生了一些事情，你知道吗？
english: and then something like this happens you know?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M021
chinese: 我是说过去三个月我甚至没有和他通过电话交谈。
english: I mean I haven't even talked to him on the phone for the past three months.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M022
chinese: 他应该是我的最好朋友。
english: He's supposed to be my best friend.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F012
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F013
chinese: 生活中只是发生了一些事情，你只是...就是没有解释，你知道吗？我们就是不...
english: just things happen in life and you just...there's just no explanation you know?  We just don't...

name: Ses03M_impro06_M023
chinese: 这太糟糕了。
english: It's so fucked up.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F014
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F015
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm so sorry.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M024
chinese: 为什么是这样的？
english: Why is that?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M025
chinese: 他正在学习成为一名医生。
english: He was studying to be a doctor.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M026
chinese: 我的意思是，他是...他想要帮助贫穷国家的人们，那是他的目标。他不在乎钱。他只是想去帮助人们。
english: I mean he was...he wanted to help people in poor countries, that is his goal.  He didn't care about the money.  He just wanted to go and help people.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M027
chinese: 什么...我在做什么？
english: What the...what am I doing?

name: Ses03M_impro06_M028
chinese: 在美国公司工作？哇。
english: Working for corporate America?  Wow.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M029
chinese: 他实际上想做某事。
english: He actually wanted to do something.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F016
chinese: 现在你可以追随他的脚步，你知道吗？实现他想做的事情。
english: Well now you can follow his footsteps, you know?  Carry out what he wanted to do.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M030
chinese: 我不能做那个。
english: I can't do that.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F017
chinese: 当然，你可以。
english: Well sure you could.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M031
chinese: 你应该见过他。
english: You should've met him.

name: Ses03M_impro06_M032
chinese: 他是最伟大的...每个人都喜欢他。
english: He is the greatest...everyone liked him.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F018
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F019
chinese: 我本来很愿意的。
english: I would've loved to.

name: Ses03M_impro06_F020
chinese: 现在我不能。
english: Now I can't.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F000
chinese: 天啊，终于轮到我了，排在队伍的前面。我在那里等了大约半个小时。
english: God, finally I got to the line, the front of the line. I've been waiting there for like half an hour.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F001
chinese: 【呼吸】这里太热了。呼。
english: [BREATHING] It's so hot in here. Hoo.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M000
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M001
chinese: 哦，嗯-
english: Oh, um-

name: Ses03F_impro01_F002
chinese: 什么问题？
english: What's wrong?

name: Ses03F_impro01_M002
chinese: 你没有填写正确。好吧。它说你必须填写这个背面的表格，但你填写了黄色的表格。
english: You didn't fill this out right. All right. It says that you have to fill out the back sheet of this, but you filled out the yellow sheet of it.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F003
chinese: 不，不，不，不，不，不。那边的女士告诉我填写前面的表格，并让我在这条线上等待。
english: No, no, no, no, no, no. The lady over there, she told me to fill out the front and she said to wait in this line.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M003
chinese: 谁？
english: Who?

name: Ses03F_impro01_F004
chinese: 我不知道。一个女士。索尼娅或者什么的。
english: I don't know. Some lady. Sonya or something.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M004
chinese: 她-她可能甚至不在这里工作。
english: She- she probably doesn't even work here.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F005
chinese: 请问？不，不。我在那边排队等候了。
