english: Excuse me? No, no. I waited in the line over there..

name: Ses03F_impro01_M005
chinese: 好的，嗯-
english: All right  Uh-

name: Ses03F_impro01_F006
chinese: 她告诉我过来这里，并且她说要填写申请表上的所有内容，我也照做了。
english: and she told me to come over here and she said to fill out everything on the application and I did that.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M006
chinese: 这不对。
english: It's not right.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F007
chinese: 看，我--不，不，不，我--你不明白。我必须回去工作。
english: Look, I-- No, no, no, I--you don't understand. I have to go back to work.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M007
chinese: 你只是拿走了-好吧。
english: You just take--all right.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M008
chinese: 嗯，你在工作中没有正确填写这张纸，还需要再花费十五分钟来完成，看看我们这里排队的人多长，所以只是-
english: Well, you didn't fill this paper at work out right and it's going to take another fifteen minutes to do it and look at how long the line we got here so just-

name: Ses03F_impro01_F008
chinese: 我不是-
english: I am not-

name: Ses03F_impro01_M009
chinese: 好的，请回去快速填写完，并且很抱歉，您需要重新排队等候。我不能让您插队。
english: okay, just go back and fill it out real quick and I'm sorry, you have to get back in line and wait. I can't let you cut.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F009
chinese: 但是你不明白。我不能重新排队，因为我必须回去工作。如果我不离开这里，我会被解雇的。
english: But you don't understand. I cannot get back in line because I have to go back to work. I will get fired if I don't leave here.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M010
chinese: 嗯，也许你应该早点到这里，这样你就有很多时间来做这件事了。
english: Well, maybe you should have got here earlier than so you had a lot of time to do this.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F010
chinese: 但是我当时在工作，那位女士告诉我过去工作并排队。
english: But I was at work and the lady told me to come and work it and to stand in the line.

name: Ses03F_impro01_M011
chinese: 我不知道这位女士是谁。
english: I don't know who this lady is.

name: Ses03F_impro01_F011
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_impro03_M000
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，看那个。嗯哦，那是多少克拉的？
english: Oh, my God, look at that. Huh-oh, how many carats is that?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F000
chinese: 我知道。【笑声】伙计，我不知道。它-可能吧。它很大。我甚至不知道怎么戴它。我的手像很低一样下垂。我简直不敢相信。
english: I know. [LAUGHTER]. Dude, I don't know. It's- Probably. It's huge. I don't even know how to like wear it. My hand is like going down like really low. I can't believe it.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M001
chinese: 喜欢十八岁吗？【笑声】
english: Like eighteen? [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_impro03_M002
chinese: 哦，耶稣。
english: Oh, Jesus.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M003
chinese: 这是什么？
english: Is it-

name: Ses03F_impro03_F001
chinese: 我- 是的，它是-
english: I- Yeah, it's-

name: Ses03F_impro03_M004
chinese: 那么他是如何做到的？
english: So how did he do it?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F002
chinese: 哦，伙计。所以我就是这样的-好吧，我们去百老汇看了一场演出，对吧？那是《糟糕的伴郎》。你看过那个吗？
english: Oh, man. So I was--okay, so we went to go see this show on Broadway, right? And it was The wed- the wed- The Lousy Chaperone. Have you seen that one?

name: Ses03F_impro03_M005
chinese: 是的 [笑声]
english: yeah [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_impro03_M006
chinese: 是的，糟糕的陪同者。【笑声】嗯。
english: Yeah, The Lousy Chaperone. [LAUGHTER] Uh huh.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F003
chinese: 对。对。对。所以，里面有一个完整的婚礼场景。好吧，不是-昏昏欲睡，昏昏欲睡[笑声]-不是糟糕的。[笑声]。嗯-所以昏昏欲睡。所以我去看了这个昏昏欲睡的伴娘。然后-
english: Right. Right. Right. So, and there's like a whole like wedding scene in it. All right, not the--Drowsy, Drowsy [LAUGHTER] --not the Lousy. [LAUGHTER]. Um - So Drowsy. So I go to see this Drowsy Chaperone. And uh-

name: Ses03F_impro03_M007
chinese: [笑声] 嗯，困了。
english: [LAUGHTER] Uh- Drowsy.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F004
chinese: 在表演结束时，你知道，就像我们都在鼓掌之类的。突然间，我看向一边，然后...
english: at the end of the performance, you know, like we're all clapping and stuff. And all of a sudden I look over and

name: Ses03F_impro03_F005
chinese: 乔走了。-他去哪里了，你知道吗？
english: Joe's gone. -where did he go, you know?

name: Ses03F_impro03_M008
chinese: 嗯，噢-
english: Uh huh. Oh-

name: Ses03F_impro03_F006
chinese: 然后我就像哦，他去了- -厕所，但他没告诉我，我甚至没注意到他离开。突然间，我发誓，我就坐在那里，然后-
english: And I'm like oh, he went to the- -the bathroom, but he didn't tell me, I didn't even notice him leaving. And all of a sudden, I swear to God, I'm sitting there and-

name: Ses03F_impro03_F007
chinese: 他走上舞台——整个演员阵容的每个人都像
english: he comes up onstage-- And the entire cast everyone just like

name: Ses03F_impro03_M009
chinese: 哦-
english: oh-

name: Ses03F_impro03_F008
chinese: 他走上去，大家都在鼓掌，他站在那里，他们给他照了一盏聚光灯。
english: goes up there and everyone's clapping and he's standing there and they put a spotlight on him.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M010
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my God.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F009
chinese: 然后我就像吓坏了。我就像怎么回事，你知道的。我不知道发生了什么。然后他就站在那里，突然他们给了他一个麦克风-
english: And I'm like freaking out. I'm like what the hell's going on, you know. I don't know what's going on. And so he's like standing there and then all of a sudden they give him a microphone-

name: Ses03F_impro03_F010
chinese: 然后他就开始对我做这样一个小演讲，关于我和这样的事情。
english: and he just starts doing like this little spiel about me and like

name: Ses03F_impro03_F011
chinese: 他要求我嫁给他，就像在舞台上一样。我当时简直不敢相信，然后我不得不走上去，我觉得我可能绊倒了或者什么的。
english: he asked me to marry him, like- onstage. I was like, I couldn't believe--and I had to walk up there and I was, like I think I tripped or something.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M011
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？
english: Are you kidding me?

name: Ses03F_impro03_M012
chinese: 你说什么？你说是的，对吗？【笑声】
english: Wha- What'd you say? You said yes, right? [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03F_impro03_F012
chinese: 是的，我说了是的，但是，是的，我的意思是，
english: Yeah, I said yes, but I, yeah, I mean,

name: Ses03F_impro03_F013
chinese: 我不知道-它就像是把我吓了一跳。
english: I don't know- it just like took me, took me by surprise.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F014
chinese: 他得分了。
english: He scored points.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M013
chinese: 你得到了起立鼓掌吗？
english: Did you get a standing ovation?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F015
chinese: 哦，是的。每个人都在场，是的。还有人，我们的朋友在观众席上，我不知道的是，像家人一样。
english: Oh, yeah. Everyone--yeah. And people--friends of ours were in the audience, I didn't know about, like family members.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F016
chinese: 是的。太棒了。
english: Yeah. It was great.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M014
chinese: 你是认真的吗？
english: Are you serious?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F017
chinese: 那是--我哭了，
english: It was--I cried,

name: Ses03F_impro03_M015
chinese: 不，你值得哭。我的意思是，幸福的眼泪。
english: No, you deserve to cry. I mean, tears of happiness.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F018
chinese: 像一个失败者一样，我哭了。
english: like a loser, I cried.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F019
chinese: 但是，我不知道，我觉得很奇怪，因为我觉得自己还很年轻，你知道吗？
english: But, I don't know, I--it's so weird to think I'm marrying somebody 'cause I feel so young, you know?

name: Ses03F_impro03_M016
chinese: 那么，那么，那么这个地方在哪里？你们谈过它会在哪里吗？
english: So where- where- where is this--have you talked about where it's going to be?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F020
chinese: 没有。没有计划。或者任何- 可能。
english: No. No plans. or any- and probably

name: Ses03F_impro03_F021
chinese: 我想我想要结婚 - 我想要举办两场婚礼。一场在这里，然后一场在欧洲。
english: like I think I want to get married--I want to have two weddings. One here, then one in Europe.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M017
chinese: 夏威夷？不。
english: Hawaii? No.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F022
chinese: 不，夏威夷是蜜月的好地方。但是，嗯--
english: No. Hawaii's for honeymoons. But uh--

name: Ses03F_impro03_M018
chinese: 哦。像巴黎一样吗？在埃菲尔铁塔上？
english: Oh. Like Paris? On the Eiffel Tower?

name: Ses03F_impro03_F023
chinese: 哦，也许吧。我不知道。我去过那里很多次了。我想我们会在西班牙结婚，然后我们会在这里结婚。
english: Oh, maybe. I don't know. I've been there so many times. I think it's--we're going to get married in Spain and then we're going to get married here.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M019
chinese: 他很有钱。也许你可以把埃菲尔铁塔租出去给你--
english: He's rich enough. Maybe you can rent out the Eiffel Tower for your--

name: Ses03F_impro03_M020
chinese: 哦，耶稣。
english: Oh, Jesus.

name: Ses03F_impro03_M021
chinese: 太棒了。【笑声】婚姻。
english: That's awesome. [LAUGHTER] Marriage.

name: Ses03F_impro03_F024
chinese: 是的。我太兴奋了。【笑声】。
english: Yeah. I'm so excited. [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事让你烦恼？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F001
chinese: 嗯，她在纽约已经离开了三年半，突然间她就出现了。
english: Well she's been away for three and a half years in New York and suddenly she just shows up.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M001
chinese: 也许，也许他只是想见她。
english: Well maybe, maybe he just wanted to see her.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而旅行七百英里。
english: Nobody travels seven hundred miles just see.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M002
chinese: 嗯，你是什么意思？他们一起长大，整个生活都住在一起。他为什么不想见她呢？
english: uh-uh What do you mean?  They grew up next to each other their entire lives.  Why shouldn't he want to see her?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M003
chinese: 嘿，不要那样看着我。我和你一样也不知道更多。
english: Hey don't look at me like that.  I don't know anymore than you.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F003
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M004
chinese: 谁说他甚至考虑过那个问题？
english: Who said he even thought about that?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F004
chinese: 我看到了它。它具有它的外观。
english: I see it.  It has the appearance of it.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M005
chinese: 好的，那又怎样？
english: Well, so what?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here Joe?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M006
chinese: 现在听着，孩子...
english: Now listen kid...

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F006
chinese: 不，她不是他的女朋友，乔也知道这一点。
english: No.  She's not his girl Joe and she knows that.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F007
chinese: 那为什么她还是单身呢？我的意思是纽约有很多单身男人。为什么她到现在还没结婚呢？可能有一百个男人告诉她她很傻，但是她还在等待。
english: Then why is still single?  I mean there's plenty of single men in New York.  Why isn't she married by now?  Probably a hundred men has told her that she's foolish but, she's waiting.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M008
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？嗯？
english: How do you know why she's waited?  Hmmm?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F008
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的，所以。
english: Because she knows what I know, that's why.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F009
chinese: 我的意思是，她的信仰比岩石还要坚定。
english: I mean, her faith is stronger than a rock.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F010
chinese: 我最糟糕的时候，我会想起她，你知道的，而且我
english: My worst times I think about her, you know, and I

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F011
chinese: 就像我知道只要她在等待，我就又是正确的。
english: it's like I know as long as she's waiting I'm right again.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M009
chinese: 看看今天多么美好的一天。我们为什么要争论呢？
english: Look at how nice the day is.  What are we arguing for?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F012
chinese: 没有。我家里没有人敢挑战她的信仰。你知道，也许陌生人可以，但不包括他的父亲，也不包括他的兄弟。
english: No.  Nobody in my house better dare and challenge her faith.  You know and maybe strangers but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M010
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你想要什么？
english: What do you want me to do?  What do you want?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F013
chinese: 我希望你能表现得好像他还活着一样。我的意思是，不要以为我没有看到你自从他邀请她来这里以后的样子。
english: I want-I want you to act like he's still alive.  I mean don't think I haven't seen the way that you've been since he invited her here.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M011
chinese: 但是凯特...
english: But Kate...

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F014
chinese: 但是我不会接受这些胡闹，因为你知道会发生什么吗？如果他不回来，我会自杀。
english: But I won't have any of this nonsense because you know what happens?  If he doesn't come back I'll kill myself.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F015
chinese: 笑，嘲笑我吧，但我会的。因为你知道她来这里时发生了什么吗？她回来后睡在他的房间里，纪念品碎成了碎片。乔，看。看看它。你必须和我一起相信。
english: Laugh, laugh at me but I will.  Because you know what happened when she came here?  When she came back she slept in his room, the memorial broke into pieces. Joe, look. Look at it. You got to believe with me.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M012
chinese: 好的。冷静下来。只是冷静下来。
english: Okay. Calm yourself. Just calm yourself.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F016
chinese: 我一个人无法完成这一切。
english: I can't do it all alone.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静一点，好吗？
english: Calm yourself, alright?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F017
chinese: 看，就在上周底特律，有个男孩回来了，他离开的时间比拉里还长，你可以自己看。你最重要的是要相信。
english: Look, it was just last week that Detroit, some boy came back he had been away longer than Larry, you can read it for yourself. You above all people have got to believe.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M014
chinese: 好了，好了，冷静一下好吗？冷静一下。等等，等等。你是什么意思，我最重要？
english: Alright, alright, calm yourself okay?  Calm yourself. Wait, wait.  What do you mean, me above all?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F018
chinese: 看，只要继续相信就好，好吗？
english: Look, just keep believing okay?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M015
chinese: 等等，那是什么意思？我最重要吗？
english: Wait, what does that mean?  Me above all?

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M016
chinese: 看看你，你在发抖。
english: Look at you, you're shaking.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_F019
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses03M_script01_2_M017
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？嗯？你凯特怎么了？
english: What do I got to hide?  Huh?  What the hell's the matter with you Kate?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M000
chinese: 你好。这里是维亚康姆服务。我能帮你什么吗？
english: Hello.  This is Viacom Services.  How can I help you?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F000
chinese: 你好？终于有人了，听着，这太荒谬了。我已经在线等了半个小时了。
english: Hello?  God finally somebody, look, this is ridiculous.  I've been waiting online for like a half an hour now.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M001
chinese: 对不起，女士，我能帮您什么吗？
english: I'm sorry ma'am, what can I help you with?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F001
chinese: 看啊，我的手机坏了。我不明白发生了什么。我试着打电话出去。我没有接到任何电话。
english: Look my, my phone isn't working.  I don't understand what's going on.  I am trying to call out.  I'm not receiving any calls

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F002
chinese: 我需要帮助，不仅是我的工作电话，也是我的家庭电话，看着...
english: and I need assistance with my...not only is my work phone, it's my home phone and look,

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F003
chinese: 这是我的生意。我通过手机赚钱。它需要正常运作。你能帮我吗？
english: this is my business.  This is how I make money is through my phone.  It needs to be working.  Can you please help me?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M002
chinese: 好的。你能告诉我你社会保障号码的最后四位数字，这样我可以确认我正在与谁交谈吗？
english: Okay.  Can you give me the last four digits of your social security number so I can verify who I'm speaking with?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F004
chinese: 两两六六。
english: two two six six.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M003
chinese: 好的。你叫什么名字？
english: Okay.  And your name is?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F005
chinese: 奥利维亚。
english: Olivia.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M004
chinese: Olivia. 嗯。好的。那么这个问题存在多久了？
english: Olivia. Um. Okay.  So how long has this problem been?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F006
chinese: 这个情况已经持续了两个星期。我每天都打电话。没有人帮助我。你们告诉我一遍又一遍，再打电话，再打电话，再打电话--
english: This has been going on for the past two weeks.  I called every single day.  Nobody is helping me.  You guys tell me the same thing over and over, call again, call again, call again--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M005
chinese: 那么问题到底是什么？
english: So what exactly is the problem?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F007
chinese: 我不知道问题是什么。这就是我想让你们知道的...为什么我的服务没有开通？我按时付了账单。我不明白。
english: I don't, I don't know what the problem is.  That's what I want you guys to...why is my service not turned on?  And I paid my bills on time.  I don't understand.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M006
chinese: 嗯，我认为其中一部分原因与网络故障有关。在过去的几周里，它一直有些问题。
english: Um- I think part of it has to do with the network being down.  It's been having some trouble the last few weeks--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F008
chinese: 好的。嗯，那样也可以，都可以。我不在乎。我真的不在乎，因为我只是想让我的手机能用而已。
english: Okay.  Well that is, that is fine and all.  I don't care.  I really don't care because I want my phone to work that's all.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F009
chinese: 这是我为你们支付服务费用，但我没有得到任何服务。我只是一直遇到掉线的电话，现在完全无法使用了。我甚至无法打电话，打九一一可能都不会起作用。
english: That is I am paying you guys for service and I'm not getting any service.  I get, I get just dropped calls all the time and now it's completely not working at all.  I can't even call out, nine one one probably wouldn't even work.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M007
chinese: 我明白了 - 我们不是-
english: I understand--we're not-

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M008
chinese: 不。好的。我们不会为这些月份收费。我们将给您三个月免费。
english: No.  Okay.  We're not charging you for any of these months.  We're going to give you three months free.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F010
chinese: 好吧，你最好这样做。你最好给我一部全新的手机，就是你应该做的。
english: Well you better.  You better give me a whole freaking new phone that's what you better do.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M009
chinese: 我们可以给你一部新手机。
english: We can give you a new phone--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F011
chinese: 我实际上想要一部相机手机。
english: I want a camera phone actually.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M010
chinese: 我们可以做到。我们可以做到。不过你必须签订一份为期一年的合同，
english: We can do that.  We can do that.  You just have to sign a one-year contract though with the--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F012
chinese: 不，不，不... 我对这些合同业务已经完成了，因为这就是可能发生的事情。
english: No, no, no...  I'm done with these contract business because this is what can happen.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F013
chinese: 你签署了合同，然后电话出了问题，你陷入困境，无法换新手机...不行。对我来说没有合同。你给我一部新手机。
english: You sign the contract and then down the line the phone doesn't work and you're stuck, you can't go to a new...no.  No contracts for me.  You give me a new phone.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M011
chinese: 此外，目前整个电力中断有点失控。
english: Besides, it's sort of out of hands at the moment----The whole electrical power outage.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F014
chinese: 我想和主管谈话。
english: I want to talk to a supervisor

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F015
chinese: 我想和你们的主管谈谈。显然你们不称职，不理解我在问什么。
english: I would like to talk to your supervisor.  Obviously you're incompetent and don't understand what I'm asking.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M012
chinese: 让我把你转给我的主管。实际上，他现在不在，所以在他回来之前我是主管。嗯-
english: Um- Let me connect you to my supervisor.  Actually, he's out right now so I'm supervisor until he comes back. Um-

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F016
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M013
chinese: 所以你可以——和我多说一些，你可以稍后再打电话过来。
english: So you could----speak with me some more, you could call back later on maybe.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F017
chinese: 那太荒谬了。你知道吗？
english: That's ridiculous.  You know?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F018
chinese: 不，我不想回电话，你让我等了好几个小时——而且这是钱，钱，钱，钱，都是从我的口袋里出去的，都是从我的口袋里出去的——
english: No I don't want to call back, you put me on hold for like hours and hours----and it's money, money, money, money and out of my pocket, out of my pocket--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M014
chinese: 我没有把你放在等候中。
english: I didn't put you on hold.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M015
chinese: 有很多人给我们打电话反映问题。每家电话公司都遇到了同样的问题，女士。
english: There are a lot of people calling us having problems.  Every phone company is having the same problems ma'am

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F019
chinese: 每一部手机...每一家手机公司？
english: Every phone...every single phone company?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M016
chinese: 嗯嗯。嗯嗯。停电，一切都乱了，飓风卡特里娜。一切都很糟糕。
english: Mmm hmmm.  Mmm hmmm.  The power outages, everything, hurricane Katrina. Everything's really messed up.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F020
chinese: 这太荒谬了。那我们应该怎么办？我们会挨饿的，因为我不能用手机。
english: This is ridiculous.Well what are we supposed to do?  We starve then because I can't use my phone cause

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F021
chinese: 我是一名房地产经纪人，这是我的生意。人们一直在给我打电话，但是你知道的，我没有座机。我负担不起有座机的费用。
english: I am a realtor and this is my business.  People are calling me all the time but you know, and I don't have a land line.  I can't afford to have a land line

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M017
chinese: 你不-
english: don't you-

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M018
chinese: 对不起，女士。我们对此无能为力。
english: I'm really sorry ma'am.  There's not----a lot we can do for it.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F022
chinese: 你最好道歉。
english: That you better be sorry.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F023
chinese: 好吧，你一点也没有帮助我。天哪，这真是太令人沮丧了。
english: Well you're not helping me at all.  God this is so frustrating.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M019
chinese: 如果你想现在打电话，我可以通过我们的电脑与你联系。我可以通过我的手机打电话，你可以通过我说话。
english: What I can do for you, if you want to make a call right now I could contact you through our computer.  I can call through my phone and you can speak through me.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F024
chinese: 什么？不。那太复杂了。看--
english: What?  No.  That's way too complicated.  Look--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F025
chinese: 你需要修理我的手机。我不在乎你需要做什么--
english: you need to fix my phone.  I don't care what you have to do--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M020
chinese: 对不起，这与电力中断和其他事情有关。
english: I'm sorry it has to do with an electrical power outage and stuff--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F026
chinese: 那么就爬上那该死的杆子去修理它，就像你需要帮助我一样。你不明白，我现在非常非常需要一部手机。
english: Well then go up the freaking pole and fix it like, you need to help me.  You don't understand I'm in dire, dire need of a phone right now.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M021
chinese: 好的，好吧，我将给你一张免费的电话卡，你可以在任何公用电话亭使用，这是我们的赠送。好吗？
english: Well, okay I'm going to give you a free phone card that you can use at any payphone and that's on us. Okay?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F027
chinese: 是的，是的，女人晚上在南中心用公用电话外出。哦，那真的很安全。
english: Yeah yeah, woman going out in South Central on the payphone at night.  Oh that's real safe.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M022
chinese: 对不起，你选择住在那里，嗯--
english: I'm, I'm sorry you chose to live there um--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F028
chinese: 不，不，不。我没有选择住在这里。我在那里工作。好吗？是的。工作，工作，工作。
english: No, no, no.  I didn't choose to live here.  I work there.  Okay?  Yeah. work work work

name: Ses03M_impro08a_MXX0
chinese: 好的。
english: okay.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M023
chinese: 嗯，我确定也许在工作的地方有一部你可以使用的电话。
english: Well I'm sure maybe there's a phone at work you could use.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F029
chinese: 我们无法打电话出去。我们无法听清楚线路。我不在工作，我在另一个办公室工作。
english: We can't call out.  We can't make out-- line.  I don't work, I work at another office.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F030
chinese: 一个律师事务所。非常感谢。
english: A law firm.  Thank you very much.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M024
chinese: 好的，嗯--
english: All right um--

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F031
chinese: 我在家里做房地产经纪人的工作，因为我没有座机电话，所以我需要一部手机，但是现在我没有手机，不知道该怎么办。而且你一点也没有帮助我。
english: I work out of my home as a realtor and because I don't have a land line, I need a phone and because of now I don't have one I don't know what to do.  And you're not helping me at all.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F032
chinese: 实际上，请告诉我您的名字先生，您的名字是什么来着？
english: In fact, give me your name sir, what's your name again?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M025
chinese: 我的名字是Sara。
english: My name is Sara.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F033
chinese: 好的。萨拉怎么了？
english: Okay.  Sara what?

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M026
chinese: 萨拉·布朗。
english: Sara Brown.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F034
chinese: 萨拉·布朗。萨拉·布朗，嗯，是的，我要挂断电话。然后我会再打电话给你，把你的名字告诉你的主管，因为你显然不适合在这里工作。
english: Sara Brown.  Sara Brown, um- yeah, I'm going to get off the phone with you. And then I'm going to call back and I'm going to give your supervisor your name because you're obviously incompetent to work here.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_MXX1
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_M027
chinese: 您知道，女士，我们记录下这次对话，所以您说的任何话都可以在法庭上得到证明，所以请记住这一点。
english: You know maam, we record this conversation so anything you say can be proven in a law of court so keep that in mind.

name: Ses03M_impro08a_F035
chinese: 你是什么，你现在是警察吗？你知道，就像我已经结束了，我已经不再关心了。再见，希望你失去工作。
english: What are you, what are you a police officer now?  You know, like I'm done, I'm over it.  Goodbye and I hope that you lose your job.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M000
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F000
chinese: 嘿。
english: Hey.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M001
chinese: 艾斯梅拉达，猜猜看？
english: Esmeralda, guess what?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F001
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M002
chinese: [笑声] 猜猜谁刚结婚了？
english: [LAUGHTER] Guess who just got hitched?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F002
chinese: 闭嘴。哦，我的天。真的吗？就这样吗？你刚刚问了问题，然后怎么样...你是怎么问的？
english: Shut up. Oh my God.  Really? Just like that?  You just asked the question and what...how did you ask?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M003
chinese: 这个人。是的。你能相信吗？她也说是的。是的。她说是的。
english: This guy. Yeah.  Can you believe it? She said yes too. Yeah.  She said yes.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M004
chinese: 好的，我们在查克·奇齐（Chuck E. Cheese）那里。
english: Okay we were at Chuck E. Cheese.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F003
chinese: 查克·奇·奇？啊，伙计，那真是太糟糕了。
english: Chuck E. Cheese?  Ah, man that is so lame.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F004
chinese: 你是认真的吗，[垃圾]人？
english: Are you serious [GARBAGE] man?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M005
chinese: 拿到那个大比萨饼 - 我把它放在比萨饼里，她吃了一些垃圾。
english: Get the big pizza--and I put it in the pizza and she ate so [GARBAGE]

name: Ses03M_impro03_F005
chinese: 哦，就像那部电影一样。我刚看过的那部电影是什么来着？不对，她是那个吞下...的地方。
english: Oh like that one movie.  What's that one movie I just saw? No.  Where she like swallows the...

name: Ses03M_impro03_M006
chinese: 美国馅饼？啊。
english: American Pie? Ah.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F006
chinese: 哦，我不记得了。《每个人都说我爱你》是与德鲁·巴里摩尔一起的...你没看过吗？好吧。
english: oh, I don't remember.  Everybody Says I Love You with Drew Barrymore...no you haven't seen it?  Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M007
chinese: 是的。听起来像是一部爱情片。无论如何，她拿到了戒指，然后她说，
english: Yeah.  It sounds like a chick flick. Anyways so, she gets the ring and she goes,

name: Ses03M_impro03_F007
chinese: 是的。嗯...
english: Yeah.  Well...

name: Ses03M_impro03_M008
chinese: 巴里，这是什么？然后我说，我不知道。她说--
english: Barry what's this?  And I go, I don't know.  She goes--

name: Ses03M_impro03_F008
chinese: 她叫你巴里吗？
english: She calls you Barry?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M009
chinese: 那是我的名字。
english: That's my name.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F009
chinese: 哦，好的。嗯，我叫你乔，因为你的中间名是约瑟夫。
english: Oh, okay.  Well I call you Joe cause you're middle name Joseph.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M010
chinese: 巴里·乔，B.J. [笑声] 哦，你这个肮脏的女孩。你真脏。
english: Barry Joe, B.J. [LAUGHTER] Oh you dirty, dirty girl. you're so dirty.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F010
chinese: 【笑声】太恶心了。不是你...是我脏吗？
english: [LAUGHTER] So nasty. No you... dirty me?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F011
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M011
chinese: 啊...无论如何，她拿起戒指然后说，这是真的吗？所以我就说，当然是真的--
english: Ah...Anyways, so she took the ring and she goes, is this real?  So I was like, of course--

name: Ses03M_impro03_M012
chinese: 萨拉和我--
english: Sara and I--

name: Ses03M_impro03_F012
chinese: 她实际上问了这是真的吗？考虑到你在查克·奇·奇（Chuck E. Cheese）里，我可能也会问同样的问题。
english: She actually asked if it was real?  I would've probably asked the same thing considering you were in Chuck E. Cheese.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M013
chinese: 加油。那是她的生日。
english: Come on. It was her birthday.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F013
chinese: 因为查克·奇·奇？
english: Because of Chuck E. Cheese?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F014
chinese: 哦，伙计。你多大了？五岁吗？
english: Oh, man. How old are you? Five?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M014
chinese: 她想要...她总是想要一些突发的事情。
english: She wanted...she always wants something spontaneous.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F015
chinese: 是的。那个，你知道的，没问题。
english: Yeah.  That's, you know, okay.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M015
chinese: 我买不起红龙虾。[笑声] 那又怎样？
english: I couldn't, I couldn't afford the Red Lobster. [LAUGHTER] What anyway?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F016
chinese: 哦天啊！你真是太便宜了，便宜，便宜。无论如何，继续吧。并不是说你很穷。我的意思是你爸爸赚得...好吧。
english: Oh god! You are damn cheap, cheap, cheap. Anyways, moving on. It's not like you're poor.  I mean your dad makes... okey

name: Ses03M_impro03_M016
chinese: 那么好吧，然后。
english: So Okay then and.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M017
chinese: 我让所有的角色动物排成一队跳康加舞。
english: I got all the character animals to do a conga line,

name: Ses03M_impro03_M018
chinese: 调暗灯光，然后我爬上了其中一张桌子把她拉了起来。
english: dim down the lights and uh, I got on one of the tables pulled her up.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F017
chinese: 你有那只老鼠吗？
english: You had the mouse?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F018
chinese: 这不是一只老鼠吗？这是一只老鼠。查克·E·奇斯？
english: Isn't it a rat?  It's a rat.  Chuck E. Cheese?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M020
chinese: 查基...我不知道。我不知道。无论如何，我把她拉起来，然后我说，我说，萨拉。
english: Chucky...I don't know.  I don't know. Anyways, I pull her up and I go, I go Sarah

name: Ses03M_impro03_F019
chinese: 好的。【笑声】
english: Okay. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses03M_impro03_M021
chinese: 你是我的指引之光，然后他们放了那首《我度过了人生中最美好的时光》的歌。
english: You're my guiding light, then they put on that song the I've had the time of my life, that song.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F020
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh my God.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F021
chinese: 好吧，那真的很俗气，乔。
english: Okay, that is really cheesy Joe.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M022
chinese: 我走的时候，我想要和你度过余生。
english: And I go, I want to spend the rest of my life with you.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F022
chinese: 哦，那有点甜蜜。
english: Oh that's kind of sweet.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M023
chinese: 我爱你宝贝。我想让你嫁给我。
english: And I love you baby.  And I want you to marry me.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F023
chinese: 等等，等等，等等，我想让你嫁给我？不，你应该更像是一个问题，比如说，你愿意嫁给我吗？不是像我想让你嫁给我。这更像是一个要求。
english: Wait, wait, wait I want you to marry me?  No, shouldn't you like be more like a question like, would you marry me?  Not like I want you to marry me.  It's like a demand.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F024
chinese: 你嫁给我。我是男人，我是简，你是泰山。
english: You marry me. I man I Jane, you Tarzan.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M024
chinese: 不。嗯，那就是我说的，一时冲动——然后她走了，她走了，
english: No. Well that's what I said, spur of the moment--and she goes, she goes,

name: Ses03M_impro03_M025
chinese: 当然。就是这样。
english: sure.  And that was it.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F025
chinese: 她说确定吗？
english: She said sure?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F026
chinese: 确定吗？谁说确定？你说是的...我不喜欢--
english: Sure?  Who says sure?  You say yes...I don't like--

name: Ses03M_impro03_M026
chinese: 是的，她走了--
english: Yeah, she goes--

name: Ses03M_impro03_M027
chinese: 因为她一开始有点困惑，但后来她说了是。
english: Cause she was a little confused at first but then she said yes.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F027
chinese: 你们在一起多久了？
english: How long have you guys been going out?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M028
chinese: 大约两个半星期。
english: About two and a half weeks.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F028
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M029
chinese: 两个人...我们彼此相爱。是的。
english: Two and ...  We love each other. Yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F029
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03M_impro03_F030
chinese: 好的。我大约两年半没见到你了，我回来的时候你正在和一个你才认识不久的人订婚。
english: Okay.  I haven't seen you in about two and a half years and I come back and you're getting engaged to somebody you only knew for

name: Ses03M_impro03_M030
chinese: 你得见见她，她很棒。
english: You got to meet her, she's wonderful.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F031
chinese: 不，不，不。你不能在两个半星期内结婚。事情不是这样进行的。你甚至不能在两个半星期内发生性关系。
english: No, no, no.  You don't get married in two and a half weeks.  It doesn't work that way.  You don't even have sex----in two and a half weeks.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M031
chinese: 她刚刚从高中毕业，她计划申请大学等等。她非常优秀。她充满活力和生机。
english: She just graduated from high school and----she's planning to apply for colleges----and stuff.She's so great.  She has so much life and energy and stuff.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F032
chinese: 什么？哦，我的天。
english: What? Oh my god.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F033
chinese: 她一定很热。
english: She must be hot.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F034
chinese: 是的，就是这样。她很漂亮，而你们要结婚了。
english: Yeah, that's it.  She's hot and you are- getting married.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M032
chinese: 是的，她很漂亮。
english: Yeah, she is good-looking.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F035
chinese: 我无法相信你。为什么你想要结婚？你是个男孩。你是个小男孩。
english: I cannot believe you.  Why do you want to get married?  You're a boy.  You're a little boy.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M033
chinese: 我今年28岁。
english: I'm twenty eight years old.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F036
chinese: 你还像个男孩一样行事。而男人需要更长的时间成长——我会告诉你的。
english: You still act like a boy.  And men take a lot longer to grow----I will tell you.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M034
chinese: 嗯，这就是为什么我正在和一个只有十八岁的人约会。天啊。我觉得她已经准备好要孩子了。
english: Well that's why I'm dating someone who's just eighteen years old. Jesus. I think she's ready to have kids already.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F037
chinese: 哦，天啊。
english: Oh man.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F038
chinese: 什么？十八岁？
english: What?  Eighteen?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M035
chinese: 我太兴奋了。这将会很棒。
english: I'm so excited.  It's going to be great.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F039
chinese: 我无法相信你。我无法相信这件事。好吧，我会去那里。我会参加那个婚礼，但我会在后面。
english: I can't believe you.  I can't believe it.  Well I'm going to be there.  I'll be at that wedding but I'll be in the back.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M036
chinese: 她刚刚...她刚刚...我们的位置也很好。她刚刚被晋升为杰克盒子的助理经理。
english: She just...she just...we're in a good position too.  She just got promoted to assistant manager at Jack In The Box

name: Ses03M_impro03_M037
chinese: -然后...是的。
english: -and so... yeah.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F040
chinese: 哇，非常有前途。是的，非常有前途的未来，你在做什么？
english: Wow. Very promising.  Yeah.  Very promising future and what are you doing?

name: Ses03M_impro03_M038
chinese: 我仍然在我父母的餐厅工作。清理餐桌。
english: I'm still working at my parents' restaurant. Busing tables.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F041
chinese: 好的。是的。生个孩子。创造美好的生活。
english: Alright. Yeah.  Have a kid.  Make a beautiful life.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M039
chinese: 哦，太好了。我妈妈说如果我们没钱了，我们可以再次搬回她那里。
english: Oh that's great. My mom said we can move in with her again if we run out of money.

name: Ses03M_impro03_F042
chinese: 你，你太过分了，我无法处理。
english: You, You are too much, I can't handle it.

name: Ses03M_impro03_M040
chinese: 我很开心。
english: I'm so happy.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M000
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F000
chinese: 你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort. You took presents from him.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F001
chinese: 礼物？那只是一个小小的琐碎的小胸针。
english: Presents? It was only a small trivial little broach.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我记得得很清楚。闪烁着钻石。非常俗气。
english: I remember it well. Bristling with diamonds. In the worst possible taste.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F002
chinese: 一点也不。它非常漂亮。我一直都在戴着它。我还保留着它。
english: Not at all. It was very pretty. And I wear it all the time. I still have it.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F003
chinese: 不，我没有。这都是你嫉妒的想象力编造出来的。
english: No, I didn't. You made that up all in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你。
english: You must admit that he was in love with you.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F004
chinese: 只是可能有一点点，但这并不严重。
english: Just a little perhaps, but it was nothing serious.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你说过的。
english: You let him kiss you. You said so.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F005
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well, what of it?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F006
chinese: 哦，别这样，这给了他很多快乐，而且并没有伤害到我。
english: Oh come on, it gave him a lot of pleasure and it didn't harm me.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么多疑和爱管闲事，你就永远不会知道任何关于它的事情。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so suspicious and nosey you'd have never known anything about it.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M008
chinese: 这是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view, I must say.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F008
chinese: 嗯，这是真的。
english: Well, it's true.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M009
chinese: 你对这个对话感到无聊吗？
english: Are you bored with this conversation?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F009
chinese: 我绝对，非常确定地是。
english: I definitely, most definitely am.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我也是。无聊得发僵。想喝点白兰地吗？
english: So am I. Bored stiff. Want some brandy?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F010
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No, thanks.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M011
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I'll have a little, I think.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F011
chinese: 我不明白你为什么要它；你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want it; you've already had two glasses.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M012
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason. Anyhow, they were very small ones.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F012
chinese: 我不明白继续谈论这样的事情有什么意义。
english: I don't see what's the point of going on and on about something like this.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M013
chinese: 哦，我的天-你几乎不能称之为晚上一直喝酒三分钟的酒杯。
english: Oh, my-you can hardly call three minute liquor glasses in the evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F013
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's become a habit with you.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M014
chinese: 你不必因为此刻你自己不想要一些而显得如此傲慢。
english: You needn't be so grand just because you don't happen to want some yourself at the moment.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F014
chinese: 不要这么愚蠢。
english: Don't be so stupid.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M015
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F015
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M016
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M017
chinese: 亲爱的，要去哪里吗？
english: Going somewhere, dear?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F016
chinese: 不，只是为了让你对我感兴趣。
english: No. Just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M018
chinese: 那个回复让我心碎了。
english: That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F017
chinese: 这是一个女人的工作，吸引男人。你能看着我一分钟吗？
english: It's a woman's job to allure the man. Watch me, won't you, a minute?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M019
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F018
chinese: 不，不是的。
english: No, it isn't.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M020
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F019
chinese: 不，不是的。我不在乎。
english: No, it's not. I don't care.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M021
chinese: 很遗憾你没有更多白兰地。它可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you didn't have more brandy. It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F020
chinese: 嗯，它似乎对你没有产生太大的奇迹，是吗？
english: Well, it didn't seem to do such wonders with you, now did it?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M022
chinese: 哦，啪啪啪，像一条小蝰蛇一样。
english: Oh, snap, snap, snap, like a little adder.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F021
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M023
chinese: 是的，它们有一袋子毒液藏在它们的牙齿后面，它们会咬人。
english: Yes, they do. They have a big bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F022
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M024
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F023
chinese: 我不在乎。我不在乎，你明白吗？我不在乎他们叫，也不在乎他们像圈圈一样在地板上翻滚。
english: I don't care. I don't care, do you understand? I don't care if they bark, if they roll over on the floor like hoops.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M025
chinese: 嗯，
english: Uhh,

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M026
chinese: 你在我们离婚后见到Peter Burden多吗？
english: did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F024
chinese: 是的，我做了，实际上做了很多。
english: Yes, I did, quite a lot actually.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我想象你让他亲吻你更多，是吗？
english: I imagine that you let him kiss you quite a bit more then, didn't you?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F025
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your business.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M028
chinese: 你度过了一个狂欢的时光。完全没有约束。非常愉快。你本来就没有太多。
english: You had a riotous-must have had a riotous time. No restraint at all. Very enjoyable. You never had much anyhow.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F026
chinese: 你真是让人受不了。我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You are quite insufferable. I suppose it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M029
chinese: 我一点儿也没有喝醉。
english: I'm not in the least bit drunk.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F027
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不太好的问题。
english: You've always had a weak head.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M030
chinese: 好的。就像我之前提到的，我说我有三个非常小的酒杯。这还不足以让一个两岁的孩子喝醉。
english: Okay. As I mentioned before, I said I had three very minute liquor glasses. That's hardly enough to get a child of two drunk.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F028
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child of two can get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M031
chinese: 哦，确实非常有趣。那么四岁的孩子、六岁的孩子或九岁的孩子怎么样？我们可以就这些不懂事的孩子展开一场精彩的辩论。
english: Oh, very interesting indeed. How about a child of four or a child of six or a child of nine. We might have a splendid little debate about this intemperate tots.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F029
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。
english: Do shut up. Shut up.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F030
chinese: 我不想再谈论这个了。
english: I don't want to talk about this anymore.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉。
english: You better turn that off.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F031
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M033
chinese: 现在已经很晚了，这会打扰楼上的人。
english: It's very late and it will annoy the people upstairs.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F032
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs. It's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M034
chinese: 嗯，我想是楼下的人。
english: Well, I suppose the people downstairs then.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F033
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M035
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of the year for Tunis.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F034
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M036
chinese: 不，我不会做这样的事情。
english: No, I will do no such thing.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F035
chinese: 打开它。
english: Turn it on.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M037
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F036
chinese: 你一直对自己太过易怒。你应该试着控制一下。
english: You've always had far too temperamental for yourself. You should try to control it.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M038
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F037
chinese: 我不会的。走开。走开。我讨厌你。
english: I will not. Go away. Go away. I hate you.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M039
chinese: 哦，非常有趣，确实如此。阿曼达，听着-
english: Oh, very amusing, indeed. Amanda, listen-

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F038
chinese: 听着，确实。不，不，不，不。我受够了听你说话，你这个虐待狂恶霸。
english: Listen, indeed. No, no, no, no. I am sick and tired of listening to you, you sadistic bully.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M040
chinese: 非常有趣的确。
english: Very amusing indeed.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F039
chinese: 停下，停下，我讨厌你，我憎恶你，你太专横自大了，完全不可理喻。
english: Stop it, stop it, I hate you, I loath you, you are overbearing and conceited and utterly impossible.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M041
chinese: 你知道吗，你是一个卑劣、脾气暴躁、邪恶的小野兽，我希望在我活着的时候再也不见到你。
english: You know, you're a vile, ill-tempered, wicked little beast and I hope that I never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F040
chinese: 这是结局。你听到了吗？结局。现在和永远。
english: This is the end. Do you hear? The end. Now and forever.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M042
chinese: 不，你不能这样出去。不，你不能。
english: No, you're not going out like this. No you're not.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F041
chinese: 哦，是的，我是的。
english: Oh, yes I am.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F042
chinese: 是的，我是。放开我。我讨厌你，我憎恨你。天哪，我简直不敢相信我终于意识到你是怎样的人。我永远不会嫁给你。永远不会。永远，永远，永远。我宁愿在痛苦中死去。
english: Yes I am. Let go of me. I hate you and I loath you. God, I can't believe I just finally realized how you are. I am never marry you. Never. Never, never, never. I would rather die in torment.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M043
chinese: 哦，闭嘴。闭嘴。闭嘴。
english: Oh, shut up. Shut up. Shut up.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_M044
chinese: 如果你爬回来跪在我面前，我也不会再嫁给你，因为你太卑鄙了。你是个刻薄、邪恶的小吸血鬼，我希望上帝永远不要让我再见到你。
english: I wouldn't marry you again if you came back crawling to me on your hands and knees because you're vile. You're a mean, evil-minded little vampire and I hope to God I never set eyes on you again.

name: Ses03F_script03_2_F043
chinese: 野兽或畜生，猪兽兽畜。
english: Beast or brute cad, swine beast beast brute.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么你邀请她来这里？
english: Why did you invite her here?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么？那让你不舒服吗？
english: Why? Does that bother you?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F001
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了。她不是突然来的-
english: She's been in New York for three-and-a-half years. She don't just suddenly come and-

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，也许，也许他只是想见她。
english: Well, maybe, maybe he just wanted to see her.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F002
chinese: 你不会只为了看而旅行七百英里。
english: You don't travel seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？他们一辈子都住在隔壁，为什么他不想见她呢？嘿，别那样看着我。我和你一样一无所知。
english: What do you mean? They lived next door to each other their entire lives. Why shouldn't he want to see her? Hey, don't look at me like that. I don't know anymore than you do.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F003
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M003
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking about it?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F004
chinese: 它有那种感觉。
english: It's got that about it.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M004
chinese: 好的，那又怎样？
english: Well, so what?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here, Joe?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M005
chinese: 听着，孩子-
english: Listen, kid-

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F006
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。她知道这一点。
english: She's not Larry's girl. She knows that.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M006
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F007
chinese: 那她为什么结婚了？那她为什么还没有结婚？她一直在纽约，那里有成百上千的单身男人。
english: Then why is she married? Then why isn't she married? She's been in New York and there's hundreds of single men there.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F008
chinese: 我确定有成百上千人问她并告诉她她是愚蠢的，但是没有。
english: I'm sure hundreds of them asked her and told her that she's foolish, but no.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F009
chinese: 她等待了。
english: She's waited.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she's waited?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F010
chinese: 因为她和我想得一样，所以。
english: Because she thinks like me, that's why.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F011
chinese: 她像一块坚如磐石的忠诚，你不知道吗。在我最糟糕的时刻，我会想起她。
english: She's faithful as a rock, don't you know. In my worst moments I can think of her-

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F012
chinese: 我再想一想，我是对的。
english: I think again, that I'm-I'm right.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M008
chinese: 看，今天天气很好。我们为什么要争论呢？
english: Look, it's a nice day. What are we arguing for?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F013
chinese: 在我家里，没有人敢挑战她的信仰。也许陌生人可以，但不包括他的父亲，也不包括他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in my house better ever dare-dare to challenge her faith. Maybe strangers, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M009
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F014
chinese: 因为他不会回来了。那我还有什么活下去的理由？我会自杀的。
english: Because he's not coming back. Then what do I got to live for? I'll kill myself.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M010
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F015
chinese: 不要，不要嘲笑我，不要嘲笑我。
english: Don't, don't laugh at me, don't laugh at me.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F016
chinese: 看着它。因为为什么，当她来到这里并在他的房间里睡觉时，纪念品碎成了碎片。看着它，看着它，乔。
english: Look at it. Because why, when she came here and she slept in his room, the memorial broke into pieces. Look at it, look at it, Joe.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M011
chinese: 好的。好的。冷静一点。
english: All right. All right. Calm yourself.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F017
chinese: 你必须相信，和我一起相信，因为我不能独自承受。
english: You got to believe, believe with me because I can't stand all alone.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M012
chinese: 好的。只是冷静下来。
english: Okay. Just calm yourself.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F018
chinese: 不，你必须相信。
english: No, you've got to believe.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F019
chinese: 相信，乔。你中的所有人都必须相信。
english: Believe, Joe. You above all people have got to believe.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M013
chinese: 为什么是我，为什么是我中的所有人？
english: Why me, above all?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M014
chinese: 嗯？
english: Huh?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M015
chinese: 为什么是我中的所有人？
english: Why me above all?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F020
chinese: 你必须继续相信。
english: You got to keep believing.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M016
chinese: 看看你，你在发抖。
english: Look at you, you're shaking.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_F021
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M017
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的吗？
english: What have I got to hide?

name: Ses03F_script01_2_M018
chinese: 咦？凯特，你怎么了？
english: Huh? What the hell's the matter with you, Kate?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M000
chinese: 嘿，你这个愚蠢的蠢货机器，给我一个该死的操作员，行不行？
english: Hey, you stupid dumb shit machine, give me a fucking operator, huh?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F000
chinese: 您好，先生，我可以帮您吗？
english: Hello sir, can I help you?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M001
chinese: 是的，我已经和这台机器在一起大约30分钟了--
english: Yeah, I've been on the-with the machine for like thirty minutes--

name: Ses03F_impro08_M002
chinese: 试图得到一个答案，但没有人给我一个答案。那么你打算怎么办？
english: trying to get an answer, and no one's given me an answer.  So what are you going to do about it?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F001
chinese: 我 [垃圾]
english: I [GARBAGE]

name: Ses03F_impro08_F002
chinese: 是的，先生，非常抱歉，但我们这里出了些问题。有很多电话打进来，系统出现了一些故障。
english: Yes, sir, I'm very sorry, but we've had some trouble here.  There's been a lot of calls and the system has-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M003
chinese: 操，你以为我整天都有时间吗？天啊
english: Fuck, do you think I have all day?  Jesus

name: Ses03F_impro08_F003
chinese: 先生，请冷静下来。没有必要使用那样的粗言秽语。这样做没有任何理由。
english: Sir, please calm down.  There's no reason to use profanity like that.  It's not-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M004
chinese: 好的，抱歉。好吧，我的手机已经出问题了，已经三天了。我无法接收任何来电。发生了什么事？
english: Fine, sorry.  Okay, my phone's been on the fritz for like three days.  I can't get any incoming calls. What- What is going on?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F004
chinese: 好的，这是给Verizon的吗？你的服务提供商？
english: Okay, and this is for Verizon? Your provider?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F005
chinese: 嗯，我们的系统出了点问题。我们的一个卫星出现故障，而且我-
english: Well, um- we have a little problem with the system going on.  One of our satellites is down, and I-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M006
chinese: 你知道吗？我只是要- 病人？我是个忙碌的人。
english: You know what?  I'm just going to- Patient?  I'm a busy man.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F006
chinese: 您需要对我们有耐心，先生，因为我们
english: You're going to have to just be patient with us, sir, as we

name: Ses03F_impro08_F007
chinese: 嗯，我知道，我们都很忙。
english: Well, I know sir, and we all are busy.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F008
chinese: 但是我肯定得- 呃- 获取你的联系方式
english: But I'm going to definitely have to- uh--get your contact information

name: Ses03F_impro08_M007
chinese: -必须，必须做什么？
english: -have to, have to what?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M008
chinese: 什么？这是我的手机。你甚至不能打电话给我。我没有另一部手机。
english: What?  It's my phone.  You can't even call me on it. I don't have another phone.

name: Ses03F_impro08_FXX0
chinese: 好吧，我不-
english: Well, I don't-

name: Ses03F_impro08_F009
chinese: 好的，嗯，如果你愿意的话，我们大概会在十个小时后启动系统。
english: Okay, well, if you would like, um- we will be turning on the systems in probably about ten hours.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M009
chinese: 什么？你在开玩笑吗？
english: What?  Are you kidding me?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F010
chinese: 先生，非常抱歉，但事情就是这样。我们对此没有控制权。这可能需要一些时间，但您必须对我们有耐心。您可以使用电话卡。我们会给您一张免费的电话卡供您使用。
english: Sir, I'm very sorry, but this is the way it is.  This- We have no control over it.  It's going to take-  -but you have to be patient with us.  You can use a calling card.  We will give you a free calling card to use.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M010
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my God.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M011
chinese: 我-我现在要自杀。
english: I- I'm going to kill myself right now.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M012
chinese: 一个免费的电话卡？
english: A free calling card?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F011
chinese: 您有座机电话吗，先生？
english: Do you have a land line, sir?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M013
chinese: 不，我没有座机电话。
english: No, I don't have a land line.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F012
chinese: 好的，我们会给您发送- 我们会为您支付您使用的分钟数的费用。
english: Okay, well, we will send you- We will reimburse you for the amount of minutes that you-

name: Ses03F_impro08_F013
chinese: 平均而言会使用。
english: -on average would use.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M014
chinese: 就这样了？好的，是的。还有什么别的吗？
english: That's it? Okay, yeah.  What else?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F014
chinese: 我们可能会给您寄一张电话卡。非常抱歉。先生，您只需要耐心等待。
english: And we will probably send you a calling card.  I'm very sorry.  You're just going to have to be patient, sir.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M015
chinese: 好的，我需要比这更多。你会给我更多一点吗？
english: Okay, I need more than this.  Are you going to give me a little bit more?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F015
chinese: 不，我们不只是给你东西。我们-我们-
english: No, we don't just give you things.  We're- we're-

name: Ses03F_impro08_F016
chinese: 我们会为您补偿您的一切-
english: we compensating you for all your-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M016
chinese: 所以你从我这里拿走东西，然后期望我只是等着。
english: So you take things from me and you expect me just to wait around.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F017
chinese: 不，不，先生，我们不会从您那里拿走任何东西。这是-这是我们不知情的。问题刚刚发生。
english: No no, we're not taking anything from you sir.  This is- This is unbeknownst to us.  The problem had just happened.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F018
chinese: 卫星在你所在的地区出现故障。
english: The satellite-is down in your area.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M017
chinese: 好的，所以你认为你会帮我挽回一些时间，然后这就能弥补我失去的三天的业务？好的，太好了。
english: Okay, so you think you're going to-  -get me back some minutes, and that's going to make up for three days of business that I lost?  Okay, great.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F019
chinese: 不，先生，三天。不是三天。现在只过了大约一天。我们不要夸大其词。
english: No, three days, sir.  It's not three days. It's- It's only been about a day now. Let's not exaggerate.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M018
chinese: 不，已经过去了三天。
english: No, it's been--three days.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M019
chinese: 好的，已经过了一天了。好吗？
english: Fine, it's been a day.  Okay?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F020
chinese: 三天？
english: Three days?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F021
chinese: 一天？
english: A day?

name: Ses03F_impro08_M020
chinese: 一天的生意。你知道我一天能赚多少钱吗？
english: A day's worth of business.  You know how much I make in a day?

name: Ses03F_impro08_F022
chinese: 我不知道，先生。
english: I don't know, sir.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M021
chinese: 大约三百万美元。
english: About three million dollars.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F023
chinese: 哦，嗯，对此我感到抱歉。嗯-我们-
english: Oh, well, I'm sorry about that. Umm- We-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M022
chinese: 所以，你要给我还回十美元的分钟--
english: So, you're going to give me back ten dollars worth of minutes--

name: Ses03F_impro08_M023
chinese: -弥补三百万美元。
english: -to make up the three million dollars.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F024
chinese: 好的，十个小时的分钟--
english: Well, ten hours worth of minutes--

name: Ses03F_impro08_F025
chinese: 将要发生的是什么。
english: is what's going to happen.

name: Ses03F_impro08_M024
chinese: 十个小时？所以，基本上，我每个月要支付四十美元的一天的分钟数。
english: Ten hours? So, basically, a day's worth of minutes which I pay forty dollars a month from it.

name: Ses03F_impro08_MXX0
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F026
chinese: 先生，
english: Sir,

name: Ses03F_impro08_M025
chinese: 所以你要给我一美元的找零。
english: So you're giving me a dollar back.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F027
chinese: 我现在想要的，我建议你做的就是把你感觉还没有得到解决的所有问题都写下来，传真给我们。
english: what I would like what I'm advising you to do now is just to write down all of your problems that you-you feel that--You know, haven't been addressed, fax it to us-

name: Ses03F_impro08_M026
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my God.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F028
chinese: 如果发生任何事情，我们会照顾好它。但现在我们能做的只是请求您的耐心。
english: and we will take care of it if anything happens.  But all we can do now is ask for your patience.

name: Ses03F_impro08_F029
chinese: 好的？谢谢您的来电。再见。
english: Okay? Thank you for calling.  Goodbye.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M000
chinese: 你好吗？
english: How you doing?

name: Ses03F_impro06_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F001
chinese: 是的。哇。
english: Yeah. Wow.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M001
chinese: 我们都会想念他。
english: We're all going to miss him.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F002
chinese: 嗯嗯。我从来不知道会这么难，你知道的。
english: Mmm hmm. I never knew it was going to be this hard, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F003
chinese: 因为你预料到它会发生，最终发生了，所以这很奇怪。
english: It's weird 'cause it's like you expected it to happen and eventually-

name: Ses03F_impro06_F004
chinese: 他得了癌症，你知道吗？
english: he had cancer, you know?

name: Ses03F_impro06_MXX0
chinese: 嗯，嗯。
english: Mmm, Hmm.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F005
chinese: 他们认为他会好起来，他确实好转了，然后事情变得糟糕了。
english: They thought he got--would get better and he did, and then it just- things turned bad.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F006
chinese: 变得更糟了，你知道的。
english: Turned around for the worst, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M002
chinese: 我不认识他，特里西娅，但是我听说他是一个伟大的人。
english: I didn't know him, Tricia, but uh- I heard that he was a great man.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F007
chinese: 他很棒。
english: He was amazing.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F008
chinese: 我爱那个男孩。
english: I loved that boy.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F009
chinese: 我们一起做了所有的事情，你知道的。
english: We did everything together, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F010
chinese: 这感觉很奇怪，我觉得。你知道吗，我感到非常孤独。现在他走了，我该怎么办呢？
english: It's weird, I think. I feel so alone, you know? What am I going to do now? Now that he's gone.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F011
chinese: 他还很年轻。看起来如此--
english: He's so young. It seems so--

name: Ses03F_impro06_F012
chinese: 在很多方面都是如此错误。
english: so wrong in so many ways.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F013
chinese: 他可怜的父母。你知道，这是他们唯一的儿子。
english: His poor parents. You know, it's their only son.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M003
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F014
chinese: 一整年的时间。我的意思是，他与这个怪物、这个东西、这个疾病一起受苦。
english: Kind of a whole year. I mean, he suffered with this, this monster, this thing, this disease.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M004
chinese: 他一直在接受化疗，对吗？
english: He was in chemo the whole time, right?

name: Ses03F_impro06_FXX0
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M005
chinese: 他刚刚获得了那个棒球奖学金。
english: And he just got that baseball scholarship.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F015
chinese: 我知道。他曾经有很多优势。
english: I know. He was, he had so much going for him.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F016
chinese: 如此英俊，如此年轻，如此有才华。
english: So handsome, so young, so gifted.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F017
chinese: 如此有才华。
english: So talented.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F018
chinese: 这样一个甜蜜的人，你知道吗？
english: Such a sweet person, you know?

name: Ses03F_impro06_M006
chinese: 他的父母怎么样？
english: How's his parents doing?

name: Ses03F_impro06_F019
chinese: 不太好。
english: Not very good.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F020
chinese: 你能想象作为一个父母，失去一个孩子吗？他只有22岁。
english: Can you imagine, though, you know, as a parent, just losing a kid? Twenty-two years old.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F021
chinese: 很奇怪，我有点感觉好像有一部分我已经消失了，你知道吗？
english: It's weird, I kind of feel like part of me is gone now, you know?

name: Ses03F_impro06_F022
chinese: 因为这另一半就像被撕裂掉一样。
english: Because this other half was just kind of like ripped away.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M007
chinese: 你们相当亲近，不是吗？
english: You guys were pretty close, weren't you?

name: Ses03F_impro06_F023
chinese: 他就像，他就像我的兄弟，你知道的。
english: He was like, he was like my brother, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F024
chinese: 他是我的兄弟。
english: He was my brother.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F025
chinese: 只是看起来太不公平了，就是这样的。
english: Just seems so unfair, is the way it is.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F026
chinese: 你知道的，他有一个非常漂亮的女朋友，大约持续了一年，然后-
english: You know, he had that really pretty girlfriend for like about a year and-

name: Ses03F_impro06_M008
chinese: 她叫什么名字？
english: What was her name?

name: Ses03F_impro06_F027
chinese: 凯利。凯利乌文尼。
english: Kelly. Kelly Uveny.

name: Ses03F_impro06_MXX1
chinese: 凯利。
english: Kelly.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F028
chinese: 他们谈论着结婚和-
english: They talked about getting married and--

name: Ses03F_impro06_M009
chinese: 试图要一个孩子。
english: Trying to have a baby.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F029
chinese: 是的。但是当他得了癌症并且情况变得糟糕时，她就离开了。
english: Yeah. But then when he got cancer and it got bad, you know, she just took off and-

name: Ses03F_impro06_F030
chinese: 所以我在那里陪伴他。
english: so I was there for him.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M010
chinese: 一些人。
english: Some people.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M011
chinese: 是的，但你在医院的所有日子都在那里。在他的床边-
english: Yeah, but you were there all the hospital days. By his bed-

name: Ses03F_impro06_F031
chinese: 是的。天啊，我爱那个孩子。
english: Yeah. God, I loved that kid.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M012
chinese: 太好了，太积极了。
english: So nice, so positive.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F032
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M013
chinese: 我们需要更多像他这样的人。
english: We need more people like him.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F033
chinese: 乔，你觉得他知道我爱他吗？
english: Joe, do you think he knew I loved him?

name: Ses03F_impro06_M014
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses03F_impro06_F034
chinese: 我从未告诉他，我爱你，但是-
english: I never told him, I love you, but-

name: Ses03F_impro06_F035
chinese: 我非常爱他。
english: I loved him so much.

name: Ses03F_impro06_M015
chinese: 我不知道Benny是否像那样聪明-但是-
english: I don't know if Benny was smart like that- but-

name: Ses03F_impro06_M016
chinese: 我确定他也爱你。只是他不知道而已。
english: I'm sure he loved you too. He just didn't know it.

name: Ses03F_impro06_FXX1
chinese: 是的，伙计。
english: Yeah, man.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F000
chinese: 你好吗，宝贝？
english: How's it going, babe?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F001
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses03F_impro02_M000
chinese: 好的。
english: All right.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F002
chinese: 好的。
english: Good.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F003
chinese: 嘿，听着，嗯-我一直想和你谈谈。我有件事要告诉你。艾米最近怎么样？
english: Hey listen,eh- I've been wanting to talk to you. I have something to tell you. How's Amy doing?

name: Ses03F_impro02_M001
chinese: 她过得很好。实际上，她今天刚刚迈出了她的第一步。我为你录下了视频，你可以看一下。
english: She's doing fine. She just took her first steps today actually. I videotaped it for you so you can watch it.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F004
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F005
chinese: 哦。
english: oh.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F006
chinese: 我真的想说。嗯，我，你知道，在中心部门他们叫我进去，我和他们谈了一下-
english: I really want to say that. Well I, so, you know, at the center department they called me in and I talked to-

name: Ses03F_impro02_M002
chinese: 哦，是吗？他们说了什么？
english: Oh, yeah? What did they say?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F007
chinese: 嗯，嗯，实际上他们——我被提升了。
english: Well umm- actually they--I was promoted.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M003
chinese: 哦，哇。太棒了。
english: Oh, wow. That's great.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F008
chinese: 嗯，是的。他们需要更多的护士随时待命，前往海外协助战争。
english: And Uh- Yeah. Uh- They're going to need um- more nurses on call for uh- to go overseas to help out with the war.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F009
chinese: 嗯，由于我被晋升为部门负责人，所以他们要求我去。
english: And uh - seeing as I was uh- promoted and head of the department now, and so- well, they asked me to go.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F010
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M004
chinese: 什么时候？
english: when?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F011
chinese: 它将会在大约三周内发生。
english: It's going- It's going to be probably in about three weeks.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M005
chinese: 什么？你不能那样做。三个星期？
english: What? You can't do that. Three weeks?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F012
chinese: 是的
english: yeah

name: Ses03F_impro02_F013
chinese: 好的，我三周后离开，但是——是的。
english: Well, I'm leaving in three weeks, but-- Yeah.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M006
chinese: 上帝啊，我们下周应该去看一间房子。
english: God, we're supposed to take a look at a house next week.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F014
chinese: 也许我们还可以做那件事
english: Maybe we can still do that

name: Ses03F_impro02_M007
chinese: 我不能-不，我不能独自做这件事。
english: I can't- No, I can't do this alone.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F015
chinese: 是的，嗯——
english: Yeah, and uh--

name: Ses03F_impro02_M008
chinese: 艾米一个月后开始上学。
english: Amy's starting school in a month.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F016
chinese: 我知道，但是你看，我必须拿这个。我的意思是，如果我不拿，我的意思是，我可能会被解雇。
english: I know, but look, I have to take this. I mean, if I don't, I mean, I could get fired.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F017
chinese: 我们知道你需要-我们也需要这笔钱。如果我不接受这个，我们甚至买不起房子。
english: And we know you need-we need the money. We couldn't even- purchase a house if I didn't take this.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M009
chinese: 上帝。
english: God.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M010
chinese: 你知道我表妹发生了什么事。她走了，再也没有回来。
english: You know what happened to my cousin. She went and she never came back.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F018
chinese: 亲爱的，我要回来了。不是那样的。
english: Honey, I'm going to come back. It's not like that.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F019
chinese: 但是，这是为期一年的。
english: But it- it is for a year.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M011
chinese: 哦
english: Oh

name: Ses03F_impro02_F020
chinese: 宝贝，对不起。但是我不想做。
english: Babe, I'm sorry. But I don't want to do.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M012
chinese: 我不能-
english: I can't-

name: Ses03F_impro02_F021
chinese: 你和我一样清楚，我非常想和你以及艾米一起留在这里，但我不能。
english: You know as much as -as much as me that I-I want to stay here with you and Amy so bad, but I can't.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M013
chinese: 你还记得上次你去的时候吗？你知道那对我来说有多难吗？现在我们有了一个孩子。
english: You remember the last time you went? You know how hard it was for me? Now we have a kid.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F022
chinese: 但是你对她真的很好。你知道，她比我更了解你，因为我每天都在工作。
english: But you're so good with her. You know, she knows you better than she knows me 'cause I'm at work every day.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M014
chinese: 我必须工作。
english: I have to work.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M015
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses03F_impro02_F023
chinese: 宝贝，我爱你。
english: Babe, I love you.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M016
chinese: 你不能把你的女儿一个人留在这里。
english: You can't leave your daughter alone like this.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F024
chinese: 但是她有你。我的意思是，那就是你存在的目的。你是我的得力助手。
english: But she has you. I mean, that's what you're there for. You're my right-hand man.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F025
chinese: 没事的，一切都会好的。
english: It's going to be okay.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M017
chinese: 你不能推迟它吗？
english: You can't postpone it?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F026
chinese: 不，我必须走了。
english: No, I have to go.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F027
chinese: 等一下，你可以写信给我，而且你知道，还可以给我发照片。
english: Wait, you can write me and as you know, send me pictures.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M018
chinese: 我不知道我能否应对你再过一年。
english: I don't know if I can handle you going another year.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F028
chinese: 你是什么意思？
english: What do you mean?

name: Ses03F_impro02_M019
chinese: 我不知道我是否能够承受。
english: I don't know if I- if I could take it.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F029
chinese: 看，我需要你为我坚强。因为现在我不能是唯一一个坚强的人，真的，我--
english: Look, I need you to be strong for me. 'Cause I can't be the only one that's strong right now, really, I--

name: Ses03F_impro02_M020
chinese: 我不可能那么坚强。整整一年。
english: I can't be that strong. A whole year.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M021
chinese: 我，哦，我的天。
english: me, oh my god.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F030
chinese: 但是我们可以工作，你知道，我们可以写信给我，我们可以看照片。
english: But we can work, you know, we--you can write me and we could see pictures

name: Ses03F_impro02_M022
chinese: 如果你不回来怎么办？
english: What if you don't come back?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F031
chinese: 如果我们活下来了，如果我们能够活下来，亲爱的，你知道，你知道我们可以度过任何困难--
english: and if we survive, if we survive that then babe, you know you know we could survive any--

name: Ses03F_impro02_F032
chinese: 我会回来。
english: I will come back.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M023
chinese: 我应该做什么 - 哦，五个人中有一个不会回来。
english: What am I supposed--oh, one out of five people aren't coming back.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M024
chinese: 它看起来不太好。
english: It doesn't look very good.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F033
chinese: 我能做到。我将要做到。而且我会平安无事地回来。
english: I can do it. I'm going to do it. And I'll be back safe and sound and-

name: Ses03F_impro02_F034
chinese: 我们将拥有我们所需的所有钱。
english: we'll have all the money that we ever needed.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F035
chinese: 然后，我将停止工作，和宝宝一起呆在家里。
english: And- And then I'll stop working and- I'll stay home with the baby.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M025
chinese: 我不想要钱。我想要你在这里。
english: I don't want the money. I want-you here

name: Ses03F_impro02_M026
chinese: 我们会得到钱，对吗？你不需要这份工作，对吗？
english: we'll get money, all right? You don't need the job, all right?

name: Ses03F_impro02_M027
chinese: 如果你的生命将会受到威胁，而且这个家庭也会受到威胁，我们不需要这份工作。我们会找到钱的。
english: If your life is going to be in danger and this family is going to be in danger we don't need the job. We'll find the money.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F036
chinese: 这是我所知道的唯一事情。我现在不能放弃。
english: It's all I ever knew how to do. I can't quit now.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M028
chinese: 我们应该如何告诉艾米？她应该如何理解那个？
english: How are we supposed to tell Amy? How's she supposed to understand that?

name: Ses03F_impro02_F037
chinese: 好的，我们告诉她妈妈要去度假一段时间。
english: Well, we- we tell her mommy's going on va- on a trip for for- a while.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M029
chinese: 她上学的第一年会感觉如何，没有妈妈。
english: How is she going to feel the first year in school, no mom.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F038
chinese: 不要对我这样做。
english: Don't do that to me.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F039
chinese: 已经够难了，Brian，我做不到。
english: It's hard enough already, Brian, I can't.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M030
chinese: 我不只是考虑自己；我在考虑我们的孩子。
english: I'm not thinking about just me; I'm thinking about our child.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F040
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F041
chinese: 我没想到会发生这种事情。我从来没有计划过这个。有些事情你就是无法计划的，你知道的。
english: I didn't expect this to happen. I never planned for this. Some things you just don't plan for, you know.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F042
chinese: 对不起，宝贝。
english: I'm sorry, babe.

name: Ses03F_impro02_F043
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm so sorry.

name: Ses03F_impro02_M031
chinese: 好的，那么。
english: All right, then.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F001
chinese: 除了弗雷达，没有人知道我们在这里，而且她也不会打电话。
english: Nobody knows we're here except Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那么就一定是他们了。
english: It must be them then.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F002
chinese: 好的，我们打算做什么？
english: Well what are we going to do?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M003
chinese: 亲爱的，我们会没事的。无论发生什么，不是吗？
english: We'll be alright, darling.  Whatever happens, aren't we?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远甜蜜。
english: Now and always sweet.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的。
english: It was bound to come sooner or later.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好。你好。什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello.  Hello.  What?  Wrong number.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F005
chinese: 啊。它让我背脊发寒。
english: Ahh.  It sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M006
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M007
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势。
english: With the most perfect poise.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F007
chinese: 当然，我可能会行一个法庭屈膝礼。
english: Certainly I shall probably do a court curtsy.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M008
chinese: 当一个人快乐的时候，那些本应该非常重要的事情却一点都不重要，不是吗？
english: Things that ought to matter dreadfully don't matter at all when one's happy, do they?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F008
chinese: 令人可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: What is so horrible is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M009
chinese: 不要说那样的话，亲爱的。
english: Don't say that, my darling.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F009
chinese: 这是真的，整个事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true the whole business is very poor joke.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M010
chinese: 意味着那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱。
english: Meaning that sacred and beautiful thing love.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的，就是这个意思。
english: Yes, meaning just that.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M011
chinese: 这一切意味着什么？这是我在不断追求终极真理中问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: What does it all mean?  That's what I asked myself in my ceaseless quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God what does it all mean?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm serious.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真。这只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious, my darling.  It's just what they want.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M013
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。
english: All the futile moralists who try to make life unbearable.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M014
chinese: 嘲笑他们，轻率对待，嘲笑一切，嘲笑他们所有神圣的口号。
english: Laugh at them, be flippant, laugh at everything, all their sacred shibboleths

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M015
chinese: 轻率的态度使他们那些虚伪的甜言蜜语变得刻薄。
english: flippancy brings out the acid in their damn sweetness and light.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F013
chinese: 如果我必须对一切都笑，那我也必须笑我们自己。
english: If I must laugh at everything, I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M016
chinese: 当然你必须。我们确实是笑柄。
english: Certainly you must.  We are figures of fun alright.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F014
chinese: 哦，这种荒谬而压倒一切的爱情会持续多久呢？
english: Oh, how long will it last, this ludicrous, over-bearing love of ours?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M017
chinese: 嗯，谁知道呢？
english: Well who knows?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F015
chinese: 我们总是想要争吵和打架。
english: We always want to bicker and fight.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M018
chinese: 不，那火焰将随着我们的激情逐渐消逝。
english: No that fire will fade long with our passion.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，我们会喜欢那样吗？
english: Oh, dear shall we like that?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M019
chinese: 这完全取决于我们打得有多好。
english: It all depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F017
chinese: 如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？剩下的那个人还会笑吗？
english: What happens if one of us dies?  Does the one that's left still laugh?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M020
chinese: 是的。是的。全力以赴。
english: Yes.  Yes.  with all his might.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F018
chinese: 嗯，那可够严重的，不是吗？
english: Well that's serious enough, isn't it?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M021
chinese: 不，不是的。死亡是非常可笑的，就像一个狡猾的小谜团。全靠镜子完成。
english: No, no it isn't.  Death is very laughable such a cunning little mystery.  All done with mirrors.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F019
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M022
chinese: 所以从长远来看，每个人都是如此。让我们肤浅地同情那些可怜的哲学家。
english: So is everyone else in the long run.  Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M023
chinese: 让我们吹喇叭和吱吱声，尽情享受派对，就像小小的、相当愚蠢的小学生一样。
english: Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and enjoy the party as much as we can like small quite idiotic little school children.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M024
chinese: 让我们品味这一刻的愉悦。亲爱的，在你的身体腐烂和蠕虫在你的眼眶里出入之前，来吻我。
english: Let's savor the delight of the moment.  Come and kiss me darling before your body rots and worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F020
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliott, worms don't pop.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M025
chinese: 我不介意你做什么，你可以把自己涂成全身绿色。
english: I don't mind what you do, see. you can paint yourself green all over

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M026
chinese: 在范多姆广场裸舞，并与世界上所有的男人一起匆匆离去，只要你最爱我，我就不会说一句话。
english: and dance naked in the place Place Vendome and rush away with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word as long as you love me best.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F021
chinese: 谢谢你，亲爱的。同样的规则也适用于你，除非我发现你甚至只是看着其他女人，我会杀了你。
english: Thank you, dear.  The same applies to you except that if I catch you so much as looking at another woman, I'll kill you.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M027
chinese: 你还记得在威尼斯那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Do you remember that awful scene in Venice?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F022
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M028
chinese: 那个你买了那条小彩绘木蛇并把它放在我的床上的地方。
english: The one where you bought that little painted wooden snake and put it on my bed.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哦，查尔斯。那是他的名字。查尔斯，他扭动得如此美妙。
english: Oh, Charles.  That was his name.  Charles he did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M029
chinese: 可怕的事情。我讨厌它。
english: Horrible thing.  I hated it.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F024
chinese: 是的，我知道你做了。你把他扔出窗户，扔进了大运河。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: Yes, I know you did.  You threw him out of the window into the Grand Canal.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M030
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F025
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M031
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧坏了我的浴袍。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your curling irons burnt holes in my dressing gown.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F026
chinese: 它也烧毁了我的梳子和浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: It burnt my comb too and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M032
chinese: 啊，那时候我们还年轻得多。那真是个令人兴奋的事情，不是吗？
english: Ah, we were much younger then.  That was a rouser wasn't it?

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F027
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M033
chinese: 你没有打我-我没有很用力地打你。
english: You didn't hit me- I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F028
chinese: 然后经理走进来，发现我们在地板上像豹子一样滚来滚去，咬来咬去，抓来抓去。
english: Then the manager came in and found us rolling about on the floor biting and scratching like panthers.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M034
chinese: 我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: I shall never forget his face.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F029
chinese: 多么荒谬。多么彻底、彻底荒谬。
english: How ridiculous.  How utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M035
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_F030
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses04F_script03_1_M036
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F000
chinese: 嗨。嗯，不好意思，我来过五个桌子，似乎没有人能告诉我需要做什么。我已经在这里一个多小时了。你能帮助我吗？
english: Hi.  Um, excuse me I've been to, like, five of the desks here and nobody seems to be able to tell me what it is I need to do.  I've been here for over an hour.  Can you possibly help me?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M000
chinese: 嗯，让我看看-你需要什么？
english: Uh, lets- What do you need exactly?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F001
chinese: 嗯，我填写了所有的表格并且把它们交给了每个人，但他们一直把我推给其他人。
english: Well I filled out all the forms and I've given them to everyone and they keep sending me to someone else.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M001
chinese: 你需要一张新的许可证，这是你告诉我的吗？
english: You need a new license, is that what you're telling me?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F002
chinese: 是的。我只是想要获得一个新的许可证。
english: Yes.  I'm just trying to get a new license.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M002
chinese: 让我看看表格。就让我看看表格。是的。你填错了。我不能 - 我不能 - 我不能用这个做任何事情。
english: Let me see the form. Just let me see the form. Yeah.  You filled this out wrong.  I can't - I can't - I can't do anything with this.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F003
chinese: 好的。我做了-
english: Okay.  I did-

name: Ses04F_impro01_M003
chinese: 女士，我无法帮助您。您需要填写一张新表格，并且需要排到队伍的后面。
english: Ma'am I cannot help you.  You need to fill out a new form and you need to get in the back of the line.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F004
chinese: 我完全按照他们告诉我的去做了。
english: I did exactly what they told me to do.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F005
chinese: 我已经做了这个地方里每个人告诉我做的一切。我已经在这里等了一个多小时了。他们让我排队等候。每次我都要重新开始。
english: I have done everything everyone in this entire place has told me to do.  I've been here for over an hour.  They make me wait in line.  Every single time I start over again.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M004
chinese: 女士，我无法帮助您。您明白吗？
english: Ma'am I can't help you.  Do you understand?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F006
chinese: 我有自己的生活。我有事情要做。我有要去的地方。你能不能请不要干扰我？
english: I have a life.  I have things to do.  I have places to go.  Can you not just put this through please?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M005
chinese: 我也有自己的生活，夫人。
english: I've got a life too ma'am

name: Ses04F_impro01_M006
chinese: 我得在这里工作一整天。好吧。我得整天和你们这些人打交道。
english: and I got to - i got to work here all day long.  Okay.  I've got to deal with you people all day.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M007
chinese: 所以我需要你做的是，我需要你正确填写这张表格，并排到队伍的最后。
english: So what I need you to do is I need you to fill out this form correctly and go to the back of the line.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F007
chinese: 好的，那很好。那很好，但是我已经按照你们告诉我的做了一切。我不明白为什么你们不能帮我完成这个。这很简单，对吧？执照。我需要它。我们能不能请你们帮我办理这个？
english: Okay, that's nice. That's nice but I have done everything you people have told me to do. I don't understand why you can't just help me get this done.  It's simple, right?  License.  I need it. Can we just do this please?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M008
chinese: 我对你无能为力。你明白吗？无能为力。
english: There's nothing I can do for you.  Do you understand that?  Nothing.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M009
chinese: 我需要你做的是去排队的后面。
english: What I need you to do is go to the back of the line,

name: Ses04F_impro01_F008
chinese: 我已经排队后面五次了。
english: I've been to the back of the line five times.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M010
chinese: 请填写此表格并等待。
english: fill out this form and wait

name: Ses04F_impro01_M011
chinese: 你将不得不再次回去。
english: You're going to have to go back again.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F009
chinese: 好的。我在表格上做错了什么，以至于我必须重新开始？
english: Okay.  What is it that I did wrong on the form that I have to start all over again?
