name: Ses04F_impro01_M012
chinese: 这整个区域你没有初始化。
english: This whole area here you didn't initial

name: Ses04F_impro01_M013
chinese: 你填写了-
english: and you filled out-

name: Ses04F_impro01_F010
chinese: 好的。嗯，我可以立即在这里完成，而不需要再次排队到后面。看，签字了。全部完成。准备好走了。
english: Okay.  Well, I can do that right here right now without going to the back of the line again.  See look initialed.  All done. Ready to go.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M014
chinese: 女士，我现在还有其他人在排队等候。我现在还有其他人在排队等候。
english: Ma'am I have other people waiting in line right now.  I have other people waiting in line right now.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F011
chinese: 我已经等了一个多小时。
english: I have been waiting for over an hour.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M015
chinese: 这个表格的整个区域本不应该填写，而你把地址填在了错误的位置。
english: This whole area of the form was not supposed to be filled out and you put the address in the wrong place

name: Ses04F_impro01_M016
chinese: 嗯，而且你把自己的名字拼错了。所以我需要你纠正一下。
english: Uhh, and you spelled your own name wrong.  So I need you to take that

name: Ses04F_impro01_F012
chinese: 我不会再重新开始了。不，我已经做了这五次了。我不会再重新开始了。
english: I'm not starting over again.  No I have done this five times.  I am not starting over again.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M017
chinese: 然后，嗯，把它丢掉。我需要你填写一张新表格。
english: and, uh, throw it away. I need you to fill out a new form.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M018
chinese: 女士，你要-你-看。你真的-你真的
english: Ma'am you're going to have- you- look. You really- you really

name: Ses04F_impro01_F013
chinese: 看，你能不能帮帮我？
english: Look can you not just help me?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M019
chinese: 我现在无法帮助你。你明白吗？
english: I can't help you right now.  Do you understand that?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F014
chinese: 我的意思是看，她-她非常友善。她不介意等几分钟，因为我已经在这里待了一整天。我还有工作要回去做。我还要去接孩子放学。我不能只是呆在这里。
english: I mean look she's -she's perfectly nice.  She doesn't mind waiting for a couple of minutes because I've been here all day. I have a job to get back to.  I have kids to pick up from school.  I can't just stay here.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M020
chinese: 看，我现在要去午餐休息了。所以你只能拿着这张表格去排队的最后面。
english: Look I'm going on my lunch break right now.  So you're just going to have to take this form and go to the back of the line.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F015
chinese: 不。不。不。不。你必须帮助我。
english: No.  No.  No. No. You have to help me.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M021
chinese: 就像我之前说的一样，现在。
english: like I said before right now.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F016
chinese: 这是你的工作，是帮助像我这样需要获得新执照的人。
english: This is your job is to help people like me who need to get a new license.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F017
chinese: 这就像你来这里的全部目的一样。
english: That's like the whole purpose of you being here.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M022
chinese: 女士，您正在考验我的耐心。您明白我的意思吗？
english: Ma'am you are testing my patience.  Do you understand me?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F018
chinese: 我-我-我在测试你的耐心吗？
english: I- I- I'm testing your patience?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M023
chinese: 你正在考验我该死的耐心。
english: You're testing my goddamn patience.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F019
chinese: 我在测试你的耐心？
english: I'm testing your patience?

name: Ses04F_impro01_M024
chinese: 我整天在这该死的建筑物里工作。我受够了，好吗？
english: I work in this fucking building all day. And I'm sick of it, okay?

name: Ses04F_impro01_F020
chinese: 是的。你必须整天在这里。
english: Yeah.  You have to be here all day.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F021
chinese: 我不需要。我需要利用我的时间去做其他事情。好的。
english: I don't need to be.  I need to go and do other things with my time.  Okay.

name: Ses04F_impro01_F022
chinese: 请把表格放进来，拍照，让我拿到我的驾照然后赶紧离开这里。拜托。
english: Please just put the form in, take the picture, let me get my license and get the hell out of here.  Please.

name: Ses04F_impro01_M025
chinese: 我已经走开了。我不在这里了。
english: I've walked away already.  I'm not here anymore.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑。这太棒了，不是吗？看看这个夜晚，再好不过了。
english: What time is it?  They're supposed to run around midnight.  This is great, isn't it?  Look at this night we've got here; couldn't be better.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M001
chinese: 实际上，我想沿着海岸线再往前走一点，远离灯光和人群，但我担心我们会错过它。你好吗？
english: Actually, I wanted to go a little farther up the coast, get away from the lights and the people, but I was afraid we'd miss it.  How you doing?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M002
chinese: 那个，那个 - 那只是泡沫吗？我甚至都分不清。虽然，如果你分不清，那可能不是它们。它们可能会很明显，你觉得呢？
english: Is that, is that - is that just foam?  I can't even tell.  Although, if you can't tell, it's probably isn't them.  It'll probably be unmistakable, don't you think?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M003
chinese: 你好吗？哦，不，你知道我做了什么吗？我忘记带手电筒了。我怎么会这么愚蠢呢？我应该带上手电筒的。
english: How you doing?  Oh, no, you know what I did?  I forgot to bring my flashlight.  How could I be so stupid?  I should have brought my flashlight.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M004
chinese: 手电筒；那个银色的。只有一个，对吧？
english: The flashlight; the silver one.  There's only one, isn't there?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F002
chinese: 这不是你的。
english: It's not yours.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M005
chinese: 它是谁的？
english: Whose is it?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的。这也是我的。
english: It's ours.  It's mine, too.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M006
chinese: 好的，当然可以。
english: Well, sure.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F004
chinese: 你一直说我的手电筒，好像它只属于你一样。这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: You kept saying my flashlight as if it's somehow just yours.  How is that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M007
chinese: 不，当然，我们的手电筒；你的和我的。我的手电筒就是你的手电筒，当然。我们怎么会忘记带它呢？希望月亮能一直出来。
english: No, of course, our flashlight; yours and mine.  Me flashlight es su flashlight, naturally.  How could we not think to bring it?  I hope the moon stays out.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M008
chinese: 我想知道，他们是否总是在满月时奔跑？我记不清去年是否是满月。记得吗？
english: I wonder, do they always run during a full moon? I can't remember if it was full last year.  Remember?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M009
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？我们应该带毯子，我们的毯子。
english: Are you cold?  Do you want my jacket?  We should have brought the blanket, our blanket.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M010
chinese: 哦，天啊。这太棒了。我甚至都没想到带一打啤酒。现在正好需要一打啤酒。我简直不敢相信我忘了。我就像个孩子一样。真不可思议我居然能记得拉上拉链出门。哦。
english: Oh, man.  This is great.  I didn't even think to bring a six pack.  Six pack would be just the ticket right about now.  I can't believe I forgot.  I'm like a kid.  It's amazing I got out of the house with my fly zipped.  Oh.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M011
chinese: 我想知道他们是否能听到我说话或感受到我们在沙滩上移动时的震动。
english: I wonder if they can hear me talk or feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F006
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M012
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: You want my jacket?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F007
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了，我们回家吧。
english: It's after eleven; let's go home.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M013
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们会错过它的。我们刚到这里。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里的意义是什么？
english: Are you kidding?  We'd miss it.  We just got here.  What's the point of coming down here if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M014
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M015
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point, too.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F010
chinese: 那么让我们回家吧。
english: So let's go home.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M016
chinese: 不，不，不。那不是我的观点。我的观点是，如果我们只是离开的话，下来这里就没有意义了。你不想看看吗？
english: No, no, no.  That's not my point.  My point is is that there's no point in coming down here if we just leave.  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M017
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我就是不喜欢。这太愚蠢了。
english: I just don't.  It's stupid.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M018
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。我的意思是，这只发生一次每年。这是一个很好的机会。想想堪萨斯的人们。他们得买机票和预订酒店才能来看这个。而我们只需要四十分钟的路程。这太好了，不能错过。
english: Honey, this is a natural phenomenon.  I mean, this only happens once a year.  It's a great opportunity.  Think about the people in Kansas.  They'd have to get plane tickets and hotel reservations to come see this.  We're just forty minutes away.  It's too good to pass up.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这些小鱼游到沙滩上，扑腾一阵然后游走。然后它们就死了。
english: Pass up what?  These little fish swim onto the beach, flop around and then they swim away.  And then they die.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M019
chinese: 是的，但是海滩上的那一刻是他们小小生命中的亮点。我的意思是，所有那些翻滚的动作是在产卵还是在交配，类似这样的事情。
english: Yeah, but that moment on the beach is the highlight of their little lives.  I mean, all that flopping around is laying eggs or what do you -- spawning or mating, something like that.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M020
chinese: 这里有神秘和魔力。
english: There's mystery here and magic.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？
english: What are you so excited about?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M021
chinese: 哦，对于这些人来说，这是一个重要的夜晚。嗯，生命的最后狂欢。
english: Oh, it's a big night for these guys.  Uh, life's last orgy.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F015
chinese: 这不是我们讨论的登月，而是鱼。这是连没人吃的鱼。
english: This isn't a moon landing we're talking about.  It's fish.  It's fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M022
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。好的。但是有一种鱼会做其他鱼不会做的事情；就像燕子回到卡皮斯特拉诺一样；或者像旅鼠跳下悬崖一样。
english: Yeah, they do. Okay.  But it's fish who do something none of the other fish do; like the swallows are returning to Capistrano; or the lemmings throwing themselves off the cliffs, like that.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M023
chinese: 这里有神秘和魔力；一点点无法解释的东西。我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: There's mystery here and magic; a little bit of the unexplainable.  I don't see how you can not be interested.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M024
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M025
chinese: 我不明白。第一次我们来这里看它时，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚。而去年，我清楚地记得你非常兴奋地来到这里，你急忙把我推出门，脚趾头撞到门槛上，直到我们上了车你才注意到。
english: I don't get it.  First time we came here to see it, you said it was the best night of your life.  And last year, I remember distinctly you were so excited to get here, you stubbed your toe rushing me out the door and didn't even notice until we were in the car.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F018
chinese: 去年，你也会记得，我们的鞋子湿了。我内裤里进了沙子。我们因为无关紧要的事情大吵了一架。你喉咙痛，我们没有看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Last year, you will also remember, our shoes got wet.  I got sand in my panties.  We got into a big fight over nothing.  You got a sore throat and we did not see the grunions.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M026
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F019
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M027
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。这个位置要好得多。我对这些事情有很好的直觉。看那里。那是什么？那是 -
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  This is a much better spot.  I've got good instincts for these things.  Look there.  What's that?  Is that -

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M028
chinese: 不，这只是海藻，不是吗？哦，天啊，太棒了。我不会错过这个的。我是说，想想这个。我知道你不感兴趣，但请花一分钟想想这个。
english: no, it's just seaweed, isn't it?  Oh, man, this is great.  I wouldn't miss this for anything.  I mean, think about this.  I know you're not interested, but just think about this for a minute.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M029
chinese: 在某个地方，有一大群银色的鱼朝这个方向前进。他们不知道为什么。我们也不知道为什么。这不是一个决定。他们没有进行投票。没有人给他们发邀请函或地图。
english: Out there someplace is this huge mass of silver fish heading this way.  They don't know why.  We don't know why.  It wasn't a decision.  They didn't take a vote.  No one sent them an invitation or a map;

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M030
chinese: 刚刚有一些小的本能时间释放的鞭炮在他们的小身体中爆炸了，他们一齐转身排成一条长达加利福尼亚海岸的队伍，开始游泳。
english: just some little instinctual time release firecracker went off in their little bodies and all as one, they turned and formed a line as long as the California coast and started swimming.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M031
chinese: 他们现在正在游泳，仿佛那是唯一重要的事情。这是没有思想的单一目标。纯粹的迫切感。
english: They're swimming right now as if that's the only thing that matters.  It's single mindedness with no mind.  Urgency that's pure urge.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M032
chinese: 他们不知道是什么驱使着他们。他们不给它一个名字，也不问一个问题。他们只是一起转身，开始游向这里；到这个地方，我们站在这里，为了一场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典。哦，天哪，我自己都起鸡皮疙瘩了。我所有的毛发都竖了起来。
english: They don't know what drives them.  They don't give it a name or ask a question.  They just turn, as one, and start the swim that brings them here; to this place, where we stand, for a massive celebration of sex and death.  Oh, man, I'm giving myself goose bumps.  All my hairs are popping up.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses04M_script02_1_M033
chinese: 你觉得怎么样？
english: Well so what did you think?

name: Ses04M_script02_1_F021
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F000
chinese: 看这个，鸡皮疙瘩。
english: Look at this, goose bumps.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M000
chinese: 你觉得怎么样？
english: Well so what'd you think?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F001
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我说的话。
english: What I said.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M002
chinese: 当然不是。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: Certainly is not.  It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F003
chinese: 这是公关活动。有人向你兜售了一个美妙的活动将在海滩上举行的虚假信息。
english: It's PR.  Somebody sold you a bill of goods that this wonderful event is going to take place on the beach.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M003
chinese: 我不是唯一一个。看看这些人。
english: I'm not the only one.  Look at these people.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F004
chinese: 当然。他们都听到了同样的故事。这就是让我们不断回来寻找更多的原因；让我们兴奋不已；让我们认为生活随时都会开始，只要我们能找到合适的位置，参与其中。
english: Sure.  They're all told the same story.  It's what keeps us coming back for more; keeps us excited; keeps us thinking that life is going to start any minute now if we could just find the right spot; get in on the action.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F005
chinese: 对不起，但对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: Well, I'm sorry, but it's still just fish to me.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？不要误解我的意思，但是你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something?  Don't take this the wrong way, but are you having your period?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F006
chinese: 该死的，奥吉，别问我那个。你问我那个我讨厌。你总是问我那个。这是侮辱。
english: Goddamn it, Augie, don't ask me that.  I hate it when you ask me that.  You always ask me that.  It's insulting.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M006
chinese: 好的，有什么困扰你的事情吗？
english: Well what's bugging you?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F007
chinese: 我们对今晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: We just have different ideas about what this evening is supposed to look like.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没什么了不起的。我们来到这里。沙鳗来了。它们做它们的小鱼事。我们发出哦，啊的声音，看着鱼。它们回家了。我们也回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  We come down here.  The grunions arrive.  They do their little fish business.  We go ooh, ah, look at the fish.  They go home.  We go home.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F008
chinese: 拜托，我们不会去看grunions。
english: For heaven's sake, we are not going to see the grunions.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F009
chinese: 我们从来不这样做，是吗？我们曾经吗？
english: We never do, do we?  Have we ever?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次。
english: We've missed them twice.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M010
chinese: 那从来都不是。
english: That's not ever.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F010
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候。那是永远的。
english: Twice is every time we've tried.  That's ever.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M011
chinese: 我们今年会见到他们。
english: We'll see them this year.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F011
chinese: 不，我们不会这样做。这是没有意义的。这就像等待圣诞老人一样。我感觉我的整个生活都将被花在站在海滩上，眼睛睁得大大的，双手紧紧地握在一起，期待着鱼的出现。但是鱼不会出现。
english: No, we won't.  It's pointless.  It's like waiting up to see Santa Claus.  I feel as though my entire life is going to be spent standing on the beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasped expectantly waiting for the fish to show up.  And the fish won't show up.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M012
chinese: 我以为你想看见它们。
english: I thought you wanted to see them.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F012
chinese: 你不知道我在说什么。
english: You don't have any idea what I'm saying.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M013
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No, of course, not.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F013
chinese: 我确实想看它。我总是这样。我一直在想这一次会是不同的，但从来都不是。
english: I did want to see it.  I always do.  I keep thinking this time will be the time, but it never is.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M014
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，没有什么需要受创伤的。
english: It's just fish; nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F014
chinese: 求求你，这不是关于鱼的事。
english: For heaven's sake, this is not about fish.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M015
chinese: 我一直在试图逆向思考，但似乎无法确定我们何时走向恶化的时刻。
english: I've been trying to work this backwards, but I can't seem to pinpoint the moment when we took a turn for the worse.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M016
chinese: 你在和玛吉通电话的时候还好。晚餐还可以。洗碗没有问题。让我想想，我洗了个澡。嗯，你看了新闻。你说今晚有鱼群出现。我说太好了，我们去吧。我今晚感觉很幸运。
english: You were fine during the phone call from Marge.  Dinner was okay.  Doing the dishes was no problem.  Let's see, I took a shower.  Uh, you watched the news.  You said the grunions are running tonight.  I said great, let's go.  I feel lucky tonight.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M017
chinese: 嗯，好的。所以我穿上外套；放出动物们；
english: Uh,okay.  So I'm putting on my jacket; putting out the animals;

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F015
chinese: 你还记得我们第一次来看它的时候吗？
english: Do you remember the first time we came to see it?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M018
chinese: 嗯，把车从车库里开出来。
english: uh, taking the car out of the gara- out of the garage.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M019
chinese: 嗯。
english: Uh.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F016
chinese: 大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。我们以为我怀孕了，我们有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。你叫我跳舞。于是我们脱掉鞋子，你打开了瓶塞。
english: It was about four years ago, right after we got married.  We thought I was pregnant and we had a bottle of champagne but no glasses.  You asked me to dance.  So we took off our shoes and you popped the cork.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F017
chinese: 当我们在跳舞时，你对我说了最温柔、最亲密的话，直接说进我的耳朵里，让我能够感受到它们，而不仅仅是听到它们。我记得当时我想，这就是了。终于，终于我像应该快乐一样。
english: And while we were dancing, you said the softest, most intimate things to me, right into my ear so that I could feel them as much as hear them.  And I remember thinking this is it.  At last, at last I'm as happy as I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M020
chinese: 等一下，我明白了。
english: Wait a minute, I've got it.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F018
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞；从瓶子里喝香槟。
english: Dancing barefoot in the sand; drinking champagne from the bottle.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M021
chinese: 它是在车里，对吗？开过Knickerbocker酒水柜台？你说让我们买点香槟，我说时间在浪费或者类似的话。对吗？就是这样，对吗？你希望这次像上次那样。就是这样。当然。
english: It was in the car, right?  Driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker?  You said let's get some champagne and I said times a wasting or something like that.  Right?  That's it, right?  You want this to be like the other time.  That's it.  Of course.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F019
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I'd rather not remember some things.  I'd rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M022
chinese: 当然。好的。好吧。我明白了。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Sure.  Okay.  Alright.  I've got it.  Listen do you want to dance?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F020
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M023
chinese: 你想要喝一些香槟吗？
english: You want to get some champagne?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F021
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M024
chinese: 你想让我在你耳边呼吸吗？
english: What, you want me to breathe in your ear?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F022
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M025
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？
english: You want to get married again?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F023
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M026
chinese: 什么，你想要离婚吗？
english: What, you want a divorce?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F024
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M027
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M028
chinese: 一块新地毯？一只贵宾犬？一份冰淇淋？一次背部按摩？一份自杀协议？什么？卡拉，什么？你到底想要什么？
english: A new carpet?  A poodle?  An ice cream?  A back rub?  A suicide pact?  What?  What, Carla?  What the hell do you want?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F026
chinese: 我希望事情能按照预期的方式发展。
english: I want something to turn out the way it's supposed to.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M029
chinese: 欢迎加入人类大家庭。你认为这就是我心中所想的吗？你认为当我求婚时，我幻想着四年后我们会来到海滩，为了鱼而互相大喊大叫吗？不。
english: Well welcome to the human race.  You think this is what I had in mind?  You think that when I proposed, I had this great fantasy going that four years down the line, we'd come to the beach and yell at each other over fish?  No.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M030
chinese: 不，我和你一样。我以为一切都会像桃子和玫瑰一样美好，风会吹拂着我们的头发，沙子会蹓着我们的脚趾，鱼儿会永远来，账单会自动支付。
english: No, I'm just like you.  I thought it was going to be all peaches and roses and wind in our hair and sand in our toes and the fish will always come and the bills will always pay themselves.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M031
chinese: 我们将会有三个胖乎乎的红润孩子，哈哈哈，宝贝，这个笑话是对我们的，你知道你会得到什么吗，卡拉？你知道你会得到什么吗？就是这个。
english: And we'll have three fat rosy kids and ha, ha, ha, baby, the joke's on us, 'cause you know what you get, Carla?  You know what you get?  This.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F027
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This what?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M032
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F028
chinese: 哦，对了，当然。这是站在海滩上。这是等待。这是战斗。
english: Oh, right, sure.  This is standing on the beach.   This is waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M033
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F029
chinese: 但这与我想象中的任何事情都不一样。
english: But this isn't anything like I thought anything would be like.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M034
chinese: 不，我知道，我也不。
english: No, I know, me neither.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F030
chinese: 这只是这样的。我的意思是，它包含了很多和一切，但它只是不是，你知道的，其他的东西。你有任何想法我在试图说什么吗？
english: This is just this.  I mean, it includes a lot and everything, but it's just not, you know, something else.  Do you have any idea what I'm trying to say?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M035
chinese: 我正在尽力而为。
english: I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F031
chinese: 我知道你是谁，奥吉。真的，我知道你希望这是特别而美好的，而且今晚是满月，沙滩上还有一切。但我就是忍不住想着要去别的地方。
english: I know you are, Augie.  Really, I do.  I know you meant for this to be special and nice and it's the full moon and the sand and everything.  But I just couldn't help thinking about being somewhere else.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M036
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起，是吗？
english: Maybe if you were with somebody else, too, huh?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F032
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M037
chinese: 不，我知道。但是还是。我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know.  But still.  I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F033
chinese: 天哪，不管我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: For heaven's sake, whatever I'm doing, I'd rather be doing it with you.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M038
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F034
chinese: 好吧，别荒谬了。难道你不知道吗？你可能是希望和别人在一起的那个人；一个知道如何享受生活并不那么较真的人。
english: Well don't be ridiculous.  Don't you know that?  You're the one who probably wishes you were with somebody else; somebody who knew how to enjoy herself and didn't take everything so hard.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M039
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我不会。
english: Actually, now that you mention it, no.  I don't.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F035
chinese: 好的，好吧。所以我们在错误的地方，但我们和正确的人在一起。
english: Okay, fine.  So we're in the wrong spot, but we're with the right person.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M040
chinese: 我不知道。对我来说，这似乎是一个好地方。我的意思是，从这里你可以看到月亮的景色。
english: I don't know.  It seemed like a good spot to me.  I mean, look at the view you've got of the moon from here.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F036
chinese: 是的，我注意到了。在水上看起来很漂亮，不是吗？大大的白色月亮。对不起，奥吉。
english: Yeah, I noticed that.  Looks pretty on the water, doesn't it?  Big ol' white moon.  I'm sorry, Augie.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M041
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're very quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_F037
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses04M_script02_2_M042
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道唯一一个爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know who loves his parents.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道它已经过时了，不是吗？
english: I know it went out of style didn't it?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F001
chinese: 没关系。这是一件好事。
english: It's okay.  It's a good thing.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F002
chinese: 你知道这里很美吧。空气很甜。
english: You know it's lovely here.  The air is sweet.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M001
chinese: 你不后悔来了。
english: You're not sorry you came.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不抱歉，不，但我不会留下来。
english: Not sorry, no but I'm not staying.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F004
chinese: 首先，你妈妈几乎告诉我要走。
english: In the first place, your mother as much as told me to go.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: Well.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F005
chinese: 你看到了那个，你- 你一直有点-
english: You saw that and you- you've been kind of-

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F006
chinese: 嗯，自从我来到这里以后，有点尴尬。
english: Well kind of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M005
chinese: 问题是，我计划在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你，但他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: The trouble is I planned on sneaking up on you over a period of a week or so but they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我知道他们会的，无论如何是你的母亲。
english: I knew they would, your mother anyway.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你是怎么知道的？
english: How did you know?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F008
chinese: 从她的角度来看，我为什么还会来呢？
english: From her point of view why else would I come?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M007
chinese: 你不想要吗？
english: Wouldn't you want to?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M008
chinese: 我猜你知道这就是为什么我要求你来的原因。
english: I guess you know this is why I asked you to come.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F009
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I guess this is why I came.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M009
chinese: 安，我爱你。我非常爱你。我爱你。
english: Ann, I love you.  I love you a great deal.  I love you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我没有想象力，这就是我能告诉你的全部。
english: I have no imagination that's all I know to tell you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M011
chinese: 我让你尴尬了。我不想在这里告诉你。
english: I'm embarrassing you.  I didn't want to tell it to you here.  I

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M012
chinese: 想要去一个我们从未去过的地方，一个我们对彼此都是全新的地方。
english: wanted some place we'd never been, a place where we'd be brand new to each other.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M013
chinese: 你认为这是错的，这把椅子，这个院子。我希望你为我做好准备。我不想从任何事物中夺走你。
english: You think this is wrong, this chair, this yard.  I want you to be ready for me.  I don't want to win you away from anything.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F010
chinese: 克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Chris, I've been ready a long, long time.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M014
chinese: 他永远离开了。你确定吗？
english: And he's gone forever.  You're sure?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F011
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M015
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F012
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M016
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F013
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M017
chinese: 安，为什么你不告诉我？
english: Ann, why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F014
chinese: 我一直在等你，克里斯。直到那时你从未写过，然后当你写了之后，你说了什么。我的意思是你确实可以含糊其辞，你知道的。
english: I was waiting for you, Chris.  Till then you never wrote and then when you did what did you say.  I mean you sure can be ambiguous you know.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M018
chinese: 给我一个吻，安。给我一个-天啊，我吻了你。
english: Give me a kiss, Ann.  Give me a-God I kissed you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M019
chinese: 我吻了安妮。多久了，多久我一直在等着吻你。
english: I kissed Annie.  How long, how long I've been waiting to kiss you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F015
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。为什么你等了这么多年？我所做的一切就是坐着想着你，不知道自己是否疯了。
english: I'll never forgive you.  Why did you wait all these years?  All I've done is sit and wonder if I was crazy for thinking of you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M020
chinese: 安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Annie, we're going to live now.  I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F016
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M021
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F017
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F018
chinese: 这是什么，克里斯？
english: What is it Chris?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M022
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方。我想和你独处。
english: Let's drive some place.  I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F019
chinese: 不。克里斯，是你妈妈吗？
english: No.  What is it Chris, your mother?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M023
chinese: 不，没有这样的事情。
english: No, nothing like that.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F020
chinese: 那么，怎么了？即使在你的信中也有一些羞愧的事情。
english: Well then what's wrong?  Even in your letters there was something ashamed.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M024
chinese: 是的。我想我一直在变化，但它正在离我远去。
english: Yes.  I suppose I have been but it's going from me.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F021
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You've got to tell me.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M025
chinese: 我不知道从哪里开始。
english: I don't know where to start.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F022
chinese: 这样做不会起作用。
english: It wouldn't work this way.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M026
chinese: 有很多事情混在一起。
english: There's so many things mixed up.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M027
chinese: 你还记得我在海外指挥一家公司吗？
english: You remember overseas I was in command of a company?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F023
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M028
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well I lost them.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F024
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M029
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F025
chinese: 哦，天哪。
english: Oh, gees.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M030
chinese: 这需要很多时间来完成，因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: It takes a lot of time to toss that off because they weren't just men.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M031
chinese: 例如，有一次连续下了几天雨，这个孩子来找我，给了我他最后一双干袜子。
english: For instance, one time it had been raining several days and this kid came to me and gave me his last pair of dry socks.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M032
chinese: 我把它们放在口袋里。那只是一件小事，但这些是我遇到的那种人。
english: I put them in my pocket. that's only a little thing but these are the kind of guys I had.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M033
chinese: 他们没有死。他们为了彼此而自杀。我的意思就是这样。再自私一点，他们今天就还在这里了。
english: They didn't die.  They killed themselves for each other.  I mean that exactly.  A little more selfish and they'd have been here today.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M034
chinese: 我看着它们倒下时得到了这个想法。所有的东西都被摧毁了，但在我看来，有一件新的东西被创造出来了。
english: And I got this idea watching them go down.  Everything was being destroyed see, but it seemed to me that there was one new thing that was made

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M035
chinese: 一种人对人的责任。你明白我吗？
english: a sort of responsibility man for man.  You understand me?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M036
chinese: 然后我回到家，一切都太棒了。
english: And then I came home and it was amazing.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M037
chinese: 这里没有任何意义。
english: There was no meaning in it here.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M038
chinese: 对他们来说，整件事就像一场公交车事故。然后我又和父亲一起工作，陷入了那场疯狂的竞争。
english: The whole thing to them was sort of a bus accident. Then I went to work with father and that whole rat race again.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M039
chinese: 我感到有点羞愧，你说的话让我感到羞愧。
english: I felt, what you said, ashamed somehow

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M040
chinese: 因为没有人有任何改变。这似乎让很多人变成了傻瓜。
english: because nobody was changed at all.  It seemed to make suckers out of a lot of guys.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M041
chinese: 我感到活着是错误的，打开新的银行账本，开新车，看到新的冰箱。
english: I felt wrong to be alive, to open the new bank book, to drive the new car, to see the new refrigerator.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M042
chinese: 我的意思是你可以把那些东西从战争中拿出来，但是
english: I mean you can take those things out of war but

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M043
chinese: 当你驾驶这辆新车时，你必须知道它源自一个人对另一个人的爱。因此，你必须变得更好一点。
english: when you drive the new car, you have to know that it came out of the love a man can have for a man.  You've got to be a little better because of that.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M044
chinese: 否则你所拥有的只是掠夺品，上面还有鲜血。我不想拿走其中的任何东西。
english: Otherwise what you have is really just loot and there's blood on it.  I didn't want to take any of it.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M045
chinese: 我猜那包括了你。
english: I guess that included you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你还是这样感觉吗？
english: And do you still feel that way?

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M046
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now, Annie.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F027
chinese: 因为你不再需要以那种方式感受，因为你有权拥有你所拥有的一切，克里斯，你明白吗，一切。
english: Because you mustn't feel that way anymore because you have a right to whatever you have, Chris, do you understand, everything

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F028
chinese: 那包括我。你的钱没有问题。你父亲让数百架飞机起飞。
english: that includes me.  And your money there's nothing wrong in your money.  Your father put hundreds of planes in the air.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F029
chinese: 你应该感到自豪。一个人应该为此付费。
english: You should be proud.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_M047
chinese: 安妮，安妮，我要为你赚大钱。
english: Annie, Annie I'm going to make a fortune for you.

name: Ses04F_script01_3_F030
chinese: 我该怎么处理一笔财富？
english: What'll I do with a fortune?

name: Ses04M_impro05_M000
chinese: 是的，嗨。看吧 - 嗯，好吧。事情是这样的。
english: Yeah, hi.  Look--Um, okay.  Here's the thing.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F000
chinese: 你好，我能帮你什么吗？
english: Hi, how can I help you?

name: Ses04M_impro05_M001
chinese: 刚从伦敦抵达--
english: Just arrived from London--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F001
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Mmhmm.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M002
chinese: 丢失了我的行李。你们的航空公司--
english: lost my luggage. Your airline--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F002
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm sorry.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F003
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M003
chinese: 我丢了行李。我没有丢失它。不，不是像我把它放在某个地方然后有人拿走了。
english: lost my luggage. I didn't lose it. No, it's not like I left it somewhere and somebody took it.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F004
chinese: 哦，哦，你没有。
english: Oh, oh, you didn't.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F005
chinese: 我以为你丢了行李。
english: I thought you lost your luggage.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M004
chinese: 它丢失了。我在传送带旁边等待，想看看行李领取处是否会出来。
english: It was lost.  I waited on the conveyor -- near the conveyor belt to see, you know, where -- then the baggage claim and see if it would- it would come out.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M005
chinese: 没有出来。我和一个当地权威人士交谈了。
english: Didn't come out.  I spoke to somebody, a local authority figure.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M006
chinese: 他告诉我来到这个桌子前，这样我至少可以拿到我因损失而应得的一百五十美元。
english: And he told me to come to this desk here so I can, uh, at least get, uh, the hundred- hundred and fifty dollars that- that I'm owed for my loss.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M007
chinese: 因为这大致是包加上里面所有物品的价值。
english: 'Cause that's roughly how much the bag plus all its contents was worth.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F006
chinese: 嗯，好的。首先，非常抱歉你丢失了你的包。
english: Uh. Okay.  I -- first of all, I'm very sorry you lost your bag.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F007
chinese: 嗯，但实际上，我们的政策是五十美元。
english: Um, but, actually, our policy is a fifty dollar

name: Ses04M_impro05_M008
chinese: 五十美元？
english: fifty dollars?

name: Ses04M_impro05_F008
chinese: 退款--丢失的包包的赔偿。是的
english: refund--coverage of the bag that was lost. yes

name: Ses04M_impro05_M009
chinese: 五十美元。不行，不行。
english: fifty dollars. No way, no.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F009
chinese: 这是我们的政策，先生。
english: That's our policy, sir.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M010
chinese: 我不明白，但问题是，我不在乎你的政策。
english: I don't but the thing is, I don't care about your policy.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M011
chinese: 你明白吗？
english: You understand?

name: Ses04M_impro05_M012
chinese: 我想让你做的是，我想让你写三个这样的，就好像我是三个人一样。好的。你可以写 - 你可以把我的名字都写上 -
english: What I want you to do is I want you to write three of those, as if I were three people.  Okay.  You can write -- you can just put my name on all --

name: Ses04M_impro05_F010
chinese: 我不能做那个。
english: I can't do that.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M013
chinese: 但是我告诉你的是，那就是你要做的。
english: But what I'm telling you is that's what you're going to do.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F011
chinese: 嗯，不，实际上，不，我不是。
english: Uh, no, actually, no I'm not.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M014
chinese: 不，不，因为，看，我不在乎你的政策说什么。我的意思是--
english: No, no, because, look, I don't care what your policy says.  I mean--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F012
chinese: 对不起，我很理解你的沮丧。你刚下飞机。
english: I'm very sorry.  I understand you're frustrated. You just got off of a flight.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M015
chinese: 你明白我的包里的东西- 我包里的东西价值一百五十美元。
english: You understand that the contents of my bag- The contents of my bag cost a hundred and fifty dollars.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M016
english: You--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F013
chinese: 我们将支付五十。
english: We'll cover fifty.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M017
chinese: 不。不。不。我需要你做的是——我需要你写支票——我需要你写三张。那就可以了。
english: No.  No.  No.  What I need you to do -- I need you to write checks for -- I need you to write three of them. That'll be satisfactory.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F014
chinese: 我们只涵盖五十个
english: We only cover fifty do-

name: Ses04M_impro05_M018
chinese: 刚刚——你可以填写表格——我们可以填写——不，不，不，我们可以填写表格三次。
english: Just -- you can fill out the form--We can fill out - no, no, no, we can fill out the form three times.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F015
chinese: 我们只赔偿价值五十美元的丢失物品。
english: We only cover fifty dollars worth of lost items.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M019
chinese: 然后就这样了。一切都会好的。只是-
english: And then that'll be that. It's going to be fine. Just-

name: Ses04M_impro05_M020
chinese: 我会非常生气的。我是说，我现在很生气，但如果你不做那个检查的话，我会变得非常生气。
english: I'm going to get very upset.  Like, I mean, I'm- I'm upset right now but I'm going to get really upset if you- if you don't do the check thing.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F016
chinese: 我非常抱歉。
english: I'm very sorry.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F017
chinese: 对不起，我很理解你的不满。你刚刚下了一趟长途飞行。
english: I'm very sorry.  I understand you're upset.  You just got off a long flight.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M021
chinese: 你不明白。实际上，你不明白。你不明白是因为我的行李丢失了。好吧。
english: You don't understand. You don't understand, actually.  You don't understand because it was my luggage that was lost.  Okay.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F018
chinese: 我们真的很想和你合作。我们真的很想帮助。
english: We really -- we want to work with you. We really -- we want to help.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F019
chinese: 我理解。如果是我的话，我会知道的。嗯-
english: I understand that.  I would know if it was mine. Um-

name: Ses04M_impro05_M022
chinese: 是的。如果是你的话，但它不是。它是我的。好的。所以只是--
english: Yeah.  If it was yours, but it's not. It's mine.  Okay. So just--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F020
chinese: 但它不是。它是你的。我理解。
english: But it's not.  It's yours.  I understand.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F021
chinese: 我知道。我们想和你合作。我们会给你五十美元，但是我--
english: I know.  We want to work with you.  We will give you the fifty dollars but I'm--

name: Ses04M_impro05_M023
chinese: 不，它不会是五十，而是一百五十。你要写三个，明白吗，三个表格。你要写三个表格然后给我。
english: No, it's not going to be -- but it's not going to be fifty, it's going to be a hundred and fifty.  You're going to write three, you understand, three of- of the forms.  You're going to write three of them out and then give it to me.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F022
chinese: 是的，我们不这样做。我可以继续给你发送--
english: Yeah, we don't do that.  I can go ahead and send you--

name: Ses04M_impro05_M024
chinese: 你-你-你-你误解了我。你会做那件事。
english: You- you- you- you're misunderstanding me.  You're going to do that.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F023
chinese: 我们一定会留意您的包裹。我们会尽力找到它。我们会填写丢失物品的表格。
english: We will definitely keep an eye out for your bag. We will try to find it.  We will, you know, fill out the form for missing items.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M025
chinese: 看，我能和你们的经理说话吗？因为我真的不想处理这个问题，我知道这不是你的错。
english: Look, can I just -- can I speak to your manager, please?  'Cause I- I really -- I don't, um -- I mean, I just don't want to deal with -- I know that -- I mean, I know this isn't your fault,

name: Ses04M_impro05_F024
chinese: 没有人能让这个三次检查的事情发生，因为我们不这样做。
english: No one can make the three check thing happen 'cause we don't do that.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F025
chinese: 我可以给你写一张支票。
english: I can write you the one check.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M026
chinese: 但是我需要和能够实现这个三项检查的人交谈。
english: but I need to speak to somebody who can make the three check thing happen.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F026
chinese: 所有-我主管能做的就是我要做的完全相同的事情。
english: All- all that my supervisor could do is the exact same thing that I'm offering to do.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M027
chinese: 但是我在说什么 - 但是我只是，只是 - 请让我 -
english: But what I'm talk -- but I'm just,just- please let me--

name: Ses04M_impro05_M028
chinese: 但是如果我能直接说话--如果我能直接与你的--与你的上级人员交谈
english: But if I could just speak directly -- if I could just speak directly to your-- to your superior person

name: Ses04M_impro05_F027
chinese: 我很乐意给你一杯咖啡。
english: I'd be happy to give you a cup of coffee, too.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F028
chinese: 我们只是随便扔进去。
english: We'll just throw that in--gratuitously.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M029
chinese: 如果那样对我来说会很有帮助，因为我只是觉得如果-你认为自己没有能力写三张支票，但实际上你是可以的。明白吗？
english: then that would be helpful to me because I just feel like if- you don't think you have the power to write three checks but you actually do. see?

name: Ses04M_impro05_F029
chinese: 不，我不会这样做。你看，如果我这样做的话，我可能会失去工作。
english: No, I don't. See, I could lose my job if I did that.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M030
chinese: 但是你的工作不是我的关心。我的关心是拿到我的行李。
english: But your job is not my concern. My concern is getting my luggage.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F030
chinese: 而你的包不是我的关心。
english: And your bag is not my concern.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F031
chinese: 我关心的只是我要给你的五十美元，用于购买你的包。
english: The fifty dollars I'm going to give you for your bag is really all I'm concerned with.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M031
chinese: 看，我不想争论这个。可以我们就不要为这个争论了。就像--
english: Look, I don't -- look, can we just not argue about this.  Like--

name: Ses04M_impro05_F032
chinese: 我非常乐意不争论这个。我会给你五十美元的证书。
english: I'm more than happy to not argue about it.  I will give you your fifty dollar certificate.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F033
chinese: 你可以继续并填写表格。我们会找你的包。
english: You can go ahead and go fill out the form. We'll look for your bag.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M032
chinese: 那又怎样-如果我们-如果我们做三种形式，那又怎样
english: So what if- what if we- what if we do three forms

name: Ses04M_impro05_M033
chinese: 它们上面有不同的名字吗？那-
english: with different names on them? That-

name: Ses04M_impro05_F034
chinese: 那就是在撒谎。
english: Then that would be lying.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M034
chinese: 但是，不。你看，因为
english: but, no. See, 'cause

name: Ses04M_impro05_M035
chinese: 如果我们有三个表格，那么我可以得到一百五十。
english: if we have three forms then I can get the hundred and fifty.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F035
chinese: 对不起。我们只能为一个人发放一张价值五十美元的证书来赔偿丢失的行李。
english: I'm sorry.  We can only issue one fifty dollar certificate to cover the lost bag for one person.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M036
chinese: 请你，你能不能请你就在这里和我合作一下？就是这样 - 我只是要求你和我合作。我知道 - 我知道你整天都会遇到很多人给你麻烦，给你烦恼，但是
english: Just please, will you please just work with me here? Just -- all I'm asking you to do is just work with me. I know -- I know that you get lots of people all day long who give you shit, give you crap, but

name: Ses04M_impro05_F036
chinese: 我理解你感到沮丧，但是--
english: I understand you're frustrated, but--

name: Ses04M_impro05_M037
chinese: 嗯，你知道，我——这是我的包，我需要150美元。请。
english: um, you know, I -- this is my bag and I need the hundred and fifty dollars. Please.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F037
chinese: 我知道。我明白这是私人的 - 这对你来说是私人的。我明白。
english: I know. I understand it's personal-- It's personal to you. I get that.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M038
chinese: 请。
english: Please.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F038
chinese: 但是如果你只是想坐下来，你知道，也许喝杯茶，稍微冷静一下，我们会继续并尽力帮助你。你没问题吧。
english: But if you want to just sit down, you know, maybe have a cup of tea, calm down a little bit, we'll go ahead and we'll do what we can for you. you okey

name: Ses04M_impro05_M039
chinese: 我已经冷静了。好的，我冷静。我冷静。
english: I'm already calm. Okay, I'm calm. I'm calm.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M040
chinese: 我只需要你填写三张表格，然后我就会永远离开你，永远不再见面。
english: Just all I need you to do is just fill out three forms and I'll leave you alone forever, forever.  I'll never -- we'll never see each other again.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F039
chinese: 我期待着那件事。然而，我不能这样做。我会失去我的工作。
english: And I'm looking forward to that.  However, I can't do that. I would lose my job.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M041
chinese: 但是那不会发生的 - 但是你不明白。你期待着再也不见我。
english: But that's not going to-- But you don't understand. You're looking forward to never seeing me again.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F040
chinese: 哦，是的。
english: Oh, yes.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M042
chinese: 但是除非你给我三张支票，否则再也见不到我了。
english: But never seeing me again is not going to happen until you give me the three checks.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F041
chinese: 对不起，真的。但是--
english: I'm sorry, really.  But--

name: Ses04M_impro05_M043
chinese: 我不相信。
english: I don't -- I'm not- I'm not convinced.

name: Ses04M_impro05_F042
chinese: 那是我道歉的意思吗？
english: That I'm sorry?

name: Ses04M_impro05_M044
chinese: 是的。如果你真的很抱歉，你会给我那三张支票的。
english: Yeah.  If you were really sorry, you'd give me the three checks.

name: Ses04M_impro05_M045
chinese: 那么，为什么我们不这样做，停止这种无聊的事情呢？嗯？嗯？
english: So why don't we just do that and stop this nonsense, hmm?  Hmm?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑。这太棒了，不是吗？看看这个夜晚，真是太美了。再好不过了。
english: What time is it?  They're supposed to run around midnight.  This is great isn't it?  Look at this night we've got here.  It couldn't be better.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M001
chinese: 实际上，我想沿着海岸再往前走一点，远离灯光和人群，但我担心会错过它。你好吗？
english: Actually, I wanted to go a little farther up the coast, get away from the lights and the people, but I was afraid to miss it.  How you doing?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M002
chinese: 那个，那个，那只是泡沫，不是吗？我甚至都分不清楚。
english: Is that, is that-that's just foam isn't it?  I can't even tell

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M003
chinese: 尽管如果你无法辨认，那可能不是他们。它很可能是不会被误认的。你不这么认为吗？你好吗？
english: although if you can't tell, it probably isn't them.  It will probably be unmistakable.  Don't you think?  How you doing?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M004
chinese: 哦，你知道我做了什么吗？我忘记带手电筒了。我怎么会这么愚蠢，竟然忘记了带手电筒。
english: Oh, no you know what I did?  I forgot my flashlight.  How could I be so stupid I forgot my flashlight.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M005
chinese: 手电筒，那个银色的。只有一个，对吗？
english: The flashlight, the silver one.  There's only one isn't there?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F002
chinese: 这不是你的。
english: It's not yours.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M006
chinese: 它是谁的？
english: Whose is it?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的。这也是我的。
english: It's ours.  It's mine too.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M007
chinese: 好的，当然可以。
english: Well sure.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F004
chinese: 你一直说我的手电筒，好像它只属于你一样。这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: You kept saying my flashlight as if it somehow is just yours.  How's that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M008
chinese: 当然，我们的手电筒，你的和我的，我的手电筒就是你的手电筒，自然而然。我们怎么会不想带它呢？
english: No of course our flashlight, yours and mine, mi flashlight es su flashlight naturally.  How could we not think to bring it?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M009
chinese: 我希望月亮能够出来。我想知道他们是否总是在满月期间奔跑。我记不清去年是否是满月。记得吗？
english: I hope the moon stays out.  I wonder do they always run during a full moon.  I can't remember if it was full last year.  Remember?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M010
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？我们应该带毯子，我们的毯子。
english: Are you cold?  Do you want my jacket?  We should have brought the blanket, our blanket.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M011
chinese: 啊，这太棒了，不是吗？我甚至没有想到带一打啤酒。现在正好需要一打啤酒。
english: Ah, this is great, isn't it?  I didn't even think to bring a six-pack.  A six-pack would be just the ticket right about now.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M012
chinese: 我简直不敢相信我忘了。我就像个孩子一样。真不可思议我居然能够带着拉链走出家门。
english: I can't believe I forgot.  I'm like a kid.  It's amazing I got out of the house with my fly zipped.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M013
chinese: 哦，我想知道他们是否能听到我说话或感受到我们在沙滩上移动时的震动？
english: Oh, I wonder if they can hear me talk or feel the vibrations in the sand when we move around?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F006
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M014
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F007
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点，我们回家吧。
english: It's after eleven let's go home.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M015
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们会错过它的。我们刚到这里。如果我们只是转身回家，来这里的意义是什么？
english: Are you kidding?  We'd miss it.  We just got here.  What's the point of coming down here if we just turn around and go home?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里下来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming down here.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M016
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M017
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point too.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F010
chinese: 那么让我们回家吧。
english: So let's go home.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M018
chinese: 不，不，不。那不是我的观点。我的观点是，如果我们只是离开的话，下来这里就没有意义了。你不想看看吗？
english: No, no, no.  That's not my point.  My point is is that there's no point in coming down here if we just leave.  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M019
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我就是不喜欢。这太愚蠢了。
english: I just don't.  It's stupid.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M020
chinese: 亲爱的，这是自然现象。我是说这种情况每年只发生一次。这是一个很好的机会。
english: Honey this is natural phenomenon.  I mean this only happens once a year.  This is a great opportunity.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M021
chinese: 想想堪萨斯的人们。他们得买机票和预订酒店才能来看这个。而我们只有四十分钟的路程。这太好了，不容错过。
english: Think about the people in Kansas.  They'd have to get plane tickets and hotel reservations to come see this.  We're just forty minutes away.  It's too good to pass up.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这些小鱼游到沙滩上，翻滚一阵，然后游走，然后它们就死了。
english: Pass up what?  These little fish swim onto the beach, flop around, and then swim away and then they die.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M022
chinese: 是的，但是海滩上的那一刻是他们小小生命中的亮点。所有那些翻滚都是在产卵，或者你说是在产卵或交配之类的。
english: Yeah but that moment on the beach is the highlight of their little lives.  All that flopping around is laying eggs or what do you, spawning or mating something like that.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M023
chinese: 这对于这些人来说是个重要的夜晚。生命的最后狂欢。
english: This is the big night for these guys.  Life's last orgy.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？我们谈论的不是登月，而是鱼。这是没人吃的鱼。
english: What are you so excited about?  This isn't a moon landing we're talking about.  It's fish.  It's fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M024
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah, they do.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F015
chinese: 哦，奥吉。
english: Oh, Augie.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M025
chinese: 好的，但是它是鱼中唯一做某事的鱼。
english: Okay but it's fish who do something none of the other fish do

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M026
chinese: 就像燕子回到卡皮斯特拉诺或旅鼠跳下悬崖一样，就像那样。这里有神秘和魔力。
english: like the swallows returning to Capistrano or the lemmings throwing themselves off the cliffs, like that.  There's mystery here and magic

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M027
chinese: 一点点无法解释的东西。我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: a little bit of the unexplainable.  I don't see how you cannot be interested.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M028
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M029
chinese: 我不明白。第一次我们来这里看的时候，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚，去年我清楚地记得你非常兴奋地来到这里。你匆忙地把我推出门，脚趾头撞到了门槛，直到我们上了车你都没有注意到。
english: I don't get it.  The first time we came here to see it you said it was the best night of your life and last year I remember distinctly you were so excited to get here.  You stubbed your toe rushing me out the door and didn't even notice until we were in the car.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F018
chinese: 去年你也会记得我们的鞋子湿了。我内裤里进了沙子。我们因为无关紧要的事情大吵了一架。你喉咙痛，我们没有看到Grinuons。
english: Last year you will also remember our shoes got wet.  I got sand in my panties.  We got in a big fight over nothing.  You got a sore throat and we did not see the Grunions.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M030
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F019
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M031
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。这是一个更好的位置。
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  This is a much better spot.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M032
chinese: 我对这些事情有很好的直觉。看那里。那是什么。那是吗？那是，那是-不，那只是海草，对吗。
english: I've got good instincts for these things.  Look there. What's that.  Is that?  Is that, is that-no it's just seaweed isn't it.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M033
chinese: 啊，伙计，这太棒了。我不会错过这个机会。我是说，想想这个。我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请花一分钟想一想。
english: Ah, man this is great.  I wouldn't miss this for anything.  I mean think about this.  I know you're not interested but just think about this for a minute.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M034
chinese: 在某个地方，有一大群银色的鱼朝这个方向游过来。他们不知道为什么。我们也不知道为什么。这不是一个决定。他们没有进行投票。
english: Out there someplace there's this huge mass of silver fish heading this way.  They don't know why.  We don't know why.  It wasn't a decision.  They didn't take a vote.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M035
chinese: 没有人给他们寄去地图或邀请。只是一些本能的定时爆竹在他们的小身体中爆炸了，他们全体一起转身排成了一条长达加利福尼亚海岸的队伍，开始游泳。
english: No one sent them a map or an invitation.  Just some little instinctual time release firecracker went off in their little bodies and all as one. They turned and formed a line as long as the California coast and started swimming.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M036
chinese: 他们现在正在游泳，仿佛那是唯一重要的事情。
english: They're swimming right now as if that's the only thing that matters.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M037
chinese: 这是没有思维的单一目标。纯粹的迫切感。
english: It's single mindedness with no mind.  Urgency that's pure urge.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M038
chinese: 他们不知道是什么驱使着他们。他们不给它一个名字，也不问问题。他们只是一起转身，开始游向这个地方的游泳。
english: They don't know what drives them.  They don't give it a name or ask question.  They just turn as one and start the swim that brings them here to this place

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M039
chinese: 我们站在庆祝性和死亡的大规模活动的立场上。
english: where we stand for massive celebration of sex and death.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M040
chinese: 啊，我自己给自己起鸡皮疙瘩了。我所有的头发都竖了起来。
english: Ah, I'm giving myself goose bumps.  All my hairs are popping up.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M041
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well so what do you think?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F021
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses04F_script02_1_M042
chinese: 我说的话。
english: What I said.

name: Ses04F_script02_1_F022
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M000
chinese: 嘿，最近怎么样？
english: Hey, what's up?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F000
chinese: 猜猜今天收到了什么？
english: Guess what came today?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M001
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F001
chinese: 我的录取信。
english: My acceptance letter.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M002
chinese: 出去。
english: Get out.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F002
chinese: 来自美国南加州大学。
english: From U.S.C..

name: Ses04F_impro07_M003
chinese: 你是认真的吗？
english: You serious?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F003
chinese: 是的，我是。
english: Yes, I am.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M004
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，发生了什么事。你进去了。否则你不会这么开心。【笑声】
english: Oh, my god what happened.  You got in. Otherwise you wouldn't be so happy. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_F004
chinese: 嗯，是的，那是大致的想法。【笑声】
english: Well yeah, that's the general idea. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M005
chinese: 太棒了。恭喜。
english: That's awesome.  Congratulations.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F005
chinese: 大而坏的录取包含有所有的信息。我要去美国南加州大学。
english: Big bad acceptance packet with all the information.  I'm going to U.S.C..

name: Ses04F_impro07_M006
chinese: 太棒了。哇。
english: That's amazing.  Wow.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F006
chinese: 我知道。【笑声】
english: I know. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M007
chinese: 你需要去弄一把九毫米手枪，因为南加州大学在南中心地区。
english: You're going to have to get like a nine millimeter because U.S.C.'s like in South Central.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F007
chinese: [笑声] 是的，嗯。不。
english: [LAUGHTER] Yeah, uh. No.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F008
chinese: [笑声] 那里很安全。
english: [LAUGHTER] It's safe around there.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M008
chinese: 不，说真的。不，说真的，你应该做这件事。
english: No, seriously. No, seriously, you should do it.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F009
chinese: 校园很美丽。我非常兴奋。
english: The campus is beautiful. I'm so excited.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M009
chinese: 我知道，但你应该带上类似电击器之类的东西。我的意思是在晚上在校园里走动。
english: I know but you should get like a taser or something.  I mean walking around the campus at night-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F010
chinese: 你想给我买一些辣椒喷雾作为我的离别礼物吗？
english: Do you want to buy me some mace for my, you know, going away present?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M010
chinese: 我会给你买一瓶辣椒喷雾。
english: I'll get you- I'll get you a bottle of mace.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F011
chinese: 我们走吧。完美。
english: There we go.  Perfect.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M011
chinese: 还有一个电击器和一把刀。
english: And a taser and a knife.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F012
chinese: 而且还有一个电击器。太好了。只要确保是一把大刀。
english: And a taser.  Excellent.  Just make sure it's a big knife.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M012
chinese: 而且你将会被充分装载。
english: And you'll be fully loaded.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F013
chinese: 我不想要那些小小的渺小的。
english: I don't want any of those little puny ones.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M013
chinese: 那么，嗯-那么你打算-你打算主修什么？
english: So, um- so what are you going to- what are you going to major in?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F014
chinese: 嗯，我在想也许是水下编织篮子。
english: Well I was thinking maybe underwater basket weaving.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M014
chinese: 水下编织篮子，我的天啊。
english: Underwater basket weaving, my god.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F015
chinese: 美国大学有这个专业吗？
english: U.S.C. has a major in that, right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M015
chinese: 他们有-他们有那个
english: They have- they have that

name: Ses04F_impro07_F016
chinese: 他们有 - 美国南加州大学拥有一切，因为它是最好的学校。
english: They have - U.S.C. has everything because U.S.C. is the best school ever.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M016
chinese: 他们把那个作为专业吗？
english: they have that as a major?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M017
chinese: 那太荒谬了。我不相信那个。
english: That's ridiculous.  I don't believe that.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F017
chinese: 好的。嗯，我在撒谎，但是-
english: Okay.  Well I'm lying but-

name: Ses04F_impro07_M018
chinese: 真的，你的专业是什么？
english: Seriously, what's your major?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F018
chinese: 嗯，我还没有决定。我想试试一些东西。
english: Well, I haven't decided yet.  I want to try some things out.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M019
chinese: 所以你还没有决定？
english: So you're undecided?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F019
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M020
chinese: 嘿，那很酷。
english: Hey, that's cool.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F020
chinese: 我知道，因为这样我可以做任何我想做的事情，对吧。我可以尝试这个类，然后尝试那个类，然后选择我最喜欢的。
english: I know 'cause then I can do whatever I want, right.  I can try classes in this and then try classes in that and then pick whatever I like best.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M021
chinese: 不，不。这完全没问题。我的意思是，就像我一个朋友，他一直在犹豫，就像他过去的十一年一样。
english: No, no.  It's totally cool.  I mean, like, this friend of mine he was- he's been undecided now for, like, the past like eleven years of his life.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F021
chinese: 好的。嗯，我不会永远犹豫不决的。【笑声】
english: okay.  Well I'm not going to be undecided forever. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M022
chinese: 嗯，嗯，好吧-
english: Uh, well-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F022
chinese: 而且它离得很近，所以你可以随时来看我。
english: And it's so close so you can come visit me all the time.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M023
chinese: 你-你-你会找到的。
english: You- you- you'll find.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M024
chinese: 是的，我知道。没错。是的，是的。因为我住在洛杉矶。
english: Yeah, I know.  That's right. Yeah, yeah. Because I live in LA.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F023
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M025
chinese: 我喜欢住在洛杉矶。
english: and I like living in LA.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F024
chinese: 所以这个安排非常完美。因为我担心如果我没有被U.S.C录取，那么我就必须去一个很远的地方，然后-
english: So this works out perfectly.  Because I was worried if I didn't get in to U.S.C., then I would have to go somewhere far away and then-

name: Ses04F_impro07_M026
chinese: 你得去别的地方，你知道的，我们会分开，那会很糟糕。
english: You'd have to, like go somewhere else, and, you know, we would be apart, and that would suck.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F025
chinese: 我会想念你。
english: I would miss you.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F026
chinese: 是的。但现在我们不必这样做。
english: Yeah. But now we don't have to.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M027
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F027
chinese: 一切都完美地解决了。
english: Everything worked out perfectly.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M028
chinese: 太棒了。
english: That's awesome.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F028
chinese: 我知道。我们应该举办一个派对。
english: I know.  We should have a party.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M029
chinese: 我们应该举办一个派对。
english: We should have a party.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F029
chinese: 我被接受进入了南加州大学的派对。
english: An I got accepted to U.S.C. party.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M030
chinese: 你被接受了-什么？参加美国南加州大学的派对？
english: You got accepted-what?  to a U.S.C. party?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F030
chinese: 不，我被美国南加州大学录取了。【笑声】
english: No.  An I got accepted to U.S.C. party. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M031
chinese: 哦，没错。好的，我明白了。对，对，对。
english: Oh, that's right. Okay, I see. Right, right, right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M032
chinese: 一个庆祝你被接受的派对。
english: A party celebrating your acceptance.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F031
chinese: 没错。现在你和我在一起。
english: Right.  Now you're with me.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M033
chinese: 那很酷。
english: That's cool.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F032
chinese: 这就是为什么我被接受的原因。
english: That is why I got accepted.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M034
chinese: 嗯，你能在同一个城市里待下去真的很酷。那么，嗯
english: Well, that's really cool that you're going to be staying in the same city and everything. so umm

name: Ses04F_impro07_F033
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M035
chinese: 我不知道你是怎么样的，就像我不知道一样。你是不是有空或者什么的？
english: I don't know are you, like, I don't know.  Are you, like, available or anything?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F034
chinese: [笑声] 你是在约我吗？
english: [LAUGHTER] Are you asking me on a date?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M036
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是我不知道。就像你知道的，我在高中时对你有点喜欢，就像
english: Well I mean I don't know.  It's like you know I kind of had a crush on you throughout high school and, like

name: Ses04F_impro07_M037
chinese: 我不知道，我只是觉得，你知道的，也许我们可以，你知道的，我不知道。就像是，你知道的，无论如何先试试水。我不明白问题在哪里。
english: I don't know I just thought that, you know, maybe we could, you know, I don't know.  It's like, you know, just test the waters anyway.  I don't see what the problem is.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F035
chinese: 你有什么想法？
english: What- what did you have in mind?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M038
chinese: 电影-电影，我们会去看电影和吃晚餐-和
english: Movies- movie, we'll go to a movie and a dinner and- and

name: Ses04F_impro07_M039
chinese: 实际上，你知道的，有这个-有这个非常酷的餐厅，嗯，我不知道你是否-它叫红龙虾。它就在附近。
english: actually, you know, there's this- there's this really cool restaurant, um, I don't know if you-  it's Red Lobster.  It's like down on

name: Ses04F_impro07_F036
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M040
chinese: 佛蒙特州。
english: Vermont.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F037
chinese: 你刚刚没有约我去红龙虾餐厅。
english: You just did not ask me on a date to Red Lobster.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M041
chinese: 等一下，你之前去过那里吗？
english: Wait, you've been there before?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F038
chinese: 有时候我听说过它。
english: On occasion I've heard of it.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M042
chinese: 哦，那么你知道它很棒。
english: Oh, so well then you know that it's awesome.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F039
chinese: 是的。完全正确。
english: Yeah.  Totally.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M043
chinese: 好的，所以我们会去那里，然后-然后我们会买一些冰淇淋，也许我们会去打迷你高尔夫球。
english: Right, so we'll go there and then- and then we'll get some ice cream and maybe we'll go putt-putt golfing.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F040
chinese: 我完全喜欢冰淇淋。
english: I am totally down with the ice cream.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M044
chinese: 好的。迷你高尔夫？
english: Okay.  Putt-putt golfing?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F041
chinese: 嗯，我们可以解决那部分。
english: Eh, we can work that part out.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M045
chinese: 是的，你想去。不，你想去。你想去。
english: Yeah, you want to go.  No, you want to go. You want to go.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F042
chinese: 好的。
english: Alright.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M046
chinese: 我可以从你的眼神中看出来。你想去。
english: I can see it in your eyes.  You want to go.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F043
chinese: 我觉得那实际上会很有趣。
english: I think that'd be really fun actually.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M047
chinese: 是的。所以我们会这样做，然后-然后-然后明天我们会有你的。
english: Yeah.  So we'll do that and then- and then- and then tomorrow we'll have your

name: Ses04F_impro07_F044
chinese: 派对。
english: party.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M048
chinese: 你好，我被录取进了南加州大学的研究生派对。是的。
english: your I got into U.S.C. graduate party. Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F045
chinese: 看看这个。多么美好的一天。我被大学录取了，还被人约出去了。
english: Well look at that.  What a great day.  I got into college and I got asked out on a date.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M049
chinese: 好的。好的，我们很开心。
english: Good. Alright we're so happy.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F046
chinese: 太棒了，为我加油。
english: Yay for me.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M050
chinese: 没错。嗯，所以U.S.C.是一所非常好的学校。
english: That's right.  Um, so U.S.C. is a really nice school.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F047
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M051
chinese: 你打算贷款还是-
english: Are you going to take out loans or-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F048
chinese: 好吧，那不是一个快乐的部分。我们不想谈论那个。
english: Okay well that's not a happy part.  We don't want to talk about that.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M052
chinese: 嗯，嘿，没关系，好的，天啊。
english: Well hey, it's okay, fine, gees.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F049
chinese: 嗯，不是这样的。我的意思是我有一些奖学金和一些财政援助之类的，但是我还得，你知道的，找一份工作。
english: Well no.  I mean I have some scholarships and some financial aid and stuff but I'll have to, you know, I'll get a job

name: Ses04F_impro07_F050
chinese: 当我在学校的时候，这将是好的。
english: while I'm in school.  It'll be good.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M053
chinese: 甜蜜的。
english: Sweet.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F051
chinese: 是的。会有好结果的。也许我可以在红龙虾餐厅工作。
english: Yeah.  It will work out.  Maybe I could work at Red Lobster.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M054
chinese: 好的，它不远。
english: Well, it's not far.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F052
chinese: 我知道。就在街对面。
english: I know.  Right down the street.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M055
chinese: 没错。有很多喜欢的地方，到处都有很多甜甜圈店。
english: That's right.  There's lots of like, there's lots of doughnut shops, like, everywhere.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F053
chinese: 没错，总是有这个选择。甜甜圈的事情。
english: Right, there's always that option. The doughnut thing.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M056
chinese: 我的意思是洛杉矶到处都有很多甜甜圈店。
english: I mean There's pretty much doughnut shops everywhere in LA.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F054
chinese: 正确
english: Right

name: Ses04F_impro07_M057
chinese: 但是，嗯-
english: But, um-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F055
chinese: 而且，像大多数地方一样。
english: and like most places really.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M058
chinese: 我是说，就像，我不知道。我只是说如果你需要赚点额外的钱。你可以，你知道的。
english: I mean, like, I don't know.  I'm just saying if you need to make some extra cash.  You can, you know

name: Ses04F_impro07_F056
chinese: 在一个甜甜圈店工作。
english: Work at a doughnut shop.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M059
chinese: 或者图书馆。
english: Or library.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F057
chinese: 也许在校园里，我听说他们在校园里有工作。
english: Maybe on campus, I hear they have jobs on campus.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M060
chinese: 我刚刚说了图书馆。
english: I just said the library

name: Ses04F_impro07_M061
chinese: 或者，嗯，校园巡航者。你可以开车载人。
english: or, um, campus cruiser.  You can drive people around.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F058
chinese: 很好。开车载醉酒的人，因为你知道这就是校园巡航车的全部。
english: Excellent.  Drive drunk people around because you know that's all campus cruisers for.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M062
chinese: 你可以选择参加学生会选举。
english: Right or you can run for student counsel.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F059
chinese: 好的。不，那很傻。
english: Okay.  No, that's dorky.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M063
chinese: 傻气的？
english: Dorky?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F060
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M064
chinese: 重要的。
english: It's important.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F061
chinese: 学生会？
english: Student counsel?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M065
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F062
chinese: 不，这很傻。
english: No, it's dorky.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M066
chinese: 好的。这很傻。
english: Fine.  It's dorky.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F063
chinese: 社交生活。你好。
english: Social life.  Hello.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M067
chinese: 但是那会适合你，因为你是个呆子。
english: But that'll fit you  because you're a dork.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F064
chinese: [笑声]。
english: [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses04F_impro07_M068
chinese: [笑声]。
english: [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses04F_impro07_M069
chinese: [笑声]。
english: [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses04F_impro07_F065
chinese: [笑声]。
english: [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses04F_impro07_M070
chinese: 我是个笨蛋。
english: I dork.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F066
chinese: 不，但我在考虑可能会去试镜参加一部戏剧或者其他什么的。我不太想加入女生联谊会。我对那种氛围不太感兴趣。
english: No.  But I'm thinking I might, you know, like audition for a play or something.  I don't really want to do the sorority thing.  I'm not really feeling that vibe with the

name: Ses04F_impro07_M071
chinese: 是的，你不想参加女生联谊会，因为你很可能会被利用和虐待。
english: Yeah, you don't want to do the sorority thing because you'll probably get used and abused by

name: Ses04F_impro07_F067
chinese: 傻气的山谷女孩们和
english: ditsy valley girls and

name: Ses04F_impro07_F068
chinese: 很多钱和
english: lots of money and

name: Ses04F_impro07_M072
chinese: 很多喝醉的大学兄弟们
english: lots of drunk frat boys

name: Ses04F_impro07_F069
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M073
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M074
chinese: 但是，嘿。他们有-他们有-他们有免费的，嗯
english: But, hey. They have- they have- they have free, uh

name: Ses04F_impro07_F070
chinese: 你听说过希腊系统吗？
english: What have you heard about the Greek system?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M075
chinese: 免费自助餐和免费活动。
english: free buffets and free events.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F071
chinese: 免费什么都没有。因为无论如何你都必须付很多钱。
english: Free nothing. 'Cause you have to pay tons of money anyway.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M076
chinese: 我的意思是它并不是真正免费的，因为你需要付费，但是是的。
english: I mean it's not really free because you have to pay for it, but yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M077
chinese: 你觉得你第一年会住在校园里还是校外？
english: Well do you think you're going to live on campus or off campus your first year?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F072
chinese: 我想我会在第一年住在校园里，因为这样你可以认识更多的人，对吗？
english: I think I'll live on campus the first year cause you  meet more people that way, right?

name: Ses04F_impro07_M078
chinese: 哦，是吗？在宿舍里？
english: Oh, yeah? In a dorm?

name: Ses04F_impro07_F073
chinese: 嗯，是的。我的意思是那是你认识人的地方，对吧。每个人都住在宿舍，对吧。
english: Well, yeah.  I mean that's where you meet people, right.  Everybody lives in the dorms, right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M079
chinese: 我不想打破你的幻想，但你要通过变得酷来结识人。
english: I hate to break this to you but you meet people by being cool, so-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F074
chinese: 哦，对不起，我的错。在我去之前，我得报名参加你的暑期课程。你可以教我如何在上大学之前变得酷。
english: Oh, oh, I'm sorry, my bad.  I'll have to, like, sign up for summer lessons from you before I go.  You can teach me how to be cool before I go to college.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M080
chinese: 不，不，不。你说得对。我的意思是，你知道，宿舍绝对是认识人的好方式。我知道我住在校外的公寓里。
english: No, no, no.  You're right though.  I mean, you know, dorms are definitely the way to meet people.  I know that I was in an apartment off campus

name: Ses04F_impro07_M081
chinese: 而且我的意思是，你知道的，我认识我的室友们，但是并没有真正的社区感。
english: and I mean, you know, I knew my roommates and stuff but I there wasn't really that sense of community-

name: Ses04F_impro07_F075
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M082
chinese: 那发生了，你知道的，那件事正在进行中。
english: that happened, you know, that was going on.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F076
chinese: 所以基本上你的意思是我是对的。
english: So basically what you're saying is that I was right

name: Ses04F_impro07_M083
chinese: 我只是开玩笑而已。天哪。你不必对每件事都那么认真。
english: I was just joking.  Gosh.  You don't have to take everything so- so seriously.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F077
chinese: 我-我是对的，对吗。
english: I'm- I'm right, right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M084
chinese: 是的，你是对的。
english: Yes, you're right.

name: Ses04F_impro07_F078
chinese: 这就是你说的。我是对的。【笑声】
english: That's what you're saying. I'm right. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro07_M085
chinese: 万岁
english: All hail to the

name: Ses04F_impro07_F079
chinese: 我。
english: me.

name: Ses04F_impro07_M086
chinese: 给你，是的。
english: to you, yes.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M000
chinese: 所以你明天要离开。
english: So you're leaving tomorrow.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F000
chinese: 是的。他们刚刚打电话来。
english: Yeah.  They just called.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M001
chinese: 这真的-这是不公平的。
english: This is really-this is unfair.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F001
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M002
chinese: 我看不到[呼吸]。
english: I don't see [BREATHING]

name: Ses04F_impro02_F002
chinese: 我不知道该说什么。我不想去，但是我没有太多的选择。
english: I don't know what to say.  I don't want to go but I don't have a lot of choice.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M003
chinese: 我是说我们俩都知道这事会发生。只是我觉得，你知道的，我不想让苏西没有母亲长大。
english: I mean we both knew that this was going to happen.  It's just that I feel that, you know, I don't want Susie growing up without a mother.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M004
chinese: 而且，嗯，我担心如果你知道的话，当你离开时，你就不会回来了。
english: And, uh, I'm afraid that if you, you know, when you leave, you won't come back.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F003
chinese: 我要回来。我需要你相信。
english: I'm going to come back.  I need you to believe that.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M005
chinese: 你不知道那个。
english: You don't know that.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F004
chinese: 我需要你也相信。如果你不相信，我怎么能相信一切都会好起来呢？
english: I need you to believe that too.  How am I supposed to believe everything's going to be okay if you don't?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M006
chinese: 我会相信，但是- 我会相信，但是- 我不知道那会发生。
english: I'll believe it, but- I'll believe it but it- I don't know that that's going to happen.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F005
chinese: 好吧，你必须要有信心，因为我没有选择，我必须走。
english: Well you have to have faith because I don't have a choice and I have to go.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M007
chinese: 你确实有选择的权利。你不必去。
english: You do have a choice.  You don't have to go.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F006
chinese: 你认为我想离开你吗？
english: Do you think I want to leave you?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M008
chinese: 你有选择的权利。
english: You have a choice.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F007
chinese: 我必须这样做。我不想离开。你认为我想错过看她长大吗？
english: I have to do this.  I don't want to leave.  Do you think I want to miss seeing her grow up?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M009
chinese: 我知道。只是你不必靠这个谋生，你知道吗？
english: I know.  It's just you don't have to do this for a living you know.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M010
chinese: 你是一个聪明的人。你还可以做其他的事情。
english: You're a smart person.  There are other things you can do.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F008
chinese: 看，当我签约时，我们俩都知道这意味着什么。
english: Look we both knew what this meant when I signed on

name: Ses04F_impro02_F009
chinese: 现在-现在真的是非常糟糕的时机，但是现在我必须走了。
english: And now- and now it's really shitty timing but now I have to go.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F010
chinese: 我是那个必须离开这里的人。我是那个必须离开你们两个的人。至少你们可以在一起。
english: I mean I'm the one who has to leave here.  I'm the one who has to leave the two of you.  At least you get to be together.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M011
chinese: 没有你在这里，这件事就不会成功。
english: It's just not going to work out without you here.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F011
chinese: 这是什么意思？
english: What's that supposed to mean?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M012
chinese: 我是说，如果没有你在这里，我们就不是一个完整的家庭。
english: I mean we can't-we're not a complete family without you here.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F012
chinese: 好吧，我会回来的。那是什么意思？你不愿意等我回来吗？
english: Well I'll come back.  What is that supposed to mean?  You're not willing to wait for me to come back?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M013
chinese: 当然我会等待。我只是-我只是不喜欢这件事发生，因为这不是最后一次发生。你还会去更多的旅行和其他活动。我只是-我不能-
english: Of course I'm going to wait.  I just- I just don't like the idea of this happening because this isn't the last time this is going to happen. You're going to go on more tours and stuff.  I just- I can't-

name: Ses04F_impro02_M014
chinese: 我情绪上无法处理这个。
english: I can't deal with this emotionally.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F013
chinese: 你想让我做什么？
english: What do you want me to do?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M015
chinese: 我希望你离开。我希望你离开这项服务。
english: I want you to leave.  I want you to leave the service.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F014
chinese: 嗯，我今天无法做这件事。我还得明天离开。
english: Well I can't very well do it today.  I still have to leave tomorrow.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M016
chinese: 你可以今天做这件事。你不必做任何事情。你不必做任何你不想做的事情。
english: You can do it today.  You don't have to do anything.  You don't have to do anything you don't want to do.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F015
chinese: 你知道吗，你并没有让这件事对我变得更容易。我是那个必须离开的人，而你真的没有帮助到我。
english: You're not making this any easier for me, you know.  I'm the one who has to go and you're really not helping.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M017
chinese: 看，我只是告诉你，你不必去。
english: Look I'm just telling you that you don't have to go.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F016
chinese: 我确实必须走了。而且我需要知道你在这里等我，并且相信我会回来。
english: I do have to go. And I need to know that you're here waiting for me and that you believe that I'm coming back.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M018
chinese: 这就是我说的全部...不，你不明白。
english: That's all I'm saying... No you don't.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F017
chinese: 谢谢，那很有帮助。
english: Thanks that helps.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M019
chinese: 这真的太不公平了。这-这太荒谬了。
english: It's just really unfair.  This is- this is bullshit.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F018
chinese: 我现在感觉好多了。
english: I feel much better now.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M020
chinese: 你的行为就像是，你知道的，你是那个经历了所有这些糟糕事情的人，但实际上并不是这样。
english: You're acting like, you know, you're the one who's going all through, you know, all this shit and it's really- it's really not.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F019
chinese: 我知道我要把所有责任留给你，但至少你可以和她在一起。
english: I know I'm leaving you here with all the responsibility but at least you get to be with her.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M021
chinese: 是的。当然我会，因为我没有参军加入这个愚蠢的事情。你为什么不现在就离开然后-
english: Yeah.  Of course I do because I didn't enlist in this stupid thing.  Why don't you just get out now and then-

name: Ses04F_impro02_F020
chinese: 我会的，但我现在不能。
english: I will but I can't right now.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M022
chinese: 是的-你不必去。他们打算做什么？嗯？他们会拿枪指着你的头吗？
english: Yes- You don't have to go.  What are they going to do?  Huh?  Put a gun to your head?

name: Ses04F_impro02_F021
chinese: 你知道-你知道这是怎么回事。我必须走了。
english: You know- you know how this works.  I have to go.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M023
chinese: 然后走吧。当你回来时，我们会在这里。
english: Then go.  We'll be here when you get back.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F022
chinese: 你就这样想要离开吗？
english: That's how you want to leave it?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M024
chinese: 我不知道还有什么其他办法离开它。你想要我对你撒谎吗？
english: I don't know how else to leave it.  What, do you want me to lie to you?

name: Ses04F_impro02_M025
chinese: 你想让我告诉你我对此感到满意吗？
english: You want me tell you that I'm okay with it?

name: Ses04F_impro02_F023
chinese: 我希望你能尽可能地接受它。我的意思是，这并不是一个很好的情况，但我们在这里没有选择。
english: I want you to be okay with it as much as you can be.  I mean it's not a great situation but we don't have an option here.

name: Ses04F_impro02_M026
chinese: 嗯，我不能像你一样不去那样对此感到满意。这样行不通。
english: Well I can't be okay with it the same way you can't not go.  It just doesn't work that way.

name: Ses04F_impro02_F024
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F000
chinese: 我有件事要告诉你。
english: I have something to tell you.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M000
chinese: 什么？你看起来很兴奋。
english: What?  You seem so excited.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F001
chinese: 真的很令人兴奋。你不想猜猜吗？
english: It's really exciting.  Don't you want to guess?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M001
chinese: 嗯，你有了一辆新车，一座新房子。嗯，还有一只狗。
english: Uh, you got a new car, a new house. Uh, a dog.
