name: Ses04F_impro03_F002
chinese: 看。
english: Look.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M002
chinese: 你是认真的吗？你要结婚了。
english: Are you serious?  You're getting married.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F003
chinese: 是的。他终于求婚了。我要结婚了。
english: Yes.  He finally proposed.  I'm getting married.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M003
chinese: 天啊，太神奇了。
english: Holy shit that's amazing.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F004
chinese: 我知道。我很-
english: I know. I'm so-

name: Ses04F_impro03_M004
chinese: 恭喜。
english: Congratulations.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F005
chinese: 谢谢你。【笑声】
english: Thank you. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro03_M005
chinese: 我被邀请了，对吗。
english: I'm invited, right.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F006
chinese: 你认为。【笑声】
english: You think. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro03_M006
chinese: 我得，嗯，我得给自己买一套新的礼服。我的，嗯，旧的有点破旧和脏了。太棒了。你们打算在哪里举行呢？
english: I'll have to, uh, I'll have to get myself a new tux.  My, uh, the old one is a little worn and dirty.  That's awesome.  Where are you guys going to have it?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F007
chinese: 嗯，实际上我们刚刚在谈论今天，我不太想做传统的教堂婚礼，你知道的。所以我们打算在草地上结婚。
english: Well actually we were just talking about today and I don't really want to do like the traditional church thing, you know.  So we are going to get married in the meadow.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F008
chinese: 你还记得优胜美地上方吗？是的。
english: Do you remember up by Yosemite? Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M007
chinese: 嗯，那是-那是-那是美丽的。那是一个美丽的地方去做这件事。
english: Well, that's- that's- that's beautiful. That's a beautiful place to do it.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F009
chinese: 我们打算在一片草地中间结婚。【笑声】
english: We're going to get married in the middle of a meadow. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro03_F010
chinese: 每个人都要过来。我们要住在那里所有漂亮的小木屋里，而且，大家都会有一些花花绿绿的自然东西。
english: Everybody's going to come up. We're going to stay in all the pretty cabins up there and, um, everybody's going to have, you know, really flowery sort of naturey stuff.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F011
chinese: 太漂亮了。
english: So pretty.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M008
chinese: 太棒了
english: That's great

name: Ses04F_impro03_M009
chinese: 我希望他们不是这样的。
english: I hope- they're not like

name: Ses04F_impro03_F012
chinese: 非常仲夏之夜的婚礼。
english: Very Midsummer Night's wedding.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M010
chinese: 好的。很好。太棒了。我希望当我们在那里的时候，没有人会被任何像熊或狼之类的动物攻击。
english: Right.  Nice.  That's great.  I hope while we're up there nobody gets attacked by any, like, bears or wolves or anything.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F013
chinese: 谢谢。非常感谢。你真的在这里帮了很大的忙。我希望没有人会死。
english: Thanks. Thanks a lot.  You're really helping the Excitement here. I hope no one dies.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M011
chinese: 好吧，不，我正在努力保持积极。
english: Well no, I am- I'm trying to be positive

name: Ses04F_impro03_M012
chinese: 我正在努力保持积极。我希望那不会发生。
english: I'm trying to be positive.  I'm trying to say I hope that doesn't happen.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F014
chinese: 好的，嗯，你知道吗？我希望你能帮忙。
english: Okey Well- well-, you know what?  I was hoping that you would help

name: Ses04F_impro03_M013
chinese: 我们将会在荒野中间。这种事情经常发生。
english: We're going to be in the middle of the wilderness. These kind of things happen

name: Ses04F_impro03_F015
chinese: 计划一切。这样你就可以确保没有人被熊攻击。
english: plan everything.  So then you can make sure that no one gets attacked by bears.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M014
chinese: 是的。我会帮忙计划。
english: Yeah.  I'll help plan.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F016
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M015
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F017
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M016
chinese: 当然。
english: Sure.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F018
chinese: 好的。大概会在六个月内。所以我们没有太长的时间。
english: Okay.  It's going to be in, like, six months.  So we don't have a really long time.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M017
chinese: 我在考虑绿色，很多绿色。绿色和棕色。我们是大自然。
english: I'm thinking greens, lots of greens. Greens and browns.  We're nature.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F019
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F020
chinese: 不。没有褐色的。
english: No.  No browns.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M018
chinese: 为什么不是棕色的？
english: Why not browns?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F021
chinese: 这是一场婚礼。
english: It's a wedding.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M019
chinese: 这是一种浅棕色，带有一点黄褐色。
english: It's a light brown, tanish.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F022
chinese: 蓝色是为了天空。
english: Blue for the sky.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F023
chinese: 来吧。
english: Come on.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M020
chinese: 我只是觉得棕色是你想要选择的颜色。我的意思是，我认为棕色和绿色之间的对比更大。
english: I just think browns are really what you want to go with.  I mean I think there's more contrast between brown and green than there is-

name: Ses04F_impro03_F024
chinese: 谁- 虽然谁要结婚？
english: who- Who's getting married though?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M021
chinese: 我知道，但你刚刚要求我-
english: I know but you just asked me to-

name: Ses04F_impro03_F025
chinese: 为了帮助策划，因为我要结婚。【笑声】
english: to help plan because I'm getting married. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro03_M022
chinese: 所以我们要选择绿色和棕色。
english: So we're going to go greens and browns.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M023
chinese: 来吧。请你帮我做一下绿色和棕色的，只做棕色的可以吗？
english: Come on.  Please will you do the greens and browns, just the browns for me?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M024
chinese: 只是为了我。来吧。我是你最好的朋友。
english: Just for me.  Come on.  I'm your best friend.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F027
chinese: 这不是你的婚礼。你可以-
english: It's not your wedding. You can-

name: Ses04F_impro03_M025
chinese: 我是你最好的朋友
english: I'm your best friend

name: Ses04F_impro03_F028
chinese: 你知道吗？你知道吗？
english: You know what? You know what?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M026
chinese: 给我那些棕色的东西。
english: Give me the browns.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F029
chinese: 你今天不能破坏我的心情。如果你想穿一件棕色的礼服，你就去穿一件棕色的礼服。
english: You can't ruin my mood today.  If you want to wear a brown tux, you go ahead and wear a brown tux

name: Ses04F_impro03_M027
chinese: 好的。好吧。那么绿色和什么？
english: Okay.  Fine.  So green and what?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F030
chinese: 但伴娘们不穿棕色，而我也不穿棕色。
english: but bridesmaids aren't wearing brown and I'm not wearing brown.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M028
chinese: 蓝色？
english: Blue?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F031
chinese: 也许
english: Maybe

name: Ses04F_impro03_M029
chinese: 好的，没问题。绿色和蓝色。
english: Okay, fine. Greens and blues.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F032
chinese: 我喜欢蓝色。
english: I like blue.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M030
chinese: 绿色和蓝色，也许还有一点浅黄色？
english: Greens and blues and maybe a little light yellow?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F033
chinese: 那样做可以。
english: That would work.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M031
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F034
chinese: 加一点-一点，嗯，黄色的修剪。也许一些黄色的花。
english: Throw in a little- little, uh, trim in yellow.  Maybe some yellow flowers.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M032
chinese: 好的。听起来不错。嗯，我们要买一个五层的蛋糕，对吗？
english: Okay.  That sounds good. Um, and, uh, we're going to get like a five, uh, story cake, right?

name: Ses04F_impro03_F035
chinese: 是的。我实际上还没有考虑过蛋糕，但是
english: Yeah.  I hadn't actually thought about the cake yet, but

name: Ses04F_impro03_M033
chinese: 我是说，你知道的，至少会有两百五十个人来。所以我们需要，你知道的，一个巨大的自助餐。
english: I mean, you know, you're going to have at least, like, two hundred and fifty people come.  So we're going to need, you know, just a huge buffet.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F036
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M034
chinese: 炸鸡，土豆泥。
english: Fried chicken, mashed potatoes.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F037
chinese: 看，这就是为什么你必须帮助的原因。
english: See this is why you have to help.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F038
chinese: 因为你会照顾一切。你会考虑到我忘记的所有细节。
english: because you're going to take care of everything.  You're going to think of all the details that I forget.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M035
chinese: 嗯，我不能负责这个。我的意思是我有事情要做。
english: Well I can't be in charge of this.  I mean I got things I got to do.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F039
chinese: 好的，没错，但是你可以帮忙。
english: Well right but you can help.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M036
chinese: 嗯，这真的很令人兴奋。我的意思是-我只是-我现在无比幸福。
english: Well this is really exciting.  I mean- I just- I couldn't be happier right now.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M037
chinese: 我很激动。天啊。
english: I'm thrilled.  God.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F040
chinese: 哈哈哈。
english: Ha ha ha.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F041
chinese: 哈哈。
english: Ha ha.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M038
chinese: 刚刚太兴奋了。我简直不敢相信你是我的最好朋友。
english: Just ecstatic.  I can't believe you're my best friend

name: Ses04F_impro03_F042
chinese: 只是无法再酷炫一点了。
english: Just couldn't be any cooler.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M039
chinese: 你是我最好的朋友，我们正在成长，现在你要结婚了。那太棒了。
english: You're my best friend, we're growing up and now you're getting married. that's amazing

name: Ses04F_impro03_F043
chinese: 我知道。我已经等了很久了。我简直不敢相信它终于发生了。
english: I know.  I've been waiting forever.  I can't believe it's finally happening.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M040
chinese: 哇。我只是-我-我-我感觉自己要晕倒了。
english: Wow.  I just- I- I- I feel like I'm going to faint.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M041
chinese: 我很-所有的血
english: I'm so- all the blood

name: Ses04F_impro03_F044
chinese: 你看起来不像要晕倒的样子。
english: You don't look like you're going to faint.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M042
chinese: 刚刚冲上脑袋的是，我，我是真心的。
english: has just rushed to my head, and I, and I mean honestly.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M043
chinese: 我开始有点膝盖发软了。
english: I'm getting a little weak in the knees.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F045
chinese: 那么，兴奋先生，你什么时候结婚？
english: So- So when are you getting married Mr. Excited?

name: Ses04F_impro03_M044
chinese: 你知道我从来没有-我-我有一连串不好的恋爱关系，但是，你知道，我是说，你得去克服它。没关系。
english: You know that I've never-I- I have a long run of bad relationships but, you know, I mean, you got to work through it.  It's fine.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F046
chinese: 关于凯西呢？我是说你们已经约会了一段时间了。
english: What about Kathy?  I mean you guys have been dating for a while.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M045
chinese: 是的，但是
english: Yeah, but

name: Ses04F_impro03_F047
chinese: 你还没有毁掉它。
english: You haven't ruined it yet.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M046
chinese: 是的。我知道，但是你知道的，也许我们会结婚。我不知道。应该会很美好。
english: Yeah.  I know but it's, you know, maybe we'll get married.  I don't know.  Should be pretty-

name: Ses04F_impro03_F048
chinese: 你真的喜欢
english: You really like

name: Ses04F_impro03_M047
chinese: 我不知道。好吧。我的意思是天哪。结婚有很大的压力，知道吗。
english: I don't know.  Okay.  I mean gosh.  There's just- look there's a lot of pressure in getting married, okay.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F049
chinese: 什么？她可能和我一样兴奋。
english: What?  She could be just as excited as I am right now.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F050
chinese: 你能让她那么兴奋。你真的喜欢她。你们已经在一起很长时间了。
english: You could make her that excited.  You really like her.  You guys have been together for a really long time now.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M048
chinese: 哦，我让她那么兴奋。
english: Oh, I've made her that excited.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F051
chinese: [笑声] 这比我需要知道的还要多。
english: [LAUGHTER] That's more than I needed to know.

name: Ses04F_impro03_M049
chinese: 什么？你之前听过我谈论过它。
english: What?  You've heard me talk about it before.

name: Ses04F_impro03_F052
chinese: 笑声
english: [laughter]

name: Ses04F_impro03_M050
chinese: 我在床上是个怪物。
english: I'm a monster in bed.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M000
chinese: 只会持续一年。
english: It's only going to be a year.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F000
chinese: 这是你孩子一生中的第一年。
english: It's the first year of your child's life.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M001
chinese: 真的，我真的无能为力。
english: There's really -- there's nothing I can do.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F001
chinese: 你对这个没问题吗？
english: You're just fine with this?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M002
chinese: 没有什么我--
english: There's nothing I --

name: Ses04M_impro02_F002
chinese: 你就这样要离开我和我们的孩子，错过我们一年的生活吗？
english: You're just going to pick up and leave me and our baby and miss a year of our lives?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M003
chinese: 看，只是一年而已。它会很快过去的。好的。
english: It's -- look, it's only a year.  It'll go by quickly.  Okay.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F003
chinese: 当你回来时，想想你将会错过的所有事情。
english: When you get back, think of all of the things that you're going to have missed.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M004
chinese: 我知道，但我会回来的。而且 - 而且 - 而且我们会有 - 我们有我们余下的生命。
english: I know, but I'll be back then.  And - and- and we'll have -- we have the rest of our lives.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F004
chinese: 不要走。
english: Don't go.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M005
chinese: 我不能做那个。我必须走了。
english: I can't do that.  I have to go.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F005
chinese: 你想要吗 - 你想要把我们抛下吗？我的意思是，我不明白为什么你要这样做。
english: Do you want to -- do you want to leave us behind?  I mean, I don't understand why you have to do this.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M006
chinese: 我已经做出了承诺。在这一点上，我不能不这样做。
english: I've made a pledge.  I can't not do this at this point.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F006
chinese: 你也对我们做出了承诺。记得那一天，我们站在彼此面前说着“直到死亡将我们分开”。戴上一些戒指，它们应该有着特殊的意义。
english: You've made a pledge to us, too.  Remember that day, we stood in front of each other and said 'til death do us part.  Put on some rings and it's supposed to mean something.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M007
chinese: 我知道。我知道。我知道。
english: I know that. I know that. I know that.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M008
chinese: 我无能为力。我的意思是，我必须走了。
english: There's nothing I can do.  I mean, I have to go.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M009
chinese: 这就是我所做的。这就是——我的意思是，这就是我的生活。我知道你也是我生活的一部分，而且我是说，只是一年而已。我会回来的。
english: And this is what I do.  This is -- I mean, this is my life.  And I know that you're part of my life, too, and I mean, it's only -- it's just going to be a year.  I'll be back.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F007
chinese: 你不能问他们吗？你不能回去问他们，看看你能否改变任务或其他什么，然后你可以留在这里吗？
english: Can't you ask them?  Can't you go back and ask them if you could -- I don't know if you could change  assignments or something and you could stay here?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M010
chinese: 这不是-这不是-不是那样的。不是那样的。我不能做那个。
english: It's not- it's not- It's not like that.  It's not like that.  I can't do that.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F008
chinese: 为什么不呢？你至少可以试一试。他们必须理解。
english: Why not?  You could, at least, try.  They have to understand

name: Ses04M_impro02_M011
chinese: 因为这是不可能的。我只是不能。我不能。
english: Because it's impossible.  There's -- I just can't.  I can't.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F009
chinese: 当你回来时，你甚至都不会认识你的孩子。这个——难道没有人可以和你谈谈吗？
english: You won't even know your child when you come back.  This -- isn't there someone you could talk to?

name: Ses04M_impro02_F010
chinese: 向他们解释情况，然后你可以留在这里。
english: Explain the situation to them and then you can stay here.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M012
chinese: 看，亲爱的，只有一年。
english: Look, honey, it's- it's- it's only going to be a year.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M013
chinese: 只是一年而已。我不会错过我儿子的整个生活。
english: It's only going to be a year. I'm not going to miss my son's entire life.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F011
chinese: 如果在那一年结束时，他们要求你继续留下来，那么会发生什么？你只是会同意吗？你只是会毫无思考地被洗脑地做他们告诉你要做的事吗？
english: And what happens if, at the end of that year, they ask you to stay longer?  Are you just going to agree?  Are you just going to absentmindedly brainwashedly do whatever it is they tell you to do?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M014
chinese: 我不打算再呆超过一年。我已经同意了一年。
english: I'm not going to stay more than a year.  I've  agreed to a year

name: Ses04M_impro02_F012
chinese: 那么为什么你要一整年都离开呢？
english: Then why do you have to go a year at all?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M015
chinese: 因为我已经同意了那个。
english: Because I've already agreed to that.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F013
chinese: 好的，不同意。告诉他们你现在不能离开。我一个人做不了这个。没有你我做不了这个。
english: Well unagree.  Tell them that you can't leave right now.  I can't do this by myself.  I can't do this without you.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M016
chinese: 是的，你可以。是的，你可以。你知道你可以。你是一个坚强的人。
english: Yes, you can.  Yes, you can.  You know you can.  You're a strong person.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F014
chinese: 这应该是一个合作伙伴关系。我们应该一起做这件事。我不应该被留在这里独自完成，而你却离开。
english: This is supposed to be a partnership.  We're supposed to do this together. I'm not supposed to be left here to do this by myself while you leave.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M017
chinese: 这是。这是。这是。这是。我打算每天给你写信。
english: It is. It is. It is. It is. I'm going to write you every day.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F015
chinese: 我应该做什么，读你的信吗？
english: What am I supposed to do, read your letters?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M018
chinese: 我们还能做什么？我——我们在这方面没有选择。你明白吗？你不能跟我一起来，我也不能留在这里。就是这样。
english: What else can we do?  I -- we don't have a choice in this.  Do you understand?  You can't come with me and I can't stay here.  That's all there is to it.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F016
chinese: 必须有些改变。我的意思是，我们不能就这样生活下去。这样行不通。
english: There has to be something.  I mean, we can't just live with this.  It's not -- it just won't work this way.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M019
chinese: 我们别无选择。我必须这样做。
english: We don't have a choice.  I have to do this.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F017
chinese: 只是告诉他们不。
english: Just tell them no.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M020
chinese: 我做不到。我很愿意。我的意思是，我不想留下来，如果你明白的话。
english: I can't do it.  I'd love to.  I mean, I don't - if you understand, I don't want to stay.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M021
chinese: 我的意思是，我不想离开。我想和你呆在这里。
english: I mean, I don't want to -- I don't want to leave.  I want to stay here with you.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F018
chinese: 那么，你能不能请尝试一下呢？如果你去问他们，他们说不行，那我会理解，但你连问都不愿意。
english: Then, can't you please try something?  If you go and ask them and they say no, then I would understand, but you're not even willing to ask.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F019
chinese: 你就不能努力一下吗？你就不能试试吗？
english: Can't you just make an effort?  Can't you just try?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M022
chinese: 我已经问过了。我不能回去。
english: I've asked already.  I can't go back.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M023
chinese: 这是不可能的。我必须走了。我真的很想留下来，但我不能。没有其他选择。
english: It can't happen.  I have to go.  I want to stay really bad, but I can't.  There's just no -- I don't have an option.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F020
chinese: 你什么时候离开？
english: When do you leave?

name: Ses04M_impro02_M024
chinese: 下周。
english: Next week.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F021
chinese: 一周。你给我一周的时间来接受这个。
english: A week.  You're giving me a week to be okay with this.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M025
chinese: 你不能把我看作是对此感到高兴。我的意思是，我并不想把你置于这种境地。
english: You can't make it out like I'm happy about this.  I mean, I didn't -- I didn't want to put you in this situation.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F022
chinese: 嗯，看起来你似乎并不太在意。
english: Well it doesn't seem like you're that bothered by it.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M026
chinese: 我是。我的意思是，我不知道。我不知道还能告诉你什么 - 你知道的，我的意思是，我可以告诉你。我不知道还能做什么。我的意思是，我被迫陷入这种境地。
english: I am.  I mean, I don't know.  I don't know what else to tell -- you know, I mean, I can tell you.  I don't know what else to do. I mean, I've been forced into this situation.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F023
chinese: 如果你真的那么在乎，你会找到一种解决办法的。
english: If you really cared so much, you'd find a way out.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M027
chinese: 我无能为力。我--我
english: There's nothing I can do.  I-- I

name: Ses04M_impro02_F024
chinese: 好的，好的。我们必须在一起。如果你不能留在这里，那我会跟着你走。我不在乎你去哪里。我们也会去。我不会留下来。
english: Fine, fine.  We have to be together.  If you can't stay here, then I'll go with you.  I don't care where you go.  We'll go, too.  I'm not staying behind.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M028
chinese: 他们不会让你一起来。这不会发生的。
english: They won't let you come along.  It's not going to happen.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F025
chinese: 这是一个自由的世界。我可以去我想去的地方。无论你在哪里，那就是我们要去的地方。
english: It's a free world.  I can go where I want.  Wherever you are, that's where we're going to go.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M029
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？请不要对此事刁难。
english: Are you kidding? Please don't be difficult about this.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F026
chinese: 困难。你要离开一年。我们有一个新生儿，而你要离开。我不认为我很难相处。
english: Difficult.  You're leaving for a year. We have a newborn child and you're leaving.  I don't think I'm being difficult.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M030
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses04M_impro02_F027
chinese: 我正在寻找一种方法使其工作。我会跟随你去任何地方。无论我需要做什么，我都会让这件事成功。
english: I'm finding a way to make it work.  And I will go wherever you go.  Whatever I have to do, I will make this work.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M031
chinese: 看，我--
english: Look, I--

name: Ses04M_impro02_F028
chinese: 你真的没有给我很多选择。
english: You're not really giving me a lot of options.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M032
chinese: 我要去的地方并不是地球上最安全的地方。好的。
english: Where I'm going is not the safest place on the earth.  Okay.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F029
chinese: 但是我应该对你去那里感到满意。
english: But I'm supposed to be okay with you going there.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M033
chinese: 但是我接受过训练。你没有接受过训练。
english: But I've been trained.  You have no training.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F030
chinese: 我不打算在这里等待。
english: I'm not going to stay here and wait.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M034
chinese: 你必须。你明白吗？你必须。
english: You have to.  Do you understand me?  You have to.

name: Ses04M_impro02_F031
chinese: 我做不到。
english: I can't do it.

name: Ses04M_impro02_M035
chinese: 嗯，我猜我们现在陷入了僵局，不是吗？
english: Well I guess we're at a stalemate then, aren't we?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say?  Maybe we should tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的。他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up.  He was still in bed.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约在今天早上四点左右。我听到了它的裂开声，醒来后望向外面。当它裂开时，他就站在那里。
english: About four this morning.  I heard it cracking and I woke up and looked out.  He was standing right there when it cracked.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。当它裂开时，他跑回房子里，在厨房里哭了起来。
english: I don't know.  When it cracked, he ran back into the house and cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不，我觉得最好的办法是让他一个人待着。
english: No, I figured the best thing was to leave him alone.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以透过房间的地板听到他。
english: I could hear him right through the floor of my room.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他在那个时候在这里做什么？他又在梦见他了。他在晚上四处走动。
english: What was he doing out here at that hour?  He's dreaming about him again.  He's walking around at night.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他变得就像他死后一样。
english: He's getting just like after he died.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F008
chinese: 那是什么意思？
english: What's the meaning in that?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道这个的意思，妈妈。但我知道一件事，你和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of this, mom.  But I know one thing you made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F009
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实，那种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him, that kind of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。为什么我们要让他继续认为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back and I know it.  Why do we allow him to go on thinking that we believe with him?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你想做什么，和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do, argue with him?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M010
chinese: 我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到拉里不会再回来了。
english: I don't want to argue with him but it's time that he realizes that Larry's not coming back anymore.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他？在夜晚等待他？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直接说我们不再有希望，我们多年来一直没有希望？
english: Why shouldn't he dream of him?  Walk the nights waiting for him?  Do we contradict him?  Do we say straight out that we have no hope anymore, that we haven't had any hope for years now?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来。
english: We've got to say it to him.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F013
chinese: 你打算如何证明它？你能证明吗？
english: How are you going to prove it?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M013
chinese: 拜托，三年了。三年过后没有人会回来的。这太疯狂了。
english: For God's sake three years.  Nobody comes back after three years.  It's insane.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F014
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说却不是，对他来说也不是。你可以说得滔滔不绝，但没有人，也没有坟墓，那么你在哪里？
english: To you it is and to me but not to him.  You can talk yourself blue in the face but there's no body and no grave so where are you?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M014
chinese: 坐下妈妈，我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F015
chinese: 问题在于这该死的报纸。每个月都会有一些男孩从无处冒出来，所以下一个就会是拉里。
english: The trouble is the goddamn newspapers.  Every month some boy turns up from nowhere so the next one is going to be Larry.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的，好的，好的。听着。你知道我为什么叫安妮来吗？
english: Alright, alright, alright.  Listen. You know why I asked Annie here don't you?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F016
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道为什么。
english: You know why.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F017
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: Well I got an idea but what's the story?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M017
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M018
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not only my business.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F019
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你已经足够大了，应该知道自己的想法。
english: What do you want me to do?  You're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M019
chinese: 那就好。我会继续进行的。
english: Then it's alright.  I'll go ahead with it.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好的，你想要确保父亲不会去做什么-
english: Well you want to make sure that father isn't going to-

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M020
chinese: 那么这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: Then it isn't just my business.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F021
chinese: 我只是在说。
english: I'm just saying.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M021
chinese: 有时候你真让我生气。你知道吗？如果我告诉爸爸，他对此大发雷霆，这也关你的事吗？
english: Sometimes you infuriate me.  You know that?  Isn't it your business too if I tell this to father and he throws a fit about it.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M022
chinese: 有时候你有- 有时候你有忽视事物的天赋。
english: Sometimes you have a- Sometimes you have a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F022
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore. The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F023
chinese: 从父亲的角度来看，他并没有死，你没有权利带走他的女孩。
english: From father's point of view, he's not dead and you have no right to take his girl.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F024
chinese: 现在你可以从那里继续前进，你知道去哪里，但是我告诉你我不知道去哪里。你看，我不知道。现在我能为你做些什么？
english: Now you can go on from there and you know where to go, but I'm telling you I don't know where to go.  See I don't know.  Now what can I do for you?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我想要某样东西时，我都不得不退缩，因为其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的一生一次又一次地如此。
english: I don't know why it is but every time I reach out for something I want, I have to pull back because other people will suffer. My whole bloody life time after time after time.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There's nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F026
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Did you ask Annie yet?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F027
chinese: 你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和父亲一样有同样的感觉。
english: How do you know she'll marry you?  Maybe she feels the same way father does.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好吧，如果她真的这样做了，那就结束了。从她的信中，我觉得她已经忘记了他。我会弄清楚的。
english: Well if she does, then that's the end of it.  From her letters, I think she's forgotten him.  I'll find out.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M028
chinese: 然后我们会和爸爸好好解决这件事，对吧妈妈。不要躲避我。
english: and then we'll thrash it out with dad, right mom.  Don't avoid me.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F028
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性。你从来没有看到过。
english: The trouble is you don't see enough women.  You never did.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M029
chinese: 所以我不擅长与女性相处。
english: So what I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F029
chinese: 我不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M030
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F030
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。自从你去打仗以来，你就没有见过她。已经过去五年了。
english: Well that's a good answer but it don't answer anything.  You haven't seen her since you went to war.  It's been five years.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M031
chinese: 我无能为力。我最了解她。我是在她旁边长大的。
english: I can't help it.  I know her best.  I was brought up next door to her.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M032
chinese: 这些年来，每当我想到一个人作为我的妻子，我就会想到安妮。你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: These years when I think of someone for my wife, I think of Annie.  What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F031
chinese: 我不想要一个图表。他认为他会回来，克里斯。
english: I don't want a diagram.  He thinks he's coming back, Chris.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F032
chinese: 你娶那个女孩。你宣布他死了。现在你父亲会发生什么？你知道吗？因为我不知道。
english: You marry that girl.  You're pronouncing him dead.  Now what happens to your father?  Do you know because I don't?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M033
chinese: 好的，那就是妈妈。
english: Alright then mom.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F033
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M034
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我希望如果我等待，爸爸会忘记拉里。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  I hoped that if I waited, dad would forget about Larry

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M035
chinese: 并且一切都会很幸福，我们会有一个正常的婚礼。但如果这里无法实现，那么我就必须离开。
english: and everything would be happy and we would have a regular wedding.  But if that can't happen here, then I'll have to get out.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F034
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M036
chinese: 我会离开。我会结婚，住在别的地方，也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll get married and live someplace else, maybe New York.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F035
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M037
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了。我不再是个好骗子了。
english: I've been a good son too long.  A good sucker I'm through with it.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你在这里有一家生意。这到底是什么鬼东西？
english: You've got a business here.  What the hell is this?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M038
chinese: 这个生意，这个生意并没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business, the business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F037
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M039
chinese: 是的，我每天喜欢它一个小时。如果我必须整天为钱而努力工作，至少在晚上我希望它美丽。
english: Yes, I like it an hour a day.  If I have to grub for money all day long, at least at evening I want it beautiful.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M040
chinese: 我想要-我想要一个家庭。我想要一些孩子。我想要建立一些我可以奉献自己的东西。安妮就在其中。现在我该去哪里找到它？
english: I want- I want a family.  I want some kids.  I want to build something I give myself to.  Annie is in the middle of that.  Now where do I find it?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F038
chinese: 你是说告诉我一些你的意思是你真的要离开这个行业吗？
english: You mean-tell me something you mean you'd really leave the business?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M041
chinese: 是的，我会这样做。
english: Yes on this I would.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F039
chinese: 嗯，你不想以那种方式思考。
english: Well you don't want to think that way.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M042
chinese: 然后你帮助我留在这里。
english: Then you help me stay here.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F040
chinese: 好吧，但不要那样想。
english: Alright but don't think that way

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F041
chinese: 因为我们到底为了什么而努力工作？整个计划只是为了你，克里斯。
english: because what the hell did we work for?  This whole shooting match is just for you, Chris.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M043
chinese: 我知道。只要你帮助我留在这里。
english: I know.  Just you help me stay here.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F042
chinese: 但不要那样想。你听到我说的了吗？
english: But don't think that way.  You hear me?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M044
chinese: 我正在这样思考。
english: I am thinking that way.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F043
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you do I?

name: Ses04F_script01_1_M045
chinese: 不，我是一个相当坚强的人。
english: No.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses04F_script01_1_F044
chinese: 是的。我能看到。
english: Yeah.  I can see that.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say?  Maybe we ought to tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的。他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up.  He was still in bed.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约在今天早上四点左右。我听到了它的裂开声，醒来后望向外面。当它裂开时，他就站在那里。
english: About four this morning.  I heard it cracking and I woke up and looked out.  He was standing right there when it cracked.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。它裂开后，他跑回屋里，在厨房里哭了。
english: I don't know.  After it cracked, he ran back in the house and cried in the kitchen.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不。我——我觉得最好的办法是不去打扰他。
english: No.  I - I figured the best thing was to leave him alone.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我透过我房间的地板听到了他。
english: I heard him right through the floor of my room.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他在那个时候在这里做什么？他又在梦见他了。他在晚上四处走动。
english: What was he doing out here at that hour?  He's dreaming about him again.  He's walking around at night.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F007
chinese: 他越来越像死后的样子。那是什么意思？
english: He's getting just like after he died.  What's the meaning in that?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道它的意思，妈妈。但我知道一件事：我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it, mom.  But I know one thing; we made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F008
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。这种事情总是会得到回报，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  That kind of thing always pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F009
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean, dishonest?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来了。我也知道。为什么我们要让他继续认为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back.  And I know it.  Why do we allow him to go on thinking that we believe with him?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你想做什么？和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do?  Argue with him?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M010
chinese: 我不想和他争论，但是他该意识到没有人再相信拉里还活着了。
english: I don't want to argue with him but it's time he realized that nobody believes Larry's alive anymore.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他？在夜晚等待他。
english: Why shouldn't he dream of him?  Walk the nights waiting for him.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们是否与他相矛盾？我们是否直接说出我们不再有希望了？我们多年来一直没有希望。
english: Do we contradict him?  Do we say straight out that we have no hope anymore?  That we haven't had any hope for years, now.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M013
chinese: 我们得对他说出来。
english: We've gotta say it to him.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你打算如何证明它？你能证明吗？
english: How are you going to prove it?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M014
chinese: 看在上帝的份上，三年了。三年之后没有人会回来的。这太疯狂了。
english: For God's sake, three years.  Nobody comes back after three years.  It's insane.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F013
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是这样，但对他来说不是。你可以说得滔滔不绝，但没有尸体，也没有坟墓，那么你在哪里？
english: To you it is and to me, but not to him.  You can talk yourself blue in the face, but there's no body and no grave, so where are you?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M015
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F014
chinese: 问题在于这该死的报纸。每个月都会有一些男孩从无处冒出来，所以下一个男孩就会是Larry。所以我们必须保持--
english: The trouble is the Goddamn newspapers.  Every month some boy turns up from nowhere, so the next boy is going to be Larry.  So we have to keep--

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M016
chinese: 好的，好的，好的。听着。你知道我为什么叫安妮来吗？
english: Alright, alright, alright.  Listen.  You know why I asked Annie here don't you?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F015
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M017
chinese: 你知道为什么。
english: You know why.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F016
chinese: 好吧，我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: Well I've got an idea, but what's the story?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M018
chinese: 要去向她求婚。
english: Going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F017
chinese: 好吧，那只是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well that's only your business, Chris.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M019
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not only my business.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F018
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你已经足够大了，应该知道自己的想法。
english: What do you want me to do?  You're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M020
chinese: 那就好。我会继续进行吗？
english: Then it's alright.  I'll go ahead with it?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F019
chinese: 好的，你想要确保你的父亲不会有--
english: Well you want to make sure your father isn't going to have --

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M021
chinese: 好的，那么你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: Well, then you know it's not only my business.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F020
chinese: 我只是在说。
english: I'm just saying.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M022
chinese: 有时候你真让我生气，你知道吗？如果我告诉父亲并且他对此大发雷霆，这也是你的事吧？你真是擅长忽视事情。
english: Sometimes you infuriate me, you know that?  Isn't it your business, too, if I tell this to father and he throws a fit about it?  You have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F021
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore.  The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F022
chinese: 从父亲的角度来看，他并没有死。而且你没有权利带走他的女孩。
english: From father's point of view, he's not dead.  And you have no right to take his girl.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F023
chinese: 现在如果你知道要去哪里，你可以从那里继续前进。但是我告诉你，我不知道要去哪里。你看，我不知道。
english: Now you can go on from there if you know where to go. But I'm telling you I don't know where to go.  See, I don't know.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F024
chinese: 现在我能为您做些什么？
english: Now what can I do for you?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我想要某样东西时，我都不得不退缩，因为其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的生活，一次又一次。
english: I don't know why it is but every time I reach out for something I want, I have to pull back because other people will suffer.  My whole bloody life, time after time after time.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你是一个体贴的人。这没有什么错。
english: You're a considerate fellow.  There's nothing wrong in that.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的。
english: To hell with that.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F026
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Did you ask Annie yet?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F027
chinese: 你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和父亲一样有同样的感觉。
english: How do you know she'll marry you?  Maybe she feels the same way father does.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好吧，如果她真的这样做了，那就结束了。从她的信中，我觉得她已经忘记了他。我们会弄清楚的。然后我们会和爸爸好好谈谈。对吧，妈妈？不要躲避我。
english: Well if she does, then that's the end of it.  From her letters, I think she's forgotten him.  We'll find out.  Then we'll thrash it out with dad. Right, mom?  Don't avoid me.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F028
chinese: 问题是，你没有看到足够多的女性。你从来没有看到过。
english: The trouble is, you don't see enough women.  You never did.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M028
chinese: 那又怎样？我对女人不擅长。
english: So what?  I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F029
chinese: 我不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M029
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F030
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的回答，但它并没有回答任何问题。他认为他会回来，克里斯。如果你娶了那个女孩，你就宣布他死了。那么你父亲会发生什么？你知道吗？因为我不知道。
english: Well that's a good answer, but it don't answer anything.  He thinks he's coming back, Chris.  You marry that girl, you're pronouncing him dead.  Now what happens to your father?  Do you know?  Because I don't.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M030
chinese: 行？
english: Line?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F031
chinese: 好的，那好吧，妈妈。
english: Alright, then, mom.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M031
chinese: 好的，那么，妈妈。我们有漏掉什么吗？没有。好的，那么，妈妈。
english: Alright, then, mom.  Did we skip something?  No.  Alright, then, mom.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F032
chinese: 是的，我们做到了。你想继续吗？
english: Yes we did. Do you want to keep going?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M032
chinese: 是的，让我们继续前进。
english: Yeah, let's keep going.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F033
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M033
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我希望如果
english: I've given it three years' of thought.  I'd hope that if

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M034
chinese: 父亲忘记了拉里，我们本来会有一个正常的婚礼，一切都很幸福。如果我在这里得不到那样的婚礼，那么我就必须离开。
english: father forgot about Larry, we'd have a regular wedding and everything happy.  If I can't get that here, then I'll have to get out.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F034
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M035
chinese: 我会离开的。我会结婚并在别的地方生活。也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll get married and live someplace else.  Maybe New York.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F035
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M036
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了，一个好傻瓜。我已经厌倦了。
english: I've been a good son too long; a good sucker.  I'm through with it.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你在这里有一家生意。这到底是什么鬼东西？
english: You've got a business here.  What the hell is this?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M037
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F037
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M038
chinese: 是的。我喜欢每天有一个小时的时间。如果我必须整天为钱而努力工作，至少在晚上，我希望它美丽。
english: Yes.  I like getting an hour a day.  If I have to grub for money all day long, at least at evening, I want it beautiful.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我想要一个家庭。我想要一些孩子。我想要建立一些我可以奉献自己的东西。安妮正在其中。现在我该去哪里找到它？
english: I want a family.  I want some kids.  I want to build something I can give myself to.  Annie's in the middle of that.  Now where do I find it?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F038
chinese: 你是说——告诉我一些事情。你是说你真的要离开这个行业吗？
english: You mean -- tell me something.  You mean you'd really leave the business?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M040
chinese: 是的，对于这个我愿意。
english: Yes, on this I would.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F039
chinese: 你不想那样思考。
english: You don't want to think like that.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M041
chinese: 然后你帮助我留在这里。
english: Then you help me stay here.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F040
chinese: 好吧。但是不要那样想，因为我们到底为了什么而努力工作呢？这一切都是为了你，克里斯。整个计划都是为了你。
english: Alright.  But just don't think like that because what the hell did we work for?  That's all for you, Chris.  The whole shooting match is just for you.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M042
chinese: 我知道。只是你帮我留在这里。
english: I know that.  Just you help me stay here.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F041
chinese: 但是不要那样想，你听到我说的吗？
english: But don't think that way, you hear me?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M043
chinese: 我正在这样思考。
english: I am thinking that way.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F042
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses04M_script01_1_M044
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强壮的人。
english: No, you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses04M_script01_1_F043
chinese: 是的，我能看到。
english: Yeah, I can see that.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M000
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F000
chinese: 那里什么都没有，你知道的。
english: There was nothing in that, you know that.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You took presents from him.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F001
chinese: 展示了一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents a trivial little broach.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我记得它上面布满了钻石，而且是最糟糕的品味。
english: I remember it well bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F002
chinese: 一点也不。它非常漂亮。我还保留着它，经常穿着。
english: Not at all.  It was very pretty.  I still have it and I wear it often.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F003
chinese: 我没有。你在嫉妒的想象中编造了整件事。
english: I did not.  You made the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你，是吗？
english: You must admit that he was in love with you, wasn't he?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F004
chinese: 也许只是一点点，没有什么严重的。
english: Just a little perhaps, nothing serious.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: You let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F005
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F006
chinese: 它给了他很多快乐，而且没有伤害到我。
english: It gave him a lot of pleasure and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F007
chinese: 如果你不那么好奇，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: If you hadn't been so nosey, you never would have known a thing about it.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M008
chinese: 这是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view, I must say.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F008
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: Oh, dear.  I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M009
chinese: 我也是。无聊得发僵。想喝点白兰地吗？
english: So am I.  Bored stiff.  Want some brandy?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No thanks.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我会自己吃一些，我想。
english: I'll have some myself, I think.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不明白你为什么要它。你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want it.  You've already had two glasses.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason.  Anyway they were very small ones.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F011
chinese: 看起来太愚蠢了，继续这样下去真是太过了。
english: seems so silly to go on and on and on with such a thing.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M012
chinese: 整个晚上一直喝三杯酒，你几乎不能说是一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three liquor glasses in the whole evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F012
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's become a habit with you.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M013
chinese: 你不必因为此刻不想要任何东西而摆出这么高傲的姿态。
english: You needn't be so grand just because you don't happen to want any at the moment.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F013
chinese: 哦，别这么愚蠢。
english: Oh, don't be so stupid.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M014
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M015
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M016
chinese: 亲爱的，你要去哪里吗？
english: Going somewhere, my dear?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F015
chinese: 只是为了让自己对你有吸引力。
english: Just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M017
chinese: 啊，那个回复伤透了我的心。
english: Ah, that reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F016
chinese: 这个女人的工作是吸引那个男人。你能帮我看一分钟吗？
english: The woman's job is to allure the man.  Watch me a minute will you.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M018
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F017
chinese: 哦，不，不是这样的。
english: Oh, no it isn't

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F018
chinese: 哦，安静点。
english: Oh, be quiet.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M020
chinese: 很遗憾你没有更多白兰地。它可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you don't have anymore brandy.  It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F019
chinese: 似乎对你并没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: It doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M021
chinese: 咔嗒，咔嗒，像一条小蝰蛇一样咔嗒咔嗒。
english: Snap, snap, snap like a little adder.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F020
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap they sting.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M022
chinese: 胡说八道，它们的牙齿后面有毒囊，它们会咬人。
english: Non-sense they have bags of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F021
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M023
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F022
chinese: 我不在乎，好吗。你明白吗？我不在乎。如果它们像箍圈一样叫唤和滚动，我也不介意。
english: I don't care, okay.  Do you understand?  I don't care.  I don't mind if they bark and roll about like hoops.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M024
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F023
chinese: 是的，我做了很多。
english: Yes, I did quite a lot.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M025
chinese: 我想你让他亲吻你更多。
english: I suppose you let him kiss you a good deal more then.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F024
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M026
chinese: 你一定度过了狂欢的时光。毫无约束，非常愉快，反正你本来就没有太多束缚。
english: You must have had a riotous time.  No restraint at all, very enjoyable, you never had much anyhow.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F025
chinese: 你真是讨人厌。我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable.  I expect it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我一点也没有喝醉。
english: I'm not in the least drunk.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F026
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不好的问题。
english: You always had a weak head.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M028
chinese: 我想我之前提到过，整个晚上我喝了三分钟的白兰地酒杯。一个两岁的孩子也不会因此而醉。
english: I think I mentioned once before that I had three minute liquor glasses of brandy the whole evening long.  A child of two couldn't get drunk on that.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F027
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就能醉得厉害。
english: On, the contrary.  A child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M029
chinese: 非常有趣，那么一个六岁的孩子、一个四岁的孩子和一个九岁的孩子怎么样？
english: Very interesting and how about a child of six and a child of four and a child of nine.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F028
chinese: 哦，闭嘴。
english: Oh, shut up.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M030
chinese: 他们会就这个问题展开一场精彩的小辩论，你知道的。不守规矩的孩子们。
english: They'd get up a splendid little debate about that, you know.  Intemperate tots.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F029
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。你最好再喝点白兰地。
english: Not very funny, dear.  You'd better have some more brandy.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M031
chinese: 非常好的主意。我会的。
english: Very good idea.  I will.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉，我认为。
english: You'd better turn that off I think.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F030
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M033
chinese: 现在已经很晚了，这会打扰楼上的人。
english: It's very late and it will annoy the people upstairs.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F031
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There is no one upstairs.  It's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M034
chinese: 楼下有人，我想。
english: There are people downstairs I suppose.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F032
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M035
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of year for Tunis.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F033
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M036
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I'll do no such thing.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F034
chinese: 好吧，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M037
chinese: 关掉它。它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off.  It's driving me mad.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F035
chinese: 你太易怒了。试着控制自己。
english: You're far too temperamental.  Try to control yourself.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M038
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F036
chinese: 走开，走开。我讨厌你。
english: Go away, go away.  I hate you.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M039
chinese: 阿曼达，听着。
english: Amanda, listen.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F037
chinese: 听？确实听了。我受够了听你说话。你这个该死的虐待狂恶霸。
english: Listen? Listen indeed.  I'm sick and tired of listening to you.  You damn sadistic bully.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F038
chinese: 停止。
english: Stop.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M040
chinese: 非常有趣。
english: Very amusing.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F039
chinese: 停下，停下。我讨厌你。你听到了吗？你自负、专横而且完全不可理喻。
english: Stop, stop.  I hate you.  Do you hear?  You're conceited and overbearing and utterly impossible.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M041
chinese: 你是一个脾气恶劣、放荡不羁、邪恶的小野兽。我希望在我活着的时候再也不见到你。
english: You're a vile tempered, loose living, wicked little beast. And I hope I never see you again as long as I live.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F040
chinese: 这是结束了，你明白吗？结束了。
english: This is the end do you understand?  The end,

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M042
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F041
chinese: 最终和永远
english: finally and forever

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F042
chinese: 哦，是我。放开我。
english: Oh, I am.  Let go of me.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M043
chinese: 你不是。
english: You're not.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F043
chinese: 哦，我讨厌你。很幸运我及时发现了你真实的样子。再嫁给你？永远不会，永远不会，永远不会。
english: Oh, I hate you. It's a good thing that I found out in time what you're really like. Marry you again?  Never, never, never.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M044
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。如果你跪着向我求婚，我也不会再嫁给你。
english: Shut up.  Shut up. I wouldn't marry you again if you came crawling to me on your bended knees.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_M045
chinese: 你是一个刻薄、邪恶心机、脾气暴躁的小巫婆。我希望上帝保佑，只要我活着，永远不再见到你。婊子。
english: You're a mean, evil minded, little tempered witch. I hope to God I never set eyes on you again as long as I live. Whore.

name: Ses04F_script03_2_F044
chinese: 我宁愿在痛苦中死去。野兽。畜生。小猪。
english: I'd rather die in torment. Beast.  Brute.  Calf swine.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F000
chinese: 嘿，你好吗？
english: Hey, how you doing?

name: Ses04M_impro06_F001
chinese: 对不起。
english: I'm sorry.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M000
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F002
chinese: 我知道-我知道没有什么话能真正帮助，但是--
english: I know- I know there's nothing I can say that will really help, but--

name: Ses04M_impro06_M001
chinese: 我知道。我只是...我不知道。只是因为你有一个人，你知道的，这很奇怪。
english: I know.  I just -- I don't know.  It's just weird because you have somebody who's, you know,

name: Ses04M_impro06_M002
chinese: 一个重要的部分在你的生活中，然后他们就消失了。我不知道。这真的不是发生在我身上的事情。
english: a major part of your life and then they're gone.  And I don't know.  That's not really -- it's never really happened to me before.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F003
chinese: 对不起。这从来都不容易。
english: I'm sorry.  It's never easy.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F004
chinese: 但是，如果你需要什么，我就在这里。我的意思是，你只需要问。我知道--
english: But, I'm here if there's anything you need.  I mean, you just have to ask.  I know --

name: Ses04M_impro06_M004
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F005
chinese: --它实际上没有做任何事情。 但是--
english: --it doesn't really do anything.  But--

name: Ses04M_impro06_M005
chinese: 我只是--这真的不公平。
english: I just -- it's just not fair.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F006
chinese: 我知道。它从来都不是。
english: I know.  It never is.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F007
chinese: 他的父母怎么样？
english: How's, um -- how's his parents doing?

name: Ses04M_impro06_M006
chinese: 我是说，他们，你知道的，他们很生气。就像你知道的，他们。
english: I mean, they're, you know, they're upset.  It's like you know, they

name: Ses04M_impro06_M007
chinese: 感受到和其他人一样的感觉。
english: feel the same way everybody else does.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F008
chinese: 我的意思是，你想做什么？你想要- 你想要谈论这个吗？你想要-
english: I mean, what do you want to do?  Do you want to- do you want to talk about it?  Do you-

name: Ses04M_impro06_M008
chinese: 【呼吸】我的意思是，没有什么好谈的了。他已经走了，我再也见不到他了。
english: [BREATHING] I mean, there's nothing really to talk about.  He's gone and I'll never see him again.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F009
chinese: 嗯，我知道这并没有太多帮助，但至少你有机会认识他。我的意思是，至少你和他在一起的时间是有的。
english: Well I know it's not a lot of help or anything, but at least you got to know him.  I mean, at least you had the time with him that you did.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M009
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F010
chinese: 我是说，我们可以对此感激。
english: I mean, we can be grateful for that.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M010
chinese: 是的，我不知道。有时候我希望我不认识他。这样我就不会--
english: Yeah, I don't know.  Sometimes I wish I didn't know him.  So I wouldn't--

name: Ses04M_impro06_F011
chinese: 你现在感觉那样是因为你心烦。但你并不真的这么想。
english: You feel that way now because you're upset.  But you don't really think that.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F012
chinese: 会好起来的。我知道这并没有帮助，但是它会变好的，你会记得你们拥有的所有美好事物；你们与他一起的所有快乐回忆，你会为这些感激。
english: It'll get better.  I know it doesn't help, but it will get better and you will remember all of the good things that you guys had; all of the memories that you have with him that were happy and you'll be grateful for those.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M011
chinese: 这只是一个可怕的生活。我就是不明白。
english: This is just -- this is a terrible life.  I just don't understand.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F013
chinese: 只是生活，总的来说？
english: Just life, in general?

name: Ses04M_impro06_M012
chinese: 我是说，这真的不公平。就像，我不知道。为什么人们-
english: I mean, it's just not fair.  Like, I don't know.  Why people -

name: Ses04M_impro06_M013
chinese: 应该有一些规则，人们在年纪大一点之前不会死亡，因为这样至少是可以预料的。
english: there should just be some sort of rule that people don't die until they're older, 'cause then, at least, it's expected.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F014
chinese: 我同意。如果我知道如何实现这个，我肯定会帮助你。
english: I agree.  If I knew how to make that happen, I would certainly help you.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M014
chinese: 我不知道该做什么。
english: I don't know what to do.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F015
chinese: 什么时候开始服务？我们可以帮忙吗？还有什么事情，我的意思是--
english: When's the service? Can- can we help?  Is there anything, I mean--

name: Ses04M_impro06_M015
chinese: 我是说，你-你可以走。我不知道。我不知道还有什么。
english: I mean, you- you can go.  I don't know.  I don't know what else.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M016
chinese: 我希望下雨。不知怎么的，那会让我感觉更舒服。
english: I hope it rains.  Somehow that'll make me feel more comfortable.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F016
chinese: 似乎如果整个世界都很悲伤，那么你也可以这样。
english: Seems like if the whole world's sad, then it's okay for you to be.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M018
chinese: 我只是希望有一种方式可以神奇地让他复活过来。
english: I just wish there was some way to just bring him back to life magically.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F017
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M019
chinese: 只是，你知道，一些东西；一些精灵。我需要找到一个精灵瓶。
english: Just, you know, some thing; some genie. I need to find a genie bottle.

name: Ses04M_impro06_F018
chinese: 我没有任何魔法答案。 但是，
english: I don't have any magic answers.  But,

name: Ses04M_impro06_F019
chinese: 我的意思是，尽管这很陈词滥调，只要爱他的人记得他，那就不是浪费，你知道的。
english: I mean, as- as cliche as it is, as long as people who loved him remember him, then it's not a waste, you know.

name: Ses04M_impro06_M020
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M000
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so what do you think?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我说的话。
english: What I said.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是科学事实。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这是公关活动。有人向你兜售了一个美妙的活动将在海滩上举行的虚假信息。
english: It's PR.  Somebody sold you a bill of goods that this wonderful event is going to take place on the beach.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M003
chinese: 我不是唯一一个。看看这些人。
english: I'm not the only one.  Look at these people.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F003
chinese: 当然，每个人都听过同样的故事。这让我们都不断地回来寻找更多。这让我们都感到兴奋，让我们相信生活随时都会开始，只要我们找到合适的位置并参与其中。
english: Well sure everybody's told the same story.  It keeps us all coming back for more.  It keeps us all excited, keeps us thinking that life is going to start any minute now if we can just find the right spot and get in on the action.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F004
chinese: 对不起，但对我来说它仍然只是鱼。
english: Well I'm sorry but it's still just fish to me.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你个问题吗？不要误解我的意思，但是你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you something?  Don't take this the wrong way but are you having your period?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F005
chinese: 该死的奥吉，别问我那个。你总是问我那个。当你问我那个时，我讨厌。这是侮辱。
english: Goddamn it Augie don't ask me that.  You always ask me that.  I hate it when you ask me that.  It's insulting.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M006
chinese: 那么，有什么困扰你的吗？
english: Well then what's bugging you?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F006
chinese: 我们对今晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: We just have different ideas about what this evening is supposed to look like.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没什么了不起的。我们来到这里。沙鳗来了。它们进行它们的小鱼事务。我们说哦，啊，看鱼。它们回家了。我们回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  We come down here.  The grunions arrive.  They do their little fish business.  We go oh, ah look at the fish.  They go home.  We go home.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F007
chinese: 求求你，这不是关于鱼的事。
english: For heaven's sake, this is not about fish.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们完全跳过了。对的。
english: We totally skipped. Right.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M009
chinese: 没什么了不起的。我们来到这里。沙鳗来了。它们进行小鱼的事务。我们说哦，啊，看鱼。它们回家了。我们也回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  We come down here.  The grunions arrive.  They do the little fish business.  We go oh, ah look at the fish.  They go home.  We go home.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F009
chinese: 拜托，长大点吧，我们不会去看格鲁尼翁鱼。
english: For heaven's sake, grow up we are not going to see the Grunions.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M010
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F010
chinese: 我们从来没有做过。我们曾经有过吗？
english: We never do.  Do we have we ever?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M011
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次，这是从来没有过的。
english: We've missed them twice that's not ever.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F011
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试过的一切。
english: Twice is every time we've tried that's ever.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M012
chinese: 我们今年会见到他们。
english: We'll see them this year.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F012
chinese: 不，我们不会这样做。这是没有意义的。这就像等待圣诞老人一样。
english: No, we won't.  It's pointless.  It's like waiting up to see Santa Clause.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F013
chinese: 上帝，我感觉我的整个生活都将花在海滩上，眼睛睁得大大的，双手紧紧地握在一起，期待着鱼儿的出现。
english: God I feel as though my entire life is going to be spent standing on the beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasped expectantly waiting for the fish to show up,

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F014
chinese: 而且鱼不会出现。
english: and the fish won't show up.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M013
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F015
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I'm saying.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M014
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No, of course not.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F016
chinese: 我确实想看它。我总是这样想。我一直在想，这一次会是那个时候，但它从来都不是。
english: I did want to see it.  I always do.  I keep thinking that this time will be the time but it never is.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M015
chinese: 这只是一条鱼，没有什么需要受到创伤的。
english: It's just a fish.  Nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F017
chinese: 求求你，这不是关于鱼的事。
english: For heaven's sake, this is not about fish.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M016
chinese: 我一直在试图倒推，但似乎无法确定我们何时走向了更糟的方向。在玛吉的电话中，你还好。晚餐还好。洗碗也没问题。
english: I've been trying to work this backwards but I can't seem to pinpoint the moment when we took a turn for the worse.  You were fine during the phone call from Marge.  Dinner was okay.  Doing the dishes was no problem.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M017
chinese: 让我们看看，我洗了个澡。你看新闻。你说今晚有Grinons。我说太好了，我们去吧。我今晚感觉很幸运。
english: Let's see I took a shower.  You watched the news.  You said the Grunions are running tonight. I said great let's go.  I feel lucky tonight.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M018
chinese: 好的。嗯，我正在穿上我的夹克，放出动物。我们正在把车从车库里开出来。
english: Okay.  Uh, so I'm putting on my jacket, putting out the animals.  We're getting the car out of the garage.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F018
chinese: 你还记得我们第一次来看它的时候吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。
english: Do you remember the first time we came to see it?  It was about four years ago right after we got married.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F019
chinese: 我们以为我怀孕了，我们有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。你叫我跳舞。所以我们脱掉了鞋子。
english: We thought I was pregnant and we had a bottle of champagne but no glasses.  You asked me to dance.  So we took off our shoes

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F020
chinese: 你弹开了瓶塞，当我们在跳舞时，你对我说了最温柔最亲密的话。
english: and you popped the cork and while we were dancing, you said the softest most intimate things to me

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F021
chinese: 直接进入我的耳朵，这样我就能尽可能多地听到它们，也能尽可能多地感受到它们。
english: right into my ear so that I could hear them as much as- so that I could feel them as much as hear them.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F022
chinese: 我记得当时想着这就是了。终于，终于我像应该的那样快乐。
english: And I remember thinking this is it.  At last, at last I'm as happy as I'm supposed to be.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M019
chinese: 等一下。我明白了。
english: Wait a minute.  I've got it.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F023
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，从瓶子里喝香槟。
english: Dancing barefoot in the sand, drinking champagne from the bottle.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M020
chinese: 在车里对吧。开车经过Knickerbocker酒水店时，你说让我们买点香槟，我说时间在浪费或者类似的话。对吗？
english: It was in the car right.  Driving past the Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, you said let's get some champagne and I said times a wasting or something like that.  Right?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M021
chinese: 就是这样，对吗？你希望这次像上次那样，对吗？就是这样。
english: That's it, right?  You want this to be like the other time, right.  That's it.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F024
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望一些事情。
english: I would rather not remember some things.  I would rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M022
chinese: 好的。对的。我明白了。当然。当然。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Okay.  Right.  I got it.  Sure.  Of course.  Listen you want to dance?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M023
chinese: 你想让我去买一些香槟吗？
english: You want me to get some champagne?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F026
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M024
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F027
chinese: 不。不。
english: No.  No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M025
chinese: 好吧，怎么了？你想让我在你耳边呼吸吗？
english: Well what?  Want me to breath in your ear?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F028
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M026
chinese: 想再次结婚吗？
english: Want to get married again?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F029
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M027
chinese: 什么？你想要离婚吗？
english: What?  What do you want a divorce?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F030
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M028
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F031
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M029
chinese: 一块新地毯，一只贵宾犬，一个背部按摩，冰淇淋，一个自杀协议。什么？什么？卡拉，你到底想要什么？
english: A new carpet, a poodle, a backrub, ice cream, a suicide pact.  What?  What?  Carla what the hell do you want?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F032
chinese: 我希望事情能按照预期的方式发展。
english: I want something to turn out the way it's supposed to.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M030
chinese: 欢迎加入人类的行列。你觉得这就是我心中所想的吗？
english: Well welcome to the human race.  You think this is what I had in mind.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M031
chinese: 你觉得当我求婚的时候，我有这样一个美好的幻想，四年后我们会来到海滩，互相因为鱼而大声争吵吗？
english: Do you think that when I proposed, I had this great fantasy going that four years down the line we'd come to the beach and yell at each other over fish.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M032
chinese: 你觉得我知道会有时候你会像看待一个用过的纸巾一样看着我，还有时候我会看着你想着天哪，下一班去阿拉斯加的飞机是什么时候。
english: Do you think that I knew that there'd be times when you'd look at me like I'm a used Kleenex and times I would look at you and think holy hell when's the next flight to Alaska.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M033
chinese: 不，不，我和你一样。我以为一切都会是桃子和玫瑰、头发上的沙子和风中的。
english: No, no I'm just like you.  I thought it was going to be all peaches and roses and sand in our hair and wind in our

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M034
chinese: 我们脚上的沙子，头发中的风，鱼儿总会来，账单总会自己付，哈哈，宝贝，我们成了笑柄。因为你知道你会得到什么，
english: Sand in our toes and wind in our hair and the fish will always come and the bills will always pay themselves and ha, ha baby the jokes on us.  Because you know what you get,

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M035
chinese: 你知道你得到了什么，卡拉，这个。
english: you know what you get Carla, this.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F033
chinese: 这是什么，这是什么？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This what, what is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M036
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F034
chinese: 哦，对了，当然这是站在海滩上。这是等待。这是战斗。
english: Oh, right, sure this is standing on the beach.  This is waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M037
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F035
chinese: 但这与我想象中的任何事情都不一样。
english: But this isn't anything like I thought anything would be like.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M038
chinese: 不，我也认识我自己。
english: No, I know me either.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F036
chinese: 这只是这样的。我的意思是它包含了很多东西，但它只是不是，你知道的，其他的东西。你有任何想法我在试图说什么吗？
english: This is just this.  I mean it includes a lot in everything but it's just not, you know, something else.  Do you have any idea what I'm trying to say?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M039
chinese: 我正在尽力而为。
english: I'm doing the best I can.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F037
chinese: 我知道你是的，奥吉。真的，我知道你希望这个特别而美好，而且今晚是满月，沙滩等等，但我就是忍不住想着其他地方。
english: I know you are, Augie.  Really I do.  I know you wanted this to be special and nice and it's the full moon and the sand and all but I just couldn't help thinking about being somewhere else.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M040
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起的话。
english: Maybe if you were with somebody else too.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F038
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M041
chinese: 不，我知道但还是。我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know but still.  I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F039
chinese: 天哪，不管我在做什么，我宁愿和你一起做。
english: For heaven's sake, whatever I'm doing I'd rather be doing it with you.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M042
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F040
chinese: 好吧，别荒谬了。难道你不知道吗？你可能是希望和别人在一起的那个人。
english: Well don't be ridiculous.  Don't you know that?  You're the one who probably wishes you were with somebody else

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F041
chinese: 一个知道如何享受生活并且不把一切都看得太重的人。
english: somebody who knew how to enjoy herself and didn't take everything so hard.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M043
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我没有。
english: Actually now that you mention it, no I don't.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F042
chinese: 好的。好吧。所以我们在错误的地方，但我们和正确的人在一起。
english: Okay.  Fine.  So we're in the wrong spot but we're with the right person.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M044
chinese: 我不知道。对我来说，这似乎是个好地方。
english: I don't know.  It seemed like a good spot to me.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M045
chinese: 我是说看看你从这里看到的月亮的景色。
english: I mean look at the view you've got of the moon from here.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F043
chinese: 是的，我注意到了。它在水上看起来很漂亮，是吧，大而明亮的白色月亮。
english: Yeah, I noticed that.  Looks pretty on the water doesn't it, big old white moon.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M046
chinese: 嗯，看看我们这里有什么。
english: Well look at what we got here.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F044
chinese: 哦，奥吉，你带来了点心。
english: Oh, Augie you brought refreshments.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M047
chinese: 这不是香槟。
english: It's not champagne.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F045
chinese: 那么我猜我们不需要眼镜了。
english: Well then I guess we don't need glasses.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M048
chinese: 你还冷吗？你想回家吗？
english: You still cold?  Do you want to go home?

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F046
chinese: 我开始觉得你可能是对的。我想这可能就是那个地方。奥吉，我很抱歉。
english: I'm beginning to think you might be right.  I think this may be the spot after all.  Augie I'm sorry.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M049
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're very quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_F047
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses04F_script02_2_M050
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M000
chinese: 是的，嗨。嗯，看，我现在只是想要续费我的车牌。就这样。我只是需要拿到那些小贴纸中的一个。
english: Yeah, hi.  Um, look, I -- all I'm trying to do right now is renew my license plate.  That's all.  I just need to get one of those little stickers.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F000
chinese: 好的。有什么问题吗？
english: Okay.  What's the problem?

name: Ses04M_impro01_M001
chinese: 然后我-我-有个女士-我排队了。我等了大约两个小时，然后我给了她这张表格。
english: And I've- I've- some lady -- I got in line.  I waited for about two hours um, and, I gave her this form

name: Ses04M_impro01_M002
chinese: 她之前给了我那个。她说，哦，我不小心给了你错的。所以我希望我可以填写一个新的，给你，然后跳过这整个排队的过程。
english: that she gave to me earlier. And she said oh, I gave you the wrong one by accident.  So I was hoping I could just fill out a new one, give it to you and sort of skip this whole line business.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F001
chinese: 好的，嗯。你有带身份证明照片吗？
english: Okay, um.  Do you have your photo ID with you?

name: Ses04M_impro01_M003
chinese: 是的，我是的。
english: Yes, I do.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F002
chinese: 好的。这是错误的表格。我很抱歉。
english: Okay.  This is the wrong form.  I'm sorry.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M004
chinese: 这个没问题，那么我可以拿到我需要的表格吗？
english: This is -- okay, then just can I have the form that I need.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F003
chinese: 我没有那个表格。你需要去那边排队，他们会给你正确的表格。填写完后，你可以把它带回给我。
english: I don't have the form.  You're going to have to go get in that line over there and they will give you the right form.  And after you fill it out, you can bring it back to me.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M005
chinese: 你不要--你没有-
english: Don't you -- you don't have-

name: Ses04M_impro01_M006
chinese: 你是在告诉我你桌子后面没有一堆它们吗？
english: are you telling me you don't have a stack of them behind the desk?

name: Ses04M_impro01_F004
chinese: 我一个都没有。
english: I don't have any of

name: Ses04M_impro01_F005
chinese: 我这里没有任何一个。你得去那边排队。然后他们会给你一份表格的副本。
english: I don't have any of them over here.  You're gonna have to go get in that line over there.  And they will give you a copy of the form.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M007
chinese: 但是你--它是一样的--我的意思是，你可以--就像我不能走到你的桌子后面--
english: But you're -- it's the same -- I mean, you can -- like I can't go behind your desk--

name: Ses04M_impro01_F006
chinese: 不，我没有。我没有-
english: Nope, I don't. I don't have-

name: Ses04M_impro01_M008
chinese: 或者我不能去那边-你可以去那个人的桌子后面，只需拿到表格。所以如果你能帮我做那个，那会帮我很多。
english: or I can't go behind there- you can go behind this person's desk and just grab the form. So if you could just do that; that would help me out a lot.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F007
chinese: 不，我不能。那是-
english: No, I can't. That's-

name: Ses04M_impro01_F008
chinese: 对不起。你必须按照这里的方式去做事情。我们有规定。
english: I'm sorry.  You have to do things the way you have to do things here.  We have rules.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M009
chinese: 看，你能不能请你只是-- --让这个--看起来，我看起来--
english: Look, can you please just-- --make this -- look, I look--

name: Ses04M_impro01_F009
chinese: 请排队，先生。后面还有人。你需要
english: Go get in that-- Sir-- Sir, there are people in line behind you. you need

name: Ses04M_impro01_M010
chinese: 看，已经过去两个小时了。你能不能请你让我轻松一点，去拿一下表格？真的不是很麻烦。
english: look-- It's  been- it's been two hours.  Can you please just make this easier on me and just go and get the form?  It's not- it's really not

name: Ses04M_impro01_F010
chinese: 对不起。对不起你正在经历困难。
english: I'm sorry.  I'm sorry you're having a hard time,

name: Ses04M_impro01_F011
chinese: 但是你将不得不去排队。
english: but you're gonna have to go get in  that line to

name: Ses04M_impro01_M011
chinese: 如果我付给你钱怎么样？
english: What if I pay you money?

name: Ses04M_impro01_M012
chinese: 我可以给你钱吗？我可以给你二十块钱，然后你回去拿表格吗？
english: Can I pay you money?  Can I give you, like, twenty bucks and you'll go back there and get the form?

name: Ses04M_impro01_F012
chinese: 二十块钱？拜托了。去那边排队。
english: twenty bucks? Please. Go get in that line over there.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M013
chinese: 来吧。你能请吗？我只是——我看，我不能——只是如果我——
english: Come on.  Will you please?  I just --I look, I  cannot-- --just if I --

name: Ses04M_impro01_F013
chinese: 看，我今天过得真糟糕。我还有二十分钟就下班了，现在我真的不需要这个，好吗？
english: Look, I'm having a really bad day.  I'm off in twenty minutes and I just really don't need this right now, okay.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M014
chinese: 我不在乎，好吧-你过得不好-我刚刚排队等了两个小时。
english: I don't care, well- You're having a bad -- I just waited in line for two hours.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F014
chinese: 而且你将不得不再次等待，因为那是你需要排队的地方。
english: And you're gonna have to go wait again, because that's the line you need.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M015
chinese: 好的，我只是——我不能做那个对吧——你能帮忙拿一下表格吗？你只需要拿一下表格。我不会再向你要求其他任何事情了。
english: Well I just -- I can't do that right -- can you please just grab the form? All you have to do is grab the form.  I'm not gonna ask anything else of you.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F015
chinese: 我不能这样做。这违反了我们的规定。你可以去那边排队，或者你可以选择离开，另外一天再来。也许会有一个更短的队伍。
english: I can't do that. It's against our rules. You can go get in that line over there or you can just go ahead and leave and come back another day.  Maybe there will be a shorter line.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M016
chinese: 那就是我-我只是-那就是我想要你-
english: That's all I- I just- That's all i want you to-

name: Ses04M_impro01_M017
chinese: 规则是，你只需要从别人的桌子后面抓一张纸。
english: Rules, you just have to grab a piece of paper behind from somebody's desk

name: Ses04M_impro01_M018
chinese: 这不是火箭科学。
english: It's not rocket science.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M019
chinese: 请——就，请——就拿表格。它就在那边。
english: Come -- just, please, just grab the form.  It's right over there.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F016
chinese: 我不能做那个。
english: I can't do that.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M020
chinese: 我知道它就在那边。
english: I know it's right over there.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M021
chinese: 为什么你要这么恶毒？
english: Why are you being such a bitch?

name: Ses04M_impro01_F017
chinese: 对不起，但我不能这样做。
english: I'm sorry, but I can't do that.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M022
chinese: 请，请你——请你能否帮我拿一下表格？
english: Please, will you please -- will you please just grab the form?

name: Ses04M_impro01_F018
chinese: 那就去排另一条队或者离开。否则我会让保安把你护送出去。
english: So go get in the other line or leave.  Or I will have you escorted out by security.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F019
chinese: 你想被赶出车管所吗？你不觉得那会有点尴尬吗？
english: Would you like to be kicked out of the D.M.V.?  You don't think that'll be a little embarrassing?

name: Ses04M_impro01_M023
chinese: 好的，是哪一行？
english: Fine, which line is it?

name: Ses04M_impro01_F020
chinese: 你刚刚来自的那个地方。
english: The one you just came from.

name: Ses04M_impro01_M024
chinese: 好的，好吧。我会去那边的。非常感谢。你真的帮了我很多。
english: Okay, fine.  I'll go over there.  Thanks, a lot.  You've been really helpful.

name: Ses04M_impro01_F021
chinese: 是的。谢谢你。祝你有一个愉快的一天。
english: Yeah.  Thank you.  Have a pleasant day.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M000
chinese: 哦，天啊，我只是...我不知道该怎么办。我不知道该怎么办。就像每一份工作，你知道，我去的每一份工作；我申请的每一份工作，
english: Oh, man, I just -- I don't know what to do.  I don't know what to do.  It's like every job, you know, I go to; every job I apply to,

name: Ses04M_impro04_M001
chinese: 就像没有人愿意雇佣我一样。已经过了好几年了，我的意思是，你明白吗，好几年了？就像，你知道我是什么意思，就像我一直在领取失业救济金，已经这么久了，就像我就是，我受不了了。我不知道该怎么办。我的意思是，我就像要疯了。
english: it's just like nobody- nobody wants to hire me. It's been years, I mean, do you understand, years?  Like, I'm -- you know what I mean, it's like I've been collecting unemployment for so long now, it's just like I just -- I can't take it.  I don't know what to do.  I mean, I'm just like losing my mind.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F000
chinese: 嗯，肯定有一些你还没有尝试过的东西。
english: Well there has to be something you haven't tried.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M002
chinese: 我-我不是在开玩笑。我已经尝试了一切。就像我去了每家企业和当地的地方，你知道的。
english: I-I'm not kidding.  I've tried everything.  Like I've gone to every business and local, you know,

name: Ses04M_impro04_M003
chinese: 当地的商业区，我找不到任何东西。就像，没有人-
english: local business in- in the area and I can't- I can't get anything.  Like, nobody -

name: Ses04M_impro04_F001
chinese: 怎么样像一个临时工代理机构？
english: What about like a temp agency?

name: Ses04M_impro04_F002
chinese: 你去过临时工机构注册了吗？也许他们可以帮忙。
