english: Have you gone, like, signed up with a temp agency?  Maybe they can help.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M004
chinese: 现在几乎没有可用的工作。我的意思是，就像，天哪。
english: there's just like no jobs available.  I mean, it's just like, God.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M005
chinese: 是的，我试过那个。然后就像，是的，我做过一件事情一次。但是，就像，那不是持久的，也不足以维持生活。
english: Yeah, I tried that.  And there was like, yeah, like I did like one thing once.  But, like, that's not -- it doesn't last very long.  And it's not enough to live on.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F003
chinese: 没错，但是你必须坚持跟进。你必须不断地打电话并提醒他们你还在寻找。
english: Right, but you have -- I mean, you have to keep on them.  You have to keep calling and reminding them that you're still looking and

name: Ses04M_impro04_F004
chinese: 我的意思是，你必须对此非常积极。
english: I mean, you have to be really aggressive about it.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M006
chinese: 是的，我明白。我明白。你不理解。
english: Yeah, I do.  I do.  You don't understand.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M007
chinese: 我-你不明白。我没有工作。全部-我的工作就是找工作。我没有做其他任何事情。
english: I- You don't understand. I don't have a job.  All- My job is to look for a job.  I don't do anything else.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M008
chinese: 但是，就像，现在已经过了好几年了，但我似乎找不到任何真正合适的东西。就是这样——我——这让我完全疯了。
english: But, like, it's been years now and I just can't seem to get anything that really fits.  It's just it -- I -- it drives me absolutely insane.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F005
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，如果情况那么糟糕，也许你不得不接受一些并不完全适合你的事情，你知道的。比如也许你得暂时做些其他的事情。找一个新的领域，新的技能。
english: Well, I mean, if it's that bad, maybe you're gonna have to take something that doesn't really fit, you know.  Like maybe you'll have to do something else for a while.  Find a new field, new skill.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M009
chinese: 不，不，不，不，不。我不能-我不能做那个。我不能，因为如果我不-如果我不-如果我不做我喜欢的事情，那我就不能-我不能-我的意思是-这有什么意义呢？
english: No, no, no, no, no.  I can't- I can't do that.  I can't, I- because if I'm not- if I'm not- if I'm not doing something that I love, then I can't -- I can't- I mean it's- what's the point?

name: Ses04M_impro04_F006
chinese: 那么你选择失业，真的。
english: Well then you're choosing to be unemployed, really.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M010
chinese: 我不选择。我不-
english: I'm not choosing. I'm not-

name: Ses04M_impro04_F007
chinese: 如果你不愿意尝试并努力去解决问题，找到一些解决办法，你知道的，我是说，有一些事情你可以做的。
english: If you're not willing to try and work with it and find something and, you know, I mean, there are things you could do.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M011
chinese: 不，但我在尝试，但是所有的事情都是这样，我申请了所有这些地方，但没有一个
english: No, but I'm try- but like all the things that I-it's like I apply to all these places and none of them

name: Ses04M_impro04_M012
chinese: -- 我的意思是，我不明白。就像是--我的意思是，我觉得我足够有资格。我只是不明白。就像，我的意思是，这只是一种情况，但已经过去了三年，你知道的，三年了。
english: -- I mean, I don't understand.  It's like -- I mean, I feel like I'm qualified enough.  I just don't understand.  Like, I mean, it's just like a matter of circumstance, but it's been three years, you know, three years.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F008
chinese: 也许，你知道，你的运气不好，而且你所在的行业市场也不景气，也许你只需要考虑暂时转行做其他事情。
english: Well maybe, you know, your luck it is just down and the market for your particular field is down and maybe you just need to look into doing something else for a while.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M013
chinese: 这很愚蠢。
english: This is stupid.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F009
chinese: 我的意思是，我并不是说你应该，你知道的--
english: I mean, I'm not saying that you should, you know--

name: Ses04M_impro04_M014
chinese: 你知道吗，这是你的错。
english: You know what, this is your fault.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F010
chinese: 请问有什么事？
english: Excuse me?

name: Ses04M_impro04_M015
chinese: 这是你的错，因为你总是告诉我要做这个，但我做了那个。我没有听取你的建议，但你似乎在告诉我-
english: It's your fault 'cause -cause you always told me to- to do this and I did that instead.  And I didn't take your advice and - and- but you sort of were like were telling--

name: Ses04M_impro04_F011
chinese: 这是我的错，因为你没有按照我告诉你的做。
english: It's my fault 'cause you didn't do what I told you to?

name: Ses04M_impro04_M016
chinese: 是的，完全正确。
english: Yeah, exactly.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F012
chinese: 那听起来像是你的错。
english: Well that sounds like your fault.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F013
chinese: 你没有做我告诉你要做的事。
english: You didn't do what I told you to do.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M018
chinese: 这是因为你总是告诉我做错事。而这一次我以为通过做相反的事情我会是对的。所以这是你的错，因为
english: That's 'cause you always tell me to do the wrong thing.  And I thought this time it was -- I was gonna be right by going with the opposite thing. So it's your fault because

name: Ses04M_impro04_M019
chinese: 因为你总是错的，而且这次你是对的。而且我没有——是的，这就是为什么。
english: -because you were always wrong and-and-and this time you were right. And-and I didn't -- yeah, that's why.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F014
chinese: 这真是令人惊讶的逻辑，你竟然把责任推到我身上。
english: That's amazing logic that you managed to turn that around and make it my fault.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M020
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，这是有道理的，不是吗，嗯？
english: Well, I mean, it makes sense, doesn't it, hmm?

name: Ses04M_impro04_F015
chinese: 我认为你可能找不到工作是因为你不愿意对自己的行为负责。
english: I think maybe you can't get employed because you aren't willing to take responsibility for your own actions.

name: Ses04M_impro04_M021
chinese: 那不是真的。我对自己的行为负责。
english: That's not true.  I take responsibility for my own actions.

name: Ses04M_impro04_F016
chinese: 真的吗？你没有工作是谁的错？
english: Really?  Whose fault is it you don't have a job?

name: Ses04M_impro04_M022
chinese: 你的。我不--
english: Yours.  I don't--

name: Ses04M_impro04_F017
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro04_F018
chinese: 你看到你刚刚做的事情了吗？
english: You see what you just did there, though?

name: Ses04M_impro04_M023
chinese: 我没有-不，我没有。对不起。我完全搞砸了这件事。你可以停下来，我猜。
english: I had- No, I don't.  I'm sorry.  I just totally screwed this one up.  You can stop it I guess.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M000
chinese: 欢迎来到西北航空公司。我能帮您什么忙吗？
english: Welcome to Northwest Airlines.  How can I help you?

name: Ses04F_impro05_F000
chinese: 你们弄丢了我的包。
english: You guys lost my bag.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M001
chinese: 你已经提交了投诉吗？
english: Did you file a complaint already?

name: Ses04F_impro05_F001
chinese: 是的。是的，我做了。
english: Yeah.  Yeah I did.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M002
chinese: 你在哪里做的？是在前台还是在行李认领处？
english: Where?  Did you do it at the front desk or by the baggage claims?

name: Ses04F_impro05_F002
chinese: 我...我不知道。他们告诉我去的地方。看，他们告诉我来找你们，因为你们弄丢了我的行李。现在已经晚了。不是说很快就会送来，而是完全丢失了。你们打算怎么处理这个问题？
english: I-I don't know.  The place where they told me to go.  Look they told me to come talk to you because you guys lost my bag.  Not it's late.  Not it will be here soon, lost it completely.  What are you going to do about that?

name: Ses04F_impro05_M003
chinese: 女士，首先我希望您冷静下来。其次-
english: Ma'am, first of all I'd like you to calm down.  Second of all-

name: Ses04F_impro05_F003
chinese: 看，那个包里装着我整个生活，而你刚刚把它弄丢了。
english: Look that bag has my entire life in it and you just lost it.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M004
chinese: 我理解，夫人。
english: I understand that ma'am.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F004
chinese: 迷失了，就像，我的意思是，
english: Lost it just, like, I mean,

name: Ses04F_impro05_M005
chinese: 女士，我理解。
english: Ma'am, I understand that.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F005
chinese: 这不是消失在空气中了。有人没有注意到。
english: it's not like it just disappeared into thin air. Somebody wasn't paying attention

name: Ses04F_impro05_F006
chinese: 因为我的包很容易被注意到。它上面有很大的、彩虹色的东西，但是没有人注意到，因为现在它就不见了。
english: because my bag was very easy to keep track of.  It's got big, you know, rainbow colored crap all over it and no one was paying attention because now it's just gone.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M006
chinese: 我理解。此刻我能为您做的最好的是给您一张五十美元的支票，这是西北航空公司为了弥补您因行李丢失而带来的不便而提供的。
english: I understand that.  The best I can do for you, at this moment, is give you fifty dollar check courtesy of Northwest Airlines for inconveniencing you in losing your luggage.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F007
chinese: 等一下。什么？
english: Wait.  What?

name: Ses04F_impro05_M007
chinese: 此刻，我能为你做的只有给你-
english: At this moment in time, all I can do for you is give you-

name: Ses04F_impro05_F008
chinese: 不。不。我听到了-我听到了你说的话。
english: No. No. I heard- I heard what you said.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F009
chinese: 你是在开玩笑吧。你要给我五十美元来完全赔偿我的包，包括里面的所有东西，以及我所经历的不便。我已经为我的机票付费了。我只希望能安全地到达目的地，并带着我的东西。这样要求太过分吗？我觉得要求你们把我的包放在我离开的地方，然后把我的包放在我到达的地方并不是什么大不了的事情。
english: You're kidding me, right.  You're going to give me fifty dollars to completely cover my bag, everything that was in it, the inconvenience that I've gone through.  I paid for my ticket.  All I expect is to safely get to my destination with my stuff.  Is that so much to ask?  I mean I really don't think that's that big a deal to ask you guys to have my bag in the place where I leave and then put my bag where I end up.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M008
chinese: 你现在非常兴奋。
english: you're getting very excited right now

name: Ses04F_impro05_F010
chinese: 是的，那里面有我所有的东西。
english: Yeah, well that's got everything I have in it.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M009
chinese: 我理解，女士，但现在我真的没什么可以为您做的。
english: I understand that, ma'am but there's not really much I can do for you right now.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F011
chinese: 看，五十美元是不能接受的。我的包本身就花了一百五十美元以上。你不能只给我一个五十美元的礼品券，然后就像那样把我打发走，好像那就足够了。好像我只需要五十美元一样。我的包比那更值钱。
english: Look fifty dollars is unacceptable.  My bag itself cost over a hundred and fifty dollars.  You can't just give me fifty dollar gift certificate to Percoes or whatever the hell and then send me off like that's- that's good enough.  Like that's all I needed was fifty dollars.  My bag is worth more than that.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M010
chinese: 我需要你做的是填写另一份投诉表格。在行李认领处前台附近有一张表格可以填写。
english: What I need you to do is file another complaint form. There's a form that you can fill out over by the front desk near the baggage claim.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M011
chinese: 如果您愿意把那个带到前台-女士。
english: If you'd like to take that over to the front desk- Ma'am.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M012
chinese: 我们只是互相说话而已。
english: We're just talking over each other.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M013
chinese: 我们不会以这种方式进行任何沟通。
english: We're not going to communicate anything this way.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F012
chinese: 我希望负责我的行李的航空公司能够给我一个等值的行李和其中的所有物品。
english: I expect your airline who was responsible for my bag to give me the equivalent of the bag and all of the things in it.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M014
chinese: 女士，在乘坐西北航空公司的飞机时，您同意了
english: Ma'am in flying with Northwest Airlines you agreed to

name: Ses04F_impro05_M015
chinese: 将你的行李签收给
english: sign away your luggage to the

name: Ses04F_impro05_F013
chinese: 我没有签署任何文件。我没有签署任何文件。你们必须做些什么-
english: I didn't sign anything. I didn't sign anything. And you people have got to make-

name: Ses04F_impro05_M016
chinese: 这是小部分-这是购买机票时的一部分协议，当你购买机票时，有-当你-
english: It's part of the small- it's part of the agreement when you're purchasing an airline ticket, there's- when you-

name: Ses04F_impro05_F014
chinese: 你必须为你弄丢了我的包和所有东西而做出赔偿。五十美元是不能接受的。
english: You have to make amends for what you did for losing my bag and all of my stuff.  Fifty dollars is unacceptable.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M017
chinese: 女士，请冷静下来。当您购买一张票时，会有一些条款和协议。
english: Ma'am, please calm down.  When you purchase a ticket, there is a terms and agreement,

name: Ses04F_impro05_F015
chinese: 不。不。我不知道。你知道吗？我要打电话给我的律师。你知道吗？这就是我要做的。我要打电话给我的律师，让他过来向你解释这是一个不可接受的选择。
english: No.  No.  I don't know. You know what? I'm going to call my lawyer. You know what?  That's what I'm going to do.  I'm going to call my lawyer and have him get down here and explain to you that this is an unacceptable option.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M018
chinese: 条款和条件-在购买票务协议中。大多数人经常浏览它。
english: terms and conditions- in the agreement of purchasing a ticket. Most people frequently look it over

name: Ses04F_impro05_M019
chinese: 我们能为您做的最好的就是给您-
english: The best that we can do for you is give you-

name: Ses04F_impro05_M020
chinese: 女士。
english: Ma'am.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F016
chinese: 我想和你们的主管谈话。
english: I want to talk to your supervisor.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M021
chinese: 我是-我是-我是我自己的主管。
english: I am- I am- I am my own supervisor.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F017
chinese: 我受够了。我想要谈话-不，不可接受，我想要和你的主管谈话。我对这件事已经完成了。
english: I've had enough.  I want to talk to-no, no unacceptable I want to your supervisor. I am done with this.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M022
chinese: 我是主管，女士。
english: I am the supervisor, ma'am.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F018
chinese: 真的吗，你不为任何人工作吗？只是你一个人吗？
english: Really, you don't work for anybody.  It's just you?

name: Ses04F_impro05_M023
chinese: 我是当前值班经理。
english: I am the current manager on duty.

name: Ses04F_impro05_F019
chinese: 好的。我想要打电话给你的上级，也就是你的老板，因为我对这家航空公司已经受够了，我已经等够了我的五十美元礼品券。
english: Okay.  Well I want to call whoever you report to, whoever your boss is because I have had enough with this airline and I am finished waiting for my fifty dollar gift certificate.

name: Ses04F_impro05_M024
chinese: 女士，我拥有西北航空公司。
english: Ma'am, I own Northwest Airlines.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她？
english: Why did he invite her?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事让你烦恼？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F001
chinese: 已经过去三年了。为什么突然间？
english: It's been three years.  Why all of a sudden?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M001
chinese: 也许-也许他只是想再次见到她。
english: Well maybe- maybe he just wanted to see her again.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？他一直在女孩的隔壁长大。他为什么不想再见她呢？
english: What do you mean?  He was brought up next door to the girl his whole life.  Why shouldn't he want to see her again?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M003
chinese: 不要那样看着我。他对我说的和对你说的一样少。
english: Don't look at me like that.  He didn't tell me anymore than he told you.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F003
chinese: 她不打算嫁给他。
english: She's not going to marry him.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M004
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking about it?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F004
chinese: 它有那种感觉。
english: It's got that about it.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M005
chinese: 好的，那又怎样。
english: Well so what.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here, Joe?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M006
chinese: 听着，孩子。
english: Listen kid.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F006
chinese: 不，排队。
english: No, line.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M007
chinese: 嗯，那为什么她还是他的女孩，乔？
english: Uh, Then why is she still-she's not his girl, Joe

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F007
chinese: 她不是他的女孩，乔。她知道她不是。
english: She's not his girl, Joe.  She knows she's not.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M008
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F008
chinese: 那她为什么还是单身呢？纽约到处都是男人。为什么她还没有结婚？
english: Then why is she still single?  New York is full of men.  Why hasn't she married?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F009
chinese: 大概有一百个人告诉她她很愚蠢，但她还是等待着。
english: Probably a hundred people told her she's foolish but she's waited.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M009
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she waited?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F010
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的，所以她像石头一样忠诚。
english: Because she knows what I know that's why.  She's faithful as a rock.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F011
chinese: 在我最糟糕的时刻，我想到她在等待，我再次知道我是对的。
english: In my worst moments, I think of her waiting and I know again that I'm right.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M010
chinese: 看，今天天气很好。我们为什么要争论呢？
english: Look it's a nice day.  What are we arguing for?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F012
chinese: 在这个家里，没有人敢夺走她的信仰，乔。陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares take her faith away, Joe.  Strangers might but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M011
chinese: 你想让我做什么？
english: What do you want me to do?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F013
chinese: 我希望你们俩表现得好像他会回来一样。自从他邀请她以来，我注意到你们俩了，别以为我没注意到。我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I want you to act like he's coming back, both of you.  Don't think I haven't noticed you since he invited her.  I won't stand for any nonsense.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M012
chinese: 但是凯特-
english: But Kate-

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F014
chinese: 因为如果他不回来，我会自杀。
english: Because if he's not coming back, I'll kill myself.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F015
chinese: 笑，嘲笑我，但为什么她回来的那天晚上会发生那件事？
english: Laugh, laugh at me, but why did that happen the very night she came back?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F016
chinese: 她在他的房间里入睡，他的纪念品碎成了碎片。看，看着它。乔-
english: She goes to sleep in his room and his memorial breaks in pieces.  Look, look at it.  Joe-

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F017
chinese: 和我一起相信，乔。我不能独自站立。
english: Believe with me, Joe.  I can't stand alone.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M014
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F018
chinese: 就在上周，一个比Larry失踪时间更长的男人出现在底特律。你亲自看到了。
english: Just last week a man showed up in Detroit missing longer than Larry.  You read it yourself.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M015
chinese: 好的。好的。冷静一点。
english: Alright.  Alright.  Calm yourself.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F019
chinese: 你最重要的是要相信。你。
english: You above all have got to believe.  You.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M016
chinese: 为什么是我中的所有人？
english: Why me above all?

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F020
chinese: 只是不要停止相信。
english: Just don't stop believing.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M017
chinese: 这是什么意思，我最重要吗？看看你，你在发抖。
english: What does that mean, me above all?  Look at you.  You're shaking.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_F021
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses04F_script01_2_M018
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide?  What the hell is matter with you Kate?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F000
chinese: 你好。感谢您致电Dell Taco公司。我可以帮助您吗？
english: Hello.  Thank you for calling Dell Taco Corporate.  Can I help you?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M000
chinese: 是的，嗯。我一直在努力联系能够退款的人，嗯，我的钱。
english: Yeah, um.  I have been trying to reach somebody who will refund, uh, my money.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M001
chinese: 嗯，基本上，嗯，我-我点了一些食物。
english: Um, I basically, um I- I ordered some food

name: Ses04F_impro08_M002
chinese: 嗯，一切都相当不对劲。所有的订单都搞乱了。
english: um and everything was pretty much uh- uh- just not done right. All the orders were messed up.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F001
chinese: 好的。那么，您是否通过自动菜单进行了操作？大部分您的请求都可以通过那个来处理。
english: Okay.  Well, Did you go through the automated menu?  Most of your requests can be taken care of through that.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M003
chinese: 是的，我做到了，但那个- 我联系到了一个接线员，她把我转接给了另外三个人。
english: Yes, I did and that didn't- I got through to, like, one operator and she sent me to like three others

name: Ses04F_impro08_M004
chinese: 现在我正在和你说话。我只想要我的钱退回来。这就是我所要求的。并不多。
english: and now I'm talking to you.  And all I want is my money back.  That's all I'm asking for. It's not much.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F002
chinese: 好的。嗯，我很乐意-
english: Okay.  Well I'd be happy to-

name: Ses04F_impro08_M005
chinese: 如果你能给我那个，那我就不再打扰你了。而且，如果我也能-什么？
english: If you could just give me that, then I will leave you alone. And just- if i could also- What?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F003
chinese: 好的，先生。我很乐意帮助您。
english: Okay, sir.  I'd be happy to help you.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F004
chinese: 先生，你能告诉我你去了哪个分行吗？我们可以从那里开始。
english: Sir, can- can you tell me which branch you went to.  We can start there.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M006
chinese: 是的，比弗利山庄。
english: Yeah, Beverley Hills.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F005
chinese: 好的。嗯，投诉是什么？
english: Okay.  Um, and what was the complaint?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M007
chinese: 食物准备得不正确。
english: The food was prepared incorrectly.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M008
chinese: 我要求不要番茄。
english: I asked for no tomatoes.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F006
chinese: 您能再具体一点吗，先生？
english: Can you be a little more specific, sir?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M009
chinese: 我要求六个玉米卷里不要放西红柿。但是所有的玉米卷上都放了西红柿和洋葱。
english: I asked for no tomatoes on six tacos.  I got tomatoes and onions on all of them,

name: Ses04F_impro08_M010
chinese: 嗯，六个中有三个发现了头发。
english: Um, hairs were found in three out of the six.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F007
chinese: 您尝试过拿回商品并修复您的订单吗，先生？
english: Did you try to take them back and get your order fixed, sir?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M011
chinese: 是的。我这样做了，他们说你必须向公司提出投诉，我说好吧。我会在今天结束之前解决你的问题，所以现在我正在努力做到这一点。
english: Yeah.  I did and they're like you've got to take it up with corporate, and I'm like well fine.  I'll have your ass by the end of the day and so now I'm trying to do that.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F008
chinese: 非常抱歉，先生。他们应该在那个特定的分行处理此事。对此我深感抱歉，但我们可以帮助您。不用担心，我们可以处理这个问题。那么您需要退款多少？
english: Well I'm very sorry, sir.  They should have dealt with it at that particular branch.  I apologize for that, uh, but we can help you.  That's no worries.  We can take care of that.  So how much did you need to be refunded?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M012
chinese: 这是一百六十美元。对不起，嗯，十六美元。
english: It was a hundred a sixty dollars.  I'm sorry, uh, sixteen dollars.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F009
chinese: 好的。嗯，我将会把您转接到另一个部门。他们需要您的地址。
english: Okay.  Um, I'm going to go ahead and transfer you over to another department.  They'll need your address.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M013
chinese: 看，我不想被转接到另一个地方-我只想给你我的姓名和地址，这样你就可以给我寄支票。
english: Look, I don't want to be transferred over to another- All I want to do is just give you my name and address so you can send me a check.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M014
chinese: 好的。你明白这就是我想要的全部。只是不要给我带来麻烦。好吗，请因为我现在非常敏感。
english: Okay.  You understand that's all I want. Just don't give me a problem with this.  Okay, please because I'm very sensitive right now

name: Ses04F_impro08_M015
chinese: 如果我被转接到另一个操作员，我将不得不再次讲述同样的烦人故事。我不-我想我快要疯了。所以如果你能不这样做，那就太好了。谢谢。
english: and if I get sent to another operator, I'll have to tell them the same damn story again.  I don't- I think I'm just going to lose my mind.  So if you could please just not do that, that would be great.  Thank you.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F010
chinese: 我明白，先生。我会向他们解释情况。
english: I understand, sir.  I will explain to them what the situa-

name: Ses04F_impro08_M016
chinese: 你不理解是因为你从未去过Del Taco并获得过我所获得的服务。你不理解。
english: You don't understand because you've never gone to Del Taco and gotten the service that I've gotten.  You don't understand.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F011
chinese: 您说得对，先生。这是您特定的情况，但我会给另一个操作员打电话。我会向他们解释发生了什么。您不需要再次讲述您的故事。
english: You're right sir.  It is your particular situation but I will call the other operator.  I will explain to them what's going on. You won't have to tell your story again.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M017
chinese: 你不会打电话给另一个操作员。你不会打电话给另一个操作员。
english: You're not going to call the other operator. You're not going to call the the other operator.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M018
chinese: 你将要在你的桌子上填写一张表格。
english: You're going to fill out a form on your desk

name: Ses04F_impro08_M019
chinese: 因为我知道你现在在你愚蠢的公司大楼的办公桌前，你将给我寄一张16美元42美分的支票。
english: because I know you're at a desk right now in your stupid corporate building and you're going to send me a check for sixteen dollars and forty two cents.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F012
chinese: 好的，先生。他们-他们必须-
english: Okay, sir.  They- they have to-

name: Ses04F_impro08_F013
chinese: 先生。
english: Sir.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F014
chinese: 先生，他们必须在另一个站点记录下您的地址。我会转告的。我会向他们解释一切。一切都会好的。我保证。
english: Sir, they have to take down your address at the other station.  I will transfer.  I will explain everything to them.  It will all be fine.  I promise.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M020
chinese: 你叫什么名字？
english: What's your name?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F015
chinese: 你好，Cindy？
english: Cindy?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M021
chinese: 你好吗？
english: Cinnee?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F016
chinese: 辛迪。
english: Cindy.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M022
chinese: 辛迪？辛迪什么？
english: Cindy?  Cindy what?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F017
chinese: 先生，我不认为我的名字真的很重要。
english: Sir, I don't think my name is really relevant-

name: Ses04F_impro08_M023
chinese: 辛迪，看着点。如果你不拿一张有支票的纸的话。
english: Cindy, look.  If you don't get your ass a piece of paper that has a check

name: Ses04F_impro08_M024
chinese: 如果你不将附件发送给我，我会非常生气。
english: attached to it and you don't send it to me, I'm going to get very upset.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F018
chinese: 好的，先生。先生，我将把您转接到该地址。
english: Alright, sir. Sir.  I'm going to transfer you to the address.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F019
chinese: 好的。你知道吗，先生。顾客永远是对的。
english: Alright.  You know what, sir.  The customer is always right.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M025
chinese: 你知道吗。我- 你知道吗？你知道吗？不，没事。没事，没事。你知道吗？
english: You know what.  I- You know what? You know what? No, it's fine. it's fine it's fine You know what?

name: Ses04F_impro08_F020
chinese: 我会继续前进，我会带走-我会带走
english: I will go ahead and I will take- I will take

name: Ses04F_impro08_M026
chinese: 嘿，辛迪。辛迪，听着，我知道这不是你的错。你想做什么就做吧。
english: Hey, Cindy. Cindy, look I know this is not your fault.  Do whatever you want.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M027
chinese: 把我转接给任何一个接线员。我只是- 你知道吗？我真的不想再继续了。我真的不想再继续了。我已经失去了所有的希望。
english: Send me to whatever operator. I just- You know what?  I'm just done.  I'm just done.  I've lost all hope.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F021
chinese: 先生，客户满意是我们的首要目标。我将亲自记录下您的电话号码和地址。
english: Sir, customer satisfaction is our first goal.  I will go ahead and take your number and your address down myself.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M028
chinese: 拿回我的十六美元。没关系，真的。
english: of getting my sixteen dollars back. It fine, no honestly.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M029
chinese: 不，辛迪甚至不看都不看。因为我-看辛迪，我知道你不在乎我，好吗。我知道我只是像其他人一样打电话的人-
english: No, Cindy just don't even-look don't even.  Cuz I- look Cindy I know you don't care about me, okay.  I know that I'm just like another person who calls-

name: Ses04F_impro08_F022
chinese: 等一下。但是我-
english: Wait. But I-

name: Ses04F_impro08_F023
chinese: 但是我正在给你你想要的。
english: But I'm giving you what you want.

name: Ses04F_impro08_M030
chinese: 不，这没关系。没关系。没关系。只要把我转接给下一个操作员就行了。没问题。
english: No it doesn't matter.  It's fine.  It's fine.  Just send me to the next operator.  That's fine.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F024
chinese: 好的。如果这是你想要的，你想去找下一个人吗？
english: Okay.  If that's what you want, you want to go to the next person?

name: Ses04F_impro08_M031
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses04F_impro08_F025
chinese: 好的。太棒了。
english: Okay.  Great.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M000
chinese: 嘿，我，嗯。对于发生的事情我真的很抱歉。我不知道-我的意思是你能做什么呢？我的意思是-
english: Hey, I'm, uh. I'm really sorry about what happened.  I don't um- I mean what you can you do?  I mean it's-

name: Ses04F_impro06_F000
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M001
chinese: 当我七岁的时候，我的奶奶去世了，我真的-我不知道，我的意思是，放手真的很难，但重要的是-是你要放手，你要意识到，你知道，他们-你知道，他们-这个人在他们在这里的时候玩得很开心，嗯，你知道，你要努力克服它。
english: When I was seven, my- my grandmother died and I really- I don't know, I mean it was really hard to let go but the important thing is- is that you do let go and your realize that, you know, they- you know, they- this person had fun while they were- while they were here and, uh, you know, you work- you work through it.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F001
chinese: 你知道，这只是，我只是，你知道，我的意思是它只是发生了。我只是，就像-我只是一直期待他走进来，你知道。
english: You know it's just, I just, you know, I mean it just happened.  I just, like- I just keep expecting him to walk in, you know.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M002
chinese: 嗯嗯。是的。是的。我的意思是- 这很困难。这很困难。
english: Mmhmm. Yeah.  Yeah.  I mean it's- it's hard.  It's hard.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F002
chinese: 我只是-我只是觉得他会活得更久一些，你知道的，因为我-我的意思是当他发现自己生病时，我们知道那不是好事，但我只是-我只是觉得会需要更长时间，你知道吗？
english: I just- I just thought he would have longer, you know, because I'm- I mean when he found out he was sick, we knew that wasn't good but I just- I just thought that it would take longer, you know?

name: Ses04F_impro06_M003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M004
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，你知道的，我的意思是，那种情况下，我的意思是，
english: Well I mean, you know, I mean it was I mean with that kind of condition,

name: Ses04F_impro06_F003
chinese: 是的。我知道。我知道。
english: Yeah. I know. I know.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M005
chinese: 你知道，这是不可避免的，我是说，老实说，这几乎就像是
english: you know, it's inevitable  and I mean honestly it's- it's almost like

name: Ses04F_impro06_M006
chinese: 你知道的，你不知道，你知道，你想让这个人经历多久，你知道。
english: you know, you don't- you know, how long do you want the person to go through that, you know.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M007
chinese: 它有点- 它几乎比他活在痛苦中更好地安息。
english: It's sort of- it's almost better off to rest in peace than he is to live in pain.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F004
chinese: 是的，我知道。但我宁愿他和我在一起，你知道的。这太不公平了。我的意思是他-他什么都没做。我的意思是他-
english: Yeah, I know. But I'd rather have him here with me, you know. It's just not fair.  I mean he- he didn't get to do like anything. I mean he was-

name: Ses04F_impro06_F005
chinese: 他只有二十四岁，我们本来要做很多事情的，你知道的，现在他将无法做到这些，也无法在我做到时陪伴在我身边。你知道的，比如有一天我会结婚，他将不在那里，他将无法见证这一切。
english: He was only twenty four and just so many things that we were going to do, you know, and now he won't get to do them and he won't get to be here when I do.  You know, like I'll get married some day and he won't be there, like, he won't get to see that.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M008
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F006
chinese: 这似乎不公平。
english: It just doesn't seem fair.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M009
chinese: 这不公平，但我的意思是，你知道，生活的过程就是这样，你遇到人，然后失去他们。
english: It's not fair but I mean that's, you know, the course of life is that, you know, you meet people and you lose them.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M010
chinese: 你还好
english: You're okay

name: Ses04F_impro06_F007
chinese: 谢谢你来到这里。
english: Thank you for being here.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M011
chinese: 你知道，我想-我想我们应该庆祝，因为我认为那是他想要的。
english: You know I think- I think we should celebrate because I think that's what he would have wanted.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F008
chinese: [笑声] 你可能是对的。如果我们都坐在那里为此感到沮丧，他可能会生气。他会希望我们举办一个派对。
english: [LAUGHTER] You're probably right.  He probably would be pissed if we were all sitting around being upset about it. He'd want us to have a party.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M012
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F009
chinese: 为了向他致敬而喝酒。【笑声】
english: And to drink in his honor. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04F_impro06_M013
chinese: 没错。没错。我的意思是他希望我们庆祝他的生命，享受我们余下的生活，尽可能地快乐。
english: That's right.  That's right.  I mean he would want us to, you know, celebrate the life that he- that he lived and, you know, enjoy the rest of ours as much as we can.

name: Ses04F_impro06_F010
chinese: 是的，我知道。
english: Yeah, I know.

name: Ses04F_impro06_M014
chinese: 所-
english: So-

name: Ses04M_impro03_M000
chinese: 嗯，嗯，好吧，我只是想告诉你，我实际上向凯特求婚了，我们要结婚了。
english: So, um, well, I just -- I kind of wanted to, you know, tell you that I'm actually -- I proposed to Kate and we're going to get married.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F000
chinese: 等等，什么？
english: Wait, what?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M001
chinese: 是的。是的，我昨天向她求婚了。我们现在订婚了，大约八个月后我们将结婚。
english: Yeah. Yeah, I proposed to her yesterday. We're getting -- we're engaged now and we're going to -- we're going to get married in about eight months.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F001
chinese: 哦，我的天。恭喜。
english: Oh, my God.  Congratulations.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M002
chinese: 是的，真是太神奇了，对吧？
english: Yeah, it's pretty amazing, huh?

name: Ses04M_impro03_F002
chinese: 我不明白 - 你是怎么做到的？发生了什么事？
english: I can't -- how did you do it?  What happened?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M003
chinese: 好吧，我决定带她去航海。
english: Well I decided to take her sailing

name: Ses04M_impro03_M004
chinese: 我们刚刚在水上，你知道，我就是——我带着戒指。然后我说，我们就这样吧。她说好，然后我们就结婚了。
english: and we were just out on the water and, you know, I just -- I had the ring with me.  And I was like let's do this.  And she was like okay and then we're getting married.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F003
chinese: [笑声] 嗯，你描绘了一个浪漫的画面。
english: [LAUGHTER] Well you paint a romantic picture.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M005
chinese: 嗯，我不想让它变得很俗气，你知道的。
english: Well I didn't want it to be like cheesy, you know.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F004
chinese: 她哭了吗？
english: Did she cry?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M006
chinese: 她没有哭，但她笑得很多，而且非常兴奋，所以...
english: She didn't cry, but she was laughing a lot and it was very exciting, so...

name: Ses04M_impro03_F005
chinese: 哦，我的天。你计划做这件事多久了？
english: Oh, my God.  How long have you been planning on doing this?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M007
chinese: 老实说，它有点快。实际上，只是在过去几个月内。
english: Honestly, it was kind of quickly.  It was actually only in the past couple months.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F006
chinese: 我简直不敢相信。你要结婚了。太疯狂了！
english: I can't believe this.  You're getting married. It's crazy!

name: Ses04M_impro03_M008
chinese: 是的。是的。我知道。我知道。我知道。这很奇怪，因为它就像是我余生的开始，你知道的。
english: Yeah. Yeah. So- I know.  I know. I know.  It's weird 'cause it's like the beginning of the rest of my life, you know.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F007
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yeah, it is.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M009
chinese: 但是，嗯，不，我的意思是，你知道的。你知道，我真的希望你喜欢，你知道，有点儿。
english: But uh- no, I mean, you know.  You know, I really want you to like, you know, sort of

name: Ses04M_impro03_M010
chinese: 帮助Kate一起规划一些事情。我的意思是，如果你愿意的话。我是说，你们俩已经是好朋友了，所以我想，你们如果想的话，就可以一起做这样的事情。我是说，你知道的，我相信你们会喜欢这样的事情。
english: help Kate out with like planning stuff. I mean, if you want to.  I mean, you guys are good friends anyway so I figured, you know, if you guys want to like -- I mean, you know, I'm sure you enjoy that kind of thing.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F008
chinese: 是的，我很愿意。谢谢。【笑声】
english: Yeah, I would love to. Thanks. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro03_M011
chinese: 好的。嗯，就是这样。
english: Okay. Well there you go.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F009
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，你们有没有讨论过你们要在哪里结婚或者--
english: Oh, my God, where -- have you guys talked about where you're going to get married or--

name: Ses04M_impro03_M012
chinese: 我认为我们要去夏威夷，然后让大家都飞过去。
english: I think we're going to -- we're going to -- we want to do it in Hawaii and just fly everybody in.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F010
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my God.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M013
chinese: 我只是因为，我的意思是，夏威夷有最好的水果自助餐。所以我只是想说忘记，你知道，所有的肉类和那些东西。
english: I just -- 'cause, I mean, Hawaii just has like the best fruit buffets.  And so I'm just going to say forget, you know, all like kind of meats and all that stuff.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M014
chinese: 这只是一个全水果自助餐婚礼，再加上一个蛋糕。
english: It's just going to be like a all fruit--fruit buffet wedding, plus a cake.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F011
chinese: 你打算像在海滩上赤脚结婚还是更正式一点？比如在教堂里。
english: Are you going to get married like on the beach barefoot or like fancier?  Like in a church.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M015
chinese: 赤脚？
english: Barefoot?

name: Ses04M_impro03_F012
chinese: 嗯，我不知道。只是随便说说。
english: Well I don't know.  Throwing it out there.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M016
chinese: 嗯，不，不，不。它会在海滩附近的一个公园里。
english: Um, no, no, no.  It'll be in like a park near the beach.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F013
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M017
chinese: 是的。但我真的很兴奋。所以每个人都会出来，这将是一个很棒的时光。而且--
english: Yeah.  But I'm really excited.  So and everybody's going to come out and it'll be a great time.  And--

name: Ses04M_impro03_F014
chinese: 你打算办一个盛大的婚礼还是只想办一个非常小的，比如只有家人和亲密的朋友？或者，我的意思是--
english: Are you going to have a big wedding or like keep it really small like just, you know, family and really close friends?  Or, I mean--

name: Ses04M_impro03_M018
chinese: 它会有点小，但不是很小，你知道的。我想要尽可能多的人能够飞到夏威夷并在那里住宿。
english: It'll be kind of small, but not, you know, not tiny, you know.  I want to have, you know, as many people as we can afford to fly out to Hawaii and put up there for--

name: Ses04M_impro03_F015
chinese: 太令人兴奋了。戒指是什么样子的？
english: It's so exciting.  What's the ring look like?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M019
chinese: 它很大而且闪亮。我不知道。它是银色的，还有--
english: It's big and shiny.  I don't know.  It's silver and--

name: Ses04M_impro03_F016
chinese: 大而闪亮。你真是个男人。【笑声】
english: Big and shiny.  You're such a guy. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro03_M020
chinese: 是的，我不知道。【笑声】但是，是的，总之 - 嗯，我想告诉你，你知道的，因为你是我的好朋友之一，也是凯特的最好的朋友之一。
english: Yeah, I don't know. [LAUGHTER] But, yeah, so anyway -- well I wanted to tell you that, you know, 'cause you're one of my good friends and you're Kate's- one of her best friends and-

name: Ses04M_impro03_F017
chinese: 我为你感到非常兴奋。太棒了。我太-
english: I'm so excited for you. That's great. I'm so-

name: Ses04M_impro03_M021
chinese: 是的，是的。她实际上——她本来要告诉你的，但我告诉她我想告诉你，而且她今天还得工作，所以我决定-
english: Yeah, yeah. She was actually -- she was going to tell you but I told her that I wanted to tell you and she had to work today anyway, so I decided to-

name: Ses04M_impro03_F018
chinese: 好的，我很高兴你告诉我。
english: Well I'm glad you told me.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M022
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yeah, yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F019
chinese: 太棒了。我--恭喜。太神奇了。
english: It's fantastic.  I -- congratulations. It's amazing.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M023
chinese: 谢谢。我真的很兴奋。这有点像是一种小小的恐惧，因为我像是，啊，你知道的，这是我第一次做这样的事情。
english: Thank you.  I'm really -- I'm really excited.  And it's -- I don't know, it's like a little -- it's like a little scary, 'cause I'm like, ah, you know, it's the first time I've ever done anything like this.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M024
chinese: 但是，你知道，就像我真的很爱她，我真的只是——我无法想象与任何其他人共度一生。所以，你知道，我知道那是正确的事情。如果你不得不质疑，你知道，不要——不要做。所以我们要去做。
english: But, you know, it's like I really love her and I really just -- I can't imagine spending my life with anybody else but her.  So, you know, it's like I know that's the right thing.  And if you have to, you know, if you have to question that, you know, don't- don't do it.  So we're going to do it.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M025
chinese: 并且它将会——你知道的，我告诉她我只是希望婚礼中褐色作为一个重要的颜色。还有，也许一些绿色和蓝色。
english: And it's going to -- the -- you know, I told her that I just -- I want the color brown to be as an integral in the wedding.  And, um, maybe some greens and blues.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F020
chinese: 她对此感觉如何？
english: And how did she feel about that?

name: Ses04M_impro03_M026
chinese: 她对此无所谓。
english: She's okay with it.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F021
chinese: 那太好了。这将是一场很棒的婚礼。你愿意在一些事情上妥协。
english: Well that's good.  It'll be a great wedding.  You're willing to compromise on things.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M027
chinese: 准确地，准确地，准确地。所以--
english: Exactly, exactly, exactly.  So--

name: Ses04M_impro03_F022
chinese: 她会让你在婚礼选择中发表意见吗？这真是令人印象深刻。非常具有前瞻性的女性。【笑声】
english: She's going to let you have say in the wedding choices?  That's pretty impressive. Very forward-thinking woman. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro03_M028
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是我刚刚告诉她——嗯，我只是说了，你知道的，嘿，这些是我的建议。
english: Well, I mean I just told her--Well I just said, you know, hey, these are my suggestions.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F023
chinese: 和棕色。
english: And brown.

name: Ses04M_impro03_M029
chinese: 所有的水果和棕色。就是这样。这是我唯一的要求。
english: All fruit and the color brown. Just that. That's all- that's my only request.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F024
chinese: 这就是为什么男人不会策划婚礼。【笑声】
english: This is why men don't plan weddings. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro03_M030
chinese: 是的。也许，也许你是对的。也许有点道理。
english: Yeah.  Well maybe--maybe you're right. Maybe there's something to that.

name: Ses04M_impro03_F025
chinese: 所有的水果和棕色。【笑声】
english: All fruit and brown. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses04M_impro03_M031
chinese: 所以，嗯，无论如何，你现在想要点餐吗？所以，嗯，我的意思是--
english: So, um, anyway, do you want to order now?   So, um I mean--

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道唯一一个爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know who loves his parents.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道。它已经过时了，不是吗？
english: I know.  It went out of style, didn't it?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F001
chinese: 没关系。这是一件好事。你知道，这里很可爱，空气也很甜。
english: It's okay.  It's a good thing.  You know, it's lovely here and the air is sweet.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M001
chinese: 所以你不后悔来了吗？
english: So you're not sorry you came?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F002
chinese: 不，不是抱歉，但我不打算留下来。
english: No, not sorry, but I'm not going to stay.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F003
chinese: 首先，你妈妈几乎告诉我要走。
english: In the first place, your mother as much as told me to go.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F004
chinese: 你看到了那个，然后你有点儿……
english: You saw that and then you've been kind of--

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M003
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F005
chinese: 嗯，自从我来到这里以后有点尴尬。
english: Well, kind of embarrassed ever since I got here.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M004
chinese: 问题是我计划在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你。但他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: The trouble is I planned on sneaking up on you over a period of a week or so.  But they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F006
chinese: 我知道他们会的，无论如何，你的母亲。
english: I knew they would, your mother, anyway.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M005
chinese: 你是怎么知道的？
english: How did you know?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F007
chinese: 从她的角度来看，我还有什么其他原因会来呢？
english: From her point of view, why else would I come?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你难道不想要吗？
english: Well wouldn't you want to?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M007
chinese: 我猜你知道这就是为什么我要求你来的原因。
english: I guess you know this is why I asked you to come.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F008
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I guess this is why I came.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M008
chinese: 安，我爱你。我非常爱你。我爱你。
english: Ann, I love you.  I love you a great deal.  I love you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我没有想象力。这就是我能告诉你的全部。我让你尴尬。
english: I have no imagination.  That's all I know to tell you.  I'm embarrassing you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M010
chinese: 我不想在这里告诉你。我想去一个我们从未去过的地方；一个我们对彼此都是全新的地方。
english: I didn't want to tell it to you here.  I wanted someplace we'd never been; someplace where we'd be brand new to each other.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M011
chinese: 你认为这是错的，不是吗；这个院子，这把椅子？我希望你为我做好准备。我不想从任何事物中夺走你。
english: You think this is wrong, don't you; this yard, this chair?  I want you to be ready for me.  I don't want to win you away from anything.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F009
chinese: 克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Chris, I've been ready a long, long time.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M012
chinese: 然后他就永远离开了？你确定吗？
english: Then he's gone forever?  You're sure?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F010
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M013
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F011
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M014
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F012
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M015
chinese: 安妮，为什么你不告诉我？
english: Anne, why didn't you let me know?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F013
chinese: 我一直在等你，克里斯。在那之前，你从未写过信，当你写了信时，你说了什么？你真的可以含糊其辞，你知道吗。
english: I was waiting for you, Chris.  'Til then, you never wrote and when you did, what did you say?  You sure can be ambiguous, you know.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M016
chinese: 安妮，给我一个吻。给我一个 -
english: Anne, give me a kiss.  Give me a -

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M017
chinese: 我吻了你。我吻了安妮。我等了多久，多久才能吻你。
english: I kissed you.  I kissed Annie.  How long, how long I've waited to kiss you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F014
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。为什么你等了这么多年？我所做的一切就是坐在那里想着我是否疯了，想着你。
english: I'll never forgive you.  Why did you wait all these years?  All I've done is sit around and wonder if I was crazy for thinking of you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M018
chinese: 安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Anne, we're going to live now.  I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F015
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M019
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F016
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。克里斯，这是什么？
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.  What is it, Chris?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M020
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方。我想和你独处。
english: Let's drive somewhere.  I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F017
chinese: 不，克里斯，是什么？你的妈妈吗？
english: No, what is it, Chris?  Your mother?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M021
chinese: 不，不，没有那样的事情。
english: No, no, nothing like that.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F018
chinese: 那么出了什么问题。即使在你的信中，也有一些让人感到羞愧的事情。
english: Then what's wrong.  Even in your letters, there was something ashamed.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M022
chinese: 是的，我想是有的。但是它正在离开我。
english: Yes, I suppose there has been.  But it's going from me.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F019
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You've got to tell me.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M023
chinese: 我不知道从哪里开始。
english: I don't know where to start.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F020
chinese: 这样做不会起作用。
english: It wouldn't work this way.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M024
chinese: 这一切都和许多其他事情混在一起。你还记得在海外时，我指挥着一个公司吗？
english: It's all mixed up with so many other things.  You remember overseas, I was in command of a company?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F021
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M025
chinese: 好吧，我把它们弄丢了。
english: Well I lost them.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F022
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M026
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F023
chinese: 哦，天哪。
english: Oh, gees.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M027
chinese: 这需要一点时间来处理，因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: It takes a little time to toss that off because they weren't just men.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M028
chinese: 例如，有一次下了好几天的雨。这个孩子来找我，把他最后一双干袜子给了我，放进了我的口袋里。这只是一件小事，但这就是我所交往的那种人。
english: For instance, one time it'd been raining several days.  And this kid came to me and gave me his last pair of dry socks; put them in my pocket.  That's only a little thing, but that's the kind of guys I had.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M029
chinese: 他们没有死。他们为了彼此而自杀。我的意思就是这样。再自私一点，他们今天就还在这里。
english: They didn't die.  They killed themselves for each other.  I mean that exactly.  A little more selfish and they'd have been here today.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M030
chinese: 我看着它们倒下时得到了这个想法，一切都被摧毁了，明白吗？但是，在我看来，似乎有一件新事物被创造出来了。
english: And I got this idea watching them go down, everything was being destroyed, see?  But, to me, it seemed there was one new thing that was made,

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M031
chinese: 一种责任。人对人。你明白我吗？然后我回家了，那真是太棒了。
english: a kind of responsibility.  Man for man.  You understand me?  And then I went home and it was incredible.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M032
chinese: 这里对他们来说没有任何意义。对他们来说，整件事只是一起公交车事故。然后我去为爸爸工作，又陷入了那种整个的竞争。我感到，就像你说的，有些羞愧。
english: There was no meaning in it here.  The whole thing to them was some sort of bus accident.  Then I went to work for dad and that whole rat race again.  I felt, what you said, ashamed somehow

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M033
chinese: 因为没有人改变。这似乎让很多人成为傻瓜。我觉得活着是错的。
english: because nobody was changed.  It seemed to make suckers out of a lot of guys.  I felt wrong to be alive;

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M034
chinese: 打开那本银行存折；开新车；看见新冰箱。我的意思是，你可以从战争中带走这些东西，但是当你开新车时，你必须知道它是源于一个人对另一个人的爱。
english: to open that bank book; to drive the new car; to see the new refrigerator.  I mean, you can take these things out of a war, but when you drive the new car, you have to know that it came out of the love a man can have for a man.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M035
chinese: 因此，你必须变得更好一点。否则，我们所拥有的真的是赃物，上面还有血迹。我不想拿走其中的任何一部分。我猜你也包括在内。
english: You have to be a little better because of that.  Otherwise, we have is really loot and there's blood on it.  I don't want to take any of it.  I guess that included you.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F024
chinese: 你还是这样感觉吗？
english: And do you still feel that way?

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now, Annie.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F025
chinese: 因为你不能再有那种感觉了，克里斯。因为你有权拥有你所拥有的一切，一切，包括我。
english: Because you mustn't feel that way anymore, Chris.  Because you have a right to everything you have, everything, Chris; to me, too.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你的钱没有问题。你父亲让数百架飞机飞上天空。你应该为此感到自豪。一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: And your money, there's nothing wrong in your money.  Your father put hundreds of planes in the air.  You should be proud.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_M037
chinese: 安妮，安妮，我要给你赚一笔大钱。
english: Annie, Annie, I'm going to make you a fortune.

name: Ses04M_script01_3_F027
chinese: 我该怎么处理一笔财富？
english: What'll I do with a fortune?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么他邀请她来这里？
english: Why did he invite her here?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M000
chinese: 哦，天啊，排队。
english: Oh, God, line.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F001
chinese: 为什么那件事会困扰你？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M001
chinese: 为什么-为什么，那让你烦恼吗？
english: Why does- why, does that bother you?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F002
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了。为什么突然间--
english: She's been in New York three and a half years.  Why, all of a sudden--

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M002
chinese: 嗯，也许-也许他只是想见她。
english: Well, maybe- maybe he just wanted to see her.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F003
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M003
chinese: 你是什么意思？他一生都在女孩的隔壁长大。他为什么不想要见她？为什么他不想再见她？
english: What do you mean?  He grew up next door to the girl all his life.  Why shouldn't he want to -- why shouldn't he want to see her again?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M004
chinese: 不要那样看着我。他对我说的和对你说的一样少。
english: Don't look at me like that.  He didn't tell me anymore than he told you.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F004
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M005
chinese: 你怎么知道他甚至在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he's even thinking about it?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F005
chinese: 它有那种感觉。
english: It's got that about it.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M006
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样？
english: Well so what?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F006
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here, Joe?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M007
chinese: 行。
english: Line.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F007
chinese: 现在听着，孩子。现在，听着。
english: Now listen, kid. Now, listen.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M008
chinese: 哦，现在听着，孩子。
english: Oh.  Now listen, kid.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F008
chinese: 她不是他的女孩，乔。她知道她不是。
english: She's not his girl, Joe.  She knows she's not.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M009
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F009
chinese: 那她为什么还是单身呢？纽约到处都是男人。为什么她还没有结婚呢？可能有一百个人告诉她她很傻，但她一直等待着。
english: Then why is she still single?  New York is full of men.  Why hasn't she married?  Probably a hundred people told her she's foolish, but she's waited.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M010
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she waited?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F010
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的，所以她忠诚如磐石。在我最糟糕的时刻，我想到她在等待，我再次知道我是正确的。
english: Because she knows what I know, that's why.  She's faithful as a rock.  In my worst moments, I think of her waiting and I know, again, that I'm right.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M011
chinese: 看，今天天气很好。我们为什么要争论呢？
english: Look, it's a nice day.  What are we arguing for?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F011
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢夺走她的信仰，乔。陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares take her faith away, Joe.  Strangers might, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M012
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你想要什么？
english: What do you want me to do? What do you want?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F012
chinese: 我希望你们俩都表现得好像他会回来一样。自从他邀请她来这里，我注意到你们了，别以为我没注意到。我不会容忍任何胡闹。
english: I want you to act like he's coming back, both of you.  Don't think I haven't noticed you since he invited her here.  I won't stand for any nonsense.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M013
chinese: 但是，凯特--
english: But, Kate--

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F013
chinese: 因为如果他不回来，我会自杀。
english: Because if he's not coming back, I'll kill myself.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F014
chinese: 笑。嘲笑我。但为什么那件事会在她来到这里的那个晚上发生？
english: Laugh.  Laugh at me.  But why did that happen the very night that she came here?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F015
chinese: 她在他的床上入睡，他的纪念品碎成了碎片。看。看着它。乔--
english: She goes to sleep in his bed and his memorial breaks in pieces.  Look.  Look at it.  Joe--

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M014
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F016
chinese: 和我一起相信，乔。我不能独自忍受。
english: Believe with me, Joe.  I can't stand all alone

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M015
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F017
chinese: 仅仅上周，一个比Larry失踪时间更长的男人出现在底特律。
english: Only last week, a man turned up in Detroit missing longer than Larry.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M016
chinese: 好了，好了。冷静一点。
english: Alright, alright.  Calm yourself.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F018
chinese: 你，最重要的是，必须相信。你。
english: You, above all, have got to believe.  You.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M017
chinese: 为什么是我中的所有人？
english: Why me above all?

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F019
chinese: 只是不要停止相信。
english: Just don't stop believing.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M018
chinese: 这是什么意思，我最重要吗？看看你，你在发抖。
english: What does that mean, me above all?  Look at you.  You're shaking.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_F020
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses04M_script01_2_M019
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide?  What the hell is the matter with you, Kate?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F001
chinese: 除了弗里达，没有人知道我们在这里，而且她也不会打电话。
english: Nobody knows we're here, except Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那么，肯定是他们了。
english: It must be them, then.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们该怎么办？
english: What are we to do?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M003
chinese: 亲爱的，我们会没事的。无论发生什么，不是吗？
english: We'll be alright, darling.  Whatever happens, aren't we?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远甜蜜。
english: Now and always sweet.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎，那么。
english: I don't care, then.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的。
english: It was bound to come sooner or later.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好，你好。什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello, hello.  What?  Wrong number.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F005
chinese: 哦，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: Oh, it sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M006
chinese: 如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: What shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M007
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势？
english: With the mo- with the most perfect poise?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F007
chinese: 当然。我可能会做一个宫廷屈膝礼。
english: Certainly.  I shall probably do a court curtsey.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M008
chinese: 啊。当一个人快乐时，那些本应该非常重要的事情却不再重要，是吗？
english: Ah.  Things that ought to matter dreadfully don't matter when one's happy, do they?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F008
chinese: 但是可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: But what's so horrible is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M009
chinese: 亲爱的，不要说那样的话。
english: Don't say that, darling.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F009
chinese: 是真的。整个事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: It's true.  The whole business is a very poor joke.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M010
chinese: 意思是那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱？
english: Meaning that sacred and beautiful thing, love?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F010
chinese: 是的，就是这个意思。
english: Yes, meaning just that.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M011
chinese: 这一切意味着什么？这是我在不断追求终极真理时问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: What does it all mean?  That's what I ask myself in my ceaseless quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God, what does it all mean?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm serious.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真。那只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious, my dear.  That's just what they want.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M013
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的道德家们。嘲笑他们。轻率一点。嘲笑一切。他们所有神圣的陈词滥调。轻率会激起他们该死的甜蜜和光明中的酸涩。
english: All the futile moralists who try to make life unbearable.  Laugh at them.  Be flippant.  Laugh at everything.  All their sacred shibboleths.  Flippancy brings out the acid- acid in their damn sweetness and light.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F013
chinese: 如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们自己。
english: If I laugh at everything, I must laugh at us, too.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M014
chinese: 当然你必须。我们确实是笑柄。
english: Certainly you must.  We're figures of fun alright.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F014
chinese: 这种荒谬而压倒一切的爱情会持续多久？
english: How long will it last, this ludicrous and overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M015
chinese: 谁知道。
english: Who knows.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F015
chinese: 我们是否总是想要争吵和打架？
english: Shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M016
chinese: 不。那火焰将随着我们的激情逐渐消逝。
english: No.  That fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。我们应该喜欢那样吗？
english: Oh, dear.  Should we like that.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M017
chinese: 这完全取决于我们打得有多好。
english: It all depends on how well we've played.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F017
chinese: 如果我们其中一个人死了会发生什么？剩下的那个人还会笑吗？
english: What happens if one of us dies?  Does the one that's left, still laugh?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M018
chinese: 是的。是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes.  Yes, with all his might.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F018
chinese: 嗯，那可够严重的，不是吗？
english: Well that's serious enough, isn't it?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M019
chinese: 不，不，不是这样的。死亡是非常可笑的；这是一个非常狡猾的小谜团，全靠镜子完成的。
english: No, no, it isn't.  Death's very laughable; such a cunning little mystery, all done with mirrors.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F019
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M020
chinese: 所以从长远来看，每个人都是如此。让我们肤浅地可怜那些可怜的哲学家。让我们吹喇叭和吱吱声，尽可能地享受派对，就像非常小的、相当愚蠢的小学生一样。
english: So is everyone else in the long run.  Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and- and enjoy the party as much as we can, like very small, quite idiotic little school children.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M021
chinese: 让我们品味这一刻的愉悦。亲爱的，在你的身体腐烂和蠕虫在你的眼眶里出入之前，来吻我。
english: Let's savor the delight of the moment.  Come and kiss me, darling, before your body rots and worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F020
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliot, worms don't pop.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M022
chinese: 我不介意你做什么，明白吗？你可以把自己涂成鲜绿色，全身赤裸地在凡尔赛广场跳舞，疯狂地和全世界的男人们一起离开，只要你最爱我，我就不会说一句话。
english: I don't mind what you do, see?  You can paint yourself bright green all over and dance naked in the Place Vendome and rush off madly with all the men in the world and I shan't say a word as long as you love me best.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F021
chinese: 谢谢你，亲爱的。同样适用于你，只是如果我发现你甚至看着别的女人，我会杀了你。
english: Thank you, dear.  The same applies to you, except that if I catch you so much as looking at another woman, I will kill you.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M023
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Do you remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F022
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M024
chinese: 当你买了那条小彩绘木蛇并把它放在我的床上的那一次？
english: The one when you bought that little painted wooded snake and put it on my bed?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哦，查尔斯；那是他的名字，查尔斯。哦，他扭动得如此美妙。
english: Oh, Charles; that was his name, Charles.  Oh, he did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M025
chinese: 可怕的事情。我讨厌它。
english: Horrible thing.  I hated it.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F024
chinese: 我知道你做了。你把它扔进了大运河。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: I know you did.  You threw it out of the window into the Grand Canal.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M026
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F025
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M027
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧坏了我的浴袍。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your curling irons burnt holes in my dressing gown.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F026
chinese: 它也烧毁了我的梳子，还有浴室里的所有毛巾。
english: It burnt my comb, too, and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M028
chinese: 行？
english: Line?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M029
chinese: 那是一场激动人心的活动，不是吗？
english: How -- that was a rouser wasn't it?

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F027
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M030
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F028
chinese: 经理走进来，发现他在地板上滚来滚去，像豹子一样咬来咬去，抓来抓去。哦，亲爱的。
english: The manager came in and found is rolling about on the floor, biting and scratching like panthers.  Oh, dear.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M031
chinese: 啊，我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: Ah, I shall never forget his face.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F029
chinese: 多么荒谬。多么彻底、彻底荒谬。
english: How ridiculous. How utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M032
chinese: 是的。那时我们都年轻得多。
english: Yes.  We were very much younger then.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_F030
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses04M_script03_1_M033
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M000
chinese: 那真是一个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: That was a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F000
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我没有很用力地打你。
english: I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F001
chinese: 经理走进来，发现我们在地板上打滚，像豹子一样咬来咬去，抓来抓去。哦，亲爱的。
english: The manager came in and found us rolling about on the floor, biting and scratching like panthers.  Oh, dear.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: I shall never forget his face.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F002
chinese: 多么荒谬。多么彻底、彻底荒谬。
english: How ridiculous.  How utterly, utterly ridiculous.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M003
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F003
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M004
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F004
chinese: 你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M005
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你从他那里拿了礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You took presents from him.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F005
chinese: 礼物？一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Presents?  A trivial little brooch.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M006
chinese: 我记得很清楚，它满是最糟糕的味道的钻石。
english: I remember it well, bristling with diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F006
chinese: 一点也不。它非常漂亮。我还保留着它，经常穿着。
english: Not at all.  It was very pretty.  I still have it and I wear it often.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M007
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F007
chinese: 我没有。你在嫉妒的想象中编造了整件事。
english: I did not.  You made the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M008
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你，是吗？
english: You must admit that he was in love with you, wasn't he?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F008
chinese: 也许只是一点点，没什么严重的。
english: Just a little, perhaps, nothing serious.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M009
chinese: 行？
english: Line?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F009
chinese: 让他亲吻你。
english: Let him kiss you.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M010
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: You let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F010
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M011
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F011
chinese: 它给了他很多快乐，而且没有伤害到我。
english: It gave him a lot of pleasure and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M012
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F012
chinese: 如果你不那么好奇，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: If you hadn't been so nosey, you never would have known a thing about it.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M013
chinese: 这是一个很好的观点，我必须说。
english: That's a nice point of view, I must say.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F013
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。我对这个对话感到无聊。
english: Oh, dear.  I'm bored with this conversation.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M014
chinese: 我也是；无聊得发慌。
english: So am I; bored stiff.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M015
chinese: 你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: You want some brandy?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F014
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No, thanks.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M016
chinese: 我想我自己也会吃一点。
english: I'll have a little myself, I think.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F015
chinese: 我不明白你为什么要它。你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want it.  You've already had two glasses.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M017
chinese: 没有特别的原因。无论如何，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason.  Anyhow, they were very small ones.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F016
chinese: 看起来继续这样做真是太愚蠢了。
english: It seems so silly to go on and on and on with such a thing.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M018
chinese: 在一个晚上里，你几乎不能说三个酒杯一直喝个不停。
english: You can hardly call three liquor glasses in a whole evening going on and on and on.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F017
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's become a habit with you.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M019
chinese: 你不必因为此刻不想要任何东西而摆出这么高傲的姿态。
english: You needn't be so grand just because you don't happen to want any at the moment.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F018
chinese: 哦，别这么愚蠢。
english: Oh, don't be so stupid.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M020
chinese: 真的，阿曼达
english: Really, Amanda

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F019
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M021
chinese: 什么都没有。
english: Nothing.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M022
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Going out somewhere, my dear?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F020
chinese: 不，只是让自己对你有吸引力。
english: No, just making myself fascinating for you

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M023
chinese: 哦，那个回复让我心碎了。
english: Oh.  That reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F021
chinese: 这个女人的工作是吸引那个男人。你能帮我看一下一分钟吗？
english: The woman's job is to allure the man.  Watch me a minute, will you?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M024
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F022
chinese: 哦，不，不是这样的。
english: Oh, no, it isn't.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M025
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F023
chinese: 哦，安静点。
english: Oh, be quiet.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M026
chinese: 行？
english: Line?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F024
chinese: 真可惜你没有更多的白兰地。
english: It's a pity you didn't- It's a pity you didn't have more brandy.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M027
chinese: 真可惜你没有更多白兰地。它可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you didn't have any more brandy.  It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F025
chinese: 似乎对你并没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: It doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M028
chinese: 行？
english: Line?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M029
chinese: 咔嚓。哦，咔嚓，咔嚓，咔嚓，就像一条小蝰蛇。
english: Snap.  Oh, snap, snap, snap, like a little adder.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F026
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M030
chinese: 他们--胡说八道，他们的牙齿后面有一小袋毒液，他们会咬人。
english: They -- nonsense, they have a little bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F027
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M031
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F028
chinese: 我不在乎。你明白吗？我不在乎。如果它们像箍圈一样叫唤和滚动，我也不介意。
english: I don't care.  Do you understand?  I don't care.  I don't mind if they bark and roll about like hoops.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你在我们离婚后还经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after our divorce?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F029
chinese: 是的，我做了，相当多。
english: Yes, I did, quite a lot.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M033
chinese: 我猜你让他亲吻你更多，是吗？
english: I suppose you let him kiss you a good deal more then, hmm?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F030
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M034
chinese: 你一定度过了一个狂欢的时光。
english: You must have had a riotous time.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M035
chinese: 没有任何约束，非常愉快。你本来就没有很多。
english: No restraint at all, very enjoyable.  You never had much anyhow.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F031
chinese: 你真是让人受不了。我猜是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable.  I expected it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M036
chinese: 我一点也没有喝醉。
english: I'm not in the least drunk.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F032
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不好的问题。
english: You always had a weak head.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M037
chinese: 我想我之前提到过，今晚我只喝了三分钟的白兰地酒杯。这对一个两岁的孩子来说几乎不足以喝醉。
english: I think I mentioned once before that I've only had three minute liquor glasses of brandy this whole evening.  That's hardly enough to get a child of two drunk.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F033
chinese: 相反，一个两岁的孩子只需要喝一杯白兰地就会醉得厉害。
english: On the contrary, a child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass of brandy.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M038
chinese: 非常有趣。那么四岁的孩子、六岁的孩子和九岁的孩子呢？
english: Very interesting.  And how about a child of four and a child of six and a child of nine?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F034
chinese: 哦，闭嘴。
english: Oh, shut up.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M039
chinese: 我们可能会就这个问题展开一场精彩的小辩论，你知道，这些不懂事的孩子们可能会变得情绪激动。
english: We might get up a splendid little- a splendid little debate about this, you know, intemperate tots.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F035
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣。你最好再喝点白兰地。
english: Not very funny, dear.  You'd better have some more brandy.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M040
chinese: 非常好的想法。我会的。
english: Very good idea.  I will

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M041
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉，我想。
english: You better turn that off I think.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F036
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M042
chinese: 现在很晚了，楼上的人会生气的。
english: It's late and the people upstairs will get annoyed.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F037
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs.  It's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M043
chinese: 楼下有人，我猜测。
english: There are people downstairs, I suppose

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F038
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M044
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of year for Tunis.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F039
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M045
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I will do no such thing.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F040
chinese: 很好，如果你坚持要粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well, if you insist on being boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M046
chinese: 关掉它。它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off.  It's driving me mad.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F041
chinese: 走开。走开。我讨厌你。
english: Go away.  Go away.  I hate you.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M047
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F042
chinese: 你太易怒了。试着控制自己。
english: You are far too temperamental.  Try to control yourself.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F043
chinese: 我们交换了。听着。
english: We swapped. Listen.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M048
chinese: 听着--
english: Listen--

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F044
chinese: 听着，确实。我受够了听你说话，你这个该死的虐待狂恶霸。
english: Listen, indeed.  I am sick and tired of listening to you, you damn sadistic bully.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M049
chinese: 你是一个恶毒脾气暴躁、放荡不羁的人。
english: You're a vile tempered, loosed living

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F045
chinese: 停止。
english: Stop.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M050
chinese: 邪恶的小野兽。而且，我-我希望我一辈子都不再见到你。
english: wicked little beast. And I- I hope I never see you again as long as live.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F046
chinese: 停下。我讨厌你。你听到我说话了吗？你自负、专横而且完全不可理喻。
english: Stop.  I hate you.  Do you hear me? You're conceited and overbearing and utterly impossible.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F047
chinese: 这是结束。你明白吗，结束？最终和永远。
english: This is the end.  Do you understand, the end?  Finally and forever.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M051
chinese: 你不能这样去。
english: You're not going like this.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F048
chinese: 哦，是的，我是。
english: Oh, yes, I am.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M052
chinese: 不，你不是。
english: No, you're not.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F049
chinese: 放开我。你是一个残忍的恶魔，我恨你，厌恶你。感谢上帝，我及时发现了你真实的本性。
english: Let go of me.  You're a cruel fiend and I hate and loath you.  Thank God, I discovered in time what you're really like.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M053
chinese: 闭嘴。闭嘴。
english: Shut up. Shut up.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M054
chinese: 你是一个刻薄、邪恶的人
english: You're a mean, evil minded

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F050
chinese: 再嫁给你？哼。
english: Marry you again? Huh.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M055
chinese: 小吸血鬼，我希望上帝保佑我活着的时候永远不要再见到你。
english: little vampire And I hope to God I never set eyes on you as long as I live.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F051
chinese: 永远不，永远不，永远不。我宁愿在痛苦中死去。野兽畜生。
english: Never, never, never.  I'd rather die in torment. Beast brute.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_M056
chinese: 妓女。
english: Whore.

name: Ses04M_script03_2_F052
chinese: 猪。
english: Swine.

name: Ses04M_impro07_M000
chinese: 好的，所以你是不会相信的。但是我今天回家了。我查看了邮件。我收到了来自南加州大学的录取信。
english: Alright, so you're not going to believe this.  But I went home today. I looked through the mail.  And I got an acceptance letter from U.S.C..

name: Ses04M_impro07_F000
chinese: 什么，不可能。
english: What, no way.

name: Ses04M_impro07_M001
chinese: 我要去美国南加州大学。是的。
english: I'm going to U.S.C.. Yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro07_F001
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses04M_impro07_M002
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yeah, yeah.

name: Ses04M_impro07_F002
chinese: 我甚至都没有。
english: I didn't even

name: Ses04M_impro07_F003
chinese: 知道你申请了南加州大学。
english: know you applied to U.S.C..

name: Ses04M_impro07_M003
chinese: 我做了。我做了。是的，我申请了美国南加州大学。我的意思是，它真的很贵，但是
english: I did.  I did. I've -- yeah, I applied to U.S.C..  I mean, it's really expensive but

name: Ses04M_impro07_M004
chinese: 这是一所非常好的学校。所以。
english: it's a really good school.  So

name: Ses04M_impro07_M005
chinese: 嗯，嗯-是的，我只是-我真的很兴奋，因为我不知道。就像整个-我的意思是，我一直很-我从小就想去那里。所以现在我真的去了，太棒了。那是一个非常漂亮的校园。哦，你去过那里。
english: Um, um- yeah, I'm just -- I'm really excited 'cause I don't know.  It's like a whole -- I mean, it's just like, I've been really -- I wanted to go there ever since I was a kid.  So now I actually am and it's awesome.  It's a really nice campus.  Oh, you've been there.

name: Ses04M_impro07_F004
chinese: 太神奇了。我在电视上看过。嗯，哇。我的意思是，你打算主修什么？你打算做什么？
english: That's amazing.  I've seen it on TV. Um, Wow.  I mean, well what are you going to major in?  What are you going to do?

english: oh, God I kissed Annie.  I kissed Annie. I can't How long have I waited to do that?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F014
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。你为什么等了这么久？这段时间里，我一直坐在那里想着你，不知道自己是否疯了。
english: I'll never forgive you.  Why did you wait so long?  All this time I've sat around wondering if I was crazy for thinking of you.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M017
chinese: 哦，安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福。
english: Oh, Annie, we're gonna live now.  I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F015
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是。
english: Not like that you're not.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M018
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F016
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。怎么了？
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.  What's the matter?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M019
chinese: 让我们去兜风吧。我，我-我想和你独处。
english: Lets go for a ride.  I I- I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F017
chinese: 不，克里斯，怎么了？这是你妈妈吗？
english: No.  Chris, what is it?  Is it your mother?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M020
chinese: 不，没有这样的事情。
english: No, nothing like that.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F018
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You have to tell me.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F019
chinese: 即使在你的信中也有一些羞愧的东西。
english: Even in your letters there was something ashamed.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M021
chinese: 是的，我想我一直都是。但是这对我来说是好事。
english: Yeah, I suppose I have been.  But it's going for me.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F020
chinese: 你必须告诉我。
english: You have to tell me.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M022
chinese: 我不知道从哪里开始。
english: I don't I don't know where to start.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F021
chinese: 这样是行不通的。
english: It wouldn't work like this.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M023
chinese: 这太混乱了，与许多其他事情混在一起。
english: It's so mixed up with so many other things.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M024
chinese: 你还记得我在海外时，我指挥着一个公司吗？
english: You remember when I was overseas, I was in command of a company?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F022
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah, sure.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M025
chinese: 我把它们弄丢了。
english: I lost them.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F023
chinese: 多少个？
english: How many?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M026
chinese: 几乎所有的。
english: Just about all.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M027
chinese: 这需要时间来摆脱这样的事情，我的意思是，因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: It- It takes time to toss something like that off,I mean, because they weren't just men.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M028
chinese: 例如，有一次，连续下了几天雨，有个孩子走到我面前，他把他最后一双干袜子给了我，只是放进了我的口袋里。
english: For instance, there was this time, and it had been raining for several days, and this kid came up to me and he gave me his last pair of dry socks, just put them in my pocket.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M029
chinese: 我知道这只是一件小事，但这就是我所拥有的那种人。他们没有死。他们为彼此而自杀。
english: I know it's it's just a little thing but that's just the kind of guys I had.  They didn't die.  They killed themselves for each other.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M030
chinese: 我的意思就是，再自私一点点，他们今天就会在这里了。当我看着他们一个个离开时，这给了我一个想法。
english: I mean that exactly, anymore selfish -- just a little bit more selfish and they would have been here today. And it gave me an idea as I was watching them all go down.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M031
chinese: 一切都在被摧毁，但我感觉同时也有新的东西被创造出来。就像一种责任感。你知道，男人之间的责任。你明白我在说什么吗？
english: Everything was being destroyed see, but I felt like something new was being created at the same time.  Like it kind of -- responsibility.  You know, man to man.  Do you understand what I'm saying?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M032
chinese: 而且，再次看到那个，再次将它带回地球上，就像-像一个纪念碑，它将站在这些人的背后，并且它将对他们产生影响。
english: And and to see that again, to to bring that back on the earth again, like- like a monument that that would stand behind these men and and and it would make a difference to them.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M033
chinese: 那时候我回家了。而且那真是令人难以置信的。在那里它没有任何意义。
english: It was and then I went home.  And it was incredible.  It didn't have any meaning there.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M034
chinese: 我的意思是，对他们来说，整件事就像是一场公交车事故。
english: I mean, the whole thing was like some kind of bus accident to them.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M035
chinese: 所以我又回到了为我爸爸工作，再次陷入了那整个竞争激烈的工作环境。
english: So I went back to work for my dad and that whole rat race again.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我感受到了你说的话，不知怎么地感到羞愧，因为没有人有任何改变。
english: I felt what you said, ashamed somehow because nobody had changed at all.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M037
chinese: 它似乎让那么多人成为傻瓜。而我，我感到活着是错误的；打开那本银行存折，开那辆车，那辆新车，看着那台新冰箱。我的意思是，
english: It seemed to make suckers out of so many guys.  And I-I felt wrong to be alive; to to open that bank book, to to drive that car, the new car, and look at that new refrigerator. I mean,

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M038
chinese: 你可以把那些东西从战争中拿出来，但如果你要开那辆车，你必须知道它来自一个人对另一个人的爱。而且你必须因此变得更好一点。因为如果你不这样做，那么一切都只是掠夺，上面沾满了鲜血，而我不想要其中的任何东西。
english: you can take those things out of the war, but if you're gonna drive that car you've got to know that that came from the love a man can have from a man. And you've got to be a little bit better because of that.  Because if you're not, then it's all just loot and there's blood on it and I didn't want any of it.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M039
chinese: 我猜那也包括你。
english: And I guess that included you.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F024
chinese: 你还有那种感觉吗？
english: Do you still feel like that?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M040
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I want you now, Annie.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F025
chinese: 因为你不能再有那种感觉了，克里斯。因为你拥有的一切，包括我在内，都是你的权利。
english: Because you can't feel like that anymore, Chris.  Because everything you have, you have a right to, me included.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F026
chinese: 你父亲，他让数百架飞机起飞，你应该为此感到骄傲。一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: And you father, he put hundreds of planes in the air and you should be proud.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M041
chinese: 噢，安妮，
english: Oh, Annie,

name: Ses05M_script01_3_F027
chinese: [笑声] 我会用财富做什么呢？
english: [LAUGHTER] What will I do with a fortune?

name: Ses05M_script01_3_M042
chinese: 安妮，我要让你发大财。
english: Annie I am going to make you a fortune.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F000
chinese: 布莱恩，我需要帮助。
english: Brian, I need help.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M000
chinese: 宝贝，我不知道该告诉你什么。不要放弃。
english: Babe, I don't know what to tell you.  Don't give up.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F001
chinese: 我不知道——我只是——我在考虑也许我应该搬回家或者什么的。我不知道该怎么办。我不能——我不能继续过我现在这样的生活。
