english: I don't--I'm just--I'm thinking maybe I should move back home or something.  I don't I don't know what to do.  I can't - I cant keep living the way I'm living.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M001
chinese: 当然不会，但是如果你搬回家，你打算做什么？你能在那里找到工作吗？
english: Well, of course not, but what are you going to do if you move back home?  Are you going to be able to find a job there?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F002
chinese: 我不知道。我的意思是，我应该做什么？我已经尽力了。
english: I don't know.  I mean, what am I supposed to do? I've It's not for lack of effort.  I've been trying.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M002
chinese: 我希望我能给你一些答案，宝贝。我的意思是，我不知道该告诉你什么。
english: I wish I had some answers for you, babe.  I mean-I don't know what to tell you.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F003
chinese: 你是怎么找到工作的？我应该做什么？
english: How did you get a job?  What am I - What am I supposed to do?

name: Ses05F_impro04_M003
chinese: 我去上学并且获得了学位。然后我找到了一份工作。
english: I went to school and I got my degree.  And I got a job.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F004
chinese: 我的意思是，我就是不知道。如果你没有很多资格，你在哪里找工作呢？在洛杉矶，这真是令人沮丧，因为如果你不认识人，你就找不到工作。这是不可能的。这完全是歧视。你必须认识人。
english: I mean, I just don't--I don't know.  If you don't have a lot of qualification, where do you - where do you find work?  It's like L.A. is so frustrating because if you don't know somebody, you can't -you can't get a job.  It's impossible.  It's totally discriminatory.  You have to know somebody.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M004
chinese: 没有什么是不可能的。
english: Nothing's impossible.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F005
chinese: 这不公平。
english: It's not fair.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M005
chinese: 你必须愿意-你必须愿意从底层开始，努力向上。
english: You have to be willing - You have to be willing to start you know at the bottom and work your way up. and

name: Ses05F_impro04_F006
chinese: 没问题。我愿意从任何地方开始。我找不到工作。
english: That's fine.  I'd be willing to start anywhere.  I can't get a job.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M006
chinese: 我
english: I

name: Ses05F_impro04_F007
chinese: 我的意思是，每小时六七五美元的工资是付不起账单的，我的意思是。
english: I mean, on six seven and five an hour does not - does not pay the bills I mean.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M007
chinese: 不，它不能支付账单，但它可以支付一些费用。而且它可以帮助你去别的地方。
english: No, it doesn't pay the bills, but it would pay something.  And it would help you get somewhere else.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F008
chinese: 我仍然无法在六七和五上生活。在洛杉矶是不可能的。住房太贵了。
english: I still can't live on in six seven and five.  It's not possible in Los Angeles.  Housing is too expensive.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M008
chinese: 不，我明白，但你必须从某个地方开始。这总比没有好，而且那是你所拥有的全部。你现在什么都没有。
english: and No, I understand, but you've got to start somewhere.  It's better than nothing and that's all you have.  You have nothing right now.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F009
chinese: 我是说，虽然这样很丢脸，但我可以在麦当劳工作一段时间，但是我是说，然后呢？我的意思是，你不能在这种行业中有所发展。
english: I mean I can do the McDonald's thing for a while as humiliating as that is, but I mean then what?  I mean You can't exactly move up in that kind of industry.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M009
chinese: 等一下，你可以晋升。麦当劳有管理项目之类的东西。
english: Wait, You can move up.  There's management programs in McDonalds and things like that.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F010
chinese: 噢，别这样，这不是我为自己设想的。说实话，你会满足于在麦当劳做经理吗？
english: Oh come on, that's not what I envisioned for myself. Honestly, would you settle for being a manager at McDonalds?

name: Ses05F_impro04_MXX0
chinese: 当然不是--
english: Well, of course not--

name: Ses05F_impro04_M010
chinese: [垃圾] 不，我不会，但是我--
english: [GARBAGE] No, I wouldn't, but I--

name: Ses05F_impro04_F011
chinese: 这真是令人羞辱的。
english: This is humiliating.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M011
chinese: 嗯，你知道吗？生活有时候会让人感到羞辱。
english: Well, you know what?  Life gets humili... humiliating at times.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F012
chinese: 不，我不想接受那个。我认为那是胡说八道。
english: No, I don't I don't want to accept that.  I think that's bullshit.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M012
chinese: 好的，你打算怎么做来使它变得不同呢？
english: Well, what are you going to do about it to make it different?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F013
chinese: 我不知道。我觉得我已经尝试了一切。
english: I don't know.  I feel like I've tried everything.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M013
chinese: 你有吗？一定还有其他的东西。
english: Have you?  There's got to be something else.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F014
chinese: 三年来每天都出去找工作，每天都去，到处都被拒绝。
english: Three years of going out every day--every day--and looking for a job and being constantly denied everywhere I go.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M014
chinese: 亲爱的，我不知道该告诉你什么。也许-也许你是对的。也许你确实需要去别的地方。我不知道，也许这里就不是命中注定的地方。我的意思是，我希望你不要放弃，但同时我也不希望你离开，但同时，我不喜欢看到你这样。
english: I don't know what to tell you, babe. Maybe- Maybe you're right.  Maybe you do have to go someplace else.  I don't know, maybe it's just not meant to be here.  I mean I want you to-I don't want you to give up, but I mean I don't want you to move away, but at the same time, I don't like seeing you like this.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F015
chinese: 我只是太害怕重新开始，我的意思是，我花了很多时间和精力来到这里。
english: I'm just so scared to start over I mean.  I put so much time and energy into being here.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F016
chinese: 我应该去哪里？我的意思是，像什么？
english: Where am I supposed to go?  I mean, like what?

name: Ses05F_impro04_M015
chinese: 如果是租金或类似的东西，我的意思是我可以帮你一点忙，如果-如果那能帮助你坚持下去的话。
english: If it's rent or something like that, I mean I can help you out a little bit, if- if that will help you you know stick with it.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F017
chinese: 我不知道。也许我可以贷款。我只是-我需要前景，但我觉得我没有任何机会。
english: I don't know. Maybe I can take out a loan. I just- I need prospects and I don't feel like I have any.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M016
chinese: 好的，只是不要放弃。而且你知道的，明天可能会有一些事情就在拐角处。
english: Well, just don't give up. And there's- you know, You never know, something might be around the corner tomorrow.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F018
chinese: 但是当我现在饿的时候，这并没有帮助我。
english: But that doesn't help me when I'm hungry now.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M017
chinese: 好的，你知道我不会让你挨饿的。
english: Well, you know I'm not going to let you starve.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F019
chinese: 我只是担心。
english: I'm just worried.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M018
chinese: 当然，你很担心。我们都很担心。我为你担心。每个人都经常担心。你知道，我不知道，也许我有一份工作，是个好工作，我很开心，但这并不意味着我明天或后天还会有这份工作。你永远不知道会发生什么。明天可能会发生一些疯狂的事情。明天可能会发生一些疯狂的事情，你会找到一份工作。你永远不知道。你可以走到街上的某个人面前，那可能是一件很棒的事情。你只需要保持积极。你总是那么消极。
english: Of course, you're worried.  We're all worried.  I'm worried for you.  Everyone's always worried.  You know, I don't-maybe I have a job and yeah, it's a good job whatever and I'm happy, but it doesn't mean I'm going to have it tomorrow or the next day.  You never know what's going to happen.  Something crazy could happen tomorrow.	Something crazy can happen for you tomorrow and you'll get a job.  You never know.  You can walk up to somebody on the street and it'll be something great.  You've just got to be positive.  You're so negative all the time.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F020
chinese: 三年过去了。
english: It's three years.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M019
chinese: 我理解，但是你知道吗，你已经消极了三年。
english: I understand, but you know what, you've been negative for three years.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F021
chinese: 你真的这么认为吗？
english: Is that honestly what you think?

name: Ses05F_impro04_M020
chinese: 这只是我个人的看法。你第一天出去找工作就开始抱怨找不到工作。我并不是说要贬低你或者别的什么，只是-
english: It's the way it seems to me.  You started complaining about not being able to find a job the first day you went out and didn't find a job.  And I'm not saying like and not trying to you know put you down or anything, it's just that-

name: Ses05F_impro04_F022
chinese: 那真的很难听。
english: That's really hard to hear.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M021
chinese: 但是这是真的，宝贝。你必须对事情更加积极一些。比如，对自己要有信心。
english: But it's true, babe.  You've got to be more positive about things.  Like- Have some faith in yourself.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F023
chinese: 我觉得我有信心，但现在信心变得薄弱，因为没有钱。
english: I feel like I have faith and now faith is running thin because there is no money.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M022
chinese: 嗯，确切地说，金钱并不是一切。
english: Well, exactly.  Money is not everything.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F024
chinese: 布莱恩，我觉得你对我所说的“金钱”的概念没有理解。我不是指像“哦，我今天不能去弄头发和修指甲”这样的金钱，而是指我无法吃饭。
english: Brian, I don't think you have a concept of what I mean by- by money.  I don't mean money like oh, I can't go get my hair and my nails done today, I mean like I can't eat.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M023
chinese: 你可以。
english: You can.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F025
chinese: 不，真的，如果我无法支付住所费用，我最终会住在我的车里。
english: No, no, really, if I can't pay to live somewhere, I'm going to end up living in my car.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M024
chinese: 你知道我绝不会让那发生。我不会让那发生。
english: You know I would never let that happen.  I wouldn't let that happen.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F026
chinese: 我只是--我
english: I just-- I

name: Ses05F_impro04_M025
chinese: 如果你必须在我这里待一段时间并重新站起来，你可以随时和我在一起。你知道，我不会把你丢给狼群或者类似的事情。如果有任何我能帮助你的方式，我会尽力的。
english: You can always stay with me if you- if you have to stay with me for a while and get yourself back up on your feet again.  You know I'm not just going to you know just throw you to the wolves or something like that.  If there's any way I can help you, I will.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F027
chinese: 好的，谢谢你。
english: Well, thank you.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M026
chinese: 但是你必须继续努力。你不能放弃。
english: But you have to keep trying.  You can't give up.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F028
chinese: 是的，我不打算停止尝试。我只是...我不知道什么时候是足够的。
english: Yeah, I don't intend to stop trying.  I just--I don't when is when enough is enough.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M027
chinese: 而且你必须思考一下——问问自己为什么他们不雇佣你？
english: And you've got to think--well, ask yourself why are they not hiring you?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F029
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M028
chinese: 我是说你要去参加面试吗？
english: I mean are you going in for interviews?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F030
chinese: 是的，而且我看起来很好，你知道的--
english: Yeah, and I look nice and I'm you know--

name: Ses05F_impro04_M029
chinese: 你在演讲吗？
english: Are you presenting-

name: Ses05F_impro04_F031
chinese: 有魅力的。
english: charismatic.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M030
chinese: 展现你最好的一面？还是你自己。
english: putting your best foot forward? or you

name: Ses05F_impro04_F032
chinese: 是的，完全是这样，而且我不是--
english: yah, to-totally, and I'm not--

name: Ses05F_impro04_M031
chinese: 他们似乎喜欢你吗？我的意思是，你能从他们那里得到任何信息吗？
english: Do they seem to like you? I mean, Can you get any read from them?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F033
chinese: 是的，我一直这么认为，但是我只是觉得无论我去哪里，都充斥着很多口头上的奉承话。
english: Yeah, I always think so, but I- I just feel like it's a lot of lip service everywhere I go.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M032
chinese: 你有没有给他们打过电话，问为什么你没有得到这份工作？
english: Have you ever called them back and asked why you didn't get the job?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F034
chinese: 是的，我跟进。
english: Yeah, I follow up.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M033
chinese: 他们是否给出了任何具体原因，解释为什么他们没有选择你？
english: Do they give you any specifics as to why they didn't go with you?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F035
chinese: 就像-这是一个问题-
english: It's just like- it's a matter of-

name: Ses05F_impro04_F036
chinese: 不够高，不够漂亮，不——你知道这个地方是怎样的。
english: not tall enough, not pretty enough, not--you know how this place is.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M034
chinese: 是的，我明白。也许我们在谈论什么工作？
english: Yeah, I understand. maybe What jobs are we talking about?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F037
chinese: 我是说，任何事情。
english: I mean, anything.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M035
chinese: 喜欢-你理想的工作是什么？你想做什么？
english: Like- What's your ideal job?  What do you want to do?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F038
chinese: 嗯，我想成为一名工作的演员。
english: Well, I'd like to be a working actor.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M036
chinese: 当然。
english: Of course.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F039
chinese: 但是嗯--
english: But um--

name: Ses05F_impro04_M037
chinese: 每个人都想成为一名工作的演员，但他们都在做其他的工作。
english: Everyone wants to be a working actor, but they all work at something else.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F040
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M038
chinese: 那么还有什么其他的事情呢？
english: So what's the something else?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F041
chinese: 调酒，餐饮服务。
english: Bartending, catering.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M039
chinese: 你不能得到一个餐饮工作吗？好吧，我可以给一些朋友打电话。我-好吧，我之前确实给一些朋友打过电话，但是你只去了一次，然后再也没有回去过。
english: You can't get a catering gig?  Well, I can call some friends.  I- Well, I did call some friends before, but you went in once and then never went back.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F042
chinese: 你愿意代表我再打几个电话吗？我不会让你难堪的。
english: Would you be willing to make some more calls on my behalf? I won't--I won't make you look bad.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M040
chinese: 如果我- 如果你- 你会坚持下去吗？
english: If I- If you- Will you stick with it?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F043
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M041
chinese: 好的。好的，我会打电话给一些人。
english: Okay.  Okay, I'll call some people.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F044
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M042
chinese: 但是你必须继续寻找其他的东西。你也必须自己去做。好吗？
english: But you've got to keep looking for other stuff. You've got to do it on your own, too.  Okay?

name: Ses05F_impro04_F045
chinese: 我会的，我会的。
english: I will, I will.

name: Ses05F_impro04_F046
chinese: 是的，谢谢你。
english: Yeah, thank you.

name: Ses05F_impro04_M043
chinese: 你知道我会永远帮助你。
english: You know I'll always help you.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M000
chinese: 嗯，那么，你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so, what do you think?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我刚才说的是什么。
english: What I was just saying.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是。这是稍微夸张的科学事实。
english: It certainly is not.  It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F002
chinese: 有人给你兜售了一些虚假的东西，说这个神奇的事情会在海滩上发生。
english: It's P.R. somebody sold you a bill of goods that this magical thing would be happening on the beach.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M003
chinese: 我不是唯一一个，看看这些人。
english: I'm not the only one, look at all these people.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F003
chinese: 当然。每个人都被告知同样的事情，这让我们都感到兴奋。这让我们都不断回来寻找更多。这让我们认为生活随时都会开始，只要我们能找到合适的位置并参与其中。
english: Sure.  Everybody is told the same thing, it keeps us all excited.  It keeps us all coming back for more.  It keeps us thinking that life is gonna start now any minute if we can just find the right spot and get in on the action.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F004
chinese: 对不起。只是，对我来说，它只是鱼而已。
english: I'm sorry.  It's just, it's it's just fish to me.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M005
chinese: 嗯，卡拉，我可以问你一个问题吗？不要生气，但是你正在经期吗？
english: uh, Carla Can I ask you a question?  no, don't get upset, but are you having your period?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F005
chinese: 该死的，奥吉。真的，你总是问我那个问题。你为什么问我那个问题？我讨厌它。太侮辱人了。
english: God damn it, Augie.  Seriously, you always ask me that.  Why do you ask me that?  I hate it.  It's so insulting.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M006
chinese: 你有什么烦恼？
english: What's bugging you then?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F006
chinese: 我只是认为-我们只是对这个夜晚应该是什么样子有不同的想法。
english: I just - We just have different ideas of what this night is suppose to look like.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M007
chinese: 这并不复杂。我们下来这里，grunions到达，它们做它们的小鱼事情。我们说哦，啊，看这些小鱼。然后它们回家，我们也回家。
english: It's not that complicated.  We come down here, the grunions arrive, they do their little fish thing.  We say ooh, awe, look at the little fish.  And then they go home and we go home.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F007
chinese: 拜托，奥吉。长大点，我们不会去看灯笼鱼的。
english: For God's sake, Augie.  It's- Grow up, we're not going to see the grunion.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们从来没有。我们曾经有过吗？
english: We We don't ever.  Have we ever?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们已经错过了他们两次。这几乎是不常见的。
english: We've missed them twice.  That's hardly ever.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F009
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候，那就是永远。
english: Twice is every time we've tried, that's ever

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M010
chinese: 好的，我们今年会见到他们。
english: Well, we'll see them this year.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F010
chinese: 不，我们不会这样做。这就像是等待圣诞老人一样。我感觉好像我的整个生活都将站在海滩上，期待地睁大眼睛，双手整齐地放在我面前，等待鱼儿的出现。但是鱼儿不会出现。
english: No, we won't.  It's like waiting up for Santa Clause or something.  I feel like as though my whole life is going to be standing on the beach waiting with my eyes opened expectantly, my hands clasped neatly in front of me, waiting for fish to show up.  And the fish will not show up.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M011
chinese: 好的，它们只是鱼而已。这没什么可受创伤的。
english: Okey, They're just fish.  It's nothing to get traumatized over.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F011
chinese: 你不理解我说的任何事情。
english: You don't understand anything I am saying.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M012
chinese: 不，当然不是。
english: No, of course not.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F012
chinese: 我确实想看它。我总是想看它。我只是-我一直以为这次会是时候，但从来没有。
english: I did want to see it.  I always want to see it.  I just- I keep thinking this will be the time and it never is.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M013
chinese: 我试图逆向思考这个问题。但是我似乎无法确定一切出错的时间点。好吧，那么--
english: I'm trying to work this backwards.  But I can't seem to pinpoint the time where everything went wrong here.  Okay, so --

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M014
chinese: 你在和玛吉通电话的时候还好，吃晚饭也还好，说话时-嗯，洗碗，没问题。好吧。所以，我在洗澡，你在看电视，新闻，你说今晚有鱼群上岸，我说，太好了，我们去吧。我感觉很幸运。好的，我穿上外套，放出动物，把车从车库开出来。
english: you were fine on the phone call with Marge, eating dinner was fine,talking- uh washing the dishes, no problem.  All right.  So, I'm taking a shower, you're watching TV, the news and you say the grunions are running tonight and I say, Great, let's go.  I'm feeling lucky.  And so, all right, and I'm putting on my coat, I'm putting out the animals, I'm pulling the car out of the garage.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F013
chinese: 你还记得我们第一次去看grunion的时候吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久。我们以为我怀孕了。我们有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子。你叫我跳舞。我们脱掉了鞋子。当我们在跳舞时，你在我耳边说了一些最亲密的话，我能感受到它们，也能听到它们。
english: Do you remember the first time that we came to see the grunion?  It was about four years ago right after we got married.  We thought I was pregnant.  We had a bottle of champagne and no glasses.  You asked me to dance.  We took off our shoes.  And while we were dancing you said the most intimate things to me right in my ear so I could feel them as much as hear them.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F014
chinese: 我记得当时想着，终于。我和我应该感到的一样幸福。
english: And I remember thinking to myself, finally.  I am as happy as I am supposed to be.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M015
chinese: 等一下。我明白了。
english: Wait a minute.  I've got it.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F015
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，喝着瓶装香槟。
english: Dancing barefoot in the sand, drinking champagne out of the bottle.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M016
chinese: 是不是在车里呢？当我们经过Knickerbocker Liquor Locker时，你说，我们停下来买香槟。然后我说，时间浪费了，或者类似的话，对吧？你希望它像以前一样，对吗？
english: It was in the car, right?  When we were passing Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, you said, Let's stop and get champagne. and I said that times a wasting or something like that, right?  You wanted it to be like it was before, right?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F016
chinese: 我宁愿不去记住一些事情。我宁愿不去期望某事。
english: I would rather not remember some things.  I'd rather not hope for something.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M017
chinese: 好的。没问题。我完全理解。好的，嗯，听着。你想跳舞吗？
english: Okay.  All right No problem.  I totally understand. okey  um, listen.  Do you want to dance?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F017
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M018
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: Do you want me to go get some champagne?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F018
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M019
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F019
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M020
chinese: 你想让我吹你的耳朵吗？
english: What, you want me to blow in your ear?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F020
chinese: [笑声] 不。
english: [LAUGHTER] No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M021
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？- 什么？你想离婚吗？
english: Do you want to get married again?- What?  What, do you want a divorce?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_FXX0
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F021
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M022
chinese: 一个假期？
english: A vacation?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F022
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M023
chinese: 一只贵宾犬，一个背部按摩，一个水疗，一个自杀包？卡拉，你到底想要什么？
english: A poodle, a backrub, a spa, a suicide pack?  What, Carla, what the hell do you want?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F023
chinese: 我只是希望-我只是希望事情能按照它们应该发展的方式进行。
english: I just want- I just want things to turn out the way they are supposed to.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M024
chinese: 嗯，欢迎加入人类的行列。你觉得这是我计划中的吗？你觉得当我求婚时，我有这样一个美好的幻想，四年后我们会在海滩上为一些鱼争吵吗？
english: Well, welcome to the human race.  Do you think this is what I had planned?  Do you think that when I proposed that I had this great fantasy going that four years down the road we would end up arguing on the beach over some fish?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M025
chinese: 你觉得我会想到有时候你会像看待用过的纸巾一样看着我，或者我会看着你想，天哪，下一班去阿拉斯加的飞机是什么时候？不，不，我和你一样。我以为一切都会像桃子和玫瑰一样，脚趾上的沙子，头发中的风，鱼儿总是会来的。账单会自动支付。我们会有三个胖乎乎的红润孩子。但是，哈哈，宝贝，笑话是我们自己。
english: Do you think that I thought there would be times when you would look at me like I was used Kleenex or I would look at you and think, good God, when's the next flight to Alaska?  No.  No, I'm just like you. I thought it would all be like peaches and roses, and sand in our toes, and wind in our hair, and the fish would always come.  And the bills would magically pay themselves.  And we'd have three fat rosy kids.  But, ha ha, baby, the jokes on us!

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M026
chinese: 因为你知道你得到了什么，卡拉？你知道你得到了什么吗？就是这个。
english: Because you know what you get, Carla?  You know what you get?  This.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F024
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么东西？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M027
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F025
chinese: 当然，这是站在海滩上。这是等待。这是战斗。
english: Sure, this is standing on the beach.  This is waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M028
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F026
chinese: 但这根本不是我想要的。
english: But this isn't at all what I wanted it to be.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M029
chinese: 现在，我知道了。我也是这样。
english: Now, I know.  Me either

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F027
chinese: 这只是这样的。我的意思是，这是很多东西和一切。但是它不是，你知道的，其他的东西。我说的有道理吗？
english: This is just this.  I mean, it's a lot and everything.  But it's not, you know, something else.  Am I making any sense?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M030
chinese: 我正在尽我所能。
english: I'm trying the best I can.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F028
chinese: 我知道，奥吉。我知道。我知道。我知道这对你来说意义重大，而且很特别，你知道的，有沙子和月亮。但是。
english: I know that, Augie.  I do.  I know that. And and I know that this meant a lot to you and and it's special, you know, with the sand and the moon but.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F029
chinese: 但是我就是忍不住想着去别的地方。
english: But I just couldn't help thinking about being somewhere else.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M031
chinese: 也许如果你和其他人在一起，也是吗？
english: Maybe if you're with somebody else, too?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F030
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M032
chinese: 不，我知道。但我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know.  But I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F031
chinese: 天哪，奥吉，无论我在做什么，我宁愿和你在一起。
english: For heavens sake, Augie, whatever I am doing, I'd rather it be with you.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M033
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F032
chinese: 是的。你不知道吗？我的意思是，你可能是那个希望和别人在一起的人，一个不会对一切都那么困扰并且知道如何享受生活的人。
english: Yes.  Don't you know that? I mean, You're probably the one you wishes you were with somebody else, somebody who didn't take everything so hard and who knew how to enjoy herself.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M034
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我不会。
english: Actually, now that you mention it, no.  I don't.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F033
chinese: 好的。嗯，我们在错误的地方，但是我们和正确的人在一起。
english: Okay.  Well, we're in the wrong spot but we're with the right person.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M035
chinese: 我不知道。我觉得这个地方相当不错。我的意思是，从这里看月亮的景色很美。
english: I don't know.  I think this is a pretty good spot.  I mean, look at the view of the moon from here.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F034
chinese: 是的，我确实注意到了。它在水面上看起来非常美丽。大而明亮的白色月亮。
english: Yes, I did notice that.  It does look really beautiful over the water.  Big old white moon.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M036
chinese: 哦，看看我们这里有什么。
english: Oh, well look what we've got here.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F035
chinese: 奥吉，你带来了点心。
english: Augie, you brought refreshments.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M037
chinese: 好吧，这不是香槟。
english: Well, it isn't champagne.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F036
chinese: 好的，那么我们就不需要眼镜了。
english: Well, then we don't need glasses.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M038
chinese: 你还冷吗？还想回家吗？
english: Are you still cold?  Still want to go home?

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F037
chinese: 不，我开始觉得你可能是对的。我觉得这可能就是那个地方。奥吉，对不起。
english: No.  I'm beginning to think you might be right. I think  this might be the spot after all.  Augie, I'm sorry.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M039
chinese: 嘘。如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh.  If we're really quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_F038
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses05M_script02_2_M040
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F000
chinese: 你是我所知道唯一一个爱他父母的人。
english: You're the only one I know who loves his parents.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M000
chinese: 我知道。它不再流行了，是吗？
english: I know.  It's going out of style isn't it?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F001
chinese: 不，这很好。
english: No, it's good.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F002
chinese: 这里真可爱。空气很甜。
english: It's so lovely here.  The air is sweet.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M001
chinese: 所以你不后悔来了吗？
english: So you're not sorry you came?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F003
chinese: 不，但我不打算留下来。
english: No.  But I'm not going to stay.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M002
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F004
chinese: 嗯，你妈妈几乎告诉我离开。
english: Well your mother has much as told me to leave.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M003
chinese: 好的--
english: Well--

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F005
chinese: 好的，你看到了！还有你。你一直-
english: Well, you saw that! And you.  You've been-

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M004
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F006
chinese: 有点尴尬，我一来就这样。
english: Well sort of embarrassed soon as I came.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M005
chinese: 嗯，计划是在一周左右的时间里悄悄接近你。但是，他们认为我们已经准备好了。
english: Well the plan was to kind of sneak up on you over a period of a week or so.  But uh- they take it for granted that we're all set.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F007
chinese: 我想他们会-至少是你的母亲。
english: I figured they would- your mother at least.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M006
chinese: 你是怎么知道的？
english: How did you know?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F008
chinese: 嗯，从她的角度来看，我还有什么其他原因会来呢？
english: Well, from her point of view why else would I come?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M007
chinese: 好的，你想要吗？我猜你知道这就是我请你来的原因。
english: Well, would you want to?  I guess you know this is why I asked you to come.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F009
chinese: 我猜这就是我来的原因。
english: I guess this is why I came.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M008
chinese: 安妮，我爱你。我非常爱你。我爱你！
english: Anne, I love you.  I love you a great deal.  I love you!

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M009
chinese: 我-我-我没有想象力，这就是我知道该说的，我-我让你尴尬了。我不想在这里告诉你。我希望是在一个不同的地方，一个我们可以彼此陌生的地方。
english: I- I -I have no imagination, that's all I know what to say, I-I'm embarrassing you. I I didn't want to tell you here.  I wanted it to be some place different, some place where we could be new to each other you know.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M010
chinese: 你感觉这里不对，对吗- 这个院子，这把椅子？我希望你为我做好准备，安妮。我不想从任何事物中夺走你。
english: You feel it's wrong here, don't you- this yard, this chair?  I want you to be ready for me Annie.  I don't want to win you away from anything.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F010
chinese: 克里斯，我已经准备好很久了。
english: Chris, I've been ready for a long time.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M011
chinese: 然后，他永远离开了-你确定吗？
english: Then, he's gone forever-you're sure?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F011
chinese: 我在两年前差点结婚了。
english: I almost got married two years ago.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M012
chinese: 为什么你没有？
english: Why didn't you?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F012
chinese: 你开始给我写信。
english: You started to write me.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M013
chinese: 你感觉到那么久以前的事情了吗？
english: You felt something that far back?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F013
chinese: 每天自从。
english: Every day since.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M014
chinese: 安妮，为什么你没有对我说些什么？
english: Annie, why didn't you say something to me?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F014
chinese: 嗯，我一直在等你！我的意思是，在那之前你没有写信，当你写信的时候，你说了什么？我的意思是，克里斯，你确实可以含糊其辞。
english: Well I was waiting for you!  I mean I didn't-until then you hadn't written and when you write- when you wrote what did you say?  I mean you sure can be ambiguous Chris.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M015
chinese: 给我一个吻，安。给我一个-
english: Give me a kiss, Ann. Give me a-

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M016
chinese: 哦，天啊-我吻了安妮！我简直不敢相信我吻了安妮！我多久都想做这件事了。
english: Oh God- I kissed Annie! I can't believe I kissed Annie!  How long I've wanted to do this.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F015
chinese: 我永远不会原谅你。你为什么等了这么久？这段时间我一直在想，我是否傻了，为了想着你！
english: I'll never forgive you.  Why did you wait so long?  All this time I've been wondering if I was a fool for thinking of you!

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M017
chinese: 哦，安妮，我们现在要开始生活了。我会让你非常幸福的。
english: Oh Annie, we're going to live now.  I'm going to make you so happy.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F016
chinese: 不是那样的，你不是这样的。
english: Not like that, you're not.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M018
chinese: 我吻了你。
english: I kissed you.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F017
chinese: 像拉里的兄弟一样。像你一样做，克里斯。克里斯，怎么了？
english: Like Larry's brother.  Do it like you, Chris.  Chris, what's the matter?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M019
chinese: 让我们开车去某个地方吧。我-我想和你独处。
english: Let's Let's drive someplace.  I- I want to be alone with you.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F018
chinese: 不，那是什么，你的母亲？
english: No, what is it, your mother?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M020
chinese: 不，没有这样的事情。
english: No, nothing like that.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F019
chinese: 这是什么？即使在你的信中，也有一些羞愧的东西。
english: What is it?  Even in your letters, there is something ashamed.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M021
chinese: 是的，我想我一直都是。但是它正在离开我。
english: Yeah, I suppose I have been.  But it's going from me.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M022
chinese: 我不知道如何开始。
english: I don't know how to start.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F020
chinese: 这样是行不通的。
english: It wouldn't work like this.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M023
chinese: 这是-这与许多其他事情混在一起，我-
english: It's- It's mixed up with so many other things, I-

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M024
chinese: 记得我在海外的时候吗？我当时指挥着这个公司。
english: Remember when I was overseas?  I was in command of the company.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F021
chinese: 是的，当然可以。
english: yeah sure.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M025
chinese: 是的。我把它们弄丢了。
english: Yeah.  I lost them.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F022
chinese: 多少个？
english: how many?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M026
chinese: 几乎全部。
english: just about all.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F023
chinese: 哦，天哪。
english: Oh gee.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M027
chinese: 需要一点时间来摆脱这样的事情，因为他们不仅仅是男人。
english: Takes a little time to toss something like that off you know because they weren't just men-

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M028
chinese: 举个例子，有一次。连续几天都在下雨。然后有个孩子走到我面前，把他最后一双干袜子给了我。你知道的，他就是把它们放进了我的口袋里。
english: for instance, there's this one time.  It had been raining for several days.  And this kid came up to me and gave me his last pair of dry socks. you know, He just put them in my pocket.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M029
chinese: 我知道那不是什么大事，但那只是我所拥有的那种人。他们没有死。他们-他们为了彼此而自杀。
english: I know that- that's not a big thing, but it's just the kind of guys I had. They didn't die. They- They killed themselves for each other.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M030
chinese: 我的意思是，就是这样-再自私一点，他们今天还会在这里。
english: I mean that exactly that-a little more selfish and they would have still been here today.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M031
chinese: 我有一个理想，看着他们都倒下。一切都被摧毁了，看到了-
english: And I got an ideal, watching them all go down.  Everything was being destroyed see and-

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M032
chinese: 但是在同一时间，对我来说似乎有一种新的东西正在被创造出来，一种责任感，人对人。你明白我的意思吗？
english: but it seemed to me that something new was being created at the same time, a kind of responsibility, man for man.  Do you understand me?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M033
chinese: 并且展示出来，将它带回地球上，就像一座纪念碑一样。每个人都会有它站在他们身后，它会对他们产生影响。
english: And to show that-to-to bring that back onto the earth again like a- like a monument.  And everyone would have it standing behind them and- and it would make a difference for them.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M034
chinese: 然后我回家了，那真是令人难以置信。这里没有任何意义。
english: And then I went home and it was incredible.  It had no meaning here.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M035
chinese: 对他们来说，那就像是一场公交车事故。我又回到了和我爸爸一起工作的地方，再次陷入那个整个的竞争激烈的环境中。
english: It was all like some kind of bus accident to them.  I went back to work with my dad, in that whole rat race again.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M036
chinese: 我感受到了你说的话-不知怎么地感到羞愧，因为没有人有任何改变。这似乎让很多人变成了傻瓜。
english: And I felt what you said- ashamed somehow-because nobody had changed at all.  It seemed to make suckers out of a whole lot of guys. and

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M037
chinese: 感觉活着是错误的-打开那本银行账户；买那辆新车；看那台新冰箱。我的意思是，你可以把这些东西从战争中带出来，但如果你开着那辆车，你必须知道那是源于一个人对另一个人的爱。而你必须要比那更好一点！
english: It felt wrong to be alive-to open that bank-book; to buy that new car; to look at that new refrigerator.  I mean, you can take those things out of the war, but if you drive that car, you have to know that that comes from the love that a man has for a man.  And you've got to be a little bit better than that!

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M038
chinese: 如果你不是这样的话，那么这一切只是掠夺，上面沾满了鲜血，我不想要其中的任何一样！我猜这也包括你。
english: And if you're not, then it's all just loot and it's got blood on it, and I don't want any of it!  And, I guess that included you.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F024
chinese: 你还有那种感觉吗？
english: Do you still feel like that?

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M039
chinese: 我现在想要你，安妮。
english: I I want you now, Annie.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F025
chinese: 因为你不能再这样感受了，克里斯，你听到我说的吗？我的意思是，你拥有的一切都是你应得的。包括我在内。你的父亲呢？你的父亲让数百架飞机起飞，你应该为此感到骄傲。一个人应该因此而得到报酬。
english: Because you can't feel like that anymore Chris, you hear me?  I mean everything that you have, you deserve.  And that includes me.  And your father?  Your father put hundreds of planes in the air, you should be proud.  A man should be paid for that.

name: Ses05F_script01_3_M040
chinese: 哦，安妮。安妮，我将让你发大财！
english: Oh Annie.  Annie, I am going to make you a fortune!

name: Ses05F_script01_3_F026
chinese: 我会用财富做什么？
english: What would I do with a fortune?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F000
chinese: 为什么你邀请她来这里？
english: Why did you invite her here?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M000
chinese: 为什么那件事会困扰你？
english: Why does that bother you?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F001
chinese: 她在纽约已经待了三年半了。为什么突然这样？
english: She's been in New York three and a half years.  Why all of the sudden?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M001
chinese: 嗯，也许吧。也许她只是想再次见到她。
english: Well maybe.  Maybe she just wanted to see her again.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F002
chinese: 没有人会为了看而走七百英里。
english: Nobody comes seven hundred miles just to see.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M002
chinese: 你是什么意思？他一生都住在那个女孩隔壁，为什么他不想再见她呢？不要那样看着我，他对我说的和对你说的一样少。
english: What did you mean? He lived next door to the girl all of his life, why wouldn't he want to see her again? Don't look at me like that, he didn't tell me any more than he told you.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F003
chinese: 他不打算和她结婚。
english: He's not going to marry her.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M003
chinese: 你怎么知道他是否在考虑这件事？
english: How do you know he is even thinking about it?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F004
chinese: 它有那种感觉。
english: It's got that about it.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M004
chinese: 好的，那又怎样。
english: Well, so what.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F005
chinese: 这里发生了什么事，乔？
english: What's going on here, Joe?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M005
chinese: 现在，听着，凯特，只是-
english: Now, listen, Kate, just-

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F006
chinese: 她不是他的女孩。她知道她不是。
english: She's not his girl.  She knows she's not.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M006
chinese: 你无法读懂她的心思。
english: You can't read her mind.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F007
chinese: 她是...那她为什么还是单身呢？纽约到处都是男人，为什么她还没有结婚？可能有一百个人告诉她她很愚蠢，但她一直在等待。
english: She's . . . Then why is she still single.  New York is full of men, why isn't she married?  Probably a hundred people told her she's foolish, but she's waited.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M007
chinese: 你怎么知道她为什么等待？
english: How do you know why she's waited?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F008
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的事情 - 她像一块忠诚的石头一样，我最糟糕的时刻我想着她在等待，我再次知道我是对的。
english: Because she knows what I know - she's faithful as a rock and my worst moments I think of her waiting and I know again that I'm right.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M008
chinese: 看，天气很好。我们为什么要争吵呢？
english: Look.  It's a nice day.  Why are we arguing?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F009
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢动摇她的信仰。陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in her- this house dares shake her faith.  Strangers might, but not his father, and not his brother.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M009
chinese: 你想让我做什么？你想要什么 -
english: What do you want me to do? What do you want--

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F010
chinese: 我希望你假装他会回来！
english: I want you to pretend like he's coming back!

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M010
chinese: 但是，凯特...
english: But, Kate...

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F011
chinese: 因为如果他不回来的话，那我就会自杀。
english: Because if he's not coming back, then I'll kill myself.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M011
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F012
chinese: 笑。嘲笑我吧，但是当她在他的床上入睡时，他的纪念品会碎成碎片，那会发生什么？
english: Laugh.  Laugh at me, but what happens the night that she goes to sleep in his bed, and his memorial breaks in pieces?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M012
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F013
chinese: 和我一起相信，乔。我不能独自站立。
english: Believe with me, Joe.  I can't stand alone.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M013
chinese: 冷静一点！
english: Calm yourself!

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F014
chinese: 仅上周，在底特律又出现了一个男孩，失踪的时间比拉里更长，你亲自看到了。
english: Only last week, another boy turned up in Detroit, been missing longer than Larry, you read it yourself.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M014
chinese: 好了，好了。冷静一点。
english: All right, all right.  Calm yourself.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F015
chinese: 你最重要的是要相信，乔。
english: You above all, have got to believe, Joe.

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M015
chinese: 为什么是我，为什么是我中的所有人？
english: Why me, above all?

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F016
chinese: 你必须相信。你必须--
english: You've got to believe. You've got to--

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M016
chinese: 你是什么意思，我最重要吗？看看你自己，你在发抖！
english: What do you mean me above all?  Look at you.  You're shaking!

name: Ses05F_script01_2_F017
chinese: 我无能为力！
english: I can't help it!

name: Ses05F_script01_2_M017
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的？你到底怎么了，凯特？
english: What have I got to hide?  What the hell is the matter with you, Kate?

name: Ses05F_impro06_M000
chinese: 梅丽莎怎么了？
english: What's wrong Melissa?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F000
chinese: 我一个好朋友前几天去世了。
english: A good friend of mine passed away the other day.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M001
chinese: 哦不，我很抱歉。发生了什么事？
english: Oh no, I'm so sorry. What happened?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F001
chinese: 哦，他们得了一些相当进展的癌症。
english: Oh they had some pretty progressive cancer,

name: Ses05F_impro06_F002
chinese: 转移并且它很久了，他们知道情况不妙，但是-
english: metastasized and it was old and they knew that it wasn't looking good, but-

name: Ses05F_impro06_M002
chinese: 那真是太糟糕了。我非常抱歉。你认识他很好吗？
english: That's the worst.  I'm so sorry.  Did you know him well?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F003
chinese: 是的。我们是的。相当亲近。
english: Yeah.  We were.  Pretty close.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F004
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro06_M003
chinese: 我非常抱歉，这是-
english: I am so sorry,  It's-

name: Ses05F_impro06_M004
chinese: 当他们那样走的时候，这是最糟糕的。[垃圾] 他年轻吗？
english: It's the worst when they go like that. [GARBAGE] Was he young?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F005
chinese: 有点。
english: Kind of.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F006
chinese: 当他们感到痛苦时，你知道，观看是很困难的。
english: It's hard to watch when it's painful for them, you know.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M005
chinese: 绝对，绝对。
english: Absolutely, absolutely.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M006
chinese: 这是思考的事情
english: It's the think

name: Ses05F_impro06_F007
chinese: 我只是，我不知道。
english: I just, I don't know.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M007
chinese: 没有理由这样做。
english: There's no reason for it.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F008
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F009
chinese: 他本来可以...他非常棒。
english: And he could of...  He was pretty awesome

name: Ses05F_impro06_M008
chinese: 是吗？他做了什么？他们做了什么？你怎么认识他的？
english: Yeah?  What'd he do?  What did they do?  How'd you know him?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F010
chinese: 嗯，我们一起长大。
english: Uh,  We grew up together.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M009
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M010
chinese: 他也是一个演员吗，还是-？
english: Is he an actor too, or-?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F011
chinese: 是的，他做了很多事情，但我们有时候是一起行动的。
english: Yeah, he kind of did a lot of things, but we acted together, sometimes.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F012
chinese: 我真的为他的家人感到非常难过，你知道的。
english: I feel really bad for his family, you know.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M011
chinese: 是的，当然，当然。
english: Yes of course, of course.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F013
chinese: 失去一个孩子一定非常、非常困难。
english: It must be really, really hard to lose a child.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M012
chinese: 他和他的家人关系很亲密吗？
english: Was he very close to his family?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F014
chinese: 是的。他们非常支持，就像整个过程中一直都在支持，但是-
english: Yeah.  And they were really supportive, like through the whole process, but-

name: Ses05F_impro06_M013
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F015
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro06_F016
chinese: 我无法想象他的父母正在经历什么。
english: I can't imagine what his- what his parents are going through.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M014
chinese: 当然不是。你根本不知道失去一个孩子是什么感觉。
english: Of course not.  You have no idea what it's like to lose a kid.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F017
chinese: 是的，我只是会想念他。
english: Yeah, I'm just going to miss him.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M015
chinese: 当然。如果有任何事情我可以帮忙的，你只需要告诉我。好吗？
english: Of course. If there's anything I can do, you just let me know.  Okay?

name: Ses05F_impro06_F018
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M016
chinese: 当然。
english: Of course.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M017
chinese: 有安排葬礼吗？或者-
english: Is there a funeral planned? or-

name: Ses05F_impro06_F019
chinese: 是的，他们打算举行某种纪念仪式或其他活动。
english: Yeah, they're going to do some sort of memorial service or something.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M018
chinese: 好的，如果你想让我和你一起去，我会去的。
english: Cool, Well, If you want me to go with you, I will.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F020
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M019
chinese: 没问题。
english: No problem.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F021
chinese: 真的很奇怪，你知道的，当你非常了解一个人，然后...
english: It's really bizarre, you know, when you know somebody really well, and then...

name: Ses05F_impro06_F022
chinese: 发生了一些事情，他们死了，就像是-
english: something happens and they die and it's like-

name: Ses05F_impro06_F023
chinese: 真的很难想象，就像你将继续生活一样，而那个人却停止了。
english: really hard to imagine that like you're going to continue to live, and that person's just going to have stopped.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M020
chinese: 对，这根本没有任何意义，它不是真实的。它感觉不真实。
english: Right, it just doesn't make any sense, it's not real.  It doesn't feel real.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M021
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F024
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro06_M022
chinese: 你知道吗，它最终会过去的，我的意思是它永远不会过去，它会一直存在，你会永远记得所有的事情，但你知道的。我猜它会变得更容易。
english: Do you know what, it's going to pass,eventually, I mean it'll never pass, it'll always be there, and you'll always remember and everything like that, but you know.  It'll get easier I guess.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F025
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M023
chinese: 那是最好的表达方式。
english: That's the best way to put it.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F026
chinese: 很难说再见。
english: It's hard to say good-bye.

name: Ses05F_impro06_M024
chinese: 绝对。
english: Absolutely.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F027
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro06_M025
chinese: 你知道吗，如果是我死了，我真的希望你也会哭泣和非常难过。所以，我认为你应该一定要这样做，因为这是它应该是的。
english: Do you know what, if it was me that died, I'd really want you to be crying and being really upset too any way. So, I think you should definitely do this, because it's trying what it's supposed to be.

name: Ses05F_impro06_F028
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro06_F029
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: yeah yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F000
chinese: 瑞安，怎么了？
english: Ryan, what's wrong?

name: Ses05M_impro06_M000
chinese: 我刚刚得到了一些坏消息。
english: I just got some bad news.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F001
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05M_impro06_M001
chinese: 我的朋友Shotty去世了。
english: My friend, Shotty, passed away.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F002
chinese: 哦，非常抱歉。
english: Oh, I'm so sorry

name: Ses05M_impro06_M002
chinese: 最后，他已经生病了一段时间了。他得了癌症。
english: The end, he's been sick for awhile.  He had cancer.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F003
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh, my gosh.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M003
chinese: 是的。只是，我从来没有想过它会真的发生，你知道吗？我的意思是-他是一个如此坚强的人，对每件事情总是充满积极的态度。
english: Yeah.  It's just, I never thought it would actually happen, you know? I mean- He's such a fighter and he's always so positive about everything.

name: Ses05M_impro06_FXX0
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M004
chinese: 你知道，他本来要做的，我们一直到最后都在谈论我们要做的事情，你知道的，当他最终战胜了这个可恶的癌症，你知道的，我们本来要做的事情。
english: You know, he was gonna, and we -- all the way up to the end we were just talking about how- you know all the stuff we were gonna do and, you know.  When he finally kicked this stupid cancer, you know, and we were gonna --

name: Ses05M_impro06_M005
chinese: 他想要旅行，你知道的。而且他非常有才华。可能是我一生中遇到的最有才华的人。
english: he wanted to travel, you know.  And he's so talented.  Probably the most talented person I have ever met in my entire life.

name: Ses05M_impro06_FXX1
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F004
chinese: 他做了什么？
english: What did he do?

name: Ses05M_impro06_M006
chinese: 他是一个设计师，你知道的。但他做了所有的事情。你知道，他画画，他做服装设计，他做舞台设计，他做灯光，他是--
english: He was a designer, you know.  But he did everything. You know, He painted and he- and he did costume design, he did set design, he did lighting, he was --

name: Ses05M_impro06_M007
chinese: 他只是做了一切。他真的，真的是我一生中遇到的最有才华的人。
english: he just did everything.  He was literally, literally the most talented guy I have ever met in my entire life.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M008
chinese: 他现在走了，我--我简直不敢相信。
english: And he's gone now and I  -- I just can't believe it.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F005
chinese: 是的。我很抱歉。
english: Yeah.  I'm so sorry.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M009
chinese: 我的意思是，有时候你觉得，你知道，你只是在进行一次对话，然后--
english: I mean, one second you think, you know, you're just having a conversation and then --

name: Ses05M_impro06_M010
chinese: 你知道的，有时候你会想打电话，或者你会想告诉某人一些事情，或者类似的情况。你知道我是什么意思吗？就像那个人就是我和他一起做那些事情的人。你知道，就是那个我需要时刻打电话告诉事情的人。
english: you know, sometimes you think you want to make that phone call, or you think you want to tell somebody something, or something like that.  Do you know what I mean?  Like that's -- he was the person that I did that with.  You know, like, that's the person who I needed to call to tell things to all the time.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F006
chinese: 你们一直都-
english: You guys have been-

name: Ses05M_impro06_M011
chinese: 现在我不再拥有那个人了，你知道的。而且，这只是，你。
english: And now I don't have that person anymore, you know.  And it's -- -- it's just, you.

name: Ses05M_impro06_FXX2
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M012
chinese: 你认为随着年龄的增长，事情会变得更容易，你知道，当你年纪越大时，你会发现-
english: You think that things get easier, you know, as you as you get older and you -

name: Ses05M_impro06_M013
chinese: 而且情况只会变得更糟。一切都变得更糟，一切都是坏的，一直都是这样；人们死去，你的朋友死去，家人死去，你最好的朋友死去。这是-
english: and it just gets worse.  It just gets worse, everything is bad all the time; people die, your friends die, family dies, your best friends die. it's-

name: Ses05M_impro06_F007
chinese: 对不起，我-
english: I'm sorry. I-

name: Ses05M_impro06_M014
chinese: 你总是在想，你知道当你还是个小孩的时候，你会觉得某件事情会发生，就像，当我长大了一切都会变好，你知道吗？
english: You always think, you know when you were- you know when you were a little kid and you think something is gonna happen, like, it will all be better when I am older, you know?

name: Ses05M_impro06_M015
chinese: 我不知道为什么人们不直接告诉你，这件事无论如何都会很糟糕。你知道，就像，这有什么意义呢？
english: And I don't know why people don't just tell you off the bat that it's just gonna suck anyway.  You know, like, what's the point?

name: Ses05M_impro06_M016
chinese: 所有最好的人都会死去，所有坏人都会活下来，而且他们无论如何都会让你的生活变得糟糕。
english: All the best people die, all the bad people live and they make life shitty for you anyway.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F008
chinese: 哇，Ryan，我知道你现在很伤心，但我不认为你总是感觉这样。
english: Wow, Ryan I know that you are hurting right now but I don't think you always feel like that.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M017
chinese: 不，你是对的。我不知道。你是对的。
english: No, you're right.  I don't.  You're right.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M018
chinese: 即使，是的 - 他不会这样感觉，他永远不会希望我有这种感觉。当然不会，但这就是我现在的状态 - 我不知道还能做什么。
english: Even, yeah -- he doesn't he would never feel that way, he would never want me to feel that way.  Of course not, but that's just where I am right now and -- -- I don't know what else to do with it.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F009
chinese: 是的，我理解。我认为悲伤是非常健康的。
english: Yeah. I understand.  I think it's really healthy to grieve.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M019
chinese: 我只是想念他。
english: I just miss him.

name: Ses05M_impro06_F010
chinese: 如果有任何我可以为你做的事情，我会在那里支持你。
english: If there's anything I can do to be there for you.

name: Ses05M_impro06_M020
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F000
chinese: 我可以帮助你吗？
english: Can I help you?

name: Ses05M_impro01_M000
chinese: 是的，我只是在拿我的身份证。我需要一张新的身份证。
english: Yes, I'm um- just getting my I.D.  I need a new I.D.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F001
chinese: 哦，这个-这个表格你拿错了。你需要去D.M.V.另一边的另一条线上。
english: Oh, this- this form that you have is the wrong form.  You need to go over to the other line on the other side of the D.M.V..

name: Ses05M_impro01_M001
chinese: 你是什么意思？我填好了我的表格，然后匆忙去办理了我的身份证。
english: What do you mean?  I filled out my forms and I rushed to get my I.D.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F002
chinese: 对，但这是错误的表格。有人给了你错误的表格。
english: Right, but this is the wrong form.  Somebody gave you the wrong form.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M002
chinese: 错误的表格？
english: The wrong form?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F003
chinese: 是的。所以，我不能——我什么都做不了。
english: Yeah.  So, I can't -- I can't do anything-

name: Ses05M_impro01_M003
chinese: 这个表格有什么问题？上面写着新的身份证。
english: What's wrong about this form?  It says new I.D. on it.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F004
chinese: 不，但这是用于替换的，你需要一个全新的许可证，作为加利福尼亚州的一个全新的许可证。
english: No, but this is for um- replacements and you need a new -- whole new license as a California --

name: Ses05M_impro01_M004
chinese: 什么是区别？那个表格和这个表格之间有什么区别？
english: What's the difference?  What's the difference between that form and this form?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F005
chinese: 先生，请不要对我发脾气。
english: Sir, don't get an attitude with me.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M005
chinese: 我不会得到一个 - 好吧，你在这条线上等着，不要有态度。
english: I'm not getting a -- well, you wait in this line and not get an attitude.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F006
chinese: 不，我理解，这里有很多人。但是我告诉你的是，对于不同的州来说情况是不同的，而且由于你要在加利福尼亚州获得新的驾照，你必须填写一个不同的表格。
english: No, I understand and there are a lot of people here.  But what I'm telling you is that it's different for different states and since your getting a new license in the state of California -- You have to fill out a different form than you did.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M006
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M007
chinese: 正确的。
english: right.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M008
chinese: 那么，当我之前向他们展示了我的身份证并且告诉他们我需要办理新的身份证时，为什么他们没有告诉我填写正确的表格呢？
english: Well then, when I showed them my I.D. before and I said I had to get a new I.D, why didn't they tell me to fill out the right form?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F007
chinese: 我不知道。我不知道是谁告诉你的。不是我。
english: I don't know.  I don't know who told you.  It wasn't me.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M009
chinese: 好吧，就是站在你旁边的那个女孩。我们可以问她为什么不让我填写正确的表格吗？
english: Well, it was this girl standing right next to you.  Can we ask her why she didn't let me fill out the right form?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F008
chinese: 你- 如果你想的话，你可以问她，但她很忙，可能不会回答你。
english: You- You can ask her if you want, but she's busy and she probably won't answer you.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M010
chinese: 这太荒谬了。我已经在这里等了四十五分钟了。只是站在这条队伍里。我花了十五分钟填写那张表格。
english: This is ridiculous.  I've been here for forty five minutes. Just standing in this one line. I took fifteen minutes to fill out that form.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F009
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F010
chinese: 先生，你- 我是说
english: Sir, you- I mean

name: Ses05M_impro01_M011
chinese: 你知道我要重新开始并填写新表格需要多长时间吗？
english: Do you know how long it's gonna take me to start all over and fill out the new form?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F011
chinese: 你可以随意浪费多少都可以
english: You can waist as much as you want

name: Ses05M_impro01_F012
chinese: 是的。我知道这可能需要一分钟。但是你--所以你最好现在开始。
english: Yeah.  I know it's gonna take a minute.  But you-- so you might as well get started now.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M012
chinese: 现在开始也许是个好主意？但是就拿这一个吧。
english: Might as well get started now? but Just take this one.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F013
chinese: 我不能接受这个，先生。这是错误的表格。
english: I can't take this one, sir. this is the wrong form.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M013
chinese: 为什么我们不能只是-你知道吗？如果我们假装我正在更新我的加利福尼亚身份证，然后我们就不告诉任何人-我从另一个州获得了新的身份证，怎么样？
english: Why can't we just -- you know what?  How about if we just pretend that I'm getting a -- renewing my California I.D. and we just don't tell anybody -- That I'm getting a new one from a different state?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F014
chinese: 先生，请不要浪费我的时间。
english: Sir, please don't waste my time.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F015
chinese: 关于这件事，我无能为力。你需要拿这张其他表格，填写完并排队到另一条线去。
english: There is nothing I can do about it.  You need to take this other form and fill it out and go stand in the other line.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M014
chinese: 来吧！你知道的——你不能只是接受——对规则做个小例外吗？我知道你们会有例外。我看到了——你知道，如果我是你的朋友，你认识我，或者类似的情况，你可能会为我做个小例外，对吗？
english: Come on!  You know -- you can't just take -- make a little exception to the rule?  I know that you guys make exceptions.  I see -- you know, if I was-if I was your friend and you knew me, or something like that, you'd probably make a little exception for me wouldn't you?

name: Ses05M_impro01_F016
chinese: 它们是不同的形式，我们对它们进行不同的处理。
english: They're different forms, we process them all different-

name: Ses05M_impro01_M015
chinese: 你不会吗？哦，拜托。你只需告诉我。你会为我做个例外的。
english: Wouldn't you? Oh, come on.  you just tell me.  You would make an exception for me.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F017
chinese: 我——绝对不会例外。
english: I -- there's no way I'd make an exception.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F018
chinese: 先生，请不要对我摆出高人一等的姿态。我不能例外。我没有-我没有那个权力。这是一个不同的形式。
english: Sir, don't patronize me.  I can't make an exception.  I don't- I don't have the power to do that.  It's a different form.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M016
chinese: 嘘...我知道你有能力做到这件事。
english: Shh...I know you've got the power to do that.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F019
chinese: 它们被处理的方式不同。
english: They're processed differently.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M017
chinese: 那是胡说八道-你是废物。我不相信。
english: That's crap- You're crap.  I don't buy it.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F020
chinese: 先生，您需要去排另外一条队伍。
english: Sir, you're gonna have to go stand in the other line.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M018
chinese: 我不会离开这条线，直到我拿到我的新身份证。就是这么简单。我不会离开这条线，直到我拿到我的新身份证。
english: I'm not leaving this line until I get my new I.D.  That's as simple as it is.  I'm not leaving this line until I get my new I.D.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F021
chinese: 我要找保安过来，让他们护送你离开。
english: I'm gonna- I'm gonna bring security over and have them escort you out.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M019
chinese: 好吧，那你只会显得很愚蠢，因为我只是在等待一张身份证，而你会让安保把我带走，因为我想要我的身份证。
english: Well, then you're just gonna look stupid because I'm just waiting for an I.D. and you're gonna make security take me out because I want my I.D.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M020
chinese: 那只是愚蠢的。
english: That's just dumb.

name: Ses05M_impro01_F022
chinese: 但是你填错了表格，站错了队，浪费了我们双方的时间。
english: But you filled out the wrong form and you're in the wrong line and you're wasting both of our times.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M021
chinese: 我填错了表格，因为他们让我填错了表格！
english: I filled out the wrong form because they made me fill out the wrong form!

name: Ses05M_impro01_F023
chinese: 很不幸，先生。您现在需要去排另一条队了。
english: Well, that's unfortunate, sir.  You're gonna have to go stand in the other line now.

name: Ses05M_impro01_M022
chinese: 这真是糟糕。你知道吗，我甚至不知道为什么我会在这个州。见鬼加利福尼亚。我要离开这里。
english: This is crap.  You know, I don't even know why I'm in this state.  Screw California.  I'm out of here.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M000
chinese: 好神啊。
english: Good God.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: You think it's them?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F001
chinese: 弗雷达是唯一一个知道我们在这里的人，而且她不会打电话上来。
english: Freda is the only one who knows we're up here, and she wouldn't call up.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M002
chinese: 那么就一定是他们了。
english: It must be them then.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们将做什么？
english: What will be do?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M003
chinese: 亲爱的，无论发生什么事情，我们都没事，对吗？
english: We're all right, darling, aren't we whatever happens?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远，我的甜蜜。
english: Now and always my sweet.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的事情。
english: It was bound to happen sooner or later.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好？你好？什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello?  Hello?  What?  Wrong number.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F005
chinese: 哦，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: Oh, it sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M006
chinese: 哦，如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办？
english: Oh, what shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M007
chinese: 以最完美的平衡姿势。
english: With the most perfect poise.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F007
chinese: 是的，我可能会行一个宫廷礼节。
english: Yes, I shall probably do a Court Curtsey.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M008
chinese: 【笑声】哦，当一个人快乐的时候，那些本应最重要的事情似乎一点都不重要，不是吗？
english: [LAUGHTER] Oh, the things that ought to matter most dreadfully don't seem to matter at all when one's happy, do they?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F008
chinese: 嗯...很遗憾，一个人不能永远保持这种状态。
english: Um... It's a pity that one can't stay this way forever.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M009
chinese: 亲爱的，不要这样说。
english: Darling, don't say that.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F009
chinese: 嗯，这是真的。
english: Well, it's true.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F010
chinese: 整个事情真的相当荒谬。
english: The whole business is really rather ridiculous.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M010
chinese: 意思是那个神圣而美丽的东西，爱？
english: Meaning that sacred and beautiful thing, love?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F011
chinese: 意思就是那样。
english: Meaning exactly that.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M011
chinese: 这一切意味着什么？这是我在不断追求终极真理中问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: What does it all mean?  That's what I asked myself in my ceaseless quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God, what does it all mean?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F012
chinese: 不要嘲笑我，我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me; I'm serious.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M012
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真，那只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious my dear one, that's just what they want.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F013
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M013
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的凡人。嘲笑他们。轻率一点。嘲笑一切，他们所有神圣的陈词滥调。轻率会使他们该死的甜蜜和光明中的酸液显露出来。
english: All the futile mortals who try to make life unbearable.  Laugh at them.  Be flippant.  Laugh at everything, all their sacred shibboleths.  Flippancy brings out the acid in their damned sweetness and light.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F014
chinese: 嗯，如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们自己。
english: Well, if I laugh at everything, I must laugh at us, too.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M014
chinese: 当然你必须。我们是好笑的人物 [笑声]。
english: Certainly you must.  We're figures of fun alright [LAUGHTER].

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F015
chinese: 嗯，如果-当我们的爱情发生了什么-
english: Well, what if-what happens when our love-

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F016
chinese: 这种压倒一切的爱情会持续多久？
english: How long will it last, this overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M015
chinese: 谁知道？
english: Who knows?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F017
chinese: 嗯，我们总是想要争吵和打架吗？
english: Well, shall we always want to bicker and fight?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M016
chinese: 不，那火焰将会随着我们的激情逐渐消失。
english: No, that fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F018
chinese: 哦，亲爱的，我们会喜欢那样吗？
english: Oh, dear, shall we like that?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M017
chinese: 这完全取决于我们打得有多好。
english: It all depends on how well we played.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F019
chinese: 好吧，如果我们其中一个死了，另一个会笑吗？
english: Well, what if one of us dies, does the other laugh then?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M018
chinese: 是的，是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes, yes, with all his might.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F020
chinese: 嗯，那可是相当严重的，不是吗？
english: Well, that's rather serious, isn't it?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M019
chinese: 不，不是的。死亡是非常可笑的。像这样一个狡猾的小谜团，全靠镜子完成。
english: No, no it isn't.  Death is very laughable.  Come such a cunning little mystery all done with mirrors.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F021
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: My dear, I do believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M020
chinese: 不，从长远来看，每个人都是如此。让我们肤浅地同情那些可怜的哲学家。让我们吹喇叭和吱吱声--
english: no, So is everyone else in the long run.  Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and --

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M021
chinese: 尽情享受派对，就像我们能够喜欢的那样，就像非常少、相当愚蠢的小学生一样。【垃圾】让我们品味这一刻的愉悦。
english: enjoy the party as long as we can like very little quite idiotic schoolchildren. [garbage] Let's savor the delight of the moment.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M022
chinese: 亲爱的，过来亲吻我吧，不然你的身体就会腐烂，蠕虫会从你的眼眶里爬进爬出。
english: Darling, come here and kiss me before your body rots and worms pop in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F022
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliot, worms don't pop.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M023
chinese: 我不介意你做什么，你可以把全身涂成绿色，赤裸着在凡尔赛广场上跳舞，和世界上的每个男人跑掉。只要我知道你最爱我，我就不会说一句话。
english: I don't mind what you do, see, you could paint your body green all over and dance naked through the Place Vendome and run off with every man in the world.  And I shan't say a word as long as I know that you love me best.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哦，谢谢亲爱的。对你也一样，除非我看到你盯着别的女人看，否则我会杀了你。
english: Oh, thank you dear.  And the same goes for you except that if I so much as see you looking at another woman, I'll kill you.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M024
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Do you remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F024
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M025
chinese: 那个你买了那条小彩绘木蛇并把它放在我的床上的地方。
english: The one where you bought that little painted wooden snake and put it on my bed.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F025
chinese: 查尔斯。那是他的名字。他扭动得如此美丽。
english: Charles.  That was his name.  He did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M026
chinese: 可怕的事情，我讨厌它。
english: Horrible thing, I hate it.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F026
chinese: 我知道。你把他扔出窗户，扔进了运河。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: I know.  You threw him out the window into the canal.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M027
chinese: 那场争吵持续了多久？
english: How long did that row last?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F027
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M028
chinese: 最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的新睡袍上。
english: The worst one was in Cannes when your curling irons burnt a hole in my new dressing gown.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F028
chinese: 嗯，它也把浴室里的所有毛巾都烧掉了。
english: Uh- It burned all the towels in the bathroom, too.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M029
chinese: 哦，那真是个激动人心的场面，不是吗？
english: Oh, that was quite a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F029
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you ever hit me.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M030
chinese: 哦，我没有打你很重。
english: Oh, I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F030
chinese: 然后经理走进来，发现我们在地板上像豹子一样打滚、咬人和抓人。
english: And then the manager came in and found us rolling around on the floor biting and scratching like panthers.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M031
chinese: [笑声] 我永远不会忘记他的脸。
english: [LAUGHTER] I shall never forget his face.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F031
chinese: 哦，荒谬。完全荒谬。
english: Oh, ridiculous. utterly ridiculous

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M032
chinese: 哦，那时候我们还很年轻。
english: Oh, we were very much younger then.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F032
chinese: 而且非常愚蠢。
english: And very much sillier.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_M033
chinese: 哦，事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: Oh, As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses05F_script03_1_F033
chinese: 你知道什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F000
chinese: 所以猜猜看。
english: So guess what.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M000
chinese: 什么
english: what

name: Ses05F_impro07_F001
chinese: 我进入了大学。
english: I got into college.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M001
chinese: 闭嘴。你得到了什么，你被哪所学校录取了？请。
english: Shut up.  What'd you get, where'd you get accepted to? please

name: Ses05F_impro07_F002
chinese: 美国法典。
english: U.S.C..

name: Ses05F_impro07_M002
chinese: 哦，甜蜜。
english: Oh, sweet.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F003
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M003
chinese: 所以你不打算离开我。
english: So you're not going to leave me.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F004
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M004
chinese: 哦，好好好好好好。
english: oh, good good good good good good.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F005
chinese: 我会留在城里。
english: I'll stay in town.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M005
chinese: 你打算住在校园吗？你打算住在哪里？
english: Are you going to live on campus?  Where are you going to live?

name: Ses05F_impro07_F006
chinese: 嗯，我不知道。
english: Uh- I don't know.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M006
chinese: 嗯！待在这里。就像去上学一样。因为你离我这么近。
english: Uh! stay over here.  Like travel to school. because you are so close to me

name: Ses05F_impro07_F007
chinese: 嗯，我不想，我不想和我妈妈住在一起。
english: Well, I don't want to, I don't want to live with my mom.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M007
chinese: 好的，你是对的，你是对的，你是对的，对的。也许我们应该一起找个地方。
english: Okay, you're right, you're right, you're right,  right.  Maybe we should get a place together.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F008
chinese: 哇，这是个好主意。你想住在哪里？
english: Whoa.  What an idea.  Where would you want to live?

name: Ses05F_impro07_M008
chinese: 那将会很棒。
english: That'll be awesome.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M009
chinese: 我不知道。嗯。我不介意住在美国南加州大学校园附近，你知道的，但我现在不打算上学。
english: I don't know.  Well.  I wouldn't mind living by the U.S.C. campus, you know, but I'm not going to go to school right now, so.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F009
chinese: 没问题。你不必去学校就能住在南加州大学附近。
english: That's fine.  You don't have to go to school to live near U.S.C..

name: Ses05F_impro07_M010
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M011
chinese: 但是我很想去参加所有的美国派对，和你一起做所有那些疯狂的事情。
english: But I'd love to go all the US- all the U.S.C. parties and do all that crazy stuff with you.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F010
chinese: 好吧。
english: Fair enough.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F011
chinese: 哇，这将会非常有趣。
english: Whoa, this is going to be so much fun.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M012
chinese: 这将会非常有趣。是的。
english: it is going to be so much fun. Yes.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M013
chinese: 嗯！我很高兴你不打算离开。
english: Uh! I'm so happy that you're not going to go away.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F012
chinese: 谢谢你。我知道，我真的，真的，真的很兴奋。
english: Thank you. I know, I'm really, really, really excited.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M014
chinese: 哦，我敢打赌你也会喜欢它的。你一直想去南加州大学。
english: Oh, I bet you're going to love it too.  You always wanted to go to U.S.C..

name: Ses05F_impro07_F013
chinese: 我知道他们有一个非常非常好的计划，适合我想做的事情。
english: I know they have a really, really great program for what I want to do.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M015
chinese: 你们会玩得很开心的。而且会有很多人，你们会认识很多人，我也会认识很多人，因为我们会一起去那里。
english: You're going to have so much fun.  And there's lo- tons of people, you're going to meet so many people, I'm going to meet so many people too, because we're going to be there together.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F014
chinese: 我们能真正地一起生活吗？
english: Can we for real live together?

name: Ses05F_impro07_M016
chinese: 当然，为什么不呢。我不知道为什么不，我现在什么都不做，我没有计划，我可以住在任何我想要的地方。
english: Sure, why not.  I don't know why not, I'm not doing anything I have no plans, I could live anywhere I want.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F015
chinese: 很棒。
english: awesome.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F016
chinese: 那我们应该在校园附近找个地方吗？还是-
english: So should we get a place near campus? or-

name: Ses05F_impro07_M017
chinese: 那将会很棒。那将会很棒。
english: That'll be great. That'll be great.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M018
chinese: 我们应该试着找一个派对场所，你知道的，那种会有很多派对、有很酷的人的地方。你认识可能在那里的人吗？
english: We should try to find, like, a party spot though, like you know where there's going to be a lot of parties, where there are cool people, though.  Do you know any people that might be out there?

name: Ses05F_impro07_F017
chinese: 好的。
english: okay.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F018
chinese: 还没有。
english: not yet.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M019
chinese: 是的，我也是这样。
english: Yeah, me either.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M020
chinese: [垃圾] 我知道，我知道，我知道，我们会解决的。对吧？[垃圾] 这将会非常有趣。
english: [garbage] I know, I know, I know, we'll figure it out.  Right?  [garbage] it is going to be so much fun.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F019
chinese: 那种情况发生了。那种情况发生在某个时间。
english: That happens. That happens at time

name: Ses05F_impro07_F020
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F021
chinese: 这将会是荒谬的。这将会非常酷。
english: It's going to be ridiculous.  It's going to be so cool.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M021
chinese: 你不能取笑我，因为我不会去上学，因为我要去工作。
english: You can't make fun of me because I'm not going to school, though, because I'm going to be working though.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F022
chinese: 我不会取笑你。
english: I'm not going to make fun of you.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M022
chinese: 我必须赚钱来养活我们。
english: I'll have to make money and support us.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F023
chinese: [笑声] 哦，我也要工作，我的意思是。
english: [LAUGHTER] Oh, I'm going to be working too, I mean.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M023
chinese: 嗯，是的，当然，但你也要忙于学校的事情，而且聚会也会占用很多时间，对吧，尤其是在美国南加州大学，我听说那是一个很热闹的派对学校。
english: Well, yeah, of course, but you're going to be working on your school stuff too, and partying that takes up a lot of time, right, especially at U.S.C., I hear it's a big party college.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F024
chinese: 我-我听到了一样的。
english: I- I hear the same.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M024
chinese: 哇- 我我做。
english: Woo- I I do.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F025
chinese: 我不知道我对此感觉如何，但是-
english: I don't know how I feel about that, but-

name: Ses05F_impro07_M025
chinese: 我知道你对此的感受。我觉得你对此感到非常兴奋。我知道你是这样的。我能感觉到。我了解你。
english: I know exactly how you feel about that. I think you feel really excited about it.  I know you are. I can tell. I know you.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F026
chinese: 哦，是的。
english: oh yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F027
chinese: 哦，是的。
english: oh yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M026
chinese: 你是一个狂野而疯狂的女人。
english: You're a wild and crazy woman.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F028
chinese: [笑声] 哦，那肯定会很棒。
english: [LAUGHTER] Oh, it'll be awesome, that's for sure.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M027
chinese: 嗯，这将会很棒。
english: Uh huh, it will be awesome.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F029
chinese: 比起我搬到波士顿来说更好。
english: Better than if I'd picked up and moved to Boston.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M028
chinese: 哦，伙计，我会对你非常生气的。我会对你非常生气，因为，我能做什么呢，
english: Oh, man, I'd have been so mad at you.  I'd have been so mad at you, because, what could I have done,

name: Ses05F_impro07_M029
chinese: 我一个人住在美国南加州大学校园附近，但并不在那里上学。只是真的很可悲和悲哀。
english: living near the U.S.C. campus by myself, not going to school there. just really pathetic and sad.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F030
chinese: [笑声] 一个人笑。
english: [LAUGHTER] by yourself.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F031
chinese: 你会是那个孩子
english: you'd be that kid

name: Ses05F_impro07_F032
chinese: 住在校园附近，但不上学。
english: living near campus, and not going to school.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M030
chinese: 没错。像大家一样依赖别人的大学经历，本来我也会这样，但是你拯救了我免受这场灾难的影响。谢谢你。非常感谢你。
english: Exactly.  Mooching off of all like the college experiences, that would've been me but you have saved me from that disaster. Thank you. Thank you very much.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F033
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro07_M031
chinese: 哦，这将会非常有趣。
english: Oh, it's going to be so much fun.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F034
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M032
chinese: 恭喜。对我来说也是，因为现在我可以拥有-
english: Well, congratulations. and to me too, because now I get to-have-

name: Ses05F_impro07_F035
chinese: 我们应该去寻找公寓。
english: We should go apartment shop-er-hunting.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M033
chinese: 那是个好主意。
english: That's a good idea.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F036
chinese: 明天我们去吧。
english: Let's go tomorrow.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M034
chinese: 明天，明天，明天-
english: Tomorrow, tomorrow, tomorrow-

name: Ses05F_impro07_F037
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro07_M035
chinese: 好的。我们很快就得办一个，你几个月后就要去上学了。
english: Good.  We'll have to have one soon, you're going to have to go to school in a couple of months.

name: Ses05F_impro07_F038
chinese: 喔-
english: Woo-

name: Ses05F_impro07_M036
chinese: 哦，天哪，太棒了...会有很多地方。【垃圾】
english: Oh God, it's awesome... There's going to be tons of places. [garbage]

name: Ses05F_impro07_F039
chinese: 令人兴奋的。
english: exciting.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M000
chinese: 事实上，那场争吵的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: As a matter of fact, the real cause of that row was Peter Burden.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F000
chinese: 你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你接受了他的礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You accepted presents from him.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F001
chinese: 只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Only a trivial little broach.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我记得很清楚，它被镶满了钻石，但是味道非常糟糕。
english: I remember it well, covered in diamonds in the worst possible taste.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F002
chinese: 不，一点也不。我-我还有它。我经常戴着它。
english: No, not at all.  I-I still have it.  I wear it quite often.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F003
chinese: 你在嫉妒的想象中把整件事情都夸大了。
english: You worked the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你，是吗？
english: You must admit that he was in love with you, wasn't he?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F004
chinese: 也许只是一点点，但是--
english: maybe just a little, but--

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M005
chinese: 你让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: You let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F005
chinese: 那又怎样？
english: And what of it?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M006
chinese: 这有什么关系？
english: What of it?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F006
chinese: 嗯，他从中得到了很多乐趣，而且对我没有伤害。
english: Well, I- he got a lot of pleasure out of it and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么好奇和怀疑，你就不会听说这件事了。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so nosey and suspicious, you never would have heard about it.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M008
chinese: 嗯，我必须说这是一个很好的观点。
english: Well, that's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F008
chinese: 我对这个对话感到非常疲倦和无聊。
english: I'm growing quite tired and bored of this conversation.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M009
chinese: 我也是，无聊得要死。你想喝点白兰地吗？
english: So am I, bored stiff.  Would you like some brandy?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M010
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I'll have a little I think.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不明白你为什么还想要。你已经喝了三杯了。
english: I don't see why you want any.  You've already had three glasses.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M011
chinese: 没有特别的原因，除此之外，它们都是非常小的。
english: No particular reason, besides, they were very small ones.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F011
chinese: 嗯，继续在这样的事情上继续下去似乎很愚蠢。
english: Well, it seems silly to go on and on in such a thing.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M012
chinese: 在一个晚上里，你几乎不能称之为一直喝下去的三杯白兰地。
english: You can hardly call three liqueur glasses of brandy in a whole evening going on and on.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F012
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's becoming a habit with you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M013
chinese: 你不必因为此刻不想要任何东西而显得如此傲慢。
english: You needn't be so grand simply because you don't happen to want any at the moment.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要这么愚蠢。
english: Don't be so stupid.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M014
chinese: 真的，阿曼达。
english: Really, Amanda.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M015
chinese: 亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Going out somewhere, dear?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F014
chinese: 只是为了让自己对你有吸引力。
english: Just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M016
chinese: 哦，那个回复让我心碎了。
english: Oh, that reply has broken my heart.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F015
chinese: 这是女人的工作来吸引男人。你为什么不看着我一会儿？
english: It's the woman's job to allure the man.  Why don't you watch me for a moment?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M017
chinese: 事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: As a matter of fact, that is perfectly true.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F016
chinese: 不，不是的。
english: No, it's not.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M018
chinese: 哦，是的，确实如此。
english: Oh, yes it is.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F017
chinese: 哦，闭嘴吧。
english: Oh, Do shut up.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M019
chinese: 真可惜你没有多喝一点白兰地。这可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you didn't take a little more brandy.  It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F018
chinese: 嗯，它似乎对你没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: Um, It doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M020
chinese: 好的，啪啪啪，像一条小蝰蛇一样。
english: Well, snap, snap, snap like a little adder.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F019
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: adder don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M021
chinese: 胡说八道，它们在牙齿后面有一小袋毒液，它们会咬人。
english: Nonsense, they have a little bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F020
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M022
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F021
chinese: 我不在乎他们像箍圈一样叫喊和滚动，好吗。
english: I don't care if they bark and roll around like hoops, okay.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M023
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M024
chinese: 离婚后，你经常见到Peter Burden吗？
english: Did you see much of Peter Burden after the divorce?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F022
chinese: 是的，我做了相当多的事情。
english: Yes, I did quite a bit.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M025
chinese: 我想你让他亲吻你的次数比以前多得多。
english: I suppose you let him kiss you a good deal more then.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F023
chinese: 管好你自己的事。
english: Mind your own business.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M026
chinese: 你一定会玩得很疯狂，完全没有约束，非常愉快。我的意思是，你本来就没有很多。
english: You must have a riotous time, no restraint at all, very enjoyable.  I mean, you never had much anyway.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F024
chinese: 哦亲爱的，你真的变得相当令人无法忍受了。我想这可能是因为你喝醉了。
english: Oh dear, you really are becoming quite insufferable.  I would imagine it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我一点儿也没喝醉。
english: I'm not the least bit drunk.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M028
chinese: 我想我之前提到过，整个晚上我只喝了三分钟的白兰地杯。一个两岁的孩子也不会因此而醉。
english: I think I mentioned once before that I had only three-minute liqueur glasses of brandy the entire evening long.  A child of two could not be drunk on that.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F025
chinese: 哦不，相反，一个两岁的孩子只喝一杯就会狂醉。
english: Oh no, on the contrary, a child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M029
chinese: 哦，非常有趣。三岁的孩子或六岁的孩子怎么样？九岁的孩子呢？
english: Oh, very interesting.  How about a child of three or a child of six?  How about a child of nine?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F026
chinese: 哦，你真是让人受不了。你能停下来吗？
english: Oh, You are so insufferable.  Do you stop.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M030
chinese: 哦，这非常有趣。我们可能会就这个无节制的孩子展开一场精彩的辩论。
english: Oh, This is very interesting.  We- we might get a splendid debate going about this intemperate tots.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F027
chinese: 亲爱的，不是很有趣，你最好再喝点白兰地。
