english: Not very funny, dear, you better have some more brandy.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M031
chinese: 哦，非常好的主意。我会的。
english: Oh, very good idea.  I will.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F028
chinese: 呃。
english: Ugh.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉，我想。
english: You better turn that off I think.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F029
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M033
chinese: 现在已经很晚了，这样会打扰楼上的人。
english: It's very late and it will disturb the people upstairs.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F030
chinese: 楼上没有人，那是一个摄影师的工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs; it's a photographer's studio.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M034
chinese: 嗯，我想楼下有人。
english: Well, there are people downstairs I suppose.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F031
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M035
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: It is not time of year for Tunis.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F032
chinese: 打开它。
english: Turn it on again.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M036
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I'll do no such thing.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F033
chinese: 好吧，如果你坚持完全无礼的话。
english: Fine, if you insist on being completely insolent.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M037
chinese: 关掉它。它让我发疯。
english: Turn it off.  It is driving me mad.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F034
chinese: 好的，亲爱的，请尽量控制自己。
english: Well, do try to control yourself darling.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M038
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F035
chinese: 你真的需要培养一个更清晰的头脑。
english: You really do need to develop uh a clearer head.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M039
chinese: 关掉它。
english: Turn it off.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F036
chinese: 我- 我讨厌你。
english: I- I hate you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M040
chinese: 阿曼达--听-听-
english: Amanda-- Listen- Listen-

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F037
chinese: 我讨厌你。
english: I hate you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F038
chinese: 不，不。我厌倦了听你说话。你粗鲁、愚蠢而且完全专横。
english: No, no.  I'm tired of listening to you.  You're boorish and idiotic and completely overbearing.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M041
chinese: 非常有趣的音乐。
english: Very music- amusing indeed.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F039
chinese: 是的，非常有趣。让我走吧。我要离开这里。我无法相信我曾打算和你结婚。
english: Yeah, very amusing.  Let me go.  I'm getting out of here.  I can't believe I intended to marry you.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M042
chinese: 你是一个脾气恶劣、放荡不羁、邪恶的小野兽，我再也不想见到你。
english: You are a vile tempered, loose living, wicked little beast, and I never want to set eyes on you again.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F040
chinese: 哦，再嫁给你？我一定是疯了。我当时在想什么？我的意思是，你完全无法无天。
english: Oh, marry you again?  I must have been insane.  What was I thinking?  I mean, you're completely outrageous.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_M043
chinese: 闭嘴，闭嘴。如果你跪着向我求婚，我也不会再嫁给你。你是一个刻薄、心机重的小吸血鬼，我希望上帝永远不让我再见到你。
english: Shut up, shut up.  I wouldn't marry you again if you came crawling to me on bended knee. You're a mean, evil-minded little vampire and I hope to God I never set eyes on you again.

name: Ses05F_script03_2_F041
chinese: 野兽；畜生；无赖；妓女
english: Beast; brute; cad; whore

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say?  Maybe we ought to tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F001
chinese: 你是什么意思？我是第一个起床的，他还在床上。
english: What do you mean?  I was the first one up, he was still in bed.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M002
chinese: 大约在今天早上四点左右。我听到了一声裂开的声音，我朝窗外看去，他就站在那里，就在那声裂开的时候。
english: About four this morning.  I heard it crack and I looked out the window and he was standing right there when it cracked.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F003
chinese: 他在凌晨四点钟在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here four in the morning?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M003
chinese: 我不知道。但是在他看到它之后，他跑回屋子里，在厨房里开始哭泣。
english: I don't know.  But after he saw it, he ran back into the house and started crying in the kitchen.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M004
chinese: 不。我觉得最好还是让他一个人待着。
english: No.  I figured it was best to leave him alone.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F005
chinese: 他又在梦到他了。他变得像在拉里去世后一样。那是什么意思？
english: He's dreaming about him again.  He's getting just like after Larry died. What's the meaning of that?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M005
chinese: 是的，是的，他是。我不知道其中的意思。但我知道一件事，妈妈，我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: Yes, yes he is.  I don't know the meaning in it.  But I know one thing, mom, we made a terrible mistake with Dad.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F006
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M006
chinese: 对他不诚实。这是一种能够得到回报的事情，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  It's the kind of thing that pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F007
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M007
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。那么为什么我们还让他以为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back and I know it.  So why do we go on letting him think that we believe with him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F008
chinese: 你打算怎么办，和他争论吗？
english: What are you gonna do, argue with him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M008
chinese: 我不想和他争论。但是现在是时候让他知道没有其他人相信Larry还活着了。我的意思是
english: I don't want to argue with him.  But it's time that he knows that nobody else believes that Larry's alive. I mean

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M009
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他，整夜等待他？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直接说我们不再有任何希望了？我们是否很久以前就没有希望了？
english: Why shouldn't he dream about him, walk the nights waiting for him?  Do we contradict him?  Do we say outright that we don't have any hope anymore?  That we haven't had any hope for a long time?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F009
chinese: 好的，你打算如何证明呢？你能证明吗？
english: Well, how are you gonna prove it?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M010
chinese: 天哪，三年了！三年后没人会回来的。太疯狂了！
english: For Gods sake, three years!  Nobody comes back after three years.  It's insane!

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F010
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是，但对他来说不是。
english: To you it is and to me, but not to him.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F011
chinese: 你可以自言自语到脸都发青，但没有人，也没有坟墓。那么你在哪里？
english: You can talk yourself blue in the face but there's no body and there's no grave.  So where are you?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M011
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F012
chinese: 问题是这该死的报纸，我的意思是，每周都会有一个新男孩突然出现。所以下一个会是Larry。所以你--
english: The trouble is the God damn newspapers, I mean, ea- each week a new boy turns up out of nowhere.  So the next one is gonna be Larry.  So you--

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M012
chinese: 好的。好的，只要听着。
english: All right.  All right, just listen.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M013
chinese: 你知道我为什么邀请安妮，对吗？
english: You know why I invited Annie, right?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F013
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M014
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F014
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法，但是故事是什么？
english: Well, I've got an idea but what's the story?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M015
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm gonna ask her to marry me.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F015
chinese: 好吧，那是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well, that's your business, Chris.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M016
chinese: 你知道这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know it's not just my business.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F016
chinese: 你想让我做什么？我的意思是，你已经年纪大了，应该知道自己想要什么。
english: What do you want me to do?  I mean, You're old enough to know your own mind.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M017
chinese: 那么没问题了吗？我应该继续下去吗？
english: So it's all right then?  I should just go ahead with it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F017
chinese: 好的，你想确保你的父亲不会--
english: Well, you want to make sure that your father isn't gonna --

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M018
chinese: 所以这不仅仅是我的事情吗？你有时候真让我生气，你知道吗？
english: So it isn't just my business?  You infuriate me sometime, you know that.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M019
chinese: 难道如果我告诉爸爸并且他对此大发雷霆，这也与你有关吗？你真是擅长忽视事情。
english: Isn't it your business, too, if I tell dad and he throws a fit about it?  You have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F018
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。我的意思是，那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore.  I mean, the girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M020
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩。
english: She's not Larry's girl.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F019
chinese: 就你父亲而言，他还活着。而她仍然是他的女孩。
english: As far as your father is concerned, he's not dead.  And she's still his girl.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F020
chinese: 现在，如果你知道去哪里，你可以继续前进，但是我不知道去哪里。
english: Now, you can go on with this if you know where to go, but I don't know where to go.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M021
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我伸手去拿我想要的东西，我都不得不收回，因为这可能会伤害到其他人，我整个可恶的生活，一次又一次。
english: I don't know why it is but every time I reach out for something that I want, I have to pull back because it might hurt somebody else, my whole bloody life, time after time, after time.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F021
chinese: 嗯，你是个体贴的家伙。这没有什么错。
english: Well, you're a considerate fella.  There's nothing wrong with that.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M022
chinese: 什么鬼东西！
english: what to hell with that!

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F022
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Have you asked Annie yet?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M023
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this settled first.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F023
chinese: 嗯，你怎么知道她会嫁给你？也许她和你父亲一样的感觉。
english: Well, how do you know she'll marry you?  Maybe she feels like your father does.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M024
chinese: 嗯，如果她真的这样做了，那就是结束了。但从她的信中看，她似乎忘记了他。
english: Well, if she does then that's the end of it.  But from her letters it seems like she's forgotten him.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M025
chinese: 我会找出来，然后我们会和爸爸好好解决，好吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: I'll find out and then we'll thrash it out with dad, all right?  Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F024
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性。你从来没有看到过。
english: The trouble is you don't see enough women.  You never did.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M026
chinese: 那又怎样，我对女人不太擅长？
english: So what, I'm not fast with women?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F025
chinese: 我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M027
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F026
chinese: 嗯，那是个好理由。但这并不代表什么。我的意思是，你自从去战争以来就没见过她。已经过去五年了。
english: Well, that's a good reason.  But it don't mean a thing. I mean, You haven't seen her since you went to war.  It's been five years.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M028
chinese: [垃圾] 我不知道。就是这样，
english: [garbage] I don't know.  It's just,

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M029
chinese: 她是我最了解的人。我从小就认识她，和她一起长大。现在当我想到一个适合做我的妻子的人时，我会想到安妮。你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: she's who I know best. I know her since I- I was a kid I grew up with her.  When I think of somebody for my wife these days, I I think of Annie.  What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F027
chinese: 不，我不想要- 克里斯，你父亲认为他会回来。如果你娶了那个女孩，你就等于宣布他已经死了。
english: No I don't want a-  Your father thinks he's coming back, Chris.  If you marry that girl, you're pronouncing him dead.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F028
chinese: 现在，你知道你父亲会发生什么吗？我不知道。
english: Now, what's going to happen to your father, do you know?  I don't.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M030
chinese: 好的，妈妈。
english: All right then, mom.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F029
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M031
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我曾希望如果我等待，爸爸现在会忘记他，我们可以有一个正常的婚礼，每个人都开心。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  I had hoped if I waited, dad would've forgotten him by now and we could have a- a regular wedding and everybody happy.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M032
chinese: 但是如果那不可能发生，那我就会离开。
english: But if that can't happen then I'll just get out.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F030
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M033
chinese: 我会离开。我会去别的地方结婚，我-我会住在别的地方，也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll go get married someplace else, I- I'll live someplace else, maybe New York.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F031
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M034
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了，一个好傻瓜。我已经厌倦了。
english: I've been a good son for too long, a good sucker.  I'm through with it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F032
chinese: 但是你在这里有一家生意。这到底是什么鬼东西？
english: But you have a business here.  What the hell is this?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M035
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意没有激发我的灵感。
english: The business?  The business doesn't inspire me.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F033
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M036
chinese: 是的，我每天想要一个小时。如果我必须整天为钱而奔波，我想回家看到美好的事物。我想要一个家庭。我想要一些孩子。
english: Yeah, I'd like one hour a day.  If I have to grub for money all day long, I'd like to go home to something beautiful.  I'd like a family.  I'd like some kids.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M037
chinese: 我想要建立属于自己的东西。而安妮是其中的核心。现在，我在哪里找到它？
english: I'd like to build something that's my own.  And Annie is in the center of that.  Now, where do I find it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F034
chinese: 你不想那样思考。
english: You don't want to think like that.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M038
chinese: 好的，你帮助我留在这里。
english: Well, you help me stay here.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F035
chinese: 好吧。但是不要那样想，因为我们到底为了什么而努力工作，克里斯？所有的这一切，全部都是为了你。
english: All right.  But don't think like that because what the hell did we work for, Chris?  All of this, all of it, it's all just for you.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M039
chinese: 我知道，妈妈。只要你帮助我留在这里。
english: I know that, mom.  Just you help me stay here.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F036
chinese: 不要这样想，你听到我说的话了吗？
english: Don't think like that, do you hear me?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M040
chinese: 嗯，我是这样想的。
english: Well, I am thinking like that.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F037
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_M041
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强壮的人。
english: No, you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses05M_script01_1b_F038
chinese: 是的，我能看到。
english: Yeah, I can see that.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F000
chinese: 嗨，嗯-我想我的行李丢失了，我需要去办理索赔或者我不知道该怎么办。
english: Hi,um- I think my baggage was lost, and I need to I guess file a claim or I don't know what.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M000
chinese: 好的，你乘坐的是哪个航班？
english: Okay, what flight were you on?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F001
chinese: 嗯，十七。来自于--
english: Um-Seventeen. Coming from --

name: Ses05F_impro05_M001
chinese: 在哪家航空公司？
english: On what airline?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F002
chinese: 这是来自伦敦的维珍大西洋航空公司。
english: It was Virgin Atlantic coming from London.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M002
chinese: 从伦敦来的，好的。嗯，你经过了所有的正常检查点吗？
english: From London, okay. Um- And you went through all your proper checkpoints?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F003
chinese: 是的，我不知道它是在哪里丢失的。我是从非洲来的，所以。
english: Yeah, I don't know where it was lost.  I was coming from Africa, so.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M003
chinese: 所以你自从非洲以来就没有见到你的行李。你通过希思罗机场飞到这里。
english: So you haven't seen your bags since Africa. You flew threw Heath Row to here.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F004
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M004
chinese: 好的。嗯，让我看看。我-
english: Okay.  Well, let me see here. I-

name: Ses05F_impro05_M005
chinese: 似乎它经过了希思罗机场。我在这里看到它。嗯-
english: It seems like it went through Heath Row.  I see it here. uh-

name: Ses05F_impro05_F006
chinese: 那很好。
english: That's good.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M006
chinese: 但是，我还没有在机场看到它。嗯。
english: But uh- I don't see it here in the airport yet. uh

name: Ses05F_impro05_M007
chinese: 我不确定它在哪里。我们绝对可以替你留意它。
english: I'm not sure where it is.  We can absolutely keep an eye out for for it for you.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F007
chinese: 好的，我不能没有它离开。我的意思是，你能找到吗？
english: Well, I can't leave without it. I mean, Could you find out?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M008
chinese: 嗯，我不是一个奇迹工作者。我不知道我能为你做什么。我这里没有那个包。
english: Well, I'm not a miracle worker.  I don't know what I can do for you.  I don't have the bag right here.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F008
chinese: 好的，你能上电脑去追踪一下并查看它什么时候到达吗？
english: Right, well can you get on the computer maybe and like track it down and see when it's going to get here?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M009
chinese: 好的，就像我告诉你的那样，它离开了希思罗机场，似乎已经到达这里。但是如果你找不到它，那么-你确定你知道你的行李包长什么样吗？
english: Well, as I told you, it left Heath Row and it seems to have arrived here.  But if you can't find it, then-are you sure you know what your bag looks like?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F009
chinese: 是的，先生，我知道我的包是什么样子的。
english: Yes, sir, I know what my bag looks like.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M010
chinese: 好的，那是什么？它是什么样的包？
english: Okay, and what is that?  What kind of bag is it?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F010
chinese: 嗯-这是一个旅行背包。它是绿色和灰色的。上面有我的名字和我的信息。
english: Um- It's a travel backpack.  It's green and gray.  It's got my name on it and my information.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M011
chinese: 你找不到它吗？
english: And you couldn't find it?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F011
chinese: 不，它没有在行李认领处出现。
english: No, it didn't turn up at the baggage claim.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M012
chinese: 你确定吗？
english: Are you sure?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F012
chinese: 我是说我们已经经历了这一切。我已经去过五个人了，他们--
english: I mean we've gone through all of this.  I've been to five people already who--

name: Ses05F_impro05_M013
chinese: 显然，那不是我，所以我将不得不问你同样的问题，这样我们才能达到相同的目标。
english: Well, obviously, that wasn't me, so I'm going to have to ask you the same questions they asked you just so we can get to the same point.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F013
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M014
chinese: 好吗？现在，嗯-它是绿色的，旅行包，你找不到它。里面有什么重要的东西吗，你需要它吗？
english: All right?  Now, um- it's green, travel bag, you couldn't find it.  And was there something important in it that you need it?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F014
chinese: 是的，很多人真的喜欢--只是情感价值，但是--
english: Yes, lots of really like -- sentimental value only, but--

name: Ses05F_impro05_M015
chinese: 情感价值。
english: Sentimental value.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F015
chinese: --真的很重要的事情。
english: --really important stuff.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M016
chinese: 好的。嗯，我不知道该告诉你什么。我能给你的是一张价值五十美元的下次航班抵用券。
english: Right.  Well, I don't know what to tell you. Um- What I can offer you is a fifty dollar voucher on your next flight.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F016
chinese: 那样是不行的。真的，我真的需要把这个包拿回来。
english: That's not going to cut it. Like, Really, I really need to get this bag back.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M017
chinese: 不，我明白。我的意思是，所有那些感伤的事情肯定很难，但是嗯，这是我能为你做的一切。
english: No, I understand. I mean. It's got to be tough all those sentimental things, but um- this is all I can do for you.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F017
chinese: 这种情况经常发生吗？他们会丢失行李，然后你们只是给人们钱吗？
english: Does this happen often?  Do they--you just lose baggage and you just offer people money for it?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M018
chinese: 嗯，你知道的，有时候就是这样，我是说我们还能做什么呢？
english: Well, you know, sometimes that's--really, I mean what else could we do?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F018
chinese: 嗯，首先不要丢失行李。我的意思是，你在提供一项服务。我为那张机票付了这么多钱。
english: Uh- Not lose the baggage in the first place. I mean You're offering a service here. I paid so much money for that ticket.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M019
chinese: 好的，
english: Well,

name: Ses05F_impro05_M020
chinese: 显然，女士。
english: Obviously ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M021
chinese: 对不起，女士。
english: I am sorry, ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M022
chinese: 让我们-让我们稍微放松一下，女士。显然，我们会尽一切努力将您的所有行李保留在这里。
english: Let's- Let's just relax for a moment, ma'am.  You understand, obviously, we're going to do everything we can to keep all of your luggage here.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M023
chinese: 显然，我们并不想让您的行李丢失。您真的相信我们会故意让您的行李丢失吗，女士？
english: Obviously, we're not trying to lose your luggage.  Do you really believe that we're trying to lose your luggage ma'am?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F019
chinese: 不，但我的意思是为什么不能-为什么你找不到它？它去哪了？谁弄丢了它？
english: No, but I mean like why can't- why can't you find it?  Where did it go?  Who lost it?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M024
chinese: 嗯，如果我知道的话，那我就会知道它在哪里了，不是吗？
english: Well, if I knew that, then I'd know where it was, wouldn't I?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F020
chinese: 嗯，我刚刚花了这么多钱买了这张票。我觉得你们应该能够给我提供超过五十美元的代金券。
english: Well, I just-I paid so much money for this ticket.  I feel like you guys should be able to get-to offer me more than a fifty dollar voucher.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M025
chinese: 嗯，我们在谈论一个包。你亲自把它带过来了，对吗？
english: Well, we're talking about one bag.  You personally made it here, didn't you?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F021
chinese: 是的，意思是我没有在一次火爆的飞机失事中丧生。多么方便，但是嗯，我支付了两千美元来乘坐你们的航空公司，我真的很希望我的行李能够完好地送到目的地。
english: Yeah, meaning I didn't die in a fiery plane crash.  How convenient, but um- I paid two thousand dollar to ride your airline, and I would really appreciate getting my bags there to my destination in one place.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M026
chinese: 那就是票价的费用。
english: That's what the cost of the ticket was for.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M027
chinese: 女士，国际航班并不便宜，这有很多原因。这与您的行李或其他因素无关。
english: Ma'am, international flights are not cheap and there's many reasons for that.  It does not have solely to do with your baggage or-

name: Ses05F_impro05_F022
chinese: 对，但协议的一部分是我支付费用，以便我可以带上自己和我的物品离开。
english: Right, but part of the agreement is that I'm paying so that I can take myself and my belongings with me.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M028
chinese: 好的。是的，女士。
english: Right. Yes, ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F023
chinese: 并且你将安全地将它们从一个地方运送到另一个地方。
english: And that you're going to transport them safely from one place to another.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M029
chinese: 没错，而且如果你仔细阅读协议的小字条款，你会发现虽然我们对行李丢失负有一定责任，但只提供五十美元的代金券作为赔偿。
english: Right, and also if you'll read the fine print of your agreement you'll see that while we do bear some responsibility for lost luggage, it is a fifty dollar voucher.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F024
chinese: 这就是你能给我的全部吗？我的意思是，那里面的东西价值远远超过五十美元。
english: That's all you can offer me? I mean, my the stuff in there is worth way more than fifty dollar.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M030
chinese: 嗯，我理解。你买了航班保险吗？
english: Well, I understand that.  Did you buy flight insurance?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F025
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M031
chinese: 嗯，那么我的手就真的被束缚了。
english: Well, my hands are really tied then.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F026
chinese: 为什么我需要航班保险？为什么你们不直接保证我带走的东西能安全到达目的地？
english: Why do I need flight insurance?  Why don't you guys just guarantee that you're going to get the stuff that I leave with to my destination?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M032
chinese: 嗯，就像任何一种保险一样。当你购买保险时，你会得到更多。你知道，就像如果你……
english: Well, it's like any kind of insurance.  You don't-when you get it, then you get more. You know, Like if you--

name: Ses05F_impro05_F027
chinese: 没错，但是如果我坐公交车，我就不需要购买行李保险，因为我带着的背包会和我一起到达目的地。
english: Right, but if I'm riding a bus, I don't need to buy luggage insurance that the backpack I take on is going to get to my destination with me.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M033
chinese: 当然不会，因为你一直带着你的背包。现在，如果你——你说这是一个旅行包。如果它那么重要，为什么你不随身携带它呢？
english: Well, of course not because you've got your backpack with you the whole time.  Now, if you--you said this was a travel bag.  Why weren't you carrying it on if it was so important?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F028
chinese: 因为他们让我检查它。它太重了。
english: Because they made me check it.  It's too heavy.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M034
chinese: 嗯，所以它真的很重。
english: Uh, so it was really heavy.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F029
chinese: 所以我本来会继续携带它，但他们让我托运了它，然后他们把它弄丢了。
english: So I would have carried it on, but they made me check it and then they lost it.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M035
chinese: 嗯，你知道吗，它可能还会出现，但在那之前，我可以给你这张五十美元的代金券。
english: Well, you know what, it could still turn up, but until then I can offer you this fifty dollar voucher.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F030
chinese: 你还能做什么？
english: There's nothing else you can do?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M036
chinese: 对不起，女士，我真的无能为力。我在这里真的束手无策。我真的希望还有其他事情我可以为您做。
english: I'm sorry, ma'am, there's nothing else I can do.  My hands are really tied here.  I really wish there was something else I could do for you.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F031
chinese: 我一秒钟都不相信。
english: I don't believe that for a second.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M037
chinese: 嗯，我不知道为什么你不相信那个。
english: Well I don't know why you wouldn't believe that.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M038
chinese: 显然，我在这里尽力做了一切。
english: Obviously, I'm doing everything that I can here.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F032
chinese: 不，我不认为你是。我的意思是，如果你尽了一切努力，要么你会给我更多的钱，要么你会找出我的包在哪里。
english: No, I don't think you are. I mean If you were doing everything you could, you'd either give me more money or you'd figure out where my bag is.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M039
chinese: 嗯，我没有办法给你更多的钱。我已经给你尽可能多的钱了，并且在弄清楚你的包在哪方面-
english: Well, I have no way to give you more money.  I'm giving you as much money as I can, and figuring- as far as figuring out where you bag is-

name: Ses05F_impro05_F033
chinese: 你说的“尽力而为”是什么意思？是谁制定这些规则的？
english: What do you mean as you can?  Who makes up these rules?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M040
chinese: 组成什么？
english: makes up?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F034
chinese: 你是一个自主的人类。你可以- 你可以进入计算机-
english: You're an autono- autonomous human being.  You could- You could go into the com-

name: Ses05F_impro05_M041
chinese: 这些规定是航空公司制定的，妈妈女士。
english: The airline makes these rules, mom ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F035
chinese: 你可以进入电脑然后-你知道-打印-
english: You could go into the computer and- you know- print-

name: Ses05F_impro05_M042
chinese: 我已经进入了电脑。我告诉你了我在电脑里能看到的，你的行李确实到达了这里。
english: I've gone into the computer.  I told you exactly what I can see in the computer that your luggage did arrive here.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F036
chinese: 所以我只是应该噢，好吧，哎呀，我的行李不见了，然后对此感到满意，并接受你们那该死的五十美元代金券吗？
english: So I'm just supposed to oh, well, oops, my luggage is gone and be fine with that and take your stinking fifty dollar voucher?

name: Ses05F_impro05_M043
chinese: 好的，你可以拿着我这张臭烘烘的五十美元代金券回家，等着看看你的行李是否出现。如果出现了，我们会把它送给你。
english: Well, you can take my stinking fifty dollar voucher and go home and wait and see if your luggage turns up. And if it does, then we'll deliver it to you.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F037
chinese: 而且你没有任何保证。
english: And you have no guarantee.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M044
chinese: 我没有任何保证，绝对没有。
english: I have no guarantee, absolutely not.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F038
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: This is ridiculous.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M045
chinese: 如何确保在行李丢失时找到您的行李？
english: How can I guarantee finding your luggage when it's lost?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F039
chinese: 嗯，因为你们弄丢了它，所以找回它应该是你们的责任。
english: Uh- Because you guys lost it, so it should be your responsibility to find it, too.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M046
chinese: 好的，当你在家里丢了东西的时候，你能保证以后能找到它吗？
english: Right, well, when you're at home and you lose something, do you guarantee that you're going to find it later on?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F040
chinese: 哦，别这样。你能别再这样了吗？这太荒谬了。
english: Oh, come on.  Would you cut it out?  This is ridiculous.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M047
chinese: 嗯，对我来说，你听起来像是在胡闹。
english: Well, it sounds to me like you're being ridiculous

name: Ses05F_impro05_F041
chinese: 不，我不认为我是。我喜欢拥有一大堆对我很重要的东西，而且我从非洲带来了它们，你知道的。这不像我随时都可以回去拿的。
english: No, I don't think I am.  I like have a whole bunch of stuff that means a lot to me, and I brought it you know from Africa.  It's not like I can just go back and get it whenever I want.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M048
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F042
chinese: 这不是说我可以去Kmart买另一个。
english: It's not like I can go to Kmart and buy another.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M049
chinese: 我理解，女士，但是东西会丢失。对此我无能为力。事情就是会发生。意外就是会发生。
english: I understand that, ma'am, but things get lost.  There's nothing I can do about that.  Things happen.  Accidents happen.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M050
chinese: 虽然我真的很想立即把你的包交给你，但显然我不能这样做。
english: And while I really would love to be able to hand you your bag right now, obviously I can't do that.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F043
chinese: 好的，没问题。
english: okay fine.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M051
chinese: 所以您想要这张五十美元的代金券吗？
english: So you'd like the fifty dollar voucher?

name: Ses05F_impro05_F044
chinese: 是的，我会拿走你的五十美元的代金券。
english: Yeah, I'll take your fifty dollar voucher.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M052
chinese: 好的，请填写这三份表格，然后我们会在接下来的三周内将其发送给您，当然，我们一定会密切关注您的行李。
english: Okay, just fill out these three forms, and um- you'll- we'll have that sent to you within the next three weeks and, of course, we'll definitely keep an eye out for your bag.

name: Ses05F_impro05_F045
chinese: 谢谢。
english: Thanks.

name: Ses05F_impro05_M053
chinese: 你有一个美好的一天。
english: You have a wonderful day.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say?  Maybe we should tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F001
chinese: 什么时候？我是第一个起床的。他还在床上。他怎么可能看到它？
english: When?  I was the first one up.  He was still in bed.  How could he have seen it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M002
chinese: 我不知道，大概是今天早上四点钟吧。我听到一声裂开的声音，然后我醒了过来，我朝窗外看去，他就站在那里，窗户正好在那时破裂了。
english: I don't know, like, four o'clock this morning.  I heard a crack, and I woke up, and I looked out the window and he was standing right there when it broke.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道，但是它坏了之后，他跑回屋里，在厨房里开始哭泣。
english: I don't know, but after it broke he ran back inside and started crying in the kitchen.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不。我觉得最好还是让他一个人待着。
english: No.  I figured it was best to leave him alone.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害吗？
english: He cried hard?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以听到他的声音从我房间的地板上传来。
english: I could hear him right through the floor in my room.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他在那个时候在外面做什么？他变得像拉里去世后一样，晚上四处走动。他做梦。
english: What was he doing out there at that hour?  He's getting just like after Larry died, walking around at night.  He dreams.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜他是。
english: I guess he is.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F007
chinese: 那是什么意思？
english: What's the meaning of that?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道它的意思，但是妈妈，你知道一件事，我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it, but you know one thing Mom, we made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F008
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。这是一种能够得到回报的事情，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  It's the kind of thing that pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F009
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean dishonest?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。那么为什么我们还让他以为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back and I know it.  So why do we go on letting him think that we believe with him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你想做什么，和他争论吗？
english: What do you want to do, argue with him?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M010
chinese: 我不想和他争论。但是现在是时候让他知道，再也没有人认为拉里还活着了。
english: I don't want to argue with him.  But it's time he knows that nobody else thinks that Larry's alive anymore.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他会梦到他，在夜晚四处寻找他？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直接说我们不再有任何希望，我们多年来都没有希望了？
english: Why should he dream about him, walking around looking for him at night?  Do we contradict him?  Do we say straight out that we don't have any hope anymore, that we haven't had any hope for years now?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't say that to him.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来。
english: We have to say it to him.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你打算如何证明？你能证明吗？
english: how are you gonna prove it?  Can you prove it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M013
chinese: 天哪！三年了！三年后没人会回来的。太疯狂了！
english: For Gods sake!  Three years!  Nobody comes back after three years.  That's insane!

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F013
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是，但对他来说不是。现在你可以自言自语到你脸都发青，克里斯，但没有尸体，也没有坟墓。那么你在哪里？
english: To you it is and to me, but not to him.  Now you can talk yourself until you're blue in the face, Chris, but there's no body and there's no grave.  So where are you?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M014
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F014
chinese: 问题在于这该死的报纸。我的意思是，每周都有一个孩子失踪，时间比拉里还长。
english: The trouble is the God damn newspapers.  I mean every every week a kid turns up, missing like longer than Larry.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的。好的，妈妈。请听我说。你知道我为什么邀请安妮来这里吗？
english: All right.  All right, mom.  Just listen.  You know why I invited Annie her, don't you?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F015
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F016
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法。但是故事是什么？
english: Well, I have an idea.  But what's the story?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M017
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F017
chinese: 好吧，那是你的事情，克里斯。
english: Well, that's your business, Chris.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M018
chinese: 这不仅仅是我的事情。
english: It's not just my business.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好的，你想让我做什么？你已经足够大了，应该知道自己的想法。
english: Well, what do you want me to do?  You're old enough to make- to know your own mind.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M019
chinese: 那么没问题吗？我应该继续做下去吗？
english: So it's okay then?  I should just go ahead and do it?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F019
chinese: 好的，你想确保你的父亲不是--
english: Well, you want to make sure that your father isn't --

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M020
chinese: 哦，所以这不仅仅是我的事情吗？
english: Oh, so it isn't just my business?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F020
chinese: 我只是在说。
english: I'm just saying.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M021
chinese: 你有时候真让我生气。你知道吗？天啊。
english: You infuriate me sometimes.  Do you know that?  God.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M022
chinese: 难道这也不关你的事吗？如果我告诉爸爸，他对此大发雷霆，你也会受到影响吧？我的意思是，你总是擅长忽视事情。
english: Isn't it your business, too, if dad -- if I tell dad and he throws a fit about it?  I mean, you have such a talent for ignoring things.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F021
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。我的意思是，那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore.  I mean, the girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩！
english: She is not Larry's girl!

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F022
chinese: 从你父亲的角度来看，他并没有死，她仍然是他的女孩。现在，如果你知道该去哪里，你可以继续前进，克里斯，但我不知道。那么我能为你做些什么？
english: From your father's point of view he's not dead and she's still his girl.  Now, you can go on from there if you know where to go, Chris, but I don't know.  So what can I do for you?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么，但每次我伸手去拿我想要的东西时，我都不得不退缩，因为我可能会伤害到别人。我整个可恶的生活；一次又一次。
english: I don't know why it is but everytime I reach out for something I- that I want, I have to pull back because I might hurt somebody else.  My whole bloody life; time after time after time.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F023
chinese: 嗯，你是个体贴的家伙，这没有什么错的。
english: Well, you're a considerate fella, there's nothing wrong in that

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的！
english: To hell with that!

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F024
chinese: 你问过安妮了吗？
english: Have you asked Annie yet?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先处理这个问题。
english: I wanted to get this taken care of first.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F025
chinese: 好吧，如果她觉得你像她的父亲怎么办？你怎么知道她会嫁给你？
english: Well, what if she feels like your father?  And how do you know she will marry you?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好的，如果是这样的话，那就到此为止了。但从她的信中听起来，她好像忘记了他。我会弄清楚的。然后我们会和爸爸好好谈谈，好吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: Well, if that's the case, then that's the end of it.  But from her letters it sounds like she has forgotten him.  I'll find out.  And then we'll thrash it out with dad, all right?  Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F026
chinese: 嗯，问题是你从来没有见过足够多的女性。
english: Well, the trouble is you never saw enough women.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M028
chinese: 那又怎样？我对女人不擅长。
english: So what?  I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F027
chinese: 嗯，我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: Well, I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M029
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F028
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的理由。但这并不意味着什么。我的意思是，你已经五年没见过她了。
english: Well, that's a good reason.  But that doesn't mean anything at all.  I mean, you haven't seen her in five years.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M030
chinese: 我最了解她，好吗？我不知道。我是和她一起长大的。现在当我想到一个适合做我的妻子的人时，我想到的是安妮。你想要什么，一个图表吗？
english: I know her best, all right?  I don't know.  I grew up next to her.  When I think of somebody for my wife these days, I think of Annie.  What do you want, a diagram?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F029
chinese: 不，我不想要——听着，克里斯，你父亲认为他会回来。你娶了那个女孩，就等于宣布他死了。现在，你知道你父亲会发生什么吗？因为我不知道。
english: No.  I don't want a -- look, your father thinks he's coming back, Chris.  You marry that girl and you're pronouncing him dead.  Now, what's going to happen to your father; do you know?  Because, I don't.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M031
chinese: 好的，妈妈。
english: All right then, mom.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F030
chinese: 好好考虑一下。
english: Just give it some more thought.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M032
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。我希望如果我等待，爸爸现在已经忘记了这件事。然后我们可以有一个正常的婚礼，每个人都开心。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  I hoped that if I'd waited, dad would have forgotten about it by now.  And we could have like a normal wedding and everybody happy.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M033
chinese: 但是如果那不可能发生，我只能离开。
english: But if that can't happen, I'll just have to get out.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F031
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M034
chinese: 我会离开。我会去结婚，住在别的地方。我不知道，也许是纽约。
english: I'll get out.  I'll go get married and live someplace else.  I don't know, maybe New York.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F032
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M035
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了。一个好傻瓜。我已经厌倦了。
english: I have been a good son for too long.  A good sucker.  I'm through with it.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F033
chinese: 什么？你是说？告诉我一些事情，你是指你要离开这个生意吗？
english: What?  You mean?  Tell me something, you mean that you would leave the business?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M036
chinese: 是的。在这个问题上，我会的。
english: Yes.  On this, I would.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F034
chinese: 你不能那样思考。
english: You can't think like that.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M037
chinese: 好的，你帮助我留在这里。
english: Well, you help me stay here.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F035
chinese: 好吧。但不要那样想。因为我们到底为了什么而努力工作，克里斯？我的意思是，这整个事情，都是为了你。
english: All right.  But don't think like that.  Because what the hell did we work for, Chris?  I mean, this whole thing, it's all for you.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M038
chinese: 我知道，妈妈。只是，你帮助我留在这里。
english: I know that, mom.  Just, you help me stay here.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F036
chinese: 只是不要那样想。你听到我说的话了吗？
english: Just don't think that way.  Do you hear me?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我正在这样思考。
english: I am thinking that way.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F037
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses05M_script01_1_M040
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强壮的人。
english: No, you don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses05M_script01_1_F038
chinese: 是的，我可以看到。
english: Yeah, I can see that.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F000
chinese: 您好，先生。我能帮您什么吗？
english: Hi, sir.  How can I help you?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M000
chinese: 哦，谢天谢地。你知道我已经打了半个小时电话，试图和一个该死的人类交谈吗？
english: Oh, thank God.  Do you know how long I've been on the phone for half an hour trying to talk to a freaking human being.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M001
chinese: 我只想要做的就是付我的该死的信用卡账单，但是我的账单有问题，就像我发誓的那样，它说我上个月没有付款，但是我知道我上个月付款了。
english: All I want to do is put my, pay for my freaking credit card, and there's something wrong in my bill, Like I swear, it says I didn't paid last month, but I know I paid last month.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F001
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M002
chinese: 我已经输入了我的号码成百上千次，它不听我的，它不起作用，我找不到一个人，最后-
english: I put- I've been typing my number in millions of times, it won't listen to me, it's not working, and I can't get a single human being, and finally-

name: Ses05F_impro08_M003
chinese: 你是一个真正的人类。非常非常感谢你。
english: you are a real human being.  Thank you very, very much.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F002
chinese: [笑声]好的。很抱歉，先生，您一直过得很艰难。
english: [LAUGHTER] All right.  I'm sorry, sir that you've been having a hard time.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M004
chinese: 这太荒谬了。我-我真的，我不明白为什么你认为这些自动化系统应该为任何人工作。它们从来没有为我工作过。
english: This is ridiculous.  I- I seriously, I don't understand why you think these automated systems are supposed to like work for anybody.  They have never, ever work for me.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F003
chinese: 我知道，这太荒谬了。
english: I kwon, it is ridiculous

name: Ses05F_impro08_F004
chinese: 是的，我明白。
english: yeah, I understand.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M005
chinese: 你能和某人谈谈这件事吗？你能告诉他们这是荒谬的，并且他们能从现在开始改变吗？你有一个电话号码可以让我打电话给一个人类吗？
english: Can you like talk to somebody about this, can you like can you tell them that this is ridiculous and can they change it from now on, is there a phone number you have that I can call that will like automatically be talking to somebody a human being.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F005
chinese: 嗯- 什么时候是什么时候-
english: Uh- when's when's-

name: Ses05F_impro08_F006
chinese: 先生-
english: Sir-

name: Ses05F_impro08_F007
chinese: 如果是的，如果你能放慢速度，我们肯定能解决你的问题，解决完问题后，我可以把你转接给经理，他可以听取你的投诉，并采取相应的措施。
english: If yeah, well if you just slow down we'll um, we'll definitely have your problem solved and after we have your problem solved, then I can transfer you to a manager, someone who can you know, you can voice your complaint to, who will be able to something about it.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M006
chinese: 好的，好的，好的。首先，好的，好的，好的。让我看看，首先，嗯，是的，我的账单有问题。
english: Well, okay ,well First off, fine, fine, fine.  Let's see, first off, um- yeah my bill's wrong.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M007
chinese: 就像我知道我上个月付过款，但是还没有付款，而且你还向我收取了滞纳金。
english: Like I know I paid last month, but it hasn't been paid and you charged me a late fee.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F008
chinese: 好的，那么在哪里？好的，没问题，那么你在哪里找到你的账单？
english: Okay, so where?, okay, all right, so where did you uh- locate your your bill?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M008
chinese: 我在邮件中收到了它。
english: I got it in the mail.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F009
chinese: 在邮件中吗？
english: In the mail?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M009
chinese: 是的
english: yeah

name: Ses05F_impro08_F010
chinese: 那么，这是不是说，这个陈述可能只是旧的，而且这笔交易还没有被处理呢？
english: So is it, is- is it at all possible that maybe this statement is just old and that the transaction hadn't been processed yet?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M010
chinese: 好的，当我在网上查看时，上面显示我被收取了滞纳金，所以我猜想我是在你们的网站上付款的。
english: Well, when I look online, it says, it says that I was charged a late fee so I'm assuming that I paid on your web site-

name: Ses05F_impro08_F011
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M011
chinese: 就像我在到期日之前通过你们自己的公司支付了一样，但是它仍然显示我的付款，并且之后还向我收取了滞纳金。
english: like I paid right through your own company before my due date but it's still and it even shows my payment there, and then it charged me the late fee afterwards.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F012
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F013
chinese: 好的。我-
english: All right. I-

name: Ses05F_impro08_F014
chinese: 好的，那么，我会查一下，看看发生了什么，也许我们可以...
english: Okay so, I'll just look it up and you know see what's going on, maybe we can...

name: Ses05F_impro08_M012
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F015
chinese: 如果我在屏幕上呼叫它。
english: if I call it up on the screen.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M013
chinese: 好的，太棒了，继续吧。
english: Okay, great, go ahead.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F016
chinese: 在数据库中，看起来好像在交易中出现了一个故障，之前没有完成，但我看到你已经支付了，你能告诉我金额是多少吗？
english: So in the database, it looks as though um, there is a there is like a glitch in the transaction where it hadn't gone through before, but I do see that you paid the, what can you tell me the amount, what was the amount?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M014
chinese: 这是一九九八年六月三日。我支付了最低金额。
english: It was one ninety eight sixty three. I paid the minimum.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F017
chinese: 好的，我确实在这里看到了，并且它说由于某种原因无法清除。我认为这是我们这边的问题。所以，嗯-
english: Okay, I do see that on here, and it says that um, it had some trouble clearing for some reason.  And I think that was the problem on our end.  So um-

name: Ses05F_impro08_M015
chinese: 哇，我简直不敢相信你竟然承认在你这边有问题。这还是头一回。
english: Wow.  I can't believe you're actually admitting to having a problem on your end.  That's a first.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F018
chinese: 嗯，你知道有时候- 就是在网上交易中，事情会发生。所以嗯-
english: Well you know sometimes-- just with online transactions, things happens. so um-

name: Ses05F_impro08_M016
chinese: 不，不，不，我很感激。
english: No, No, No, I am grateful.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M017
chinese: 绝对。
english: Absolutely.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F019
chinese: 是的，我们-有人进去-并解决了问题，看起来你已经付清了。
english: Yeah, we- Somebody went in and- and cleared the problem and it looks like you're all paid.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M018
chinese: 他们拿走了吗？
english: Did they take-

name: Ses05F_impro08_F020
chinese: 你是直接从你的银行账户中扣款，对吗？
english: You do the direct the direct it um- it's taking right out of your bank account, correct?

name: Ses05F_impro08_M019
chinese: 是的，是的，确切地说。
english: Yes, yes, exactly.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F021
chinese: 是的，所以-那个-那个确实成功了。
english: Yeah so- That --that did go through.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M020
chinese: 你会把我的账户上的滞纳金取消吗？
english: Are you taking the late fee off of my account then?

name: Ses05F_impro08_F022
chinese: 嗯，我可以尝试为您做到这一点，当然。
english: Um- I can try to do that for you, certainly.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M021
chinese: 因为我按时付款。
english: Because I paid it on time.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F023
chinese: 对的，对的，而且因为——是的，因为那只是一个计算机故障，所以那应该也会被解决。所以我打算继续尝试将其输入计算机。如果在几天后你发现你被收取了逾期费用，那么你应该打电话回来，我们会处理的。
english: Right, right, and since--yeah, since it was just a computer glitch, then that's that should be cleared up as well.  So I'm going to go ahead and try and put that into the computer.  And if for some reason you notice on your statement in a few days that you've been charged and an overdue fee, then you should just call back and we'll have that.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M022
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M023
chinese: 是的，但如果我回电话，我将不得不再次经历这整个繁琐的过程，并试图找到一个洞或某人。
english: Yeah, but if I call back, I'll have to go through this whole rigmarole again. and try to get a hole or someone.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F024
chinese: 好的，我会给你我的直线电话和号码，这样你就可以直接联系到我了。
english: Well I'll give you my direct line and my number so you can- you can  get directly to me.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M024
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses05F_impro08_F025
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M025
chinese: 那将会很美妙，那将会很棒，真的。
english: That would be wonderful, that would be great seriously.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F026
chinese: 没问题。
english: No problem.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M026
chinese: 谢谢你，号码是多少？
english: thank you, what's the number?

name: Ses05F_impro08_F027
chinese: 啊，一八零零三二三
english: ahh one eight hundred three two three

name: Ses05F_impro08_M027
chinese: 三 二 三
english: three two three

name: Ses05F_impro08_F028
chinese: 六四九四
english: six four nine four

name: Ses05F_impro08_M028
chinese: 六四九四。那将会非常棒，非常感谢你。
english: six four nine four. That would be so great, thank you so much.

name: Ses05F_impro08_FXX0
chinese: 是的，所以--
english: Yep, So--

name: Ses05F_impro08_F029
chinese: 不客气
english: You're welcome

name: Ses05F_impro08_M029
chinese: 哦。
english: oh.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F030
chinese: 对于给您带来的不便，我很抱歉。
english: I'm sorry that it was an inconvenience.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M030
chinese: 这真是太可怕了，但是你让它变得好多了，非常感谢。绝对。
english: It was horrible, but you've made it much better, thank you very much. Absolutely

name: Ses05F_impro08_F031
chinese: 我很高兴。
english: I am glad.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F032
chinese: 祝你有一个愉快的一天。
english: Have a good day.

name: Ses05F_impro08_M031
chinese: 你也一样，非常感谢，祝你有一个美好的一天。
english: You too, thank you so much, have a wonderful day.

name: Ses05F_impro08_F033
chinese: 再见
english: bye bye

name: Ses05F_impro08_M032
chinese: 再见
english: bye

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M000
chinese: 哦，天哪。
english: Oh Good God.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F000
chinese: 你认为是他们吗？
english: Do you think it's them?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M001
chinese: 我想知道。
english: I wonder.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F001
chinese: 什么，除了弗里达，没有人知道我们在这里，而她也不会打电话。
english: what, Nobody knows we are here except Freda and she wouldn't ring up.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M002
chinese: 是他们吗？
english: Must be them then?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F002
chinese: 我们要做什么？
english: What do we do?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M003
chinese: 我们都没事，亲爱的，无论发生什么事情。
english: We're all right, aren't we, darling, whatever happens?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F003
chinese: 现在和永远，我的甜蜜。
english: Now and always, my sweet.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M004
chinese: 我不在乎。
english: I don't care then.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F004
chinese: 这是迟早会发生的事情。
english: It was bound to happen sooner or later.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M005
chinese: 你好？你好？什么？打错电话了。
english: Hello?  Hello?  What?  Wrong number.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F005
chinese: 哦，它让我毛骨悚然。
english: Oh, it sent shivers up my spine.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M006
chinese: 哦，如果他们突然走进来，我们该怎么办。
english: Oh, what shall we do if they suddenly walk in on us.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F006
chinese: 表现得精致。
english: Behave exquisitely.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M007
chinese: 带着最糟糕的-带着最完美的平衡？
english: With the worst- with the most perfect poise?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F007
chinese: 我可能会行一个宫廷屈膝礼。
english: I shall probably do a Court Curtsey.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M008
chinese: 嗯，真是令人惊讶，一旦你感受到--
english: Uhh, It's amazing how once you feel--

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M009
chinese: 当一个人快乐时，那些本应最为重要的事情却一点都不重要，对吗？
english: things that ought to matter most dreadfully don't matter at all when one's happy, do they?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F008
chinese: 令人可怕的是，一个人无法保持快乐。
english: What's so horrible is that one can't stay happy.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M010
chinese: 嗯，亲爱的，你不能说那样的话。
english: Uhh, You mustn't say that, my darling.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F009
chinese: 嗯，这是真的。整个事情都是一个非常糟糕的笑话。
english: Well, it's true.  The whole business is a very poor joke.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M011
chinese: 作为那个神圣而美妙的东西，爱。
english: Being that sacred and wonderful thing, love.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F010
chinese: 意思只是那样。
english: Meaning just that.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M012
chinese: 嗯，这一切意味着什么？这是我在无尽的追求终极真理中问自己的问题。亲爱的上帝，这一切意味着什么？
english: Um What does it all mean?  That's what I ask myself in my endless quest for ultimate truth.  Dear God, what does it all mean?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F011
chinese: 不要嘲笑我。我是认真的。
english: Don't laugh at me.  I'm serious.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M013
chinese: 亲爱的，你不能太认真。那只是他们想要的。
english: You mustn't be serious, darling.  That's just what they want.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F012
chinese: 他们是谁？
english: Who's they?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M014
chinese: 所有那些试图让生活变得难以忍受的徒劳的凡人们。嘲笑他们，轻率对待。嘲笑一切，嘲笑他们所有神圣的陈词滥调。
english: All the futile mortals who try to make life unbearable.  Laugh at them, Be flippant.  Laugh at everything, all their sacred shibboleths.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M015
chinese: 嗯-那个-轻率地行事会激发出他们该死的美丽和光芒中的酸液。
english: uh- the- Being flippant brings out the acid in their damned beauty and light.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F013
chinese: 如果我对一切都笑，那么我也必须笑我们自己。
english: If I laugh at everything, then I must laugh at us too.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M016
chinese: 当然你必须。我们确实是好笑的人物。
english: Certainly you must.  We are figures of fun all right.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F014
chinese: 哦，这种荒谬而压倒一切的爱情会持续多久呢？
english: Oh, how long will it last, this ludicrous, overbearing love of ours?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M017
chinese: [垃圾] 谁知道？
english: [garbage] who knows?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F015
chinese: 好吧，我们会一直争吵和打架吗？
english: Well, will we always bicker and fight?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M018
chinese: 不。那火焰将随着我们的激情逐渐消逝。
english: No.  That fire will fade along with our passion.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F016
chinese: 哦，亲爱的。我们会喜欢那样吗？
english: Oh, dear.  Shall we like that?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M019
chinese: 嗯，这取决于我们打得有多好。
english: Well, it depends on how well we played.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F017
chinese: 如果我们其中一个死了，另一个会笑吗？
english: What if one of us dies, does the other one laugh then?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M020
chinese: 是的，是的，全力以赴。
english: Yes, yes, with all his might.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F018
chinese: 那相当严重，不是吗？
english: That's rather serious, isn't it?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M021
chinese: 不，不，那真是可笑。这个令人费解的小谜团全都是用镜子完成的。
english: No, no that is quit laughable.  The cutting little mystery all done with mirrors.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F019
chinese: 亲爱的，我相信你在说胡话。
english: Darling, I do believe you're talking nonsense.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M022
chinese: 所以从长远来看，每个人都是如此。让我们肤浅地可怜那些可怜的哲学家。让我们吹喇叭和吱吱作响，尽可能地享受派对，就像一群安静的愚蠢的小学生一样。
english: So is everyone else in the long run.  Let's be superficial and pity the poor philosophers.  Let's blow trumpets and squeakers and enjoy the party as long as we can, like little quiet idiotic school children.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M023
chinese: 亲爱的，亲吻我，然后在你的身体腐烂并且蠕虫开始在你的眼眶里出没之前。
english: [garbage] Darling, kiss me before your body rots and worms start popping in and out of your eye sockets.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F020
chinese: 埃利奥特，蠕虫不会爆炸。
english: Elliott, worms don't pop.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M024
chinese: 我不在乎你做什么。你可以把身体涂成亮绿色，裸体穿过凡尔赛广场，和世界上的每个男人在一起，我都不会说一句话。只要我知道你最爱我。
english: I don't care what you do.  See, you could paint your body bright green and and run naked through the Place Vendome and run with every man in the world and I shan't say a word.  As long as I know that you love me best.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F021
chinese: 嗯，谢谢你，亲爱的。对你也一样，但是如果我看到你对其他女人有任何意思，我会杀了你。
english: Uhh, Thank you, darling.  And the same goes for you, except that if I ever see you so much as look at another woman, I'll kill you.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M025
chinese: 你还记得我们在威尼斯发生的那个可怕的场景吗？
english: Do you remember that awful scene we had in Venice?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F022
chinese: 哪一个特定的？
english: Which particular one?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M026
chinese: 那个你买了那个小木桩并把它放在我的床上的地方。
english: The one where you bought that little painted wooden stake and you put it on my bed.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F023
chinese: 哇，查尔斯。那是他的名字。他扭动得如此美丽。
english: Awe, Charles.  That was his name.  He did wriggle so beautifully.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M027
chinese: 可怕的事情。我讨厌它。
english: Horrible thing.  I hated it.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F024
chinese: 我知道你做了。你把它扔到了下面的运河里。我不认为我会原谅你这样做。
english: I know you did.  You threw it out the window into the Canal below.  I don't think I'll ever forgive you for that.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M028
chinese: 那个流浪汉持续了多久？
english: How long did that roue last?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F025
chinese: 它持续不定期地进行了几天。
english: It went on intermittently for days.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M029
chinese: 哦，最糟糕的一次是在戛纳，当你的卷发棒烧了一个洞在我的新睡袍上？
english: Oh, The worst one was in Cannes when your curling iron burnt a hole in my new dressing gown?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F026
chinese: 哦，我的梳子和浴室里的所有毛巾都烧坏了。
english: Oh, It burnt my comb and all the towels in the bathroom.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M030
chinese: [笑声] 那真是一个令人兴奋的场面，不是吗？
english: [LAUGHTER] That was quit a rouser, wasn't it?

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F027
chinese: 那是你第一次打我。
english: That was the first time you hit me.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M031
chinese: 哦，我没有打你很重。
english: Oh, I didn't hit you very hard.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F028
chinese: 然后经理走进来，看到我们都在地板上滚来滚去，互相咬和抓。【笑声】
english: And then the manager came in and saw us all rolling all over the floor, biting and scratching one another. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M032
chinese: 我永远不应该忘记他的脸。【笑声】
english: I should never forget his face. [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F029
chinese: 多么荒谬，完全荒谬。
english: How ridiculous, utterly ridiculous

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M033
chinese: 我们当时年轻得多。
english: We were very much younger then.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F030
chinese: 非常愚蠢。
english: Very much sillier.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_M034
chinese: 说起来，那场骚乱的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: Come to think of it, the real cause of that roues was Peter Burden.

name: Ses05M_script03_1_F031
chinese: 你知道那里面什么都没有。
english: You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M000
chinese: 嗨。嗯-我的行李没有从传送带上出来。
english: Hi. Um-  My luggage didn't come out of the conveyor thingy.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F000
chinese: 嗯。嗯。
english: Hmm. Hmm.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M001
chinese: 那么，嗯，我该怎么办？
english: So, um, what do I do?

name: Ses05M_impro05_F001
chinese: 多久之前发生的？
english: How long ago was that?

name: Ses05M_impro05_M002
chinese: 嗯，大约一个半小时前。我和一个站在那边的人聊过，他们说等一下。有时候一些随机的东西会迟到。
english: Uh- Like, an hour and a half ago.  I talked to somebody who was standing out there and they said wait.  Sometimes like random butt- pieces come out late.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F002
chinese: 嗯-嗯。
english: Uh-Hmm.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M003
chinese: 于是我在那里等待，但什么也没有发生。
english: And so I waited there, but nothing came.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F003
chinese: 嗯，好的。你可以提交索赔。你是从哪里来的？
english: Um, okay.  Well, you can fly- file a claim.  Where were you coming from?

name: Ses05M_impro05_M004
chinese: 我是从中西部来的，像是爱荷华州。
english: I was coming from um the Midwest, like Iowa.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F004
chinese: 所以，在国内，是吗？嗯
english: So, within the country, though? umm

name: Ses05M_impro05_M005
chinese: 是的，我知道我在国内。我的意思是，这并不复杂。
english: Yeah, I know I was in the country.  I mean, it's not that complicated.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F005
chinese: 是的，嗯，它永远丢失的可能性很小，因为你在那里。
english: Yeah, well the chances of it being lost forever, you know, are slight because -- -- you were in the --

name: Ses05M_impro05_M006
chinese: 嗯，我希望如此。
english: Well, I would hope so.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F006
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，你知道有时候行李会丢失。
english: Well, I mean, you know that happens pretty often that sometimes baggage -- -- gets lost.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M007
chinese: 人们失去
english: People lose --

name: Ses05M_impro05_M008
chinese: 永远？
english: forever?

name: Ses05M_impro05_F007
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M009
chinese: 你知道，这实际上，我的意思是，这是一个非常重要的行李。
english: You know, this is actually, I mean it's -- it's a really important piece of luggage.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F008
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M010
chinese: 我的意思是，它并不大或者什么的。我的意思是，它并不值很多钱或者什么的。
english: I mean, it's not big or anything like that.  I mean, it's not worth a lot of money or anything.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F009
chinese: 你的航班有保险吗？
english: Did you have insurance on your flight?

name: Ses05M_impro05_M011
chinese: 不，我的意思是，当你购买机票或其他东西时，你不会得到保险吗？
english: No.  I mean, don't you get insurance when you buy your ticket or something?

name: Ses05M_impro05_F010
chinese: 不，你现在必须购买它。它要额外花费三十美元。
english: No, you have to buy it now.  It's like thirty dollar extra.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M012
chinese: 嗯，甚至没有人告诉我那件事。就像，我为什么会想到买保险呢？我-就像是一个三小时的飞行。
english: Well, no one even told me about that.  Like, why would I think to buy insurance?  I was- It's like a three hour flight.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F011
chinese: 嗯，这是值得的东西。
english: well, it's something that worth

name: Ses05M_impro05_F012
chinese: 是的，我不知道。
english: yeah, I don't know.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M013
chinese: 你怎么能像这样把我的行李弄丢了，就像从...中弄丢了一样。
english: How can you lose my luggage like from like, in --

name: Ses05M_impro05_F013
chinese: 机会是它可能只是你知道的 - 花时间从飞机上卸货。
english: Chances are it's probably just you know -- taking time being um- unloaded from the airplane.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M014
chinese: -- 四百英里？
english: -- four hundred miles?

name: Ses05M_impro05_M015
chinese: 我应该希望如此。你知道，我今天需要那个。
english: I should hope so.  You know, I need that today.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F014
chinese: 嗯，嗯，我能做的事情不多。我可以，你可以提交这份报告，当它到达时我们会给你打电话。
english: Um, well, there's not much I can do.  I can, you can file this report and we'll call you when it comes in.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M016
chinese: 让我向你解释一下问题是什么。我祖父的遗骸在那个袋子里。而且我必须今天分发它们。我们应该，你知道的，今天把它们扔到海里。
english: Let me explain to you what the problem is.  My grandfather's remains are in that bag.  And I have to, like, distribute them today.  We're suppose to, you know, throw them out to the sea today.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F015
chinese: 哇。
english: wow.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F016
chinese: 哇。嗯，那真的很重要，显然。但是，嗯 --
english: Wow.  Well, that's really important, obviously.  But, um --

name: Ses05M_impro05_M017
chinese: 是的。我的意思是，如果你有建议，比如说，帮助我会很好。
english: Yeah.  I mean, if you have a suggestion, like, it would be great to help me out here.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F017
chinese: 嗯，实际上，我不知道那是合法的。嗯，这是个问题。
english: Uh- Actually, I don't know that that's legal. Um- it is the issue

name: Ses05M_impro05_M018
chinese: 好吧，我不在乎它是否合法。它已经发生了。它已经完成了。
english: Well, I don't care if it's legal.  It's happened.  It's already done.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F018
chinese: 是的，我的意思是，你的包可能被没收了，因为它是--
english: Yeah I mean, Your bag might have been confiscated because it's --

name: Ses05M_impro05_M019
chinese: 好的，你能告诉我它是否被没收了吗？
english: Well, could you tell me if it's been confiscated then.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F019
chinese: -- 这是一个生物危害物。所以- 嗯
english: -- it's a biohazard. so- um

name: Ses05M_impro05_M020
chinese: 我是说，一些信息会很好。一些帮助。你能不能，像，输入一些内容然后找出来？
english: I mean, some information here would be great.  Some help.  Can you, like, type something in and find out?

name: Ses05M_impro05_F020
chinese: 是的。让我打个电话给保安。
english: Yeah.  Let me just call security.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M021
chinese: 那将会很棒。非常感谢你。
english: That would be great.  Thank you very much.

name: Ses05M_impro05_F021
chinese: [笑声] 好的，等一下。
english: [LAUGHTER] Okay.  Hold on.

name: Ses05M_impro05_M022
chinese: 谢谢你
english: Thank you

name: Ses05F_impro01_F000
chinese: 嗨，我需要一个身份证。
english: Hi, I need an ID.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M000
chinese: 啊，是的，这是错误的线路。对不起。你需要回到2B线。那是你应该从那里开始的地方。
english: ahh Yeah, this is the wrong line.  I'm sorry.  You need to go back over to line two B.  That's where you should have started from.

name: Ses05F_impro01_FXX0
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F001
chinese: 好的，对不起，但是我刚刚在这条队伍里排了一个小时。我可以有什么办法吗？
english: Okay, I'm sorry, but I just stood in this line for an hour.  can I Is there any way I can-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M001
chinese: 我的意思是，在这个队伍里我真的无法为你做任何事情。这不是办理新身份证的队伍，而是注册的队伍。
english: I mean, there's really nothing I can do for you in this line.  This is not the line for new I.D.  This is the line for registration.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F002
chinese: 不，他们告诉我-对不起，但他们告诉我要排在这条线上。
english: No, they told me-I'm sorry, but they told me to be in this line.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M002
chinese: 是的，我理解，女士。我不知道他们对您说了什么，但您需要排在另一条队伍里。
english: Yeah, I understand that ma'am.  I don't know what they said to you, but you need to be in a different line.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F003
chinese: 什么，我的意思是什么...有什么区别吗？在那里我需要做什么，而在这里我做不了什么？
english: What, I mean what... what's the difference?  What do I need to do there that I can't do here?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M003
chinese: 嗯，我这里没有相机。我无法在这里帮助您，女士。我这里有完全不同的表格。您需要去另一个地方。
english: Well, I have no camera here.  I can't help you at all here, ma'am.  I have forms for something completely different.  You need to go to a different place.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F004
chinese: 你能不能-我能不能就拿到正确的-
english: Can you just-can I just get the right-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M004
chinese: 请您简单地走到第二行A，女士，我很抱歉。
english: Simply step to line two A, ma'am, I'm sorry.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F005
chinese: 你能把我放在那条队伍的前面吗？
english: Would you be able to put me at the front of that line?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M005
chinese: 你后面有一大排人在等着。
english: There is a large line of people behind you waiting to be--

name: Ses05F_impro01_F006
chinese: 我知道。我和这些人一起排队过。我理解。我知道那是什么感觉。你能不能请过来一下-
english: I know.  I've been in line with these people.  I understand.  I understand what it's like.  Could you please like call over and-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M006
chinese: 我不想在这里失礼，女士，但是您需要去B号二号线。这是注册的队伍。
english: I don't want to be rude here, ma'am, but line two B is where you need to be.  This is the line for registration.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F007
chinese: 我听到了。我听到了。谢谢，但是我排队等了很久，我不想整天都在这里。
english: I hear that.  I hear that.  Thank you, but I've waited in line for so long, and I don't want to have to be here all day.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M007
chinese: 我没有那些-
english: I don't have those-

name: Ses05F_impro01_F008
chinese: 那么我可以从你这里拿到表格，然后在这里填写，也许你可以-
english: So could I maybe get the form from you, fill it out here- and maybe you could-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M008
chinese: 我没有那些表格，女士。我无法帮助您。这就是为什么您需要去2A号窗口。
english: I don't have those forms, ma'am.  I can't help you.  That's why you need to go to line two A.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F009
chinese: 那需要多长时间？
english: And how long is that going to take?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M009
chinese: 女士，显然我不知道需要多长时间。那里似乎有一点排队。看起来大约有三四十个人。可能需要四到五个小时。对不起。
english: Ma'am, obviously I have no idea how long it's taking.  There seems to be a bit of a line there.  It looks like thirty forty people.  It could take four to five hours.  I'm sorry.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F010
chinese: 我不-
english: I don't-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M010
chinese: 对不起，夫人，我无能为力。
english: There's nothing I can do for you, ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F011
chinese: 我今天没有时间做这个，而且-
english: I don't have time for this today, and-

name: Ses05F_impro01_M011
chinese: 但是，显然我没有时间让你站在这里浪费我的时间。后面还有其他需要服务的人在等待正确的事情。
english: But, obviously I don't have time for you to stand here and waste my time in this line.  There are other people who need service behind you who are waiting for the right things.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F012
chinese: 有什么事情你能做吗？请有些同情心。有什么你能做的吗？
english: Is there anything you can do?  Please, have some compassion.  Is there something you can do?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M012
chinese: 我是一个非常有同情心的人，你暗示我不是这样让我感到冒犯。当然，我是有同情心的。你看，我在车管所工作。你以为我是什么？去二号A排队等候。
english: I am a very compassionate person, and I'm offended that you imply that I'm not.  Of course, I'm compassionate.  Look, I work in the D.M.V..  What do you think I am?  Go wait in line two A.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M013
chinese: 不要让我找别人过来把你搬走。我不能回去那边。如果你需要，我会叫保安来的。
english: Don't ask me to have somebody else come over here and move you myself.  I can't come back over there.  I'll get security if you need me to.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F013
chinese: 请，我觉得这并不必要。我只是在问，也许你可以打电话过去，告诉她有人给她提供了错误信息，因为我没有选择站在这条队伍里。我问他们应该站在哪里，他们告诉我站在这里。
english: Please, I don't think that's necessary.  I'm just asking, maybe you could call over and say that somebody miss informed her because I didn't pick to stand in this line.  I asked them where to stand, and they told me here.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M014
chinese: 什么，不，我确定他们没有告诉你这里。
english: what, no, I'm sure they did not tell you here.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F014
chinese: 不，他们做了。那边的女士告诉我站在这条线上，我已经在这里等了一个小时了。
english: No, they did.  The lady over there told me to stand in this line and I've been here for an hour.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M015
chinese: 什么女士，什么？清洁工？
english: what The lady, what? the janitor?

name: Ses05F_impro01_F015
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M016
chinese: 你问清洁工应该站在哪条队伍里？显然，那不会是正确的事情。
english: You asked the janitor what line to stand in?  Obviously, that's not going to be the right thing.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F016
chinese: 不，我不是，对不起。我不是笨蛋。
english: No, I'm not, I'm sorry.I'm not stupid.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M017
chinese: 我并不是说您很愚蠢，女士。我觉得是您自己说您很愚蠢。
english: I'm not saying that you're stupid, ma'am.  I think you just said that you were stupid.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F017
chinese: 难道你什么都不能做吗？只需打电话过去问问他们，我能不能插队到另一条队伍的前面。
english: Isn't there anything you can do?  Just call over and ask them if I can go to the front of the line in the other line.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M018
chinese: 这种方式在这里行不通，女士。
english: It doesn't work that way here, ma'am.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F018
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M019
chinese: 这里有一个严格的制度。你需要在正确的队伍中等待正确的事情。这是注册的队伍。
english: There is a strict system here.  You need to wait in the right line for the right thing.  This is the line for registration.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F019
chinese: 除非他们要告诉我，你这次至少会告诉我站在正确的队伍里吗？
english: Except they're going tell, are you going to tell me the right line to stand in this time at least?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M020
chinese: 我告诉过你，这是第二行A。
english: I told you it was line two A.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F020
chinese: 好的，上次他们告诉我是这条线，显然，这是不真实的。
english: Right, well, last time they told me, it was this line, and obviously, it's not true.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M021
chinese: 我不知道是谁告诉你那个，但他们是错的。对不起。
english: I don't know who told you that but they were wrong.  I'm sorry.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F021
chinese: 你们有经理可以和我交谈吗？
english: Do you have a manager I could speak with?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M022
chinese: 我是经理。
english: I am the manager.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F022
chinese: 你对我坦诚吗？
english: Are you being straight with me?

name: Ses05F_impro01_M023
chinese: 我对您非常直接，女士。我无法为您做任何事情。您需要站在A号排队。
english: I'm being very straight with you, ma'am.  There is nothing I can do for you.  You need to stand in line two A.

name: Ses05F_impro01_F023
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses05F_impro01_M024
chinese: 非常感谢你。祝你有一个美好的一天。
english: Thank you very much.  You have a wonderful day.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F000
chinese: 宝贝，我需要你坐下。
english: baby, I need you to sit down.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M000
chinese: 这是什么？
english: What is it?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F001
chinese: 嗯。
english: um.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M001
chinese: 你可以说出来。
english: You can say it.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F002
chinese: 对不起。只是有很多事情要解释。啊，我接到一个电话--
english: I'm sorry.  It's just a lot ahh to explain. ahh I got a call--

name: Ses05F_impro02_M002
chinese: 你还好吗？
english: Are you all right?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F003
chinese: 是的，嗯，到目前为止一切都好。嗯。
english: Yeah, um everything's fine so far. um

name: Ses05F_impro02_F004
chinese: 我今天接到了一个电话，
english: I got a call today,

name: Ses05F_impro02_FXX0
chinese: 嗯，呃--
english: And um--

name: Ses05F_impro02_M003
chinese: 好的。
english: okay.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F005
chinese: 我需要去海外一段时间。
english: I'm going to need to go overseas for a while.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M004
chinese: 你被叫了起来。
english: You got called up.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F006
chinese: 伊拉克。
english: Iraq.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M005
chinese: 我以为你说这至少要过一年才会发生。
english: I thought you said this wasn't going to happen for at least a year.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F007
chinese: 对不起。我以为是这样的。“叹气”
english: I'm sorry.  I thought so. "sigh"

name: Ses05F_impro02_M006
chinese: 我要做什么？
english: What am I going to do?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F008
chinese: 我不知道“叹气”。
english: I don't know "sigh".

name: Ses05F_impro02_M007
chinese: 我一个人做不了这个。我不知道怎么做这个。你知道怎么做这个。
english: I can't do this by myself. I I don't know how to do this.  You know how to do this.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M008
chinese: 孩子们-
english: The kids-

name: Ses05F_impro02_F009
chinese: 我知道。我知道。
english: I know.  I know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M009
chinese: 没人在这里。你的父母住在国家的另一边。
english: Nobody's even here.  Your parents live on the other side of the country.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F010
chinese: 我知道。嗯，我们得弄清楚这一切。我的意思是，我认为军队会提供托儿服务并帮助我们解决这个问题。嗯。
english: I know.  Well, we'll have to figure all that out.  I mean, I think the Army's going to provide childcare and help us out with that. um.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M010
chinese: 你必须去哪里？你要去哪里？
english: Where do you have to go?  Where are you going?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F011
chinese: 伊拉克。
english: Iraq.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M011
chinese: 你在那里打算做什么？那里会危险吗？你在做什么？
english: What are you going to do there?  Is it going to be dangerous?  What are you-?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F012
chinese: 我想是步兵。我不确定。
english: I think infantry.  I'm not sure.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M012
chinese: 这是--
english: It's--

name: Ses05F_impro02_M013
chinese: 我们可以做点别的吗？你能告诉他们你刚刚生了两个孩子吗？
english: Can we do something else?  Can you tell them that you just had two kids?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F013
chinese: 这将至少需要六个月，可能是一年。我已经尝试过了。
english: It's going to be at least six months, probably a year. I tried.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M014
chinese: 我不明白为什么他们会做这样的事情。
english: I don't understand why they would just do something like this?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F014
chinese: 我知道，我知道。这真的很糟糕。
english: I know, I know.  It's really, really messed up.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M015
chinese: 这没有任何意义。这太愚蠢了。我告诉过你不应该去军队。
english: It doesn't make any sense.  It's stupid.  I told you you shouldn't go in the Army.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F015
chinese: 相信我，如果我有选择的话，我不会选择这个。
english: Believe me, if I had a choice, I wouldn't have chosen this.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M016
chinese: 我不知道我不知道我要做什么。我不知道如何-
english: I don't know I don't know what I'm going to do.  I don't know how to-

name: Ses05F_impro02_F016
chinese: 你不知道怎么做什么？你会没事的。我的意思是，你是一个很棒的父母。我知道。
english: You don't know how to what?  You'll be fine. I mean, you're a great parent. I know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M017
chinese: 他们六个月大。六个月大，他们很小。
english: They're six months old. Six months old, they're tiny.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M018
chinese: 我不能做这个。我以前从未做过这个。我对这个一无所知。
english: I can't do this.  I've never done this before.  I don't know anything about this.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F017
chinese: 好吧，也许你应该搬到我妈妈那里，她可以帮助你。
english: Well, maybe you should move in with my mom and she can help.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M019
chinese: 你的妈妈，你想让我搬去和你妈妈住？
english: Your Your mom, you want me to move in with your mom?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F018
chinese: 我不知道，我只是...我在努力想些什么。
english: I don't know, I'm just--I'm trying to think of something.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M020
chinese: 她甚至不喜欢我。她从来没有喜欢过我。不。
english: She doesn't even like me.  She's never liked me. No.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F019
chinese: 她喜欢你。当然，她喜欢你。
english: She likes you. Of course, she likes you.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M021
chinese: 她喜欢你。她喜欢孩子们。
english: She likes you.  She likes the kids.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M022
chinese: 我知道我不能-“叹气”
english: I no I can't- "sigh"

name: Ses05F_impro02_F020
chinese: 你不可以做什么？
english: You can't what?

name: Ses05F_impro02_M023
chinese: 我不能让你走。我不能让你走。我会给他们打电话。我会说些什么。我会做任何事情。我会告诉他们一些不同的事情。
english: I can't let you go.  I can't let you go.  I'll call them.  I'll say something.  I'll do anything.  I'll tell them something different.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F021
chinese: 我认为我们无能为力。
english: I don't think there's anything we can do.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M024
chinese: 我会告诉他们我生病了，而且你不能离开某件事。
english: I'll tell them I'm sick and that you can't leave something.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F022
chinese: 好吧，我们可以试试。宝贝，不要求我。我的意思是，如果有什么我能做的事情，我会去做的。相信我。这不是我想要的。
english: Well, we can try it.  Baby, don't beg me.  I mean, if there were anything that I could do, I would do it.  Believe me.  This is not what I want.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M025
chinese: 这不公平。
english: It's not fair.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F023
chinese: 我知道。我知道这不公平。
english: I know.  I know it's not fair.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M026
chinese: 为什么非得是你？还有那么多其他人。可以让别人去。这不公平。
english: Why has to be you?  There's all those other people.  Somebody else can go instead.  It's not right.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F024
chinese: 好吧，显然其他人都不能去。
english: Well, apparently nobody else can go.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M027
chinese: 你打算做什么与其他人不同的事情？
english: What are you going to do that's any different than anybody else?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F025
chinese: 我不知道。宝贝，你为什么问我这个问题？对我来说也同样困难。请试着理解一下。
english: I don't know.  Baby, why are you asking me this?  It's just as hard for me.  Please, try to understand that.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M028
chinese: 我不知道。不是我，所以我是那个必须留在这里的人。我是那个必须照顾他们的人，而且我没有-我没有其他人。你们是我唯一的依靠。
english: I don't know.  It's not me, so I'm the one who has to stay here.  I'm the one who has to take care of them, and I don't have-I don't have anybody else.  You're all I have.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F026
chinese: 我明白，宝贝。对不起。我的意思是试着理解我自己也害怕。
english: I understand, baby.  I'm sorry. I mean try to understand I'm I'm scared myself.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M029
chinese: 我理解。我担心你。我不知道将会发生什么事情。
english: I understand.  I'm worried about you.  I don't know what's going to happen to you.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F027
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M030
chinese: 伊拉克的情况真是太糟糕了。每天都有人丧生。
english: Iraq of all-come on.  People die every day.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F028
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M031
chinese: 我只是-
english: I jus-

name: Ses05F_impro02_F029
chinese: 我们会想出办法的。我们只需要...我们只需要考虑一下这个问题。你的家人中有谁能帮助我们吗？
english: We'll figure something out.  We just have to ... we just have to think about this.  Could any of your family help us?

name: Ses05F_impro02_M032
chinese: 我不知道。
english: I don't know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F030
chinese: 也许我们应该打电话给你的父母。
english: Maybe we should call your parents.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M033
chinese: 是的。我猜是这样。我不知道他们要说什么。
english: Yeah.  I guess.  I don't know what they're going to say.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M034
chinese: 是的，我们会给他们打电话。我们会想出办法的。对不起，对不起，对不起。你是对的。
english: Yeah, we'll call them.  We'll figure something out.  I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm sorry.  You're right.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F031
chinese: 我将会错过他们的第一句话。
english: I'm going to miss their first words.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M035
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F032
chinese: 你每天都需要给我发送照片和信件。
english: You'll have to send me pictures and letters everyday.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M036
chinese: 一直以来，每天，每天。他们那边有电子邮件之类的东西，对吗？我可以给你发照片。
english: All the time, every day, every day.  They have e-mail over there and stuff like that, right? I can send you pictures.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F033
chinese: 我不知道。我希望如此。
english: I don't know. I hope so.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M037
chinese: 你必须在任何时候都要给我打电话。你必须告诉我你在做什么和你的情况如何。好吗？
english: You have to call me all the time whenever you can.  You have to tell me what you're doing and how you're doing.  Okay?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F034
chinese: 是的，尽我所能。
english: Yeah, as much as I can.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M038
chinese: 我们还有多久？你什么时候离开？
english: How long do we have?  When do you leave?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F035
chinese: 叹息。三周。
english: "sigh" Three weeks.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M039
chinese: 三个星期？
english: Three weeks?

name: Ses05F_impro02_F036
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M040
chinese: 我不行。好的，我们可以做到。我们可以做到。没关系。我们会让它成功的。
english: I don't Okay.  Okay, we can do this.  We can do this.  It's okay.  We'll make it work.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F037
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro02_M041
chinese: 我爱你。
english: I love you.

name: Ses05F_impro02_F038
chinese: 我爱你。我会非常想念你。“叹气”
english: I love you.  I'm going to miss you so much. "sigh"

name: Ses05M_impro03_M000
chinese: 猜猜看？
english: Guess what?

name: Ses05M_impro03_F000
chinese: 什么？
english: what?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M001
chinese: 我做到了，我向她求婚了。
english: I did it, I asked her to marry me.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F001
chinese: 什么？你做了？
english: What? you did?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M002
chinese: 是的，我做到了。
english: Yes, I did it.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M003
chinese: 哦，我的天啊，就在上个周末。
english: Oh my god, it was just last weekend.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F003
chinese: 哦，什么，怎么-在哪里，你是怎么做到的？
english: Oh, what, how- where how did you do it?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M004
chinese: 她——嗯，她说是的，首先，让我直截了当地说一下。嗯，我也想这样假设。但是你永远不知道这些事情，对吧？
english: She--,well, she said yes, first of all, let me say that right off the bat. Well, I would like to assume, too.  But you never know these things, right?

name: Ses05M_impro03_F004
chinese: 好的，很好。我，我假设。
english: Okay good. I I assumed.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M005
chinese: 嗯，但是不- 它很棒。它真的很棒。我觉得她真的很惊讶，她真的很开心。嗯-
english: Um-, but no- It was It was great.  It was really great.  I think she was really surprised and she was really happy. um-

name: Ses05M_impro03_F005
chinese: 哦-
english: oh-

name: Ses05M_impro03_M006
chinese: 我在优胜美地做到了。我们像往常一样去露营。你知道我们经常去那里露营。但是，嗯-瀑布的水流有点减少，你知道。所以，我们-我让她爬上去。
english: I did it up at Yosemite.  We went camping right like we usually do.  You know we go camping up there all the time.  But, um- the waterfalls had died down a little bit, you know. And so uh- we-I had her climb up.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M007
chinese: 你知道的-我们做了一些-你知道的攀岩，爬上了瀑布，然后到了上面的一个小水池。然后，我-太棒了。嗯-你必须爬上这块小石头-
