english: You know- we did some- you know some rock climbing up the waterfalls and went up to this little pool that was up there.  And then, I- it's great. Um- You have to climb this little rock-

name: Ses05M_impro03_F006
chinese: 嗯嗯
english: uh-huh

name: Ses05M_impro03_M008
chinese: 你可以爬上去，它上面长满了藻类，你知道的。所以，我想让她爬上去拍照，就在这个小瀑布区域后面，她到那里拍了照片。然后，我让她回来。然后，我也打算做同样的事情。
english: and you can climb it and it's covered in algae you know. So, I wanted her to climb it to go take a picture, like, back in this little waterfall area, and she got back there and she took her picture. And then, I had her come back.  And I was going to do the same thing.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M009
chinese: 好吧，相反我爬上岩石，就像我-我没有故意做的-嗯，我是故意做的。我让它看起来像是我不小心做的。我滑到了一个水池里，对吧？然后她吓坏了，因为我从这块岩石上滑下来了。嗯-
english: Well, instead I climb up on the rock and like I- I didn't do it -- well, I did it on purpose. I made it look like I accidentally did it.  I slipped down into this pool of water, right?  And she freaks out because I slide all the way down this rock.  And um-

name: Ses05M_impro03_FXX0
chinese: 敬畏。
english: Awe.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M010
chinese: 然后我从水中冒出来 - 我已经计划好了，你知道吗？我从水中冒出来，我呼吸着，然后我抓住她的手，你知道。在我的手中，我拿着戒指。
english: And I pop up out of the water -- and I had planned it already, you know? I pop up out of the water and I [BREATHING] and I like, grab her hand, you know.  and that In my hand, I've got the ring.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M011
chinese: 她就像是-她感受到了，你知道的，但她不知道是什么。她帮助我走出困境，我不会放开她的手。她问我，你在做什么？我说，你救了我的命，现在你愿意嫁给我吗？
english: And she's like- she feels it you know and she doesn't know what it is.  And she you know helps me get out and I won't let go of her hand.  And she's like, what are you doing?  I and said, You saved my life, now will you marry me?

name: Ses05M_impro03_F007
chinese: 哦，我的天。那太戏剧化了。
english: Oh, my God.  That's so dramatic.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M012
chinese: 那不是很棒吗？我不想让它太俗套，但是-但是-她喜欢它。她喜欢它。
english: Wasn't that great? I didn't want it to be too hokey.but- but- She liked it.She liked it.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F008
chinese: 太可爱了。
english: so cute.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F009
chinese: 不，它完全是原创的。
english: No, it's totally original, though.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F010
chinese: 哦。
english: oh.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M013
chinese: 是的。她说是的。当然，她哭了。
english: Yeah.  And she said yes.  And she cried, of course.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F011
chinese: 哦，那你度过了一个整个周末的野营？
english: Oh, Then you had a whole weekend of camping?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M014
chinese: 是的。我们一开始就做了那个。所以我们只是度过了一个愉快的周末，是的。
english: Yes.  We did that in the beginning, exactly.  So we had, so we just had, you know, good times the rest of the weekend, yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F012
chinese: 哦，对了。当然 [笑声]
english: Oh, right. sure [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05M_impro03_M015
chinese: 这真是太有趣了- 这真是太有趣了。她很棒。而且我很开心。
english: It was a lot of fun- It was a lot of fun.  She's great.  And I'm so happy.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F013
chinese: 那么你打算在哪里举办你的婚礼？
english: So where are you going to have your wedding?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M016
chinese: 我们打算回到中西部去办，那里是她家人都在的地方。他们都在那里。你知道的，所以，嗯，所以，只是要办一个小小的婚礼。但是，嗯，你知道，当然，你会来的，对吗？
english: We're going to do it back in the Midwest where her family all is.  They're all out there. you know so, Um  And so, just gonna have a small, small wedding. But, um- you know, of course, you're going to come, right?

name: Ses05M_impro03_F014
chinese: 是的，当然。
english: Yeah. of course.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M017
chinese: 好的，很好。嗯，实际上我希望你参与其中。
english: Okay good. And uh- I want you to be in it actually.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F015
chinese: 好的，好的。
english: Okay Okay.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M018
chinese: 嗯-她也希望你参加。她非常爱你。她认为你是最可爱的。当然，你是的。你是我最好的朋友，所以-
english: Um- And she wants you to be in it, too.  She loves you so much. She thinks you're the sweetest.  Of course, you are.  You're You're my best friend so-

name: Ses05M_impro03_FXX0
chinese: 敬畏。
english: Awe.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F016
chinese: 她现在在哪里？
english: Where is she right now?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M019
chinese: 哦，她又回去上班了。是的。
english: oh, She's back at work. yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F017
chinese: 是的，我会和你们两个一起出去玩。
english: Yeah,I'll hang out with the both of you.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M020
chinese: 当然。我们这周晚些时候出去吃晚餐。
english: Of course.  We'll go out to dinner later this week.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F018
chinese: 是的。
english: yes.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M021
chinese: 它将会是完美的。
english: It will be perfect.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F019
chinese: 哦，我为你感到非常兴奋。
english: Oh I'm so excited for you.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M022
chinese: 是的，我也是。哦，我太爱了。
english: Yes, me too. Oh I am so in love.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F020
chinese: 哦。
english: oh.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M023
chinese: 她就是那个人。
english: She's the one.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F021
chinese: 哦，天哪。你已经告诉你的父母了吗？还有其他的事情吗？
english: Oh, my gosh.  You told your parents already? and everything

name: Ses05M_impro03_M024
chinese: 当然。我立刻告诉了他们。我们立刻给他们打了电话。
english: Of course.  I told them right away.  We called them all right them.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F022
chinese: 他们是如此兴奋吗？
english: Are they so excited?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M025
chinese: 哦，是的。我妈妈很激动。哦，是的，她非常开心。这是你知道的，这是她的梦想成真。她一直想要她的小男孩 - 她想要孩子，你知道的。
english: Oh, yeah.  My mom's freaking out. Oh yeah, She's so happy. this is you know  It's her dream come true.  She always wanted her little boy -- she wants kids, you know.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M026
chinese: 她想要孙子孙女。所以我们会立即着手解决这个问题。
english: She wants grandkids. So we'll be working on that right away.

name: Ses05M_impro03_FXX1
chinese: 正确，正确。
english: right right.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F023
chinese: 你们打算要孩子吗？
english: Are you guys gonna have kids?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M027
chinese: 当然，我们会要孩子的，至少三个。
english: Of course, we're gonna have kids, like three at least.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F024
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses05M_impro03_F025
chinese: 哇，马上就可以吗？
english: Whoa, right away?.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M028
chinese: 她想要八个孩子，而我却说不，不，不，不，不。我说我们可以考虑要三个，然后再看看。
english: She wants like eight- She wants like eight kids and I'm like, no, no, no, no, no.  I am like what Let's do maybe three and we'll go with that.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F026
chinese: 你打算立刻开始吗？
english: Are you going to start right away?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M029
chinese: 嗯，我们需要花一点时间来适应，你知道的，我们需要适应环境，开始我们的生活，赚钱，你知道的，过得舒适一些。
english: Well, we're going to take a little bit of time, you know, we need to get acclimated and you know start our lives, make money, you know be comfortable.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F027
chinese: 是的，你以前有没有和别人一起生活过？
english: Yeah, have you ever like lived with someone else before?

name: Ses05M_impro03_M030
chinese: 哦，是的，是的，是的，是的，我的意思是，实际上我们在一起住了一段时间，当时我们在大学的时候，住了一小段时间。是的。
english: Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah I mean, actually we lived together awhile back when we -- Yeah, back in college for a little while. yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F028
chinese: 哦，是吗？我不知道那个。
english: Oh, did you?  I didn't know that.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F029
chinese: 哦。
english: oh.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M031
chinese: 但是，我们真的已经习惯了彼此。我们花了一些时间分开，现在我们打算重新在一起。我们很快就要搬到一起了。
english: But that- so we are really used to each other. We took the time apart and now we're going to get back together.  We're going to move in soon.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F030
chinese: 哦哦
english: Oooh

name: Ses05M_impro03_M032
chinese: 太棒了。我是一个幸运的人。
english: it's great. I'm a lucky man.

name: Ses05M_impro03_F031
chinese: 那真是令人难以置信，恭喜。
english: That's incredible yeah ,Congratulations.

name: Ses05M_impro03_M033
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F000
chinese: 他要说什么？也许我们应该在他看到之前告诉他。
english: What's he going to say? Maybe we should tell him before he sees it.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M000
chinese: 他看到了它。
english: He saw it.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F001
chinese: 他怎么能看到呢？我是第一个起床的。他还在床上。
english: How could he see it?  I was the first one up.  He was still in bed.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M001
chinese: 他在这里的时候它坏了。
english: He was out here when it broke.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F002
chinese: 什么时候？
english: When?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M002
chinese: 大约在凌晨四点左右，突然传来一声爆裂声，我朝外看去。当我看到时，我们就站在那里。
english: Around Four this morning, and there was a crack and I looked out.  We're standing right there when I cracked.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F003
chinese: 他凌晨四点在这里做什么？
english: What was he doing out here at four in the morning?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M003
chinese: 我不知道。但当它裂开时，他跑回房子里，在厨房里开始哭泣。
english: I don't know.  but When it cracked he ran back into the house and start to cry in the kitchen.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F004
chinese: 你和他说话了吗？
english: Did you talk to him?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M004
chinese: 不。我觉得最好还是让他一个人待着。
english: No.  I figured it was best to leave him alone.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F005
chinese: 他哭得很厉害。
english: He cried hard.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M005
chinese: 我可以透过房间的地板听到他。
english: I could hear him right through the floor of my room.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F006
chinese: 他又在想他了。
english: He is thinking about him again.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F007
chinese: 现在的情况就像是拉里去世后一样，他做梦，晚上四处走动。
english: It's getting just like after Larry died, he's having dreams, he's walking around at night.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M006
chinese: 我猜，他是。
english: I guess, he is.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F008
chinese: 那是什么意思？
english: What's the meaning of that?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M007
chinese: 我不知道它的意思。但我知道妈妈做了一件事。我们和爸爸犯了一个可怕的错误。
english: I don't know the meaning of it.  But I know one thing mom did.  We made a terrible mistake with dad.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F009
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M008
chinese: 对他不诚实。这是一种能够得到回报的事情，现在正在得到回报。
english: Being dishonest with him.  It's the kind of thing that pays off and now it's paying off.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F010
chinese: 你是什么意思，不诚实？
english: What do you mean, dishonest?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M009
chinese: 你知道拉里不会回来，我也知道。那么为什么我们还让他以为我们和他一样相信呢？
english: You know that Larry's not coming back, and I know it.  So why do we go on letting him think that we believe with him?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F011
chinese: 你打算做什么，和他争论吗？
english: What are you going to do, argue with him?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M010
chinese: 不，嗯，我不想和他争论，但是是时候我们意识到没有其他人相信拉里还活着了。
english: No um, I don't want to argue with him, but it's time we realized that nobody else believes that Larry is alive.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M011
chinese: 为什么他不应该梦见他，在夜晚四处走动，寻找他呢？我们是否与他矛盾？我们是否直接说我们不再有任何希望，我们多年来都没有希望了？
english: Why shouldn't he dream about him, walk around during the night, looking for him um.  Do we contradict him?  Do we say outright that we don't have any hope anymore, that we haven't had any for years now?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F012
chinese: 你不能对他说那样的话。
english: You can't just say that to him.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M012
chinese: 我们必须对他说出来！
english: We have to say it to him!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F013
chinese: 你打算如何证明呢，我的意思是，没有尸体也没有坟墓。那么你打算怎么办？你有证据吗？
english: How are you going to prove it, I mean, there's no body and there's no grave.  So what are you going to do? Do you have proof?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M013
chinese: 求求你了，妈妈，三年啊。三年后没人会回来的！太疯狂了！
english: For God's sake, mom, three years.  Nobody comes back after three years!  It's insane!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F014
chinese: 对你来说是这样，对我来说也是这样，但对你父亲来说不是。现在看，你可以自言自语，但没有尸体，也没有坟墓，那你在哪里？
english: To you it is, and to me, but not to your father.  Now look, you can talk yourself  blue in the face, but there's no body, and there's no grave, so where are you?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M014
chinese: 坐下，妈妈。我想和你谈谈。
english: Sit down, mom.  I want to talk to you.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F015
chinese: 这该死的报纸真是麻烦，我的意思是每周他们都会报道一些比拉里离开更久的男孩回来了，所以下一个就会--
english: The trouble with the god damned newspapers, I mean every week, they do a story about some boy's been gone longer than Larry and he comes back, so the next one is gonna--

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M015
chinese: 好的，好的妈妈。听着！
english: All right, All right mom.  Listen!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M016
chinese: 你知道我为什么把安妮请过来，对吗？
english: You know why I asked Annie here, don't you?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F016
chinese: 为什么？
english: why?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M017
chinese: 你知道。
english: You know.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F017
chinese: 好的，我有一个想法。但是故事是什么？
english: Well I got an idea.  But what's the story?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M018
chinese: 我打算向她求婚。
english: I'm going to ask her to marry me.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F018
chinese: 好吧，那是你的事，克里斯。
english: Well that's nobody's business but yours, Chris.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M019
chinese: 你知道那不仅仅是我的事情。
english: You know that's not just my business.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F019
chinese: 你打算做什么，我的意思是你已经足够大了可以自己决定了？
english: What- What am - what are you going to do, I mean you're old enough to make up your own mind?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M020
chinese: 所以没问题。那我可以继续进行吗？
english: So it's all right.  I can go ahead with it then?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F020
chinese: 好的，你想要确保你的父亲不会，你知道，丢失它们。
english: Well you're want to make sure your father isn't you know going to--lose them

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M021
chinese: 那不仅仅是我的事情。有时候你让我很生气。你知道吗？
english: Then it's not only my business.  Sometimes you infuriate me.  You know that?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M022
chinese: 你知道吗？如果我告诉爸爸，他会大发脾气，这也关你的事吧？你真是擅长忽视事情！
english: You know that?  Isn't it your business too, if I tell dad, and he gets, throws a fit about it?   you have such a talent for ignoring things!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F021
chinese: 我忽略我需要忽略的事情。那个女孩是拉里的女孩。
english: I ignore what I got to ignore.  The girl is Larry's girl.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M023
chinese: 她不是拉里的女孩！
english: She's not Larry's girl!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F022
chinese: 就你父亲而言，他还活着，你没有权利带走他的女孩。
english: As far as your father is concerned, he's not dead and you've no right to take his girl.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F023
chinese: 现在克里斯，你可以从那里继续，但我不知道该怎么办。我的意思是，你知道该怎么办吗，因为我不知道。
english: Now Chris you can go on from there, but I don't know what to do.  I mean do you know what to do, because I don't.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M024
chinese: 我不知道为什么会这样。但每次我伸手去拿我想要的东西，我都不得不退缩，因为其他人会受苦。我整个可恶的生活，一次又一次，又一次。
english: I don't know why it is.  But every time I reach out for something I want, I have to pull back because other people will suffer.  My whole bloody life, time after time, after time.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F024
chinese: 嗯，你是个体贴的人，这没有什么错。
english: Well you're a considerate fellow, there's nothing wrong with that.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M025
chinese: 去他妈的！
english: To hell with that!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F025
chinese: 你已经问过安妮要嫁给你了吗？
english: Have you asked Annie yet to marry you?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M026
chinese: 我想先解决这个问题。
english: I want to get this settled first.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F026
chinese: 嗯，你怎么知道她会同意呢，我的意思是也许她和你父亲有相同的感受？
english: Well how did you know that she will go along with it, I mean maybe she feels the same way as your father?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M027
chinese: 好的，如果她真的这样做了，那就是结束了，但从她的信中看起来她已经忘记了这件事。我会弄清楚然后和爸爸好好谈谈，好吗？妈妈，不要躲避我。
english: Well, if she does, then that's the end of it, but from her letters it sounds like she's forgotten about it.  I'll find out and then we'll thrash it out with Dad, all right?  Mom, don't avoid me.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F027
chinese: 问题是你没有看到足够多的女性，你从来没有看到过
english: The trouble is you don't see enough women, you never have

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M028
chinese: 所以呢，我对女人不太擅长。
english: So what, I'm not fast with women.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F028
chinese: 嗯，我就是不明白为什么非得是安妮。
english: Well I just don't see why it has to be Annie.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M029
chinese: 因为它是这样的。
english: Because it is.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F029
chinese: 嗯，那是一个很好的理由，但它并没有回答问题。
english: well, that's a good reason, but it doesn't answer a thing.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M030
chinese: 我无能为力。我最了解她。我是在她旁边长大的，这是最容易的，当我为我的妻子想到某个人时，我想到的是安妮。你想要一个图表吗？
english: I can't help it.  I know her best.  I was brought up next door to here, the easiest, when I think of somebody for my wife, I think of Annie.  Do you want a diagram?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F030
chinese: 不，我不想要一个图表，但是，克里斯，你父亲认为拉里会回来。
english: No, I don't want a diagram, but, Chris, your father thinks Larry's coming back.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F031
chinese: 你娶了他的女儿，你就宣布他死了。现在你知道你父亲会发生什么吗？我不知道。
english: You marry his girl, and you're pronouncing him dead.  Now what's going to happen to your father, do you know?  I don't.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M031
chinese: 好的，那么，妈妈。
english: All right, then, Mom.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F032
chinese: 请再仔细考虑一下。
english: Give it some more thought.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M032
chinese: 我已经思考了三年。希望到现在他不会这样做。你能忘记拉里吗，我们可以举行一场普通的婚礼，让每个人都开心。但这在这里是不可能的，我已经准备好离开了。
english: I've given it three years of thought.  And hope by now that he wouldn't.  Can you forget about Larry an-- and we can have a regular wedding and have everybody be happy.  But that can't happen here, I'm set to get out.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F033
chinese: 这是什么鬼东西？
english: What the hell is this?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M033
chinese: 我会离开。我会结婚，去别的地方生活。也许，也许是纽约？
english: I'll get out. I'll get married and live some place else.  Maybe, maybe New York?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F034
chinese: 你疯了吗？
english: Are you crazy?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M034
chinese: 我做了个好儿子太久了，一个大傻瓜。我已经厌倦了。
english: I've been a good son for too long, a big sucker.  I'm through with it.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F035
chinese: 等一下。告诉我这个。你是不是要说你要离开这个生意？
english: Wait a minute.  Tell me this.  Do you mean to say that you would leave the business?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M035
chinese: 这个生意？这个生意？它没有激发我的灵感？
english: The business?  The business?  It doesn't inspire me?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F036
chinese: 你必须被激励吗？
english: Must you be inspired?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M036
chinese: 是的！我每天喜欢花一个小时在这上面。如果我整天都得为钱而奔波，我喜欢回到一个美丽的家。我想要一个家庭。我想要-我想要孩子。我想要建立一些我可以全身心投入的东西，而安妮就是其中心脏，那么我在哪里找到它呢？
english: Yes!  I like it an hour a day.  If I had to grub for money all day long, I like to come home to something beautiful.  I want a family.  I want- I want kids.  I want to build something I can give myself to. and Annie is in the center of that, and now where do I find it?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F037
chinese: 不要这样想！不要那样想！
english: Don't- you, you can't think like that!  Don't think like that!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M037
chinese: 那么帮助我留在这里。
english: Then help me stay here.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F038
chinese: 好吧！但是不要那样想，因为我的意思是，克里斯，我们做了这一切到底是为了什么？整个事情都是为了你！整个计划都是为了你！
english: All right!  But don't think like that, because I mean, what the hell did we do all this for, Chris?  The whole business it's all for you!  The whole shooting match is for you!

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M038
chinese: 我知道，妈妈。我知道。只要你帮我留在这里。
english: I know that Mom. I know.  Just you help me stay here.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F039
chinese: 好的，但不要这样想。
english: All right, but don't think like that.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M039
chinese: 我是这样想的。
english: I am thinking like that.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F040
chinese: 我不明白你的意思，对吗？
english: I don't understand you, do I?

name: Ses05F_script01_1_M040
chinese: 不，你不是。我是一个相当强硬的人。
english: No.  You don't.  I'm a pretty tough guy.

name: Ses05F_script01_1_F041
chinese: 是的，我能看到。
english: Yeah, I can see that.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M000
chinese: 噢，天啊。我不知道该怎么办了。就像我说的那样--
english: Uh, God.  I don't know what to do anymore.  Like I said --

name: Ses05M_impro04_F000
chinese: 你是什么意思？
english: What do you mean?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M001
chinese: 我不知道。对我来说，外面没有什么东西。我找不到工作。我已经一年、三年没有找到工作了。是吧，三年了吧？我一直没有能够找到工作。
english: I don't know.  There's nothing for me out there.  I can't get a job.  I haven't gotten a job in a year, three years.  What is it, three years now; right? That I haven't been able to have a job.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F001
chinese: 真的吗？已经这么久了吗？
english: Really? It's been that long?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M002
chinese: 像那样的东西。我甚至都记不起来了。我不知道该怎么办了。我每天都出去——嗯，不是每天，几乎每天。
english: Something like that.  I can't even remember anymore. I don't know what to do anymore.  I just get out there everyday -- well, not everyday, almost everyday.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F002
chinese: 哇。
english: Wow.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M003
chinese: 并尝试做些什么。我的意思是-
english: And try to do something. I mean-

name: Ses05M_impro04_F003
chinese: 你一直在尝试什么？
english: What have you been trying?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M004
chinese: 好的，一切都可以。我会做临时工，你知道，办公室工作。你知道，为了支付账单，无论什么工作我都愿意做。
english: Well, everything.  I'll do temping, you know, office work.  You know, whatever to pay the bills.  You know, I'll do anything.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M005
chinese: 但是，我的意思是，我不想保留那些工作。我不想要那些工作。这不是我想做的。
english: But, I mean, I don't want to keep those jobs.  I don't want those jobs.It's not what I want to do.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F004
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M006
chinese: 但是，我不知道。天啊，我该怎么办？我应该回学校吗？我不能-我负担不起回学校的费用。
english: But, I don't know.  God, what am I going to do?  Should I go back to school?  I can't- I can't afford to go back to school.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M007
chinese: 你做什么工作？
english: What do you do?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F005
chinese: 嗯，我的意思是，现在我只是做一点点各种各样的事情。而且我不认为我处于像职业或事业导向的地方。
english: Well, I mean, right now I'm just doing a little bit of everything.  And I don't- I don't think that I'm in like a profession, like career oriented place.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M008
chinese: 你打算永远在那里吗？我的意思是，你打算做什么--
english: You plan on being there forever? I mean, Like, what do you --

name: Ses05M_impro04_F006
chinese: 不，我只是在餐馆工作之类的地方。但是，我也在尝试参加试镜之类的事情。所以，这就是...
english: No.  I'm just working in restaurants and stuff. But, I'm also trying to audition and what not.  So, it's --

name: Ses05M_impro04_M009
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M010
chinese: 正确的。
english: right.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M011
chinese: 是的，是的。嗨，你好。我也在找工作。但是我找不到餐厅的工作。我找不到——餐厅的工作机会。没有人愿意给我任何东西。
english: Yeah, yeah.  Well, hello.  That's what I'm doing too.  But I can't get the restaurant job.  I can't get -- -- the restaurant gig.  No one will give me anything.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F007
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M012
chinese: 我参加这些面试，它们都很不错，你知道的。他们很友善，我也对他们友善，你知道的，互相给予，来来回回，无论如何。
english: I go in for these interviews, and they're all cool and everything, you know.  Their nice and I'm nice to them, you know, give and take, back and forth, and whatever.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M013
chinese: 但是他们总是和别人一起去。
english: But they always go with somebody else.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F008
chinese: 洛杉矶真的很难。我的意思是，你试过去酒吧几次，和那里的员工交朋友吗？
english: L.A. is really hard.  I mean, have you tried like just going into a bar a couple of times to make friends with people who work there? and

name: Ses05M_impro04_M014
chinese: 是的，绝对的。喂？你认识我。我经常去酒吧。就像，他们都认识我，你知道的。但是没有人愿意雇佣我。
english: Yeah, absolutely.  Hello?  You know me.  I go to bars all the time.  Like, they all know me, you know.  But no one wants to hire me.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M015
chinese: 但是也许他们不想雇佣我是因为他们认识我。我不知道，我有什么问题，是我有什么问题吗？
english: but Maybe they don't want to hire me because they know me. I don't know, what's wrong with me, Is there something wrong with me?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F009
chinese: 我刚要说的是那是你的问题。也许你过于深入了。不，我的意思是，只是
english: I was just going to say that's your issue. Maybe you are going in too much. No, I mean, just

name: Ses05M_impro04_F010
chinese: 你每晚都要去酒吧吗？
english: are you going into the bars every night?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M016
chinese: 我是说，你可以告诉我什么。为什么没有人雇佣我？是因为我吗？请坦诚。你可以告诉我。你知道我能承受得住。你只要告诉我。为什么？
english: I mean, You can tell me what.  Why is no one hiring me?  Is it me?  Be honest.  You can tell me. you know I can take it.  I can take it, you just tell me. Why?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F011
chinese: 嗯，我真的不知道。我不知道在工作环境中认识你，所以。
english: Well, I don't really know.  I don't I don't know you in like a job situation, so.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M017
chinese: 是的，但是我--好吧，那么就从个性上来说呢？我的意思是，了解我的人不会雇佣我。为什么？
english: Yeah, but I'm -- okay, well how about personality wise?  I mean, people who know me won't hire me.  Why?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F012
chinese: 哇。我是说，你在工作时有态度问题吗？
english: Wow.  I don't -- I mean, do you- do you have an attitude problem when you're on the job?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M018
chinese: 我不认为我在工作时有态度问题，不，我现在有态度问题是因为我没有工作。
english: I don't think I have an attitude problem when I'm on the job, no- I have an attitude problem right now because I don't have a job.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F013
chinese: 也许【垃圾】。
english: Maybe [garbage].

name: Ses05M_impro04_F014
chinese: 没错。也许你有一点点粗鲁的氛围或者什么的。
english: Right.  Maybe you have, like, you know a little bit of an abrasive vibe or something.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M019
chinese: 一种粗糙的氛围？
english: An abrasive vibe?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F015
chinese: 我不知道。我只是在尝试--
english: I don't know.  I'm I'm just trying --

name: Ses05M_impro04_M020
chinese: 让我知道那个没问题。你认为我有一种粗鲁的氛围，随你便。当然，你有权发表自己的意见。也许这就是为什么我没有工作的原因。
english: Let me know that's -- that's fine.  You think I have an abrasive vibe, whatever.  You're entitled to your opinion, of course.  Maybe that's why I don't have a job.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F016
chinese: 你是在变得防御性吗？
english: Are you getting defensive?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M021
chinese: 不，我没有变得防御。我没有变得防御。不。我问了你一个问题，你告诉了我。什么？
english: No.  I'm not getting defensive.  I'm not getting defensive.  No. I asked you a question, you told me.  What?

name: Ses05M_impro04_F017
chinese: 是的。这可能是你想要看的东西。我的意思是 -
english: Yeah.  That might be something you want to look at.  I mean --

name: Ses05M_impro04_M022
chinese: 我并不是一直都这样。我的意思是，我不是这样的人——我只是现在很沮丧，好吗。我只是想做一些——
english: I'm not like this all the time.  I mean, I don't -- I'm just frustrated right now, all right.  I just want to do --

name: Ses05M_impro04_F018
chinese: 好的。
english: Okay.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M023
chinese: 我想赚点钱。我需要赚点钱。我得支付一些账单，我欠别人钱。我欠很多人钱。我需要赚点钱。
english: I want to make some money.  I need to make some money.  I've got to pay some bills, I owe people money.  I owe lots of people money.  I need to make some money.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F019
chinese: 我理解。
english: I understand.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F020
chinese: 是的，这很有压力。我意识到了。
english: Yeah, it's stressful.  I recognize that.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M024
chinese: 你有任何想法我怎样可以赚钱吗？我的意思是，我可以做些什么来快速赚钱，有什么办法吗？任何相对合法的方式都可以。
english: Do you have any idea how I can make money?  I mean, what can I do to make some quick money, something?  Anything, that's relatively within the you know law.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F021
chinese: 啊。
english: ah.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F022
chinese: 不- 不卖大麻，对吗？
english: Not- Not selling pot, right?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M025
chinese: 对，可能不会卖大麻。我不想进监狱。
english: Right, probably not selling pot. I don't want to go to jail.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F023
chinese: 好的，那么。
english: Okay so.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F024
chinese: 好吧。
english: Fair enough.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M026
chinese: 因为那对我来说真的是锦上添花。
english: Because that would just really be a topper for me.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F025
chinese: 是的。【笑声】这是个笑话。
english: Yeah.  [LAUGHTER] It's a joke.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M027
chinese: 谢谢你。哈哈。
english: Thank you.  Ha ha.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F026
chinese: 对不起。那么，让我们看看。还有什么？有什么可用的吗？什么？嗯。嗯。
english: Sorry.  So, let's see.  What else?  What's available? What? Um.  Hmm.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M028
chinese: 看到我说的了吗？你甚至什么都想不出来。
english: See what I mean?  You can't even think of anything.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F027
chinese: 嗯，不是立刻能想到的。只需要一分钟。但是你有什么特殊技能吗？
english: Well, not off the top of head.  It will just take you know take a minute.  But do you have any, like, special skills?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M029
chinese: 我会杂耍。
english: I can juggle.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F028
chinese: 好的，也许我们可以找到一些关于杂耍的东西给你。
english: Well, maybe we can find you something with juggling.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M030
chinese: 我已经尝试过了。
english: I've tried.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F029
chinese: 你有没有查看过克雷格名单和其他东西？
english: Have you checked out Craig's List and stuff?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M031
chinese: 是的！没有人想要一个杂耍者。我不会去-我不会像小丑一样打扮。我不会像一个该死的小丑一样打扮。不。
english: Yes!  Nobody wants a juggler.  I am not going to -- I'm not going to dress up like a clown. I'm not going to dress up like a freaking clown. No.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F030
chinese: 如果你做儿童派对怎么样？哦，别这样。
english: What if you do kids parties? oh, come on.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M032
chinese: 不，这是贬低人的行为。我不是个小丑。我有才华。小丑没有才华。
english: No, it's demeaning.  I am not a clown.  I have talent.  Clowns don't have talent.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F031
chinese: 好的。没问题。
english: Okay.  All right.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M033
chinese: 就是这么简单。
english: It's that simple.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F032
chinese: 好的。嗯，好吧。我们不会-我不会和你争论这个。
english: Okay.  Well, fine. we won't- I won't argue with you about that.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M034
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F033
chinese: 还有什么？我不行了 - 呃。我脑子一片空白。
english: What else?  I can't -- uh.  I'm drawing a blank here.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M035
chinese: 你和我都一样。
english: You and me both.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F034
chinese: 那很艰难。我真的很抱歉，Ryan。
english: That's rough.  I'm really sorry, Ryan.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M036
chinese: 是的，生活很糟糕。
english: Yeah, life sucks.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F035
chinese: 嗯，嗯，这是你在参加这些工作面试时让人们看到的一面吗？
english: Well, um, is that kinda like the side of you that you let people see when you go into these job interviews?

name: Ses05M_impro04_M037
chinese: 不，我只是为你展示了那个[垃圾]。
english: No, I just showed that for you [garbage].

name: Ses05M_impro04_F036
chinese: 好的。嗯，那很好。是的，我的意思是，当你开心的时候，你是一个很有亲和力的人。而且我不- 我不
english: Okay.  Well, that's good.  Yeah, I mean, you're you're- when you're happy you're a pretty personable guy.  And I don't --I don't

name: Ses05M_impro04_M038
chinese: 我喜欢这样想。
english: I like to think so.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F037
chinese: 我看不出问题出在哪里。所以
english: I can't see where the issue would be. so

name: Ses05M_impro04_M039
chinese: 看见。
english: see.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M040
chinese: 是的，谢谢你的帮助。
english: Yeah, well thanks for your help.

name: Ses05M_impro04_F038
chinese: 对不起。祝你好运，伙计。
english: I'm sorry.  Good luck, man.

name: Ses05M_impro04_M041
chinese: 我会需要它。
english: I'll need it.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？他们应该在午夜左右开始跑。哦，这太棒了，不是吗？看看我们这里的夜景。再好不过了。实际上，我想去海岸线上再往上走一点，远离所有的灯光和人群。不过我担心我们可能会错过，所以你怎么样？
english: What time is it?  They're supposed to run around midnight.  Oh, this is great, isn't it?  Look at the night we've got here.  It couldn't be better.  Actually, I wanted to go a little further up the coast you know to get away from all the lights and the people.  I was afraid we might miss it though, so how are you doing?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M001
chinese: 那是什么？那是-等等，那是泡沫吗？我甚至都分辨不出来。哦，实际上，如果我分辨不出来，那可能不是泡沫，对吗？它可能会非常明显，你觉得呢？
english: What's that? Is that- Wait, is that foam?  I can't even tell.  Oh Actually, I guess if I can't tell then it probably isn't it, is it?  It will probably be unmistakable, don't you think?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M002
chinese: 这太棒了。你好吗？哦，不。哦，你知道我做了什么吗？我忘记带手电筒了。我怎么会这么愚蠢？我忘记带手电筒了。
english: This is great.  How are you doing?  Oh, no.  Oh, do you know what I did?  I forgot the flashlight.  How could I be so stupid?  I forgot the flashlight.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M003
chinese: 手电筒。那个银色的。只有一个，对吧？愚蠢。
english: The flashlight.  The silver one.  There's only one, isn't there?  Stupid.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F002
chinese: 你是指我们的手电筒吗？
english: You mean our flashlight?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M004
chinese: 好的-
english: Well-

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F003
chinese: 我的意思是，你一直在说我的手电筒，就好像它只属于你一样。这样会让我感觉怎么样？
english: I mean, you kept saying my flashlight, the flashlight like it was only somehow yours.  How is that supposed to make me feel?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M005
chinese: 哦，不，当然，我们的手电筒。我的手电筒是给你的手电筒，当然。
english: Oh, no, of course, our flashlight.  Me flashlight is to you flashlight, naturally.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M006
chinese: 我们怎么会忘记它呢？嗯，我希望月亮能一直出来。我想知道，他们是否总是在满月时奔跑？我记不清了，去年月亮是满月吗，你记得吗？
english: How could we have forgotten it? Well, I hope the moon stays out.  I wonder, do they always run during a full moon?  I can't remember, was the moon full last year, do you remember?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F004
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M007
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？我们应该带毯子，我们的毯子。哦，太棒了。我甚至没有想到带一箱啤酒。哦，现在正好需要一箱啤酒。
english: Are you cold?  Do you want my jacket?  We should have brought the blanket, our blanket.  Oh, this is great.  I didn't even think to bring a six pack.  Oh, a six pack would be just the ticket right about now.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M008
chinese: 我简直不敢相信我忘了。我就像个小孩子一样。我很惊讶我居然能够穿好裤子离开家。哦，[笑声]
english: I can't believe I forgot.I'm like a little kid.  I'm surprised I made it out of the house with my fly zipped. Oh, [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M009
chinese: 哦，我想知道他们是否能听到我，或者当我们在沙子上移动时是否能感受到震动。或者其他什么。
english: Oh, I wonder if they can hear me or if they can feel the vibrations when we move around in the sand. or something

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F005
chinese: 我冷。
english: I'm cold.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M010
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: Do you want my jacket?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F006
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了。我们就回家吧。
english: It's after eleven.  Let's just go home.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M011
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们刚到这里，我们会错过它的。如果我们只是转身回家，那来这么远有什么意义呢？
english: Are you kidding?  We just got here, we'd miss it.  What's the point of coming all the way out here if we're just going to turn around and go home?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F007
chinese: 在这里出来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming out here.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M012
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F008
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M013
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point, too.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那么，让我们走吧。
english: So let's go.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M014
chinese: 哦，不，不，不。不，那不是我的观点。我的观点是，如果我们只是要离开，那出来这里有什么意义呢？难道你不想看吗？
english: Oh, no, no, no.  no That's not my point.  My point is what's the point coming out here if we're just going to leave?  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F010
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M015
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F011
chinese: 我就是不愿意。
english: I just don't.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M016
chinese: 哦
english: Oh

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F012
chinese: 这很愚蠢。
english: it's stupid.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M017
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。我的意思是，这种事情每年只发生一次。这是一个很好的机会。
english: Honey, it's a natural phenomenon.  I mean, this kind of thing only happens once a year.  It's a great opportunity.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M018
chinese: 我是说，想想堪萨斯的人们，他们得买飞机票和酒店预订才能来看这个。而我们只有四十分钟的路程。这是一个太好的机会，不容错过。
english: I mean, Think about people in Kansas, they've got to get like you know plane tickets and hotel reservations just to see this.  We're just forty minutes away.  It's just too good of an opportunity to pass up.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F013
chinese: 过什么？这只是一些小鱼，它们游到海滩上，扑腾着，然后游走，然后死掉。
english: Pass what up?  It's It's just little fish and they swim up on the beach and they flop around and they swim away and then they die.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M019
chinese: 是的，但是在海滩上度过的所有时间是他们小小生命中的亮点。你知道的，
english: Yeah, but all that time on the beach is the highlight of their little lives.  You know,

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M020
chinese: 关于蹦来蹦去的那一切，就像下蛋或者你在做什么——产卵或交配之类的。
english: and all that about flopping around, it's like laying eggs or what do you -- spawning or mating or something like that.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M021
chinese: 我是说，对于这些人来说，这是一个重要的夜晚。你知道的，生命的最后狂欢。
english: I mean, this is a big night for these guys.  You know, life's last orgy.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋。这不是火箭科学，只是鱼而已。连没人吃的鱼。
english: What are you so excited about.  This isn't rocket science, this is just fish.  Fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M022
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah, they do.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F015
chinese: 奥吉。
english: Augie.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M023
chinese: 好的。但是它们是一种其他鱼类所没有的鱼。就像燕子飞往卡皮斯特拉诺或旅鼠跳下悬崖一样，你知道的，就像那样。这里有魔力和神秘。还有一点无法解释的东西。你知道的，我不明白你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: All right.  But they are fish that do something no other fish do.  Like the swallows were turning into Capistrano or Lemmings jumping off the cliffs, you know like that. There's- There's magic here and mystery.  And a little bit of the unexplainable.  You know, I can't see how you could not be interested.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F016
chinese: 我只是不行。
english: I'm just not.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M024
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F017
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M025
chinese: 我不明白。我的意思是，第一次我们来的时候，你说那是你一生中最美好的夜晚。而去年，我清楚地记得你对来这里非常兴奋，以至于你在推我出门时脚趾头被撞到门上，直到上车后你才注意到。
english: I don't get it.  I mean, the first time we came you said it was the best night of your life. And last year I remember distinctly you were so excited about coming that you stubbed your toe toe pushing me out the door and you didn't even notice until you got in the car.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F018
chinese: 嗯，如果你还记得去年我们-我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，我们吵了一架，你喉咙疼，而且我们没看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Well, if you also remember last year we- our shoes got wet, I got sand in my panties, we had a big argument, you had a sore throat, and we didn't see the grunion.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M026
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F019
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M027
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。这个位置要好得多。我对这些事情有很强的感觉。
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  This is a much better spot.  I've got a great sense for these things.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M028
chinese: 看那里。那是什么？那是——哦不，那是海草。
english: Look there.  What is that?  Is that -- Oh No, that's seaweed.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M029
chinese: 哦，这太棒了。我绝对不会错过这个机会。我的意思是，想想这个，我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请花一秒钟思考一下；
english: Oh, this is great.  I wouldn't miss this for the world. I mean, think about this, I know you're not interested but just think about this for a second;

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M030
chinese: 在某个地方，有一群巨大的银鱼正在朝着这个方向游动。他们不知道为什么这样做。我们也不知道为什么他们这样做。这不是一个决定。没有人进行投票。没有人给他们发邀请函或地图之类的东西。这只是一个内部的定时炸药引爆了。然后他们一起转身，排成了一条与加利福尼亚海岸线一样长的巨大队伍，然后他们就开始游泳了。他们现在正在这个时刻游泳。而且，而且-
english: somewhere out there is a giant mass of silver fish all swimming in this direction.  They don't know why they're doing it.  We don't know why they're doing it.  They didn't- It wasn't a decision.  No one took a vote.  Nobody sent them an invitation or a map or anything like that.  It was just some internal time release fire cracker that went off. And all as one they turned around and formed this giant line as long as the California coastline and they just started swimming.  They are swimming right now at this very moment.   And And-

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M031
chinese: 而且它是没有思想的单一目标。它-它的紧迫感，它的纯粹冲动。我的意思是，它们没有做出任何决定。它们不会提出任何问题。它们不给它一个名字。
english: And it's single mindedness with no mind. It- It's urgency, it's pure urge.  I mean, they didn't make any decisions.  They don't ask any questions.  They don't give it a name,

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M032
chinese: 他们突然转身，开始朝着我们现在站立的这个地方游过来，为了最后一次的性与死亡的庆祝。天啊，这让我起鸡皮疙瘩。看看所有竖起来的毛发。
english: they just all as one turn around and start swimming to this very point where we are standing now for one last celebration of sex and death. God, it's giving me Goosebumps.  Look at all the hairs that are standing up.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_F020
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses05M_script02_1_M033
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, so what do you think?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F000
chinese: 好的，所以有个重要的消息。
english: Okay, so big news.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M000
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05F_impro03_M001
chinese: 来吧，什么？
english: Come on, what?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F001
chinese: 我要结婚了。
english: I'm getting married.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M002
chinese: 闭嘴。
english: Shut up.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F002
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M003
chinese: 没门。
english: No way.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F003
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M004
chinese: 他问你？
english: He asked you?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F004
chinese: 嗯嗯。
english: Uh-huh.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M005
chinese: 没门，什么时候？什么时候，什么时候，它是什么时候发生的？
english: No way, when? when,when, When did it happen?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F005
chinese: 就在几天前。
english: Just a couple days ago.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M006
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh my gosh.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F006
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M007
chinese: 你居然答应了。我简直不敢相信。我从来没想过你会结婚。
english: And you actually said yes.  I can't believe it.  I never thought you would get married.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F007
chinese: 我也不知道自己。
english: I know me neither.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M008
chinese: 哦，我的天。
english: Oh my gosh.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F008
chinese: 没错，我也以为我会更年长一些。我以为我至少会三十多岁。
english: Right, I thought I would be way older too. I thought I would be I be at least thirty something.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M009
chinese: 哦，当然。
english: Oh absolutely.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M010
chinese: 嗯，我们总是说我们会在三十岁时结婚。如果到那时我们还没有找到其他人结婚，我们就会互相结婚。
english: Well, we always said we'd be in our thirtieth when we got married. And we were going to get married to each other if we didn't by then

name: Ses05F_impro03_F009
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F010
chinese: 我知道，对吧。我们在三十九岁的时候说了什么？
english: I know, right. What'd we say, when we were thirty nine?

name: Ses05F_impro03_M011
chinese: 三十九岁，是的。我简直不敢相信。所以你违背了我们的约定。非常感谢你。
english: Thirty nine, yeah.  I can't believe it.  So you broke our pact. Thanks a lot.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F011
chinese: 对不起。
english: Sorry.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M012
chinese: 非常感谢。好吧，好的，你得告诉我细节。他说了什么？在哪里？发生了什么？
english: Thanks a lot.  Well, okay, you've got to tell me the details.  What did he say?  Where was it?  What happened?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F012
chinese: 嗯，嗯，嗯，我不知道他做了多少计划。
english: Um, Well, uh, I don't-I don't know how much planning he had done.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M013
chinese: 好的。没问题， spontaneity很棒。 spontaneity很棒。
english: Okay.  That's okay, spontaneous is great.  Spontaneous is awesome.

name: Ses05F_impro03_FXX0
chinese: 实际上，但是--
english: Actually, but--

name: Ses05F_impro03_F013
chinese: 真的很美。
english: It was really beautiful.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M014
chinese: 你一定会喜欢那个的。
english: You've got to love that.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F014
chinese: 是的，我们去了一场非常棒的爵士音乐会，嗯-
english: Yeah, we went to a really great jazz show, and um-

name: Ses05F_impro03_M015
chinese: 很好，你喜欢爵士乐。
english: Nice, you love the jazz.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F015
chinese: 是的，然后我们去了一个像餐厅一样在屋顶上的地方。
english: Yeah, and after, we went up to this um, this place like a restaurant on the roof kind of thing.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M016
chinese: 哦，好的，是的。
english: Oh, okay, yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F016
chinese: 所以你知道，晚餐晚些时候，还有香槟和其他的东西。
english: So you know like late dinner and champagne and what not.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M017
chinese: 你在芝加哥吗？
english: Were you in Chicago?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F017
chinese: 嗯。
english: Mm-hmm.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M018
chinese: 市中心，它漂亮吗？当然漂亮。
english: Downtown, was it beautiful? of course it was beautiful

name: Ses05F_impro03_FXX1
chinese: 是的--
english: yeah--

name: Ses05F_impro03_F018
chinese: 如此美丽，满月。
english: so beautiful, full moon.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M019
chinese: 真是个家伙。我简直不敢相信。那好吧，你知道任何细节吗？什么时候举行？有什么消息吗？
english: What a guy.  I can't believe it.  So okay, so do you know any details?  When's it going to be?  Anything?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F019
chinese: 我不知道。我猜是下个夏天。
english: I don't know.  I guess next summer.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M020
chinese: 我在里面吗？
english: Am I in it?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F020
chinese: 是的。是的，当然。
english: Yeah.  Yeah, of course.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M021
chinese: 好的，我当然希望如此，当然。
english: Okay, I certainly hope so, of course.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F021
chinese: 那么，我猜下个秋天吧。
english: So next fall I guess.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M022
chinese: 下一个秋天。
english: Next fall.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F022
chinese: 是的，我喜欢秋天。
english: Yeah, I like the autumn.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M023
chinese: 你打算在城里做还是在外地？
english: Are you going to do it in town or are you out of town?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F023
chinese: 哦，我们会在城里做这件事。
english: oh, We'll do it in town.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M024
chinese: 哦，好的。
english: Oh, okay.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F024
chinese: 是的，他的家人住得不远，所以我想-
english: Yeah, his family doesn't live too far away, so I think-

name: Ses05F_impro03_M025
chinese: 是的，他是从哪里来的？
english: Yeah, where's he from again?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F025
chinese: 他也来自芝加哥。
english: He's from Chicago as well.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M026
chinese: 哦，他是的，好的。
english: Oh he is, okay.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F026
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M027
chinese: 酷，完美。又一个芝加哥人，一定要喜欢它。
english: Cool, perfect.  Another Chicagoite, got to love it.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F027
chinese: 太奇怪了，对吧，就像你可以和某人在一起长大，却直到你离开几百英里远才真正了解他们。
english: It's so weird too, right, that like you can grow up so near somebody and never know them until you travel hundreds of miles away.

name: Ses05F_impro03_MXX0
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M028
chinese: 没错，是的。我简直不敢相信你在非洲见到了他。
english: Exactly, yeah.  I can't believe you met him in Africa.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F028
chinese: 我知道
english: I know

name: Ses05F_impro03_M029
chinese: 而且机会呢，遇到在非洲的某人然后回到芝加哥的机会有多大？
english: And the chances, what are the chances of meeting somebody in Africa and then coming back to Chicago?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F029
chinese: 对，就像哦，你来自哪里？美国。在美国哪里？芝加哥。在芝加哥的哪里？
english: Right, being like oh, where are you from?  The U.S.  Where in the U.S.?  Chicago.  Where in Chicago?

name: Ses05F_impro03_M030
chinese: [笑声] 我是sil
english: [LAUGHTER] I am sil

name: Ses05F_impro03_F030
chinese: 了解这个社区。是的，它相当奇怪。
english: Knowing the neighborhood.  Yeah, it's pretty bizarre.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M031
chinese: 现在你要结婚了。
english: And now you're getting married.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F031
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M032
chinese: 那太棒了。你一定很兴奋。你告诉你妈妈了吗？
english: That is amazing.  You must be so excited.  Did you tell your mom?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F032
chinese: 嗯。
english: Mm-hmm.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M033
chinese: 哦，她哭了吗？
english: Oh, did she cry?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F033
chinese: 是的，她爱他。
english: Yeah, she loves him.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M034
chinese: 我知道的。我知道的，当然她会喜欢。你怎么可能不喜欢和平队工作人员先生呢？他是最好的人。
english: I knew it.  I knew it, of course she does.  How could you not love Mr. Peace Corps worker man?  He's the nicest guy ever.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F034
chinese: 是的，是的，那就是我的类型。
english: Yeah, she-yeah, that's my type.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M035
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M036
chinese: 你...我简直不敢相信。我为你感到非常高兴。这正是你想要的。这是你的梦想成真。
english: you.. I can't believe it.  I'm so happy for you.  This is exactly what you wanted.  It's your dream come true.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F035
chinese: 谢谢你。
english: Thank you.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M037
chinese: 这个人非常合适，我完全赞同。他是一个很棒的人。我们度过了很愉快的时光。他能喝酒。太棒了。
english: The exact right guy, I fully approve.  He's a wonderful guy.  We have a great time.  He can drink.  That's awesome.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F036
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M038
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_F037
chinese: 是的，我们现在都要出去玩。
english: Yeah, we all have to hang out now.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M039
chinese: 当然，当然她会……当然她会。是的，在他们结婚后，不要像其他人一样消失，我再也见不到他们。那会让我生气。你不想让我生气。你知道我生气时会变成什么样子。
english: Of course, of course she will ... of course she will.  Yeah, don't go and disappear like everyone else after they get married and I never see them again.  That'll make me mad.  You don't want to make me mad.  You know how I get when I get mad.

name: Ses05F_impro03_FXX2
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_impro03_FXX3
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F038
chinese: 我的意思是，如果没有其他人出现，我对我将要嫁给的那个人有一些责任。
english: I mean, I I have I have some duty to the man I was going to marry if nobody else came up.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M040
chinese: 准确的。
english: Exactly.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M041
chinese: 确切地说，"笑"。
english: Exactly, "laugh".

name: Ses05F_impro03_F039
chinese: 对不起。
english: Sorry.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M042
chinese: 啊，我一直担心你会有点嫉妒我，但我从来没有那么幸运。
english: ahh I was always worried you'd be a little bit jealous of me, but I was never quite that lucky.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F040
chinese: 还有时间做那件事。
english: There's still time for that.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M043
chinese: 哦，谢谢。在你结婚之前搬到这里来吧 [笑声]
english: Oh, thanks. move here before you get married [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_F041
chinese: [呼吸]
english: [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M044
chinese: 完美，好，不错。 "叹气"
english: Perfect, okay, good. "sigh"

name: Ses05F_impro03_M045
chinese: 我那么不难过了。嗯，我为你感到兴奋。
english: I don't feel so bad then.  Well, I'm excited for you.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F042
chinese: 我知道。我简直不敢相信。
english: I know. I can't believe it.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M046
chinese: 我简直不敢相信。
english: I can't believe it.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F043
chinese: 我非常兴奋
english: I am very excited

name: Ses05F_impro03_M047
chinese: 你还告诉了谁？
english: Who else have you told?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F044
chinese: 只是一些人。
english: Just a few people.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M048
chinese: 真的吗？
english: Really?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F045
chinese: 目前只是亲密的朋友。
english: Just close friends so far.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M049
chinese: 所以我是第一个之一？这让我感到非常重要。
english: So I was one of the first ones? That makes me feel so important.

name: Ses05F_impro03_FXX3
chinese: 是的。
english: Yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F046
chinese: 我现在必须考虑搬家。我们要一起搬家。
english: I have to think about moving now.  We're going to move in together

name: Ses05F_impro03_M050
chinese: 哦，是的，当然。
english: Oh yeah, of course.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F047
chinese: 我认为在结婚之前一起生活是个好主意。
english: I think it's a good idea to live together before you get married.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M051
chinese: 我也这么认为。你打算买房子还是-
english: I think so, too.  Are you going to get a house or-

name: Ses05F_impro03_F048
chinese: 我不想要一座房子，我是说只是-
english: I don't want a house, I mean just-

name: Ses05F_impro03_M052
chinese: 不是吗？
english: No?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F049
chinese: 洛杉矶的公寓很好。
english: L.A. apartment is fine.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M053
chinese: 哦，好的。
english: Oh, nice.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F050
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M054
chinese: 一个好的公寓。 [呼吸]
english: A good apartment. [BREATHING]

name: Ses05F_impro03_F051
chinese: 两个艺术家，虽然。我们注定会永远贫穷。
english: Two artists, though.  We're bound to be poor forever.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M055
chinese: 是的，你打算如何生存下去？
english: Yeah, how are you going to survive?

name: Ses05F_impro03_M056
chinese: 没错。你打算要孩子吗？
english: Exactly. Are you going to have kids?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F052
chinese: 是的，我这么认为。我的意思是，暂时不会。
english: Yeah, I think so.  I mean, not for a while.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M057
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M058
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F053
chinese: 绝对不会很快。
english: Definitely not for a while

name: Ses05F_impro03_F054
chinese: 是的。
english: yeah.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M059
chinese: 所以现在，我将不得不找其他人来生我的孩子。
english: So now, I'm going to have to find somebody else to bear my children.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F055
chinese: [笑声] 祝你好运。
english: [LAUGHTER] Good luck.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M060
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M061
chinese: 哦，谢谢。我会需要它的。
english: Oh, thanks.  I'll need it.

name: Ses05F_impro03_F056
chinese: 你不会有麻烦，你不会有麻烦。
english: You won't have trouble, You won't have trouble.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M062
chinese: 哦，谢谢，你太好了。
english: Oh thanks, you're too nice

name: Ses05F_impro03_M063
chinese: 只是现在很客气
english: just being polite now

name: Ses05F_impro03_F057
chinese: 你应该就像那样接近她。嘿，你愿意生我的孩子吗？
english: You should just approach her like that.  Hey, will you bear my children?

name: Ses05F_impro03_M064
chinese: 因为我不结婚。
english: because I am not getting married.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M065
chinese: 没错，[笑声] 我觉得这会非常受欢迎，你觉得呢？
english: Exactly, [LAUGHTER] I think that'll go over great, don't you?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F058
chinese: 是的，完全正确。
english: Yeah, totally.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M066
chinese: 这就是女孩喜欢的，对吗？
english: That's what girls like, right?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F059
chinese: 总共打开。
english: Total turn on.

name: Ses05F_impro03_M067
chinese: 你介意为我弄几个出来吗？
english: Would you mind popping out a few for me?

name: Ses05F_impro03_F060
chinese: [笑声]
english: [LAUGHTER]

name: Ses05F_impro03_M068
chinese: 那太好了，谢谢。
english: That'd be great, thanks.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M000
chinese: 好了，那么呢？你怎么想？
english: Well, so?  What do you think?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F000
chinese: 关于什么？
english: About what?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M001
chinese: 我刚才说的是什么。
english: What I was just saying.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F001
chinese: 这太荒谬了。
english: It's ridiculous.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M002
chinese: 这绝对不是科学事实。它稍微夸张了一点。
english: It certainly is not. It's slightly exaggerated scientific fact.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F002
chinese: 这是公关，有人向你兜售了一个美妙的活动将在海滩上举行的虚假信息。
english: It's PR, somebody sold you a bill of goods that this wonderful event is going to occur on the beach.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M003
chinese: 我不是唯一一个，看看这些人。
english: I am not the only one, look at all these people.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F003
chinese: 是的，他们都被告知同样的事情。他们都被告知你知道的事情。这让他们兴奋不已，他们迫不及待地等待着，如果他们能够在正确的位置上加入，那么也许生活就会开始。
english: Yeah, they are all told the same thing.  They are all told that you know.  Gets them excited and they can't wait and that if they just get in on the right spot, than you than maybe life will start

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M004
chinese: 我们在谈论同一件事吗？
english: Are we talking about the same thing?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F004
chinese: 对不起。对我来说只是鱼而已。
english: I am sorry.  It's just fish to me.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M005
chinese: 卡拉，我可以问你一个问题吗？现在不要生气，你正在经期吗？
english: Carla, can I ask you a question?  Now don't be upset, are you having a period?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F005
chinese: 该死，奥吉。你为什么总是问这样的问题？这太侮辱人了。
english: God damn it, Augie.  Why do you always ask things like that?  It's so insulting.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M006
chinese: 你有什么烦恼？
english: What's bugging you?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F006
chinese: 我对今晚的情景有一个不同的想法。
english: I just had a different idea of what this evening is going to look like.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M007
chinese: 没什么了不起的。我们来到这里。沙鲷到达并进行它们的小鱼事。然后我们说，哇，看那些小鱼。他们回家，我们也回家。
english: There's nothing to it.  We come down here.  The grunion arrives and they do their little fish thing.  And we say, Oh, wow.  Look at the little fish.  They go home, we go home.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F007
chinese: 天哪，Augie，长大点吧，我们不会去看grunions的。
english: For heaven's sake Augie, grow up we are not going to see the grunions.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M008
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F008
chinese: 我们从来没有做过。我们曾经吗？我们从来没有。
english: We never do.  Have we ever?  We never have.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M009
chinese: 我们错过了他们两次，这永远不会发生。
english: We miss them twice, it's not ever.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F009
chinese: 两次是我们每次尝试的时候，那就是永远。
english: Twice is every time we tried, that's ever.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M010
chinese: 好的，我们今年会见到他们。
english: Well We will see them this year.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F010
chinese: 不，我们不会。奥吉，这就像等待圣诞老人的到来一样。我感觉自己将会一辈子站在海滩上，眼睛睁得大大的，双手期待地紧握在我面前，等待鱼儿的出现，但鱼儿却不会出现。
english: No, we won't.  Augie it's like waiting for Santa Claus to come.  I feel like I am going to spend my entire life standing on the beach with my eyes wide open and my hands clasp expectantly in front of me waiting for the fish to show up and the fish will not show up.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M011
chinese: 我以为你想看它。
english: I thought you wanted to see it.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F011
chinese: 我做了，我确实想看。我一直都想看，奥吉。
english: I did, I do want to see it.  I always want to see it, Augie.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M012
chinese: 这只是鱼而已，没有什么需要受到创伤的。
english: It's just fish, it's nothing to get traumatize over.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F012
chinese: 求求你，这不是关于鱼的事。
english: For heaven's sake, this is not about fish.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M013
chinese: 好的，我一直在试图逆向思考，但似乎无法确定我们何时走向了最糟糕的地方。
english: Okay, I been trying to work this backwards but I can't seem to pinpoint a moment when we took a turn for the worst here.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M014
chinese: 当你和玛吉通电话时，一切都很好。晚餐还可以。洗碗也没问题。让我想想，我洗了个澡，你在看新闻，你说今晚有鱼群出现，我说，太好了，我们去吧，我感觉很幸运。
english: When you are on the phone with Marge, everything was fine.  Dinner was okay.  Doing the dishes was no problem. Let's see, I took a shower and you were watching the news and you said the grunions are running tonight and I said, great, let's go I am feeling lucky.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M015
chinese: 好的，所以我正在穿上我的夹克，把动物放起来，把车从车库里开出来。
english: Right, so I am putting on my jacket and putting up the animals and pulling the car out of the garage.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F013
chinese: 奥吉，你还记得我们第一次来看它的时候吗？那是大约四年前，就在我们结婚后不久，我们以为我怀孕了。
english: Augie, do you remember the first time we came to see it?  It was about four years ago right after we got married and we thought I was pregnant.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F014
chinese: 我们有一瓶香槟，但没有杯子，你让我跳舞，所以我们脱掉鞋子，当我们跳舞时，你在我耳边说了最亲密的话，我能感受到它们，也能听到它们。
english: We had a bottle of champagne but no glasses and you ask me to dance so we took off our shoes and while we were dancing, you said the most intimate things right in my ears so I could feel them as much as hear them.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F015
chinese: 我记得当时想着，终于，终于。我像应该的那样快乐。
english: And I remember thinking, Finally, finally.  I am as happy as I am supposed to be.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M016
chinese: 等一下，我明白了。
english: Wait a minute, I got it.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F016
chinese: 在沙滩上赤脚跳舞，从瓶子里喝香槟。
english: Dancing barefoot in the sand, drinking champagne from the bottle.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M017
chinese: 是在车里，对吧？当我们经过Knickerbocker Liquor Locker时，你说，我们去买点香槟吧。然后我说浪费时间之类的。对吧？当然。
english: It was in the car, right?  When we were passing Knickerbocker Liquor Locker, you said, Let's get some champagne.  And I said time wasting or something like that.  Right? of course.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F017
chinese: 我宁愿不记得一些事情。我宁愿不对一些事情抱有希望。
english: I rather not remember some things.  I rather not hope for some things.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M018
chinese: 好的，没问题，我明白了。你希望它像上次那样，好的，没问题。听着，你想跳舞吗？
english: Okay, all right I got it.  You wanted it to be like the other time, okay no problem. Listen, You want to dance?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F018
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M019
chinese: 你想让我去拿一些香槟吗？
english: You want me to go get some champagne?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F019
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M020
chinese: 脱掉我们的鞋子吗？
english: Take off our shoes?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F020
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M021
chinese: 你想让我在你耳边低声说什么？
english: What, you want me to whisper in your ear?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F021
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M022
chinese: 你想再次结婚吗？
english: You want to get married again?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F022
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M023
chinese: 什么？你想要离婚吗？
english: What? What You want a divorce?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F023
chinese: 不，不。
english: No no.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M024
chinese: 一个假期？一块新地毯，一只贵宾犬？一袋冰淇淋，一个自杀包，卡拉，你到底想要什么？
english: A vacation? A new carpet, a poodle?  A bag of ice cream, a suicide pack, what what Carla?  What the hell do you want?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_FXX0
chinese: 不。
english: No.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F024
chinese: 我希望事情能按照预期的方式发展。
english: I want something to turn out the way it is suppose to turn out.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M025
chinese: 什么。欢迎来到人类世界。
english: What.  Welcome to the human race.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M026
chinese: 你认为这就是我心中所想的吗？你认为当我求婚时，我有这样一个美好的幻想，四年后我们会在海滩上争吵着鱼。你认为我知道会有时候你会像看待用过的纸巾一样看着我吗？或者我会看着你，心想着，天哪，下一班去阿拉斯加的飞机是什么时候。
english: You think this is what I had in mind?  You think that when I propose I had this great fantasy going that four years down the road, we will end up on a beach arguing over fish. You think that I knew that there would be times when you will look at me like I am used Kleenex?  Or that I will look at you and think, holy hell what's the next flight to Alaska.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M027
chinese: 不，不，我就像你一样，我以为一切都会是桃子和玫瑰，沙子在我们的脚趾间，风在我们的头发中，鱼儿总是会来的。账单会自动支付，我们会有三个胖乎乎的可爱孩子，我们会过上幸福的生活，哈哈，宝贝，这个笑话是对我们的。
english: No, no I was just like you, I thought it will be all peaches and roses and- and sand in our toes and wind in our hair and the fish will always come. And the bills will always magically pay themselves and we will have three fat rosy kids and we will be, HAHA baby the joke is on us.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M028
chinese: 因为你知道吗，卡拉？你知道你得到了什么吗？就是这个。
english: Because you know what Carla?  You know what you get?  This.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F025
chinese: 这是什么？这是什么？这甚至什么都不是。
english: This what?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M029
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes it is.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F026
chinese: 当然，这是站立。这是等待。这是战斗。
english: Sure, this is standing.  This is waiting.  This is fighting.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M030
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F027
chinese: 但这与我想象的完全不同。
english: But this isn't anything like I thought it would be.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M031
chinese: 不，我也认识我自己。
english: No, I know me either.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F028
chinese: 我的意思是，就是这样，我的意思是它包括很多和一切，你知道它是沙子，是满月，我只是-对不起，但我忍不住希望我在别的地方。
english: I mean it is just this , I mean it includes a lot and everything and you know it's the sand and it's the full moon and I just-I am sorry but I couldn't help wishing I was somewhere else.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M032
chinese: 也许如果你也和其他人在一起的话？
english: Maybe if you are with somebody else too?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F029
chinese: 我没有说那个。
english: I didn't say that.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M033
chinese: 不，我知道，但是。我知道我不能让你快乐。
english: No, I know, but.  I know I don't make you happy.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F030
chinese: 天哪，Augie，无论我在哪里，我总是想和你在一起。
english: For heaven's sake Augie, wherever I am I always wanted to be with you.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M034
chinese: 是的？
english: Yeah?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F031
chinese: 天哪，难道你不知道吗？
english: For heaven's sake, don't you know that?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F032
chinese: 无论我在做什么，我都想和你在一起。我的意思是你可能是那个希望和别人在一起的人，一个不会把一切都看得那么重的人，一个知道如何享受自己的人。
english: Whatever I am doing, I wanted to be with you.  I mean you are probably the one who wishes you were with somebody else, somebody who didn't take everything so hard and who knows how to enjoy herself.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M035
chinese: 实际上，既然你提到了，不，我不会。
english: Actually, now that you mention it.  No, I don't.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F033
chinese: 好的。也许我们在错误的地方，但我们和正确的人在一起。
english: Good.  So maybe we are on the wrong spot but we are with the right person.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M036
chinese: 我不知道。对我来说，这个地方看起来相当不错，我是说你从这里看到的月亮景色。
english: I don't know.  Seems like a pretty good spot to me I mean look at the view of the moon you got from here.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F034
chinese: 是的，我确实注意到了。它在水上看起来非常美丽。那是金白色的月亮。
english: Yes, I did notice that.  It does look really beautiful on the water.  The gold white moon.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M037
chinese: 嗯，看看我们这里有什么。
english: Well, look what we have got here.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F035
chinese: 奥吉，你买了点心。
english: Augie, you bought refreshments.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M038
chinese: 好吧，这不是香槟。
english: Well, it's not champagne.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F036
chinese: 好吧，那我们就不需要眼镜了。
english: Well than we don't need glasses.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M039
chinese: 你还冷吗？你还想回家吗？
english: Are you still cold?  You still want to go home?

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F037
chinese: 不，我开始觉得也许这就是那个地方。
english: No, I am beginning to think that maybe this is the spot after all.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M040
chinese: 嘘，如果我们非常安静，鱼可能会过来。
english: Shh, If we're very quiet, the fish might come.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_F038
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses05F_script02_2_M041
chinese: 或者不。
english: Or not.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M000
chinese: 现在几点了？难道不应该在午夜开始运行吗？这太棒了，不是吗？看看我们这里的美好夜晚。再好不过了--
english: What time is it?  Isn't it supposed to start running around midnight?  This is great, isn't it?  Look at this great night we got here.  Couldn't be better--

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M001
chinese: 实际上，我希望沿着海岸线再往前走一点，远离灯光和人群，但我担心会错过。你好吗？
english: actually I was hoping to go a little bit further up the coast to get away from the lights and the people but I was afraid I will miss it.  How are you doing?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F000
chinese: 好的。
english: Fine.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M002
chinese: 那是-不，不，不，那是泡沫吗？我甚至都分辨不出来，虽然如果我-如果我分辨不出来，那可能不是泡沫吧？对吧，它可能会很明显，但你不觉得吗？你好吗？
english: Is that--no, no no is that foam?  I can't even tell, although if I- if I can't tell, it probably isn't it?  Right It'll probably be unmistakable, but don't you think?  How you doing?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M003
chinese: 哦不，你知道我做了什么。我忘记带手电筒了。我怎么会这么愚蠢呢？我简直不敢相信我忘记带手电筒了。
english: Oh no, you know what I did.  I forgot my flashlight.  How could I be so stupid?  I can't believe I forgot my flashlight.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F001
chinese: 什么手电筒？
english: What flashlight?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M004
chinese: 手电筒，那个银色的，只有一个，对吗？
english: The flashlight, the silver one, there's only one, isn't there?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F002
chinese: 这不是你的手电筒。
english: It's not your flashlight.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M005
chinese: 它是谁的？
english: Whose is it?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F003
chinese: 这是我们的-我们的手电筒。这是你的和我的。
english: It's ours- our flashlight.  It's yours and mine.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M006
chinese: 好的，当然。
english: Well, Sure.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F004
chinese: 我的意思是你一直在说“我的手电筒”，好像它只属于你一样。这样会让我有什么感觉？
english: I mean you keep saying ,my flashlight, as if it's somehow just yours.  How's that suppose to make me feel?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M007
chinese: 不，当然，你是对的。我们的手电筒。我的手电筒就是你的手电筒，当然。我们怎么会不想带它呢？
english: No, Of course, you are right.  Our flashlight.  Me flashlight is you flashlight naturally.  How can we not think to bring it?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M008
chinese: 嗯，我希望月亮能继续出来。嗯，我想知道他们在满月期间是否总是漫游？我记不清了，去年是满月吗？你记得吗？
english: Well, I hope the moon stays out.  Well, I wonder do they always wander during a full moon?  I can't remember, wasn't it full last year?  Do you remember?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F005
chinese: 是的。
english: yes.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M009
chinese: 你冷吗？你想要我的夹克吗？我们应该买一条毯子。我们的毯子……这太棒了，不是吗？
english: Are you cold?  You want my jacket?  We should have bought a blanket.  Our blanket-.  This is great, isn't it?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M010
chinese: 我甚至没有想到带一打啤酒。现在正好需要一打啤酒。我简直不敢相信我忘了。看看孩子，我很惊讶我能带他出门。
english: I didn't even think to bring a six-pack.  A six-pack would be just the thing right about now. I can't believe I forgot.  And look at kid, I am surprise I make it out of the house about flies it.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M011
chinese: [笑声] 我想知道他们是否能听到我说话，或者当我们在沙滩上移动时是否能感受到震动。
english: [LAUGHTER] I wonder if they can hear me talk or if they can feel the vibration in the sand when we are moving around

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F006
chinese: 我冷。
english: I am cold.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M012
chinese: 你想要我的夹克吗？
english: you want my jacket?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F007
chinese: 现在已经过了十一点了，我们回家吧。
english: It's after eleven, let's go home.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M013
chinese: 你在开玩笑吗？我们会错过它的。我们刚到这里，如果我们只是要离开的话，出来这里有什么意义呢？
english: Are you kidding?  We'd miss it. We just got here, what's the point of coming out here if we are just going to leave.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F008
chinese: 在这里出来没有意义。
english: There is no point in coming out here.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M014
chinese: 正确。
english: Right.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F009
chinese: 那是我的观点。
english: That's my point.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M015
chinese: 那也是我的观点。
english: That's my point too.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F010
chinese: 那么，让我们走吧。
english: So let's go.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M016
chinese: 不，不，不。那不是我的观点。我的观点是如果我们只是转身回家，那下来这里有什么意义。你不想看看吗？
english: No, no, no.  That's not my point.  My point is what's the point in coming down here if we are just going to turn around and go home.  Don't you want to see it?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F011
chinese: 不是特别的。
english: Not particularly.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M017
chinese: 为什么不呢？
english: Why not?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F012
chinese: 我就是不愿意。
english: I just don't.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M018
chinese: 亲爱的，这是一个自然现象。我的意思是，这种情况每年只发生一次。这是一个很好的机会。
english: Honey, this is a natural phenomenon. I mean,  It happens like once a year.  It's a great opportunity.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M019
chinese: 想想堪萨斯州的人们，他们必须预订飞机和酒店才能来看这个，但我们只需要40分钟的路程。太好了，不容错过。
english: Think about people in Kansas, they have to get a- a plane reservation and a hotel reservation just to see this uh- but we are just forty minutes away.  Too good to pass up.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F013
chinese: 放弃什么？这只是小鱼，它们在海滩上待一个月，翻来覆去地游来游去，然后它们死去。
english: Pass up what?  Its little fish, one month on the beach and they flop around and they swim away and then they die.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M020
chinese: 是的，但是海滩上的那一刻是他们小小生命中的亮点，所有那些翻滚都是在产卵或者你知道的，交配或者产卵或者类似的事情。
english: Yeah but that moment on the beach is the highlight of their little lives, all that flopping around is laying eggs or what you- mating or spawning or something like that.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M021
chinese: 这对这些人来说是个重要的夜晚。生命的最后狂欢。是的。
english: This is a big night for these guys.  Life's last orgy. Yeah

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F014
chinese: 你为什么这么兴奋？我的意思是，我们谈论的不是火箭科学，而是鱼。而且是没人吃的鱼。
english: What are you so excited about?  I mean it's not--it's not rocket science we are talking about, its fish.  Its fish nobody even eats.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M022
chinese: 是的，他们确实这样做。
english: Yeah they do.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_FXX0
chinese: 奥吉。
english: Augie.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M023
chinese: 好的，但它们是一种其他鱼类所没有的特殊行为。就像燕子返回卡皮斯特拉诺一样，或者像旅鼠跳下悬崖那样。
english: Okay, but they are fish that do something that no other fish do.  Like the swallows returning to Capistrano, or the lemmings jumping off a cliff you know like that.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M024
chinese: 这里有一些神秘和魔力。有一点无法解释的东西。我无法理解你怎么可能不感兴趣。
english: There's There's mystery here and magic.  A little bit of the unexplainable.  I can't understand how you could not be interested.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F015
chinese: 我只是不是。
english: I am just not.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M025
chinese: 真的吗？
english: For real?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F016
chinese: 是的。
english: Yes.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M026
chinese: 我不明白，第一次我们来到这里时，你说这是你一生中最美好的夜晚，去年我清楚地记得你非常兴奋，以至于你踩到我的脚把我推出门外，直到上车后你才注意到。
english: I don't get it, the first time we came out here, you said it was the best night of your life and last year I remember distinctly you were so excited that you stuff your toe pushing me out of the door and you didn't notice it until you got into the car.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F017
chinese: 去年你也记得，我们的鞋子湿了，我内裤里进了沙子，我们还发生了一场大争吵。你喉咙痛，我们没有看到沙鳗鱼。
english: Last year you also remember, our shoes got wet and I got sand in my panties and we got into a big fight.  You had a sore throat and we did not see the grunions.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M027
chinese: 我们不在一个好的位置。
english: We weren't in a good spot.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F018
chinese: 我们第一次也没有看到他们。
english: We didn't see them the first time either.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M028
chinese: 我们只是不在一个好的位置。这个位置要好得多。我对这些事情有很强的直觉。
english: We just weren't in a good spot.  This is a much better spot.  I got a great instinct for these things.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M029
chinese: 看那里，那是什么？是吗？那是一根海藻，不是吗？
english: Look there, what's that?  Is it?  Is that a--Ah, it's a seaweed isn't it?

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M030
chinese: 哦，这太棒了。我不会错过这个机会。我是说想想这个。我知道你对此不感兴趣，但请花一秒钟思考一下。
english: Oh, this is great.  I wouldn't miss this for the world.  I mean think about this. I know you are not interested but think about this for a second.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M031
chinese: 在某个地方，有一群巨大的银鱼正在朝着这个方向游动。他们不知道为什么，我们也不知道为什么。他们没有收到邀请。这不是一个投票，也不是一个决定。没有人给他们发送地图或类似的东西。
english: Somewhere out there, is a giant mass of silver fish all swimming in this direction.  They don't know why and we don't know why. They didn't get an invitation.  And it wasn't a vote- it wasn't a decision.  And nobody sent them a map or anything like that.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M032
chinese: 这只是一些内在的时间释放爆竹，它在他们内部爆炸，然后他们转过身来，排成一条长达加利福尼亚海岸的队伍，开始游泳。
english: It's just some little instinctual time-release firecracker that went off inside them and all this one they turn around and form a line as long as the California coast and just started swimming.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M033
chinese: 他们现在正在游泳，仿佛这是唯一重要的事情。这是一种没有思想的单一目标，纯粹的迫切感。他们不知道是什么驱使着他们。他们不给任何名字，也不问任何问题。他们只是一起转身，开始向我们现在站立的地方游去，为了一场关于性和死亡的盛大庆典。天啊，这让我胳膊上的鸡皮疙瘩都起来了。
english: They are swimming right now as if it's the only thing that matters.  It's- It's single mindedness with no mind, urgency that's pure urge. It's- They don't know what drives them.  They- They don't give any name or ask any question. They just turn as one and started to swim to the very point we are standing right now for a massive celebration of sex and death.  God, it's giving me goose bumps all over my hairs on my arm. popping up.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_F019
chinese: 那是风。
english: That's the wind.

name: Ses05F_script02_1_M034
chinese: 嗯，那么你认为怎么样？
english: Well, So what do you think?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M000
chinese: 想想看，那个流氓的真正原因是彼得·伯登。
english: Come to think of it the real cause of that roue was Peter Burden.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F000
chinese: 哦，你知道那里什么都没有。
english: Oh You knew there was nothing in that.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M001
chinese: 我对这种事情一无所知。你接受了他的礼物。
english: I knew nothing of the sort.  You accepted presents from him.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F001
chinese: 只是一个微不足道的小胸针。
english: Only a trivial little broach.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M002
chinese: 我记得很清楚，它被钻石覆盖着，而且品味非常糟糕。
english: I remember it well, covered in diamonds and the worst possible taste.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F002
chinese: 一点也不。我非常喜欢它。我经常穿它。
english: Not at all.  I quite like it.  I wear it often.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M003
chinese: 你特意为了折磨我而去纠缠彼得·伯登。
english: You went out of your way to torture me over Peter Burden.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F003
chinese: [垃圾]，不，我没有。你在嫉妒的想象中把整件事情都编造出来了。
english: [garbage], No, I didn't.  You worked the whole thing up in your jealous imagination.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M004
chinese: 你必须承认他爱上了你，是吗？
english: You must admit that he was in love with you. wasn't he?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F004
chinese: 哦，可能有一点点。没有什么严重的。
english: Oh, maybe a little.  Nothing serious.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M005
chinese: 他让他亲吻你。你说你做了。
english: He let him kiss you.  You said you did.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F005
chinese: 好吧，那又怎样。
english: Well, what of it.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M006
chinese: 怎么了？
english: what of it?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F006
chinese: 好吧，这给了他很多快乐，而且对我没有伤害。
english: Well it gave him a lot of pleasure and it didn't hurt me.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M007
chinese: 关于我呢？
english: What about me?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F007
chinese: 嗯，如果你不那么好奇和多疑，你就永远不会知道这件事。
english: Well, if you hadn't been so nosey and suspicious you never would have known about it.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M008
chinese: 嗯，我必须说这是一个很好的观点。
english: Well, that's a nice point of view I must say.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F008
chinese: 我对这个对话感到非常无聊。
english: I'm getting very bored with this conversation.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M009
chinese: 我也是，无聊得要死。
english: Me, too, bored stiff.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M010
chinese: 你想要一些白兰地吗？
english: Do you want some brandy?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F009
chinese: 不，谢谢。
english: No thanks.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M011
chinese: 我想我会点一点。
english: I think I'll have a little.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F010
chinese: 我不明白你为什么要它；你已经喝了两杯了。
english: I don't see why you want it; you've already had two glasses.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M012
chinese: 没有特别的原因。此外，他们是小孩子。
english: No particular reason.  Besides, they were little ones.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F011
chinese: 嗯，继续这样做似乎很愚蠢。
english: Well, it seems silly to go on and on with such a thing.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M013
chinese: 你几乎可以说-你几乎可以说整个晚上只喝三小杯白兰地。
english: You can hardly say- You can hardly call three little liquor glasses of brandy for the entire evening going on and on.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F012
chinese: 这已经成为你的习惯了。
english: It's becoming a habit with you.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M014
chinese: 你不必因为此刻不需要我而摆出这么高傲的姿态。
english: You needn't be so grand simply because you don't happen to want me at the moment.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F013
chinese: 不要傻。
english: Don't be stupid.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M015
chinese: 阿曼达，真的吗。
english: Amanda, really.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F014
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M016
chinese: 什么都没有。亲爱的，你要出去吗？
english: Nothing.  Are you going out somewhere, darling?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F015
chinese: 只是为了让自己对你有吸引力。
english: Just making myself fascinating for you.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M017
chinese: 嗯，那个回答刚刚伤透了我的心。
english: Um- Well, that reply has just broken my heart.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F016
chinese: 这是一个女人的工作来吸引男人。请你看一下我，好吗？
english: It's a woman's job to allure the man.  Watch me a moment, won't you?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M018
chinese: 哦，事实上，那是完全正确的。
english: Oh, as a matter of fact, that's perfectly true.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F017
chinese: 不，不是的。
english: No, it isn't.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M019
chinese: 是的，是的。
english: Yes, it is.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F018
chinese: 不，不是的，请安静。
english: No, it it is not, be quiet.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M020
chinese: 很遗憾你没有多喝一点白兰地。这可能会让你少一点不愉快。
english: It's a pity you didn't have a little bit more brandy.  It might have made you a little less disagreeable.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F019
chinese: 嗯，它似乎对你没有产生太大的奇迹。
english: hum, It doesn't seem to have worked such wonders with you.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M021
chinese: 哦，啪嗒，啪嗒，啪嗒。就像一条小蛇一样。
english: oh, Snap, snap, snap.  Like a little Adder.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F020
chinese: 加法器不会咬人，它们会刺人。
english: Adders don't snap, they sting.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M022
chinese: 胡说八道，他们在牙齿后面有一小袋毒液，他们会咬人！
english: Nonsense, they've got a little bag of venom behind their fangs and they snap!

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F021
chinese: 它们刺人。
english: They sting.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M023
chinese: 他们咔嗒一声。
english: They snap.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F022
chinese: 好的，我不在乎他们像箍圈一样滚动和吠叫，好吗？
english: Okay, I don't care if they roll about like hoops and bark, okay?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M024
chinese: 那么，离婚后你见到Peter Burden多吗？
english: So, did you see much of Peter Burden after the divorce?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F023
chinese: 是的，我做了很多。
english: Yes, I did quite a lot.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M025
chinese: 你一定让他亲吻你更多了，是吗？
english: You must have let him kiss you quite a good deal more then, huh?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F024
chinese: [笑声] 管好你自己的事。
english: [LAUGHTER] Mind your own business.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M026
chinese: 我确定你度过了一个狂欢的时光，毫无约束，非常愉快。你本来就没有太多束缚。
english: I'm sure you had a riotous time, no restrain at all, very enjoyable.  You never had much anyway.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F025
chinese: 你真是让人受不了。我想这是因为你喝醉了。
english: You're quite insufferable.  I do imagine it's because you're drunk.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M027
chinese: 我一点儿也没有喝醉。
english: I am not the slightest bit drunk.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F026
chinese: 你一直都有一个脑袋不好的问题。
english: You always had a weak head.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M028
chinese: 我确实相信我已经说过了，整个晚上我只喝了三杯白兰地的迷你酒杯。一个两岁的孩子也不会因此而醉。
english: I do believe that I have said already that I had three minuet liquor glasses of brandy in the entire evening.  A child of two couldn't get drunk of that.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F027
chinese: 哦，不，相反，一个两岁的孩子只喝一杯就会醉得厉害。
english: Oh, no on the contrary, a child of two could get violently drunk on only one glass.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M029
chinese: 哦，真的吗？三岁的孩子呢？六岁的孩子呢？九岁的孩子呢？
english: Oh, really?  How about a child of three, or child of six, what about a child of nine?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F028
chinese: 不要- 你能闭嘴吗。
english: Not- Would you shut up.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M030
chinese: 你知道，我们可以就这个问题展开一场非常好的辩论。你知道，这是不懂事的孩子们。
english: You know, we could get a really good debate going on about this.  You know intemperate tots.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F029
chinese: 亲爱的，你不太好笑。你最好再喝点白兰地。
