english: You're not very funny, dear.  You better have some more brandy.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M031
chinese: 你知道吗？那是一个非常好的主意。我想我会这样做。
english: You know what?  That's a very good idea.  I think I will.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M032
chinese: 你最好把那个关掉，我觉得。
english: You better turn that off, I think.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F030
chinese: 为什么？
english: Why?

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M033
chinese: 因为现在已经很晚了，你会打扰到楼上的人。
english: Because it's very late and you'll disturb the people upstairs.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F031
chinese: 楼上没有人。这是一个摄影工作室。
english: There aren't any people upstairs.  It's a photography studio.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M034
chinese: 嗯，我想楼下有人。
english: Well, there are people downstairs, I suppose.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F032
chinese: 他们在突尼斯。
english: They're away in Tunis.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M035
chinese: 这不是突尼斯的时候。
english: This is no time of the year for Tunis.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F033
chinese: 请再次打开它。
english: Turn it on again, please.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M036
chinese: 我不会做这样的事情。
english: I do I shall do no such thing.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F034
chinese: 很好。如果你非得粗鲁和愚蠢的话。
english: Very well.  If you have to be boorish and idiotic.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M037

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M039

name: Ses05M_script03_2_M040

english: You are a vile tempered, wicked living, evil little beast.  And I hope I never set eyes on you ever again.

chinese: [垃圾] 不，你不是。

english: You are a cruel fiend and I-I loath you.  I thank God I realized who you are before I decided to marry you again.  Oh my God, never!

chinese: 野兽

english: You're a wicked little vampire.  And I pray to God I never set eyes on you again as long as I live.

name: Ses05M_script03_2_F043
chinese: 蛮力

name: Ses05M_impro08_M000

english: D.S.L. Extreme, can I help you?

english: Hi, I need- I need some help.  I've been transferred to, like, eight different departments and I've told my problem to every single department, and then they just send me to another one and say they are going to send all my information so I won't have to repeat it, and then that person doesn't know what's going on.  And I've restated my story about eight different times and I just want somebody to help me get my connection back, because this happens every two weeks.  And I want to know what to do to stop it from happening again.

chinese: 是的。

name: Ses05M_impro08_M003

chinese: 然后我会重置IP地址。我会像这样，你知道的，直接将调制解调器连接到我的电脑上，然后重置所有设置，然后再把路由器放回去。然后-
english: And I'll reset the IP address.  I will do like, you know, direct connect the modem to my computer, and then reset everything, and then put the router back in. And-

name: Ses05M_impro08_M004
chinese: 嗯。嗯。

name: Ses05M_impro08_F004

name: Ses05M_impro08_M006
chinese: 好的。嗯，我不知道。而且这种情况每两周都会发生？
english: Okay. Um-  Well, I don't know.  And it consistently happens every two weeks?

name: Ses05M_impro08_F006
chinese: 差不多，是的 - 我不知道是不是因为电话线路不好或其他原因。

name: Ses05M_impro08_MXX0
chinese: 好的。

chinese: 嗯，是的。

chinese: 好的。

name: Ses05M_impro08_F016
chinese: 好的。

english: It's set to zeros.  Okay, maybe that's our problem.  That could very well be our problem there.  Somehow you've lost your IP address.  I'm not sure why that would happen every week.  It could be a cycling issue, something like that.  But let's go ahead and type your IP address in again.

name: Ses05M_impro08_FXX0
chinese: 好的。

english: what happening - So if we reset this, how will I know it's not going to happen again every other week?

english: Oh, my God.  I can't even tell you how much of a relief that is.  I literally call and talk to five different people.  Like last week it went off and I spent an hour and a half on the phone with different people.  And I've been doing that like every, every other week for months now.

name: Ses05M_impro08_M022
chinese: 我完全理解。

name: Ses05M_impro08_F023

chinese: 当然。我只是不想再让这种事情发生在你身上了。

chinese: 这是什么？

chinese: 亲爱的，我得告诉你一件事。我刚接到一个电话。我要去伊拉克。
english: Sweetheart, I've got to tell you something.  I just got a call.  I'm going to Iraq.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F001
chinese: 什么？

name: Ses05M_impro02_M001
chinese: 我知道这个时机真的很糟糕，但我没有选择。

name: Ses05M_impro02_F002
chinese: 什么？不，你不能！

name: Ses05M_impro02_M002
chinese: 我知道。我必须走了。

name: Ses05M_impro02_M004

name: Ses05M_impro02_M005

english: I don't know what to do.  I'm - Sorry

name: Ses05M_impro02_M006
chinese: 我知道。

name: Ses05M_impro02_M007

name: Ses05M_impro02_M008
chinese: 我已经尝试了一切。我已经打电话给我认识的每个人。我已经尝试了一切。没有人能为我做任何事情，或者他们不愿意为我做任何事情。
english: I've tried everything.  I've called everyone I know.  I've tried everything. No one can do anything for me or they won't do anything for me.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F007

name: Ses05M_impro02_M009
chinese: 至少一年。
english: At least a year.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F008
chinese: 什么？
english: What?

name: Ses05M_impro02_M010
chinese: 我知道。
english: I know.

name: Ses05M_impro02_M011
chinese: 我不想--孩子们。你必须照顾他们。你必须-你必须-
english: I don't want to -- the kids.  You've got to take care of them.  You've got- you've got to-

name: Ses05M_impro02_M012
chinese: 告诉他们关于我，给他们看我的照片和一切类似的东西，因为他们将在很长一段时间内见不到我。这是如此重要的时刻，我不想错过。
english: tell them about me and show them pictures of me and everything like that, because they are not going to see me for such a long time.  And it's such an important time and I just don't want to miss it.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F009
chinese: 一定有我们可以做的事情。你不能就这样走。
english: There's got to be something we can do.  You can't just go.

name: Ses05M_impro02_MXX0
chinese: 我不知道该怎么办
english: I don't know what to-

name: Ses05M_impro02_M013
chinese: 我没有 - 我知道。我们要去哪里 - 我们要去哪里 - 只是逃跑吗？我能做什么？我们可以去哪里？
english: I don't have -- I know.  What are we gonna- What are we- just run away?  What can I do?  Where can we go?

name: Ses05M_impro02_F010
chinese: 为什么我们不这样做-我们可以吗-我们可以离开这个国家吗？
english: Why don't we do that- Can we- Can we just leave the country?

name: Ses05M_impro02_M014
chinese: 我们要去哪里？
english: Where are we gonna go?

name: Ses05M_impro02_M015
chinese: 我们要去哪里？
english: Where are we gonna go?

name: Ses05M_impro02_F011
chinese: 我不知道。

name: Ses05M_impro02_M016
chinese: 他们无论如何都会找到我。你知道他们会的。
english: They'll find me anyway.  You know they will.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F012
chinese: 如果他们在别处找到你，最糟糕的情况会是什么？
english: What would be the worst that would happen if they found you somewhere else?

name: Ses05M_impro02_M017

english: They'd put me in jail and then how long- when will I get to see the kids?  What, ten years?  I don't know.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F013

english: I know.  But I'll-I'll send the pictures all the time and I'll write them emails and you can read them the emails that I send them.

chinese: 你将会被派驻在哪里？你将会做什么？
english: Where are you gonna be stationed?  What are you gonna be doing?

english: I'm gonna be in Bagdad, just doing security.

name: Ses05M_impro02_F015
chinese: 你是要像坦克一样四处奔跑吗？我是说，那是什么意思？
english: Are you gonna be like in tanks running around?  What- I mean, what does that mean?

name: Ses05M_impro02_M020
chinese: 是的，这将是一切。我将在前面。我会--这不会安全。

name: Ses05M_impro02_F016
chinese: 哦，我的天。

name: Ses05M_impro02_M021
chinese: 我只是想对你诚实。我不想你。

chinese: 为什么你邀请她来这里？

english: How do you know why she's waited?

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F008
chinese: 因为她知道我知道的，所以她忠诚如磐石。在我最糟糕的时刻，我想到她在等待，我再次知道我是正确的。
english: Because she knows what I know, that's why.  She's faithful as a rock.  In my worst moments I think of her waiting and I know again that I'm right.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M008
chinese: 看，外面天气多么美好，我们为什么要争吵呢？
english: Look, it's a beautiful day outside, why are we arguing?

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F009
chinese: 在这个房子里，没有人敢夺走她的信仰，乔。陌生人可能会，但不是他的父亲，也不是他的兄弟。
english: Nobody in this house dares takes her faith away, Joe.  Strangers might, but not his father, not his brother.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M009
chinese: 好吧，你希望我对此做些什么？你想要什么？
english: Well, what do you want me to do about it?  What do you want?

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F010
chinese: 我希望你们假装他会回来。你们两个，别以为我没注意到你们和克里斯自从她来了以后的事情。我不想听到任何废话。
english: I want you to pretend like he's coming back.  Both of you, don't think I haven't noticed you and Chris since she's gotten here.  I don't want any nonsense.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M010
chinese: 但是凯特呢？
english: But Kate?

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F011
chinese: 不，因为如果她-他不回来，那我会自杀。笑！嘲笑我！
english: No, because if she- he's not coming back then I'll kill myself. Laugh!  Laugh at me!

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F012
chinese: 但是为什么她回来的那天晚上会发生这种事情呢？她睡在他的床上，他的纪念品碎成了碎片。看看它。
english: But why did that happen the very night she came back?  She goes to sleep in his bed and his memorial breaks in pieces.  Look at it.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M011
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F013
chinese: 和我一起相信，乔。我不能独自站立。
english: Believe with me, Joe.  I can't stand alone.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M012
chinese: 冷静下来。
english: Calm yourself.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F014
chinese: 仅仅上周，底特律出现了一个失踪时间比Larry还长的男人。你亲自读到了这个消息。
english: Only last week a man turned up in Detroit missing longer than Larry.  You read it yourself.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M013
chinese: 好的。好的。
english: All right.  All right.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F015
chinese: 你最重要的是要相信。
english: You above all have got to believe.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M014
chinese: 你是什么意思，我最重要吗？
english: What do you mean, me above all?

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F016
chinese: 只是不要停止相信。
english: Just don't stop believing.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M015
chinese: 这是什么意思，我最重要吗？看看你，你在发抖。
english: What's that suppose to mean, me above all?  Look at you, you're shaking.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_F017
chinese: 我无能为力。
english: I can't help it.

name: Ses05M_script01_2_M016
chinese: 我有什么需要隐藏的，凯特？你到底怎么了？
english: What have I got to hide, Kate?  What the hell is the matter with you?
